timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin ɗa na biyu a cikin yara 8 a Ajaccio na tsibirin Corsica.
Ya wuce Faransa tare da yayansa Joseph kuma ya shiga makarantar addini ta keɓance da gidajen ibada na Autun.
Ya shiga makarantar soja ta Brienne.
Ya shiga makarantar soja ta Paris.
Mahaifinsa Carlo ya mutu saboda ciwon daji na ciki (gastric cancer).
Ya ci jarrabawar zama jami'in bindigar yaki kuma aka nada shi a matsayin mukaddashin soja (second lieutenant) yana da shekaru 16.
Ya fara aiki a matsayin jami'in bindigar yaki a rundunar La Fère da ke Valence.
Lokacin da rundunar La Fère ta koma Auxonne, ya yi aiki a can.
Juyin juya halin Faransa ya barke.
Ya sami hutu kuma ya koma mahaifarsa Corsica.
An kashe Louis XVI.
Bayan bangaren Paoli ya tsare shi kuma aka washe gidansa da gonarsa, ya gudu daga Corsica tare da iyalinsa.
Ya sake kwace katangar L'Éguillette da Balaguier a Siege of Toulon don samun nasara, kuma an kara masa girma zuwa Brigadier General.
Juyin mulkin Thermidor ya faru kuma aka kashe kungiyar Robespierre.
An tsare shi saboda abotarsa da kani na Robespierre, Augustin, amma ba da dadewa ba aka sake shi.
Ya danne bore na masu goyon bayan sarauta da ya faru a Paris.
Ya auri Joséphine de Beauharnais.
An zabe shi a matsayin kwamandan rundunar yakin Italiya.
Ya mamaye Vienna, babban birnin Austria, kuma ya sanya hannu kan Yarjejeniyar Campo Formio.
Ya jagoranci sojoji kusan 50,000 don sauka a tashar jiragen ruwa ta Alexandria ta Masar, inda ya fara yakin Masar.
Rundunar sojan ruwa ta Faransa ta sha kashi a hannun rundunar sojan ruwan Birtaniya ta Horatio Nelson a yakin Aboukir Bay.
Ya tsere daga Masar kuma ya koma Faransa.
Ya gudanar da juyin mulkin Brumaire tare da Sieyès, mai iko na gwamnatin juyin juya hali.
Sabuwar tsarin mulki da ta kafa jakadu (consuls) guda uku an mika ta ga zaben raba gardama na kasa kuma aka amince da ita.
Rundunar yakin Faransa ta haye tuddan Saint-Bernard.
Ya sami nasara a Yakin Marengo da sojojin Austria.
Ya kafa Bankin Faransa domin tabbatar da daidaiton tattalin arziki.
Ya daidaita alaka da Amurka ta hanyar Yarjejeniyar Mortefontaine.
Ya cimma yarjejeniyar addini da siyasa (Concordat) da Paparoma Pius VII.
Ya tura runduna ta mutane 30,000 zuwa Haiti (Saint-Domingue) don kokarin sake mamaye yankin da dawo da bauta.
Ya sanya hannu kan Yarjejeniyar Amiens da Birtaniya, inda aka samu zaman lafiya bayan shekaru 10.
Ya kafa lambar yabo ta Légion d'honneur.
Ya zama Babban Consul na Har Abada (First Consul for Life) kuma ya karfafa ikon kama-karya.
Ya sayar da Louisiana ga Amurka a kan dalar Amurka miliyan 15.
An gano wata makarkashiyar kisan kai da Georges Cadoudal da masu goyon bayan dawo da masarautar Bourbon suka shirya don adawa da Napoleon.
Ya janye sojoji bayan ya bar shirin mamaye Haiti.
Haiti ta sami yancin kai a hukumance, inda ta zama jamhuriya ta farko ta bakaken fata.
An yanke shawarar kafa daular sarauta (Empire) ta hanyar zaben raba gardama na kasa.
Ya gudanar da bikin nadin sarauta a Cocin Notre-Dame, inda ya zama Napoleon I, sarki na farko na Daular Faransa.
Rundunar sojan ruwa ta Faransa ta sha kashi sosai a hannun rundunar sojan ruwan Birtaniya karkashin jagorancin Nelson a yakin Trafalgar.
Rundunar Faransa ta sami babban nasara a yakin Austerlitz, kuma Austria ta mika wuya ta hanyar sanya hannu kan Yarjejeniyar Pressburg.
Ya nada kaninsa Louis a matsayin sarkin Netherlands.
Ya doke sojojin Prussia a Yakin Jena-Auerstedt kuma ya shiga Berlin.
Ya ba da Dokar Berlin don kafa Tsarin Katange Nahiyar (Continental System).
Ya sanya hannu kan Yarjejeniyar Tilsit da Alexander I na Rasha.
Ya mamaye Portugal bayan ta karya Dokar Katange Nahiyar.
Ya mamaye Rome.
Mazauna birnin Madrid sun tayar da kayar baya ga sojojin Faransa.
Ya hade Daular Paparoma (Papal States) da kasarsa.
Bayan Paparoma ya sanar da korarsa daga coci (excommunication), ya kama shi kuma ya tsare shi a Savona.
Ya rabu da sarauniya Joséphine.
Ya sake auren Marie Louise, diyar Sarkin Austria Franz I.
Sweden ta taya Bernadotte, Marshal na Faransa, gadon sarautar Sweden na gaba.
Marie Louise ta haifi Napoleon II, Sarkin Rome.
Ya jagoranci sojoji 600,000 don kai hari a kasar Rasha.
Ya tilasta tura Paparoma zuwa Fontainebleau.
Rundunar Faransa ta yi nasara a wani babban yaki da aka yi kusa da Borodino.
Ya mamaye Moscow.
Rundunar Faransa ta janye daga Rasha.
Ya sanya hannu kan 'Concordat na Fontainebleau' da Paparoma Pius VII.
Ya sha kashi sosai a Yakin Leipzig bayan hadaddiyar rundunar sojoji ta kewaye shi ta kai masa hari.
Paris, babban birnin Faransa, ya fada hannun abokan gaba.
Bayan sanya hannu kan Yarjejeniyar Fontainebleau, an kora shi a matsayin mai mulkin tsibirin Elba.
Ya gudu daga tsibirin Elba.
Ya shiga Paris kuma ya sake zama Sarkin Faransa.
Ya sha kashi a Yakin Waterloo sakamakon harin hadin gwiwa na Birtaniya da Prussia, wanda ya kawo karshen mulkinsa na Kwanaki Dari (Hundred Days).
An tsare shi a tsibirin Saint Helena da ke Kudancin Tekun Atlantika.
Ya rasu da misalin karfe 5:49 na yamma.
An mayar da gawarwarsa Faransa kuma aka binne shi a Les Invalides da ke Paris.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Dokar Napoleon (Napoleon Code)
keyAchievements.description: A shekara ta 1804, ya kafa "Dokar Faransa ta Kasa" (Civil Code of the French), wato Dokar Napoleon, wadda ta yi tasiri sosai a kan dokokin kasa a duk fadin duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Ci gaban dabarun yaki da tsarin soja
keyAchievements.description: A fannin soja, ya yi tasiri har zuwa yakin zamani, kuma ya samar da ci gaba a fannoni kamar dabara, tsari, horo, kungiya, kayan yaki, tufafi, da tsarin bada kyaututtuka.

keyAchievements.title: Nasara a Siege of Toulon
keyAchievements.description: Bayan ya jagoranci nasara a Siege of Toulon a shekara ta 1793, an kara masa girma zuwa Brigadier General yana da shekaru 24 don zama janar.

keyAchievements.title: Nasarar Yakin Italiya
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi nasarar gudanar da yakin Italiya a shekara ta 1796, kuma ya ci gaba da samun nasarori a yakin farko na kawance da Faransa, wanda ya sa ya yi fice a matsayin soja.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Bankin Faransa
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa Bankin Faransa a shekara ta 1800 domin tabbatar da daidaiton tattalin arziki.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Lambar Yabo ta Légion d'honneur
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa shahararriyar lambar yabo ta Légion d'honneur a shekara ta 1802.

keyAchievements.title: Yarjejeniyar Addini da Siyasa (Concordat)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kulla yarjejeniya da Paparoma Pius VII a shekara ta 1801 domin sulhuntawa da Cocin Roman Katolika da kuma amincewa da mabiya addinin Furotesta.

keyAchievements.title: Tsarin Gyaran Birnin Paris
keyAchievements.description: Bayan ya zama sarki, ya kaddamar da manufofin zamanantar da birnin Paris, babban birnin Faransa, domin maida shi birni na farko a duniya.

faq.question: Shin tsayin Napoleon yana da gajarta a gaskiya?
faq.answer: A'a, tsayinsa na gaskiya ya kai 167-168cm, wanda ya fi matsakaicin tsayin sojojin Faransa na lokacin da ke da 164cm. An yada jita-jitar cewa yana da gajarta saboda bambancin ma'auni da kuma rikitarwa tsakaninsa da Napoleon III.

faq.question: Ta yaya Napoleon ya mutu?
faq.answer: Dalilin mutuwarsa na hukumance shi ne ciwon daji na ciki (gastric cancer), amma an samu sinadarin arsenic mai yawa a gashin kansa, wanda ya sa aka yi zargin cewa an kashe shi ta hynar guba.

faq.question: Shin Beethoven ya sadaukar da wakar nan ta "Hero" ga Napoleon?
faq.answer: Beethoven ya dauki Napoleon a matsayin gwarzo na jamhuriya kuma ya sanya wa wakarsa ta uku suna "Bonaparte," amma bayan Napoleon ya zama sarki, ya ji takaici ya fasa sadaukarwa gare shi kuma ya canza sunan wakar zuwa "Eroica" (Gwarzo).

faq.question: Daga me rugujewar Napoleon ta fara?
faq.answer: Rugujewarsa ta fara ne saboda karancin kayayyakin bukata na yau da kullum sakamakon Dokar Katange Nahiyar ta 1806, rashin nasarar mamaye yankin Iberian, da kuma gazawar yakin Rasha na 1812.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin ɗa na uku na Sarki Taejong da Sarauniya Wonnyeong a Junsu-bang na Hanseong.
Lokacin da yayansa Yanyangdaegun ya rasa mukamin yarima mai jiran gado, an nada shi a matsayin sabon yarima mai jiran gado.
Ya karbi sarauta daga Taejong kuma ya zama sarki na hudu na Joseon a Fadar Geunjeongjeon ta Gyeongbokgung.
Ya nada Yi Jong-mu a matsayin babban kwamandan yankuna uku don jagorantar jiragen yaki 227 da sojoji 17,000 don mamaye Tsibirin Tsushima (Daemado).
Ya kafa Jiphyeonjeon (Cibiyar Nazarin Manufofi) a cikin fada don gudanar da tsarin mulkin tsakiya.
An yaye Joseon daga aikawa da mata budurwoyi da zinari/azurfa a matsayin haraji ga Daular Ming.
Rundunar da Kim Jong-seo ya jagoranta ta fatattaki kabilar Jurchen a yankin Hamgyong kuma ta kafa sansanoni 6 (6 Jins) don bude yankunan arewa.
Ya ji tausayin talakawan da ba su iya koyon haruffan kasar Sin (Hanja) cikin sauki ba, don haka shi da kansa ya kirkiro haruffa 28.
Ya sanar da kaddamar da Hunminjeongeum wanda shi da kansa ya kirkiro.
Bayan rash인 lafiyarsa ta tsananta, ya koma gidan Yarima Yeongeung kuma ya rasu a can.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkiro Hunminjeongeum
keyAchievements.description: Ya kirkiro Hunminjeongeum, wani tsarin rubutu mai inganci da kimiyya wanda talakawa za su iya koya cikin sauki.

keyAchievements.title: Taimakawa ci gaban kimiyya da fasaha
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da cikakken goyon baya ga kirkirar abubuwa kamar Honcheoni (na'urar duba taurari), Angbuilgu (agogon rana), Jagyeokru (agogon ruwa), da Cheokugi (na'urar auna ruwan sama), kuma ya tallafa wa masana kamar Jang Yeong-sil da Choe Hae-san.

keyAchievements.title: Karfafa tsaron kasa
keyAchievements.description: Ya tura Yi Jong-mu don mamaye Tsushima, kuma ya tura Choe Yun-deok da Kim Jong-seo zuwa arewa don kafa yankuna 4 da sansanoni 6 (4 Guns da 6 Jins) domin fadada iyakoki.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa tsarin siyasa
keyAchievements.description: Ya nada Hwang Hui, Maeng Sa-seong, Yun Hoe, da Kim Jong-seo don gudanar da harkokin gwamnati, wanda ya zama farkon tsarin Uijeongbu Seosaje.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa tsarin haraji
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da dokoki kamar Jeonbunyukdeungbeop (raba fili gida 6) da Yeonbungudeungbeop (raba amfanin gona gida 9) don kafa tsarin harajin kasa na Joseon.

keyAchievements.title: Wallafa littattafai
keyAchievements.description: Ya wallafa littattafai a fannoni daban-daban kamar "Worinchongangjigok", "Yongbieocheonga", "Nongsajikseol", da "Goryeosa".

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Sarki Sejong Mai Girma?
faq.answer: An haifi Sejong a ranar 15 ga Mayu, 1397 (10 ga Afrilu a kalandar gargajiya) a Junsu-bang na Hanseong, a matsayin ɗa na uku na Sarki Taejong da Sarauniya Wonnyeong.

faq.question: Ta yaya Sarki Sejong Mai Girma ya hau kan gadon sarauta?
faq.answer: Bayan yayansa Yangnyengdaegun ya rasa mukamin yarima mai jiran gado, an nada shi yarima mai jiran gado, kuma ya hau karagar mulki a shekara ta 1418 bayan Taejong ya sauka daga mulki.

faq.question: Menene babban abin da Sarki Sejong Mai Girma ya cimma?
faq.answer: Babban abin da ya cimma shi ne kirkiro Hunminjeongeum, wani tsarin rubutu mai inganci da kimiyya wanda talakawa za su iya koya cikin sauki.

faq.question: Wane nasarori Sarki Sejong Mai Girma ya samu a fannin tsaron kasa?
faq.answer: Ya tura Yi Jong-mu don mamaye Tsushima, kuma ya tura Choe Yun-deok da Kim Jong-seo zuwa arewa don kafa yankuna 4 da sansanoni 6 domin fadada iyakoki.

faq.question: Yaushe Sarki Sejong Mai Girma ya rasu?
faq.answer: Sejong ya rasu a ranar 30 ga Maris, 1450 (17 ga Fabrairu a kalandar gargajiya).

timeline.event: An haife shi ga mahaifinsa Yesugei da mahaifiyarsa Hoelun a Deliun Boldog kusa da Kogin Onon.
An san shi a matsayin shekarar haihuwar Genghis Khan amma ya bambanta a littattafan tarihi daban-daban (bikin tunawa na Mongolia na yanzu shi ne 14 ga Nuwamba).
Ya ziyarci Dei Sechen na kabilar Onggirat kuma ya auri diyarsa Börte a hukumance.
An zabe shi a matsayin shugaban tsohuwar kabilar Kiyad.
Shugabannin kabilar Kiyad Borjigin sun nada Temujin a matsayin Khan na Khamag Mongol kuma suka ba shi taken Genghis Khan.
Ikon kabilar Kiyad ya karfafa, kuma ya yi Yakin Fuka-fuki 13 da Jamukha a kwarin Dalan Balzhut.
Toghrul Khan, wanda aka kora saboda rikicin cikin gida na kabilar Kereyid, ya dawo kan mulki da taimakon Temujin.
Temujin ya sami taimakon Kereyid don kai hari da kuma ruguza dangin Jurkin, sannan ya hada dangin Borjigin.
Ya yi yaki ya kuma fatattaki kabilar Merkit da ta rage a arewacin tsaunuka.
Ya gudan a Kurultai a Temeen Keer kuma ya sanar da yakin mamaye kabilar Naiman.
Genghis Khan ya hada gwiwa da Kereyid don kai hari ga Naiman a yankin Dutsen Altai.
Ragowar kabilun Tatar, Merkit, da Tayichiud sun hada kai don nada Jamukha a matsayin Khan. Ya halaka kawancen Jamukha a Yakin Köiten da hadaddiyar kungiyar arewa maso gabas.
Temujin ya yi yaki da Tatar, inda ya kashe shugabansu Jalin Buqa da wasu mutane kusan dari na Tatar da suka rage.
Ong Khan ya kai hari a filin kiwon dabbobi na Temujin saboda makarkashiyar Senggum, amma Temujin ya kai hari ba tsammani a babban sansanin Kereyid kuma ya sami babban nasara.
Sojojin Khamag Mongol sun fatattaki tare da mamaye Naiman.
Temujin ya doke Naiman na Yamma da Merkit na Arewa, wadanda su ne manyan kabilu na karshe da suka rage a tsaunukan Mongolia, kuma ya kashe Jamukha.
A taron shugabannin kabilu da aka yi a gefen Kogin Onon, an nada Temujin a matsayin Genghis Khan kuma ya kafa Daular Mongol.
Ya tura dansa Jochi don mamaye kabilun daji. Sarkin Western Xia Li Anquan ya yi alkawarin mika wuya ga Mongolia kuma ya tura diyarsa ta auri Genghis Khan.
Ya sanya hannu kan yarjejeniyar zaman lafiya da Western Xia kuma aka amince da ikon Mongolia. Ya kuma mika Masarautar Uyghur ta Tianshan karkashin ikonsa.
Ya tura Kublai don mamaye Karluks, makiyaya na kabilar Turkic, kuma shugabansu Arslan Khan ya mika wuya. Genghis Khan ya sanar da Daular Jin cewa zai daina biyan haraji.
Ya sanar da yaki da Daular Jin kuma ya doke sojojin Jin 400,000 a Yakin Yehuling.
Ya jagoranci sojoji don kai hari ga Daular Jin, inda ya mamaye tare da hade yankunansu da ke kudancin Babban Katangar kasar Sin.
Lokacin da Daular Jin ta nemi zaman lafiya, ya auri Gimbar Gimbiya (Princess Qiguo) kuma ya janye bayan ya karbi diyya.
Sojojin Mongol sun kewaye tare da mamaye Zhongdu (Yanjing), tsohon babban birnin Daular Jin.
Genghis Khan ya tura tawagar kasuwanci zuwa Daular Khwarazmian, amma Inalchuq, gwamnan Otrar, ya kashe tawagar.
Genghis Khan ya fara mamaye Khwarazm da sojoji 200,000.
Genghis Khan ya janye bayan ya kammala yakin daukar fansa a kan Khwarazmshah.
Genghis Khan ya bar Peshawar ya koma tsaunukan Mongolia bayan ya ji labarin boren Western Xia.
Genghis Khan ya isa tsaunukan Mongolia.
Sojojin Mongol sun mamaye Western Xia kuma suka kai hari kan iyakokinta.
Genghis Khan ya zauna a tsaunin Liupan, ya karbi mika wuya na Western Xia, amma ya ki shawarar zaman lafiya ta Daular Jin.
Genghis Khan ya mutu.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Daular Mongol da zama Khagan na farko
keyAchievements.description: An nada shi a matsayin Genghis Khan a Kurultai na 1206, inda ya kafa Daular Mongol kuma ya zama Khagan na farko.

keyAchievements.title: Hada kabilun Mongolia
keyAchievements.description: A matsayinsa na jagoran soja da na siyasa wanda ya hada kabilun Mongolia daban-daban, ya mamaye kabilun tsaunukan Mongolia.

keyAchievements.title: Mamaye manyan yankuna
keyAchievements.description: Ya mamaye yankuna masu yawa tun daga Mongolia da China, har zuwa Peninsula ta Koriya, Tsakiyar Asiya, da Gabashin Turai.

keyAchievements.title: Tsarin soja bisa cancanta
keyAchievements.description: Ana daukar sa a matsayin daya daga cikin mafi girman masu mamaye yanki kuma jagoran soja mai nasara a tarihi ta hanyar jagorantar jaruman sojoji bisa cancanta.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa rubutun harshen Mongolia
keyAchievements.description: Ya taimaka wajen kafa tsarin rubutun harshen Mongolia tare da taimakon wani jami'i daga kabilar Naiman.

faq.question: Menene ainihin sunan Genghis Khan?
faq.answer: Ainihin sunan Genghis Khan shi ne Borjigin Temujin.

faq.question: Yaushe Genghis Khan ya zama Khan na Daular Mongol?
faq.answer: A taron shugabannin kabilu da aka yi a gefen Kogin Onon a watan Fabrairu na 1206, an nada Temujin a matsayin Genghis Khan, inda ya kafa Daular Mongol kuma ya hau karagar mulki a matsayin Khagan na farko.

faq.question: Wane irin kimantawa Genghis Khan yake samu?
faq.answer: Ana girmama shi a matsayin allah ko gwarzon da ya kafa kasa a Mongolia, amma akwai kimantawa daban a Gabashin Turai da Yammacin Asiya wadanda aka mamaye, inda ake kallonsa a matsayin mai kisan kiyashi, mai washe dukiya, kuma mai lalata wayewa.

faq.question: Ta yaya mahaifin Genghis Khan ya mutu?
faq.answer: Lokacin da Genghis Khan yake da shekaru 9, mahaifinsa Yesugei ya mutu sakamakon guba da kabilar Tatar ta ba shi, wadda ke da daddiyar gaba da dangin sarauta na Borjigin na Mongolia.

faq.question: Me yasa Genghis Khan ya kai hari ga Daular Khwarazmian?
faq.answer: Saboda Inalchuq, gwamnan birnin Otrar, ya kashe ayarin yan kasuwa Musulmi 450 da ke karkashin kariyar Genghis Khan, kuma Sarkin Daular Khwarazm ya ki biyan diyya kan hakan.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Pella, babban birnin Macedonia, a matsayin dan Philip II da Olympias.
Ya doke hadaddiyar rundunar Athens da Thebes tare da Philip II a Yakin Chaeronea.
Ya gudu daga Macedonia tare da mahaifiyarsa amma ya dawo bayan watanni 6.
Bayan kisan mahaifinsa Sarki Philip II, ya gaji gadon sarautar Macedonia yana da shekaru 20.
Don daidaita iyakokin arewa, ya fita yakin murkushe yan tawaye inda ya doke kabilun Thrace, Triballi, Getae, da Illyria, sannan ya danne boren Thebes ya kuma lalata birnin.
Ya haye Hellespont don fara mamaye Daular Achaemenid (Daular Farko ta Farisa) kuma ya yi nasara a Yakin Granicus.
Ya kai hari ya kuma mamaye Tyre, sannan ya wuce Masar inda aka dauke shi a matsayin mai ceto.
Ya bar Masar ya nufi Mesopotamia, inda ya doke Darius III a Yakin Gaugamela kuma ya mamaye Babylon.
Ya mamaye India amma ya juye a Kogin Hyphasis saboda adawar sojojinsa.
Ya mutu a Babylon yana da shekaru 33.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa babban daula
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa wata babbar daula da ba a taba ganin irinta ba a tsohuwar Yammacin duniya, wadda ta fara daga Girka har zuwa Masar da arewa maso yammacin India.

keyAchievements.title: Nasarar soja
keyAchievements.description: Bai taba yin rashin nasara a yaki ba, kuma ana daukar sa a matsayin daya daga cikin kwararrun shugabannin soja a tarihi.

keyAchievements.title: Rugujewar Daular Farisa
keyAchievements.description: Ya murkushe sojojin Farisa a yake-yaken hukunci kamar na Issus da Gaugamela, wanda ya kai ga mutuwar Darius III da rugujewar Daular Farko ta Farisa.

keyAchievements.title: Taimakawa wajen kafa al'adun Hellenistic
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa birane masu suna 'Alexandria' a wurare daban-daban na yankunan da ya mamaye, wanda ya taimaka wajen hada al'adun gabashi da yammacin duniya da kuma taka rawar gani wajen kafa al'adun Hellenistic.

keyAchievements.title: Manufar hada gabashi da yamma
keyAchievements.description: Ya nemi hada gabashi da yamma ta hanyar karbar al'adun Farisa, aurar da mutanen Girka da mazauna yankunan da aka mamaye, da kuma nada jami'an Farisa a gwamnati.

faq.question: Wane ne malamin Alexander Mai Girma?
faq.answer: Ya sami horo daga masanin falsafa Aristotle har zuwa lokacin da ya kai shekaru 16, kuma Anaximenes na Lampsacus ma yana daya daga cikin malamansa.

faq.question: Wane irin babbar daula Alexander Mai Girma ya kafa?
faq.answer: Ya kafa wata babbar daula da ba a taba ganin irinta ba a tsohuwar Yammacin duniya, wadda ta fara daga Girka zuwa kudancin Masar da gabashin arewa maso yammacin India.

faq.question: Shin Alexander Mai Girma ya taba yin rashin nasara a yaki?
faq.answer: Bai taba yin rashin nasara a yaki ba, kuma ana daukar sa a matsayin daya daga cikin kwararrun shugabannin soja a tarihi.

faq.question: Ta yaya Alexander Mai Girma ya ruguza Daular Farisa?
faq.answer: Ya murkushe sojojin Farisa a yake-yaken hukunci kamar na Issus da Gaugamela, wanda ya kai ga mutuwar Darius III da rugujewar Daular Farko ta Farisa.

faq.question: Wadanne birane Alexander Mai Girma ya kafa?
faq.answer: Ya kafa birane masu suna 'Alexandria' a wurare da yawa na yankunan da ya mamaye, kuma Alexandria ta Masar ita ce tafi shahara.

alexander-the-great.missingDataNote: 모든 정보는 제공된 출처 원문에서 직접 확인된 사실만을 기반으로 작성되었습니다.

timeline.event: Haihuwar Walter Elias "Walt" Disney
Ya yanke shawarar zama mai zane kuma ya tafi Kansas
Ya kafa Disney Brothers Studio tare da yayansa Roy Disney
Ya samar da kuma nuna fim din animation mai tsawo na farko a duniya, <Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs>
Ya kafa wani babban wurin shakatawa na yara mai suna Disneyland a kusa da Los Angeles
An gano yana da ciwon daji na huhu mataki na karshe kuma ya mutu

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Walt Disney Studios
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa Walt Disney Studios a shekara ta 1923 tare da yayansa Roy Disney.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da hoton Oswald the Lucky Rabbit
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da hoton zomo 'Oswald the Lucky Rabbit' a cikin shahararrun hotunan kyanwa na lokacin, kuma ya gabatar da shi a matsayin fim na farko na animation mai nuna hali na musamman.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar Mickey Mouse
keyAchievements.description: Ya kirkiro hoton 'Mickey Mouse' don kara shahara, kuma ya sanya masa suna 'Mickey' bisa shawarar matarsa Lillian Disney.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da fim din animation mai murya na farko a duniya
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da fim na uku na Mickey Mouse, 'Steamboat Willie', wanda ya zama fim din animation mai murya na farko a duniya kuma fim din da ya fara gabatar da Mickey Mouse a hukumance.

keyAchievements.title: Fim din animation mai launi na farko da ya lashe lambar yabo ta Academy
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da 'Flowers and Trees', fim din animation mai launi na farko da ya yi amfani da tsarin bugun launi uku, kuma ya lashe lambar yabo ta Academy a fannin gajeren fim din animation na farko.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da fim din animation mai tsawo na farko a duniya
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da kuma nuna <Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs>, fim din animation mai tsawo na farko a duniya a shekara ta 1937, wanda ya zama babban abin tattaunawa a lokacin.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Disneyland
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa wani babban wurin shakatawa na yara mai suna Disneyland a kusa da Los Angeles a shekara ta 1955, wanda ya karfafa matsayinsa na dan kasuwa fiye da mai shirya fim kawai.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Walt Disney kuma yaushe ya mutu?
faq.answer: An haifi Walt Disney a ranar 5 ga Disamba, 1901 kuma ya mutu a ranar 15 ga Disamba, 1966 sakamakon ciwon daji na huhu mataki na karshe.

faq.question: Yaushe aka kafa Walt Disney Studios?
faq.answer: An kafa Walt Disney Studios tare da yayansa Roy Disney a shekara ta 1923.

faq.question: Wane ne babban hoton da Walt Disney ya kirkiro?
faq.answer: Walt Disney ya kirkiro 'Mickey Mouse' wanda ya samu babban shahara, kuma wannan hoton yana wakiltar Kamfanin Walt Disney har yau.

faq.question: Wane fim din animation mai tsawo Walt Disney ya fara samarwa a duniya?
faq.answer: Ya samar da kuma nuna <Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs>, fim din animation mai tsawo na farko a duniya a shekara ta 1937, wanda ya sami babban nasara.

faq.question: Shin jita-jitar cewa an daskare Walt Disney gaskiya ce?
faq.answer: Ko da yake jita-jitar cewa an daskare gawar Walt Disney ta taba yaduwa, amma karya ce; an kona gawarsa kuma an binne shi a Forest Lawn Memorial Park da ke Glendale.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Milan, Ohio, kuma ya girma a Port Huron, Michigan.
Samar da na'urar aika sako ta atomatik.
Kafa dakin gwaje-gwaje na Menlo Park, wanda aka sani da dakin gwaje-gwaje na sirri na farko a duniya.
Samar da na'urar rikodin sauti (phonograph).
Samar da na'urar aika sauti na tarho.
Samar da sabuwar na'urar samar da wutar lantarki da kayan fitila.
Ya yi gwajin jirgin kasa na lantarki.
Gina tashar wutar lantarki da inganta masana'antu.
Ya samar da inji da baturi mai adana wuta.
Ya halarci kuma ya yi jawabi a bikin cikar shekaru 50 da kirkirar kwan fitila mai haske yana da shekaru 82.
Ya rasu a ranar 18 ga Oktoba yana da shekaru 84.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar na'urar rikodin sauti (phonograph)
keyAchievements.description: Wannan yana daya daga cikin mafi shahararriyar kirkira a duniya, kuma daya daga cikin takardun mallakar fasaha masu yawa da aka yi rajista a karkashin sunan Edison.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar kwan fitila
keyAchievements.description: Wannan kirkira ce da ta haskaka daren birni, kuma ta kawo ci gaba a fannin samarwa da raba wutar lantarki, wanda ya taimaka wajen shigar da wutar lantarki kowane gida.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa dakin gwaje-gwaje na Menlo Park
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa dakin gwaje-gwaje na Menlo Park a shekara ta 1876, wanda aka sani da dakin gwaje-gwaje na sirri na farko a duniya, don ci gaba da kirkirar abubuwa.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa General Electric
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa General Electric daga baya, wanda ya samo asali daga kamfanin hasken lantarki da Edison ya kafa.

keyAchievements.title: Gano Tasirin Edison (Edison Effect)
keyAchievements.description: Wannan wani muhimmin bincike ne na kimiyya wanda ya zama tushen kirkirar bututun vacuum mai electrodes uku, wanda ya bude hanya ga kirkirar rediyo.

faq.question: Takardun mallakar fasaha nawa Thomas Edison ya yi rajista?
faq.answer: Akwai takardun mallakar fasaha na Amurka guda 1,093 da aka yi rajista a karkashin sunan Edison, kuma an ce ya kirkiro abubuwa guda 2,332 ba tare da hukumance ba.

faq.question: Wane irin ilimi na yau da kullum Thomas Edison ya samu?
faq.answer: Edison ya sami watanni 3 kacal na ilimi na yau da kullum, amma ya nuna bajinta saboda jajircewar mahaifiyarsa wadda malama ce wajen koyar da shi.

faq.question: Wane irin mutum ne Thomas Edison ga iyalinsa?
faq.answer: Ko da yake Edison ya mayar da hankali kan kirkira da kasuwanci, ya yi watsi da iyalinsa; bai halarci bikin binne matarsa ta farko ba, kuma rayuwar yaransa ba ta kasance mai kyau ba.

faq.question: Wane tasiri kirkirar Thomas Edison ta yi a kan kimiyya da fasahar Amurka?
faq.answer: Edison ya mayar da Amurka kasa da ta fi Turai karfi a fannin fasaha ta hanyar kirkire-kirkire ta amfani da gwaje-gwaje da sha'awa maimakon ka'idojin ilimi na makaranta.

timeline.event: Haihuwar Gaius Julius Caesar.
Ya zama shugaban iyali yana da shekaru 16 bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa.
An zabe shi a matsayin Flamen Dialis (babban firist na Jupiter) kuma ya auri Cornelia.
Ya koma Rome bayan mutuwar Sulla kuma ya fara aiki a matsayin lauya.
Ya tafi karatu a tsibirin Rhodes don kammala karatunsa na iya magana (rhetoric).
An zabe shi a matsayin Quaestor, kuma gwaggonsa Julia da matarsa Cornelia sun mutu a shekara guda.
An zabe shi a matsayin Aedile kuma ya auri Pompeia, jikanyar Sulla.
Ya tsaye takara kuma ya lashe zaben Pontifex Maximus (babban firist na addinin Rome).
Lokacin da yake aiki a matsayin Praetor, ya rabu da Pompeia saboda badakalar bikin Bona Dea, kuma aka nada shi gwamnan lardin Hispania Ulterior.
An zabe shi a matsayin Consul tare da Marcus Calpurnius Bibulus, kuma suka kafa Triumvirate na Farko.
An nada shi gwamnan lardunan Gallia Cisalpina da Illyricum, inda ya fara Yakin Gallic.
Shugabannin Triumvirate sun hadu a Luca na Gallia Cisalpina don kara tsawon wa'adin mulkin Caesar na gwamna da shekaru 5.
Bayan ya magance matsalolin kabilun Germania, ya zama Roman na farko da ya kaddamar da mamayar Birtaniya (Britannia).
Diyarsa Julia ta mutu yayin haihuwa, kuma Crassus ya mutu a Yakin Carrhae, wanda ya sa hadin gwiwar Triumvirate ya wargaje.
Ya danne babban boren da Vercingetorix ya tayar a tsakiyar Gallia a Yakin Alesia, inda ya mamaye Gallia kusan gaba daya.
Ya haye Kogin Rubicon tare da runduna daya kacal, wanda ya tayar da yakin basasa.
Ya kwantar da hankula a Hispania kuma ya zama Dictator ta hanyar Praetor Lepidus.
Ya hau karagar mulki a matsayin Consul a karo na biyu, kuma ya yi murabus daga mukamin Dictator bayan kwanaki 11.
Ya nufi Girka don yakar Pompey.
Ya fara yakin da sojojin Pompey a kwarin Pharsalus.
Wasu gungun sanatoci karkashin jagorancin Marcus Junius Brutus sun kashe shi.
Sanatocin Rome sun ayyana Caesar a matsayin allah na Rome a hukumance.

keyAchievements.title: Mamaye Gallia
keyAchievements.description: Ya mamaye Gallia daga shekara ta 58 zuwa 52 kafin haihuwar Annabi Isa (K.H), wanda ya fadada yankin Daular Rome har zuwa Tekun Arewa.

keyAchievements.title: Jagorantar Triumvirate na Farko
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa Triumvirate na Farko tare da Marcus Licinius Crassus da Gnaeus Pompeius Magnus, wanda ya ba su damar sarrafa siyasar Rome na tsawon shekaru.

keyAchievements.title: Gyara Jamhuriyar Rome
keyAchievements.description: Bayan ya karbi mulki, ya gudanar da sauye-sauye masu yawa a cikin al'umma da siyasar Rome, kuma ya mayar da tsarin mulkin masu fada a ji na jamhuriyar zuwa tsarin mulki na tsakiya.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyana Kansu a matsayin Dictator na Har Abada
keyAchievements.description: A karshe ya ayyana kansa a matsayin Dictator na Har Abada (Dictator perpetuo), wanda ya taka rawar gani wajen canza Jamhuriyar Rome zuwa Daular Rome.

keyAchievements.title: Mamayar Birtaniya (Britannia)
keyAchievements.description: A shekara ta 55 K.H, ya zama Roman na farko da ya kaddamar da mamayar Birtaniya.

keyAchievements.title: Kaddamar da Acta Diurna
keyAchievements.description: Ya kaddamar da Acta Diurna, wanda ke zama kamar jaridar zamani, ta hanyar lika ta a fili domin sanar da jama'a rahotannin majalisar dattijai da na jama'a.

keyAchievements.title: Shawarar Dokar Kasa (Agrarian Law)
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi yunkurin gyara al'umma ta hanyar ba da shawarar Dokar Kasa (lex iulia de agraria) don sake raba filaye ga talakawa.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta Littattafan Yaki
keyAchievements.description: Shi da kansa ya rubuta tarihin yake-yakensa kamar Commentarii de Bello Gallico (Tarihin Yakin Gallic) da Commentarii de Bello Civili (Tarihin Yakin Basasa) don sanar da rayuwarsa ga al'ummomin gaba.

faq.question: Menene asalin sunan Julius Caesar 'Caesar'?
faq.answer: Pliny Mai Girma ya yi da'awar cewa an sami wani kakan Caesar da aka haife shi ta hanyar tiyata (caesarean section), wanda ke nufin 'an yanke shi daga mahaifa'. Wasu ra'ayoyin sun ce sunan ya fito ne saboda gashi mai kauri ko idanu masu launin toka, ko kuma saboda kakansa ya kashe giwa.

faq.question: Shin gaskiya ne cewa an haifi Julius Caesar ta hanyar tiyatar cesarean?
faq.answer: A'a. Kafin Julius Caesar ma an sami mutanen da ke da sunan 'Caesar'. Bayan haka, a lokacin ana yin tiyatar cesarean ne kawai a jikin matattun mata, amma mahaifiyar Caesar, Aurelia, ta yi tsawon rai bayan ta haife shi.

faq.question: Wane tsarin siyasa Caesar ya bi?
faq.answer: Caesar ya bi tafarkin Populares (masu goyon bayan talakawa), kuma ya kasance dan siyasa da ya fi son daukaka bukatunsa kai tsaye ga masu zabe maimakon bin tsarin gargajiya.

faq.question: Yaushe aka fadi shahararriyar maganar Caesar 'An riga an jefa guda (dice)'?
faq.answer: A ranar 12 ga Janairu, 49 K.H, lokacin da Caesar ya haye Kogin Rubicon da runduna daya kacal don fara yakin basasa, Plutarch ya ambaci maganar a harshen Girka a matsayin 'Ku jefa guda!', yayin da Suetonius ya rubuta ta a harshen Latin a matsayin 'Alea iacta est' (An riga an jefa guda).

faq.question: Ta yaya aka kashe Julius Caesar?
faq.answer: A ranar 15 ga Maris, 44 K.H, wasu gungun sanatoci karkashin jagorancin Marcus Junius Brutus, wadanda suka kulla makarkashiyar dawo da jamhuriya, sun kashe shi.

timeline.event: An haife shi a ranar 30 ga Yuli a wani kauye da ke yammacin Detroit, Michigan, Amurka.
Mahaifiyarsa ta rasu yana da shekaru 12.
Ya bar makaranta yana da shekaru 15 don zama makaniki.
An gayyace shi don zama injiniya a Kamfanin Edison Illuminating kuma ya fara aiki.
Ya kammala injin mai kona mai a ciki (internal combustion engine) kuma ya kera mota.
Bayan ya bar Kamfanin Edison, ya kafa kamfanin kera motoci na 'Ford' yana da shekaru 40, kuma ya gabatar da tsarin belt conveyor don fara kera motar Ford Model T.
Wallafa littafinsa "Today and Tomorrow".
Wallafa littafinsa "My Philosophy of Industry".
Ya rasu a ranar 7 ga Afrilu yana da shekaru 84.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Ford Motor Company
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa kamfanin kera motoci na 'Ford' a shekara ta 1903 yana da shekaru 40.

keyAchievements.title: Kera mota ta farko
keyAchievements.description: Ya kammala injin mai kona mai a ciki don kera mota a shekara ta 1892.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da Ford Model T da tsarin samar da kayayyaki na bai daya
keyAchievements.description: Ya fara kera motar Ford Model T ta hanyar amfani da tsarin belt conveyor da ya gabatar a karon farko a duniya a shekara ta 1903.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa tsarin Fordism
keyAchievements.description: 미래에 대한 공포와 과거에 대한 존경을 버릴 것, 경쟁을 위주로 일하지 말 것, 봉사가 이윤에 선행할 것, 값싸게 제조하여 값싸게 팔 것 등의 4가지 경영철학을 내세웠다.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da Tsarin Ford (Ford System)
keyAchievements.description: 제품의 표준화, 부분품의 단순화, 작업의 전문화라는 3S 운동을 전개하며 컨베이어 시스템을 채용하여 노동 생산성 향상에 기여했다.

keyAchievements.title: Kyautata walwalar ma'aikata
keyAchievements.description: Bayan kafa kamfanin, ya gabatar da kyawawan sharuda ga ma'aikata kamar 'yin aiki na tsawon sa'o'i 8 a rana tare da mafi karancin albashi na dalar Amurka 5'.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Henry Ford kuma yaushe ya mutu?
faq.answer: Henry Ford ya rayu daga 30 ga Yuli, 1863 zuwa 7 ga Afrilu, 1947, inda ya rasu yana da shekaru 84.

faq.question: Wane kamfani Henry Ford ya kafa?
faq.answer: Henry Ford ya kafa kamfanin kera motoci na 'Ford Motor Company' a shekara ta 1903.

faq.question: Menene manyan nasarorin Henry Ford?
faq.answer: Ya kera mota a shekara ta 1892, kuma ya fara kera Ford Model T ta hanyar amfani da tsarin belt conveyor da ya gabatar a karon farko a duniya a shekara ta 1903.

faq.question: Wane irin alaka ke tsakanin Henry Ford da Edison?
faq.answer: 헨리 포드는 에디슨이 세운 에디슨 회사에서 기술 책임자로 일했으며, 1890년에는 에디슨 조명 회사 기사로 초청되어 근무했습니다.

timeline.event: An haife ta da suna Magdalena Carmen Frida Kahlo y Calderón.
Ta kamu da cutar shan-inna (polio) tana da shekaru 6, wanda ya sa kafar damanta ta zama gajaciya da rashin karfi.
Ta sami mummunan rauni a kashin baya, kafar dama, da mahaifa sakamakon hatsarin mota tana da shekaru 18.
Auren Diego Rivera
Rabuwa da Diego Rivera a watan Nuwamba.
Sake auren Diego Rivera.
Zanen "The Love Embrace of the Universe".
Ta rasu a ranar 13 ga Yuli sakamakon sake kamuwa da ciwon sanyi na huhu (pneumonia).
Nunin ayyukan Frida Kahlo a Gidan Kayan Tarihi na Sejong Center da Soma Museum of Art.
Nunin ayyukan Frida Kahlo da Diego Rivera a Seoul Arts Center.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da tsarin zanen Mexico (Mexican Art Style)
keyAchievements.description: Ta samar da nata salon zane na musamman ta hanyar hada salon gaskiya (realism), surrealism, da alama (symbolism) na Mexico tare da al'adun gargajiya na kasar.

keyAchievements.title: Shahararren aiki: "Frida and the Miscarriage"
keyAchievements.description: Wannan shi ne daya daga cikin shahararrun ayyukanta da ke nuna wahalar rayuwarta saboda matsalar kashin kwangila da ta haifa da ita.

keyAchievements.title: Shahararren aiki: "Henry Ford Hospital"
keyAchievements.description: Wannan shi ne daya daga cikin shahararrun ayyukanta da ke nuna wahalar rayuwarta saboda matsalar kashin kwangila da ta haifa da ita.

keyAchievements.title: Shahararren aiki: "The Love Embrace of the Universe"
keyAchievements.description: Wannan zanen yana nuna Frida Kahlo da kanta rike da masoyinta Diego Rivera wanda ya bayyana a matsayin jariri a hannunta.

faq.question: Wace irin mai zane ce Frida Kahlo?
faq.answer: Ta kasance mai zane ta salon surrealism kuma yar gurguzu ta kasar Mexico, wadda ta kafa salon zane na musamman ta hanyar hada salon gaskiya, surrealism, symbolism na Mexico da al'adun gargajiya.

faq.question: Yaya rayuwar Frida Kahlo ta kasance?
faq.answer: Rayuwarta ta kasance cike da wahalhalu, ciki har da kamuwa da cutar shan-inna tana da shekaru 6 da kuma samun mummunan rauni a hatsarin mota tana da shekaru 18.

faq.question: Wadanne ne shahararrun ayyukan Frida Kahlo?
faq.answer: Sun hada da "Frida and the Miscarriage", "Henry Ford Hospital", da "The Love Embrace of the Universe".

faq.question: Wane ne Frida Kahlo ta aura?
faq.answer: Ta auri Diego Rivera, mai zane kuma mai fafutuka na kasar Mexico, kuma ta sake auren sa bayan sun taba rabuwa.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar sunan Frida Kahlo 'Frida'?
faq.answer: Sunan da mahaifinta dan kasar Jamus, Guillermo Kahlo ya ba ta, kuma yana nufin zaman lafiya a harshen Jamusanci.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin babban da na gidan kwarai (equestrian class) mai arziki a Arpinum, Italiya.
Ya yi aikin soja.
Yakin basasa ya barke tsakanin Gaius Marius da Sulla, kuma a wannan lokacin ya koyi falsafar Plato da Aristotle karkashin Philo.
Ya fara aiki a matsayin lauya.
Ya sami shahara bayan ya yi nasarar kare Roscius wanda aka zarga da kisan mahaifinsa.

timeline.year: Na tsawon shekaru uku tun daga 79 K.H
timeline.event: Ya bar Rome don yin karatu a Athens da Rhodes don nazarin iya magana da falsafa, kuma ya koyi karatu karkashin Posidonius.
Ya shiga harkar gwamnati tun daga mukamin Quaestor.
An zabe shi a matsayin Aedile, kuma ya samu shaharar zama lauya mafi kyau a Rome ta hanyar tabbatar da laifin Verres a shari'ar Verres, kuma ya rubuta jawabin karyata Verres (In Verrem).
An zabe shi a matsayin Praetor, ya rubuta jawabin goyon bayan Pompey, kuma ya wallafa jawabin kare Murena (Pro Murena).
Ya zama Consul, babban mukamin gwamnati, inda ya dakatar da makarkashiyar cin amanar kasa ta Catiline kuma ya gabatar da jawabin karyata Catiline (In Catilinam).
Ya wallafa jawabin kare Archias (Pro Archia).
Ya shiga cikin mawuyacin hali na siyasa bayan kaddamar da Triumvirate na Farko na Caesar, Pompey, da Crassus.
Ya bar Rome ya yi gudun hijira zuwa Macedonia sakamalokin wata doka da Tribune Clodius Pulcher ya zartar, kuma aka lalata gidansa da gidajen shakatawarsa.
Ya dawo Rome da taimakon masu goyon bayansa kuma ya sami diyar asarar da ya yi.
Ya wallafa "De Oratore".
Ya wallafa "De Partitione Oratoria".
An zabe shi a matsayin Augur kuma ya sake komawa aikin gwamnati.
Ya wallafa "De Legibus".
An zabe shi a matsayin gwamnan Cilicia don haka ya bar Rome, kuma ya wallafa "De Re Publica".
An zabe shi a matsayin gwamnan Capua kuma ya bar Rome, sannan ya shiga bangaren Pompey lokacin da yakin basasa ya barke tsakanin Caesar da Pompey.
Caesar ya doke Pompey a Pharsalus, kuma Cicero ya dawo Italiya da izinin Caesar.
Ya wallafa ayyuka kamar "Paradoxa Stoicorum", "Brutus", da "Orator".
Diyarsa Tulia da yake so ta rasu, kuma ya wallafa ayyuka kamar "Consolatio", "Hortensius", "De Finibus", "Tusculanae Disputationes", da "De Natura Deorum".
An kashe Caesar, kuma Cicero ya dawo fagen siyasa.
Ya gabatar da jerin jawabai na "Philippics" don kushe Antony.
Ya wallafa ayyuka kamar "De Divinatione", "Cato Maior de Senectute", "De Fato", "Laelius de Amicitia", "De Virtutibus", "De Gloria", "De Officiis", da "Topica".
Octavian ya kaddamar da Triumvirate na Biyu tare da Antony da Lepidus.
Sojojin Antony sun kashe shi a Formia (Caieta) inda ya rasu.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa harshen Latin na gargajiya
keyAchievements.description: Cicero ne ya tsara harshen Latin na gargajiya, kuma ana daukar salon rubutunsa a matsayin misali na harshen Latin na gargajiya.

keyAchievements.title: Samun shaharar zama lauya mafi kyau a Rome
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami shaharar zama lauya mafi kyau a Rome bayan ya yi nasara a kan babban lauya na lokacin a shari'ar Verres a shekara ta 70 K.H.

keyAchievements.title: Dakatar da makarkashiyar Catiline a matsayin Consul
keyAchievements.description: A lokacin da yake matsayin Consul a shekara ta 63 K.H, ya dakatar da makarkashiyar cin amanar kasa ta Catiline kuma ya ceci Jamhuriyar Rome daga rugujewa.

keyAchievements.title: Fassarar falsafar Girka zuwa harshen Latin
keyAchievements.description: Ya sadaukar da kansa wajen fassarar ra'ayoyin falsafar Girka zuwa harshen Latin a lokacin da ya dakatar da ayyukan siyasa.

faq.question: Yaushe kuma a ina aka haifi Cicero kuma yaushe ya mutu?
faq.answer: An haifi Cicero a ranar 3 ga Janairu, 106 K.H a Arpinum, Italiya, kuma ya rasu bayan da aka kashe shi a ranar 7 ga Disamba, 43 K.H a Formia.

faq.question: Wane ir인 kimantawa Cicero yake da shi a fannin siyasa?
faq.answer: Yawanci kimantawa a kan rayuwar siyasarsa ba ta da kyau sosai, inda ake kallonsa a matsayin mai ilimi da ke yawo a tsakiyar filin fama, ko kuma dan neman zarafi mai basira daban-daban.

faq.question: Wace gudunmawa Cicero ya bayar ga harshen Latin na gargajiya?
faq.answer: Cicero ne ya tsara harshen Latin na gargajiya, kuma ana amfani da salon rubutunsa a matsayin misali na harshen Latin na gargajiya wanda har yanzu ake amfani da shi wajen koyon harshen Latin.

faq.question: Ta yaya Cicero ya mutu?
faq.answer: A ranar 7 ga Disamba, 43 K.H, ya zama daya daga cikin wadanda Antony ya kaddamar da shirin kashe su bayan kafuwar Triumvirate na Biyu, kuma aka kashe shi a Caieta, sannan aka rataye kansa da hannayensa biyu a filin taron Rome.

timeline.event: Helen Adams Keller ta haifu a gidan gonar Ivy Green da ke Tuscumbia, Alabama, Amurka.
Kate Keller, mahaifiyar Helen, ta sami kwarin gwiwa bayan ta karanta "American Notes" na Charles Dickens, don haka ta tafi Baltimore don neman shawara daga J. Julian Chisolm.
Anne Sullivan ta isa gidan Helen kuma ta fara koyar da ita.
Helen ta yi rajista a Makarantar Perkins ta Makafi.
Ta rubuta "The Frost King" tana da shekaru 11.
Helen Keller da Anne Sullivan sun koma New York don halartar Makarantar Wright-Humason ta Kurame da Makarantar Horace Mann ta Kurame.
Ta koma Massachusetts kuma ta halarci Makarantar Cambridge ta Mata.
Ta sami gurbin shiga Jami'ar Radcliffe, wadda ke zama jami'ar mata ta Jami'ar Harvard.
Ta wallafa tarihin rayuwarta "The Story of My Life" tare da Anne Sullivan da mijinta John Macy.
Ta kammala karatu a Jami'ar Radcliffe tana da shekaru 24, inda ta zama kurma-makaciya ta farko da ta sami digirin farko (Bachelor of Arts).
Ta rubuta "The World I Live In".
Ta shiga Jam'iyyar Gurguzu ta Amurka (Socialist Party of America) tana da shekaru 29.
Ta shiga kungiyar Industrial Workers of the World (IWW).
An wallafa jerin kasidunta na gurguzu mai suna "Out of the Dark".
Ta kafa kungiyar 'Helen Keller International' tare da George Kessler.
Ta rubuta kasidu don kungiyar Industrial Workers of the World (IWW).
Ta fito a cikin fim din ba-harshe (silent film) "Deliverance".
Ta taimaka wajen kafa kungiyar American Civil Liberties Union (ACLU).
An wallafa tarihin addininta "My Religion".
Anne Sullivan ta rasu.
Lokacin da ta ziyarci Akita Prefecture a kasar Japan, ta yi tambaya game da shahararren karen nan Hachiko kuma ta sami karen Akita mai suna 'Kamikaze-go'.
Bayan mutuwar 'Kamikaze-go', ta karbi dan uwansa 'Kenzan-go' a matsayin kyauta ta musamman daga gwamnatin Japan.
Wasan kwaikwayo na William Gibson na Playhouse 90 ya zama wasan "The Miracle Worker" na farko.
Polly Thomson ta rasu sakamakon bugun jini (stroke).
Ta yi fama da cutar jini a kwakwalwa akai-akai kuma ta share shekarunya na karshe a gida.
Fim din "The Miracle Worker" wanda Anne Bancroft da Patty Duke suka jagoranta ya lashe lambar yabo ta Oscar.
Ta karbi lambar yabo ta "Presidential Medal of Freedom" daga Shugaban Amurka Lyndon B. Johnson.
An zabe ta a matsayin memba na "National Women's Hall of Fame" a Nunin Duniya na New York.
Ta rasu tana da shekaru 88 a gidanta da ke Arcan Ridge, Westport, Connecticut.
Gallup ya zabe ta a matsayin daya daga cikin mutane 18 mafi daraja a karni na 20.
Jihar Alabama ta sanya hoton Helen Keller a jikin tsabar kudi ta kwata ta Amurka (kudin kwata 25) da ke wakiltar jihar.
An sanya mutum-mutumin tagulla na Helen Keller a dakin adana kayan tarihi na kasa (National Statuary Hall Collection).

keyAchievements.title: Kurma-makaciya ta farko da ta sami digirin farko
keyAchievements.description: 1904년 레드클리프 대학교를 졸업하며 인문계 학사를 받은 최초의 시각, 청각 시청각장애인이 되었습니다.

keyAchievements.title: Marubuciya da mai koyarwa
keyAchievements.description: Ta wallafa littattafai guda 12 da kasidu masu yawa, kuma ta yi aiki a matsayin marubuciya da mai koyarwa a Amurka.

keyAchievements.title: Mai fafutukar gurguzu da hakkin dan adam
keyAchievements.description: Ta shiga gaba-gaba a tarurruka da ayyukan kare hakkin mata, zaman lafiya, soke hukuncin kisa, adawa da aikin karfi na yara da wariyar launin fata.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Helen Keller International
keyAchievements.description: Ta kafa kungiyar 'Helen Keller International' tare da George Kessler a shekara ta 1915 don gudanar da bincike a kan gani, lafiya, da abinci mai gina jiki.

keyAchievements.title: Taimakawa wajen kafa ACLU
keyAchievements.description: Ta taimaka wajen kafa kungiyar American Civil Liberties Union (ACLU) a shekara ta 1920.

keyAchievements.title: Lambobin yabo na kasa
keyAchievements.description: Ta sami lambar yabo ta Presidential Medal of Freedom a shekara ta 1964, kuma an sanya ta a cikin National Women's Hall of Fame a shekara ta 1965, tare da ci gaba da karrama ta a hanyoyi da dama bayan mutuwarta.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Helen Keller kuma yaushe ta mutu?
faq.answer: Helen Keller ta rayu daga 27 ga Yuni, 1880 zuwa 1 ga Yuni, 1968, inda ya rasu yana da shekaru 88.

faq.question: Ta yaya Helen Keller ta rasa ganinta da jinta?
faq.answer: Ta kamu da cutar zazzabin scarlet da kumburin laka (meningitis) tana da shekaru 19 da haihuwa, kuma wannan cuta ta sanya ta zama mai fama da matsalolin gani da ji a duk rayuwarta.

faq.question: Wane ne ya fi tasiri a kan karatun Helen Keller?
faq.answer: Malama Anne Sullivan ta isa gidan Helen a watan Maris na shekara ta 1887, kuma ta yi babban tasiri a rayuwar Helen ta hanyar koya mata harshe ta hanyar rubuta haruffan kalmomi a tafukan hannunta.

faq.question: Wadanne irin ayyukan fafutuka Helen Keller ta shiga?
faq.answer: Helen Keller ta kasance marubuciya kuma yar gurguzu mai fafutuka a kan hakkin mata na kada kuri'a, zaman lafiya, soke hukuncin kisa, da yaki da aikin yara da wariyar launin fata.

faq.question: Wane shahararren aiki ne ke nuna rayuwar Helen Keller?
faq.answer: Fim din "The Miracle Worker" wanda ke nuna yarintar Helen Keller da alakarta da malama Anne Sullivan shi ne mafi shahara, kuma fim din na shekara ta 1962 ya lashe lambar yabo ta Oscar.

helen-keller.missingDataNote: 생후 19개월 후 발생한 질병으로 인한 시청각 장애 발생 시점의 정확한 연도가 원문에 명시되지 않아 타임라인에서 생략되었습니다.

timeline.event: An yi masa baftisma a cocin Katolika na St. Remigius da ke Bonn, Jamus.
An tallata shi a matsayin 'yaro mai hazaka' mai shekaru shida a cikin takardar sanarwar kade-kaden farko na jama'a.
Ya fara daukar darasi karkashin Christian Gottlob Neefe a Bonn.
Ya fara aiki a matsayin mataimakin mai kunna organ na Neefe.
An wallafa aikinsa na farko, "Nine Variations on a March by Dressler, WoO 63" don piano.
An wallafa piano sonatas guda uku, WoO 47.
An wallafa makala ta farko game da Beethoven a cikin Magazin der Musik.
Ya fara aiki a matsayin ma'aikaci mai karbar albashi a cocin masarauta, kuma an nada shi a matsayin mai kunna organ na biyu na masarauta na din-din-din.
An tilasta wa mahaifinsa Johann murabus daga aikin masarauta, kuma aka ba da umarnin cewa a rika biyan rabin kudin fansharsa kai tsaye ga Beethoven don kula da iyalinsa.
An yi imanin cewa an nemi ya rubuta Cantata na Mutuwar Sarki Joseph II, WoO 87, da Cantata na Hawan Mulki na Sarki Leopold II, WoO 88.
Ana tsammanin an gabatar da shi ga Joseph Haydn a karon farko lokacin da Haydn ya tsaya a Bonn a kan hanyarsa ta zuwa London.
An nemi ya kera kidan ballet, "Music for a Knight's Ballet, WoO 1".
Sun sake haduwa a Bonn lokacin da Haydn yake komawa Vienna daga London, kuma Haydn ya yi alkawarin karbar Beethoven a matsayin dalibinsa.
Ya bar Bonn ya nufi Vienna tare da taimakon Yarima Elector.
Jim kadan bayan isa Vienna, ya sami labarin rasuwar mahaifinsa.
Ya samu babban shahara a matsayin gwani na piano a Vienna.
Birnin Bonn ya fada hannun Faransa.
Ya buga daya daga cikin piano concertos dinsa a wasansa na farko a Vienna.
Ya yi gyaran daftarin farko na aikinsa na farko (Piano Trios guda uku Nos. 1-3, Op. 1) don wallafawa.
Ya zagaya manyan cibiyoyin al'adun Tsakiyar Turai kamar Prague, Dresden, Leipzig, da Berlin.
Ya tsara Cello Sonatas Nos. 1-2, Op. 5 a Berlin kuma ya sadaukar da su ga Friedrich Wilhelm II.
Ya koma Vienna.
Ya tafi tafiya zuwa Pressburg da Pest.
Ya yi fama da matsalolin rashin lafiya mai tsanani a lokutan zafi da kaka na kowace shekara.
Ya fara gano cewa yana da matsalar ji (hearing).
Jinsa ya ci gaba da raunana yayin tafiyarsa zuwa Prague, wanda ya sa ya bar shirin gudanar da wasanni na tafiya.
Ya tsara String Quartets guda shida na farko, Op. 18 bisa bukatar Yarima Joseph Franz Lobkowitz.
Ya yi nasara a kan gwani Joseph Wölfl a gasar wasan piano.
An wallafa Piano Sonata No. 8 "Pathétique", Op. 13.
Ya kammala Septet, Op. 20.
Ya fara koyar da piano ga yaran Anna Brunsvik, wata yar sarauta ta Hungary.
Ya yi nasara a kan Daniel Steibelt a gasar wasan piano.
Ya yi hayar Burgtheater don gabatar da babban wasansa na farko na symphony.
Gabatar da Symphonies dinsa na 1 da na 2 ya sanya shi zama daya daga cikin matasa masu kida mafi muhimmanci na lokacin.
An wallafa String Quartets guda shida na farko, Op. 18, kuma an sadaukar da su ga Yarima Lobkowitz.
Ya kammala kidan ballet "The Creatures of Prometheus, Op. 43" kuma an gabatar da shi a karon farko a Burgtheater da ke Vienna.
Ya hadu da matashiyar yar sarauta Giulietta Guicciardi.
Ya koyar da Ferdinand Ries.
Matashin Carl Czerny ya yi karatu karkashin Beethoven.
An wallafa Piano Sonata No. 14, Op. 27-2 ("Moonlight Sonata") kuma an sadaukar da ita ga Giulietta Guicciardi.
Ya kammala Symphony No. 2, amma an soke wasan kide-kiden.
Ya koma Heiligenstadt a bayan birnin Vienna don kokarin amincewa da yanayinsa, kuma ya rubuta Heiligenstadt Testament.
Archduke Rudolph na Austria ya fara karatun piano da kida tare da shi.
Ya tsara Symphony No. 3 "Eroica".
Count Joseph Deym ya rasu.
Ayyukansa a Theater an der Wien ya zo karshe saboda canjin gudanarwa.
Ya ji takaicin ayyana kansa a matsay인 'Sarki' da Napoleon ya yi, don haka ya goge sunan Napoleon daga shafin farko na daftarin kida na Symphony No. 3.
An gabatar da Symphony No. 3 "Eroica" a karon farko.
An gabatar da wasan opera Fidelio a karon farko a gaban gidaje kusan babu kowa saboda mamayar Faransa a birnin.
An wallafa Symphony No. 3 "Eroica".
Muzio Clementi, mai kida kuma mai wallafawa, ya sami ikon wallafa ayyukansa a kasar Birtaniya.
Yarima Esterházy ya nemi ya rubuta kidan coci (Mass in C major, Op. 86) don tunawa da ranar rasuwar matarsa.
Ya shirya kuma ya gabatar da babban wasan sadaka wanda ya hada da Symphonies Nos. 5 da 6, Piano Concerto No. 4, Mass in C major, da Choral Fantasy.
Jérôme Bonaparte ya taya shi mukamin Kapellmeister a fadar Kassel, kuma Archduke Rudolph, Count Kinsky, da Yarima Lobkowitz sun yi alkawarin ba shi albashin fansho don ya ci gaba da zama a Vienna.
An nemi ya tsara kida don wasan kwaikwayo na Johann Wolfgang von Goethe, Egmont.
Kidan wasan Egmont (Op. 84) ya fito.
Ya nemi Therese Malfatti da aure amma ta ki yarda.
Yarima Lobkowitz ya daina biyan kudin fansho.
Ya kamu da rashin lafiya mai tsanani tare da ciwon kai da zazzabi mai zafi.
Ya hadu da Goethe a Teplitz.
Ya rubuta wasikar soyayya mai tsawo ta shafuka 10 ga masoyiyarsa ta din-din-din (Immortal Beloved) yayin da yake Teplitz.
Ya ziyarci kaninsa na biyu Johann don neman ya kawo karshen zaman tare da Therese Obermayer.
Kaninsa Johann da Therese Obermayer sun yi aure.
Yarima Kinsky ya rasu bayan ya fado daga kan doki.
Ya shiga cikin mawuyacin hali na damuwa kuma yawan ayyukansa na kida ya ragu.
Ya ari kaninsa Kaspar kudin florins 1500.
Ya sami kwarin gwiwar fara kida bayan samun labarin shan kashin Napoleon a Yakin Vitoria da hadaddiyar rundunar Duke na Wellington ta yi.
An gabatar da "Wellington's Victory" (Op. 91) da Symphony No. 7 dinsa, Op. 92 a karon farko a wani wasan sadaka ga wadanda yaki ya shafa.
An sake gabatar da "Wellington's Victory" sakamakon yabo da aka rika yi masa.
Beethoven da ya yi kida a wasan "Archduke Trio" ya bayyana a matsayin mai kida shi kadai (soloist) a karon karshe a fili.
Ya fara amfani da na'urar taimakawa ji ta irin kakaki (ear trumpet) da Mälzel ya kera.
Ya samar da kida a cikin yanayi na kishin kasa don nishadantar da shugabannin kasashe da jakadun da suka halarci taron Vienna.
Ya dogara ga doka don karbar diyar asara daga Yarima Lobkowitz.
Ya tsara "Calm Sea and Prosperous Voyage, Op. 112" don kungiyar mawaka da marubutan kida (orchestra) bisa wakar Goethe.
Bayan rasuwar kaninsa Kaspar, ya shiga cikin dogon takaddama na shari'a da matar Kaspar, Johanna, a kan hakkin rikon dansa Karl.
Yawan ayyukan kida na Beethoven ya ragu sosai zuwa matakin da ba a taba gani ba a duk rayuwarsa ta manyantaka.
Ya yi nasarar karbe hakkin rikon dan uwansa Karl.
Ya kammala "An die ferne Geliebte, Op. 98".

timeline.year: Fiye da shekara guda tun daga watan Oktoba 1816
timeline.event: Ya yi fama da doguwar rashin lafiya ('zazzabi mai kumburi').
Ya nemi kuma ya sami goyon bayan Beethoven a kan metronome da Mälzel ya kera sabo.
Lafiyar Beethoven ta inganta, kuma dan uwansa Karl mai shekaru dogma sha daya ya koma zama tare da shi a watan Janairu.
Ya kammala Piano Sonata No. 29 "Hammerklavier", Op. 106.
Ya fara rubuta tsarin kidan da zai zama bangare na Symphony No. 9 dinsa na karshe.
An canza shari'ar zuwa kotun farar hula ta Vienna, wanda ya sa ya rasa matsayinsa na mai rikon riko shi kadai.
An sanar da cewa an daukaka Archduke Rudolph zuwa matsayin Cardinal-Archbishop.
Mai wallafa Antonio Diabelli ya gayyaci mawaka 50 na Vienna ciki har da Beethoven don su tsara variations.
Ya kammala variations guda ashirin wadanda daga baya suka zama "Diabelli Variations, Op. 120" guda 33.
Mai wallafa Maurice Schlesinger ya ziyarci Beethoven a karon farko.
Ya sake samun hakkin rikon dan uwansa Karl bayan mummunan gwagwarmayar shari'a.
Hawan gadon sarautar Rudolph a Olomouc (wanda ya tayar da "Missa solemnis, Op. 123").
An tura Piano Sonata No. 30, Op. 109 ga mai wallafawa.
An sake ganin yanayin rashin lafiyarsa inda yake fama da rheumatism da ciwon shawara.
A cikin wasikar da ya aike wa Rudolph, Beethoven ya bayyana imaninsa ga Ubangiji na kansa.
An wallafa Piano Sonata No. 31, Op. 110.
Ya so ya sulhunta da dan uwansa Johann wanda ya yi aure.
An wallafa "Calm Sea and Prosperous Voyage, Op. 112" tare da sadaukarwa ga mawaki Goethe.
Kungiyar Philharmonic Society ta London ta ba da shawarar kera kida don symphony.
Yarima Nikolai Galitzin ya nemi Beethoven ya kera string quartets guda uku.
Anton Schindler ya fara aiki a matsay인 mataimaki (secretary) marar albashi na mai kidan.
An kammala "Missa solemnis", Symphony No. 9, da "Diabelli Variations".
Ya gabatar da daftarin kidan coci da aka kammala ga Rudolph.
An gabatar da Symphony No. 9 da wasu sassa na "Missa solemnis" a karon farko a Kärntnertortheater kuma sun sami babban yabo.
Wasan na biyu wanda mai gudanarwa ya tabbatar da mafi karancin kudi bai sami halartar mutane da yawa ba.
Schuppanzigh Quartet ne ya gabatar da String Quartet No. 12 in E-flat major, Op. 127 a karon farko.
Ya kamu da rashin lafiya mai tsanani kwatsam yayin da yake rubuta Quartet No. 15 in A minor, Op. 132.
A cikin wasan farko, karshen sashi na babban kida (counterpoint) na Quartet No. 13 in B-flat major, Op. 130 ya kasance mai matukar wahala ga masu kida da masu saurare baki daya.
Duk da cewa ya sulhunta da Schindler, an mayar da Karl Holz a matsayin mataimaki.
Dan uwansa Karl, wanda ya sake saduwa da mahaifiyarsa, ya yi yunkurin kashe kansa.
Ya koma gidan dan uwansa Johann a Gneixendorf tare da dan uwansa (Karl) kuma suka zauna can na tsawon watanni uku.
Ya kammala sabon karshen kida (finale) na Quartet No. 13 in B-flat major, Op. 130, wanda ya zama aikinsa na karshe.
Ya kamu da ciwon sanyi na huhu (pneumonia) yayin tafiyarsa ta komawa Vienna a cikin mota budurwa a lokacin sanyi da damina.
Dan uwansa Karl ya tafi don shiga aikin soja a Jihlava.
Ya fada wa Schindler da sauran mutane cewa 'Ku yi tafi, abokai, wasan kwaikwayo ya kare.'
Ya rasu yana da shekaru 56.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyuka a matsayin mai kida da mai kunna piano
keyAchievements.description: Shi mai kida ne na kasashen yamma da kuma mai kunna piano na kasar Jamus, kuma babban mai kida ne da ya yi aiki a lokacin sauyin salon kida na gargajiya (classicism) da na romanticism.

keyAchievements.title: Taken 'Masanin Kida' (樂성)
keyAchievements.description: Ana bayyana shi a matsayin gwarzo a lokuta da dama, kuma ana kiran sa da taken 'Masanin Kida' (樂성).

keyAchievements.title: Manyan shahararrun ayyuka
keyAchievements.description: Ayyukansa mafi shahara sun hada da "Symphony No. 3", "Symphony No. 5", "Symphony No. 6", "Symphony No. 9", "Pathétique Sonata", da "Moonlight Sonata".

keyAchievements.title: Aiki na farko da aka wallafa
keyAchievements.description: A watan Maris na 1783, ya wallafa aikinsa na farko, "Nine Variations on a March by Dressler, WoO 63" don piano.

keyAchievements.title: Piano sonatas na farko
keyAchievements.description: An yaba wa Piano Sonatas guda uku, WoO 47, wadanda aka wallafa a shekara ta 1783, da nuna basirarsa da bajintarsa a matsayin mai kida tun yana matashi.

keyAchievements.title: Neman tsara kidan ballet
keyAchievements.description: A shekara ta 1791, an nemi ya tsara kidan ballet "Music for a Knight's Ballet, WoO 1", wanda ya zama aikinsa na farko don fage.

keyAchievements.title: Aiki na farko mai lambar Op.
keyAchievements.description: A shekara ta 1795, ya wallafa aikinsa na farko mai lambar Op. (Piano Trios guda uku Nos. 1-3, Op. 1), wanda ya kawo masa nasarar kudi.

keyAchievements.title: Cello Sonatas Nos. 1-2, Op. 5
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara shi a Berlin a shekara ta 1796, kuma ya shahara wajen hada sassa daban-daban na cello da piano da kuma nuna fasahar kida mai girma (virtuoso).

keyAchievements.title: Piano Sonata No. 8 "Pathétique", Op. 13
keyAchievements.description: Wannan aiki da aka wallafa a shekara ta 1799 an bayyana shi a matsayin wanda ya fi dukkan ayyukansa na baya karfin hali, zurfin tunani, matakin kirkira, da fasahar sauti.

keyAchievements.title: Septet, Op. 20
keyAchievements.description: Ya kammala shi a shekara ta 1799 kuma yana daya cikin ayyukansa mafi shahara a rayuwarsa.

keyAchievements.title: String Quartets guda shida na farko, Op. 18
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara su tsakanin 1798 da 1800, aka wallafa su a shekara ta 1801, kuma an sadaukar da su ga Yarima Lobkowitz.

keyAchievements.title: Symphonies dinsa na 1 da na 2
keyAchievements.description: Gabatar da su a yake-yake na 1800 da 1803 ya sanya shi zama daya daga cikin matasa masu kida mafi muhimmanci bayan Haydn da Mozart.

keyAchievements.title: Kidan ballet "The Creatures of Prometheus, Op. 43"
keyAchievements.description: Ya kammala shi a lokacin bazara na 1801, kuma an nuna shi a karon farko a Burgtheater da ke Vienna kuma ya samu nasara.

keyAchievements.title: Piano Sonata No. 14 "Moonlight Sonata", Op. 27-2
keyAchievements.description: An wallafa shi a shekara ta 1802 kuma an sadaukar da shi ga Giulietta Guicciardi.

keyAchievements.title: Symphony No. 3 "Eroica"
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara shi a shekarun 1803-1804, kuma shi ne babban aikin da ya kaddamar da lokacinsa na tsakiya ko na 'gwarzo'.

keyAchievements.title: Opera Fidelio
keyAchievements.description: An nuna shi a karon farko a watan Nuwamba 1805, kuma an kammala shi bayan gyare-gyare daga baya.

keyAchievements.title: Mass in C major, Op. 86
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara shi a shekara ta 1807 bisa bukatar Yarima Esterházy.

keyAchievements.title: Babban wasan sadaka
keyAchievements.description: A watan Disamba na 1808, ya shirya kuma ya gabatar da babban wasan sadaka wanda ya hada da Symphonies Nos. 5 da 6, Piano Concerto No. 4, Mass in C major, da Choral Fantasy.

keyAchievements.title: Kidan wasan Egmont na Goethe, Op. 84
keyAchievements.description: An nemi ya tsara shi a karshen shekarar 1809 kuma ya fito a shekara ta 1810, wanda ya dace sosai da salon kida na 'gwarzo' na Beethoven.

keyAchievements.title: String Quartet No. 11 in F minor, Op. 95 ("Quartetto Serioso")
keyAchievements.description: An san shi a matsayin wani aikin na wannan lokaci.

keyAchievements.title: Piano Trio No. 7 in B-flat major, Op. 97 ("Archduke Trio")
keyAchievements.description: An sadaukar da shi ga mai tallafa masa, Rudolph.

keyAchievements.title: "Wellington's Victory", Op. 91 da Symphony No. 7, Op. 92
keyAchievements.description: An nuna su a karon farko a ranar 8 ga Disamba, 1813 a wani wasan sadaka kuma sun sami babban nasara.

keyAchievements.title: Piano Sonata No. 27 in E minor, Op. 90
keyAchievements.description: Wannan shi ne piano sonata na farko da ya tsara a lokacin bazara na 1814 bayan shekaru 5 na hutu.

keyAchievements.title: "An die ferne Geliebte, Op. 98"
keyAchievements.description: Ya kammala shi a shekara ta 1816 kuma ya gabatar da tsarin song cycle ga kidan gargajiya.

keyAchievements.title: Piano Sonata No. 29 "Hammerklavier", Op. 106
keyAchievements.description: Wannan yana daya daga cikin manyan ayyukansa da ya kammala a shekara ta 1818.

keyAchievements.title: "Missa solemnis", Op. 123
keyAchievements.description: Ya fara tsara shi a shekara ta 1819 bayan sanarwar daukaka matsayin Archduke Rudolph, kuma ya kammala shi a shekara ta 1823.

keyAchievements.title: "Diabelli Variations" guda 33, Op. 120
keyAchievements.description: Ya fara shi a shekara ta 1819 bisa bukatar Antonio Diabelli, kuma ya kammala shi a shekara ta 1823.

keyAchievements.title: Piano Sonatas Nos. 30 (Op. 109) da 31 (Op. 110)
keyAchievements.description: Suna daya cikin piano sonatas dinsa na karshe da aka wallafa a shekarun 1820 da 1821.

keyAchievements.title: Symphony No. 9
keyAchievements.description: Ya fara zayyana shi a shekara ta 1818 kuma ya kammala shi a shekara ta 1823. Bayan an nuna shi a karon farko a ranar 7 ga Mayu, 1824, ya sami yabo cewa 'wani gwanin kida da baya gajiya ya nuna mana sabuwar duniya'.

keyAchievements.title: String Quartet No. 12 in E-flat major, Op. 127
keyAchievements.description: Schuppanzigh Quartet ne ya gabatar da shi a karon farko a watan Maris na 1825.

keyAchievements.title: Quartet No. 14 in C-sharp minor, Op. 131
keyAchievements.description: Wannan shi ne na karshe a cikin jerin ayyukan da Beethoven da kansa ya kimanta a matsayin mafi kyawun aiki shi kadai.

keyAchievements.title: Quartet No. 16 in F major, Op. 135
keyAchievements.description: Wannan wani karin quartet ne da ya kammala lokacin da yake zaune a Gneixendorf.

faq.question: Yaushe kuma a ina aka haifi Beethoven?
faq.answer: An haife shi a Bonn, Jamus, kuma akwai rahoton cewa an yi masa baftisma a ranar 17 ga Disamba, 1770. Tun da al'ada a lokacin ita ce a yi baftisma cikin sa'o'i 24 bayan haihuwa, Beethoven da kansa ya dauki ranar haihuwarsa a matsayin 16 ga Disamba.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan ayyukan Beethoven?
faq.answer: Shahararrun ayyukansa sun hada da "Symphony No. 3", "Symphony No. 5", "Symphony No. 6", "Symphony No. 9", "Pathétique Sonata", da "Moonlight Sonata".

faq.question: Yaushe Beethoven ya mutu, kuma menene asalin dalilin mutuwarsa?
faq.answer: Ya rasu a ranar 26 ga Maris, 1827 yana da shekaru 56, kuma ana zargin cututtuka kamar cirrhosis na hanta, ciwon sanyi na huhu, da gubar dalma (lead poisoning) a matsayin dalilin mutuwarsa.

faq.question: Shin Beethoven ya rasa jinsa gaba daya?
faq.answer: Beethoven ya rasa jinsa ne a hankali, kuma ko da a shekarunsa na karshe ya iya gane sautuna kasa-kasa da kuma kararrawa farat daya, don haka bai zama kurma gaba daya ba.

faq.question: Menene taken Beethoven?
faq.answer: Ana kwatanta shi a matsayin gwarzo sau da yawa, kuma ana kiran sa da taken 'Masanin Kida' (樂성) ko kuma 'Waliyin Kida'.

faq.question: A wane lokaci na tarihi Beethoven ya yi aikinsa na kida?
faq.answer: Ya kasance babban mai kida da ya yi aiki a lokacin sauyin salon kida na gargajiya da na romanticism.

beethoven.missingDataNote: 베토벤의 정확한 출생일은 원문에 명시적으로 나와 있지 않고, 세례 기록과 당시 관습을 통해 추정됩니다. 사망 원인 또한 여러 가지가 의심된다고만 언급되어 있으며, 한 가지로 확실하게 밝혀져 있지 않습니다.

keyAchievements.title: Shugaban kasa mafi dadewa kan mulki a Amurka
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne shugaban kasa daya tilo a tarihin Amurka da ya yi mulki mafi dadewa kuma ya yi shugabanci fiye da sau uku (sauran sau hudu).

keyAchievements.title: Kaddamar da Tsarin New Deal
keyAchievements.description: Ya kaddamar da Tsarin New Deal don magance Babban Tawaye na Tattalin Arziki, inda ya samar da taimako ga marasa aikin yi da manoma don farfado da tattalin arziki.

keyAchievements.title: Canza tsarin siyasa da bude hanyar yanci na zamani (modern liberalism)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa 'Kawancen New Deal' wanda ya canza siyasar Amurka zuwa Tsarin Jam'iyyu na Biyar da kuma samar da tsarin yanci na zamani.

keyAchievements.title: Sauye-sauye a fannin kudi da aiki
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da muhimman dokokin tsara harkokin kudi, sadarwa, da aiki kamar kafa Hukumar Kula da Hannun Jari (SEC), Hukumar Inshorar Ajiya (FDIC), da kuma zartar da Dokar Alakar Ma'aikata ta Kasa.

keyAchievements.title: Soke dokar hana sayar da giya
keyAchievements.description: Ya sanya hannu kan Dokar Cullen-Harrison wadda ta kawo karshen lokacin dokar hana sayar da giya.

keyAchievements.title: Jagorantar Yakin Duniya na Biyu
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi aiki kafada da kafada da sauran shugabannin kasashe don jagorantar kasashen kawance (Allies) da ke yakar kasashen Axis, kuma ya kula da tattalin arzikin Amurka na lokacin yaki.

keyAchievements.title: Fara kera makamin nukiliya
keyAchievements.description: Ya fara kaddamar da aikin kera makamin nukiliya na farko a duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa harsashin Majalisar Dinkin Duniya (UN)
keyAchievements.description: Ya hada kai da sauran shugabannin kasashen kawance don kafa harsashin Majalisar Dinkin Duniya da sauran hukumomin bayan yaki.

keyAchievements.title: Gudanar da Manufar Makwabci Nagari (Good Neighbor Policy)
keyAchievements.description: Ya gudanar da Manufar Makwabci Nagari wadda ta soke hakkin shiga tsakanin Amurka kai tsaye a cikin harkokin kasashen Latin Amurka.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa tsarin tsaron jama'a (social security)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa tsarin tsaron jama'a a karkashin doka ta hynar Dokar Tsaron Jama'a don tabbatar da taimakon kudi ga tsofaffi, talakawa, da nakasassu.

keyAchievements.title: Kyautata ma'aunin aiki
keyAchievements.description: Ya zartar da Dokar Daidaita Sharudan Aiki (FLSA) wadda ta haramta aikin yara tare da kafa mafi karancin albashi na tarayya.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Ofishin Shugaban Kasa
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa Ofishin Shugaban Kasa don zama cibiyar gudanarwa ta tarayya ta hanyar Dokar Sake Tsari ta shekara 1939.

keyAchievements.title: Kokarin kare muhalli
keyAchievements.description: Ya karfafa fadadawa da tallafawa gandun daji na kasa da na jihohi, kuma ya yi kokarin kare muhalli ta hanyar amfani da kungiyoyin kiyaye muhalli na matasa.

faq.question: Franklin D. Roosevelt ya kasance shugaban kasa na nawa a Amurka?
faq.answer: Ya kasance Shugaban Kasa na 32 na Amurka.

faq.question: Menene manyan nasarorin Franklin D. Roosevelt?
faq.answer: Ya kaddamar da Tsarin New Deal don magance Babban Tawaye na Tattalin Arziki kuma ya jagoranci kasashen kawance a Yakin Duniya na Biyu.

faq.question: Sau nawa aka zabi Franklin D. Roosevelt a matsayin shugaban kasa?
faq.answer: Shi kadai ne a tarihin Amurka da aka zaba a matsayin shugaban kasa fiye da sau uku, wato sau hudu gaba daya.

faq.question: Wace rashin lafiya Franklin D. Roosevelt ya yi fama da ita?
faq.answer: An gano yana da cutar shan-inna (polio) wadda ta shanye kafafunsa a shekara ta 1921.

faq.question: Wace ce matar Franklin D. Roosevelt?
faq.answer: Matarsa ita ce Eleanor Roosevelt.

faq.question: Yaushe Franklin D. Roosevelt ya mutu?
faq.answer: Ya rasu a ranar 12 ga Afrilu, 1945.

timeline.event: Haihuwar Marcus Aurelius Antoninus a Rome.
Ya sanya tufafin masana falsafa kuma ya karbi salon rayuwarsu bisa umarnin Diognetus.
Antoninus Pius, magajin Hadrian, ya dauki Marcus a matsayin dansa.
Antoninus Pius ya zama sarki baada ya mutuwar Hadrian.
Ya yi aiki a matsayin Consul karkashin Antoninus Pius.
Ya zama Consul tare da Antoninus Pius a matsayin abokin aikinsa.
Ya zama Consul a karo na biyu.
Ya auri Faustina, diyar Antoninus Pius.
Haihuwar diyarsa ta farko Domitia Faustina.
안토니누스 피우스가 마르쿠스에게 트리부누스 권한과 임페리움을 내려줌.
Faustina ta haifi yan biyu maza Titus Aurelius Antoninus da Tiberius Aelius Aurelius (basu yi tsawon rai ba).
Haihuwar diyarsa Annia Aurelia Galeria Lucilla.
Ana tsammanin mutuwar diyarsa Domitia Faustina.
Haihuwar dansa Tiberius Aelius Antoninus (bai yi tsawon rai ba).
Mutuwar Domitia Lucilla, mahaifiyar Marcus.
Ya sake fuskantar mutuwar wani daban na yayansa (ba a san sunansa ba).
Faustina ta haifi yara mata Fadilla da Cornificia.
Bayan mutuwar Antoninus Pius, Marcus da Lucius Verus sun hau karagar mulki a matsayin hadin gwiwar sarakuna (co-emperors).
Ya rage yawan azurfa da ke cikin denarius, kudin Rome, daga 83.5% zuwa 79%.

timeline.year: Karshen lokacin zafi ko farkon kaka na 161
timeline.event: Vologases IV na Parthia ya shiga Masarautar Armenia, inda ya kori sarki ya kuma nada Pacorus a matsayin sarki.
Barkewar Yakin Parthia.
Lucius da kansa ya tafi filin fama don jagorantar Yakin Parthia.
An mamaye Artaxata, babban birnin Armenia.
Lucius ya sami taken 'Armeniacus'.
Sabon babban birnin Armenia, Kaine Polis, ya mayar da Artaxata.
Sojojin Rome sun wuce Mesopotamia don mamaye Edessa da sake nada Sarki Mannus. An juga mamaye Nisibis.
Sojojin Cassius sun isa Seleucia da Ctesiphon, inda suka mamaye Ctesiphon da kona fadar sarauta, sannan suka washe Seleucia.
Annoba ta Antonine ta barke a Mesopotamia kuma ta yadu zuwa Rome.
Sojojin Cassius sun haye Kogin Tigris don nufar Media kuma suka koma filin fama. Lucius ya sami taken 'Medicus'.
Marcus ya ayyana yayansa yan biyu Annius da Commodus a matsayin magada.
Barkewar yaki da kabilun Jamus (Marcomannic Wars).
Ya sake daidaita darajar denarius ta hanyar daukaka yawan azurfa da ke cikinsa daga 79% zuwa 82%.
Ana tsammanin co-emperor Lucius ya mutu sakamakon annoba.
Sojojin Rome sun fatattaki kabilun Jamus a lardin Dacia, amma babban kwamanda Fronto ya mutu a fage.
Mutanen Mauritania sun tayar da kayar baya a lardin Arewacin Afirka kuma suka kai hari har zuwa Hispania.
Ya kaddamar da shirin mulki na hadin gwiwa da dansa Commodus.
Ya mutu yana da shekaru 58 a wani sansanin soja kusa da Vindobona ko Sirmium.

keyAchievements.title: Sarkin Daular Rome
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance Sarki na 16 na Daular Rome (161-180) kuma na karshe a cikin Hadaddun Sarakuna Biyar (Five Good Emperors), kuma sarki na karshe na lokacin zaman lafiya na Pax Romana.

keyAchievements.title: Masanin falsafa na Stoic
keyAchievements.description: A matsayinsa na masanin falsafa na Stoic, ya rubuta littafin "Meditations" wanda ya zama muhimmin daftarin aiki don fahimtar falsafar Stoic ta da.

keyAchievements.title: Nasarorin soja
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami nasarar yake-yake da Daular Parthia da Masarautar Armenia a gabashi, kuma ya doke kabilun Jamus a Yakin Marcomannic.

keyAchievements.title: Gyaran tsarin kudi
keyAchievements.description: Ya dauki matakai don daidaita yawan azurfa da ke cikin denarius na Rome.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan shari'a da gudanarwa
keyAchievements.description: Ya nuna gagarumin goyon baya a fannoni guda uku: yantar da bayi, kare yara da masu fama da yunwa, da kuma zaben sanatocin birni.

keyAchievements.title: Gina abubuwan tunawa
keyAchievements.description: An gina Marcus Aurelius Column da mutum-mutumin doki a Rome don tunawa da nasarorin yakin da ya samu.

faq.question: Wane ne Marcus Aurelius?
faq.answer: Ya kasance Sarki na 16 na Daular Rome (161-180) kuma masanin falsafa na Stoic, kuma na karshe a cikin Hadaddun Sarakuna Biyar da na karshe a zamanin Pax Romana.

faq.question: Menene manyan nasarorin soja na Marcus Aurelius?
faq.answer: Ya sami nasarar yake-yake da Daular Parthia da Masarautar Armenia a gabashi, kuma ya doke kabilun Marcomanni, Quadi, da Iazyges a Yakin Marcomannic.

faq.question: Wane muhimmin littafi ya rubuta?
faq.answer: Littafin "Meditations" da ya rubuta yana da matukar muhimmanci wajen fahimtar falsafar Stoic ta da, kuma yana nuna tunaninsa na sirri game da rayuwa.

faq.question: Wadanne matsaloli Daular Rome ta fuskanta a lokacin mulkinsa?
faq.answer: A lokacin mulkinsa, Daular Rome ta fuskanci yake-yake masu yawa, kuma Annoba ta Antonine da ta barke a shekara ta 165 ko 166 ta shafi mutane da yawa, inda ta kashe kusan mutane miliyan 5 daga cikin mutane miliyan 10 na daular.

faq.question: Ta yaya Marcus Aurelius ya zabi magajinsa?
faq.answer: Ya zabi kada ya yi amfani da dan riko a matsayin magaji, don haka dansa Commodus ya gaje shi a matsayin sarki, sai dai wannan shawarar ta zama abin muhawara tsakanin masana tarihi na da da na yanzu.

faq.question: Wane ne Seneca yake nufi?
faq.answer: Seneca yana nufin Seneca Dattijo (mai fada a ji na Rome na da), ko kuma Seneca Yaro (dan siyasa, masanin falsafa da marubuci wanda ya kasance malamin Sarki Nero). Hakanan yana iya nufin kabilar Seneca ta kungiyar Iroquois ta yan asalin Arewacin Amurka, ko kuma kuskuren rubutu na kalmar Jafananci ta 'senaka' (baya).

seneca.missingDataNote: 연도 정보 부족으로 타임라인 생략. 특정 인물 '세네카'에 대한 업적 정보가 아닌, 여러 '세네카'에 대한 정의만 제공되어 주요 업적 항목 생략.

timeline.event: An haife shi ga mahaifinsa Shuliang He da mahaifiyarsa Yan Zhengzai a Qufu, Lardin Lu.
Mutuwar mahaifinsa Shuliang He.
Ya yi aure.
Mutuwar mahaifiyarsa Yan Zhengzai.
Ya auri diyar dangin Bingguan na Lardin Song.
Ya sami da namiji mai suna Li.
Ya bude makaranta a Lardin Lu kuma ya fara koyar da dalibai.
Ya fara aikin gwamnati a matsayin mai kula da asusu (Wili), sannan ya zama mai kula da kiwon dabbobi (Sizhi).
Ya gudu zuwa Lardin Qi tare da Sarki Duke Zhao na Lu sakamakon 'Tawayen Sanguan' na Lardin Lu.
Ya koma Lardin Lu daga Lardin Qi.
Ya zama shugaban gudanarwa na Zhongdu (Zhongduzai).
An daukaka matsayinsa zuwa Da Siku (Ministan Shari'a).
Ya bar Lardin Lu bayan ya fuskanci kiyayya daga Jisun Si, kuma ya yi yawace-yawace a kasashe daban-daban na tsawon shekaru 14.
Ya shiga damuwa bayan rasa dansa Boyu da dalibansa Yan Hui da Zilu daya bayan daya.
Ya koma mahaifarsa Qufu kuma ya sadaukar da kansa wajen koyar da dalibai.
Ya rasu yayin da dalibansa ke kallo.
Sarki Xuanzong na Daular Tang ya nada Confucius a matsayin 'Sarkin Wenzhao'.
Sarki Zhenzong na Daular Song ya ba shi taken girmamawa na 'Zhisheng Wenxuan Wang'.
Ya fara zama wanda ake kira da 'Dacheng Zhisheng Wenxuan Wang'.
An ba shi taken 'Zhisheng Xianshi'.
An ba shi taken 'Dacheng Zhisheng Wenxuan Xianshi'.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa makaranta ta farko a China
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne na farko a tarihin kasar Sin da ya kafa makarantar kansa don koyar da dalibai.

keyAchievements.title: Soke mummunar al'ada ta binne mutane da rayuka (immolation)
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba wa sarki shawara don soke mummunar al'adar binne bayi ko mutane da rayuka tare da mamaci wadda ta ci gaba da wanzuwa har zuwa lokacin.

keyAchievements.title: Kwato tsoffin yankunan Lardin Lu
keyAchievements.description: Ya kwato tsoffin yankunan da Lardin Lu ta rasa ta hanyar amfani da dabarun gaske wajen shawarwari da Lardin Qi.

keyAchievements.title: Koyar da Littattafai Guda Shida (Six Classics)
keyAchievements.description: '역', '시', '서', '예', '악', '춘추' 등 육경을 교재로 삼아 제자들을 교육했습니다.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da ra'ayin Ren (jin kai/kauna)
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da falsafar jin kai wadda ke mayar da hankali kan 'Ren' (仁) a matsayin babban burin ayyukan dan adam.

keyAchievements.title: Koyar da dalibai na gaba
keyAchievements.description: Ya koma mahaifarsa a shekarunsa na karshe kuma ya mayar da hankali kan koyar da dalibai, wanda ya sa ya samar da fitattun dalibai da yawa.

faq.question: Wane ne Confucius?
faq.answer: Ya kasance dan siyasa, masanin falsafa, da mai koyarwa na lokacin Spring and Autumn na kasar Sin ta da, kuma an san shi da zama wanda ya kafa addinin Confucianism.

faq.question: Menene babban ra'ayin Confucius?
faq.answer: Yana kunshe a cikin littafinsa na maganganu da ayyuka "Analects" (논어), inda ya gabatar da falsafar jin kai wadda ke dora 'Ren' (仁) a matsayin babban makasudin ayyukan dan adam.

faq.question: Wane irin ayyukan koyarwa Confucius ya yi?
faq.answer: Ya kafa makarantar kansa ta farko a tarihin kasar Sin don koyar da littattafai masu tsarki kamar Classic of Poetry, Classic of History, da I Ching, kuma ya yi kokarin tarbiyyantar da dalibai na gaba.

faq.question: Menene burin siyasa na Confucius?
faq.answer: Ya bayar da shawarar gudanar da mulki bisa ga nagarta maimakon doka (덕치주의) da kuma mayar da dan adam a matsay인 mafi muhimmanci (인본주의).

faq.question: Yaushe Confucius ya mutu?
faq.answer: Ya rasu a shekara ta 479 K.H yana da shekaru 72 yayin da dalibansa ke kallo.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Athens, tsohuwar kasar Girka.
Ya shiga yake-yake guda uku kai tsaye a matsayin soja mai dauke da makamai masu nauyi (hoplite).
Ya yi aiki a matsayin mai koyarwa don tarbiyyantar da matasa.
Ya shiga harkokin siyasa na tsawon shekara guda a matsayin memba na Majalisar Dattijai ta 500 (Boule).
'신성 모독죄'와 '젊은 세대들을 타락시킨 죄'로 기소당하고 71세의 나이로 사약을 마시고 사형당함.

keyAchievements.title: Mutumin farko a falsafar yammacin duniya
keyAchievements.description: Ya shafe rayuwarsa wajen tattaunawa a kan matsalolin falsafa daban-daban, don haka ana daukar sa a matsayin mutum na farko a falsafar yammacin duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da Hanyar Socratic (Maieutics / Socratic Method)
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da dabarar haihuwar tunani (산파술) wadda ke taimakawa wajen gano kuskure a cikin tunani ta hanyar amfani da dialectics na Zeno don jagorantar mutum zuwa ga tunani na kwarai.

keyAchievements.title: Jaddada alakar da ke tsakanin nagarta da jahilci
keyAchievements.description: Ya jaddada fannin dabi'u ta hanyar bayyana cewa munanan ayyuka suna faruwa ne saboda jahilci, yay인 다 nagarta ke fitowa daga tunani mai ma'ana.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa tunani mai mayar da hankali kan kurwa (soul)
keyAchievements.description: A matsayinsa na mai bin ra'ayin raba jiki da kurwa (dualism), ya yi da'awar cewa kurwa ba ta mutuwa kuma dukkan ilimi yana kunshe a cikinta.

keyAchievements.title: Taken 'Malami mafi girma na dan adam'
keyAchievements.description: An kara masa girma ko kuma an kira shi da taken 'Malami mafi girma na dan adam' saboda ya yi tasiri a kan mutane da dama ta hanyar kyawawan dabi'unsa da iliminsa.

faq.question: Shin Socrates ya bar wani littafi?
faq.answer: Socrates bai bar wani littafi ba; an san falsafarsa ne ta hanyar rubuce-rubucen dalibansa da na mutanen lokacin.

faq.question: Shin Socrates ya fada cewa 'Dokar da ba ta da kyau ma doka ce'?
faq.answer: Babu wata shaida da ke nuna cewa Socrates da kansa ya fadi wannan maganar; wannan karin maganar ya fara bayyana ne daga bakin Domitius Ulpianus a lokacin Daular Rome.

faq.question: Ta yaya Socrates ya mutu?
faq.answer: An tuhume shi da laifin 'saba wa alloli' da 'lalata tunanin matasa', kuma aka yanke masa hukuncin kisa, inda ya rasu bayan ya sha kofin guba.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa ra'ayin 'Dao' (Hanya) a matsayin gaskiyar sararin samaniya
