keyAchievements.description: Shi ne mutum na farko a kasar Sin da ya yi tunani a kan dukkan abubuwan da ke cikin sararin samaniya, kuma ya kira asalin tafarkin sararin samaniya da suna 'Dao'.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da falsafar 'Wu wei' (Aiki ba tare da kokari ba / Bin dabi'a)
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da falsafar 'Wu wei' wadda ke cewa ya kamata mutum ya rayu bisa ga dokokin dabi'a da lamiri mai kyau maimakon ya takura kansa ga tsare-tsare na wucin gadi na mutane.

keyAchievements.title: Littafin "Tao Te Ching" an ce shi ya rubuta shi
keyAchievements.description: Ana daukar littafin "Tao Te Ching" na kashi biyu mai surori 81, wanda ke kunshe da asalin 'Dao' da falsafar rayuwa ta zahiri, a matsayin littafin da ya rubuta.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa harsashin addinin Taoism da falsafar Taoist
keyAchievements.description: 그의 사상은 후세에 '도교의 시조'로 불리며 '노장 사상' 또는 '도가 사상'으로 발전하는 데 중요한 기초를 마련했습니다.

faq.question: Shin Laozi ya kasance mutum na gaskiya a tarihi?
faq.answer: Sima Qian ya rubuta cewa akwai mutane uku da ake tunanin su ne Laozi, kuma a karshe ya bayyana cewa Laozi wani babban mutum ne mai nisa da jama'a wanda ba za a iya sanin ainihin rayuwarsa ba. A shekaru na baya, ya zama al'ada a dauki Li Er, wanda ake cewa ya koyar da Confucius dabi'u, a matsayin Laozi, amma wannan yana iya zama tatsuniya da aka kirkiro don nuna wanda ya kafa falsafar Taoist.

faq.question: Menene babban falsafar Laozi?
faq.answer: Laozi ya bayyana asalin tsarin sararin samaniya a matsayin 'Dao', kuma ya kalli cewa 'Dao' ba shi da wani siffa ko launi amma yana nan a kowane lokaci. Falsafarsa ta shahara da ra'ayin 'Wu wei', inda yake jaddada cewa ya kamata mutane su rayu cikin gaskiya bisa dokokin dabi'a maimakon bin tsare-tsare na mutane.

faq.question: Menene abubuwan da ke kunshe a cikin "Tao Te Ching"?
faq.answer: Littafin "Tao Te Ching" yana bayyana asalin 'Dao' da falsafar rayuwa ta zahiri, inda yake kunshe da ra'ayin cewa 'Dao' yana samar da dukkan abubuwa amma baya mallakarsu ko mulkarsu. Hakanan yana gabatar da ra'ayin rayuwa na rashin jayayya da bin dabi'a, da kuma ra'ayin samar da sararin samaniya guda daya.

lao-tzu.missingDataNote: 노자의 정확한 생몰 연대 및 생애에 대한 구체적인 정보가 원문에 부족하여 타임라인을 구성할 수 없었습니다. 당 현종과 송 진종에 의한 추존 기록은 있으나, 해당 사건의 정확한 연도가 명시되어 있지 않아 타임라인에 포함하지 않았습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Stagira, yankin Thrace na tsibirin Chalkidiki da ke arewacin Girka.
Shiga makarantar Academeia ta Plato yana da shekaru 17.
Ya tafi Atarneus bisa gayyatar Hermias, shugaban mulki, dab da mutuwar Plato.
Ya tafi Mieza a matsayin malami na sirri na Yarima Alexander bisa bukatar Sarki Philip II na Macedonia.
Ya koma Stagira don ci gaba da bincike bayan Alexander ya zama mai rikon sarauta.
Ya sake komawa Athens don kafa makarantar Lyceum, inda ya yi koyarwa da bincike na tsawon shekaru 12.
Baynan samun labarin mutuwar Alexander Mai Girma, ya tafi Chalcis, mahaifarsa ta bangaren mahaifiyarsa, don kauce wa boren adawa da Macedonia.
Ya rasu yana da shekaru 63 sakamakon ciwon ciki.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da tsarin falsafar yammacin duniya
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne ya fara samar da cikakken tsarin falsafar yammacin duniya wanda ya hada da dabi'u, kyawu (aesthetics), tunani (logic), kimiyya, siyasa, da metaphysics.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa dakin karatu da lambun dabbobi na Makarantar Lyceum
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa dakin karatu a Makarantar Lyceum da kuma lambun dabbobi na farko a duniya tare da taimakon Alexander Mai Girma.

keyAchievements.title: Jagora a fannin ilimin tunani (Logic)
keyAchievements.description: Ya zama jagora a fannin ilimin tunani na yau da kullum ta hanyar wallafa "Prior Analytics", kuma ya kirkiro tsarin syllogism (삼단 논법).

keyAchievements.title: Binciken ilimin dabbobi (Zoology)
keyAchievements.description: Ya duba, ya rubuta, kuma ya rarraba nau'ikan dabbobi fiye da 500, kuma ya bar cikakkun rahotanni kamar gano yadda kifi whale da kifin shark ke haihuwa.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da ka'idar dalilai hudu (Four Causes)
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da ka'idar dalilai hudu wadda ke bayyana dalilin abubuwan da ke motsawa da canzawa ta fannoni hudu: dalilin sinadari (material cause), siffa (formal cause), aiki (efficient cause), da manufa (final cause).

keyAchievements.title: Bayanin camera obscura
keyAchievements.description: Littafinsa "Problems" yana kunshe da tsohon bayanin camera obscura, wadda ke zama kamar kyamarar farko.

faq.question: Wane ne malamin Aristotelian kuma wane ne dalibinsa?
faq.answer: Aristotle ya kasance dalibin Plato kuma malamin Alexander Mai Girma.

faq.question: Wadanne fannoni Aristotle ya rubuta littattafai a kai?
faq.answer: Ya rubuta littattafai a kan fannoni daban-daban kamar physics, metaphysics, waka, biology, zoology, logic, iya magana, siyasa, dabi'u, da kimiyyar dabi'u.

faq.question: Menene misali mafi shahara a cikin ilimin tunani na Aristotle?
faq.answer: Misali mafi shahara shi ne 'syllogism', wanda ke zama hujja ta amfani da hanyar deductions.

faq.question: Menene ka'idar sinadarai hudu (Four Elements) ta Aristotle?
faq.answer: Aristotle ya gabatar da sinadarai hudu: wuta (mai zafi da bushewa), kasa (mai sanyi da bushewa), iska (mai zafi da jika), da ruwa (mai sanyi da jika).

faq.question: Menene makasudin ilimi a gurin Aristotle?
faq.answer: Aristotle ya dora makasudin ilimi a kan samar da rayuwa mai ma'ana da kuma samun rayuwa mai dadi.

faq.question: Wane irin ra'ayi Aristotle yake da shi game da mata?
faq.answer: Ra'ayin Aristotle game da mata ya yi babban tasiri a kan masana na yammacin duniya har zuwa karshen zamanin tsakiya (Middle Ages), kuma ana tattauna shi a matsayin muhimmin batu a tarihin mata.

timeline.event: Haihuwa
Ya tafi Sicily bisa rokon Dionysius II don kokarin kafa gwamnati ta kwarai.
Mutuwa
Shekarar karshe da makarantar Academeia ta Plato ta ci gaba da aiki.

keyAchievements.title: Kaddamar da ra'ayin gaskiya na tunani (Objective Idealism)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance masanin falsafa kuma masanin kasar Girka wanda ya kafa tsarin objective idealism.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa makarantar Academeia da koyarwa
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa makarantar 'Academeia', wadda ke zama asalin jami'o'i na yanzu, don koyarwa.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta tattaunawa (Dialogues)
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta tattaunawa a kan batutuwan falsafa da dama kamar siyasa, dabi'u, metaphysics, da epistemology.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da ka'idar siffofi (Theory of Forms / Ideas)
keyAchievements.description: Ya fita daban da ra'ayoyin malaminsa Socrates don gabatar da nasa salon ra'ayi da ake kira Theory of Forms (이데아론).

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da ka'idar mulki ta masana falsafa (Philosopher King)
keyAchievements.description: "철학자가 왕이 되거나, 왕이 철학을 해야 한다"는 유명한 철인 정치론을 전개했다.

keyAchievements.title: Kaddamar da farkon ra'ayin gurguzu na tunani (Idealistic Communism)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kaddamar da farkon ra'ayin gurguzu na tunani ta hanyar ra'ayin dan adam mai ma'ana wanda ke da 'nauyin' zama 'halitta mai ma'ana' don kafa al'umma ta kwarai.

faq.question: Wane ne Plato?
faq.answer: Plato ya kasance dalibin Socrates kuma malamin Aristotle, kuma masanin falsafa da masanin kasar Girka wanda ya kafa tsarin objective idealism.

faq.question: Menene manyan nasarorin Plato?
faq.answer: Ya kafa tsarin objective idealism, ya kafa makarantar 'Academeia' wadda ke zama asalin jami'o'i na yanzu, kuma ya gabatar da Theory of Forms da tsarin Philosopher King.

faq.question: Wace siffa rubuce-rubucen Plato ke da ita?
faq.answer: Yawancin rubuce-rubucensa na yanzu suna cikin tsarin tattaunawa (dialogues), inda yake nuna malaminsa Socrates a matsayin mai bayani na farko.

faq.question: Menene ra'ayin Plato game da ilimi?
faq.answer: Plato ya raba ilimi zuwa matakai 5, inda kowane mataki yake koyar da adabi, wasanni, lissafi, da dialectics da nufin samar da shugabannin kasa.

faq.question: Wane ra'ayi Plato ke da shi game da ci gaban yara?
faq.answer: Plato ya kalli cewa akwai fannoni uku na ci gaban dan adam: sha'awa (appetite), rai (spirit), da hankali (reason), kuma ya jaddada muhimmancin kwarewa a lokacin yarinta tare da bayar da shawarar raba yara maza da mata a shekaru 6.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Vinci, wani kauye da ke yankin Tuscany.
Rahoton haraji ya nuna cewa yana zama a gida daya da mahaifinsa.
Mutuwar mahaifiyarsa ta riko Albiere.
Ya koma Florence tare da iyalinsa yana da shekaru 14 kuma ya shiga cikin shagon aiki (workshop) na Andrea del Verrocchio.
Ya yi rajista a kungiyar masu zane ta Florence kuma ya shahara a matsayin mai zane.
Ya taimaka wajen kera aikin malaminsa Verrocchio, "The Baptism of Christ", inda ya zana mala'ika a bangaren hagu.
An gayyace shi ya zama mai zane na dangin Sforza a Milan.
Ya kera "Virgin of the Rocks" (da ke Louvre Museum).
Ya mayar da hankali kan binciken tsarin jikin dan adam da na dawakai, kuma ya sadaukar da kansa ga takardun bincike a kan tsarin jikin dan adam, tashiwar tsuntsaye, da optics.
Ya kera "The Last Supper".
Ya koma Florence a shekara ta 1500 sakamakon mamayar Milan da Sarki Louis XII na Faransa ya yi.
Cesare Borgia ya gayyace shi don gudanar da aikin injiniya na gina hanyoyin ruwa da tsara birane.
Ya koma Florence kuma ya fara zana "Mona Lisa".
Mahaifinsa Ser Piero ya mutu yana da shekaru 77.
Ya zama mai zane na fadar Sarki Louis XII na Faransa a Milan.
Ya koma Florence sannan ya koma Rome karkashin tallafin Giuliano de' Medici.
Ya hadu da Francis I a Bologna kuma aka gayyace shi zuwa Faransa.
Mai tallafa masa Giuliano de' Medici ya rasu.
Ya haye tuddan Alps tare da dalibinsa Francesco Melzi don nufar Amboise, Faransa.
Ya rubuta wasiyyarsa kamar yana jin mutuwar sa ta gabato.
Ya rasu yana da shekaru 67 a gidansa na sirri da ke Clos Lucé, Faransa.
Mutuwar Francesco Melzi ta sanya yawancin hotunan zane-zane (croquis) da zane-zane na Leonardo da Vinci bayyana a fili ga duniya.
Ba a samu ragowar kashinsa ba a yanzu saboda an lalata kabarinsa lokacin da aka rushe cocin a lokacin Juyin Juya Halin Faransa.

keyAchievements.title: Masanin fannoni daban-daban (Polymath)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance babban masanin kasar Italiya wanda ya yi ayyuka a fannoni daban-daban kamar zane, sassaka, kirkira, gine-gine, tsarin jiki (anatomy), geography, da kida.

keyAchievements.title: Zabar sa a matsayin mutum mafi kirkira
keyAchievements.description: Ya come na daya a matsayin mutum mafi kirkira a cikin kwararrun masana 10 da suka canza tarihin dan adam wadanda majallar Nature ta zaba a shekara ta 2007.

keyAchievements.title: Mona Lisa
keyAchievements.description: Wannan shi ne zane mafi shahara a duniya a yanzu, kuma shi ne aikin da ke wakiltar Louvre Museum.

keyAchievements.title: The Last Supper
keyAchievements.description: Yana daya cikin shahararrun ayyukanta, kuma ana daukar sa a matsayin babban aikin karni.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da salon zane na Sfumato
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da dabarar Sfumato, wadda ke zana iska da ke kewaye da abubuwa don nuna ainihin siffa mai fuskoki uku (three-dimensional).

keyAchievements.title: Bincike da gano abubuwan kimiyya
keyAchievements.description: Ya gano ka'idojin motsin igiyar ruwa (wave motion), karfin ruwa (fluid pressure), famfo, da hawan ruwa, kuma ya yi bincike a kan ka'idojin jirgin sama, aerodynamics, anatomy, da botany.

keyAchievements.title: Littafin "A Treatise on Painting" (De Pictura / Trattato della Pittura)
keyAchievements.description: Ya bar kasidu da dama ciki har da littafin "A Treatise on Painting", wando ke zama muhimmin daftarin aiki na ka'idar fasaha ta Renaissance.

faq.question: Yaushe kuma a ina aka haifi Leonardo da Vinci kuma yaushe ya mutu?
faq.answer: An haife shi a ranar Asabar, 15 ga Afrilu, 1452 da karfe 3 na dare a Vinci, wani kauye da ke yankin Tuscany.

faq.question: Menene shahararrun ayyukan Leonardo da Vinci?
faq.answer: A cikin ayyukansa daban-daban, 'Mona Lisa' ita ce tafi shahara a yanzu, kuma 'The Last Supper' ma tana daya daga cikin manyan ayyukansa.

faq.question: Wadanne fannoni Leonardo da Vinci ya yi aiki a kai?
faq.answer: Ya yi ayyuka da ayyukan yi daban-daban kamar mai zane, mai sassaka, mai kirkira, mai tsara gine-gine, masanin anatomy, masanin geography, da mai kida.

faq.question: Shin Leonardo da Vinci ya sami ilimi na yau da kullum?
faq.answer: Tun da shi dan shege ne, bai koyi karatu da rubutu a makarantar gwamnati ba, kuma bai sami ilimi na yau da kullum a kan harsunan Latin da Girka ko sauran ilimi ba.

faq.question: A ina Leonardo da Vinci ya mutu?
faq.answer: Ya rasu a ranar 2 ga Mayu, 1519 yana da shekaru 67 a gidansa na sirri da ke Clos Lucé, Faransa.

faq.question: Shin kashin Leonardo da Vinci yana nan a yanzu?
faq.answer: Ba a samu ragowar kashinsa ba a yanzu saboda an lalata kabarinsa lokacin da aka rushe cocin a shekara ta 1802 a lokacin Juyin Juya Halin Faransa.

faq.question: Shin Leonardo da Vinci ya yi aure?
faq.answer: Ya rayu a matsayin gwauron daji a duk rayuwarsa don haka bai bar yara ba.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Salzburg, kasar Austria.
Ya kware sosai wajen kunna keyboard da violin, kuma ya fara tsara kida.
Ya yi tafiyar gabatar da wasanni zuwa kasashen Turai daban-daban kamar Jamus, Paris, da London.
Ya koyi tsara kida karkashin Johann Christian Bach a London, Birtaniya.
Ya koyi ka'idojin kida karkashin Giovanni Battista Martini lokacin da yake tafiya a Italiya.
Ya sami kwarin gwiwa na kwarai daga kidan Haydn, Wagenseil, da Monn lokacin da yake tafiya a Vienna.
Ya gabatar da Piano Concerto (K.242) a karon farko ta amfani da kayan kida da Stein ya samar.
An kori shi daga mukaminsa na mai kidan fadar Salzburg don haka ya tafi Vienna, inda ya zauna har mutuwarsa.
Ya auri Constanze.
Ya shiga kungiyar Freemasons reshen 'Beneficence'.
Ya rasu.
Matarsa Constanze ta sake auren wani jakadan Denmark Georg Nikolaus von Nissen.

keyAchievements.title: Tsara ayyukan kida masu yawa
keyAchievements.description: Duk da gajeriyar rayuwarsa, ya bar ayyukan kida fiye da 800 a kusan dukkan fannonin kidan gargajiya na yammacin duniya saboda saurin kirkirarsa.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyuka mafi kyau na kowane fanni
keyAchievements.description: Ana daukar yawancin ayyukansa a matsayin mafi kyau a fannonin symphony, concerto, kidan daki (chamber music), opera, da choral repertoire.

keyAchievements.title: Tsara manyan wasannin opera
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara wasannin opera kamar "Idomeneo", "The Abduction from the Seraglio", "The Marriage of Figaro", "Don Giovanni", "Così fan tutte", da "The Magic Flute".

keyAchievements.title: Piano Concertos
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara piano concertos fiye da 12 a Vienna, wadanda ake dauka a matsayin daya cikin manyan nasarorinsa.

keyAchievements.title: Tsara shahararrun ayyuka
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara shahararrun ayyuka kamar symphonies dinsa guda uku na karshe ciki har da Symphony No. 41, serenade "Eine kleine Nachtmusik", Clarinet Concerto, da kuma "Requiem" wanda ya bar shi ba tare da kammalawa ba.

faq.question: Menene dalilin mutuwar Mozart?
faq.answer: Rahoton ya bayyana cewa dalilin shi ne 'zazzabi mai yawa', amma babu isasshen bayani don gano cutar ta hanyar magunguna na zamani, kuma akwai ra'ayoyi daban-daban kamar trichinosis, guba, da zazzabin rheumatic.

faq.question: Shin Mozart ya mutu cikin talauci?
faq.answer: Ko da yake ana yawan fadar cewa ya mutu cikin talauci da rashin kulawa, akwai kuma hujja mai karfi da ke cewa yana da kudin shiga mai kyau.

faq.question: Shin Mozart ya hadu da Beethoven?
faq.answer: Akwai labarin cewa sun hadu a Vienna a shekara ta 1784, amma tun da wannan labarin ya fito ne kawai daga littafin tarihin Mozart na Otto Jahn, ba shi da cikakken aminci a yanzu.

faq.question: Shin gaskiya ne cewa Antonio Salieri ne ya kashe Mozart da guba?
faq.answer: Labarin gasar da ke tsakanin Mozart da Salieri da kuma kisan guba labari ne kawai na kan titi, kuma an yi amfani da shi a matsayin jigon ayyuka daban-daban kamar wasan kwaikwayo na Alexander Pushkin, wasan opera na Nikolai Rimsky-Korsakov, da wasan kwaikwayo na Peter Shaffer.

faq.question: Shin Mozart ya tsara kida lokaci guda ne sakamakon samun kwarin gwiwa?
faq.answer: Jita-jitar cewa Mozart ya kammala kidan a kansa sannan ya rubuta shi ba tare da yin wani gyara ba tatsuniya ce kawai; a gaskiya ya kasance mai kida da ke yin aiki da taka-tsantsan da kokari.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Stratford, kasar Ingila.
Ya bar makaranta kuma ya taimaka wa iyalinsa saboda matsalolin kudi na gida.
Ya auri Anne Hathaway, wadda ta girme shi da shekaru takwas, yana da shekaru 18.
Ya sami izinin aure daga kotun cocin Anglican ta Worcester.
Ya sami diya mace mai suna Susanna.
An haifi yan biyu Hamnet da Judith.
Ya isa babban birnin London.
Ya yi aiki a matsayin mai rubuta wasan kwaikwayo na tsawon shekaru 24, inda ya wallafa wasanni guda 38 ciki har da wasan dariya da na ban tausayi (comedies da tragedies).
Ana iya fahimtar cewa ya kasance shahararren mai rubuta wasan kwaikwayo a London.
Ya wallafa dogon shirin waka "Venus and Adonis".
Ya wallafa dogon shirin waka "The Rape of Lucrece" kuma ya zama mai rubuta wasan kwaikwayo na musamman na kungiyar wasan kwaikwayo ta Lord Chamberlain's Men.
Ya gabatar da wasan dariya na soyayya "A Midsummer Night's Dream" kuma ya sami yabo mai kyau.
Kungiyar Lord Chamberlain's Men ta gina Globe Theatre a kudancin Kogin Thames.
Bayan mutuwar Sarauniya Elizabeth I, kungiyar Lord Chamberlain's Men ta canza suna zuwa King's Men.
Babban diyarsa Susanna ta auri likita John Hall.
An wallafa "Shakespeare's Sonnets".
An sami labarin cewa ya koma mahaifarsa Stratford shekaru kadan kafin mutuwarsa.
An nemi ya halarci kotu a matsayin shaida game da rajistar auren Mary, diyar Mountjoy.
Ya sayi gatehouse na tsohon gidan ibada na Blackfriars a London.
Karamar diyarsa Judith ta auri mai sayar da giyar inabi Thomas Quiney.
Ya rasu ya bar matarsa da yara mata biyu.
An wallafa dukkan wasannin kwaikwayonsa ta hannun abokan aikinsa na wasan kwaikwayo (ciki har da wasanni 36).

keyAchievements.title: Matsayin mai rubuta wasan kwaikwayo mafi kyau a Birtaniya
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami matsayin 'mai rubuta wasan kwaikwayo mafi kyau a Birtaniya' lokacin yana da rai, kuma an yaba masa a matsayin mafi kyawun mai rubuta wasan kwaikwayo na lokacin.

keyAchievements.title: Kera shahararrun ayyukan gargajiya na dan adam
keyAchievements.description: Ya bar manyan ayyukan wasan kwaikwayo da ke nuna zurfin tunanin dan adam kamar "Romeo and Juliet" da "Hamlet", wadanda suka zama ayyukan gargajiya na dan adam.

keyAchievements.title: Kwarewa a fannoni daban-daban da kuma rubuce-rubuce masu yawa
keyAchievements.description: Ya kware a dukkan fannonin wasan kwaikwayo kamar wasan tarihi, wasan dariya, wasan ban tausayi, da wasan dariya-ban tausayi (tragicomedies), kuma ya rubuta wasanni 36, sonnets 154, da dogayen wakoki guda biyu.

keyAchievements.title: Taimakawa wajen ci gaban harshen Turanci na zamani
keyAchievements.description: Ya nuna karfin harshen Turanci na zamani don samar da kyakkyawan tsarin wakar wasan kwaikwayo, wanda ya yi babban tasiri a kan yawan kalmomi da kalaman Turanci na yanzu.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta manyan wasannin ban tausayi guda hudu (Four Great Tragedies)
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta manyan wasannin ban tausayi guda hudu wadanda ke da babban shahara a tarihin adabi na duniya: "Hamlet", "Othello", "King Lear", da "Macbeth".

faq.question: Shin William Shakespeare ya sami ilimin jami'ar?
faq.answer: Sabanin sauran marubuta na lokacin, bai sami wani ilimi na gaba da sakandare ba, amma ya zama babban marubuci saboda basirarsa ta amfani da harshe da kuma fahimtar fasahar fage.

faq.question: Shin akwai wata muhawara game da ainihin marubucin ayyukan Shakespeare?
faq.answer: Ko da yake an sami tambayoyi game da ko Shakespeare wanda bai sami ilimin jami'ar ba ne ya rubuta dukkan ayyukan, babu wata shaidar da ke nuna cewa wasu mutane kamar Francis Bacon ne ainihin marubutan.

faq.question: Wadanne nau'ikan ayyuka Shakespeare ya rubuta?
faq.answer: Ya kware a dukkan fannonin wasan kwaikwayo kamar wasan tarihi, wasan dariya, wasan ban tausayi, da tragicomedies, kuma ya rubuta wasanni 36, sonnets 154, da dogayen wakoki guda biyu.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan wasannin ban tausayi guda hudu na Shakespeare?
faq.answer: Manyan wasannin ban tausayi guda hudu sune "Hamlet", "Othello", "King Lear", da "Macbeth", wadanda suka sanya shi zama marubuci mai matukar shahara a tarihin adabi na duniya.

william-shakespeare.missingDataNote: 셰익스피어의 생애에 대한 자료는 불충분하여 추측과 빈약한 기록으로만 헤아려 볼 수 있으며, 특히 유랑기 행적과 작품 활동 시작 시기는 명확하게 밝혀지지 않았다. 또한, 유년기 부모님 이름에 대한 원문 내 불일치가 있어 해당 정보는 생략되었다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Ulm, Masarautar Württemberg na Daular Jamus.
Komawa kasar Switzerland.
Ya bar zama dan kasar Jamus don kauce wa aikin soja, kuma ya yi rajista a shirin samun difloma ta koyar da lissafi da physics a Zurich Polytechnic.
Ya ci jarrabawar lissafi da physics kuma ya sami difloma ta tarayya ta koyarwa.
Ya sami zama dan kasar Switzerland.
Ya auri Mileva Marić kuma ya sami aiki na din-din-din a Ofishin Mallakar Fasaha na Switzerland (Patent Office) da ke Bern.

Ya sami digirin digirgir (PhD) daga Jami'ar Zurich, kuma ya wallafa kasidu guda 4 a kan tasirin photoelectric (광전 효과), motsin Brownian (브라운 운동), special relativity (특수 상대성이론), da daidaiton nauyi da karfi (E=mc²) a cikin shekarar da ake kira 'Annus Mirabilis' (Shekarar Al'ajabi).
Nada shi a matsayin mai koyarwa (Privatdozent) a Jami'ar Bern.
Nada shi a matsayin Mataimakin Farfesa na theoretical physics a Jami'ar Zurich.
Ya zama cikakken Farfesa a Jami'ar Charles-Ferdinand ta Jamus da ke Prague.
Ya koma Berlin don shiga Hukumar Kimiyya ta Prussia da Jami'ar Humboldt.
Ya kammala ka'idar general relativity cikin nasara.
Ya zama darekta na Kaiser Wilhelm Institute for Physics kuma ya sake zama dan kasar Jamus.
Ya rabu da Mileva Marić kuma ya auri Elsa Löwenthal. Ya shahara a duniya bayan Sir Arthur Eddington ya tabbatar da hasashensa na karkacewar haske.
An ba shi lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannin Physics saboda gudunmawar da ya bayar ga theoretical physics, musamman gano dokar photoelectric effect.
Ya yi tafiya zuwa kasashen Asiya da suka hada da Singapore, Ceylon, da Japan, da kuma Palestine.

Yayin da yake ziyara a Amurka, ba zai iya komawa Jamus ba saboda hawan mulki na Adolf Hitler, don hakan ya bar zama dan kasar Jamus a hukumance kuma ya zama babban masani a Cibiyar Nazari ta Princeton (Institute for Advanced Study).
Ya sanya hannu kan wasika zuwa ga Shugaba Roosevelt don yi masa kashedi game da shirin makamin nukiliya na Jamus da kuma ba da shawarar cewa Amurka ta kaddamar da irin wannan bincike.
Ya zama dan kasar Amurka.
Ya rasu yana da shekaru 76.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da ka'idar relativity
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da special relativity da general relativity, wadanda ke zama manyan shasshaka biyu na physics na zamani, kuma ya kawo sauyi a kan fahimtar lokaci, sarari, da gravity.

keyAchievements.title: Ka'idar daidaiton nauyi da karfi (E=mc²)
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da 'equation mafi shahara a duniya' wanda ke nuna cewa nauyi (mass) da karfi (energy) za su iya musanya juna.

keyAchievements.title: Gano dokar photoelectric effect
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da muhimmiyar gudunmawa ga ci gaban quantum theory ta hanyar gabatar da ra'ayin cewa haske yana tafiya a matsadar kwararar kwayoyin haske (photons), kuma ya lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannin Physics.

keyAchievements.title: Bayanin motsin Brownian (Brownian motion)
keyAchievements.description: Ya bayyana motsin kwayoyin cuta mara tsari a cikin ruwa, wanda ya samar da kwakkwarar shaida a kan wanzuwar atoms da molecules.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa harsashin ilimin sararin samaniya na zamani (modern cosmology)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa harsashin modern cosmology wanda ke nazarin tsari da ci gaban sararin samaniya bisa ga general relativity.

keyAchievements.title: Hasashen gravitational waves
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi hasashen wanzuwar gravitational waves wadanda ke zama motsi a cikin tsarin lokaci da sarari, kuma an tabbatar da hakan ta hanyar duba kusan bayan shekaru 100.

faq.question: Wace muhimmiyar nasarar kimiyya ce ta sa Albert Einstein ya lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel?
faq.answer: Ya lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannin Physics a shekara ta 1921 saboda 'gudunmawar da ya bayar ga theoretical physics, musamman gano dokar photoelectric effect'.

faq.question: Menene gudunmawar kimiyya mafi shahara ta Einstein?
faq.answer: Ya samar da ka'idar relativity kuma ya ba da muhimmiyar gudunmawa ga ci gaban quantum mechanics, kuma equation dinsa na daidaiton nauyi da karfi E=mc² ana kiransa 'equation mafi shahara a duniya'.

faq.question: Me yasa Einstein ya bar Jamus ya koma Amurka?
faq.answer: Bayan Adolf Hitler ya hau mulki a Jamus a shekara ta 1933, ya ki amincewa da manufofin gwamnatin Nazi don hakan ya zauna a Amurka, kuma ya zama dan kasar Amurka a shekara ta 1940.

faq.question: Wane matsayi Einstein yake da shi game da kera makamin nukiliya?
faq.answer: Ya sanya hannu kan wasika don yi wa Shugaba Roosevelt kashedi game da shirin makamin nukiliya na Jamus dab da Yakin Duniya na Biyu, amma gaba daya ya soki ra'ayin kera makaman nukiliya.

faq.question: Wane irin ra'ayin addini Einstein yake da shi?
faq.answer: Ya bayyana cewa ya amince da Ubangiji na pantheistic (wanda ba na mutum ba) a cikin falsafar Baruch Spinoza, kuma ya kira kansa da 'mara addini mai zurfin addini' maimakon mara yarda da Allah (atheist).

timeline.event: An haife ta a matsayin ta biyar a cikin yara biyar (namiji daya da mata hudu) a Warsaw.
Mahaifiyarta wadda ke fama da ciwon fuka na huhu (tuberculosis) ta rasu tana da shekaru 10.
Ta fara aiki a matsayin malama a gida tun tana da shekaru 17, kuma ta yanke shawarar tafiyar karatu zuwa Paris, Faransa.
Ta shiga Jami'ar Sorbonne da ke Paris don karantar lissafi da physics.
Ta auri masanin kimiyya Pierre Curie.
Tare da Pierre Curie, ta fara raba tare da gano radium chloride daga pitchblende, wani irin dutsen uranium.
Ta samu radium chloride mai kyau gram 0.1 bayan sarrafa tan 8 na datti na dutsen uranium.
Ta lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannin Physics tare da mijinta Pierre Curie da Henri Becquerel.
Ta lashe lambar yabo ta Davy Medal tare da Pierre Curie.
Ta lashe lambar yabo ta Matteucci Medal tare da Pierre Curie.
Bayan mutuwar mijinta Pierre Curie, ta fara koyarwa a Jami'ar Sorbonne da ranar 5 ga Nuwamba, inda ta zama mace ta farko da ta zama farfesa.
Ta lashe lambar yabo ta Actonian Prize.
Ta yi nasarar auna nauyin atom na radium cikin daidaci.
Ta lashe lambar yabo ta Elliott Cresson Medal.
Ta samu radium na karfe ta hanyar electrolysis na radium chloride.
Ta lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannin Chemistry ita kadai saboda gano radium da polonium da kuma binciken siffofin radium da sinadaransa.
Lafiyarta ta lalace sosai lokacin da ta kai shekaru 56.
Ta shiga gidan kula da tsofaffi na Sancellemoz da ke Switzerland.
Ta rasu tana da shekaru 67 sakamakon cutar daji na kashi, sankarar jini (leukemia), da aplastic anemia da suka hadu saboda yawan shiga cikin radiation.
Baynan shekaru 61 da mutuwarta, gwamnatin Faransa ta amince da gudunmawarta kuma aka binne ta a Panthéon, inda ta zama mace ta farko da aka yi wa hakan.

keyAchievements.title: Lashe lambobin yabo na Nobel guda biyu da zama mace ta farko da ta lashe shi
keyAchievements.description: Ita ce mace ta farko da ta lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel, kuma mutum daya tilo da ya lashe duka lambar yabo ta Physics da ta Chemistry.

keyAchievements.title: Gano polonium da radium
keyAchievements.description: Tare da Pierre Curie, ta gano tare da sanya wa sababbin sinadarai suna polonium da radium.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa ra'ayin radioactivity
keyAchievements.description: Ta fara amfani da kalmar 'radioactivity', kuma ta bayyana cewa radiation yana faruwa ne a matakin atom, wanda ya nuna sabuwar hanya ga binciken kimiyya.

keyAchievements.title: Mace ta farko da ta zama farfesa a Jami'ar Sorbonne
keyAchievements.description: Bayan mutuwar mijinta, ta fara koyarwa a Jami'ar Sorbonne inda ta zama mace ta farko da ta zama farfesa.

faq.question: Wadanne lambobin yabo na Nobel Marie Curie ta lashe?
faq.answer: Marie Curie ta lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannin Physics a shekara ta 1903 tare da mijinta Pierre Curie da Henri Becquerel, kuma ta lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannin Chemistry ita kadai a shekara ta 1911.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan sinadarai da Marie Curie ta gano?
faq.answer: Marie Curie ta gano sababbin sinadarai guda biyu, polonium da radium, tare da mijinta Pierre Curie.

faq.question: Ta yaya Marie Curie ta mutu?
faq.answer: Marie Curie ta rasu a ranar 4 ga Yuli, 1934 tana da shekaru 67 sakamakon cutar daji na kashi, sankarar jini, da aplastic anemia da suka hadu saboda yawan shiga cikin radiation.

faq.question: Shin an binne Marie Curie a Panthéon na Faransa?
faq.answer: E, an binne Marie Curie a Panthéon, makabartar kasa ta Faransa, a watan Afrilu na 1995, wanda ya kasance bayan shekaru 61 da mutuwarta, kuma ita ce mace ta farko da aka yi wa hakan.

timeline.event: Haihuwar Nikola Tesla
Shiga Jami'ar Fasaha ta Graz (Technische Universität Graz) da ke Austria
Ya sami aiki a reshen Paris na Kamfanin Tarho na Edison ta hanyar shirye-shiryen yan uwa Puskas
Ya tafi Amurka tare da wasikar yabo daga Charles Batchelor kuma ya hadu da Edison
Ya hadu da A. K. Brown, shugaban kamfanin Western Union Telegraph Company, kuma suka kafa kamfani mai suna Tesla
Kafa sabon kamfanin lantarki na Tesla (Tesla Electric Company)
Westinghouse ya kafa tashar wutar lantarki ta amfani da tsarin AC na Tesla don samar da wuta ga yankin ma'adinai
Ya yi koyarwa a taron kimiyya na wutar lantarki kuma ya gabatar da mechanical oscillator da electrical oscillator
Ya nuna hanyar sadarwa ta rediyo (wireless communication) a karon farko a jawabinsa a Franklin Institute da ke Philadelphia da National Electric Light Association da ke St. Louis
Hukumar Niagara ta kulla yarjejeniya da Westinghouse, wanda ya kawo karshen yakin wutar lantarki (War of Currents)
Realizing wireless communication via radio for the first time
Mummunan gobara ta tashi a dakin gwaje-gwajensa da ke 33-35 South Fifth Avenue
Raporta hadarin X-rays ga New York Academy of Sciences
Neman lambar mallakar fasaha ta wireless communication a ofishin patent
Ya bar New York kuma ya nuna jirgin ruwa mai tafiya da na'urar sarrafawa ta nesa (remote-controlled boat) a Chicago
Ya isa Colorado Springs bayan ya karbi shawarar Leonard Curtis
Ya auna walƙiya yayin guguwa kuma ya gano wani lokaci na daban, inda ya fahimci cewa su ne standing waves (정상파)
Ya kammala aiki a Colorado kuma ya shirya barin wurin
Amincewa da lambar mallakar fasaha ta wireless communication
An wallafa wata makala a jaridar <New York Times> da ke cewa an zabi Edison da Tesla don lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannin Physics tare
Kamfanin dillacin labarai na Reuters ya bayar da rahoton cewa Hukumar Nobel ta zabi Farfesa William Henry Bragg da Farfesa William Lawrence Bragg a matsayin wadanda suka lashe lambar yabo
Ya kafa asalin tunanin radar don manufar soja
Mutuwar Nikola Tesla
CGPM (General Conference on Weights and Measures) ta samar da SI unit na magnetic flux density a matsayin 'tesla' a Paris
An bayyana mutum-mutumin tunawa da cikar shekaru 150 da haihuwar Nikola Tesla a hukumance a Queen Victoria Park da ke Niagara Falls, Ontario, Canada

keyAchievements.title: Tsara tsarin AC (Alternating Current System)
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara transformer da tsarin AC kuma ya ba da muhimmiyar gudunmawa ga wutar lantarki ta kasuwanci.

keyAchievements.title: Ci gaban electromagnetism
keyAchievements.description: An san shi da kyau a matsayin mutumin da ya kawo ci gaba mai kyau na electromagnetism a karshen karni na 19 da farkon karni na 20.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa asalin tsarin AC na zamani
keyAchievements.description: Lambar mallakar fasaharsa da bincikensa na ilimi sun kafa asalin tsarin AC na zamani wanda ya hada da polyphase system na raba wuta da kuma AC motor.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da wireless communication
keyAchievements.description: Ana kiran sa da uban wireless communication saboda shi ne ya fara samar da sadarwa ta rediyo a karon farko a shekara ta 1894.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da ka'idar rotating magnetic field
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da wani sabon tsarin da ke amfani da ka'idar rotating magnetic field bisa ga tunanin da ya samu lokacin da yake yawo a lambun shakatawa tare da abokinsa.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar polyphase system
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da polyphase system wanda ya hada da polyphase induction motor, split-phase induction motor, da polyphase synchronous motor don bada damar samarwa, aikawa, rabawa, da amfani da wutar lantarki.

keyAchievements.title: Binciken X-rays
keyAchievements.description: Ya dauki hotunan X-ray kafin gano da Wilhelm Conrad Röntgen ya yi, kuma ya kai rahoton hadarin X-rays ga New York Academy a shekara ta 1897 baada ya gano cewa suna da illa ga jikin dan adam.

keyAchievements.title: Tunani na wireless energy transfer da sadarwa
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami ra'ayoyin gudanar da yanayin duniya ta hanyar magnetic field, aikawa da makamashi ta hanyar wireless, da hanyoyin sadarwa.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da fluidic diode
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da wani daftarin bututu mai musamman don bada damar amfani da man fetur mai cin wuta yayin kera babban turbine a tashar wutar lantarki ta Waterside, kuma ana kiran wannan da 'fluidic diode'.

keyAchievements.title: Kaddamar da asalin radar
keyAchievements.description: Ya kaddamar da asalin radar don manufar soja don bin diddigin jiragen ruwa na karkashin kasa na Jamus (U-boats) a lokacin yakin duniya na farko kusan shekara ta 1917.

keyAchievements.title: Wallafa ka'idar dynamic theory of gravity
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da wata sabuwar ka'idar gravity mai suna dynamic theory of gravity wadda ke soki ka'idar Einstein ta hanyar bayyana cewa karkacewar sarari ba zai yiwu ba kuma sararin samaniya cike yake da ether.

faq.question: Wane ne Nikola Tesla?
faq.answer: Nikola Tesla ya kasance mai kirkira, masanin physics, da injiniyan wutar lantarki dan asalin Serbia da Amurka, wanda ya tsara transformer da tsarin AC kuma ya kafa asalin tsarin AC na zamani don jagorantar juyin juya halin masana'antu na biyu.

faq.question: Menene manyan nasarorin Tesla?
faq.answer: Shi ne ya fara samar da tsarin AC, polyphase induction motor, da wireless communication, kuma ya ba da gagarumar gudunmawa a fannin electromagnetism kamar binciken X-rays, tunanin wireless energy transfer, da kaddamar da asalin radar.

faq.question: Wane irin alaka ke tsakanin Tesla da Edison?
faq.answer: Tesla ya yi aiki a kamfanin Edison inda ya inganta kyawun janareta, amma ya bar kamfanin saboda bai sami kyautar kudi da aka yi masa alkawari ba. Daga baya ya yi 'yakin wutar lantarki' da tsarin DC na Edison ta hanyar amfani da tsarin AC dinsa.

faq.question: Shin Tesla ya lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel?
faq.answer: An sami makala a shekara ta 1915 da ke cewa za a ba shi lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannin Physics tare da wani, amma bai sami sanarwa ta hukumance ba kuma wasu mutane ne suka lashe lambar yabon a karshe.

faq.question: Shin Hanyar kirkirar Tesla tana da ban mamaki?
faq.answer: Yana da duniyar tunani ta kansa a cikin kansa, kuma yana iya magance dukkan matakan da ake bukata don kirkira a cikin kansa ba tare da wani daftarin tsari ko gwaje-gwaje na musamman ba.

faq.question: Wadanne misalai ne aka yi amfani da sunan Tesla a kai?
faq.answer: An yi amfani da sunansa ga SI unit na magnetic flux density 'tesla (T)', crater a bayan wata, asteroid '2244 Tesla', tashar wutar lantarki da filin jirgin sama a Serbia, da kuma kamfanin kera motoci na lantarki 'Tesla Motors'.

faq.question: Wane irin hali Tesla yake da shi?
faq.answer: Ya kasance mai son rubuta waka da kirkira tun yana yaro, kuma yana da wasu halaye na daban kamar auna yawan abinci kafin ya ci da kuma nuna sha'awa ga lu'ulu'u masu haske. Hakanan yana da wasu tsoro na musamman da kuma obsessive-compulsive tendencies.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Zundert, kasar Netherlands.
An haifi kaninsa Theodorus Theo.
An tura shi zuwa makarantar kauye ta Zundert.
Shiga makarantar kwana ta Zevenbergen.
An tura shi zuwa makarantar sakandare ta Tilburg.
Ya bar makaranta kuma ya dawo gida.
Ya fara aiki a Goupil & Cie art gallery da ke The Hague.
Ya koma reshen London na Goupil & Cie da ke Southampton Street.
An tura shi aiki zuwa Paris.
An kore shi daga Goupil & Cie; ya yi aiki a matsayin malami na wucin gadi marar albashi a makarantar kwana ta Ramsgate, Birtaniya; ya zama mataimakin mai wa'azi na cocin Methodist.
Ya shirya jarrabawar shiga tsarin karantar shari'ar addini (theology) karkashin kawunsa Johannes Stricker a Amsterdam.
Ya fadi a jarrabawar shiga theology kuma ya bar gidan kawunsa; ya dauki darasin watanni 3 a makarantar wa'azi ta Protestant da ke Laeken kusa da Brussels.
Ya yi aikin mai wa'azi a kauyen Petit-Wasmes na ma'adinai da ke Borinage, Belgium; an kore shi daga kungiyar wa'azi.
Ya koma Cuesmes don zama tare da masu hakar gwal; ya fara yin zane da gaske bisa shawarar Theo.
Ya tafi Brussels kuma ya yi rajista a Royal Academy of Fine Arts.
Ya koma Etten don zama tare da iyalinsa na wani lokaci mai tsawo; ya nemi auren Cornelia 'Kee' Vos-Stricker, diyar kawunsa, amma ta ki yarda.

Ya koyi zanen mai (oil painting) karkashin Anton Mauve kuma ya samar da dakin aiki; ya fara zama tare da Klasina Maria 'Sien' Hoornik, karuwa mai shaye-shaye; ya kwanta a asibiti na tsawon makonni 3 saboda ciwon sanyi na fitsari (gonorrhea).
Ya rabu da Sien da yaranta; ya koma lardin Drenthe da ke arewacin Netherlands; ya koma gidan iyayensa da ke Nuenen.
Ya shiga soyayya da makwabciyarsa Margot Begemann, amma ta yi yunkurin kashe kanta da guba saboda iyayensu sun ki amincewa da aurensu.
Mahaifinsa ya rasu a ranar 26 ga Maris; ya kammala "The Potato Eaters"; an nuna "The Potato Eaters" a karon farko a The Hague.
Ya koma Antwerp.
안트베르펜의 왕립 미술 아카데미 고등부 입학 시험에 응시하여 입학 허가를 받았다; 과로, 부실한 식사, 과도한 흡연으로 병원에 입원했다; 파리로 이사하여 동생 테오의 아파트에서 함께 살며 페르낭 코르몽의 화실에서 미술을 배웠다.
Ya koma Asnières-sur-Seine a arewa maso yammacin Paris; ya zama abokin Paul Gauguin; ya gudanar da nunin zane-zane a Montmartre tare da Bernard, Anquetin, da Toulouse-Lautrec.

Ya bar Paris ya koma Arles da ke kudancin Faransa don neman lafiya; ya yi hayar dakuna 4 a 2 Place Lamartine da ke Arles; Paul Gauguin ya isa Arles; ya yanke kunnensa na hagu bayan sun yi fada da Gauguin kuma ya kwanta a asibiti.

Ya koma Gidan Rawaya (Yellow House) da ke Arles; yan sanda sun rufe gidansa saboda korafe-korafen mazauna kauyen, don haka ya koma asibiti; ya shiga dakin jinya na Saint-Paul-de-Mausole da ke Saint-Rémy-de-Provence da kansa.
알베르 오리에가 《메르퀴르 드 프랑스》에서 그의 작품을 찬양했다; 브뤼셀의 Les XX로부터 연례 전시에 참여해 달라는 초청을 받았다; 파리 샹젤리제 거리에서 열린 제6회 앙데팡당전에 참여했다; 생레미의 병원을 떠나 파리 교외 오베르쉬르우아즈로 거처를 옮겼다.
Ya yi yunkurin kashe kansa ta hanyar harbin kirjinsa da revolver a ranar 27 ga Yuli.
Ya rasu a ranar 29 ga Yuli.
An binne shi a makabartar Auvers-sur-Oise a ranar 30 ga Yuli.
Kaninsa Theo ya rasu a ranar 25 ga Janairu.
Jo van Gogh-Bonger, matar Theo, ta mayar da gawar Theo kusa da kabarin Vincent.

keyAchievements.title: Shahararren mai zane na Post-Impressionism
keyAchievements.description: Yana daya cikin shahararrun masu zane na Post-Impressionism a tarihin fasahar yammacin duniya, wanda ya taimaka wajen samar da Expressionism a fasahar zamani.

keyAchievements.title: Mai kera ayyukan fasaha da dama
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera ayyukan fasaha kusan 2,100, ciki har da zanen mai 860, a cikin shekaru 10 kacal.

keyAchievements.title: Launuka masu karfi da salon goga mai karfi
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa salon zane na musamman mai dauke da launuka masu karfi da dramatics na goga a cikin zanen kasa (landscapes), static objects (still lifes), hotunan mutane, da hotunansa na kansa.

keyAchievements.title: Amfani da launuka a matsayin alama
keyAchievements.description: Ya yarda cewa launuka suna da tasiri na tunani da dabi'u fiye da kwatanta abu kawai, kuma ya yi amfani da launin rawaya (yellow) a matsayin alamar hasken rana, rayuwa, da Ubangiji.

keyAchievements.title: Jerin hotunansa na kansa
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera hotunansa na kansa fiye da 43 tsakanin 1885 da 1889 don bayyana zurfin tunaninsa da yanayin jikinsa da hankalinsa daban-daban.

keyAchievements.title: Shahara a duniya bayan mutuwa
keyAchievements.description: Kodayake zane guda daya kacal ya sayar lokacin yana da rai, bayan mutuwarsa fasaharsa da tarihin rayuwarsa sun zama alamar gwanin kida da aka fahimta ba daidai ba, kuma ayyukansa suna cikin zanen-zane mafi tsada a duniya.

faq.question: Zane nawa Vincent van Gogh ya sayar lokacin yana da rai?
faq.answer: Zane guda daya kacal ya sayar lokacin yana da rai, wato "The Red Vineyard".

faq.question: Ayyuka nawa Vincent van Gogh ya kera a duk rayuwarsa?
faq.answer: Ya kera ayyukan fasaha kusan 2,100, ciki har da zanen mai 860, a cikin shekaru 10 kacal.

faq.question: Me yasa Vincent van Gogh ya yanke kunnensa?
faq.answer: Da alama ya ji wasu muryoyi bayan sun yi fada da Paul Gauguin, don hivyo ya yanke duka ko sashi na kunnensa na hagu da reza, wanda ke nuna cewa ya fuskanci matsalar hauka ta farat daya.

faq.question: Ta yaya Vincent van Gogh ya mutu?
faq.answer: Ya yi yunkurin kashe kansa ta hanyar harbin kirjinsa da revolver a cikin gonar alkama yana da shekaru 37 a ranar 27 ga Yuli, 1890, kuma ya rasu bayan kwanaki biyu a ranar 29 ga Yuli sakamakon ciwon da raunin ya haifar.

faq.question: Wane irin alaka ke tsakanin Vincent van Gogh da kaninsa Theo?
faq.answer: Kaninsa Theo ya tallafa wa Vincent a fannin kudi da na zuciya, kuma sun rike daddiyar abota ta hanyar aikawa da wasiku daruruwa a duk rayuwarsa.

faq.question: Wane zane na Van Gogh aka sayar da mafi tsada?
faq.answer: A ranar 15 ga Mayu, 1990, an sayar da zanesa na "Portrait of Dr. Gachet" (kashi na farko) a kon dalar Amurka miliyan 82.5 a gidan gwanjo na Christie's, wanda ya kafa sabon tarihin mafi tsada.

timeline.event: Kakansa Abraham Lincoln ya rasu bayan da yan asalin Amurka (Native Americans) suka kai masa hari.
Haihuwar Abraham Lincoln
Iyalinsa sun rasa filayensu sakamakon takaddamar mallakar kasa.
Mutuwar mahaifiyarsa Nancy Lincoln
Mahaifinsa Thomas Lincoln ya auri Sarah Johnston a matsayin mata ta biyu.
Yayarsa Sarah Lincoln ta rasu yayin haihuwa.
Iyalinsa sun koma filin gwamnati na Macon, Illinois.
Lincoln ya isa kauyen New Salem, Illinois kuma ya fara aiki karkashin Denton Offutt.
Ya tsaya takarar zaben majalisar dokoki ta Illinois amma bai yi nasara ba.
Ya sami lasisin lauya ta hanyar koyon kansa.
Zaben sa a matsayin dan majalisar jihar Illinois.
Ya hadu da Ann Rutledge a New Salem.
Mutuwar Ann Rutledge
Kawo karshen alakarta da Mary Owens.
Yin alkawarin aure da Mary Todd.
Auren Mary Todd.
Haihuwar babban dansa Robert Todd Lincoln.
Iyalinsa sun sayi gida a Springfield.
Zaben sa a matsayin dan majalisar wakilai ta tarayya (House of Representatives).
Haihuwar dansa na biyu Edward Baker Lincoln.
Mutuwar dansa na biyu Edward Baker Lincoln.
Haihuwar dansa na uku William Wallace Lincoln.
Haihuwar dansa na hudu Tad Lincoln.
Ya tsaya takarar zaben Sanata na tarayya amma bai yi nasara ba.
An zabe shi a matsayin dan takarar shugaban kasa a taron Jam'iyyar Republican.
Zaben sa a matsayin Shugaban Kasa na 16 na Amurka.
Jihar South Carolina ta sanar da janyewa daga tarayya (Union).
Wakilan jihohi 7 na kudu sun hadu a Montgomery don kafa Kungiyar Jihohin Kudu (Confederacy).
Rantsar da shi a matsayin Shugaban Kasa.
Barkewar Yakin Basasa na Amurka (American Civil War) tun daga Yakin Fort Sumter.
Ya magance hadarin yaki da Birtaniya a cikin shari'ar Trent Affair.
Mutuwar dansa na uku William Wallace Lincoln.
Majalisa ta zartar da dokar yantar da bayin wadanda suka shiga Yakin Basasa da karfi.
Nasara ta sojojin arewa (Union) a Yakin Antietam.
Ya sanar da daftarin farko na yantar da bayi (Preliminary Emancipation Proclamation).
Ya sanar da kaddamar da Dokar Yantar da Bayi (Emancipation Proclamation).
Ya kafa Jam'iyyar National Union Party kuma ya sake lashe zaben shugaban kasa.
Yakin Basasa ya zo karshe bayan faduwar Richmond, babban birnin kudu.
John Wilkes Booth ya kashe shi lokacin da yake kallon wasan kwaikwayo a Ford's Theatre.
Mutuwa
An harbe John Wilkes Booth ya mutu.
Dansa na hudu Tad Lincoln ya mutu yana matashi a Chicago.
Robert Lincoln ya tura mahaifiyarsa Mary Lincoln zuwa asibitin mahaukata.

keyAchievements.title: Zama Shugaban Kasa na 16 na Amurka
keyAchievements.description: Ya jagoranci kasar a lokacin babban rikicin cikin gida na Yakin Basasa don kiyaye tarayya da kuma soke bauta.

keyAchievements.title: Jagorantar soke bauta
keyAchievements.description: Ya kaddamar da Dokar Yantar da Bayi a shekara ta 1863 kuma ya jagoranci soke bauta ta hanyar zartar da Gyara na 13 ga Tsarin Mulkin Amurka.

keyAchievements.title: Nasara a Yakin Basasa
keyAchievements.description: Ya mayar da hankali kan samun nasara a yakin ta fannin soja da na siyasa, kuma ya zabi manyan kwamandoji kamar Janar Ulysses S. Grant don samun nasara a Yakin Basasa.

keyAchievements.title: Magance shari'ar Trent Affair
keyAchievements.description: Ya magance Trent Affair wadda ta taba kawo hadarin yaki da Birtaniya a karshen shekara ta 1861.

keyAchievements.title: Jawabin Gettysburg (Gettysburg Address)
keyAchievements.description: Ya zama alamar yanci, daidaci, da dimokuradiyya na Amurka, kuma yana daya cikin jawabai da aka fi ambata a tarihin kasar.

keyAchievements.title: Samun lasisin lauya ta hanyar koyon kansa
keyAchievements.description: Ya kammala karatunsa da kansa maimakon zuwa makaranta, kuma ya zama lauya bayan ya ci jarrabawar lauyoyi.

faq.question: Yaya Abraham Lincoln ya sami ilimi?
faq.answer: Ya kammala karatunsa da kansa maimakon zuwa makaranta, kuma dukkan iliminsa na yau da kullum ya kasance watanni 18 kacal na darussa karkashin malamai daban-daban da ke zagayawa.

faq.question: Wane matsayi Lincoln yake da shi game da bauta?
faq.answer: Ya kasance mai nuna adawa ga fadada bauta a fili, kuma ya soki bauta a matsayin 'tsarin mugunta'.

faq.question: Me yasa aka kashe Lincoln?
faq.answer: John Wilkes Booth, wani shahararren dan wasan kwaikwayo mai goyon bayan kudu, ya fusata da jawabin Lincoln a kan hakkin kada kuri'a na bakaken fata, don haka ya kashe shi a Ford's Theatre a ranar 14 ga Afrilu, 1865.

faq.question: Shin Lincoln ya kasance mai kokawa (wrestler)?
faq.answer: 프로레슬링이 처음 생겨날 당시 프로레슬러로 연명한 적이 있으며, 12년 동안 많은 싸움에서 단 1번밖에 패하지 않았을 정도로 강한 선수였습니다.

faq.question: Wane irin hali Lincoln yake da shi?
faq.answer: Ya kasance mai son yin wasa da barkwanci, amma ya yi fama da cutar damuwa (depression) na dogon lokaci saboda mutuwar mahaifiyarsa da yayarsa tun suna matasa da kuma rashin masoyiyarsa.

timeline.event: An haife shi ga Augustine Washington da Mary Ball Washington a Westmoreland County, lardin Virginia.
Ya taimaka wajen auna filin Lord Fairfax da ke yammacin Blue Ridge.
Ya yi aiki a matsayin babban mai auna fili na farko a Culpeper County da aka kafa sabo.
Ya tafi jinya a Barbados tare da yayansa Lawrence don neman lafiya ga ciwon fuka na Lawrence.
형 로렌스 사망 후 그의 부동산 일부를 상속받고 식민지 총독 부관 임무 일부를 떠맡음. 버지니아 군대의 부관 참모로 임명되어 소령이 됨.
Ya shiga rundunar soja ta Virginia yana da shekaru 21. A watan Disamba, ya tafi iyakar Ohio bisa bukatar Gwamna Dinwiddie don isar da kashedi na karshe na Birtaniya ga Faransawa.
Ya auri Martha Dandridge Custis kuma ya zama daya cikin mutane mafi arziki a jihar Virginia.
An nada shi a matsayin babban kwamandan rundunar Continental Army da aka kafa a Taron Continental Congress don yakar Birtaniya.
Ya koma gidansa don gudanar da rayuwarsa ta sirri bayan karshen Yakin Yancin Kai na Amurka.
Ya shugabanci Taron Tsara Tsarin Mulki na Philadelphia (Philadelphia Convention) don tsara sabon Tsarin Mulki na Amurka.
An zabe shi ta hanyar goyon baya na bai daya a zaben shugaban kasa na Amurka, kuma ya zama shugaban kasa na farko na kasar.

Ya sanya hannu kan Jay Treaty da Birtaniya don kauce wa yaki. Ya jagoranci sojojin jihar da kansa don danne boren Whiskey Rebellion. Ya sanya hannu kan Dokar Sojan Ruwa ta 1794 (Naval Act of 1794) a ranar 27 ga Maris don kaddamar da ita.
An sanya hannu kan yarjejeniyar zaman lafiya tsakanin Amurka da Algiers.
Ya zartar da dokar tallafawa kudin kera jiragen ruwa guda 3 wadanda suka kusa kammala.
Ya sauka daga mulki bayan ya yi shugabanci sau biyu, wanda ya kafa al'adar yin mulki sau biyu kacal ga shugaban kasa.
Ya rasu yana da shekaru 67.
Shugaba Abraham Lincoln ya ba shi matsayin babban janar na soja na musamman na Amurka (General of the Army).
Shugaba Ulysses S. Grant ya ba shi matsayin marshal na soja na Amurka.
Shugaba Gerald Ford ya ba shi matsayin babban kwamandan soja na musamman na Amurka (General of the Armies).

keyAchievements.title: Zama Shugaban Kasa na farko na Amurka
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi shugabanci ga shekara ta 1789 zuwa 1797 a matsayin shugaban kasa na farko, inda ya kafa asalin ayyuka da al'adun sassan gwamnatin tarayya.

keyAchievements.title: Babban kwamandan Yakin Yancin Kai na Amurka
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi aiki a matsayin babban kwamandan rundunar Continental Army da shekara ta 1775 zuwa 1783 a lokacin Yakin Yancin Kai na Amurka, inda ya samu yancin kan kasar.

keyAchievements.title: Shugabancin Taron Tsara Tsarin Mulki na Philadelphia
keyAchievements.description: Ya shugabanci Taron Philadelphia a shekara ta 1787 don tsara daftarin Tsarin Mulki na Amurka.

keyAchievements.title: Gudanar da manufar rashin shiga tsakani
keyAchievements.description: Ya bi manufar rashin shiga tsakani a harkokin kasashen waje, musamman ta hanyar rike tsaka-tsaki a yake-yaken da suka barke a Turai.

keyAchievements.title: Kokarin kafa gwamnatin tsakiya mai karfi
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi kokarin kafa gwamnatin tsakiya mai karfi ta hanyar tsara bashi na kasa, kaddamar da tsarin haraji mai kyau, da kafa banki na kasa.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa al'adar shugabanci sau biyu kacal
keyAchievements.description: 헌법에 임기 제한 조항이 없었음에도 3선 권유를 거절하고 2선 연임 후 퇴임하여 관례를 세웠습니다.

keyAchievements.title: Danne boren Whiskey Rebellion
keyAchievements.description: Ya jagoranci sojoji da kansa don danne boren Whiskey Rebellion a shekara ta 1794 don kafa ikon gwamnatin tarayya.

keyAchievements.title: Taimakawa wajen kafa Sojan Ruwan Amurka
keyAchievements.description: Ya sanya hannu kan 'Dokar Sojan Ruwa ta 1794' don bada gudunmawa ta kwarai wajen kafa Sojan Ruwan Amurka.

keyAchievements.title: Sanar da jawabin bankwana
keyAchievements.description: Ya bar shahararren 'jawabin bankwana' yayin sauka daga mulki don bada shawarwari a kan mahimmancin hadin kai, kashedi game da bangaranci, da manufofin kasashen waje.

keyAchievements.title: Taimakawa wajen tsara ofishin shugaban kasa da samar da dimokuradiyya ta jama'a
keyAchievements.description: Ana kimanta shi da cewa ya taka rawar gani wajen tsara ofishin shugaban kasa da samar da dimokuradiyya ta jama'a a Amurka.

faq.question: George Washington ya kasance shugaban kasa na nawa a Amurka?
faq.answer: George Washington shi ne shugaban kasa na farko na Amurka wanda ya yi mulki daga shekara ta 1789 zuwa 1797.

faq.question: Wace rawar George Washington ya taka a Yakin Yancin Kai na Amurka?
faq.answer: Ya kasance babban kwamandan rundunar Continental Army daga shekara ta 1775 zuwa 1783 a lokacin Yakin Yancin Kai na Amurka, inda ya samu yancin kan kasar.

faq.question: Ta yaya George Washington ya lashe zaben shugaban kasa?
faq.answer: An zabe shi ta hanyar goyon baya na bai daya a zaben shugaban kasa na Amurka na shekara ta 1789, wanda ya kasance shi kadai tilo da aka yi wa hakan a tarihin kasar.

faq.question: Sau nawa George Washington ya yi shugabanci?
faq.answer: Ya sauka daga mulki bayan ya yi shugabanci sau biyu, wanda ya kafa al'adar yin mulki sau biyu kacal ga shugaban kasa.

faq.question: Yaushe George Washington ya mutu?
faq.answer: George Washington ya rasu a shekara ta 1799 yana da shekaru 67.

faq.question: Shin George Washington ya taimaka wajen kafa Sojan Ruwan Amurka?
faq.answer: Ya sanya hannu kan 'Dokar Sojan Ruwa ta 1794' don bada gudunmawa ta kwarai wajen kafa Sojan Ruwan Amurka.

faq.question: Wace irin manufar kasashen waje George Washington ya gudanar?
faq.answer: Ya bi manufar rashin shiga tsakani a harkokin kasashen waje, musamman ta hanyar rike tsaka-tsaki a yake-yaken da suka barke a Turai.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin dan na uku na Yi Jeong a Geoncheon-dong, kudancin Hanseong a ranar 28 ga Afrilu (8 ga Maris a kalandar gargajiya).
Ya auri wata mace ta dangin Bang kuma ya shirya jarrabawar soja ta hanyar koyon dabarun yaki karkashin tallafin surukinsa Bang Jin.
Ya tsaya jarrabawar soja ta musamman ta Hullyeonwon yana da shekaru 27 amma ya fadi saboda ya fado daga kan doki.
Ya ci jarrabawar soja ta yau da kullum a ranar 22 ga Maris yana da shekaru 32 a matsayin matsayi na hudu na kashi na uku, kuma ya fara aikin gwamnati a matsayin Gwonnji Hullyeonwon Bongsa.
Ya zama gwamnan soja (Gwongwan) na Donggubi-bo a watan Disamba.
Ya yi aiki a matsayin Hullyeonwon Bongsa a Haemi na tsawon watanni 10.
An canza shi zuwa jami'in soja na kwamandan soja na lardin Chungcheong a watan Disamba.
An tura shi aiki a matsayin sugun manho (kwamandan sojan ruwa) na Balpo-jin da ke lardin Jeolla a watan Yuli.
An cire shi daga mukaminsa na Balpo-jin Manho a watan Janairu saboda zargin rash인 kula da makamai da Seo Ik ya yi, amma ba da dadewa ba aka mayar da shi.
Ya zama Hullyeonwon Bongsa a watan Mayu.
Ya zama jami'in soja na kwamandan kudu bisa shawarar Yi Yong, kwamandan soja na arewacin Hamgyong a watan Yuli.
An nada shi a matsayin Gwongwan na Geonwon-bo a watan Agusta.
Mahaifinsa ya rasu a ranar 15 ga Nuwamba.
Ya zama Jubu na Saboksi a watan Janairu, sannan ya zama Josan Manho da shugaban kula da gonaki na Nokdo (Nokdo Dunjeonsaui).
Yakin Nokdundo ya barke a watan Satumba sakamakon harin ba-tsammani da kabilar Jurchen ta kai, kuma Yi Sun-sin ya zauna tare da Yi Gyeong-rok don yakar su kuma suka yi nasara.

Yi Il, kwamandan arewa, ya dora masa laifin rashin nasara a Yakin Nokdundo, wanda ya sa aka cire shi daga mukaminsa, aka daure shi, kuma aka tilasta masa shiga aikin soja a matsayin soja talaka (ba shi da matsayi / Baekuijonggun) a watan Oktoba.
An yi masa afuwa kuma aka mayar da shi kan mukaminsa saboda kama shugaban Jurchen Ueulginae a yakin lardin Nokdundo na biyu.
Ya sami shawarwari daga Yi San-hae da Jeong Eon-sin a watan Janairu ta hanyar tsarin daukar ma'aikata na Bibyeonsa.
Ya zama jami'in soja na mai duba lardin Jeolla a watan Fabrairu.
Ya zama Mugyeom Seonjeongwan a watan Nuwamba.
An nada shi a matsayin shugaban gundumar Jeongeup (Jeongeup Hyeongam) bisa shawarar Ryu Seong-ryong a watan Disamba, kuma ya sami babban yabo daga talakawa saboda gudanar da mulki mai kyau.

An daukaka shi daga Jeongeup Hyeongam zuwa gwamnan Jindo, Garipo Cheomjeoljesa, sannan zuwa kwamandan sojan ruwa na bangaren hagu na lardin Jeolla (Jeolla Jwado Sugun Jeoljesa) a watan Fabrairu bisa umarnin Sarki Seonjo.
Ya sami labarin mamayar Busanpo da sojojin Japan suka yi ta hanyar sakon gaggawa na Won Gyun da misalin karfe 10 na dare a ranar 26 ga Mayu (16 ga Afrilu a kalandar gargajiya).
Ya sami nasararsa ta farko ta hanyar nutsar da jiragen yaki 26 na sojojin Japan a Yakin Okpo a ranar 16 ga Yuni (7 ga Mayu a kalandar gargajiya).
Ya yi amfani da Geobukseon (Jirgin Kunkuru) a karon farko a Yakin Sacheon a ranar 8 ga Yuli (29 ga Mayu a kalandar gargajiya), inda ya lalata jiragen abokan gaba 13.
Ya doke sojojin Japan sosai ta hanyar amfani da tsarin yakin fikafikin shaho (Hagikjin) a Yakin Hansando a ranar 14 ga Agusta (8 ga Yuli a kalandar gargajiya).
An daukaka shi zuwa matsayin Jaheondaebu a ranar 16 ga Agusta.
Ya lalata jiragen abokan gaba kusan 100 a Yakin Busan a ranar 1 ga Satumba a kalandar gargajiya.
Ya wuce zuwa Ungpo na gundumar Ungcheon don yin Yakin Ungpo a ranar 12 ga Maris (10 ga Fabrairu a kalandar gargajiya).
Gwamnatin Joseon ta nada shi a matsayin Samdo Sugun Tongjesa (babban kwamandan sojan ruwa na larduna uku) a ranar 1 ga Agusta a kalandar gargajiya.
An cire shi daga mukaminsa na Tongjesa kuma aka mayar da shi Hanseong a daure a ranar 11 ga Afrilu (25 ga Fabrairu a kalandar gargajiya).
Ya tsira daga kisa a ranar 16 ga Mayu (1 ga Afrilu a kalandar gargajiya) kuma ya sami umarnin shiga aikin soja ba tare da mukami ba karkashin babban janar Gwon Yul.
Mahaifiyarsa ta rasu a cikin jirgin ruwa a ranar 26 ga Mayu (11 ga Afrilu a kalandar gargajiya) yayin da yake shiga aikin soja ba tare da mukami ba.
An sake nada shi a matsayin Samdo Sugun Tongjesa a ranar 28 ga Agusta (16 ga Yuli a kalandar gargajiya) bayan mummunan rashin nasara da Won Gyun ya yi a Yakin Chilcheonryang.
Ya sami babban nasara a Yakin Myeongnyang a ranar 26 ga Oktoba (16 ga Satumba a kalandar gargajiya) ta hanyar doke jiragen yaki fiye da 130 na sojojin Japan da jirage 13 kacal na Joseon.
Ya mutu sakamakon harbin harsashi yayin da yake bin diddigin sojojin Japan da ke gudu a Yakin Noryang a ranar 19 ga Nuwamba a kalandar gargajiya.
An ba shi taken girmamawa na uyi-jeong (Right State Councillor) na Uijeongbu a watan Disamba.
An nada shi a matsayin Seonmu First Class Meritorious Subject a watan Yuni, kuma aka ba shi taken jwa-ui-jeong (Left State Councillor) a watan Yuli.
Ya zama Chungmugong bayan ya sami taken girmamawa na 'Chungmu' (忠武) daga Sarki Injo a watan Maris.
Sarki Jeongjo ya ba shi taken girmamawa mafi girma na yeong-ui-jeong (Chief State Councillor) a watan Yuli.

keyAchievements.title: Cin jarrabawar soja
keyAchievements.description: Ya ci jarrabawar soja yana da shekaru 32 a shekara ta 1576 kuma ya fara aikin gwamnati.

keyAchievements.title: Nasara a Yakin Nokdundo
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi nasarar doke kabilar Jurchen a Yakin Nokdundo da ya barke a shekara ta 1587 tare da Yi Gyeong-rok, kuma ya ceto talakawa kusan 60 na Joseon.

keyAchievements.title: Kera da samar da Geobukseon (Jirgin Kunkuru)
keyAchievements.description: Jim kadan bayan zama Jeolla Jwasusa, ya shirya kayan yaki da abinci don yaki, kuma ya samar da tsarin tsaro ta hanyar kera jirgin kunkuru.

keyAchievements.title: Nasarorin manyan yake-yake na sojan ruwa a lokacin Imjin War
keyAchievements.description: Ya doke sojojin ruwa na Japan daya bayan daya a yake-yaken ruwa kamar na Okpo, Sacheon, Hansando, da Busan bayan barkewar Imjin War, wanda ya ba shi damar sarrafa tekun da yanke hanyoyin abinci na abokan gaba.

keyAchievements.title: Zama Samdo Sugun Tongjesa
keyAchievements.description: Ya zama babban kwamandan sojan ruwa na larduna uku a shekara ta 1593 don jagorantar sojojin ruwa na Joseon da sake gina su.

keyAchievements.title: Babban nasara a Yakin Myeongnyang
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami babban nasara a Yakin Myeongnyang da jiragen yaki 12 kacal a kan daruruwan jiragen abokan gaba bayan rashin nasarar Yakin Chilcheonryang, wanda ya canza yanayin yakin gaba daya.

keyAchievements.title: Nasara da mutuwa a Yakin Noryang
keyAchievements.description: Ya doke sojojin Japan da ke gudu a Yakin Noryang na shekara ta 1598 tare da sojojin ruwa na Daular Ming, kuma ya rasu bayan da harsashi ya same shi a lokacin yakin.

keyAchievements.title: Girmama shi a matsayin Gwarzo na Kasa (Seongung)
keyAchievements.description: Ana girmama shi a matsayin gwarzo na kasa wanda ya ceci kasarsa ta hanyar samun nasarori a yake-yaken ruwa da sojojin ruwa na Japan ta hanyar amfani da kyawawan dabarun yaki lokacin da yake Samdo Sugun Tongjesa na Joseon a lokacin Imjin War.

faq.question: Yaushe kuma a ina aka haifi Yi Sun-sin?
faq.answer: An haife shi a ranar 28 ga Afrilu, 1545 (8 ga Maris a kalandar gargajiya) a Geoncheon-dong, kudancin Hanseong (kusa da Shindo Building, Eulji-ro 18-gil 19, Jung-gu, Seoul a yanzu).

faq.question: Yaushe Yi Sun-sin ya ci jarrabawar soja?
faq.answer: Yi Sun-sin ya ci jarrabawar soja a ranar 22 ga Maris, 1576 yana da shekaru 32.

faq.question: Me yasa Yi Sun-sin ya yi aikin soja ba tare da mukami ba sau biyu?
faq.answer: Na farko ya faru ne a shekara ta 1587 bayan Yi Il ya dora masa laifin rashin nasarar Yakin Nokdundo, kuma na biyu ya faru ne a shekara ta 1597 bayan an cire shi daga mukamin Tongjesa saboda zargin kin bin umarnin gwamnati.

faq.question: A wane yakin ruwa Yi Sun-sin ya mutu?
faq.answer: Yi Sun-sin ya mutu sakamakon harbin harsashi yayin da yake bin diddigin sojojin Japan da ke gudu a Yakin Noryang a ranar 19 ga Nuwamba, 1598 a kalandar gargajiya.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan rubuce-rubucen Yi Sun-sin?
faq.answer: Yi Sun-sin ya bar "Nanjung Ilgi" (Littafin Yakin Kullum) wanda ke dauke da rahotannin lokacin Imjin War, da kuma "Chungmugong Yi Sun-sin Jeonseo" (Cikakkun Ayyukan Yi Sun-sin).

faq.question: Wane taken girmamawa Yi Sun-sin ya samu?
faq.answer: Yi Sun-sin ya zama Chungmugong bayan ya sami taken 'Chungmu' (忠武) daga Sarki Injo a watan Maris na shekara ta 1643.

faq.question: Yaya dangin Yi Sun-sin suke?
faq.answer: Yi Sun-sin ya sami yara maza uku (Yi Hoe, Yi Ye, Yi Myeon) da diya mace daya da matarsa ta kwarai mai suna Bang na gundumar Sangju, kuma ya sami yara maza biyu (Yi Hun, Yi Sin) da yara mata biyu da kwarwarkarsa ta dangin Oh na Haeju.

timeline.event: An haife ta a matsayin diyar Henry VIII da Anne Boleyn.
Kashe mahaifiyarta Anne Boleyn.
Mayar da matsayinta na gimbiya ta hanyar canza Dokar Gado.
Mutuwar Henry VIII da hawan karagar mulki na dan uwanta na uba daya Edward VI.
An kore ta daga gida ta hanyar mahaifiyarta ta riko Catherine Parr.
Kashe Thomas Seymour.
Mutuwar Edward VI.
Hawan karagar mulki na yayarta na uba daya Mary I.
An tsare ta a Hasumiyar London (Tower of London) saboda zargin tana bayan Boren Wyatt.
Ta zama Sarauniya ta Masarautar Ingila da Ireland bayan mutuwar Mary I.
Gudanar da bikin nadin sarauta a Westminster Abbey.
Sanar da sabuwar Dokar Shugabancin Coci (Act of Supremacy).
Kai hari Havre, Faransa (harin farko tilo da ta fara kaiwa).
Mary I, Sarauniyar Scotland, ta gudu zuwa Ingila kuma aka tsare ta.
Paparoma Pius V ya sanar da korarta daga coci ta hanyar ayyana ta a matsayin mai bidi'a (heretic).
Humphrey Gilbert ya kafa mallaka (colony) a Arewacin Amurka.
Barkewar Yakin Ingila da Spain.
Kashe Mary, Sarauniyar Scotland.
Rundunar sojan ruwa ta Spain (Armada) ta sha kashi sosai a hannun Sojan Ruwan Ingila.
Ingila ta kai babban hari ga Spain (Drake-Norris Expedition) amma ta sha kashi sosai.
Ci gaba da yaki da yan tawayen Ireland karkashin jagorancin Hugh O'Neill.
Elizabeth ta ayyana cewa ta 'auri kasarta'.
Bada izinin kafa Kamfanin Gabashin Indiya na Ingila (East India Company).
Kashe Robert Devereux, Earl na Essex.
Ta rasu a Fadar Richmond.

keyAchievements.title: Gudanar da mulki mai kyau na shekaru 44
keyAchievements.description: Ta kasance sarauniyar Ingila da Ireland na tsawon shekaru 44 tun daga hawan mulki a shekara ta 1558 zuwa mutuwarta a shekara ta 1603, inda ta jagoranci 'Lokacin Elizabeth' (Elizabethan Era).

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Cocin Ingila (Church of England)
keyAchievements.description: Ta soke manufofin addini na Mary I don sake tabbatar da rabuwa da Cocin Katolika, kuma ta taimaka wajen kafa Cocin Ingila.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da hoton 'Sarauniya Budurwa' (Virgin Queen)
keyAchievements.description: An kira ta da taken 'Sarauniya Budurwa' saboda ta ki yin aure duk da korafe-korafe da tayi na aure da yawa, wanda ya hadu da girmama budurci na mutane don zama alamar girmama kanta.

keyAchievements.title: Doke sojojin ruwa na Spain (Armada)
keyAchievements.description: Sojan Ruwan Ingila ya doke rundunar sojan ruwa ta Spain a shekara ta 1588 a kusa da Gravelines don kauce wa hadarin kasa.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa mallakar kasashen waje da fadada kasuwanci
keyAchievements.description: Ta kafa asalin mallakar kasashen waje da fadada kasuwanci ta hanyar kafa mallakar Arewacin Amurka ta Humphrey Gilbert da bada izinin kafa Kamfanin Gabashin Indiya na Ingila.

faq.question: Elizabeth I ta kasance diyar wane?
faq.answer: Ita ce diyar da Henry VIII ya samu da matarsa ta biyu Anne Boleyn.

faq.question: Me yasa aka kira Elizabeth I da 'Sarauniya Budurwa'?
faq.answer: An kira ta da 'Sarauniya Budurwa' saboda ta ki yin aure duk da shawarwarin aure da yawa da ta samu.

faq.question: Menene babban nasarar soja na Elizabeth I a lokacin mulkinsa?
faq.answer: Doke rundunar sojan ruwa ta Spain a shekara ta 1588 shi ne babban nasarar soja da ta samu.

faq.question: Wane irin alaka ke tsakanin Elizabeth I da Mary I na Scotland?
faq.answer: Mary I ta kasance barazana ga Elizabeth saboda tana neman gadon sarautar Ingila, kuma a karshe an kashe ta bisa umarnin Elizabeth bayan ta shiga cikin wata makarkashiya.

timeline.event: Haihuwar Yarima Damdeok, wanda ya zama sarki na 19 na Goguryeo (Gwanggaeto the Great).
Hawan karagar mulki na mahaifinsa Gogugyang bayan mutuwar kawunsa Sosurim.
An nada shi a matsayin yarima mai jiran gado (crown prince).

timeline.year: Waton Mayu na shekarar 391 a kalandar gargajiya
timeline.event: Ya zama sarki na 19 na Goguryeo bayan mutuwar Gogugyang, kuma ya fara amfani da taken zamanin Yeongnak.
Ya jagoranci sojoji 40,000 don kai hari ga iyakar arewa ta Baekje, inda ya mamaye katangogi fiye da 10 ciki har da Seokhyun-seong.
Ya umarci janar dinsa da ya dakatar da sojojin Baekje lokacin da suka kai hari ga iyakar kudu ta Goguryeo.
Ya doke Khitan kuma ya ceto talakawa fiye da 10,000 wadanda aka kama a shekara ta 8 ta mulkin Sosurim (378).
Ya mamaye Gwanmi-seong, katangar arewa ta Baekje, bayan ya kewaye ta na tsawon kwanaki 20.
Mutuwar Sarki Jinsa na Baekje da hawan karagar mulki na Asin.
Ya dakatar da harin Baekje a Gwanmi-seong. Ya kafa haikali (temples) guda 9 a Pyongyang.
Ya dakatar da harin Baekje a Sugok-seong. Ya gina katangogi guda 7 a iyakar kudu don kariya ga harin Baekje.
Ya kama sojojin Baekje fiye da 8,000 a Kogin Pae kuma ya sami babban nasara. Ya wuce zuwa Yeomsu don doke kabilar Khitan Paeryeo kuma ya sanya ta karkashin ikonsa.

Ya kai babban hari ga Baekje, inda ya mamaye katangogi 58 da kauyuka 700 a arewacin Kogin Han kuma ya kewaye Wirye-seong. Ya karbi mika wuya na Sarki Asin na Baekje kuma ya dawo bayan ya dauki kaninsa da jami'ai 10 a matsayin rehusa (hostages).
Ya doke Sushen don samar da zaman lafiya a iyakar arewa maso gabas.
Ya tafi Pyongyang. Lokacin da Baekje da Wa (Japan) suka kai hari ga Silla, Silla ta tura jakada zuwa Pyongyang don neman taimako.

Ya tura sojoji 50,000 zuwa Silla don doke sojojin Wa. Ya bi sojojin Wa har zuwa Jongbal-seong na Geumgwan Gaya kuma ya kore su. Ya canza sarkin Silla daga Naemul Maripgan zuwa Silseong Maripgan. Murong Sheng, sarkin Later Yan, ya kai hari ga Shin-seong da Namso-seong.
Ya kai hari ga Sugun-seong na Later Yan kuma ya mamaye ta.
Ya halaka sojojin Wa da suka shiga yankin Daebang. Ya doke Later Yan kuma ya kai hari har zuwa Yeongun don mamaye ta.
Ya doke sojojin Later Yan a Liaodong-seong.
Ya doke sojojin Later Yan a Mokjeo-seong don tabbatar da ikon Liaodong.
Ya tura sojoji 50,000 don doke sojojin Later Yan kuma ya sami ganima mai yawa. Ya mamaye katangogi 6 na Later Yan a kan hanyarsa ta komawa gida.
Ya kulla kyakkyawar alaka da Northern Yan baada ya Ko Un (dangin Goguryeo) ya kafa ta, wanda ya samar da zaman lafiya a iyakar yamma.
Ya gina katangogi 6 ciki har da Doksan-seong a gabas kuma ya mayar da mutanen Pyongyang zama a can. Ya tafi kudu.
Ya kai hari ga Dongbuyeo (Eastern Buyeo) kuma ya sanya ta mika wuya.

timeline.year: Waton Oktoba na shekarar 412 a kalandar gargajiya
timeline.event: Ya rasu.
Jangsu ya gina mutum-mutumin kabari (stele) kuma ya nada masu tsaron kabari (sumyoin) bisa ga wasiyyarsa don kula da kabarin sarki.

keyAchievements.title: Doke Baekje
keyAchievements.description: Ya kai babban hari ga Baekje a shekara ta 396, inda ya mamaye katangogi 58 da kauyuka 700 a arewacin Kogin Han, kuma ya karbi mika wuya na Sarki Asin.

keyAchievements.title: Doke Khitan da Sushen
keyAchievements.description: Ya doke Khitan a shekara ta 392 don ceto talakawansa, kuma ya doke Sushen a shekara ta 398 don samar da zaman lafiya a iyakar arewa maso gabas.

keyAchievements.title: Taimaka wa Silla da doke Wa (Japan)
keyAchievements.description: Ya tura sojoji 50,000 zuwa Silla a shekara ta 400 don doke hadaddiyar rundunar Baekje da Wa, kuma ya nuna tasirinsa a kan Silla ciki har da canza sarkin kasar.

keyAchievements.title: Nasarar yaki da Later Yan
keyAchievements.description: Ya doke Later Yan a yakin da suka yi, wanda ya tabbatar da ikon Liaodong, kuma ya samar da zaman lafiya a iyakar yamma ta hanyar kulla kyakkyawar alaka da Northern Yan.

keyAchievements.title: Sanya Dongbuyeo mika wuya
keyAchievements.description: Ya kai hari ga Dongbuyeo a shekara ta 410 kuma ya sanya ta mika wuya, wanda ya karfafa tasirin Goguryeo a arewa.

keyAchievements.title: Karfafa gudanarwa ta gida
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa haikali 9 da gina katangogi a Pyongyang, kuma ya gyara kaburburan sarakuna da kafa tsarin masu tsaron kabari don karfafa asalin kasar.

faq.question: Menene sunan Gwanggaeto the Great?
faq.answer: Sunansa Damdeok (談德) ko An (安).

faq.question: Gwanggaeto the Great ya kasance sarki na nawa na Goguryeo?
faq.answer: Ya kasance sarki na 19 na Goguryeo.

faq.question: Daga yaushe zuwa yaushe Gwanggaeto the Great ya yi mulki?
faq.answer: Ya yi mulki daga watan Mayu na 391 zuwa watan Oktoba na 412 a kalandar gargajiya.

faq.question: Menene taken zamanin Gwanggaeto the Great?
faq.answer: Taken zamaninsa shi ne Yeongnak (永樂).

faq.question: Wadanne nasarori Gwanggaeto the Great ya samu a yakin da ya yi da Baekje?
faq.answer: Ya kai babban hari ga Baekje a shekara ta 396, inda ya mamaye katangogi 58 da kauyuka 700 a arewacin Kogin Han, kuma ya karbi mika wuya na Sarki Asin na Baekje.

faq.question: Ta yaya Gwanggaeto the Great ya taimaka wa Silla?
faq.answer: Ya tura sojoji 50,000 zuwa Silla a shekara ta 400 don doke hadaddiyar rundunar Baekje da Wa, kuma ya nuna tasirinsa a kan Silla ciki har da canza sarkin kasar.

faq.question: Yaushe aka gina Gwanggaeto the Great Stele?
faq.answer: Sarki Jangsu ne ya gina Gwanggaeto the Great Stele a shekara ta 414.

gwanggaeto-the-great.missingDataNote: 즉위 및 사망 연도에 대해 《삼국사기》와 광개토대왕릉비 간의 기록 차이가 원문에 명시되어 있습니다.

timeline.event: Haihuwar Blenheim Palace, Oxfordshire
Shiga rundunar sojan kasa ta Birtaniya
Zaben sa a matsayin dan majalisa (MP) na Jam'iyyar Conservative
Canza jam'iyya zuwa Jam'iyyar Liberal
Nada shi a matsayin Shugaban Hukumar Kasuwanci (President of the Board of Trade) a majalisar H. H. Asquith
Auren Clementine Hozier
Haihuwar diyarsa ta farko Diana
Daukaka shi zuwa matsayin Sakataren Gida (Home Secretary)
Haihuwar dansa na biyu Randolph
Nada shi a matsayin Shugaban Sojan Ruwa (First Lord of the Admiralty)
Barkewar Yakin Duniya na Farko, inda ya jagoranci ayyukan Sojan Ruwan Birtaniya
Yin murabus daga majalisar ministoci
Nada shi matsayin lieutenant colonel na wucin gadi don jagorantar runduna ta 6 ta Royal Scots Fusiliers
Nada shi matsayin Ministan Kayan Yaki (Minister of Munitions) a gwamnatin Lloyd George
Haihuwar dansa na hudu Marigold (diya)
Nada shi matsayin Sakataren Yaki da na Sama (Secretary of State for War and Air)
Nada shi matsayin Sakataren Kasashen da ke Karkashin Mulki (Secretary of State for the Colonies)
Mutuwar diyarsa Marigold
Haihuwar diyarsa ta biyar kuma ta karshe Mary
Rasa gurbin zabe a mazabar Dundee
Nada shi matsayin Ministan Kudi (Chancellor of the Exchequer)
Mayar da tsarin zinari (gold standard) zuwa matakin da yake a shekara ta 1914
Gyaran jaridar gwamnati ta "British Gazette" a lokacin babban yajin aiki na Birtaniya
Sauka daga matsayin Ministan Kudi baada rashin nasarar Jam'iyyar Conservative a zaben Birtaniya
Wallafa littafinsa "My Early Life"
Yin murabus daga in-shadow cabinet na Jam'iyyar Conservative saboda goyon bayan Baldwin ga matsayin mulkin kai na India
Gano barazanar Jamus ta Nazi baada hawan mulki na Hitler
Wallafa kundayen littattafai 4 na "Marlborough: His Life and Times"
Sokin sanya hannu kan Yarjejeniyar Munich a matsayin 'mummunan rashin nasara gaba daya'
Sake nada shi matsayin Shugaban Sojan Ruwa baada sanar da yaki ga Jamus
Nada shi a matsayin Firayim Minista na Birtaniya
Jawabinsa na farko baada zama Firayim Minista: "Jini, Wahala, Hawaye, da Gumi"
Jawabinsa baada karshen shirin janye sojoji na Dunkirk: "Zamu yi yaki a bakin teku"
Jawabinsa na "This was their finest hour"
Gwamnatocin Birtaniya da Amurka sun kulla yarjejeniyar jiragen yaki da sansanin sojan ruwa (Destroyers for Bases Agreement)
Kaddamar da Dokar Ba da Lamunin Makamai (Lend-Lease Act) a hukumance
Kaddamar da shirin mamaye Tarayyar Soviet (Operation Barbarossa) da Hitler ya yi
Sanar da Yarjejeniyar Atlantika (Atlantic Charter) tare da Roosevelt
Sanar da yaki ga Japan jim kadan baada harin Pearl Harbor da Japan ta kai
Ya bayyana faduwar Singapore a hannun sojojin Japan a matsayin 'mummunan bala'i mafi muni da kuma mika wuya mafi girma a tarihin soja na Birtaniya'
Barkewar Yunwar Bengal (Bengal famine)
Ya zama shugaban jam'iyyar adawa ta farko baada rashin nasarar Jam'iyyar Conservative a zaben kasa
Sake zama Firayim Minista
Lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannin Adabi (Nobel Prize in Literature)
Yin murabus daga matsayin Firayim Minista
Rike kujerarsa ta dan majalisa
Mutuwa

keyAchievements.title: Firayim Minista na Yakin Duniya na Biyu
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance Firayim Minista na Birtaniya daga shekara ta 1940 zuwa 1945, inda ya jagoranci kasashen kawance (Allies) wadanda ke yakar kasashen Axis don samun nasara a shekara ta 1945.

keyAchievements.title: Lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannin Adabi (Nobel Prize in Literature)
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta littattafai da dama kuma ya lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannin Adabi a shekara ta 1953.

keyAchievements.title: Jagorantar sauye-sauye a cikin al'umma
keyAchievements.description: Lokacin da yake Shugaban Hukumar Kasuwanci da Sakataren Gida, ya goyi bayan sauye-sauye a gidan yari da tsaron jama'a na ma'aikata, kuma ya kaddamar da mafi karancin albashi da inshorar rashin aikin yi.

keyAchievements.title: Karfafan karfin sojan ruwa
keyAchievements.description: A matsayinsa na Shugaban Sojan Ruwa, ya kafa sashen tsara sojan ruwa, kuma ya taimaka wajen kera jiragen karkashin kasa, sake mayar da hankali kan Royal Naval Air Service, da kuma goyon bayan kera tankunan yaki.

keyAchievements.title: Mai yin jawabai na lokacin yaki
keyAchievements.description: Ya karfafa gwiwar mutane ta hanyar jawabai masu karfi kamar "Jini, Wahala, Hawaye, da Gumi" da "Zamu yi yaki a bakin teku" don hada karfin gwiwa ga yaki.

keyAchievements.title: Sanar da Yarjejeniyar Atlantika tare
keyAchievements.description: Ya sanar da Yarjejeniyar Atlantika tare da Roosevelt a shekara ta 1941 don gabatar da burin kasashen biyu game da makomorar duniya bayan yaki.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Winston Churchill kuma yaushe ya mutu?
faq.answer: Winston Churchill ya rayu daga 30 ga Nuwamba, 1874 zuwa 24 ga Janairu, 1965.

faq.question: Sau nawa Winston Churchill ya yi Firayim Minista?
faq.answer: Ya yi Firayim Minista na Birtaniya sau biyu: daga shekara ta 1940 zuwa 1945 a lokacin Yakin Duniya na Biyu, da kuma daga shekara ta 1951 zuwa 1955 daga baya.

faq.question: Wace jam'iyya Winston Churchill yake ciki?
faq.answer: Ya shafe mafi yawan rayuwarsa ta siyasa a matsayin memba na Jam'iyyar Conservative, kuma ya kasance memba na Jam'iyyar Liberal daga shekara ta 1904 zuwa 1924.

faq.question: Shin Winston Churchill ya lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel?
faq.answer: E, ya rubuta littattafai da dama tsakanin mulkinsa biyu kuma ya lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannin Adabi a shekara ta 1953.

faq.question: Wace rawar Churchill ya taka a Yakin Duniya na Biyu?
faq.answer: An nada shi matsayin Firayim Minista na Birtaniya a watan Mayu na 1940 a lokacin Yakin Duniya na Biyu, inda ya kafa gwamnatin hadaka kuma ya jagoranci kasashen kawance wadanda ke yakar kasashen Axis don samun nasara a shekara ta 1945.

faq.question: Shin Churchill ya yi amfani da kalmar 'Iron Curtain' (Iron Curtain)?
faq.answer: E, ya yi amfani da kalmar 'Iron Curtain' don yin kashedi game da fadada tasirin gurguzu a Turai yayin da yakin cacar baki da Tarayyar Soviet ya tsananta bayan rashin nasarar Jam'iyyar Conservative a zaben shekara ta 1945, kuma ya bukaci hadin kan Turai.

timeline.event: An haife shi ga Yarima Yiren da Zhao Ji a kasar Zhao.
Ya fara mulki a matsayin sarki na 31 na Daular Qin (karkashin kulawar Lü Buwei).
Ya fara mulki da kansa (direct rule).
Ya halaka Daular Han.
Ya halaka Daular Zhao.
Ya halaka Daular Wei.
Ya halaka Daular Chu.
Ya halaka Daular Yan.
Ya halaka Daular Qi kuma ya hada kan kasar kasar Sin gaba gaba (unification of China).
Ya kaddamar da shirin kona littattafai (Fen shu).
Ya kaddamar da shirin binne masanan Confucian da rayuwarsu (Keng yu).
Ya rasu yana da shekaru 50 a yankin Shaqiu lokacin da yake tafiyarsa ta karshe.

keyAchievements.title: Hadin kan kasar Sin
keyAchievements.description: Ya hada kan kasar Sin wadda ta rabu, kuma ya kafa tsarin sarki (emperor system) da kuma tsarin gudanarwa na larduna (junxian system) don kafa asalin daulolin kasar Sin na tsawon shekaru 2,000 na gaba.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa tsarin sarki (Emperor System)
keyAchievements.description: Ya fara amfani da taken 'Huangdi' (Emperor) maimakon taken sarki na da (Wang), kuma ya kira kansa da 'Shi Huangdi' (First Emperor).

keyAchievements.title: Kaddamar da tsarin larduna (Junxian System)
keyAchievements.description: Ya raba kasar zuwa larduna (commanderies) 36 bisa shawarar Chancellor Li Si, kuma ya nada gwamnoni, kwamandojin soja, da masu duba a kowane lardin don kafa tsarin mulki na tsakiya.

keyAchievements.title: Daidaita ma'aunai, kudi, da rubutu
keyAchievements.description: Ya daidaita ma'aunai (weights and measures), kudi, da rubutu, kuma ya gyara hanyoyi don gudanar da daular cikin sauki.

keyAchievements.title: Kammala Babban Katanga na kasar Sin (Great Wall of China)
keyAchievements.description: Ya hada katangogin da kasashe daban-daban suka gina a lokacin Yakin Kasashe (Warring States) don kammala Babban Katanga na kasar Sin domin dakatar da harin kabilar Xiongnu.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Shi Huangdi?
faq.answer: An haife shi ga Yarima Yiren na Daular Qin wanda aka tura matsayin rehu (hostage) a kasar Zhao da Zhao Ji a shekara ta 259 K.H.

faq.question: Me yasa Shi Huangdi ya yi amfani da taken 'Huangdi' (Emperor)?
faq.answer: Ya kalli cewa taken sarki na da (Wang) bai dace da shi ba, don haka ya karbi 'Huang' da 'Di' daga shahararrun sarakunan da (Three Sovereigns and Five Emperors) don kiran kansa da 'Huangdi' (Emperor), kuma ya sanya wa kansa suna 'Shi Huangdi' (First Emperor).

faq.question: Menene babban zaluncin Shi Huangdi?
faq.answer: Ya kaddamar da shirin Fen shu keng yu (kona littattafai da binne masana) wanda ke zama babban danniyar al'adu, inda ya kona dukkan littattafan da ba su shafi tarihin Qin, magunguna, ko aikin gona ba, kuma ya binne masana fiye da 460 da rayuwarsu.

faq.question: Wadanne kokari Shi Huangdi ya yi don samun tsawon rai mara mutuwa?
faq.answer: Ya tura mai sihiri Xu Fu tare da yara maza da mata 3,000 da kuma dukiya a cikin jirgin ruwa zuwa Dutsen Penglai don nemo maganin tsawon rai, kuma ya sha mercury (수은) yana tunanin cewa maganin tsawon rai ne.

faq.question: Ta yaya Shi Huangdi ya mutu?
faq.answer: Ya rasu yana da shekaru 50 a yankin Shaqiu sakamakon rashin lafiya mai tsanani yayin tafiyarsa ta karshe a shekara ta 210 K.H.

timeline.event: An haife shi a birnin Rome.
Mahaifinsa Octavius ya rasu.
Ya karanta jawabin girmamawa a jana'izar kakarsa Julia Caesaris.
