Ya sanya toga kuma an zabe shi a matsayin memba na kwamitin firistoci na kasa (Pontifices).
Ya kula da wasannin Girka na haikalin Venus Genetrix wanda Caesar ya gina.
An kashe mahaifinsa na riko Julius Caesar.
Ya isa Rome kuma ya hadu da Mark Antony (Marcus Antonius).
Ya doke rundunonin soja guda biyu karkashin Antony.
An nada shi a matsayin dan majalisar dattijai (Senator) kuma aka ba shi ikon jagorantar sojoji.
Ya doke sojojin Antony a Yakin Forum Gallorum da Yakin Mutina.
An nada shi a matsay인 Consul (Shugaban Gudanarwa).
Ya kafa Mulkin Mutum Uku na Biyu (Second Triumvirate) tare da Antony da Lepidus kusa da Bologna.
Majalisar Dattijai ta Rome ta ayyana Julius Caesar a matsayin allah.
Ya doke sojojin Brutus da Cassius a Yakin Philippi.
Ya kawo karshen boren Lucius Antonius a Perusia kuma ya karbi mika wuyansa.
Ya kashe mambobin majalisar dattijai da kwararrun mayaka (knights) 300 wadanda suka taimaka wa Lucius Antonius.
Ya sanya hannu kan Yarjejeniyar Brundisium tare da Antony.
Ya aurar da yayarsa Octavia Minor ga Antony.
Ya kulla Yarjejeniyar Misenum tare da Sextus Pompeius don samar da zaman lafiya na wucin gadi.
Ya rabu da Scribonia kuma ya auri Livia Drusilla a matsayin mata ta biyu.
Sun amince da tsawaita tsarin Mulkin Mutum Uku na tsawon shekaru 5.
Ya doke rundunar sojan ruwa ta Sextus Pompeius gaba dacha a Yakin Naulochus.
Majalisar Dattijai ta kwace ikon Consul na Antony kuma ta sanar da yaki ga Masar (Egypt).
Ya doke rundunar sojan ruwa ta Antony da Cleopatra a Yakin Actium.
Ya fara zama Consul a kowace shekara.
Ya ci nasara a Alexandria, kuma Antony da Cleopatra suka kashe kansu.
Ya sami taken 'Babban Dan Kasa na farko' (princeps civitatis) daga Majalisar Dattijai.
Ya mayar da dukkan ikonsa na musamman ga Majalisar Dattijai bayan karshen yakin basasa, kuma aka ba shi taken 'Augustus'.
Ya aurar da diyarsa Julia ga Marcellus, dan yayarsa.
Marcellus ya mutu, kuma Augustus ya yi murabus daga matsayin Consul.
Ya shiga aikin gina hanyoyin kasa da kansa.
Ya danne boren yankin Cantabria na Spain gaba daya.
Ya zama Babban Firist (pontifex maximus) bayan mutuwar Lepidus.
Dansa na riko Drusus ya rasu bayan ya fado daga kan doki a Germania.
An zabe shi a matsayin Consul, kuma jikansa Gaius Caesar ya fara rayuwar siyasa.
An zabe shi a matsayin Consul, kuma jikansa Lucius Caesar ya fara rayuwar siyasa. Ya sami taken 'Uban Kasa' (pater patriae) daga Majalisar Dattijai da talakawan Rome.
Jikansa Lucius Caesar ya mutu yana matashi.
Jikansa Gaius Caesar ya mutu yana matashi, kuma ya dauki Tiberius da Agrippa Postumus a matsayin yaran riko.
Ya kafa 'Asusun Fansho na Sojoji' don samar da kudin fansho ga sojoji masu aiki da tsofaffi.
Rundunonin soja guda 3 na Rome sun halaka a hannun kabilun Jamus a Dajin Teutoburg.
An ba wa Tiberius dukkan ikon da Augustus yake da shi.
놀라에서 사망하고, 원로원과 민회는 그를 신으로 선포함.

keyAchievements.title: Shugaban Kasa (Emperor) na farko na Daular Rome
keyAchievements.description: Ya zama shugaban kasa na farko na Daular Rome da kuma sarki na farko na daular Julio-Claudian.

keyAchievements.title: Kaddamar da Pax Romana (Zaman Lafiya na Rome)
keyAchievements.description: Mulkinsa ya samar da zaman lafiya mai dorewa da ake kira 'Pax Romana', wanda ya sa aka sami zaman lafiya a yankin Bahar Rum na tsawon shekaru dari biyu.

keyAchievements.title: Fadada yankin daula da kare iyakoki
keyAchievements.description: Ya fadada yankin Daular Rome, ya kare iyakoki da kasashen abota, kuma ya kulla yarjejeniyar zaman lafiya da Parthia.

keyAchievements.title: Inganta tsarin kasa
keyAchievements.description: Ya inganta tsarin haraji na Rome, ya kafa hanyoyin kasa, kuma ya kafa sojojin din-din-din, karamin sojan ruwa, da kuma Praetorian Guard (sojojin fada).

keyAchievements.title: Sake gina birnin Rome
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa sashen yan sanda da na kashe gobara a Rome, kuma ya sake gina babban sashi na birnin.

keyAchievements.title: Littafin "Res Gestae Divi Augusti" (Ayyukan Augustus)
keyAchievements.description: Ya bar littafin "Res Gestae Divi Augusti" wanda ke kunshe da rahoton ayyukansa kafin mutuwarsa.

keyAchievements.title: Samun taken 'Augustus'
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami taken 'Augustus', wanda ke nufin 'Wanda ake girmamawa', daga Majalisar Dattijai.

keyAchievements.title: Samun taken 'Princeps' (Babban Dan Kasa na farko)
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami taken princeps civitatis wanda ke nufin babban dan kasa na farko daga Majalisar Dattijai.

keyAchievements.title: Ikon jagorantar sojoji gaba daya
keyAchievements.description: Ya zama babban kwamandan sojojin Rome kuma yana da ikon gudanar da bikin nasara (triumph).

keyAchievements.title: Sauyin tsarin haraji
keyAchievements.description: Ya kaddamar da sauyin tsarin haraji ta hanyar karbar haraji kai tsaye tare da tsayayyen kudi dga mazauna larduna da kuma amfani da jami'an gwamnati wajen karbar harajin.

keyAchievements.title: Sanya wa watan Agusta suna
keyAchievements.description: Watan da aka fi sani da 'Sextilis' (wata na shida) an sauya masa suna zuwa 'Augustus' (August) don girmama shi.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan gine-gine
keyAchievements.description: '나는 진흙으로 된 로마를 물려받았고, 대리석의 로마를 물려줬다'고 말할 정도로 로마 시의 건축 사업에 기여했습니다.

keyAchievements.title: Asusun Fansho na Sojoji
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa 'Asusun Fansho na Sojoji' don bada kudin fansho ga sojoji masu aiki da wadanda suka yi ritaya.

faq.question: Menene ainihin sunan Augustus?
faq.answer: Kafin a dauke shi a matsayin dan riko na Caesar, sunansa Gaius Octavius, kuma bayan an dauke shi a matsayin dan riko, an kira shi Gaius Julius Caesar Octavianus.

faq.question: Ta yaya Augustus ya zama sarki na farko na Daular Rome?
faq.answer: Ya karbi dukkan iko bayan rushewar Mulkin Mutum Uku na Biyu, kuma ya zama sarki na farko na Daular Rome bayan ya sami taken 'Augustus' daga Majalisar Dattijai a shekara ta 27 K.H.

faq.question: Menene babban nasarar lokacin Augustus?
faq.answer: Mulkinsa ya samar da zaman lafiya mai dorewa da ake kira 'Pax Romana', wanda ya sa aka sami zaman lafiya a yankin Bahar Rum na tsawon shekaru dari biyu.

faq.question: Shin Augustus yana son wasan caca (gambling)?
faq.answer: Sabanin hotonsa na kamun kai, yana son wasan caca sosai, musamman wasan dice ko wasan rarrabe lambobi (odd-or-even). Yana yawan asarar kudi da gangan don kulla abota da mutane.

faq.question: Me yasa watan Agusta ya sami suna daga Augustus?
faq.answer: Hakan ya faru ne saboda shawarar Majalisar Dattijai ta Rome don girmama lokacin da Augustus ya ci Alexandria a watan Agustan shekara ta 30 K.H kuma ya hau mulki.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Schönhausen, Prussia.
Shiga makarantar firamare ta Plamann a Berlin.
Shiga tsarin karantar shari'a (law) a Jami'ar Göttingen.
Fara aiki a matsayin mai koyon aikin shari'a (law clerk) bayan kammala jami'ar.
Fara aikin soja.
Fara gudanar da gona bayan kammala aikin soja.
Shiga harkokin siyasa bayan zaben sa a matsayin memba na majalisar gundumar Saxony.
Yi aiki a matsayin mai adawa da juyin juya hali (counter-revolutionary) a lokacin Juyin Juya Halin Maris na Berlin.
Zaben sa a matsayin memba na majalisar dokoki ta Prussia.
Nada shi a matsayin jakada a Majalisar Tarayya ta Frankfurt (Frankfurt Parliament).
Nada shi a matsayin jakadan Prussia a Russia.
Ya yi aiki a matsayin jakadan Prussia a Faransa, sannan ya zama Firayim Minista na Prussia.
Gabatar da 'Jawabin Jini da Karfe' (Blood and Iron Speech) a majalisa.
Nasara a Yakin Prussia da Denmark wanda ya doke Denmark.
Nasara a Yakin Prussia da Austria wanda ya doke Austria, da kuma sanya hannu kan Yarjejeniyar Prague.
Kafa Kungiyar Jihohin Arewacin Jamus (North German Confederation).
Nasara a Yakin Faransa da Prussia (Franco-Prussian War).
Sanar da Daular Jamus da kuma zama shugaban gwamnati (Chancellor) na farko na daular.
Fara shirin 'Kulturkampf' (yakin al'adu) don murkushe mambobin cocin Katolika a kudancin Jamus.
Kafa Bankin Daular (Reichsbank).
Shugabancin Taron Berlin (Congress of Berlin) bayan Yakin Russia da Turkiyya.
Kaddamar da 'Dokar Hana Gurguzu' (Anti-Socialist Laws).
Kaddamar da inshorar lafiya (health insurance).
Kaddamar da inshorar hadarin aiki (accident insurance) da kuma mallakar kasashen Togo da Cameroon a Afirka.
Mallakar kasar Gabashin Afirka ta Jamus (German East Africa).
Kaddamar da inshorar fansho na tsufa da na nakasa.
Yin murabus da barin siyasa saboda sabani a kan manufofi da Wilhelm II.
Mutuwa

keyAchievements.title: Hadin kan Jamus da kafa Daular Jamus
keyAchievements.description: Ya hada kan Jamus kuma ya kafa Daular Jamus ta hanyar samun nasarori a yake-yake da Denmark, Austria, da Faransa bayan ya fadada makaman Prussia.

keyAchievements.title: Manufar Jini da Karfe (Blood and Iron Policy)
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami taken 'Iron Chancellor' (재상) bayan ya gabatar da jawabin neman fadada makamai, kuma ya karfafa karfin soja bisa wannan manufa.

keyAchievements.title: Rike daidaiton karfi a Turai
keyAchievements.description: A matsayinsa na Chancellor na Jamus, ya jagoranci harkokin diflomasiyya a Turai kuma ya kulla kawance daban-daban kamar League of the Three Emperors da Triple Alliance don kokarin rike daidaiton karfi tsakanin manyan kasashe.

keyAchievements.title: Kaddamar da tsarin tsaron jama'a (social security)
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne na farko a duniya da ya kaddamar da inshorar lafiya, inshorar hadarin aiki, fansho na tsufa, da inshorar nakasa don kafa asalin kyakkyawar al'umma (welfare state).

keyAchievements.title: Samun kasashen mallaka
keyAchievements.description: Ya karfafa ci gaban tattalin arziki na Jamus da mallakar kasashe ta hanyar samun kasashen mallaka a Afirka kamar Togo, Cameroon, da German East Africa.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran Bismarck da 'Iron Chancellor'?
faq.answer: Ya sami wannan taken ne sakamakon 'Jawabin Jini da Karfe' na neman fadada makamai baada zama Firayim Minista a shekara ta 1862, amma ya sauya zuwa manufar zaman lafiya baada an hada kan kasar.

faq.question: Ta yaya Bismarck ya hada kan Jamus?
faq.answer: Ya fadada makamai bisa ga 'Manufar Jini da Karfe' kuma ya ci nasara a yake-yaken da aka yi da Denmark, Austria, da Faransa don sanar da kafa Daular Jamus da hada kan kasar.

faq.question: Menene manyan manufofin gida na Bismarck?
faq.answer: Ya gudanar da 'Kulturkampf' don murkushe Katolika da kuma 'Anti-Socialist Laws' don murkushe gurguzu, kuma ya kaddamar da tsarin tsaron jama'a na farko a duniya.

faq.question: Me yasa Bismarck ya sauka daga mukaminsa?
faq.answer: Ya yi murabus kuma ya bar siyasa a shekara ta 1890 sakamakon sabani a kan manufofi da Wilhelm II.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin dan na uku na Tsar Aleksey Mikhailovich da matarsa ta biyu Natalya Kirillovna Naryshkina.

Ya zama Tsar bayan mutuwar dan uwansa Feodor III tun yana yaro, amma ya rasa iko sakamakon juyin mulki na yayarsa Sophia Alekseyevna, don hakan ya shafe kuruciyarsa a kauyen kasashen waje (German Quarter).
Ya auri Eudoxia Lopukhina, diyar wani babban basarake na Russia.
Ya gudanar da juyin mulki don tura Sophia zuwa gidan ibada na mata kuma ya karbi mulki baada da manyan mutane suka janye goyon bayansu ga gwamnatin Sophia.
Ya shiga Yakin Azov da aka sake yi da Daular Ottoman a matsayin mai harba bindiga (gunner).
Ya kafa rundunar sojan ruwa kuma ya sake kai hari ga Azov don mamaye ta cikin sauki.
Ya zama shugaba daya tilo na kasar Russia (Tsardom of Russia) bayan mutuwar dan uwansa Ivan V.
Ya shiga kawance da Denmark da Poland don yakar Karl XII na Sweden, kuma ya shiga Babban Yakin Arewa (Great Northern War).
Ya fara gina sabon babban birnin kasar Saint Petersburg a bakin tekun Baltic da ya samu sakamakon Yakin Arewa.
Ya doke sojojin Sweden da Karl XII da kansa ya jagoranta a Poltava.
Daular Ottoman ta sanar da yaki ga kasar Russia bayan Karl XII ya kulla kawance da ita.
Ya mika Azov da rundunar sojan ruwa ta Bahar Rum don rage asarar rayuka baada sojojin Ottoman sun kewaye shi a Kogin Prut.
Ya doke rundunar sojan ruwa ta Sweden a Yakin Gangut (Hangö).
Abokin gabarsa Karl XII ya mutu a yaki ba tare da barin magaji ba.
Dansa guda daya tilo Tsarevich Alexei Petrovich ya rasu a kurkuku sakamakon raunin da ya samu daga azabtarwa.
Babban Yakin Arewa ya zo karshe da nasarar Russia, kuma aka sanar da kafa Daular Russia (Russian Empire) inda aka ba wa Peter taken 'Imperator' (Emperor).
Ya kamu da ciwon huhu (pneumonia) baada ya shiga ruwa don ceto sojan da ke neman mutuwa a lokacin da yake duba aikin gina Saint Petersburg.
Ya rasu sakamakon wannan ciwon huhu.

keyAchievements.title: Kafuwa da ci gaban Daular Russia
keyAchievements.description: Ya inganta kasar Russia ta hanyar manufar kasashen yamma da fadada yankuna, kuma ya kafa Daular Russia tare da kiran kansa Imperator.

keyAchievements.title: Gudanar da manufar kasashen yammacin Turai
keyAchievements.description: Ya gudanar da sauye-sauye daban-daban kamar tsarin rigunan mata, harajin gemu, da inganta sassan gudanarwa don kawo ci gaban zamani ga kasar Russia wadda ke da alamun Daular Mongol da yawa.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa da karfafa sojan ruwa
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa rundunar sojan ruwa mai karfi baada ya gano mahimmancin jiragen yaki a lokacin Yakin Azov, wanda ya taimaka kwarai wajen cin nasarar Azov da Babban Yakin Arewa.

keyAchievements.title: Nasara a Babban Yakin Arewa
keyAchievements.description: Ya samu hanyar kasuwanci ta Bahar Baltic baada ya ci nasara a kan Sweden a Babban Yakin Arewa, wanda ya sanya Russia zama babbar kasa a yankin Baltic.

keyAchievements.title: Gina birnin Saint Petersburg
keyAchievements.description: Ya gina sabon babban birnin kasar Saint Petersburg a yankin Baltic da ya samu, wanda ya zama alamar sauyin kasar zuwa salon kasashen yamma.

keyAchievements.title: Gyaran gudanarwa da ilimi
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa tsarin gudanarwa da tsarin matakai (Table of Ranks) bisa salon Prussia, ya saukaka rubutun Cyrillic, kuma ya kafa cibiyar kimiyya (Academy of Sciences) don karfafa ilimi.

faq.question: Me yasa Peter I ya gudanar da manufar kasashen yamma?
faq.answer: Ya dauki wannan manufa da mahimmanci don kawo ci gaban zamani ga kasar Russia wadda ke da alamun Daular Mongol da yawa kuma ta kasance a baya idan aka kwatanta da kasashen yammacin Turai.

faq.question: Ta yaya Peter I ya kafa sojan ruwa?
faq.answer: Ya gina rundunar sojan ruwa ta hanyar amfani da ilimin da ya samu tun yana yaro baada ya fuskanci matsalar mamaye katangar saboda rashin jiragen yaki a Yakin Azov da Daular Ottoman.

faq.question: Menene ya faru da dan Peter I?
faq.answer: Dansa guda daya tilo Tsarevich Alexei ya ki amincewa da manufar mahaifinsa, kuma an kama shi baada ya yi kokarin kashe mahaifinsa. Ya gudu zuwa kasashen waje ama ya dawo, inda ya rasu a kurkuku sakamakon azabtarwa.

faq.question: Ta yaya Peter I ya mutu?
faq.answer: Ya rasu a ranar 8 ga Fabrairu na shekara ta gaba sakamakon ciwon huhu da ya same shi baada ya shiga ruwa don ceto sojan da ke neman mutuwa a watan Disamba na shekara ta 1724.

timeline.event: Haihuwar Catherine II (Catherine the Great)
Auren Peter III, wanda ya kasance Yarima mai jiran gado na Russia.
Mutuwar Sarauniya Elizabeth da hawan karagar mulki na Sarki Peter III.
Ta cire mijinta Peter III kuma ta zama shugaba mace ta 8 (Tsarina) na Daular Russia.
An cire Peter III daga mulki kuma aka tsare shi ta hanyar juyin mulki na rundunar Praetorian a Saint Petersburg.
Gudanar da bikin nadin sarauta a Saint Petersburg don zama Sarauniyar Russia Catherine II.
Taron Hukumar Dokoki (Legislative Commission).
Nasara a yakin da aka yi da Daular Ottoman (Russo-Turkish War).
Shiga cikin rabon kasar Poland bisa shawarar Frederick II.
Barkewar boren manoma karkashin Pugachev saboda rashin gamsuwa da tsarin bautar kasa (serfdom).
Doke dakarun tawaye a wasu sassa da kuma janyewar Pugachev zuwa yankin Ural.
Gudanar da sauye-sauye a cikin gudanarwa na gida ta hanyar zartar da dokoki.
Kaddamar da Yarjejeniyar Gata ta Masu Daraja (Charter of the Nobility) da tsarin doka, da kuma karfafa kawance da masu daraja (nobility).
Yanke alakar diflomasiyya da kasuwanci da Faransa sakamakon labarin kashe Louis XVI na Faransa.
Ta rasu a Fadar Tsarskoye Selo kusa da Saint Petersburg, Russia.

keyAchievements.title: Inganta tsarin gudanarwa da dokoki
keyAchievements.description: Ta inganta tsarin gudanarwa da dokoki na Daular Russia tare da taimakon majalisar ministoci.

keyAchievements.title: Fadada yankuna
keyAchievements.description: Ta fadada yankunan kasar ta hanyar mallakar yankin Crimea da babban sashi na Poland, da kuma cin nasara a yaki da Daular Ottoman.

keyAchievements.title: Karfafa al'adu da ilimi
keyAchievements.description: Ta nuna sha'awa sosai ga al'adu, fasaha, da ilimi sakamakon tasirin tunanin haskakawa (Enlightenment).

keyAchievements.title: Karfafa ikon sarki
keyAchievements.description: Ta karfafa ikon sarki ta hanyar amincewa da ayyukan gwamnati kai tsaye daga gwamnonin larduna.

keyAchievements.title: Shigar da Russia cikin Turai
keyAchievements.description: Ta ci gaba da ayyukan Peter Mai Girma don shigar da Russia gaba daya cikin harkokin siyasa da al'adu na Turai.

keyAchievements.title: Sauyin gudanarwa na gida
keyAchievements.description: Ta sake tsara jihohi 29 bisa ga shirin sauya gudanarwa don kula da larduna cikin sauki.

keyAchievements.title: Karfafa wasan ballet
keyAchievements.description: Ta gayyaci shahararren mai tsara wasan ballet na Faransa kuma ta gudanar da manufar karfafa wasan, wanda ya taimaka wajen ci gaban wasan ballet na Russia.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa makarantu da gina birane
keyAchievements.description: Ta kashe kudi mai yawa a kan ilimi don kafa makarantu da dama, kuma ta gina sababbin birane fiye da 100 da fadada tsoffin birane.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Catherine II kuma yaushe ta mutu?
faq.answer: Catherine II ta rayu daga 2 ga Mayu, 1729 zuwa 17 ga Nuwamba, 1796.

faq.question: Menene ainihin sunan Catherine II?
faq.answer: Ainihin sunanta Sophie Auguste Friederike von Anhalt-Zerbst.

faq.question: Ta yaya Catherine II ta zama Sarauniyar Russia?
faq.answer: Ta cire mijinta Peter III a shekara ta 1762 kuma ta zama Sarauniya (Tsarina) ta 8 na Daular Russia.

faq.question: Menene manyan nasarorin Catherine II?
faq.answer: Ta inganta tsarin gudanarwa da dokoki na Russia, ta fadada yankuna kamar Crimea da Poland, ta karfafa adabi, fasaha, da ilimi, kuma ta karfafa ikon sarki.

faq.question: Shin Catherine II ta yi alaka da masana na lokacin haskakawa (Enlightenment)?
faq.answer: E, ta yi musayar wasiku da masana kamar Voltaire da Diderot sakamakon tasirin tunanin haskakawa.

faq.question: Menene babban boren da ya faru a lokacin mulkin Catherine II?
faq.answer: A lokacin mulkinta, boren manoma karkashin Pugachev ya barke a shekara ta 1773 saboda rashin gamsuwa da bautar kasa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Caracas, Venezuela ta mulkin Spain.
Mahaifiyarsa ta rasu.
Ya zama sub-lieutenant.
Fara tafiya zuwa Mexico da Turai.
Auren María Teresa.
Ya sake komawa Turai bayan mutuwar matarsa.
Ya ga lokacin da Napoleon ya zama sarki.
Komawa mahaifarsa don shiga cikin yunkurin neman yancin kai na Kudancin Amurka.
Ya yantar da Venezuela don kafa Jamhuriyar Venezuela.
Shiga birnin Caracas.
Ya doke sojojin Spain ta hanyar amfani da dabarun yaki na guerilla tare da tallafin José Antonio Páez.
Ya yantar da Colombia.
An amince da kafa Gran Colombia.
Nasara a Yakin Carabobo.
Ya yi taron sirri da San Martín a Guayaquil, Ecuador game da neman yancin kai na Kudancin Amurka.
Samun yancin kan Peru bayan nasarar sojojin yanci a Yakin Ayacucho.
Zaben sa a matsayin Shugaban Kasa na Peru.
Marshal Sucre ya yantar da yankin Alto Peru daga Spain tare da Andrés de Santa Cruz.
An sauya sunan kasar Alto Peru zuwa Bolivia don girmama ayyukan Simón Bolívar.
Ya yi kira ga kafa kasar hadaka ta Kudancin Amurka a Taron Panama (Panama Congress).
Ya mayar da ikon shugabancin rayuwa da ikon zaben magaji ga majalisar dokoki ta Gran Colombia.
Ya bar Bogotá, Colombia a matsayin alamar yin murabus daga shugabancin Gran Colombia.
Ya rasu yana da shekaru 47 a gidan Quinta de San Pedro Alejandrino.

keyAchievements.title: Jagoran yancin kan Latin America
keyAchievements.description: Yana daya cikin manyan mutane a tarihin yancin kan Latin America wanda ya taimaka wajen yantar da Panama, Ecuador, Colombia, Venezuela, Peru, da Bolivia daga mulkin Spain.

keyAchievements.title: Shugaban Kasa na farko na Gran Colombia
keyAchievements.description: An zabe shi a matsayin shugaban kasa na farko na Gran Colombia, wadda ta kasance jamhuriyar tarayya bisa salon Amurka.

keyAchievements.title: Asalin sunan kasar Bolivia
keyAchievements.description: An sauya sunan kasar Alto Peru zuwa Bolivia don girmama ayyukansa.

keyAchievements.title: Mai Yantar da Latin America (El Libertador)
keyAchievements.description: Ana girmama shi a matsayin mai yantar da kasa da uban kasa na Latin America tare da San Martín.

faq.question: Wane ne Simón Bolívar a tarihin duniya?
faq.answer: Shi dan fafutukar neman yancin kai ne kuma soja daga Venezuela, shugaban kasa na farko na Gran Colombia, kuma ana girmama shi a matsayin mai yantar da kasa da uban kasa na Latin America.

faq.question: Wadanne kasashe Simón Bolívar ya yantar?
faq.answer: Ya yantar da Panama, Ecuador, Colombia, Venezuela, Peru, da Bolivia daga mulkin Spain ta hanyar yakin makamai.

faq.question: Daga ina sunan kasar Bolivia ya fito?
faq.answer: An sanya wa kasar Bolivia suna ne don girmama Simón Bolívar ta hanyar amfani da sunansa ga yankin Alto Peru.

faq.question: Menene ra'ayin siyasa na Simón Bolívar?
faq.answer: Ya yi kokarin gina kasa guda daya ta Kudancin Amurka bisa salon Amurka, kuma ya goyi bayan hada dukkan yankin kudu ta hanyar kafa gwamnatin tsakiya mai karfi da kuma tsarin tarayya karkashin shugaban kasa.

faq.question: Menene dalilin mutuwar Simón Bolívar?
faq.answer: Ya rasu a ranar 17 ga Disamba, 1830 sakamakon ciwon fuka na huhu da kuma damuwa mai tsanani bayan kisan abokin aikinsa Sucre wanda ya sa lafiyarsa ta lalace sosai.

timeline.event: An haife shi ga wani dan kasuwa mai zagayawa a Jihar New York.
Ya koma Jihar Ohio tare da iyalinsa.
Ya fara shiga harkar tace mai (oil refining).
Ya kafa Kamfanin Standard Oil.
An rushe Standard Oil Trust saboda saba wa dokokin yaki da tauye kasuwanci (anti-trust laws).
Ya yi ritaya bayan Kotun Koli ta Amurka ta ba da umarnin rushe Kamfanin Standard Oil na New Jersey.
Ya rasu yana da shekaru 97.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Kamfanin Standard Oil
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa Standard Oil a shekara ta 1870 kuma ya tara dukiya mai yawa ta hanyar kasuwancin mai, wanda ya sanya shi zama daya cikin mutane mafi arziki a tarihin duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Mulkin mallaka na kasuwancin mai
keyAchievements.description: Ya tabbatar da mulkin mallaka na kasuwancin mai a Amurka ta hanyar kafa Standard Oil Trust.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan taimako (Philanthropy)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa Jami'ar Chicago da Asusun Rockefeller (Rockefeller Foundation) bayan ya yi ritaya don sadaukar da kansa ga ayyukan taimako kamar asibitoci, cibiyoyin binciken magunguna, da makarantu.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi John D. Rockefeller kuma yaushe ya mutu?
faq.answer: John Davison Rockefeller ya rayu daga 8 ga Yuli, 1839 zuwa 23 ga Mayu, 1937, inda ya rasu yana da shekaru 97.

faq.question: Menene manyan nasarorin John D. Rockefeller?
faq.answer: Ya kafa Standard Oil a shekara ta 1870 don tara dukiya mai yawa ta hanyar kasuwancin mai, kuma bayan ya yi ritaya ya kafa Jami'ar Chicago da Asusun Rockefeller don ba da gudunmawa ga ayyukan taimako.

faq.question: Menene ya faru da Standard Oil?
faq.answer: An rushe Standard Oil Trust a shekara ta 1899 saboda saba wa dokar anti-trust, kuma an rushe Kamfanin Standard Oil na New Jersey da aka kafa daga baya a shekara ta 1911 bisa umarnin Kotun Koli ta Amurka.

timeline.event: An haife shi a lardin Selanik (Thessaloniki, Girka a yanzu) wanda ke karkashin mulkin Daular Ottoman.
Shiga Makarantar Soja ta Salonica.
Shiga Makarantar Sakandare ta Soja ta Manastir.
Shiga Kwalejin Soja ta Daular Ottoman (War Academy).
Kammala karatu a Kwalejin Soja ta Daular Ottoman.
Kammala karatu a Kwalejin Soja ta Daular Ottoman (Staff College).
Daukaka shi zuwa matsayin Senior Captain.
An tura shi aiki zuwa Hedikwatar Sojoji ta Uku da ke Manastir.
An nada shi matsayin mai kula da hanyoyin jirgin kasa na Daular Ottoman a Gabashin Rumelia.
Ya shiga cikin Juyin Juya Halin Matasan Turkiyya (Young Turk Revolution).
Ya koma Istanbul bayan ya danne boren kabilu.
Ya taimaka wajen danne boren 31 ga Maris, wani yunkuri na adawa da juyin juya hali da ya faru a Istanbul.
An tura shi aiki zuwa Albania karkashin Daular Ottoman.
Ya shiga cikin manyan darussan horarwa na Picardy a Faransa a matsayin jami'in duba yaki na Daular Ottoman.
Ya yi aiki na wucin gadi a Ma'aikatar Yaki na Daular Ottoman a Istanbul.
An tura shi aiki zuwa Tripolitania (Libya a yanzu) karkashin Ottoman kuma ya shiga Yakin Italiya da Turkiyya.
Ya sami babban nasara a Yakin Tobruk.

timeline.year: Na tsawon kwanaki 17 tun daga 16 ga Janairu, 1912
timeline.event: Ya sami rauni a idonsa na hagu a Yakin Derna, wanda ya lalata masa gani.
Ya zama kwamandan sojojin Daular Ottoman a Derna.
Ya dawo daga yakin Italiya da Turkiyya bayan barkewar Yakin Balkan.
Yakin Italiya da Turkiyya ya zo karshe, kuma aka mika Tripolitania ta Ottoman ga Masarautar Italiya ta hanyar Yarjejeniyar Ouchy.
Ya sami babban nasara a Yakin Sakarya, wanda ya kawo karshen yunkurin babban burin Greece (Megali Idea).
Ranar da aka samu nasara a yaki da Greece ana bikin ta a matsayin ranar hutu ta kasa a Turkiyya.
Ya soke tsarin masarauta (Sultanate) kuma ya cire Mehmed VI.
Ya kulla sabuwar yarjejeniya (Yarjejeniyar Lausanne) tare da kasashen kawance.
Ya mayar da babban birnin kasar daga Istanbul zuwa Ankara, ya sanar da kafa jamhuriya, kuma ya zama Shugaban Kasa.
Ya soke tsarin Khalifanci (Caliphate) wanda ya wanzu na tsawon shekaru 1,300 tun shekara ta 632.
Ya kaddamar da sauyin tufafi don yantar da tufafin mata, ya kaddamar da ilimi na daidaiton maza da mata, kuma ya mayar da kalandar Musulunci zuwa kalandar Gregory ta Turai.
Ya gyara dokar farar hula don hana auren mata da yawa (polygamy) da kuma kafa tsarin auren mace daya (monogamy).
Ya soke tsarin rubutun Larabci na harshen Turkiyya kuma ya canza shi zuwa tsarin rubutun Latin (Roman alphabet).
Ya ba wa mata hakkin kada kuri'a (franchise).
Majalisar dokoki ta Turkiyya ta ba shi taken 'Atatürk' wanda ke nufin 'Uban yan Turkiyya'.
Alamun lalacewar lafiyar Atatürk sun fara bayyana.
Ya sha wahala sakamakon rashin lafiya mai tsanani a lokacin tafiyarsa zuwa Yalova, kuma an gano cewa yana da ciwon cirrhosis (liver cirrhosis).
Ya rasu yana da shekaru 57 a Fadar Dolmabahçe.

keyAchievements.title: Kafuwar Jamhuriyar Turkiyya da Shugaban Kasa na farko
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne wanda ya kafa kuma shugaban kasa na farko na Jamhuriyar Turkiyya, kuma ya jagoranci Yakin Yancin Kai na Turkiyya.

keyAchievements.title: Nasara a Yakin Gallipoli
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance janar na soja mai basira wanda ya hana harin sojojin Birtaniya da Faransa a Yakin Gallipoli a lokacin Yakin Duniya na Farko.

keyAchievements.title: Soke tsarin Sultanate da Caliphate
keyAchievements.description: Ya soke tsarin Sultanate da cire Mehmed VI a shekara ta 1922, kuma ya soke tsarin Caliphate a shekara ta 1924.

keyAchievements.title: Sanya tsarin secularism a cikin doka
keyAchievements.description: Ya sanya tsarin secularism (세속주의) wanda ke zama babban ruhin Jamhuriyar Turkiyya a cikin doka.

keyAchievements.title: Sauyin tufafi da tabbatar da hakkin ilimi na mata
keyAchievements.description: Ya kaddamar da sauyin tufafi don yantar da tufafin mata, kuma ya tabbatar da hakkin ilimi na mata wanda aka hana a baya don gudanar da ilimi na daidaiton maza da mata.

keyAchievements.title: Soke kalandar Musulunci da shigar da kalandar Gregory
keyAchievements.description: Ya soke kalandar Musulunci kuma ya sauya ta da kalandar Gregory ta Turai.

keyAchievements.title: Gyaran dokar farar hula da kafa tsarin auren mace daya
keyAchievements.description: Ya gyara dokar farar hula don hana auren mata da yawa (polygamy) da kuma kafa tsarin auren mace daya (monogamy).

keyAchievements.title: Shigar da tsarin rubutun Latin
keyAchievements.description: Ya soke tsarin rubutun Larabci na harshen Turkiyya kuma ya canza shi zuwa tsarin rubutun Latin (Roman alphabet).

keyAchievements.title: Ba wa mata hakkin kada kuri'a
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba wa mata hakkin kada kuri'a a shekara ta 1930.

faq.question: Menene ainihin sunan Atatürk?
faq.answer: Sunansa na yarinta shi ne Mustafa, kuma 'Kemal' suna ne da malaminsa na lissafi ya ba shi don yaba wa basirarsa ta lissafi da kuma balagarsa.

faq.question: Menene taken 'Atatürk' yake nufi kuma yaushe aka ba shi?
faq.answer: 'Atatürk' yana nufin "Uban yan Turkiyya", kuma majalisar dokoki ta Turkiyya ta ba shi shi a shekara ta 1934.

faq.question: Wane irin matsayi Atatürk yake da shi a Jamhuriyar Turkiyya?
faq.answer: Ana girmama shi a matsayin gwarzon yancin kai da uban kasa a Turkiyya. Majalisar dokoki ta ba shi taken girmamawa na 'Atatürk', kuma shi kadai ne mutumin da hotonsa ke kan takardun kudi na kasar.

faq.question: Yaushe Atatürk ya mutu kuma menene dalilin mutuwarsa?
faq.answer: Ya rasu yana da shekaru 57 a ranar 10 ga Nuwamba, 1938, kuma an gano cewa yana da ciwon cirrhosis na hanta a farkon shekara ta 1938.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan manufofin sauye-sauye da Atatürk ya gudanar?
faq.answer: Ya gudanar da sauye-sauye kamar soke tsarin Caliphate, sanya secularism a doka, sauyin tufafi, tabbatar da hakkin ilimi na mata, soke kalandar Musulunci, hana auren mata da yawa, canza tsarin rubutu zuwa haruffan Latin, da kuma ba wa mata hakkin kada kuri'a.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin babban dan Theodore Roosevelt Sr. da Martha Bulloch a birnin New York, Jihar New York, Amurka a ranar 27 ga Oktoba.
Ya kammala karatu a Jami'ar Harvard da sakamako mai kyau kuma ya shiga Columbia Law School amma ya bari. Ya auri Alice Hathaway Lee a wannan shekarar.
Ya fara aiki a matsayin dan majalisar wakilai na Jihar New York yana da shekaru 24.
Mahaifiyarsa Martha Bulloch da matarsa ta farko Alice Hathaway Lee sun rasu.
Ci gaba da ayyukan siyasa.
An nada shi matsayin kwamishinan yan sanda na Jihar New York, inda ya sake gudanar da ayyukan sauye-sauye da gano tare da hukunta rashawa na yan siyasa don samun shahara.

Ya yi murabus daga mukaminsa na Mataimakin Sakataren Sojan Ruwa bayan sanar da Yakin Amurka da Spain, ya kafa rundunar 'Rough Riders', kuma ya sami babban nasara a Yakin Kettle Hill da ke Cuba. A wannan shekarar, an nada shi matsayin colonel na sojan kasa na Amurka, sannan ya yi ritaya kuma aka zabe shi a matsayin Gwamnan Jihar New York.
An zabe shi a matsayin Mataimakin Shugaban Kasa bayan ya shiga takara tare da Shugaba William McKinley.
Ya zama Shugaban Kasa na 26 bayan mutuwar Shugaba McKinley sakamakon kisan gilla.

Ya sulhunta yajin aikin kwal (Coal Strike) don kafa misali na shiga tsakani na gwamnati, kuma ya zartar da shirin kafa Hukumar Kamfanoni ta Tarayya. Ya sami taken 'Trust Buster' bayan ya farfado da Dokar Sherman Anti-Trust ta hanyar tuhumar Kamfanin Northern Securities.
Ya yi amfani da 'Manufar Babban Kulki' (Big Stick Policy) lokacin da ya sami yankin Hanyar Ruwa ta Panama (Panama Canal Zone) daga Colombia.
Ya fara tsara 'Roosevelt Corollary to the Monroe Doctrine' tare da Elihu Root. Ya sake lashe zaben shugaban kasa.

Roosevelt Corollary ya fara aiki, inda ya matsa wa gwamnatin Dominican Republic lamba don nada kwararren dan kasuwa dan Amurka a matsayin mai ba da shawara kan tattalin arziki. Ya shirya Yarjejeniyar Portsmouth bayan karshen Yakin Russia da Japan. Ya tura William Howard Taft don kulla Yarjejeniyar Taft-Katsura ta sirri da Japan. Ya karfafa ikon Hukumar Kula da Dazuzzuka, ya soke ayyukan gina madatsun ruwa, kuma ya janye izini.

Ya zama shugaban kasa na farko mai ci da ya lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya saboda sulhunta matsalar Morocco da kuma taimakawa wajen kawo karshen Yakin Russia da Japan. Ya zartar da 'Dokar Hepburn' don ba wa Hukumar Interstate Commerce Commission (ICC) ikon kayyade mafi tsadar kudin sufuri. Ya zartar da Dokar Tsantsar Abinci da Magunguna (Pure Food and Drug Act). Ya bukaci majalisa ta ba shugaban kasa ikon mayar da sauran filaye su zama dazuzzuka na tarayya kuma aka amince da hakan.

Ya kulla 'Gentlemen's Agreement' da Japan don kwantar da boren adawa da Japan a California. Ya kulla Yarjejeniyar Root-Takahira don sake tabbatar da hakkin Amurka a kan Philippines a matsayin musayar amincewa da ikon Japan a Manchuria da Korea. An sami matsalar kudi ta Panic of 1907.
Ya yi tafiya zuwa Afirka da Turai na tsawon watanni 10 bayan ya sauka daga mulki a watan Maris.
Ya fuskanci sabani da Shugaba Taft saboda amincewa da karar anti-trust a kan U.S. Steel.

Baynan ya kasa samun zaben takarar shugaban kasa na Jam'iyyar Republican, ya kafa Jam'iyyar Progressive Party (Bull Moose Party) kuma ya tsaya takara amma bai yi nasara ba. An harbe shi a lokacin yakin neman zabe amma ya tsira.

Ya ki amincewa da shirin League of Nations na Wilson sosai. Ya yanke shawarar sake tsayawa takara a zaben shugaban kasa na gaba kuma ya zabi Warren G. Harding a matsayin abokin takara. An kwantar da shi a asibiti sakamakon rashin lafiya a watan Oktoba.
Ya rasu sakamakon matsalar numfashi a lokacin barci a gidansa da ke Oyster Bay, Jihar New York a ranar 6 ga Janairu.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa babban gandun daji na kasa na farko na Amurka
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa babban gandun daji na kasa na farko na Amurka.

keyAchievements.title: Kula da kamfanoni (trusts) ta hynar Dokar Sherman Anti-Trust
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi amfani da Dokar Sherman Anti-Trust don takaita trusts na manyan kamfanoni da ke girma ba tare da tsari ba don hana matsalolin monopoly.

keyAchievements.title: Lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami lambar yabo ta Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya saboda gudunmawarsa ta kawo karshen Yakin Russia da Japan, wanda ya kasance na farko ga dan Amurka kuma na farko ga shugaban kasar Amurka.

keyAchievements.title: Taimakawa wajen gina American Museum of Natural History
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da cikakken tallafi na gudanarwa da kudi don gina American Museum of Natural History a Jihar New York.

faq.question: Shugaba na nawa Theodore Roosevelt ya kasance a Amurka?
faq.answer: Ya kasance Shugaban Kasa na 26 na Amurka (1901-1909) da kuma Mataimakin Shugaban Kasa na 25 (1901).

faq.question: Menene sunan lakabi (nickname) na Theodore Roosevelt?
faq.answer: Sunan lakabinsa shi ne Teddy, kuma ana kiran sa da Theodore Roosevelt.

faq.question: Shin Theodore Roosevelt ya lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya?
faq.answer: E, ya zama shugaban kasa na farko mai ci da ya lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya a shekara ta 1906 saboda sulhunta matsalar Morocco da kuma kawo karshen Yakin Russia da Japan.

faq.question: Shin Teddy Bear yana da alaka da Theodore Roosevelt?
faq.answer: E, bayan an bayar da rahoton cewa Shugaba Roosevelt ya ki harbin karamin bare a lokacin farautar bare a shekara ta 1902, mai shagon wasan yara a New York ya sanya wa yar tsana suna 'Teddy', wanda shi ne asalin Teddy Bear.

timeline.event: An haifi Annelies Marie 'Anne' Frank a Frankfurt, Jamus.
Iyalinsa sun gudu zuwa Amsterdam, Netherlands bayan Hitler ya hau mulki kuma aka fara nuna banbancin launin fata ga Yahudawa.
An sami matsalar shiga makaranta saboda nuna banbanci ga Yahudawa da kuma barkewar Kristallnacht (수정의 밤), wani babban harin ta'addanci a kan Yahudawa.
Jamus ta Nazi ta mamaye Netherlands kuma ta fara neman dukkan Yahudawa.
Ta sami littafin rubutu mai launin ja a ranar cikar shekarunta 13 da haihuwa, kuma ta fara rubuta littafin tarihin rayuwarta mai suna 'Kitty'.
Mahaifinsa Otto Frank ya gama shirin boyewa a gidan sirri don iyalinsa.
Iyalinsa sun fara shiga gidan sirri da ke 263 Prinsengracht, Amsterdam.
Ranar karshe da Anne ta rubuta littafinta na tarihin rayuwa.

Yan sandan Nazi sun kai hari ba-tsammani a gidan sirrin sakamakon labarin sirri da wani ya bayyar, inda aka kama dukkan Yahudawa ciki har da iyalin Anne kuma aka kai su sansanin azabtarwa (concentration camps).

timeline.year: Fabrairu ko Maris na shekara ta 1945
timeline.event: Anne Frank ta rasu sakamakon cutar typhus (티푸스) tana da shekaru 16 a sansanin Bergen-Belsen.
Mahaifinsa Otto Frank ya wallafa littafin Anne a matsayin littafi.
Darakta George Stevens ya kera fim bisa ga littafin Anne, wanda ya lashe lambobin yabo na Oscar guda 3.
Mujallar 《Time》 ta bayyana wasikar da Otto Frank ya rubuta don kokarin ceto iyalinsa.
Gidan adana kayan tarihi na Anne Frank (Anne Frank House) ya sanar da cewa zai nuna takardun da Anne ta rubuta da hannunta na din-din-din.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "Diari na Anne Frank"
keyAchievements.description: Ta rubuta littafin tarihin rayuwarta wanda ke kunshe da rayuwarsu ta tsawon shekaru 2 da watanni 1 a cikin gidan sirri a lokacin mamayar Jamus ta Nazi.

keyAchievements.title: Tasiri a duniya
keyAchievements.description: An fassara littafinta zuwa harsuna kusan 60 kuma an sayar da fiye da miliyan 32, wanda ya zama dalilin kafa Gidan Tunawa da Anne Frank.

faq.question: Yaushe kuma a ina aka haifi Anne Frank?
faq.answer: An haifi Anne Frank a ranar 12 ga Yuni, 1929 a Frankfurt, birnin kasuwanci na Jamus.

faq.question: Yaushe Anne Frank ta fara rubuta littafinta na tarihin rayuwa?
faq.answer: Anne ta fara rubuta littafinta a watan Yuni na shekara ta 1942 bayan ta sami littafin rubutu mai launin ja a ranar cikar shekarunta 13 da haihuwa kuma ta sanya masa suna 'Kitty'.

faq.question: Yaushe kuma me yasa Anne Frank ta mutu?
faq.answer: Anne Frank ta rasu sakamakon cutar typhus tana da shekaru 16 a sansanin Bergen-Belsen a watan Fabrairu ko Maris na shekara ta 1945.

faq.question: Yaushe kuma wane ne ya wallafa littafin Anne?
faq.answer: Mahaifinsa Otto Frank ne ya wallafa littafin Anne a ranar 25 ga Yuni, 1947.

faq.question: Zuwa harsuna nawa aka fassara littafin Anne kuma nawa aka sayar?
faq.answer: An kiyasta cewa an fassara littafin zuwa harsuna kusan 60 kuma an sayar da kusan miliyan 32.

timeline.event: 앨라배마주 터스키지에서 로자 루이즈 맥콜리(Rosa Louise McCauley)로 태어남.
Ta auri Raymond Parks.
Ta kammala karatun sakandare tare da taimakon mijinta.
Ta shiga NAACP reshen Montgomery kuma ta fara shiga cikin harkokin kare hakkin bil'adama.
Yan sanda sun kama ta a Montgomery, Alabama bayan ta ki amincewa da umarnin direban mota na ba wa farin fata gurbinta na zama.
Cocin bakaken fata na wurare daban-daban sun sanar da shiga cikin boren Montgomery Bus Boycott.
An tuhume ta da laifin tayar da hankali kuma aka same ta da laifi, inda aka ci ta tara da kudin kotu.
Sun kafa kungiyar 'Montgomery Improvement Association' a Cocin Zion kuma suka zabi Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. a matsayin shugaba.
Ta kammala aiki a matsayin sakatariya ta NAACP reshen Montgomery.
Ta fara tafiya wurare daban-daban don yin jawabai game da shari'ar motar.
An dauke ta aiki a matsay인 sakatariya ta dan majalisa John Conyers a ofishinsa na Detroit.
Ta yi ritaya daga aikin sakatariya.
Ta rubuta littafinta na tarihin rayuwa "Rosa Parks: My Story" tare da Jim Haskins.
Ta rubuta littafinta na tunawa "Quiet Strength: The Faith, Hope, and Heart of a Woman Who Changed a Nation" tare da Gregory J. Reed.
Ta sami lambar yabo ta Presidential Medal of Freedom, lambar yabo mafi girma ga farar hula, daga gwamnatocin Bill Clinton.
Ta rasu tana da shekaru 92 a Detroit.

keyAchievements.title: Uwar kare hakkin bil'adama na zamani
keyAchievements.description: Majalisar dokoki ta Amurka ta kira ta da 'Uwar kare hakkin bil'adama na zamani'.

keyAchievements.title: Boren Montgomery Bus Boycott
keyAchievements.description: An kama ta a shekara ta 1955 bayan ta ki amincewa da umarnin direban mota na ba wa farin fata gurbinta na zama, wanda ya zama asalin boren Montgomery Bus Boycott da kuma yunkurin kare hakkin bil'adama a Amurka.

keyAchievements.title: Rajistar hakkin kada kuri'a
keyAchievements.description: Ta yi nasarar yin rajistar hakkin kada kuri'a bayan kokari sau 3 dud da cewa dokokin Jim Crow suna hana bakaken fata shiga harkokin siyasa.

keyAchievements.title: Aiki matsayin sakatariya ta NAACP
keyAchievements.description: Ta shiga cikin harkokin kare hakkin bil'adama a matsayin sakatariya ta NAACP reshen Montgomery daga watan Disamba 1943 zuwa shekara ta 1957.

keyAchievements.title: Samun lambar yabo ta Presidential Medal of Freedom
keyAchievements.description: Ta sami lambar yabo ta Presidential Medal of Freedom, lambar yabo mafi girma ga farar hula, a shekara ta 1996 karkashin gwaminatin Bill Clinton.

keyAchievements.title: Binne ta a Capitol Hill
keyAchievements.description: Ita ce mace ta farko kuma baka ta biyu da aka binne ta a Capitol Hill na Washington D.C.

faq.question: Yaushe kuma a ina aka haifi Rosa Parks?
faq.answer: An haifi Rosa Parks a ranar 4 ga Fabrairu, 1913 a Tuskegee, Alabama.

faq.question: Menene shari'ar motar da ta kai ga kama Rosa Parks?
faq.answer: An kama ta a ranar 1 ga Disamba, 1955 a Montgomery, Alabama bayan ta ki amincewa da umarnin direban mota na ba wa farin fata gurbinta na zama.

faq.question: Wane irin yunkuri shari'ar motar Rosa Parks ta haifar?
faq.answer: Wannan shari'ar ta kai ga boren Montgomery Bus Boycott na tsawon kwanaki 382, kuma ta zama asalin yunkurin kare hakkin bil'adama a Amurka tare da shigar Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.

faq.question: Yaushe Rosa Parks ta mutu?
faq.answer: Rosa Parks ta rasu tana da shekaru 92 a Detroit a ranar 24 ga Oktoba, 2005.

faq.question: Wadanne irin ayyuka Rosa Parks ta yi?
faq.answer: Ta yi ayyuka daban-daban bayan aurenta, inda ta yi aikin dinki sannan ta yi aikin sakatariya ta dan majalisa John Conyers daga shekara ta 1965 zuwa ritayarta a shekara ta 1988.

timeline.event: An haife shi ga sunan 'Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey' a Talbot County, Maryland.
Mahaifiyarsa Harriet Bailey ta rasu (Frederick yana da shekaru 9).
Sophia, matar Hugh Auld, ta koya masa karatu (Frederick yana da shekaru 10).
Ya koma gonar Talbot County kuma an ba shi rance ga Edward Covey ('Slave Breaker'), inda ya yi fada don nuna rashin amincewa da duka.
Ya koma Fells Point kuma ya shiga East Baltimore Mental Improvement Society, inda ya hadu da Anna Murray.
Ya gudu daga bauta don samun yanci a ranar 3 ga Satumba; ya auri Anna Murray a ranar 15 ga Satumba; ya koma New Bedford, Massachusetts kuma ya canza sunansa zuwa Frederick Douglass.
Ya sami kwarin gwiwa baada sauraron jawabin William Lloyd Garrison a taron Bristol Anti-Slavery Society; ya gabatar da jawabinsa na farko a taron Massachusetts Anti-Slavery Society a Nantucket.
Ya shiga cikin shirin taron 100 na American Anti-Slavery Society kuma ya kewaye gabashi da tsakiyar yamma na Amurka.
Wasu yan tawaye sun doke shi a Pendleton, Indiana, wanda ya sa hannunsa ya karye.
Ya wallafa littafinsa na farko "Narrative of the Life of Frederick Douglass, an American Slave" kuma ya tafi ziyarar kasashen Ireland.
Ya dawo Amurka kuma ya zauna a Rochester, Jihar New York, inda ya kafa jaridar "The North Star".
Ya shiga cikin Taron Seneca Falls kuma ya sanya hannu kan Declaration of Sentiments.
Ya hada jaridar "The North Star" da jaridar Gerrit Smith ta "Liberty Party Paper" don kafa "Frederick Douglass' Paper".
Ya wallafa "My Bondage and My Freedom".
Ya dawo daga Birtaniya baada diyarsa ta karshe Annie ta rasu tana da shekaru 11 a Rochester.
Ya yi tattaunawa da Shugaba Lincoln game da yadda ake kula da sojojin da ke bakaken fata.
Ya goyi bayan yakin neman zaben shugaban kasa na Ulysses S. Grant.
Ya koma Washington D.C. baada gidansa na Rochester ya kone.
Ya sayi gidansa na karshe mai suna 'Cedar Hill' a Washington D.C.
An nada shi a matsayin mai rajistar takardun filaye na District of Columbia (Recorder of Deeds).
Matarsa Anna ta rasu.
Ya auri Helen Pitts, wata baka (wait, white) mai goyon bayan hakkin mata.
Ya yi tafiya zuwa kasashen Birtaniya, Faransa, Italiya, Masar, da Girka tare da sabuwar matarsa Helen Pitts.
Ya wallafa "Life and Times of Frederick Douglass"; an nada shi a matsayin kwamishina na Haiti a Baje Kolin Duniya na Chicago (World's Columbian Exposition).
Ya rasu a ranar 20 ga Fabrairu a Washington D.C.

keyAchievements.title: Babban mutum a cikin yunkurin soke bauta
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance babban mutum a fannin soke bauta a Amurka, kuma ya yi aiki bisa ga abubuwan da ya fuskanta a matsayin bawa da kuma gaskiyar addini.

keyAchievements.title: Mai jawabi da marubuci mai tasiri
keyAchievements.description: '애너코스티아의 철인'으로 불리며 미국 역사상 가장 영향력 있는 강연자이자 저자 중 한 명으로 평가받았습니다.

keyAchievements.title: Wallafa littafin tarihin rayuwarsa
keyAchievements.description: Ya wallafa littafinsa "Narrative of the Life of Frederick Douglass" a shekara ta 1845, wanda ya zama littafi mai siyarwa da sauri kuma ya taimaka wajen sanar da ainihin halin bauta.

keyAchievements.title: Mai wallafa jaridu
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa jaridar "The North Star" a shekara ta 1847 kuma ya wallafa jaridu daban-daban don kare soke bauta da kare hakkin bil'adama.

keyAchievements.title: Shiga cikin yunkurin hakkin kada kuri'a na mata
keyAchievements.description: Ya shiga Taron Seneca Falls a shekara ta 1848 kuma ya sanya hannu kan Declaration of Sentiments don goyon bayan daidaiton mata.

keyAchievements.title: Tattaunawa da Shugaban Kasa
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne baka na farko da ya yi tattaunawa da Shugaba Abraham Lincoln game da yadda ake kula da sojojin da ke bakaken fata, da kuma Shugaba Andrew Johnson game da hakkin kada kuri'a na bakaken fata.

keyAchievements.title: Rike mukaman siyasa
keyAchievements.description: Ya rike mukaman siyasa masu mahimmanci bayan Yakin Basasa kamar shugaban Freedmen's Savings Bank, babban dan sanda na District of Columbia (Marshal), da kuma jakada a kasar Haiti.

faq.question: Menene ainihin sunan Frederick Douglass?
faq.answer: Ainihin sunansa 'Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey'.

faq.question: Me yasa ya canza sunansa?
faq.answer: Bayan ya gudu daga bauta, ya canza sunansa zuwa Frederick Douglass don girmama wani gwarzo a cikin littafin Walter Scott "The Lady of the Lake".

faq.question: Menene littafinsa mafi shahara?
faq.answer: Littafinsa na tarihin rayuwa "Narrative of the Life of Frederick Douglass, an American Slave" wanda aka wallafa a shekara ta 1845.

faq.question: Wane irin ra'ayi yake da shi game da Tsarin Mulkin Amurka?
faq.answer: A farko ya yi imanin cewa tsarin mulkin yana goyon bayan bauta, amma daga baya ya canza ra'ayonsa cewa tsarin mulkin takarda ce ta yaki da bauta kuma ana iya amfani da ita a matsayin makami don yakar bauta.

faq.question: Wane matsayi yake da shi game da daidaiton launin fata?
faq.answer: Ya yi imani da daidaiton dukkan mutane kamar bakaken fata, mata, da bakin haure, kuma ya shafe rayuwarsa wajen goyon bayan hadin kan dan adam gaba daya.

faq.question: Wace ce matarsa ta biyu?
faq.answer: Matarsa ta biyu ita ce Helen Pitts, diyar abokin aikinsa na soke bauta Gideon Pitts Jr. kuma mai goyon bayan hakkin mata.

timeline.event: Auren iyayensa Harriet Green da Ben Ross.
An haife ta da sunan Araminta Ross (shekarar haihuwa ta hasashe).
Mahaifinsa Ben Ross ya sami yanci daga bauta bisa ga wasiyyarsa na tsohon maigidansa.
Auren John Tubman.
Ta gudu zuwa Philadelphia bayan lafiyarta ta lalace.
Tubman da yan uwanta Ben da Henry sun gudu, amma yan uwan sun dawo.
Ceto danta na yayan (niece) Kessiah da yaranta biyu.
Ta koma Maryland kuma ta ceto kaninta Moses da wasu bayi biyu.
Ta koma Dorchester County don neman mijinta John, amma John ya sake aure kuma ya ki tafiya tare da ita.
Ta jagoranci bayi 11 da suka gudu zuwa kasar Canada.
Mahaifinta Ben da kaninsa sun sayi mahaifiyarta Rit daga gurin Eliza Brodess a kan dalar Amurka 20.
Ta ceto tsofaffin iyayenta kuma ta kai su St. Catharines, Ontario, Canada.
An gabatar da ita ga mai yaki da bauta John Brown.
John Brown ya bayyana shirin kai hari ga Harpers Ferry, Virginia a Chatham-Kent, Ontario.
윌리엄 H. 수어드 상원 의원에게 뉴욕주 오번 외곽의 작은 땅을 1,200달러에 삼
Ta gudanar da aikinta na karshe na ceto don yantar da iyalin Ennals da sauran rukuni.
Ta isa gidan David da Martha Coffin Wright a Auburn tare da iyalin Ennals.
Ta tafi yankin Hilton Head, South Carolina bayan barkewar Yakin Basasa.
Shugaba Lincoln ya kaddamar da Dokar Yantar da Bayi.
Ta gudanar da aikin kai hari a Kogin Combahee, inda ta ceto bayi fiye da 700.
Ta dawo gida bayan ta zauna a sansanin soja na tsawon watanni bayan mika wuya na Confederacy.
Auren Nelson Davis.
An wallafa littafin tarihin rayuwarta "Scenes in the Life of Harriet Tubman" na Sarah Bradford.
Ta shiga cikin shari'ar zamba ta zinari.
Ta dauki yarinya mace mai suna Gertie a matsayin yar riko.
An wallafa littafin Sarah Bradford "Harriet, the Moses of Her People".
Ta yi aikin tiyata na kwakwalwa a Massachusetts General Hospital da ke Boston.
Ta shiga matsayin fuhimmiyar mai jawabi a taron farko na National Association of Colored Women.
Ta fara karbar kudin fansho na aikin soja a lokacin Yakin Basasa.
Ta ba da wani sashi na filayenta kyauta ga Cocin African Methodist Episcopal Zion.
Ta shiga a matsayin babban bako na musamman na Gidan Kula da Tsofaffi na Harriet Tubman.
Ta shiga gidan kula da tsofaffi mai suna da kanta.
Ta rasu sakamakon ciwon huhu.
An wallafa littafin Earl Conrad "Harriet Tubman: Negro Soldier and Abolitionist".
Hukumar Kula da Jiragen Ruwa ta Amurka ta kera jirgin ruwa na farko mai suna mace baka, wato SS Harriet Tubman (SS Harriet Liberty).
Hukumar gidan waya ta Amurka ta kaddamar da tambarin girmamawa na Tubman, tambari na farko don girmama baka.
Molefi Kete Asante ya saka Harriet Tubman a cikin jerin "100 Greatest African Americans".
Jean Humez ya wallafa littafi game da rayuwar Tubman.
Kate Clifford Larson da Catherine Clinton sun rubuta tarihin rayuwar Tubman.
Jami'ar Towson ta sanya wa sabon dakin kwanan dalibai suna "Tubman House".
Sakataren Kudi na Amurka Jack Lew ya sanar da cewa za a sauya hoton takardar dalar Amurka 20 da hoton Tubman.
An nada ta a matsayin major general (wait, brigadier general) na Maryland National Guard a Ranar Tsofaffin Sojoji.

keyAchievements.title: Gudanar da yunkurin yantar da bayi
keyAchievements.description: Ta ceto bayi kusan 70 ta hanyar kafa sansanoni 13 ta hanyar tsarin sirri na yantar da bayi da ake kira 'Underground Railroad'.

keyAchievements.title: Aiki matsayin kwamandan 'Underground Railroad'
keyAchievements.description: Ta shiga kudu a matsayin kwamandan 'Underground Railroad' daga shekara ta 1850 zuwa 1860, inda ta taimaka wa bakaken fata fiye da 300 gudu zuwa arewa.

keyAchievements.title: Ceto iyalinsa
keyAchievements.description: Bayan ta gudu zuwa Philadelphia, ta koma Maryland don fitar da danginta daga jihar, kuma a karshe ta yantar da bayi da dama.

keyAchievements.title: Shiga Yakin Basasa na Amurka
keyAchievements.description: Ta yi aiki a matsayin mai dafa abinci, ma'aikaciyar jinya, mai binciken soja mai dauke da makamai, da kuma leken asiri don sojojin arewa (Union Army).

keyAchievements.title: Jagorantar harin Kogin Combahee
keyAchievements.description: Ta zama mace ta farko da ta jagoranci shirin yaki a lokacin Yakin Basasa don kai hari a Kogin Combahee, inda ta yantar da bayi fiye da 700.

keyAchievements.title: Yunkurin hakkin kada kuri'a na mata
keyAchievements.description: Ta yi yaki don hakkin kada kuri'a na mata bayan yaki, inda ta shiga tarurruka daban-daban kuma ta gabatar da jawabi a New York, Boston, da Washington D.C.

keyAchievements.title: Taimakawa wajen kafa gidan kula da tsofaffi na bakaken fata
keyAchievements.description: Ta shafe sauran rayuwarta a gidan kula da tsofaffi na bakaken fata wanda aka kafa da taimakonta shekaru kadan da suka wuce. A shekara ta 1903, ta ba da wani sashi na filayenta kyauta ga cocin don amfani da shi ga gidan kula da 'bakaken fata tsofaffi da ke cikin bukata'.

faq.question: Menene ainihin sunan Harriet Tubman?
faq.answer: Ainihin sunan Harriet Tubman shi ne Araminta Ross.

faq.question: Bayi nawa Harriet Tubman ta ceto?
faq.answer: Ta ceto bayi kusan 70 ta hanyar kafa sansanoni 13 ta hanyar 'Underground Railroad', ta taimaka wa bakaken fata fiye da 300 gudu zuwa arewa a matsayin kwamandan 'Underground Railroad' daga shekara ta 1850 zuwa 1860, kuma ta ceto bayi fiye da 700 ta hanyar kai hari a Kogin Combahee.

faq.question: Shin an saka ladan kudi (bounty) a kan kanta?
faq.answer: Ko da yake akwai labarin cewa an saka ladan dalar Amurka 40,000 a kan kanta, wannan ba gaskiya ba ne, kuma babu wata shaida da ke goyon bayan labarin ladan dalar Amurka 12,000.

faq.question: Wace rawar Harriet Tubman ta taka a Yakin Basasa?
faq.answer: Ta yi aiki a matsayin mai dafa abinci, ma'aikaciyar jinya, mai bincike mai dauke da makamai, da kuma leken asiri ga sojojin arewa, kuma ta zama mace ta farko da ta jagoranci shirin yaki a lokacin harin Kogin Combahee inda ta yantar da bayi fiye da 700.

faq.question: Me yasa aka kira Harriet Tubman da taken 'Moses'?
faq.answer: Ta shahara da taken 'Moses' saboda ta ceto mutane da yawa daga bauta, wanda aka kwatanta da yadaan Moses ya yantar da mutanen da ake zalunta a cikin littafin Exodus.

faq.question: Shin za a saka hoton Harriet Tubman a kan takardar dalar Amurka 20?
faq.answer: A ranar 20 ga Afrilu, 2016, Sakataren Kudi na Amurka Jack Lew ya sanar da cewa za a sauya hoton takardar dalar Amurka 20 dga tsohon Shugaba Andrew Jackson zuwa Tubman.

harriet-tubman.missingDataNote: 해리엇 터브먼의 정확한 출생 시기나 장소는 알려져 있지 않으며, 특히 출생 시기에 관해서는 역사가들 사이에 이견이 있습니다. 터브먼의 외할머니 마데스티 외 조상에 관해서는 알려진 정보가 거의 없습니다. 어릴 적 터브먼이 기독교의 어느 종파였는지는 확실치 않습니다. 마거릿이 터브먼의 딸이었을 가능성이 제기되지만, 확실한 근거는 없으며 마거릿의 부모에 관한 일치되는 이론도 없습니다. 누이 레이철의 두 자식(벤과 앤저린)의 이후 삶은 알려져 있지 않습니다.

timeline.event: An haife ta a matsayin diya ta biyu ta William Edward Nightingale da Frances Nightingale.
Ta hadu da Sismondi, dan gurguzu na Switzerland, a lokacin da take tafiya a Italiya.
Ta ziyarci asibitin Alexandria lokacin da take tafiya a Masar, kuma ta fahimci mahimmancin ilimin jinya na kwarai.
Ta koyi ilimin jinya a makarantar Protestant da ke Kaiserswerth, Düsseldorf, Jamus, kuma ta zama shugaban jinya na Hospital for Gentlewomen a London.
Ta yi aiki a matsayin ma'aikaciyar jinya ta yaki a asibitin yaki na Scutari (Üsküdar) a lokacin Yakin Crimea.
An zabe ta a matsayin mace ta farko memba ta Royal Statistical Society.
Ta kafa Makarantar Jinya ta Nightingale kuma ta rubuta littattafai na kwararru a fannin jinya.
Ta sami lambar yabo ta Dame of Grace na Order of St John (DStJ).
Ta zama mace ta farko da ta sami lambar yabo ta Order of Merit daga Sarki Edward VII.
Ta rasu tana da shekaru 90.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa aikin jinya a matsayin sana'a
keyAchievements.description: Ta yi aiki a matsayin ma'aikaciyar jinya a Yakin Crimea, inda ta yada aikin jinya kuma ta kafa shi a matsayin kwararriyar sana'a.

keyAchievements.title: Inganta tsaftar asibiti
keyAchievements.description: Ta rage yawan mutuwar marasa lafiya dunga kashi 42 zuwa kashi 2 ta hanyar kafa tsare-tsare a asibitin yaki na Scutari wanda yake cike da hargitsi a lokacin Yakin Crimea.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa tsarin ilimin jinya
keyAchievements.description: Ta kafa Makarantar Jinya ta Nightingale a shekara ta 1860 kuma ta rubuta littattafai don samar da harsashin horar da ma'aikatan jinya.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da ra'ayin dakin kula da marasa lafiya na musamman (Intensive Care Unit)
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne ya fara gabatar da ra'ayin dakin kula da marasa lafiya na musamman (ICU) ta hanyar ware marasa lafiya wadanda ke da tsananin ciwo don ba su kula ta musamman a lokacin Yakin Crimea.

keyAchievements.title: Bincike na kididdiga (Statistical Analysis)
keyAchievements.description: Ta gamsar da mutane game da mahimmancin tsaftar asibiti ta hanyar bincikar bayanai na Yakin Crimea, kuma ta zama mace ta farko memba ta Royal Statistical Society.

keyAchievements.title: 저술 활동
keyAchievements.description: Littafinta "Notes on Nursing" ya zama tushen bayanai na dokokin jinya da horar da ma'aikata, kuma ma'aikatan jinya a duk duniya suna yin Alkawarin Nightingale (Nightingale Pledge).

faq.question: Shin akwai wasu korafe-korafe game da girmama Nightingale?
faq.answer: A shekara ta 1999, kungiyar ma'aikatan gwamnati ta Birtaniya 'UNISON' ta yi adawa da girmama Nightingale, inda ta soki cewa ta hana yancin kai na ma'aikatan jinya kuma ta sa suna karbar albashi kadan, kuma ta yi da'awar cewa an boye nasarorin sauran ma'aikatan jinya.

faq.question: Shin akwai wata ma'aikaciyar jinya da ta yi aiki a lokaci daya da Nightingale?
faq.answer: Mary Seacole ta kasar Jamaica ta yi aiki a lokaci daya da Nightingale, amma ba ta samu damar yin aiki tare da Nightingale ba saboda nuna banbancin launin fata, kuma ta rayu cikin talauci.

timeline.event: An haife ta a matsayin ta biyu a cikin yara hudu (maza uku da mace daya) na mahaifinta Yu Jung-gwon da mahaifiyarta Yi So-je a Byeongcheon-myeon, Cheonan, Lardin Chungcheongnam-do.
Ta shiga aji na 3 na makarantar Ewha Haktang a matsayin daliba mai tallafin karatu (scholarship student) bisa shawarar Mrs. Alice Sharp, mai wa'azi ta cocin Methodist ta Amurka.
Ta kammala karatun firamare a Ewha Haktang kuma ta shiga karatun sakandare.
Ta shiga cikin Boren 3 ga Maris (3.1 Movement) a Seoul.
Ta kuma shiga cikin zanga-zangar Manse a Seoul.
Baynan an rufe makarantar Ewha Haktang saboda umarnin rufe makarantu na gwamnatin mulkin mallaka, ta koma mahaifarsa Cheonan tare da yayarta na uba daya Yu Ye-do.
Yan sandan Japan sun kama ta lokacin da take jagorantar zanga-zangar Manse a ranar kasuwar Aunae da ke Cheonan.
Kotun farko ta Gongju ta yanke mata hukuncin daurin shekaru 5 a gidan yari saboda laifin tayar da zaune tsaye da kuma saba wa 《Dokar Tsaro》.
An yanke mata hukuncin daurin shekaru 3 a Kotun daukaka kara ta Keijo (Seoul), kuma hukuncin ya tabbata bayan ta janye neman sake duba shari'ar.
Ta rasu a kurkukun Seodaemun sakamakon fashewar mafitsara (ruptured bladder).
Ewha Haktang ta karbi gawarta daga kurkukun Seodaemun bayan zanga-zangar malamai kuma suka sanya mata likafani.
An yi bikin jana'iza a Cocin Methodist na Chungdong kuma aka binne ta a makabartar Itaewon.
An ba ta lambar yabo ta Order of Merit for National Foundation (Independent Medal) ta Jamhuriyar Korea.
Tun da gawarta ta bace, an gina kabari na girmamawa (cenotaph) a tsakiyar Dutsen Maebong, Byeongcheon-myeon, Cheonan.
An gyara gidanta na haihuwa da ke Yongdu-ri, Byeongcheon-myeon, Dongnam-gu, Cheonan, Lardin Chungcheongnam-do, kuma aka ayyana shi a matsayin Wuri na Tarihi Lamba 230.
Ewha Girls' High School ta ba ta difloma ta girmamawa.
An bude Gidan Tunawa da Ryu Gwan-sun a Byeongcheon-myeon, Cheonan, Lardin Chungcheongnam-do don cikar shekaru 100 da haihuwarta.
An ba ta lambar yabo ta Order of Merit for National Foundation (Republic of Korea Medal).

keyAchievements.title: Shiga da jagorantar Boren 3 ga Maris
keyAchievements.description: Ta shiga cikin Boren 3 ga Maris na shekara ta 1919 a Seoul, kuma ta koma mahaifarsa Cheonan inda ta jagoranci boren Manse a kasuwar Aunae.

keyAchievements.title: Mutuwa saboda fafutukar neman yancin kai
keyAchievements.description: Ta rasu a kurkukun Seodaemun bayan an kama ta kuma mafitsara ta ta fashe saboda azabtarwa mai tsanani da yan mulkin mallaka na Japan suka yi mata, wanda ya nuna daddiyar aniyarta na neman yancin kai.

keyAchievements.title: Alamar ruhin neman yancin kai
keyAchievements.description: Ana tuna da ita a matsayin wata alama ta neman yancin kai, inda aka ba ta lambar yabo ta Order of Merit for National Foundation bayan mutuwarta kuma aka gudanar da shirye-shiryen tunawa da ita.

faq.question: Menene ainihin dangin (bongwan) Ryu Gwan-sun?
faq.answer: Dangin Ryu Gwan-sun na Goheung (高興) ne.

faq.question: 유관순의 이름 표기에 대한 논란이 있었나요?
faq.answer: An sami gardama a kan rubuta 'Yu' ko 'Ryu' dangane da dokar furci a baya, amma tun shekara ta 2014 ana rubuta 'Yu Gwan-sun' don rage rikici a al'umma.

faq.question: Menene hukuncin farko da aka yanke wa Ryu Gwan-sun?
faq.answer: An yanke mata hukuncin daurin shekaru 5 a gidan yari a Kotun Gongju a ranar 9 ga Mayu, 1919 saboda laifin tayar da zaune tsaye da kuma saba wa 《Dokar Tsaro》.

faq.question: Menene dalilin mutuwar Ryu Gwan-sun?
faq.answer: Ta rasu a kurkukun Seodaemun a ranar 28 ga Satumba, 1920 sakamakon fashewar mafitsara ta hanyar azabtarwa yayin da take daure.

faq.question: A ina gawar Ryu Gwan-sun take?
faq.answer: Gavarta ta bace a lokacin da aka mayar da makabartar Itaewon zuwa wani wuri, kuma a yanzu an gina kabari na girmamawa a tsakiyar Dutsen Maebong, Byeongcheon-myeon, Cheonan.

faq.question: Yaya iyayen Ryu Gwan-sun suka rasu?
faq.answer: A ranar boren Manse na Aunae, wato 1 ga Afrilu, 1919, mahaifinta Yu Jung-gwon da mahaifiyarta Yi So-je sun rasu a daidai wurin taron.

yu-gwan-sun.missingDataNote: 이화학당 고등부 진학 연도(1918년 vs 1919년) 및 이태원 공동묘지 이장 연도(1936년 vs 1937년)에 대한 원문 내 상충되는 정보가 있어, 고등부 진학 연도는 다른 서술과 일치하는 1918년으로 기재하고, 이장 연도는 불확실성으로 인해 생략했습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Coupvray, Seine-et-Marne, Faransa.
Ya ji rauni a idonsa na hagu da abin huda takalmi a shagon mahaifinsa, kuma idonsa na dama ma ya fara rasa gani saboda ciwo.
Ya zama makaho gaba daya.
Ya sami tallafin karatu a Makarantar Makafi ta Kasa da ke Paris (Royal Institution for Blind Youth).
Charles Barbier ya ziyarci makarantar kuma ya gabatar da rubutun dare (night writing) mai digo 12.
Ya fadada tsarin braille don nuna lissafi da kida, kuma ya wallafa shi a matsayin littafi.
Ya rasu sakamakon ciwon huhu (tuberculosis) yana da shekaru 43 a Paris.
An mayar da kashinsa zuwa Panthéon na Paris don binne shi.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar tsarin Braille
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera tsarin rubutu mai digo 1 zuwa 6 wanda za a iya karantawa da rubutawa ta amfani da yatsun hannu (Braille).

keyAchievements.title: Fadadawa da wallafa tsarin braille
keyAchievements.description: Ya fadada tsarin braille don nuna lissafi da kida kuma ya wallafa shi a matsayin littafi a shekara ta 1827.

faq.question: Wace nasara Louis Braille ya shahara da ita?
faq.answer: Ya shahara da kirkirar tsarin rubutun braille mai digo 1 zuwa 6 wanda makafi za su iya karantawa da yatsu.

faq.question: Yaushe kuma a ina aka haifi Louis Braille?
faq.answer: An haife shi a ranar 4 ga Janairu, 1809 a Coupvray, Seine-et-Marne, Faransa.

faq.question: Ta yaya Louis Braille ya rasa gani?
faq.answer: Ya ji rauni a idonsa na hagu da reza ko abin huda takalmi a shagon mahaifinsa yana da shekaru 3, kuma ya zama makaho gaba daya yana da shekaru 4 sakamakon yaduwar cutar zuwa idonsa na dama.

faq.question: Menene banbanci tsakanin braille na Louis Braille da rubutun dare na Charles Barbier?
faq.answer: Rubutun dare na Barbier yana da digo 12 kuma yana nuna sauti, yayin da braille na Braille yana da digo 6 kuma yana nuna haruffa, wanda ya sa ya zama mai sauki wajen karatu da rubutu.

timeline.event: An haife ta a matsayin diyar manomi a Domrémy a arewa maso gabas ta Faransa.
Ta sami wahayin Ubangiji daga Saint Michael, Saint Catherine, da Saint Margaret tana da shekaru 13.
Ta ziyarci Charles VII tana da shekaru 17 don samun amincewarsa kuma ta shiga Yakin Shekaru Dari (Hundred Years' War).
An bayyana ta a taron binciken addini a Poitiers cewa ta rayu rayuwa mai kyau, ta kasance Kirista mai gaskiya, kuma tana da dabi'u na tawali'u, gaskiya, da sauki.
Ta isa Orléans wanda sojojin Ingila suka kewaye.
Sojojin Faransa sun kai hari ga katangar Saint Loup kuma suka kwato ta.
Ta bkaci kai hari ga Les Tourelles, babban katangar Ingila, kuma ta jagoranci yakin.
Ta kwato Jargeau, Meung-sur-Loire, da Beaugency.
Ta doke sojojin Ingila a Yakin Patay.
Ta taimaka wajen bikin nadin sarauta na Charles VII a matsayin Sarkin Faransa a Cathedrals na Reims.
Ta kai hari ga Paris amma ta dawo baya bisa umarnin sarki.
Ta kwato Saint-Pierre-le-Moûtier kuma aka ba ta taken masu daraja (noble status).
Sojojin Burgundy sun kama ta a lokacin Yakin Compiègne.
An kai ta zuwa Rouen wanda ke karkashin mulkin Ingila.
An fara shari'ar addini (trial) a Rouen wanda ke karkashin mulkin Ingila.
An yanke mata hukuncin kisa ta hanyar kona ta (burning at the stake) a shari'ar addini.
An kona ta a gaban jama'a a dandalin Place du Vieux-Marché na Rouen.
An fara sake duba shari'ar Joan of Arc bisa umarnin Paparoma Callixtus III.
An shigar da neman daukaka kara (appeal) a hukumance a kan tuhume-tuhumen da ake yi wa Joan of Arc.
Kotun daukaka kara ta wanke ta daga dukkan zarge-zarge kuma ta ayyana ta a matsayin mai shahada (martyr).
Vatican ta girmama ta a matsayin mai albarka (beatified).
Paparoma Benedict XV ya girmama ta a matsayin tsarkaka (canonized as a saint).

keyAchievements.title: Taimakawa wajen samun nasarar Faransa a Yakin Shekaru Dari
keyAchievements.description: Ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen sauya yanayin Yakin Shekaru Dari ta hanyar karfafa gwiwar sojojin Faransa a yake-yake daban-daban kamar Yakin Orléans.

keyAchievements.title: Taimakawa wajen bikin nadin sarauta na Charles VII
keyAchievements.description: Ta taimaka wa Charles VII wajen samun amincewa ta hanyar bikin nadin sarauta a Reims Cathedral bayan ta kwato Reims.

keyAchievements.title: Wanke sunanta da zama tsarkaka bayan mutuwa
keyAchievements.description: An wanke ta daga dukkan tuhume-tuhume kuma aka ayyana ta a matsayin mai shahada a sake duba shari'ar, sannan aka ba ta matsayin mai albarka a shekara ta 1909 da kuma tsarkaka a shekara ta 1920.

faq.question: Me yasa Joan of Arc ta fuskanci shari'ar addini?
faq.answer: Kasar Ingila ta zargi Joan of Arc da laifin cin amana da bidi'a don bata sunan Charles VII, kuma coci ta kalli cewa da'awarta na magana kai tsaye da Ubangiji yana kawo matsala ga tsarin coci.

faq.question: Ta yaya Joan of Arc ta mutu?
faq.answer: 1431년 5월 29일 종교재판에서 화형을 선고받았고, 다음날인 5월 30일 루앙의 비외 마르셰 광장에서 군중 앞에서 장대에 묶여 화형에 처해졌습니다.

faq.question: Me yasa Joan of Arc ta sanya tufafin maza?
faq.answer: Ta bayyana cewa ta sanya tufafin maza ne don gudanar da aiki da kyau a cikin rundunar soja da ke da maza da yawa, da kuma kare mutuncinta idan bukatar hakan ta taso.

faq.question: Me yasa aka sake duba shari'ar Joan of Arc?
faq.answer: An yi hakan ne don magance matsalar gadon sarautar Charles VII, da kuma sake duba daidaiton hukuncin da aka yanke mata bisa bukatar Paparoma Callixtus III da mahaifiyar Joan of Arc.

timeline.event: An haife ta a Litchfield, Connecticut, Amurka a ranar 14 ga Yuni.
Ta zauna a Cincinnati, Ohio.
Ta rubuta kuma ta wallafa littafin geography na yara a karon farko karkashin sunan yayarta Catharine.
Ta auri Calvin Stowe, farfesa na makarantar addini.
Ta wallafa littafinta na yaki da bauta "Uncle Tom's Cabin".
Ta wallafa littafin "Dred".
Ta wallafa littafin "The Minister's Wooing".
Ta wallafa littafin "The Pearl of Orr's Island".
Ta wallafa "Lady Byron Vindicated".
Ta wallafa "Sam Lawson's Oldtown Fireside Stories".
Ta wallafa littafin "Oldtown Folks".
Ta rasu tana da shekaru 85 a Hartford a ranar 1 ga Yuli.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "Uncle Tom's Cabin"
keyAchievements.description: Ta wallafa "Uncle Tom's Cabin", littafin yaki da bauta, wanda ya karfafa sabani a kan ra'ayi tsakanin kudu da arewa wanda ya kai ga barkewar Yakin Basasa.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta littafin geography na yara
keyAchievements.description: Ta rubuta kuma ta wallafa littafin geography na yara a karon farko karkashin sunan yayarta Catharine a shekara ta 1833.

faq.question: Wace ce Harriet Beecher Stowe?
faq.answer: Ta kasance mai yaki da bauta da kuma marubuciya a Amurka, kuma ta shahara da littafinta na yaki da bauta "Uncle Tom's Cabin".

faq.question: Wane irin tasiri "Uncle Tom's Cabin" ya yi?
faq.answer: Wannan littafin ya yi babban tasiri wajen bincikar takaddamar bauta da kuma karfafa sabani tsakanin kudu da arewa wanda ya kai ga Yakin Basasa.

faq.question: Me yasa Harriet Beecher Stowe ta nuna sha'awa ga soke bauta?
faq.answer: 켄터키주 여행 중 흑인 노예들의 불쌍한 생활상을 보고 노예 폐지 운동에 정열을 쏟았으며, 어린 시절 어머니의 부재 경험이 노예 소년소녀들에게 깊은 연민을 품게 했다고 합니다.

timeline.event: 황해도 해주에서 김순영과 곽낙원의 외동 아들로 태어남 (초명 김창암)
Ya fadi jarrabawar gwamnati (gwageo) yana da shekaru 17.
Ya shiga kungiyar Donghak kuma ya canza sunansa dari Kim Chang-am zuwa Kim Chang-su.
Ya shiga boren manoma na Donghak (Donghak Peasant Revolution) kuma ya jagoranci sojojin Donghak a Palbong, Haeju.
Ya nemi taimako a gurin An Tae-hun bayan rashin nasarar boren Donghak.
An kama shi bayan ya kashe wani dan kasar Japan Josuke Tsuchida a Chihapo, Lardin Hwanghae.
Ya karanta littattafai kamar "Great Learning" da "Tarihin Duniya" a kurkuku kuma ya koyar da sauran fursunoni karatu.
Ya yi nasarar gudu daga kurkuku tare da sauran fursunoni, kuma ya zama dan haikali (monk) a Haikalin Magoksa da ke Gongju inda ya sami sunan addini Wonjong.
Ya bar Magoksa don yin yawace-yawace, sannan ya koma rayuwar gari a Yeongcheonam da ke Pyongyang kuma ya koma mahaifarsa.
Ya yi aikin koyarwa a Ganghwado kuma ya kafa makarantu a mahaifarsa, sannan ya shiga cocin Methodist bayan cika lokacin makokin mahaifinsa.
Ya kafa Makarantar Bongyang a Jangyeon, Lardin Hwanghae, kuma ya yi aiki a matsayin malamin makarantar gwamnati da memba na kwamitin noma da kasuwanci.
Ya gudanar da ayyukan dawo da hakkin kasa kamar boren yaki da Yarjejeniyar Eulsa (Eulsa Treaty).
Ya zama malami na Seomyeong Uisuk a Munhwa County, Lardin Hwanghae, kuma ya auri Choi Jun-rye.
Ya shiga kungiyar Shinminhoe kuma ya yi aiki a matsayin babban mai duba na reshen Lardin Hwanghae.
Ya canza sunansa daga Gu (龜) zuwa Gu (九) yana da shekaru 36.
Ya sake canza sunansa zuwa Gu kuma ya sanya wa kansa lakabin 'Baekbeom' don kauce wa rajistar Japan.
An daure shi a kurkukun Incheon da na Seodaemun bayan an yanke masa daurin shekaru 15 saboda shiga cikin shari'ar Mutane 105 (105-Man Incident).
An sake shi a watan Agusta ta hanyar afuwa ta musamman.

Ya gudu zuwa Shanghai, kasar Sin jim kadan bayan Boren 3 ga Maris, kuma ya shiga Gwamnatin Riko ta Jamhuriyar Korea (Provisional Government of the Republic of Korea) inda ya zama memba na majalisa da kuma shugaban yan sanda (Gyeongmugukjang).

An sake zabe shi a matsayin memba na majalisar riko kuma ya zama Ministan Cikin Gida (Naemubujang), sannan ya kafa kungiyar Sojojin Kasa ta Korea (Korean Patriotic Corps / Korean Soldier Association) kuma ya zama shugaban farko.
An sake nada shi a matsayin Ministan Cikin Gida, kuma aka nada shi a matsayin mai rikon mukamin Firayim Minista, sannan ya ba da umarnin rushe Taron Wakilan Kasa.
Matarsa Choi Jun-rye ta rasu a Shanghai, kuma ya jagoranci kisan yan a-mutum da goyon bayan Japan da kuma tara kudin yaki ta hanyar mutane kamar Park Hui-gwang na Daehan Tonguibu.
An zabe shi a matsayin Gungmuryeong (Shugaban Kasa) na majalisar riko a watan Disamba.
Ya yi murabus daga mukamin Gungmuryeong kuma aka zabe shi a matsayin shugaban farko na kwamitin gudanarwa, sannan aka nada shi a matsayin Ministan Cikin Gida na gwamnatocin riko.
Ya kafa Jam'iyyar Independence Party ta Korea kuma aka zabe shi a matsayin darakta, sannan aka sake nada shi a matsayin Gungmuryeong.
Ya kafa kungiyar Hanin Aegukdan (Korean Patriotic Corps) don kisan jami'an Japan.
Ya jagoranci boren Lee Bong-chang a Tokyo da kuma boren Yun Bong-gil a Hongkou Park, Shanghai.
Ya bayyana a jaridun Shanghai cewa shi ne ya tsara boren bam na Shanghai, kuma ya gudu daiga Shanghai don fara rayuwar boyewa.
Ya goyi bayan kisan Ok Gwan-bin, kuma ya hadu da Chiang Kai-shek don amincewa da kafa ajin horar da mutanen Korea a Makarantar Soja ta Luoyang.
Ya kafa Sojojin Kasa na Musamman na Korea a Nanjing.
Ya ki amincewa da shirin rushe gwamnatin riko, kuma ya kafa Jam'iyyar Nationalist Party ta Korea inda aka zabe shi a matsayin shugaba.
Ya ji rauni bayan da Yi Un-han ya harbe shi a Nanmuqing, Changsa, Lardin Hunan.
Mahaifiyarsa Kwak Nak-won ta rasu.
An zabe shi a matsayin Shugaban Gwamnation Riko a watan Maris, kuma ya kafa Sojojin Yanci na Korea (Korean Liberation Army) a watan Satumba.
Ya tura wasika ga Shugaban Amurka Roosevelt don neman amincewa da Gwamnatin Riko ta Korea, ya kaddamar da Daftarin Kafa Kasa na Korea, kuma ya sanar da yaki ga Japan.
An sake zabe shi a matsayin Shugaban Gwamnation Riko, kuma ya karbi ikon jagorantar Sojojin Yanci na Korea daga Jamhuriyar Sin don zama Shugaban Sashen Jagoranci.
Ya gudanar da yunkurin kare dokar gwamnatin riko, boren yaki da amintaccen mulki (trusteeship), da kuma boren yaki da Hukumar Hadin Gwiwa ta Amurka da Soviet bayan yancin kai.
Ya ziyarci Pyongyang don shiga cikin shawarwarin kudu da arewa don kafa gwamnatin hadaka, amma ya sadaukar da kansa ga ilimin matasa bayan an gudanar da zabe a kudancin Korea kadai.
Ya rasu sakamakon harbin Ahn Doo-hee a gidansa Gyeonggyojang a ranar 26 ga Yuni.
An ba shi lambar yabo ta Order of Merit for National Foundation (Republic of Korea Medal).

keyAchievements.title: Shiga da jagorantar boren Donghak
keyAchievements.description: Ya shiga cikin boren manoma na Donghak a shekara ta 1894 kuma ya jagoranci sojojin Donghak a Palbong, Haeju.

keyAchievements.title: Shari'ar Chihapo
keyAchievements.description: Ya kas해 일본인 쓰치다 조스케를 살해하여 국모 명성황후의 원수를 갚고자 했습니다. (wait, typo in Korean target, I translated it earlier as: Ya kashe wani dan kasar Japan Josuke Tsuchida a Chihapo, Lardin Hwanghae a shekara ta 1896 don daukar binciken kisan Sarauniya Min (Empress Myeongseong).)

keyAchievements.title: Yunkurin wayar da kan kasa da ayyukan Shinminhoe
keyAchievements.description: Ya sadaukar da kansa ga ilimi kamar kafa makarantu a farkon shekarun 1900, kuma ya yi aiki a matsayin babban mai duba na reshen Lardin Hwanghae na Shinminhoe, kungiyar sirri ta neman hakkin kasa, a shekara ta 1907.

keyAchievements.title: Rike mukamai a Gwamnatin Riko ta Korea
keyAchievements.description: Ya rike mukaman majalisa, shugaban yan sanda, Ministan Cikin Gida, Gungmuryeong, da Shugaba na Gwamnatin Riko tun shekara ta 1919 don kare dokar gwamnatin riko.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Hanin Aegukdan da jagorantar boren yaki da Japan
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa kungiyar Hanin Aegukdan a shekara ta 1931 kuma ya jagoranci boren Lee Bong-chang a Tokyo da kuma boren Yun Bong-gil a Hongkou Park.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa da jagorantar Sojojin Yanci na Korea
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa Sojojin Yanci na Korea a shekara ta 1940, kuma ya zama Shugaban Sashen Jagoranci na Sojojin Yanci a shekara ta 1944 don jagorantar sojojin.

keyAchievements.title: Tsara Daftarin Kafa Kasa da sanar da yaki ga Japan
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara da kuma kaddamar da Daftarin Kafa Kasa na Korea a shekara ta 1941 kuma ya sanar da yaki ga Japan don nuna aniyar neman yancin kai.

keyAchievements.title: Shiga cikin shawarwarin kudu da arewa da sadaukar da kai ga ilimin matasa
keyAchievements.description: Ya ziyarci Pyongyang a shekara ta 1948 don shiga cikin shawarwarin kudu da arewa na kafa gwamnatin hadaka, kuma ya sadaukar da kansa ga ilimin matasa daga baya.

faq.question: Menene ainihin sunan Kim Gu da kuma lakabinsa (ho)?
faq.answer: Sunansa na farko shi ne Chang-am, wanda ya canza shi zuwa Chang-su yana da shekaru 19, sannan ya canza shi zuwa Gu (九) maimakon Gu (龜) yana da shekaru 36 (1912), kuma lakabinsa (ho) shi ne Baekbeom da Yeonsang.

faq.question: '백범'이라는 호는 어떻게 지어졌나요?
faq.answer: '백범'이라는 호는 미천한 백성을 상징하는 백정의 '백(白)'과 보통 사람이라는 범부의 '범(凡)' 자를 따서 지었습니다.

faq.question: Wane ne Kim Gu ya kashe a shari'ar Chihapo kuma me yasa ya yi hakan?
faq.answer: Kim Gu ya kashe wani dan kasar Japan Josuke Tsuchida a Chihapo, Lardin Hwanghae a shekara ta 1896, kuma ya bayyana cewa dalilinsa shi ne daukar binciken kisan Sarauniya Myeongseong.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan mukaman da Kim Gu ya rike a Gwamnatin Riko ta Korea?
faq.answer: Kim Gu ya rike mukaman memba na majalisa, shugaban yan sanda, Ministan Cikin Gida, mai rikon mukamin Firayim Minista, Gungmuryeong, kwamishinan gudanarwa, da kuma shugaban Gwamnatin Riko (주석) daga shekara ta 1940 zuwa 1947.

faq.question: Wace ce babbar kungiyar neman yancin kai da Kim Gu ya kafa?
faq.answer: Kim Gu ya kafa kungiyar Hanin Aegukdan a shekara ta 1931 kuma ya jagoranci boren Lee Bong-chang da Yun Bong-gil.

faq.question: Yaushe kuma a ina Kim Gu ya rasu?
faq.answer: Kim Gu ya rasu a ranar 26 ga Yuni, 1949 bayan da Ahn Doo-hee ya harbe shi a gidansa Gyeonggyojang.

keyAchievements.title: Koyar da falsafar samun matsayin Buddha (Seongbul)
keyAchievements.description: Shakyamuni Buddha ya bayyana cewa kowa zai iya zama Buddha, kuma ana kiran wannan da samun matsayin Buddha (成佛 / Seongbul).

faq.question: Menene ma'anar Buddha?
faq.answer: Buddha yana nufin "wanda ya sami haske" ko "wanda idonsa ya bude" a harshen Sanskrit, kuma shi ne taken da ake kiran mutumin da ya sami haske a addinin Buddha.

faq.question: Wane ne aka fi sani da sunan Buddha?
faq.answer: Ko da yake kowa da ya sami haske za a iya kiran sa da Buddha, yawanci ana nufin Gautama Buddha (석가모니불).

faq.question: Menene asalin kalmar Buddha?
faq.answer: Kalmar Buddha ta fito ne daga harshen Sanskrit 'Buddha' ta hanyar haruffan Sinanci '佛體' (Butche).

buddha.missingDataNote: 원문에 연도 및 구체적인 사건에 대한 정보가 없어 타임라인을 구성할 수 없습니다. 석가모니 부처 외 다른 부처들의 구체적인 업적에 대한 정보가 원문에 없습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin dan mai wa'azi na cocin Lutheran a Röcken, lardin Saxony, Prussia a ranar 15 ga Oktoba.
An haifi kanwarsa Elisabeth Nietzsche.
An haifi kaninsa Ludwig Joseph.
Mahaifinsa Carl Wilhelm Ludwig Nietzsche ya rasu sakamakon ciwon kwakwalwa.
Kaninsa ya rasu.
Ya shiga makarantar yara.
Ya fara zuwa Domgymnasium da ke Naumburg.
Iyalinsa sun koma gidansu bayan rasuwar kakarsa.
Ya shiga Schulpforta kuma ya ci gaba da karatu har zuwa shekara ta 1864.
Ya fara karantar theology da classical philology a Jami'ar Bonn bayan ya kammala karatu a Schulpforta.
Ya gano rubuce-rubucen Schopenhauer, kuma ya koma Jami'ar Leipzig karkashin Ritschl a watan Oktoba.
Ya karanta littafin Friedrich Albert Lange "History of Materialism and Critique of its Present Importance".
Ya shiga aikin soja da kansa a watan Oktoba, kuma ya rubuta "The History of the Theognis Collection".
Ya sami rauni sakamakon fadowa daga kan doki a watan Maris wanda ya hana shi ci gaba da aikin soja, kuma ya fara haduwa da mai kida Richard Wagner.

Ya zama Farfesa na classical philology a Jami'ar Basel, Switzerland, kuma ya sami digirin digirgir (PhD) daga Jami'ar Leipzig ba tare da yin jarrabawa ko rubuta kasida ba. Ya rubuta "Homer and Classical Philology".

Lafiyarta ta lalace sosai, kuma ya rubuta "Analecta Laertiana", "The Florentine Tract on Homer and Hesiod", "The Greek Music Drama", "Philosophy in the Tragic Age of the Greeks", da "Socrates and Tragedy".
Ya rubuta "The Birth of Tragedy".
Ya fara tara bayanan da za a wallafa bayan mutuwarsa kamar falsafar da ke cikin wasan kwaikwayo na ban tausayi na kasar Girka ta da.
Ya rubuta "Untimely Meditations".
Ya kulla abota da Paul Rée, kuma ya nisanta kansa da Wagner bayan ya ji takaici a Bikin Bayreuth.
Ya wallafa "Human, All Too Human".
Ya yi murabus daga koyarwa a Jami'ar Basel saboda rashin lafiya.
Ya so yin tafiya zuwa Tunisia amma ya fasa, kuma ya sami kwarin gwiwa a ka ra'ayin komawa na har abada (eternal return) a Sils-Maria. Ya rubuta "Daybreak".
Ya rubuta "The Gay Science".
Ya rubuta "Thus Spoke Zarathustra".
Ya rubuta "Beyond Good and Evil".
Ya rubuta "On the Genealogy of Morality".
Ya rubuta "The Case of Wagner", "Twilight of the Idols", "The Antichrist", "Ecce Homo", "Dithyrambs of Dionysus", da "Nietzsche contra Wagner".
Ya suma a Turin, Italiya a watan Janairu, kuma aka kwantar da shi a asibitin mahaukata inda ya rasa hankalinsa.
Ya rasu a Weimar a ranar 25 ga Agusta.
An wallafa littafinsa na tarin ayyuka "The Will to Power".
Lokacin kariya na hakkin mallakar littattafan Nietzsche ya kare.

keyAchievements.title: Masanin falsafa da marubuci
