keyAchievements.description: A matsayinsa na masanin falsafa da marubuci na Jamus, ya nemi ya rushe al'adun Yamma kuma ya kafa sabbin dabi'u.

keyAchievements.title: Samun taken 'Masanin Falsafa mai Guduma'
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami taken 'Masanin Falsafa mai Guduma' saboda yana son ya rushe al'adun Yamma kuma ya kafa sabbin dabi'u.

keyAchievements.title: Binciken asalin dabi'un Kirista da rationalism
keyAchievements.description: Ya mayar da hankali kan bayyana asalin dabi'un Kirista da rationalism, inda ya yi da'awar cewa abubuwa masu ma'ana sun fito ne daga rashin hankali da hauka.

keyAchievements.title: Kaddamar da 'Son rayuwa a doron kasa'
keyAchievements.description: Ya ki amincewa da rarrabuwar ra'ayi ta idealism kuma ya bukaci mutane su so rayuwa a zahiri.

keyAchievements.title: Sukar totalitarianism, kishin kasa mai tsanani (nationalism), da adawa da Yahudawa (anti-Semitism)
keyAchievements.description: Ya yada ra'ayoyin da ke sukar totalitarianism, nationalism, statism, da anti-Semitism.

keyAchievements.title: Zama Farfesa na classical philology a Jami'ar Basel
keyAchievements.description: Ya zama Farfesa na classical philology a Jami'ar Basel ta Switzerland yana da shekaru 24.

keyAchievements.title: Samun digirin digirgir (PhD)
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami digirin digirgir daga Jami'ar Leipzig a shekara ta 1869 bisa ga rubuce-rubucensa da aka wallafa kadai.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "The Birth of Tragedy"
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta "The Birth of Tragedy" a shekara ta 1872, wanda ke kunshe da ra'ayin fasaha na musamman game da wasan ban tausayi na kasar Girka ta da.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "Untimely Meditations"
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta "Untimely Meditations" tsakanin shekara ta 1873 da 1876, wanda ke dauke da sukar al'adu don kalubalantar ci gaban al'adun Jamus.

keyAchievements.title: Wallafa "Human, All Too Human"
keyAchievements.description: Ya fara nisanta kansa da falsafar Schopenhauer da Wagner ta hanyar wallafa "Human, All Too Human" wanda ke cike da karin magana a shekara ta 1878.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da ra'ayin 'Mutuwar Allah' (Death of God)
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da ra'ayin 'Mutuwar Allah' wanda ke nufin asarar dabi'u mafi girma da mutum ya kera da kuma zuwan nihilism.

keyAchievements.title: Goyi bayan monism (vital ontology)
keyAchievements.description: Ya goyi bayan monism wanda ke adawa da dualism na falsafar zamani ta hanyar mayar da hankali kan will to power, inda ya guje wa rabe-raben mai lura da abin da ake kallo.

keyAchievements.title: Rarrabe ra'ayin nihilism
keyAchievements.description: Ya rarrabe nihilism zuwa active nihilism da passive nihilism don jaddada mahimmancin dabi'ar kera ma'ana da kansa.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da ra'ayin 'Komawa na Har Abada' (Eternal Return)
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da ra'ayin 'Komawa na Har Abada' wanda ya sami kwarin gwiwa a Sils-Maria a shekara ta 1881 a matsayin tushen ra'ayi na littafin "Thus Spoke Zarathustra".

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da ra'ayin 'Übermensch' (Overman)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera nau'in mutum na 'Übermensch' wanda ke tsallake tare da shawo kan dabi'un zamani, asali, da imani don kera sabbi.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da ra'ayin 'Will to Power'
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da 'Will to Power' (zabin Karfi) wanda ke adawa da ra'ayin kiyaye kai, inda ya yi da'awar cewa burin rayuwa ba tsira ba ne kawai face nuna karfi.

keyAchievements.title: Sukar dabi'u (Moral Critique)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance yana sukar dabi'u ta hanyar rarrabe su zuwa 'slave morality' da 'master morality' tare da tattauna asalin dabi'u ta fuskar tunani da kima.

keyAchievements.title: Gudunmawa a matsayin classical philologist
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi tasiri a kan ra'ayin kyan gani (aesthetics) na zamani bisa ga zurfin fahimtarsa game da kasashen Girka da Roma na da.

keyAchievements.title: Babban tasiri a kan falsafar Turai da adabi bayan mutuwarsa
keyAchievements.description: Ko da yake an yi watsi da shi lokacin yana da rai, ya yi tasiri ga masana da marubuta da dama kamar Heidegger, Jaspers, Freud, da Thomas Mann bayan mutuwarsa.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan kida
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara waƙoƙi da kide-kiden piano tun yana shekaru 13 zuwa 20, kuma ya bar wasu kide-kide a lokacin da yake Basel.

faq.question: Me yasa aka kira Nietzsche da 'Masanin Falsafa mai Guduma'?
faq.answer: An ba shi lakabin 'Masanin Falsafa mai Guduma' saboda yana son ya rushe al'adun Yamma kuma ya kafa sabbin dabi'u.

faq.question: Menene sanadin rashin lafiyar kwakwalwar Nietzsche?
faq.answer: Ya fuskanci lalacewar hankali a karshen rayuwarsa. Maganar cewa cutar syphilis (매독) ce ta haifar da hakan jita-jita ce kawai, kuma a cewar rahoton jaridar Telegraph, sanadin shi ne ciwon kansa na kwakwalwa (brain tumor).

faq.question: Shin Nietzsche mai adawa da Yahudawa ne?
faq.answer: Ko da yake Nietzsche ya soki totalitarianism, nationalism, statism, da anti-Semitism, littafinsa "The Antichrist" yana kunshe da wasu kalamai da ke zama tushen kyamar Yahudawa.

faq.question: Shin ra'ayoyin Nietzsche suna da alaka da Nazism?
faq.answer: Kodayake Nietzsche ya soki totalitarianism, statism, da anti-Semitism, bayan mutuwarsa kanwarsa Elisabeth ta karkatar da rubuce-rubucensa don amfanin mulkin Nazi. Duk da haka, akwai masu nuni da cewa gwamnatin Nazi ta yi amfani da littattafansa na hukuma ma.

faq.question: Wane irin kimantawa Nietzsche ya samu a lokacin rayuwarsa?
faq.answer: A lokacin rayuwarsa, malamai sun yi watsi da shi gaba daya, kuma ya fuskanci mummunar suka daga addinai da masu kare dabi'u, zare da zargin cewa yana bata tarbiyyar al'umma.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Königsberg, birnin kasuwanci na Prussia.
Ya shiga makarantar sirri ta Collegium Fridericianum wacce masanin addini Schultz, abokin mahaifiyarsa, ke jagoranta.
Ya kammala karatu a Collegium Fridericianum kuma ya shiga Jami'ar Königsberg don karantar falsafa da lissafi.
Mahaifinsa ya rasu, kuma ya wallafa kasidarsa ta kammala karatu "Thoughts on the True Estimation of Living Forces".

Ya sami digirin digirgir (PhD) da kasidarsa "Universal Natural History and Theory of the Heavens", kuma ya sami izinin koyarwa a jami'ar da kasidarsa "A New Elucidation of the First Principles of Metaphysical Cognition".
Ya ki amincewa da mukamin farfesa na adabi da Ma'aikatar Ilimi ta Prussia ta ba shi.
Ya fara aiki a matsayin ma'aikacin dakin karatu (librarian) a Royal Library don biyan kudaden rayuwa.
Ya sami mukamin farfesa na falsafa a Jami'ar Königsberg kuma ya gabatar da kasidarsa ta shiga aiki.
Ya kammala aikinsa na ma'aikacin dakin karatu na Royal Library.
Ya wallafa bugu na farko na "Critique of Pure Reason".
Ya wallafa makalolin "Answering the Question: What is Enlightenment?" da "Idea for a Universal History with a Cosmopolitan Purpose".
Ya wallafa "Groundwork of the Metaphysics of Morals".
Ya wallafa "Metaphysical Foundations of Natural Science", kuma aka zabe shi a matsayin shugaban Jami'ar Königsberg har zuwa shekara ta 1788.
Ya wallafa bugu na biyu na "Critique of Pure Reason".
Ya wallafa "Critique of Practical Reason".
Ya wallafa "Critique of Judgment".
Ya sami sabani da hukumomin ilimi game da wallafawa da tace makalarsa "On the Radical Evil in Human Nature".
Ya wallafa "Religion Within the Boundary of Pure Reason".
Ya wallafa "Perpetual Peace: A Philosophical Sketch".
Ya wallafa "The Metaphysics of Morals".
Ya rasu da misalin karfe 4 na asuba a ranar 12 ga Fabrairu yana da shekaru 80.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa harsashin falsafar idealism ta Jamus
keyAchievements.description: Ya kai lokacin wayewa (Enlightenment) na zamani kololuwa kuma ya kafa harsashin falsafar idealism ta Jamus.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa falsafar suka (Critical Philosophy)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa falsafar suka don shawo kan empiricism da dogmatism na baya.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "Critique of Pure Reason"
keyAchievements.description: Ya binciki tsari da iyakokin hankali (reason) da kansa don kalubalantar metaphysics da epistemology na gargajiya kuma ya nuna gudunmawarsa.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "Critique of Practical Reason"
keyAchievements.description: Ya mayar da hankali kan fannin ethics, inda ya nemo tushen dabi'u a cikin yanci na transcendental wanda causality baya mulka mawa.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "Critique of Judgment"
keyAchievements.description: Ya binciki fannin aesthetics da teleology don gabatar da jigon falsafar suka.

keyAchievements.title: Kokarin juyin juya hali na Copernican (Copernican Revolution)
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi kokarin kawo 'juyin juya hali na Copernican' ta hanyar nuna iyakokin hankalin dan adam da kuma shigar da tsarin a priori a cikin fahimtar dan adam.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da 'Categorical Imperative'
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da 'Categorical Imperative' (정언명령), wani umarni a matsay인 wajibi da ya kamata a bi ko da yaya yanayi yake, ta hanyar daukar niyyar aiki da mahimmanci fiye da sakamakonsa.

keyAchievements.title: Shigar da shirin Perpetual Peace
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da shawarar kafa kungiyar kasashen duniya bisa ga ra'ayin dokokin kasa da kasa don samun zaman lafiya na har abada ba tare da yake-yake a tsakanin kasashe ba.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan littattafan Kant?
faq.answer: Manyan littattafan Kant sun hada da "Critique of Pure Reason", "Critique of Practical Reason", da "Critique of Judgment".

faq.question: Menene 'juyin juya hali na Copernican' yake nufi a cikin fannin fahimta (epistemology) na Kant?
faq.answer: 'Juyin juya hali na Copernican' ra'ayi ne cewa dan adam baya fahimtar abu kamar yadda yake kawai, face dai fahimtar dan adam ce ke kera siffar abin da ake kallo.

faq.question: Wadanne ne umarnai guda biyu na dokar dabi'u da Kant ya gabatar?
faq.answer: Na farko shi ne ka yi aiki ta yadda tsarin nufinka zai iya zama ka'idar doka ta duniya a lokaci guda, kuma na biyu shi ne ka dauki mutuncin kanka da na kowane mutum a matsayin manufa a kowane lokaci maimakon abin amfani kawai.

faq.question: Menene abu na musamman game da rayuwar Kant?
faq.answer: Kant bai taba yin tafiya mai nisa da ta wuce mil 100 daga Königsberg ba a duk rayuwarsa, kuma ya gudanar da rayuwa mai cike da tsari na yau da kullum.

timeline.event: An haife shi a ranar 31 ga Maris a La Haye en Touraine ga iyalin masu fada aji na shari'a (nobility of the robe).
Ya shiga makarantar Jesuit ta Collège Royal Henry-le-Grand da ke La Flèche kuma ya yi karatu a can har zuwa shekara ta 1614.
Ya sami digiri na shari'a (Licence) daga Jami'ar Poitiers.
Ya ji tare da warware wata matsala mai wuya ta geometry daga gurin shugaban jami'ar Netherlands a Paris.
Ya yi tafiya zuwa Netherlands inda ya hadu da Isaac Beeckman, kuma ya rubuta aikinsa na farko, wato karamin littafi mai suna "Compendium of Music".
Ya shiga rundunar soja ta Maximilian na Bavaria a Jamus, inda ya fuskanci Yakin White Mountain (백산 전투), kuma ya yi wasu mafarkai da suka bayyana masa tafiyar rayuwarsa a sansanin soja na kusa da Ulm.
Ya bar aikin soja ya koma kasar Faransa.
Ya fara binciken lissafi, kimiyyar halitta, musamman fannin optics a Paris.
Ya rubuta kasida mara kammala "Rules for the Direction of the Mind".
Ya rubuta gajeren kasida "Rules for the Direction of the Mind", kuma ya koma Netherlands a lokacin hunturu na wannan shekarar don neman yancin bincike da tunani.
Ya rubuta littafin kimiyyar halitta "The World" (Le Monde).
Ya wallafa "Discourse on the Method", inda ya kara kasidu guda uku: Dioptrics, Meteorology, da Geometry, kuma ya wallafa shi ba tare da saka sunansa ba.
Ya wallafa "Meditations on First Philosophy".
Ya tsara falsafarsa daki-daki kuma ya wallafa "Principles of Philosophy" a harshen Latin.

Littafinsa na karshe "The Passions of the Soul" (Les passions de l'âme) an wallafa shi bisa ga wasikun da ya aike wa Elisabeth na Bohemia, kuma ya tafi Fadar Masarautar Sweden bisa gayyatar Sarauniya Christina.
Ya rasu sakamakon ciwon huhu (pneumonia) yana da shekaru 54 a Stockholm a ranar 11 ga Fabrairu.
An mayar da kashinsa zuwa Paris kuma aka ajiye shi a Cocin Saint-Étienne-du-Mont.
Gwamnatin Faransa ta mayar da gawarsa zuwa ginin tarihi na Faransa (Panthéon).
An sake ajiye kashinsa a Cocin Saint-Germain-des-Prés.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa harsashin falsafar zamani
keyAchievements.description: Ana kiran sa da uban falsafar zamani saboda shi ne ya fara kafa tsarin tunani na zamani.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar analytic geometry
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera tsarin coordinates (Cartesian coordinate system) kuma ya kafa analytic geometry wanda ke hada algebra da geometry wuri guda.

keyAchievements.title: Tabbatar da ra'ayin 'Ina tunani, saboda haka ina wanzuwa'
keyAchievements.description: Ya fara tabbatar da ainihin ka'idar 'Ina tunani, saboda haka ina wanzuwa' (Cogito, ergo sum) a matsayin ruhin 'mai cin gashin kansa da tunani mai ma'ana' na lokacin wayewa a cikin littafinsa "Discourse on the Method".

keyAchievements.title: Goyon bayan mind-body dualism
keyAchievements.description: Ya goyi bayan dualism wanda ke rarrabe hankali da jiki, ko kuma ruhu da kwayoyin halitta, don hada ra'ayin kimiyya na halitta da kuma metaphysics na ruhu.

keyAchievements.title: Gano dokar refraction na haske
keyAchievements.description: Ya tabbatar da dokar refraction na haske da kansa, wacce kuma ake cura 'Dokar Snell', ta hanyar binciken optics.

faq.question: 데카르트는 왜 '근대 철학의 아버지'라고 불리나요?
faq.answer: Ana kiran sa da uban falsafar zamani saboda shi ne ya fara kafa tsarin tunani na zamani, kuma ya bude hanyar lissafi na zamani ta hanyar kafa analytic geometry.

faq.question: Menene shahararren ra'ayi na Descartes?
faq.answer: Ya shahara da tabbatar da ka'idar 'Ina tunani, saboda haka ina wanzuwa' (Cogito ergo sum) a matsayin ruhin 'mai cin gashin kansa da tunani mai ma'ana' na lokacin wayewa a cikin littafinsa "Discourse on the Method".

faq.question: Wane irin imani na addini Descartes yake da shi?
faq.answer: Ya rike imaninsa na Roman Catholic a duk rayuwarsa, kuma ya yi da'awar cewa daya daga cikin burin littafinsa "Meditations on First Philosophy" shi ne kare imanin Kiristanci.

faq.question: Menene dualism na Descartes?
faq.answer: Ya kasance yana rarrabe kwayoyin halitta zuwa abubuwa na ruhu ('res cogitans' / mai tunani) da kuma abubuwa na jiki ('res extensa' / mai tsawo) ko kuma abubuwa daban-daban da ke da bambanci sosai.

timeline.event: An haife shi ga mahaifinsa Isaac Rousseau, mai kera agogo, da Susan Bernard a Jamhuriyar Geneva, Switzerland.
Mahaifiyarsa Susan Bernard ta rasu sakamakon matsalolin haihuwa.
Mahaifinsa ya koma wani wuri saboda rashin jituwa da birnin Geneva, kuma Rousseau ya shiga makarantar kwana a kusa da Geneva.
Ya fara horar da kansa don zama sakataren kotu.
Ya karbi baftisma na Roman Catholic a Turin, Italiya, kuma ya sami sunan baftisma Jean-Joseph.
Ya koma Lausanne kuma ya yi aiki a matsayin malamin kida karkashin sunan bogi.
Ya ziyarci Paris a karon farko, sannan ya rayu a Chambéry da sauran wurare ta hanyar Lyon.
Ya rayu kusa da Madame de Warens a Chambéry da Les Charmettes, inda ya sadaukar da kansa ga kida, karatu, da neman ilimi.
Ya hadu kuma ya kulla abota da d'Alembert da Diderot, masana na lokacin wayewa, a Paris.
Ya tsara sabon tsarin rubuta kida kuma ya gabatar da shi a Académie des Sciences ta Paris amma bai yi nasara ba.
Bayan an wallafa "Dissertation on Modern Music", ya koma Venice kuma ya yi aiki a matsayin sakatare na Count of Montaigu.
Ya auri Marie-Thérèse Levasseur, mai hidima a gidansa, bayan sun dade sun zama tare.
Ya shahara bayan kasidarsa "Discourse on the Arts and Sciences" ta sami lambar yabo ta farko a gasar Académie de Dijon, kuma an nuna wasan operansa "The Village Soothsayer".
Ya shiga cikin tsara "Encyclopédie" na Diderot da d'Alembert inda ya rubuta makaloli a kan kida da tattalin arzikin siyasa, kuma ya wallafa "Discourse on the Arts and Sciences".
Ya tsara wasan opera "The Village Soothsayer" (Le Devin du Village).
Ya mai da hankali kan tsarin siyasa da zamantakewa don gasar Académie de Dijon, wanda ya zama tushen littafinsa "The Social Contract".
Ya zauna a Hermitage kuma ya fara rubuta "The Social Contract", "Julie, or the New Heloise", da "Émile".
Ya yanke abota da Diderot bayan shekara guda sakamakon rashin jituwa a kan batun rawar da wasan kwaikwayo ke taka wa al'umma.
An wallafa "Julie, or the New Heloise" a Paris kuma ya sami babban nasara.
Ya wallafa "Émile" da "The Social Contract", kuma ya gudu zuwa Switzerland saboda takurawar da ya fuskanci sakamakon haka.
Ya fara rubuta "Confessions" bayan da aka kai masa hari a cikin littafin sirri na Voltaire "The Sentiment of the Citizens".
Ya kammala rubuta "Confessions".
Ya dawo birnin Paris.
Ya rubuta "Rousseau Judge of Jean-Jacques".
Ya fara rubuta "Reveries of the Solitary Walker" amma bai kammala shi ba.
Ya rasu a ranar 2 ga Yuli.

keyAchievements.title: Falsafar Yarjejeniyar Zamantakewa (Social Contract Theory)
keyAchievements.description: Littafi ne da ya kaddamar da ra'ayin ikon jama'a (popular sovereignty) da kuma kafa general will a matsayin sharadin halatta ikon gwamnati.

keyAchievements.title: Falsafar Kimiyya da Fasaha (Discourse on the Arts and Sciences)
keyAchievements.description: Wannan kasida ce da ta lashe lambar yabo ta farko a gasar Académie de Dijon, kuma tana dauke da ra'ayoyin da ke tsallake iyakokin lokacin wayewa.

keyAchievements.title: Asalin Rashin Daidaito (Discourse on the Origin of Inequality)
keyAchievements.description: Littafi ne da ke bayyana rashin daidaiton da ya faru sakamakon tsarin mallakar filaye da ci gaban al'umma ta hanyar kwatanta shi da yanayin halitta (state of nature).

keyAchievements.title: Émile
keyAchievements.description: Littafi ne da ya bayyana ra'ayin addini na halitta (natural religion) wanda ya yi babban tasiri ga tunani na karni na 18 amma ya fuskanci takurawa sakamakon haka.

keyAchievements.title: Shiga cikin rubuta Encyclopédie
keyAchievements.description: Ya shiga cikin rubuta "Encyclopédie" na Diderot da d'Alembert inda ya rubuta makaloli a kan kida da tattalin arzikin siyasa.

keyAchievements.title: Falsafar General Will (Kudin Nufi na Gari)
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da ra'ayin nufin dan adam na gari don kafa tsarin hadaka da ke neman moriyar jama'a da yanci daidai gwargwado.

keyAchievements.title: Ra'ayin daidaiton bil'adama na kwarai
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance na farko a tarihi da ya zurfafa cikin matsalar daidaiton bil'adama a aikace, kuma ya bayyana cewa rashin daidaiton tattalin arziki shi ne tushen dukkan matsalolin al'umma.

faq.question: Wane ne Jean-Jacques Rousseau?
faq.answer: Jean-Jacques Rousseau ya kasance masanin yarjejeniyar zamantakewa na kasar Faransa, mai goyon bayan demokradiyya ta kai tsaye, mai ra'ayin jamhuriya, da kuma masanin falsafa na lokacin wayewa wanda aka haife shi a Jamhuriyar Geneva, Switzerland.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar 'general will' (nufin gari) na Rousseau?
faq.answer: Nufin gari na Rousseau shi ne nufin kafa tsarin hadaka wanda ke karewa da kiyaye muradin kowane memba ta hanyar amfani da dukkan ikon hadaka, inda kowa ke shiga cikin al'umma gaba daya amma yana biyayya ga kansa kadai don ya kasance cikin yanci kamar yadda yake a baya.

faq.question: Me yasa Rousseau ya ce "Mu koma ga yanayin halitta (nature)"?
faq.answer: Rousseau bai yi watsi da wayewar kai ba gaba daya, face dai ya soki matsalolin al'ummar zamani da ba ta da yanci da daidaito, kuma ya bukaci a dawo da asalin al'ummar da ke tabbatar da hakki na halitta na yanci da daidaito ga kowa.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan littattafan Rousseau?
faq.answer: Manyan littattafan Rousseau sun hada da "The Social Contract", "Discourse on the Arts and Sciences", "Discourse on the Origin of Inequality", "Émile", da "Julie, or the New Heloise".

timeline.event: An haife shi a Freiberg in Mähren, Masarautar Austria-Hungary (Příbor a yanzu).
Ya amince da karancin sakamako a bincikensa na farko a kan gabobin haihuwa na kurwar teku a kasidarsa "The Testes of the Eel".
Ya sami digirin digirgir (MD) a fannin magani da kasidarsa "On the Spinal Cord of Lower Fish Species".
Ya zauna a Paris don gudanar da bincike tare da Jean-Martin Charcot.
Ya auri Martha Bernays kuma ya kafa asibitinsa na fannin jijiya (neurology clinic).
Ya wallafa "Studies on Hysteria" tare da Josef Breuer.
Ya wallafa "The Interpretation of Dreams".
Ya fara jin wani abu ba daidai ba a cikin bakinsa.
An fara gano ciwon daji (tumor) a cikin bakinsa.
Ya sami lambar yabo ta Goethe Prize saboda gudunmawarsa ga fannin psychology da adabin Jamusanci.
An kona yawancin littattafansa baada da jam'iyyar Nazi ta hau mulki a Jamus.
Ya gudu zuwa London, Birtaniya bayan Jamus ta Nazi ta mamaye kasar Austria (Anschluss).
Ya rasu.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa fannin psychoanalysis
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance masanin psychology na kasar Austria wanda ya kafa fannin psychoanalysis.

keyAchievements.title: Falsafar sume (unconscious) da dannewa (repression)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera ra'ayoyi game da asirin sume (unconscious) da kuma dabarun kariya na dannewa (defense mechanisms of repression).

keyAchievements.title: Hanyar warkarwa ta psychoanalytic clinic
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera hanyar warkarwa ta hanyar tattaunawa tsakanin maras lafiya da mai bincike don warkar da matsalolin kwakwalwa.

keyAchievements.title: Sake fassara sha'awar jima'i (libido)
keyAchievements.description: Ya sake bayyana sha'awar jima'i (libido) a matsayin babban karfi na motsa rayuwar dan adam.

keyAchievements.title: Falsafar transference (canza ji)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera ra'ayin transference (감정 전이) a cikin alakar jiyya.

keyAchievements.title: Hanyar fassara mafarki
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera hanyar lura da 'bukatun sume' ta hanyar fassara mafarkai.

keyAchievements.title: Tsarin kwakwalwa (psyche)
keyAchievements.description: Ya bayyana cewa kwakwalwa tana kunshe da sani (conscious), kafin sani (preconscious), da sume (unconscious), kuma ya gabatar da ra'ayoyin id, ego, da super-ego.

keyAchievements.title: Falsafar instincts (본능)
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da dabi'ar neman rayuwa (Libido) da kuma burin mutuwa (Thanatos).

faq.question: Wane ne Sigmund Freud?
faq.answer: Sigmund Freud ya kasance masanin psychology na kasar Austria kuma wanda ya kafa fannin psychoanalysis.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan ra'ayoyin da Freud ya kera?
faq.answer: Ya kera ra'ayin kariya na sume da dannewa, hanyar warkarwa ta psychoanalytic clinic, da kuma sake bayyana sha'awar jima'i a matsayin babban karfi na motsa rayuwa.

faq.question: Yaya Freud ya bayyana tsarin kwakwalwa?
faq.answer: Freud ya bayyana cewa kwakwalwa tana kunshe da sani, kafin sani, da sume, kuma ya gabatar da ra'ayoyin id, ego, da super-ego.

faq.question: Yaushe Freud ya rasu?
faq.answer: Sigmund Freud ya rasu a ranar 23 ga Satumba, 1939.

sigmund-freud.missingDataNote: 가족이 빈으로 이주한 정확한 연도(4살 때로만 명시됨)와 빈 정신 분석 학회가 조직된 정확한 연도(1899년 이후로만 명시됨)는 원문에 명시되어 있지 않아 생략되었습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Switzerland.
Mahaifinsa Paul Jung an nada shi zuwa wata babbar cocin da ke Laufen (lokacin da Jung ke da shekaru 6).
Ya hadu da Sigmund Freud a karon farko a Vienna.
Ya fara gudanar da bincike a kan falsafar analytical psychology da kansa.
Ya bar kungiyar Psychoanalytic Society.

timeline.year: Har zuwa murabus dinsa a shekara ta 1914
timeline.event: Ya yi aiki a matsayin shugaban International Psychoanalytic Association.
Ya wallafa littafin "Psychology of the Unconscious".
Ya wallafa littafin "A Psychological Approach to the Dogma of the Trinity".
Ya wallafa littafin "Transformation Symbolism in the Mass".
Ya wallafa littafin "Answer to Job".
Ya rasu yana da shekaru 85.
An wallafa littafinsa "Memories, Dreams, Reflections" bayan mutuwarsa.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa fannin analytical psychology
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance masanin hauka (psychiatrist) na kasar Switzerland wanda ya kafa tare da bude fannin analytical psychology da kansa.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa ra'ayin complex
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi amfani da kalmar 'complex' don bayyana wasu yanayi na musamman kuma ya kafa harsashin ra'ayoyin da ke da alaka da shi.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa ra'ayin collective unconscious (sume na gari)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa ra'ayin collective unconscious, wanda ke zama ma'ajiyar bayanan ruhu da aka hada ta hanyar tarihi da al'adun dan adam maimakon abubuwan da mutum daya ya fuskanta kawai, duk da cewa yana cikin sume.

keyAchievements.title: Rarraba hali (introvert/extrovert)
keyAchievements.description: Ya rarrabe halin dan adam zuwa introvert (mai son zama shi kadai) da extrovert (mai son jama'a).

keyAchievements.title: Kera ra'ayin individuation (개체화)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera tare da tsara hanyoyin warkarwa na kwakwalwa, inda ya ga cewa mutanen da ke karbar magani za su iya zama cikakkun mutane ta hanyar tsarin 'individuation'.

keyAchievements.title: Goyon bayan archetype na Self (자기원형)
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi da'awar cewa archetype na Self, wanda ke taimaka wa asirin sume na cikin mutum ya zama cikakke, yana da ikon wuce gona da iri (transcendent function).

keyAchievements.title: Ra'ayoyin anima da animus
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da ra'ayoyin anima da animus, wadanda ke nuna bangaren mace ko na namiji a cikin psyche (rayuwar ruhu) na mutum.

keyAchievements.title: Ra'ayin archetype (원형)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa ra'ayin archetype, wani ra'ayi da aka aro dari fannin anthropology wanda ke nufin hotuna ko jigogi na ruhu na dukkan dan adam.

keyAchievements.title: Ra'ayin persona (페르소나)
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da ra'ayin persona, wani bangare na hali wanda ke bayyana don daidaitawa ko sauki ga mutum a cikin al'umma.

keyAchievements.title: Ra'ayin shadow (그림자)
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da ra'ayin shadow, wanda ke dauke da bangarorin hali wadanda galibi ake kallo a matsayin marasa kyau kuma aka danne su ta yadda mutum baya gane su da kyau.

keyAchievements.title: Ra'ayin Self (자기)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kalli 'Self' (자기), wanda aka nuna shi da mandala mai hada mace da namiji, a matsayin babban archetype na psyche wanda ke jagorantar tsarin individuation.

faq.question: Wane ne Carl Jung?
faq.answer: Carl Jung ya kasance masanin hauka (psychiatrist) na kasar Switzerland, wanda ya kafa fannin analytical psychology, ya kafa ra'ayoyin complex da collective unconscious, kuma ya rarrabe halayen mutane zuwa introvert da extrovert.

faq.question: Me yasa Carl Jung da Freud suka rabu?
faq.answer: Freud ya takaita ra'ayin 'libido' a kan sha'awar jima'i kadai, yayin da Jung ya kalle shi a matsayin karfi na rayuwa mai fadi, wanda ya haifar da rabuwarsu saboda banbancin ra'ayi.

faq.question: Wane fannin psychology Carl Jung ya kafa?
faq.answer: Carl Jung ya bi hanyarsa ta musamman don budewa da kafa fannin analytical psychology.

faq.question: Yaya Carl Jung ya yi magana game da Allah?
faq.answer: Ya bayyana game da Allah cewa "Ba wai na yi imani da shi ba ne, na san shi." a wata hira da ya yi da gidan rediyo ko talabijin.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Amsterdam, Netherlands ga dangin Yahudawa na kasar Portugal.
Bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa, ya karbi shagon kayan kasuwanci na kasashen waje na mahaifinsa yana da shekaru 21.
An kore shi daga al'ummar Yahudawa kuma aka la'ance shi saboda zargin sukar addinin Yahudanci da sabo ga Allah.
Ya rubuta "Treatise on the Emendation of the Intellect" a Rijnsburg kuma ya wallafa "Principles of Cartesian Philosophy".
Ya kulla abota da Johan de Witt, shugaban siyasa na Jamhuriyar Netherlands, a Voorburg.
Ya wallafa "Tractatus Theologico-Politicus" ba tare da sunansa ba, kuma ya zauna a The Hague a wannan shekarar.
Gwamnatin Netherlands ta hana wallafa "Tractatus Theologico-Politicus".
Ya fara rubuta "Tractatus Politicus".
Ya rasu sakamakon ciwon huhu (lung disease) yana da shekaru 44.
Ya kammala littafinsa mafi girma "Ethics" (Ethica) amma bai samu damar wallafa shi lokacin yana da rai ba, kuma an kaddamar da bugu na farko na "Tractatus Politicus".

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "Ethics" (Ethica)
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi babban tasiri ga falsafar Yamma ta hanyar rubuta babban littafinsa "Ethics", wanda ke kunshe da matsayinsa na falsafa da ke adawa da dualism na ruhu da jiki duk da cewa ya yarda da wasu bangarorin foundationalism na Descartes.

keyAchievements.title: Hada kwayoyin halitta (nature) da jigon dabi'u (morals) wuri guda
keyAchievements.description: Ya sake farfado da ra'ayoyin tsohuwar makarantar Stoicism a ma'anar zamani, inda ya gudanar da ayyukan falsafa na hada kwayoyin halitta da jigon dabi'u wuri guda.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da ra'ayin Conatus
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da ra'ayin 'Conatus' (코나투스), wanda ke nufin kokari ko sha'awar kiyayewa, bunkasawa, da kuma kammala kansa, kuma ya kalli cewa cikakken nuna shi ne farin ciki.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa tsarin monistic pantheism (범신론)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kalli Allah da kuma yanayin halitta a matsayin sunaye biyu na abu guda (substance), kuma ya kafa ra'ayin monistic pantheistic wanda ke da alaka mai karfi da rashin addini (atheism).

keyAchievements.title: Gudunmawa ga falsafar rationalism ta zamani
keyAchievements.description: Ana daukar sa a matsayin daya cikin manyan masana falsafa na rationalism na karni na 17 a Turai, wanda ya kafa harsashin lokacin wayewa na karni na 18 da kuma sukar littafi mai tsarki na zamani.

faq.question: Wane irin kulawa Spinoza ya samu a al'ummar Yahudawa?
faq.answer: Kodayake ya san al'adun Yahudawa sosai, an kore shi daga al'ummar Yahudawa yana da shekaru 23 saboda ra'ayoyinsa na suka, kuma dukkan littattafansa an saka su a cikin jerin littattafan da aka hana na Cocin Katolika.

faq.question: Menene manyan ra'ayoyin falsafa na Spinoza?
faq.answer: Ya goyi bayan monistic pantheism wanda ke kallon Allah da yanayin halitta a matsayin sunaye biyu na abu guda, kuma ya gabatar da ra'ayin 'Conatus' (코나투스), wanda ke nufin sha'awar kiyaye, bunkasa, da kuma kammala kansa.

faq.question: Wane irin aiki Spinoza ya yi don neman abinci?
faq.answer: Ya yi aikin gyaran gilashin idanu (lens grinding) don samun abinci cikin kyar, kuma ya ki amincewa da albashi ko mukami na girmamawa ciki har da aikin farfesa a lokacin rayuwarsa.

faq.question: Menene babban littafi na Spinoza?
faq.answer: Babban littafinsa na rayuwa shi ne "Ethics" (Ethica), kuma bayan wannan akwai "Tractatus Theologico-Politicus", "Treatise on the Emendation of the Intellect", da sauransu.

faq.question: Shin maganar "Ko da gobe duniya za ta kare, yau zan dasa bishiyar apple" ta Spinoza ce?
faq.answer: Wannan magana ce ta Martin Lutheran, kuma an bayyana a fili a cikin asali cewa ba lallai ba ne Spinoza ne ya fada ta da kansa.

timeline.event: Haihuwar Sun Wu (kiyasi)
Ya zama babban mai ba da shawara kan harkokin yaki (military strategist) na Sarki Helü na kasar Wu bisa shawarar Wu Zixu.
Ya fara yakin kai hari ga kasar Chu tare da Helü da Wu Zixu a matsayin janar-janar, kuma suka kwato Ying, babban birnin kasar Chu.
Helü ya kai hari ga kasar Yue duk da adawar Sun Wu, wanda ya sa aka doke shi kuma ya mutu.
Mutuwar Sun Wu (kiyasi)

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "The Art of War" (손자병법)
keyAchievements.description: A matsayinsa na mai ba da shawara kan harkokin yaki na lokacin Kaka da Bazara (Spring and Autumn period), ya rubuta babi 13 na littafin "The Art of War".

keyAchievements.title: Nadin matsayin mai ba da shawara kan harkokin yaki na kasar Wu
keyAchievements.description: Ya zama mai ba da shawara kan harkokin yaki na Sarki Helü na kasar Wu bisa shawarar Wu Zixu kuma ya horar da sojoji.

keyAchievements.title: Nasara a yakin kai hari ga kasar Chu
keyAchievements.description: Ya taimaka wajen kwato babban birnin kasar Chu, wato Ying, ta hanyar jagorantar yakin kai hari ga kasar Chu tare da Helü a shekara ta 506 BC.

keyAchievements.title: Taimakawa wajen samun babban nasara a kan kasar Yue
keyAchievements.description: Ya taimaka wa Fuchai, magajin Helü, wajen karfafa ikon kasa sannan ya kai hari ga kasar Yue don samun babban nasara.

faq.question: Wane ne Sun Wu?
faq.answer: Sun Wu ya kasance mai ba da shawara kan harkokin yaki na lokacin Spring and Autumn, wanda sunansa na ladabi (zi) shi ne Changqing, kuma an fi saninsa da taken girmamawa Sun Tzu (손자). Shi ne ya rubuta "The Art of War".

faq.question: Shin akwai cikakkun bayanai game da rayuwar Sun Wu?
faq.answer: Ko da yake akwai bayanai masu mahimmanci kamar Records of the Grand Historian (Shiji) na Sima Qian, rayuwarsa tana cike da gardama, kuma babu cikakken bayani game da rayuwarsa bayan ya yi ritaya.

faq.question: Yaya Sun Wu ya zama mai ba da shawara kan harkokin yaki na kasar Wu?
faq.answer: Ya gudu zuwa kasar Wu tare da danginsa inda ya hadu da firayim minista Wu Zixu, kuma ya zama mai ba da shawara kan harkokin yaki bisa gayyatar Sarki Helü na kasar Wu sakamakon shawarar Wu Zixu.

faq.question: Menene babban littafi na Sun Wu?
faq.answer: Babban littafinsa shi ne "The Art of War" (손자병법), wanda aka dade ana daukar sa a matsayin littafin yaki mai mahimmanci a yankunan da ke amfani da haruffan Sinanci.

sun-tzu.missingDataNote: 손무의 정확한 출생 및 사망 연도는 '경(頃)'으로 표기되어 추정치이며, 은퇴 이후의 생애는 원문에 명시되어 있지 않습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Chirnside, arewacin Edinburgh.
Ya canza sunansa dari Home zuwa Hume, kuma ya yi aikin akawu (clerk) na tsawon watanni kadan a Bristol.
Ya kammala littafinsa na farko na falsafa "A Treatise of Human Nature" yana da shekaru 26.
Ya nemi gurbin koyarwa a Jami'ar Edinburgh da wasu makaloli a kan dabi'u da siyasa amma bai yi nasara ba.
Ya kasance malami na sirri (tutor) na Marquess of Annandale, kuma ya fara rubuta "The History of England".
Ya wallafa "An Enquiry Concerning Human Understanding".
Ya wallafa "An Enquiry Concerning the Principles of Morals".
Ya koma Edinburgh inda ya zama shugaban dakin karatu na Advocates' Library na Edinburgh.
Ya wallafa "The History of England" a matsayin littattafai guda 6 wadanda ya dauki shekaru 15 yana rubutawa.
Ya wallafa "Four Dissertations" da "The Natural History of Religion".
Ya wallafa "Sister Peg".
Ya yi aikin sakatare na jakadan Faransa kuma ya kulla abota da Rousseau.
Ya wallafa "My Own Life" kuma ya rasu a ranar 25 ga Agusta, inda aka binne shi a Edinburgh.
An wallafa littafinsa "Dialogues Concerning Natural Religion" bayan mutuwarsa.

keyAchievements.title: Matsayinsa na masanin falsafa, tattalin arziki, da tarihi
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance masanin falsafa, tattalin arziki, da tarihi na kasar Scotland, kuma ana daukar sa a matsayin daya cikin manyan mutane a fannin falsafar Yamma da kuma lokacin wayewa na Scotland (Scottish Enlightenment).

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "A Treatise of Human Nature"
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta littafinsa na farko na falsafa "A Treatise of Human Nature" yana da shekaru 26, wanda a yanzu ake dauka a matsayin daya daga cikin mafi mahimmancin littattafai a tarihin falsafa.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "The History of England"
keyAchievements.description: Ya dauki shekaru 15 yana rubuta "The History of England" kuma ya wallafa ta a matsayin littattafai guda 6 tsakanin shekara ta 1754 da 1762.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da 'Is-ought problem' (Matsalar kasancewa da abin da ya kamata)
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da 'is-ought problem', wanda ke nuna cewa bayyana 'gaskiya' kawai ba zai iya haifar da hukunci na 'ya kamata' ba, wanda ya zama muhimmin batu a fannin meta-ethics na zamani.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da 'Sympathy' (juyayi) a matsayin harsashin tunani na dabi'u
keyAchievements.description: Ya kalli dabi'u a matsayin batun ji (sentiment) kuma ya sanya sympathy ya zama harsashin dabi'u, wanda ya kafa asali ga utilitarianism.

keyAchievements.title: Taimakawa wajen kafa hanyar bincike ta empiricism a kan kimiyyar dan adam
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da shawarar cewa ya kamata a yi bincike a kan kimiyyar dan adam ta hanyar empiricism na 'kwarewa da lura', kuma ya yi kokarin bincikar ainihin gaskiyar ruhun dan adam.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da 'Problem of Induction' (Matsalar induction)
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da 'problem of induction' (matsalar induction) wanda ke nuna cewa ba za a iya tabbatar da amincin hujja ta induction ba.

keyAchievements.title: Matsayi na skepticism game da ka'idar causality
keyAchievements.description: Ya nuna shakku a kan ka'idar causality ta hanyar kallon cewa dangantakar sanadi da sakamako ta fito ne dari dabi'a da kuma probability da aka kafa ta hanyar induction kawai.

keyAchievements.title: Bayyana rawar da kudi ke takawa a kasuwanci
keyAchievements.description: Ya bayyana cewa kudi hanya ce ta musayar kayayyaki a cikin tsarin kasuwa, kuma adadin kudi ba shi da wata ma'ana a cikin al'ummar da ta kai matakin daidaito.

faq.question: Wane ne David Hume?
faq.answer: David Hume ya kasance masanin falsafa, tattalin arziki, da tarihi na kasar Scotland, kuma ana daukar sa a matsayin daya cikin manyan mutane a fannin falsafar Yamma da kuma lokacin wayewa na Scotland.

faq.question: Wadanne ne siffofin falsafar Hume?
faq.answer: Ana kallon falsafar Hume a matsayin ci gaba na skepticism, kuma akwai gardama a kan ko an dauki abubuwan naturalism da mahimmanci.

faq.question: Wane matsayi Hume ya dauka game da addini?
faq.answer: Hume ya bayyana ra'ayoyinsa game da dukkan addinai, amma tun da yake yana da wuya a yi magana a kan addini a lokacin rayuwarsa, an wallafa littattafansa da ke da alaka da addini bayan mutuwarsa.

faq.question: Menene ra'ayin siyasa na Hume?
faq.answer: Hume ya kasance memba na jam'iyyar Tory mai sassaucin ra'ayi da nuna shakku, kuma ya jaddada mahimmancin doka da kuma ruhin jama'a don al'umma.

faq.question: Yaya Hume ya kalli tattalin arziki?
faq.answer: Hume ya kalli cewa kasuwanci da ciniki suna inganta rayuwar mutane da kuma kawo ci gaban al'adu, kuma idan mutane suka zama masu arziki, ikon kama-karya na gwamnati zai raunana.

timeline.event: An haife shi ga mahaifinsa jami'an shari'a a Wrington, Somerset.
Ya shiga makarantar kwana ta Westminster kuma ya kammala karatu da sakamako mai kyau.
Ya shiga Christ Church, Oxford a matsayin daliba mai tallafin karatu, inda ya fahimci falsafar Descartes.
Ya sami digiri na farko (Bachelor of Arts).
Ya fara aiki a matsayin malami (tutor) na Jami'ar Oxford na tsawon shekaru 5.
Ya fara binciken kimiyyar halitta da magani.
Ya zauna a Brandenburg, Jamus a matsayin sakataren jakada, inda ya ga yiwuwar amincewa da addinai daban-daban (religious tolerance).
무역 식민위원회의 서기장에 임명됨
Ya fara rubuta babban littafinsa "An Essay Concerning Human Understanding".
Ya dawo kasar Birtaniya.
Ya gudu zuwa Netherlands don kauce wa kungiyar masu goyon bayan sarki (Royalists).
Ya dawo kasa bayan nadin sarauta na William III sakamakon Juyin Juya Hali na Girmamawa (Glorious Revolution).
Ya zama shugaban kudaden shiga (Commissioner of Appeals) kuma ya shahara bayan ya wallafa "An Essay Concerning Human Understanding" wanda ya rubuta a lokacin da yake gudun hijira.
Ya yi ritaya a Essex.
Ya rasu a Essex.

keyAchievements.title: Gwarzon falsafar empiricism ta Birtaniya
keyAchievements.description: Ana daukar sa a matsayin masanin falsafa na empiricism na farko na Birtaniya na kwarai.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da Yarjejeniyar Zamantakewa
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi da'awar cewa an kafa kasa ta hanyar yarjejeniyar zamantakewa don tabbatar da tsaron hakki na halitta.

keyAchievements.title: Masanin lokacin wayewa da liberalism
keyAchievements.description: An san shi sosai a matsayin daya cikin masana na lokacin wayewa da kuma liberalism masu tasiri sosai.

keyAchievements.title: Asalin ra'ayin 'Self-identity' (Asalin kansa)
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne masanin falsafa na farko da ya yi kokarin bayyana kansa ta hanyar ci gaba na 'sani' (consciousness).

keyAchievements.title: Goiri bayan 'Tabula Rasa' (Farar takarda)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kalli kwakwalwa a matsayin 'tabula rasa' (farar takarda) ta hanyar yin da'awar cewa mutum baya haifuwa da ra'ayoyin a priori.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da ka'idar 'Night-watchman state'
keyAchievements.description: Ya goyi bayan ka'idar 'night-watchman state', wacce ke cewa aikin kasa shi ne tabbatar da tsaro mafi kankanta kawai.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa harsashin ikon jama'a (popular sovereignty)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa harsashi ga ikon jama'a ta hanyar yin da'awar cewa mutane sun amince su damka iko ga kasa ta hanyar yarjehiya.

keyAchievements.title: Goiri bayan constitutional democracy da hakki na halitta
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne mutum na farko da ya goyi bayan tsarin demokradiyya na tsarin mulki (constitutional democracy) da kuma hakki na halitta.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa harsashin rarraba iko guda uku (separation of powers)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa harsashi ga rarraba iko zuwa bangaren doka, shari'a, da gudanarwa.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "An Essay Concerning Human Understanding"
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne babban littafinsa da ke magana kan matsalolin fahimta ciki har da kimiyya na zamani.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "The Reasonableness of Christianity"
keyAchievements.description: Wannan rubutu ne da aka rubuta a matsayin amsa ga shirin John Toland.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "A Letter Concerning Toleration"
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi da'awar cewa "Toleration (amincewa da wasu) shi ne babban ma'auni na gane imani na gaskiya".

faq.question: Yaya ake kimanta John Locke a matsayin masanin falsafa?
faq.answer: Ana kimanta Locke a matsayin masanin falsafa na empiricism na farko na kwarai na Birtaniya, kuma an san shi a matsayin daya cikin masana na lokacin wayewa da kuma liberalism masu tasiri sosai.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan littattafan John Locke?
faq.answer: Manyan littattafansa sun hada da "An Essay Concerning Human Understanding", "Two Treatises of Government", "The Reasonableness of Christianity", da "A Letter Concerning Toleration".

faq.question: A ina ra'ayoyin John Locke suka yi tasiri?
faq.answer: Ra'ayoyin Locke sun yi tasiri ga Voltaire, Rousseau, Juyin Juya Halin Amurka, da masana na lokacin wayewa na Scotland, kuma an nuna su a cikin Declaration of Independence na Amurka.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar 'tabula rasa' (farar takarda) da John Locke ya goyi baya?
faq.answer: Locke ya kalli kwakwalwa a matsayin 'tabula rasa' (farar takarda), inda ya yi da'awar cewa mutum baya haifuwa da ra'ayoyin a priori.

faq.question: Menene Yarjejeniyar Zamantakewa na John Locke ke bayyarwa?
faq.answer: Locke ya yi da'awar cewa an kafa kasa ta hanyar yarjejeniyar zamantakewa don tabbatar da tsaron hakki na halitta na mallakar dukiya ta hanyar aiki a cikin yanayin halitta mai zaman lafiya.

faq.question: Wane matsayi John Locke ya dauka game da toleration (amincewa da wasu)?
faq.answer: Locke ya yi da'awar cewa "Toleration shi ne babban ma'auni na gane imani na gaskiya", amma ya nuna dabi'a mai karo da juna ta hanyar cire Roman Catholics da wadanda ba su yarda da Allah ba daga cikin wadanda za a amince da su.

faq.question: Wane matsayi John Locke ya dauka game da bauta?
faq.answer: Locke ya nuna dabi'a mai karo da juna ta hanyar adawa da bauta a Birtaniya, amma ya amince da yadda Ingila ke mallakar bakaken fata a matsayin bayi a yankunan mulkin mallaka na Amurka.

john-locke.missingDataNote: 일부 저서(예: <통치론>)에 대한 상세한 설명은 '저서' 섹션에 명시적으로 제공되지 않아 해당 필드를 비워두었습니다.

timeline.event: An haifi Simone de Beauvoir a Paris, Faransa.
Ta yi jawabi game da Leibniz a Sorbonne, kuma ta wuce jarrabawar zama farfesa na falsafa (agrégation) a matsayi na biyu.
Ta wallafa littafin "She Came to Stay" (L'Invitée).
Ta rubuta makala game da dabi'un existentialism "Pyrrhus and Cineas".
Ta wallafa "The Ethics of Ambiguity".
An wallafa "The Second Sex" (Le Deuxième Sexe) a kasar Faransa.
Ta wallafa littafin tarihin rayuwarta "Memoirs of a Dutiful Daughter".
Ta wallafa littafin tarihin rayuwarta "The Prime of Life".
Ta wallafa littafin tarihin rayuwarta "Force of Circumstance".
Ta rubuta makala "The Coming of Age" (La Vieillesse).
Ta sanya hannu kan Manifesto of the 343 don neman izinin zubar da ciki (abortion).
Ta wallafa littafin tarihin rayuwarta "All Said and Done".
Ta wallafa "When Things of the Spirit Come First" (Quand prime le spirituel), wanda ke dauke da labaran da ta fuskanta a matsayin mace a yarintarta.
Ta rubuta "Adieux: A Farewell to Sartre" (La Cérémonie des Adieux) game da rayuwar Jean-Paul Sartre ta karshe.
Ta rasu sakamakon ciwon huhu (pneumonia) kuma an binne ta a makabartar Montparnase da ke Paris.

keyAchievements.title: Marubuciya kuma masaniyar falsafa
keyAchievements.description: Ta kasance shahararriyar marubuciya kuma masaniyar falsafa ta kasar Faransa, wacce ta rubuta littattafai a fannoni daban-daban kamar wasan kwaikwayo, kasidun falsafa, makaloli, tarihin rayuwa, da tarihin kanta.

keyAchievements.title: "She Came to Stay" (L'Invitée)
keyAchievements.description: Wannan littafi ne na tarihi da ke nuna hadaddiyar alakar da ke tsakanin kanta, Sartre, Olga Kosakiewicz, da Wanda Kosakiewicz.

keyAchievements.title: "The Mandarins" (Les Mandarins)
keyAchievements.description: Littafi ne da ya lashe lambar yabo ta Prix Goncourt, wanda ke nuna Sartre, Nelson Algren, da sauran mutane a lokacin bayan Yakin Duniya na Biyu.

keyAchievements.title: "The Second Sex" (Le Deuxième Sexe)
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne littafi mai muhimmanci da ya zama harsashin feminism na zamani ta hanyar zurfafa bincike a kan zaluncin da ake yi wa mata.

keyAchievements.title: "The Ethics of Ambiguity" (Pour une morale de l'ambiguïté)
keyAchievements.description: Littafi ne mai saukin fahimta don shiga fannin existentialism na Faransa, wanda ke da sauki idan aka kwatanta da littattafai masu wuyar fahimta na Sartre.

keyAchievements.title: Wallafawa da gyaran jaridar Les Temps Modernes
keyAchievements.description: Ta kafa jaridar siyasa "Les Temps Modernes" tare da Sartre, Merleau-Ponty, da sauransu, kuma ta yi aiki a matsayin edita har zuwa gabannin rasuwarta.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta littafin tarihin rayuwarsa
keyAchievements.description: Ta rubuta tarihin rayuwarta ta hanyar littattafai guda 4 masu shahara tun daga "Memoirs of a Dutiful Daughter".

keyAchievements.title: Shiga cikin yunkurin yantar da mata na kasar Faransa
keyAchievements.description: Ta shiga cikin harkokin yantar da mata na kasar Faransa a shekarun 1970, kuma ta sanya hannu kan Manifesto of the 343 don neman izinin zubar da ciki a hukumance.

faq.question: Wace ce Simone de Beauvoir?
faq.answer: Ta kasance marubuciya kuma masaniyar falsafa ta kasar Faransa, wacce ta rubuta littattafai, kasidun falsafa, siyasa, batutuwan al'umma, makaloli, da tarihin kanta.

faq.question: Menene babban littafinta?
faq.answer: Ta rubuta littattafai na metaphysics kamar "She Came to Stay" da "The Mandarins", kuma ta rubuta "The Second Sex" a shekara ta 1949 wanda ya zama harsashin feminism na zamani.

faq.question: Yaya dangantakar iyalin Simone de Beauvoir take?
faq.answer: An haife ta ga mahaifinta Georges de Beauvoir, jami'in shari'a, da mahaifiyarta Françoise Brasseur, kuma kanwarta Hélène de Beauvoir ta kasance mai zane (painter).

faq.question: Wace alaka ce ke tsakaninta da Jean-Paul Sartre?
faq.answer: Ta hadu da Sartre a Jami'ar Paris, kuma a jarrabawar zama farfesa na falsafa a shekara ta 1929, Sartre ne ya zo na daya yayin da ita ta zo na biyu, kuma sun ci gaba da kasancewa cikin hadaddiyar alakar rayuwa a duk rayuwarsu.

faq.question: Menene babban sako da ta gabatar a cikin "The Second Sex"?
faq.answer: Ta yi da'awar cewa maza sun kera wa mata almara na 'asiri' don mayar da su 'wasu na daban' (the Other) a cikin al'umma. Kuma ta amince da ka'idar 'wanzuwa ta riga asali' (existence precedes essence) inda ta kalli cewa ba a haifuwar mace a matsayin mace, a'a, mace ana kera ta ne.

faq.question: Yaya ta shiga cikin yunkurin yantar da mata?
faq.answer: Ta yi aiki a yunkurin yantar da mata na kasar Faransa a shekarun 1970, kuma ta sanya hannu kan Manifesto of the 343 na shekara ta 1971 don neman halatta zubar da ciki wanda ke da laifi a Faransa a lokacin.

timeline.event: An haife ta a Linden, Jamus.
Wallafa kasida a kan ra'ayin soyayya.
An hana ta samun lasisin koyarwa (habilitation) saboda ita Bayahudiya ce, kuma ta gudu dari Jamus zuwa Paris.
Auren Heinrich Blücher.
Ta gudu zuwa Amurka tare da mijinta da mahaifiyarta.
Ta zama yar kasar Amurka (naturalized citizen).
Wallafa "The Origins of Totalitarianism".
Wallafa "Rahel Varnhagen: The Life of a Jewess" da "The Human Condition".
Ta zama mace ta farko da aka nada a matsayin farfesa na din-din-din a Jami'ar Princeton.
Wallafa "Between Past and Future".
Wallafa "Eichmann in Jerusalem: A Report on the Banality of Evil" da "On Revolution".
Wallafa "Men in Dark Times".
Wallafa "Crises of the Republic: Lying in Politics", "Civil Disobedience", da "On Violence".
Wallafa "Crises of the Republic" (littafin tarin ayyuka).
Mutuwa
Wallafa littafinta na karshe mara kammala "The Life of the Mind".

keyAchievements.title: Kafa kanta a matsayin mai ba da shawara kan siyasa (political theorist)
keyAchievements.description: Ta bayyana kanta a matsayin mai ba da shawara kan siyasa maimakon masaniyar falsafa, kuma ta bar ayyuka a kan yadda bil'adama ke zama a duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Bincike a kan iko, siyasa, hukuma, da totalitarianism
keyAchievements.description: Ta bar ayyuka a kan dabi'ar iko, siyasa, hukuma, da kuma totalitarianism.

keyAchievements.title: Tsara ra'ayin yanci
keyAchievements.description: Ta tsara yanci a matsayin abu na fili da na hadaka, kuma ta mayar da hankali kan tabbatar da yanci a matsayin aikin siyasa na gari.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da ra'ayin 'Banality of Evil' (Maganar Banza na Mugunta / 악의 평범성)
keyAchievements.description: Ta gabatar da sakamako a cikin rahoton shari'ar Eichmann cewa rashin tunani na kwarai yana haifar da banality of evil.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "The Origins of Totalitarianism"
keyAchievements.description: Ta rubuta littafi don bin diddigin tushen communism da Nazism da kuma alakar su da adawa da Yahudawa.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "On Revolution"
keyAchievements.description: Ta kwatanta Juyin Juya Halin Amurka da na Faransa, inda ta yi da'awar nasarar Juyin Juya Halin Amurka da kuma masifar Juyin Juya Halin Faransa.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa ka'idar iko
keyAchievements.description: Ta bayyana iko a matsayin 'abin da ba zai iya zama na mutum daya ba, face dai yana wanzuwa ne kawai muddin kungiya tana tare', kuma ta bambanta shi da karfi (violence) sosai.

faq.question: Yaya Hannah Arendt ta bayyana kanta?
faq.answer: Arendt da kanta ta ki taken masaniyar falsafa saboda falsafa tana mai da hankali kan 'mutum daya', kuma ta bayyana kanta a matsayin mai ba da shawara kan siyasa.

faq.question: Menene 'banality of evil' wanda Arendt ta gabatar?
faq.answer: A cikin rahoton shari'ar Eichmann, Arendt ta yanke shawarar cewa rashin tunani na kwarai yana haifar da banality of evil a karshe.

faq.question: Menene ra'ayin iko na Arendt?
faq.answer: Arendt ta bayyana iko a matsayin 'abin da ba zai iya zama na mutum daya ba, face dai yana wanzuwa ne kawai muddin kungiya tana tare', kuma ta bambanta shi da karfi (violence) sosai.

faq.question: Yaya Arendt ta auna Juyin Juya Halin Amurka da na Faransa?
faq.answer: Arendt ta yi da'awar cewa Juyin Juya Halin Faransa, wanda aka fi nazari da kwaikwayo a kansa, ya kasance masifa, yayin da Juyin Juya Halin Amurka wanda aka watsar da shi ya kasance nasara.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Copenhagen, Denmark.
Ya shiga Sashen Koyar da Addini na Jami'ar Copenhagen yana da shekaru 18.
Mahaifiyarsa Ane Sørensdatter Lund Kierkegaard ta rasu.
Ya fuskanci yunkurin kansa na kisa (suicide attempt).
Ya hadu da Regine Olsen.
Mahaifinsa Michael Pedersen Kierkegaard ya rasu.
Ya nemi auren Regine Olsen.
Ya fasa auren Regine Olsen.
Ya kammala karatu da digirin digirgir (PhD) a fannin falsafa dari Jami'ar Copenhagen.
Ya wallafa kasidarsa ta jami'ar "On the Concept of Irony with Continual Reference to Socrates".
Ya kammala rubuta "Either/Or".
Ya wallafa "Either/Or".
Ya wallafa "Fear and Trembling".
Ya wallafa "Repetition".
Ya wallafa "Philosophical Fragments".
Ya wallafa "The Concept of Anxiety".
Ya wallafa "Stages on Life's Way".
Peder Ludvig Møller ya wallafa makalar sukar "Stages on Life's Way".
Ya wallafa "Concluding Unscientific Postscript to Philosophical Fragments".
Ya wallafa "Works of Love".
Ya fara kai hari ga Cocin Denmark ta hanyar littattafanya kamar "Practice in Christianity".
Ya wallafa "The Sickness Unto Death".
Ya ci gaba da sukar Cocin Denmark a karshen rayuwarsa.
Ya rasu sakamakon ciwon kashin baya (spinal tuberculosis) a Asibitin Frederik.

keyAchievements.title: Gwarzon falsafar existentialism
keyAchievements.description: Ana kiran sa da gwarzon falsafar existentialism saboda ya samar da zurfin fahimta a kan zabin rayuwa na kansa da kuma ji.

keyAchievements.title: Sukar falsafar idealism ta Hegel da Cocin Lutheran ta Denmark
keyAchievements.description: Ya gudanar da ra'ayinsa na musamman ta hanyar adawa da falsafar idealism ta Hegel da kuma tsauraran matakai na Cocin Lutheran ta Denmark wadanda suka mamaye lokacin.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da ra'ayoyin 'Individuality' (Kansa) da 'Leap of Faith' (Tsalle na Imani)
keyAchievements.description: Ya binciki jigon addini ta hanyar manyan ra'ayoyi na 'individuality' na dan adam da kuma 'leap of faith' wanda ke tsallake hankali.

keyAchievements.title: Hanyar isar da sako ta sirri da amfani da sunayen bogi (pseudonyms)
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi amfani da sunayen bogi daban-daban da hanyoyin isar da sako ta sirri don jagorantar mai karatu ya nemo ma'anar da kansa.

keyAchievements.title: Wanda ya kafa fannin Christian psychology
keyAchievements.description: Ana kiran sa da wanda ya kafa fannin Christian psychology ta hanyar zurfafa bincike a kan fargaba da yanke kauna na dan adam, kuma ya yi tasiri a kan existential psychology.

faq.question: Yaya ake auna Kierkegaard a matsayin masanin falsafa?
faq.answer: Ana daukar sa a matsayin gwarzon falsafar existentialism, kuma ana sanya shi a matsayin 'Christian existentialist' wanda ya bambanta da wadanda ba su yarda da Allah ba.

faq.question: Menene manyan ra'ayoyin Kierkegaard?
faq.answer: Manyan ra'ayoyinsa biyu da aka fi sani su ne 'leap of faith' da 'individuality', wadanda ke bayyana yadda mutum ke yarda da Allah ko gudanar da aiki cikin soyayya.

faq.question: Me yasa Kierkegaard ya yi amfani da sunayen bogi?
faq.answer: Ya yi hakan ne don jagorantar mai karatu ya nemo ma'anar da kansa maimakon karanta bayanan saman takarda kawai, da kuma hana mutane kallon ra'ayoyinsa a matsayin wani tsari mai iko.

faq.question: Wane matsayi Kierkegaard ya dauka game da Cocin Denmark?
faq.answer: A karshen rayuwarsa, ya soki Cocin Denmark cewa ta gurbata kuma ta bata ainihin ma'anar Kiristanci, inda ya yi nuni da taron coci mara ma'ana da kuma ayyukan gwamnati na hukuma.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin babban dan dan kasuwa a Danzig (Gdańsk a yanzu).
Iyalinsa sun koma Hamburg bayan an hada Danzig da Prussia.
An haifi kanwarsa Adele, kuma ya koyi harshen Faransanci na tsawon shekaru 2 a Le Havre, Faransa.
Baynan ya dawo dari Faransa, ya shiga makarantar sirri ta Dr. Runge, wata cibiyar horar da yan kasuwa, kuma ya yi karatu na shekaru 4.
Ya yi tafiya zuwa Hannover, Karlsbad, Prague, da Dresden tare da mahaifinsa.
Ya yi tafiya a Turai tare da dukkan iyalinsa bisa shawarar mahaifinsa, kuma ya koyi harshen Turanci a London.
Ya yi tafiya ta hanyar Faransa, Switzerland, Vienna, Dresden, da Berlin, kuma ya fara horar da kansa a fannin kasuwanci a Danzig.
Mahaifinsa ya rasu bayan ya fado dari kofar iska ta dakin ajiye kaya.
Iyalinsa sun koma Weimar bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa, amma Schopenhauer ya zauna a Hamburg don ci gaba da horar da kansa a fannin kasuwanci.
Ya daina horon kasuwanci bisa shawarar mahaifiyarsa, kuma ya shiga Gymnasium da ke Gotha don koyon harshen Latin da na Girka.
Ya kalli wasan kwaikwayo da Napoleon ya shirya a Erfurt, kuma ya soki mata masu fada aji da ke kallon wasan.
Ya shiga Sashen Koyar da Magani na Jami'ar Göttingen, amma ya fi nuna sha'awa ga falsafa.
Ya saurari darussan masanin falsafa Gottlob Ernst Schulze, inda ya sami shawarar nazarin Plato da Kant sosai.
Ya yanke shawarar karantar falsafa sakamakon karfafa gwiwa dari Christoph Martin Wieland, kuma ya koma Jami'ar Berlin.
Ya fara bincikar masana falsafa da dama kamar Plato, Kant, Bacon, Locke, da Hume.

Ya kammala kasidarsa ta digirin digirgir "On the Fourfold Root of the Principle of Sufficient Reason" kuma ya sami digirin digirgir (PhD) a fannin falsafa. Ya gabatar da kasidarsa ga Johann Wolfgang von Goethe kuma ya yi bincike a kan ka'idar launi (theory of colors).
Ya karanta kuma ya binciki fassarar Latin ta Upanishad ("Oupnekhat") a dakin karatu na Weimar, kuma ya fuskanci sabani mai tsanani da mahaifiyarsa.
Ya wallafa "On Vision and Colors" wanda ya samu ta hanyar alakar sa da Goethe, kuma ya soki ka'idojin launi na Newton da na Goethe.
Ya kammala kuma ya wallafa babban littafinsa na rayuwa "The World as Will and Representation", sannan ya yi tafiya zuwa Italiya.
Ya nemi gurbin koyarwa (lecturer) a Jami'ar Berlin, kuma ya dawo gida don taimakawa mahaifiyarsa da ke fuskantar barazanar fatara.
Ya wuce jarrabawar gwaji ta koyarwa a Jami'ar Berlin, amma saboda rashin farin jini, ya daina koyarwa baada zangon karatu guda daya kacal.
Ya yi tafiya zuwa Italiya don fuskantar al'adu, fasaha, da yanayi, kuma ya rubuta bayanai game da su.
Ya dawo Jamus inda ya shiga cikin damuwa sakamakon fama da cututtuka daban-daban da kuma matsalar rashin ji.
Ya zauna a Gastein, Mannheim, da Dresden, kuma ya tsara fassara littattafan David Hume.
Ya koma Berlin don koyon harshen Spanish da kuma fassara littattafan Spanish.
Ya koma Frankfurt don ciyar da sauran rayuwarsa bayan cutar kwalara (cholera) ta yadu a Berlin.
Ya zauna a Frankfurt, kuma littattafansa sun fara samun hankalin mutane.
Ya gabatar da bukatar kafa ginin tunawa da Goethe a Frankfurt amma ba a amince da ita ba.
Ya wallafa "On the Will in Nature", wanda ke nuna ra'ayinsa cewa kimiyyar halitta tana dacewa da falsafarsa.

Ya shiga cikin wallafa tarin littattafan Kant inda ya ba da shawarar daukar bugun farko (A) na "Critique of Pure Reason" da mahimmanci, kuma ya yanke shawarar shiga takarar kasidar Royal Norwegian Society of Sciences and Letters.
Mahaifiyarsa Johanna Schopenhauer ta rasu, kuma ya yanke shawarar shiga takarar kasidar Royal Danish Academy of Sciences and Letters.
Ya sami lambar yabo dari Royal Norwegian Society of Sciences and Letters don kasidarsa "On the Freedom of the Will".
Ya shigar da kasidarsa "On the Basis of Morality" ga Royal Danish Academy, amma bai samu lambar yabo ba saboda ya soki Hegel da sauransu.
Ya wallafa "The Two Fundamental Problems of Ethics" ta hanyar hada kasidun guda biyu.
Ya hadu da kanwarsa Adele bayan shekaru 20.
Ya kammala bugu na biyu na "The World as Will and Representation" kuma aka wallafa shi tare da sake buga bugu na farko.
Ya fara rubuta "Parerga and Paralipomena".
Julius Frauenstädt ya hadu da Schopenhauer kuma ya zama dalibinsa.
Ya wallafa sabon bugu na "On the Fourfold Root of the Principle of Sufficient Reason".
Kanwarsa Adele ta rasu.
Ya wallafa "Parerga and Paralipomena" wanda ya dauki shekaru yana rubutawa, kuma wannan littafin ya zama mafi farin jini a cikin littattafansa.
John Oxenford, mai fassarawa na Birtaniya, ya gabatar da ra'ayinsa a cikin 'Westminster Review' don sanar da kasar Birtaniya.
Ya wallafa sabon bugu na "On the Will in Nature", kuma Richard Wagner ya aike masa da kwafin "The Ring of the Nibelung".
Sashen Falsafa na Jami'ar Leipzig ya gabatar da taken takara "Explanation and Critique of Schopenhauer's Philosophical Principles".
An kaddamar da darussa game da Schopenhauer a Jami'ar Bonn da Jami'ar Breslau, kuma an fassara wasu littattafansa zuwa harshen Turanci da Faransanci.
An shirya masa bikin cikar shekaru 70 da haihuwa, kuma ya ki amincewa da shawarar zama memba na Royal Prussian Academy of Sciences.
An wallafa bugu na uku na "The World as Will and Representation".
Ya rasu sakamakon ciwon huhu a gidansa da ke Frankfurt a ranar 21 ga Satumba.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "On the Fourfold Root of the Principle of Sufficient Reason"
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta kasidarsa ta digirin digirgir wacce ta zama sananniyar falsafa a fannin fahimta (epistemology).

keyAchievements.title: Wallafa "The World as Will and Representation"
keyAchievements.description: Ya wallafa babban littafinsa na falsafa wanda ake dauka a matsayin aikin rayuwarsa.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da falsafar Gabas (Eastern Philosophy)
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne na farko a Yamma da ya sanar da masu karatu game da kyawun falsafar Gabas.

keyAchievements.title: Bayyana rashin addini (atheism)
keyAchievements.description: Ana daukar sa a matsayin daya cikin masana falsafa na musamman da suka bayyana rashin yardarsu da Allah a fili.

keyAchievements.title: Wallafa "Parerga and Paralipomena"
keyAchievements.description: Ya wallafa tarin kasidu game da rayuwa gaba daya wanda ya sa ya zama sananne sosai.

keyAchievements.title: Samun lambar yabo ta Royal Norwegian Society
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami lambar yabo dari Royal Norwegian Society of Sciences and Letters don kasidarsa "On the Freedom of the Will".

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da tausayi (compassion) a matsayin harsashin dabi'u (ethics)
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da tausayi a matsayin harsashin dabi'u sabanin Kant, kuma ya bayyana shi ta hanyar metaphysics.

keyAchievements.title: Sukar dabi'u na Kant
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi tasiri ga tattaunawar dabi'u na zamani ta hanyar nuna gazawar dabi'un doka da wajibi na Kant.

faq.question: Wadanne ne masana falsafa da Schopenhauer ya fuskanci sabani da su?
faq.answer: Ya kasance yana da yakinin cewa ya gaji ra'ayoyin Kant daidai, kuma ya soki Hegel, Fichte, da Schelling a matsayin jabun masana da suka karkatar da ra'ayoyin Kant.

faq.question: Yaya Schopenhauer ya san game da falsafar Gabas?
faq.answer: Ya san game da addinin Hindu da na Buddha ta hanyar masanin Gabas Friedrich Majer a shekarun 1820, kuma ya gane cewa jigogi na wadannan addinai iri daya ne da sakamakon da shi da Kant suka samu.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan littattafan Schopenhauer?
faq.answer: Manyan littattafansa sun hada da kasidarsa ta digirin digirgir "On the Fourfold Root of the Principle of Sufficient Reason" da kuma babban littafinsa na rayuwa "The World as Will and Representation".

faq.question: Me yasa Schopenhauer ya ci gaba da bincike a wajen jami'a?
faq.answer: Bayan sabaninsa da Hegel a cikin koyarwar jami'a, ya raina kungiyoyin farfesoshi kuma ya ci gaba da bincikensa da kansa ba tare da dogaro ga wata kungiya ba.

faq.question: Yaya Schopenhauer ya auna falsafar Kant?
faq.answer: Kodayake ya karbi ra'ayoyin Kant ta hanyar suka, yana da yakinin cewa ya gaji ra'ayoyin Kant daidai, kuma ya yaba da gano a priori a fannin fahimta da Kant ya yi a matsayin babban aikin tarihi.

faq.question: Menene Schopenhauer ya kalla a matsayin harsashin dabi'u?
faq.answer: Ya gabatar da tausayi a matsayin harsashin dabi'u sabanin Kant wanda ya kalli hankali da doka a matsayin tushen dabi'u, kuma ya bayyana shi ta hanyar metaphysics.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Woolsthorpe, Lincolnshire, Birtaniya, kuma mahaifinsa Isaac Newton Sr. ya rasu a watan Oktoba, 1642 kafin haihuwarsa.
Lokacin da Newton ke da shekaru 3, an bar shi a hannun kakanninsa bayan mahaifiyarsa Hannah Ayscough ta sake aure.
Mahaifiyarsa ta dawo bayan rasuwar mahaifinsa na riko (stepfather).
An tura shi zuwa Makarantar King's School da ke Grantham don koyon harshen da, kuma ya nuna sha'awa ga chemistry yayin da yake zama a gidan mai hada magunguna Mr. Clark.
Mahaifiyarsa ta kira shi zuwa gidansu na Woolsthorpe don koya masa aikin gona.
Ya shiga Trinity College, Cambridge.
Ya tsara binomial theorem gaba daya, kuma ya zauna a mahaifarsa na tsawon shekaru 2 bayan an rufe Jami'ar Cambridge sakamakon cutar annoba (plague).
Ya dawo bayan Jami'ar Cambridge ta sake budewa kuma ya sami digiri na biyu (Master of Arts).
Ya kera reflecting telescope (망원경).
Ya zama farfesa na lissafi a Jami'ar Cambridge bayan Isaac Barrow, kuma ya fara bincike a kan calculus.
An zabe shi a matsayin memba na Royal Society, kuma ya samar da ka'idar haske bisa ga lura da yadda prism ke raba haske fari zuwa launuka daban-daban (spectrum).
Ya gano thin-film interference.

Ya wallafa "Philosophiae Naturalis Principia Mathematica" wanda ke kunshe da harsashin classical mechanics da kuma gravity na duniya (universal gravitation), kuma ya tabbatar da dokoki guda 3 na motsin abubuwa.
Ya yi aiki a matsayin memba na majalisa (Member of Parliament).
Ya yi aiki a matsayin shugaban Royal Mint.
Ya zama shugaban Royal Society na London bayan mutuwar Robert Hooke.
Sarauniya Anne ta ba shi taken knighthood (knight).
Ya kera wani gwaji don tabbatar da wanzuwar ether.
Ya rasu a lokacin barci yana da shekaru 84, kuma an binne gawarsa a Westminster Abbey.

keyAchievements.title: Ci gaban calculus
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da gudunmawa ga fannin calculus tare da Gottfried Wilhelm Leibniz, kuma ya kera hanyar Newton (Newton's method) don nemo tushen equations.

keyAchievements.title: Tsara binomial theorem gaba daya
keyAchievements.description: Ya tabbatar da binomial theorem da aka tsara gaba gaba, kuma ya ba da gudunmawa ga binciken power series.

keyAchievements.title: Classical mechanics da universal gravitation
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da harsashin classical mechanics da universal gravitation ta hanyar "Principia", kuma ya rubuta dokokin motsi na Newton.

keyAchievements.title: Kera reflecting telescope
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera reflecting telescope na farko mai amfani.

keyAchievements.title: Ka'idar haske
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da ka'idar haske bisa ga lura da yadda prism ke raba haske fari zuwa launuka daban-daban (spectrum).

keyAchievements.title: Dokar sanyaya ta Newton
keyAchievements.description: Ya gano dokar sanyaya ta Newton ta hanyar gwaji, ya binciki gudun sauti, kuma ya kera ra'ayin Newton's fluid.

keyAchievements.title: Dokar inverse-square law na gravity
keyAchievements.description: Ya gano dokar inverse-square law na gravity, wacce ke cewa karfin jan hankali a tsakanin abubuwa biyu yana dogaro ne bisa ga nisan da ke tsakaninsu.

faq.question: Wane ne Isaac Newton?
faq.answer: Isaac Newton ya kasance masanin lissafi, kimiyya (physicist), da sararin samaniya na kasar Birtaniya.

faq.question: Menene littafin Newton mafi tasiri?
faq.answer: Littafinsa "Philosophiae Naturalis Principia Mathematica" wanda aka wallafa a shekara ta 1687 yana daya cikin manyan littattafai masu tasiri a tarihin kimiyya, inda ya gabatar da harsashin classical mechanics da universal gravitation.

faq.question: Yaya Newton ya ba da gudunmawa ga calculus?
faq.answer: Ya ba da gudunmawa ga fannin calculus tare da Gottfried Wilhelm Leibniz, kuma ya gano hanyar Newton (Newton's method) don neman sakamako na kusa na equations.

faq.question: Wadanne ne dokokin motsi na Newton?
faq.answer: Dokokin motsi na Newton sun hada da dokar inertia, dokar acceleration, da kuma dokar action and reaction.

faq.question: Yaya Newton ya bayyana gravity?
faq.answer: Ya gano dokar inverse-square law na gravity, kuma ya bayyana dokar universal gravitation wacce ke cewa karfin da ke jawo apple kasa da kuma karfin da ke kiyaye wata a sararin samaniya iri daya ne.

faq.question: Shin Newton ya yi aure?
faq.answer: Ko da yake akwai wata mace da ya kulla yarjejeniyar aure da ita a lokacin samartakarsa, bai yi aure ba saboda ya mayar da hankali sosai kan bincike da aiki, kuma ya rayu a matsayin maras aure (bachelor) a duk rayuwarsa.

faq.question: Wane imani na addini Newton yake da shi?
faq.answer: Ya ki amincewa da Trinity (Uba, Da da Ruhu Mai Tsarki) amma yana da imani mai zurfi, inda ya yarda da Ubangiji guda daya wanda ya halicci komai kuma ya sadaukar da lokaci mai yawa wajen fassara littafi mai tsarki.

faq.question: Wadanne mukaman gwamnati Newton ya rike?
faq.answer: Ya yi ayyuka kamar memba na majalisa, shugaban Royal Mint, da kuma shugaban Royal Society na London.

timeline.event: An haifi Galileo di Vincenzo Bonaiuti de' Galilei a Pisa, Tuscany, Italiya.
Ya zama farfesa na lissafi a Jami'ar Pisa.
Ya rubuta "On Motion".
Ya gyara telescope mai karfin ninkawa sau 3 wanda aka kera a Netherlands, kuma ya bayyana telescope dinsa na farko ga masu fada aji na Venice.
Ya gano manyan duniyoyi guda 4 (moons) na Jupiter ta hanyar telescope, kuma ya wallafa "Sidereus Nuncius" (Starry Messenger).
Ya tafi Florence bisa gayyatar Cosimo II de' Medici, Grand Duke of Tuscany, don ci gaba da bincikensa.
Ya ziyarci Rome kuma ya zama memba na Accademia dei Lincei.
Cardinal Robert Bellarmine ya ba shi umarnin kada ya kare ko koyar da ka'idar Copernican.
Ya wallafa "The Assayer" (Il Saggiatore) don kalubalantar ka'idojin da suka dogara kan ikon Aristotle, kuma ya samar da tsarin lissafi na tunani na kimiyya.
Ya wallafa "Dialogue Concerning the Two Chief World Systems", amma an kai shi kotun addini ta Rome sakamakon haka.
Kotun addini ta same shi da laifi kuma aka daure shi a gidansa (house arrest), kuma dukkan littattafansa an saka su a cikin jerin littattafan da aka hana.
Ya kammala "Discourses and Mathematical Demonstrations Relating to Two New Sciences", kuma ya zama makaho gaba daya.
Mutuwar Galileo.
Paparoma John Paul II ya amince cewa shari'ar Galileo kuskure ce kuma ya nemi afuwa.

keyAchievements.title: Gyara telescope da lura da sararin samaniya
keyAchievements.description: Ya gyara telescope don gano moons na Jupiter, tabo na wata, da kuma tabo na rana, sannan ya goyi bayan ka'idar heliocentrism ta Copernicus ta hanyar lura da canje-canjen Venus.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa dokokin motsi
keyAchievements.description: Ya binciki motsin abubuwa masu sauri (acceleration) don kafa kinematics, kuma ya kafa ra'ayoyin gudu da sauri wadanda suka zama harsashin dokokin motsi na Newton.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa hanyar bincike ta kimiyya
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa dokokin lissafi na duniya da kuma bincike na zahiri don jagorantar farkon kimiyyar lissafi (physics) a ma'anar zamani.

keyAchievements.title: Gano manyan moons guda 4 na Jupiter
keyAchievements.description: Ya gano Io, Europa, Ganymede, da Callisto, wanda ya tabbatar da cewa ba dukkan abubuwan sararin samaniya ke kewaye da duniya ba kamar yadda ra'ayin Aristotle yake.

faq.question: Shin Galileo Galilei ya taba yin gwajin fadowar abubuwa a Hasumiyar Pisa da gaske?
faq.answer: A'a, wannan gwajin labari ne da marubucin tarihin Galileo kuma mai goyon bayansa Viviani ya kera don girmama Galileo. Galileo ya soki ka'idar Aristotle ta hanyar tunani na kwarai.

faq.question: Shin Galileo ya kasance Kirista na kwarai na Roman Catholic dunga sabaninsa da addini?
faq.answer: E, ya kasance Kirista na kwarai na Roman Catholic ba tare da la'akari da sabaninsa da addini ba, kuma ya so zama limamin coci (priest) a wani lokaci.

faq.question: Shin labarin cewa Galileo ya ce "Duk da haka, duniya tana juyawa" bayan shari'ar addini gaskiya ne?
faq.answer: A'a, ko da yake an san wannan labarin don nuna sha'awarsa ta neman gaskiyar kimiyya, babu wata shaida mai kyau da ke tabbatar da cewa Galileo ya fadi wannan kalmar da gaske.

faq.question: Wane matsayi Vatican ta dauka game da shari'ar geocentrism ta Galileo?
faq.answer: A shekara ta 1992, Paparoma John Paul II ya amince cewa shari'ar Galileo kuskure ce kuma ya nemi afuwa, kuma a shekara ta 1744 an cire littafin Galileo "Dialogue" daga cikin jerin littattafan da aka hana na coci.

timeline.event: An haife shi a  Shrewsbury, Birtaniya.
Ya sami ilimin firamare da sakandare.
Ya fara karatu a Makarantar Shrewsbury.
Ya fara karantar magani (medicine) a Jami'ar Edinburgh.
Ya bar Jami'ar Edinburgh kuma ya shiga Sashen Koyar da Addini na Jami'ar Cambridge.
Ya kammala karatu a Jami'ar Cambridge da sakamako mai kyau, kuma ya shiga jirgin HMS Beagle a ranar 27 ga Disamba.
Ya kammala tafiyar bincike ta HMS Beagle.
HMS Beagle ya isa Falmouth, Cornwall.
Ya rarraba kasidarsa ta farko game da daukaka kasa a Kudancin Amurka ga Geological Society of London, kuma ya gabatar da samfuran dabbobi masu shayarwa da tsuntsaye ga Zoological Society.
An zabe shi a matsayin memba na majalisa na Geological Society.
Ya koma London don shiga kungiyar kimiyya ta Lyell.
Ya fara tunani a kan 'yiwuwar canza wani nau'i zuwa wani' a cikin littafinsa na rubutu mai ja (Red Notebook).
An zabe shi a matsayin sakatare na Geological Society.
Ya auri Emma Wedgwood, kuma ya wallafa "The Voyage of the Beagle".
Ya zauna a wajen birnin London don tattarawa da tsara bayanai game da ka'idar evolution (진화론).
Ya wallafa littafinsa na farko na binciken halittu "The Structure and Distribution of Coral Reefs".
Ya rubuta bayanin farko na shafuka 35 da fensir game da ka'idar evolution ta hanyar natural selection.
Ya wallafa "Geological Observations on the Volcanic Islands".
Ya wallafa "Geological Observations on South America" bisa ga bayanan bincike na HMS Beagle.
Ya fara rubuta ka'idar evolution.
Ya gabatar da ra'ayinsa tare da kasidar Alfred Russel Wallace a taron Linnean Society.
Ya wallafa "On the Origin of Species", inda ya kafa gaskiyar canjin halittu da kuma 'natural selection'.
Ya wallafa "The Descent of Man" wanda ke magana game da canjin dan adam.
Ya wallafa "The Expression of the Emotions in Man and Animals".
Ya wallafa "The Formation of Vegetable Mould through the Action of Worms".
Ya rasu yana da shekaru 73, kuma an binne shi a Westminster Abbey.

keyAchievements.title: Babban gudunmawa ga ka'idar evolution
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance masanin halittu (biologist) da duwatsu (geologist) na kasar Birtaniya wanda ya fi kowa ba da gudunmawa ga ka'idar evolution.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da ka'idar natural selection
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da natural selection ta hanyar gasar neman rayuwa a cikin kasida ta hadin gwiwa tare da Alfred Russel Wallace.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "On the Origin of Species" da kuma sanar da ka'idar evolution
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta "On the Origin of Species" a shekara ta 1859 don bayyana ka'idar evolution tare da hujjoji masu karfi.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da ka'idar hadaka ta kimiyyar rayuwa (life sciences)
keyAchievements.description: Abubuwan da Darwin ya gano a kimiyyance suna bayyana ire-iren rayuwa a matsayin ka'idar hadaka ta kimiyyar rayuwa.

keyAchievements.title: Kalubalantar ka'idar creationism (창조설)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kaddamar da ka'idar evolution na halittu a cikin "On the Origin of Species" don sauya ka'idar creationism da ta mamaye lokacin, wanda ya bude sabon zamani.

keyAchievements.title: Tabbatar da canjin halittu ta hanyar tafiyar HMS Beagle
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance yana da tabbaci a kan canjin halittu ta hanyar lura da duwatsu da kuma shuke-shuke da dabbobi daki-daki a lokacin binciken HMS Beagle.

keyAchievements.title: Wallafa manyan littattafai
keyAchievements.description: Ya bar littattafai na ilimi daban-daban kamar "The Structure and Distribution of Coral Reefs" (1842), "Geological Observations on the Volcanic Islands" (1844), "Geological Observations on South America" (1846), da "The Descent of Man" (1871).

faq.question: Yaushe Charles Darwin ya haifu kuma yaushe ya rasu?
faq.answer: An haifi Charles Darwin a ranar 12 ga Fabrairu, 1809, kuma ya rasu a ranar 19 ga Afrilu, 1882.

faq.question: Menene ainihin babban aikin Charles Darwin?
faq.answer: Charles Darwin ya ba da babban gudunmawa ga ka'idar evolution, kuma ya kafa natural selection ta hanyar wallafa "On the Origin of Species" a shekara ta 1859.

faq.question: Wane matsayi Charles Darwin ya dauka game da bauta?
faq.answer: Charles Darwin ya ki amincewa da tsarin bauta bayan ya yi fushi sosai da yadda farar fata ke bautar da bakaken fata a lokacin tafiyarsa a Kudancin Amurka.

faq.question: Menene makasudin shiga jirgin HMS Beagle na Charles Darwin?
faq.answer: A farko ya shiga a matsayin farar hula bisa sha'awar Kyaftin din jirgin na son haduwa da masana, amma daga baya ya yi aiki a matsayin mai binciken halittu (naturalist) bayan an yaba da basirarsa ta musamman.

faq.question: Shin labarin cewa Charles Darwin ya canza imaninsa na addini a karshen rayuwarsa gaskiya ne?
faq.answer: Labarin cewa Darwin ya yarda da ka'idar creationism na Littafi Mai Tsarki na Ibraniyawa kuma ya dawo da imaninsa ga Yesu Kiristi kafin mutuwarsa karya ne.

timeline.event: Haihuwar Michelangelo di Lodovico Buonarroti Simoni.
Ya shiga shagon Domenico Ghirlandaio a matsayin dalibi (apprentice).
Ya kammala "Pietà" (피에타) bisa umarnin Cardinal Jean de Bilhères na kasar Faransa.
Ya fara kera mutum-mutumi na "David" (다비드) bisa bukar birnin Florence.
Ya shiga Rome bisa gayyatar Paparoma Julius II, inda aka ba shi aikin gina kabarin Paparoma.
Aka ba shi aikin zana rufin Sistine Chapel na Fadar Vatican kuma ya fara aiki.
Ya kammala zane na rufin Sistine Chapel.
Ya bar Florence gaba daya kuma ya zauna a Rome.
Paparoma Paul III ya ba shi aikin babban zane na bango na Sistine Chapel, wato "The Last Judgment" (최후의 심판).
Ya kammala "The Last Judgment".
Ya kammala mutum-mutumi na "Moses" (모세) na kabarin Julius II.
Ya kammala zane na fresco "The Conversion of Saul" a Cappella Paolina na Vatican.
Ya kammala zane na fresco "The Crucifixion of St. Peter" a Cappella Paolina na Vatican.
Ya rasu yana da shekaru 89 a Rome.

keyAchievements.title: Pietà
keyAchievements.description: Wannan babban aiki ne na mutum-mutumi na lokacin Renaissance wanda aka kammala shi a Rome a shekara ta 1499 bisa umarnin Cardinal Jean de Bilhères na kasar Faransa.

keyAchievements.title: David
keyAchievements.description: Wannan mutum-mutumi ne na yaro David wanda aka kammala shi cikin shekaru 3 bisa bukar birnin Florence a shekara ta 1501.

keyAchievements.title: Zane na rufin Sistine Chapel
keyAchievements.description: Wannan zane ne na rufin Sistine Chapel na Fadar Vatican wanda aka kammala shi cikin shekaru 4 bisa bukar Paparoma Julius II a shekara ta 1508, kuma yana nuna mafi yawan koyarwar Katolika kamar Creation of Adam.

keyAchievements.title: The Last Judgment
keyAchievements.description: Wannan babban zane ne na bango na Sistine Chapel wanda aka kammala shi cikin shekaru 6 bisa bukar Paparoma Paul III a shekara ta 1535.

keyAchievements.title: Kabarin Julius II
keyAchievements.description: Wannan ginin tunawa ne na jana'iza wanda aka kammala shi cikin shekaru 40 baada an ba shi aikin gina kabarin Paparoma Julius II a shekara ta 1505, kuma mutum-mutumi na "Moses" ne ya fi shahara.

faq.question: Wane irin mai fasaha Michelangelo ya kasance?
faq.answer: Ya kasance mai kera mutum-mutumi, mai zane, mai tsara gine-gine (architect), da kuma mawaƙi na kasar Italiya, kuma babban gwarzo ne na lokacin Renaissance.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan ayyukan mutum-mutumi na Michelangelo?
faq.answer: Manyan ayyukansa na mutum-mutumi sun hada da "Pietà" wanda aka kammala shi a shekara ta 1499, da kuma "David" wanda aka kammala shi cikin shekaru 3 tun daga shekara ta 1501.

faq.question: Wane ne ya zana rufin Sistine Chapel?
faq.answer: Michelangelo ne ya zana shi cikin shekaru 4 bayan ya karbi bukar Paparoma Julius II a shekara ta 1508.

faq.question: A ina zane na "The Last Judgment" na Michelangelo yake?
