faq.answer: Wannan babban zane ne na bango na Sistine Chapel wanda aka kammala shi cikin shekaru 6 bisa bukar Paparoma Paul III a shekara ta 1535.

timeline.event: An haife shi a gunduma ta 9 na Paris a ranar 14 ga Nuwamba.
Ya karbi baftisma ga sunan Oscar-Claude a Cocin Notre-Dame-de-Lorette a ranar 20 ga Mayu.
Iyalinsa sun koma Le Havre, Normandy.
Ya shiga makarantar sakandare ta fasaha ta Le Havre a ranar 1 ga Afrilu.
Mahaifiyarsa ta rasu.
Ya hadu da abokin aikinsa mai zane Eugène Boudin.
Ya isa Paris a watan Afrilu kuma ya zauna a Hotel du Nouveau Monde.
Ya shiga Académie Suisse wacce Charles Suisse ke jagoranta a farkon watan Fabrairu, inda ya hadu da Camille Pissarro.
An dauke shi aikin soja a Le Havre a ranar 2 ga Maris, kuma ya shiga rundunar dakarun gwal na Afirka (Chasseurs d'Afrique) a ranar 29 ga Afrilu.
Ya kamu da cutar zazzabin taifot (typhoid fever) a lokacin bazara, don hivyo ya koma Le Havre don samun sauki, kuma ya hadu da Johan Barthold Jongkind a lokacin rani.
Ya koma Paris a watan Disamba inda ya shiga shagon Charles Gleyre, kuma ya hadu da Auguste Renoir da Frédéric Bazille.
Ya fara bayyana a matsayin mai zane a Salon da kyau ta hanyar "The Mouth of the Seine at Honfleur" da "The Pointe de la Hève at Low Tide".
Ya shigar da "The Woman in the Green Dress" (녹색 드레스를 입은 여인) da "Road of Chailly" (샤이 공원의 포장도로) ga Salon kuma aka amince da su.
Abokiyar zamansa Camille Doncieux ta haifi dansu na farko Jean.
Ya auri Camille a ranar 28 ga Yuni, kuma ya zauna cikin gudun hijira a London da Netherlands kafin barkewar Yakin Franco-Prussian.
Mahaifinsa ya rasu, kuma iyalinsa sun koma Argenteuil.
Sun koma 'Pink House with Green Shutters' a Argenteuil, kuma ya nuna "Impression, Sunrise" (인상, 해돋이) da sauran ayyuka a Baje Kolin Impressionist na farko.
Ya zana "Woman with a Parasol - Madame Monet and Her Son" (파라솔을 든 여인 - 모네 부인과 그 아들).
Camille Monet ta kamu da rash인 lafiya mai tsanani, kuma ya shirya wani baje kolin don nuna adawa da Salon.
Ya nuna zane-zane guda 7 na "Gare Saint-Lazare" (생라자르 역) a Baje Kolin Impressionist na 3 a ranar 5 ga Afrilu.
An haifi dansa na biyu Michel, kuma suka koma kauyen Vétheuil, sannan an gano cewa Camille tana da ciwon kansa na mahaifa (uterine cancer).
Camille ta rasu.
Ya shigar da zane-zane guda biyu ga Salon kuma aka amince da daya dari cikinsu.
Ya koma Poissy a watan Disamba tare da Alice Hoschedé (matar Ernest Hoschedé) da yaranta.
Ya shiga Baje Kolin Impressionist na 7 a karon karshe.
Ya koma wani gidan haya da ke Giverny tare da yaransa a ranar 29 ga Afrilu, kuma an gudanar da baje kolinsa na farko na tunawa da rayuwarsa (retrospective).
Ya yi gajeruwar tafiyar zane tare da Auguste Renoir zuwa Italian Riviera da Genoa a watan Disamba.
Ya zauna a Bordighera dari 18 ga Janairu zuwa 5 ga Afrilu kuma ya samar da zane-zane guda 38.
Ya yi tafiyar zane zuwa gonakin tulip na Netherlands.
Ya hadu da John Singer Sargent a lokacin rani.
Ya sayi gidansa na Giverny.
An nuna zane-zane guda 15 na "Haystacks" (건초더미 연작) a Durand-Ruel Gallery.
Ya samar da zane-zane guda 26 na "Rouen Cathedral" (루앙 대성당).
An nuna zane-zane guda 20 na "Rouen Cathedral".
An nuna zane-zane guda 61 a Galerie Georges Petit.
Ya fara zana furen ruwa (water lilies), kuma ya zauna na tsawon makonni 6 a London.
Ya nuna zane-zane na farko na gonarsa wadanda suka fi mayar da hankali kan gadar kasar Japan (Japanese bridge).
Ya fadada tabkin gidansa, kuma baje kolin tarin zane-zane na furen ruwa ya sami babban nasara a birnin New York a watan Fabrairu.
Ya kara girman gonar ruwa ta kusa kai murabba'in mita 4,000.
An nuna tarin zane-zane "Views of the Thames in London - 1900-1904" a watannin Mayu da Yuni.
Ya zauna a Fadar Barbaro da ke Venice tare da Alice a lokacin kaka.
An gudanar da baje kolin da ke da taken "Water Lilies" a ranar 6 ga Mayu, inda aka nuna zane-zane guda 48.
Matarsa ta biyu Alice ta rasu.
Ya yi tafiya zuwa London don tattaunawa da masanin idanu na Jamus Richard Liebreich.
Babban dansa Jean ya rasu.
Ya fara aikin zane-zane (Grandes Décorations) don gwamnatin Faransa.
Ya fara zana hotunan kasa (landscapes) da dukkan karfinsa.
Matsalar idonsa ta dan ragu na wucin gadi sakamakon maganin fadada kwayar ido (mydriatics).
Ya yi aikin tiyata na cataract (백내장).
Bayan idonsa ya gyaru, ya fara sauya wasu ayyukan da ya yi kafin aikin tiyatar.
Ya rasu sakamakon ciwon kansa na huhu (lung cancer) yana da shekaru 86 a ranar 5 ga Disamba, kuma an binne shi a makabartar cocin Giverny.
An nuna zane-zane na katako (panels) guda 27 a Musée de l'Orangerie a watan Mayu.
Rubutun André Masson ya taimaka wajen sauya yadda mutane ke kallon zane-zanen Monet.
Zane-zanen furen ruwa da ke cikin ma'ajiyar Museum of Modern Art (MoMA) da ke New York sun kone sakamakon gobara.
Michel ya ba da gidan Monet, gonarsa, da tabkin furen ruwa kyauta ga Académie des Beaux-Arts ta Faransa.
An sake gyara gonar Monet kuma aka bude ta ga jama'a.
An kera Google Doodle don bikin cikar shekaru 161 da haihuwar Claude Monet a ranar 14 ga Nuwamba.
An sayar da "London, Parliament, Sunlight in the Fog" a kan dalar Amurka miliyan 20.1.
An wallafa kasida game da wuraren da ya yi zanen London a cikin mujallar Proceedings of the Royal Society.
An sake sace "Cliffs near Dieppe" a karon na biyu a watan Agusta.
An sayar da "The Railroad Bridge at Argenteuil" a kan dalar Amurka miliyan 41.4 a ranar 6 ga Mayu.
An dawo da "Cliffs near Dieppe" a watan Yuni.
An sayar da "The Water Lily Pond" a kan fam 40,921,250 (kusan dalar Amurka 80,451,178) a ranar 24 ga Yuni.
Zane-zanen "The Church at Vétheuil" da "The Water Lily Pond" sun zama batun shari'a a kotun New York a watan Oktoba.
An sami zanen Monet wanda wani dan kasuwa Bayahude ke da shi a cikin akwatin Cornelius Gurlitt.
An mayar da zanen da Nazis sace "The Beach" ga jikokin ma'auratan Parlagi.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa da bude fannin Impressionism
keyAchievements.description: '인상주의의 아버지'로 불리며, 인상파의 창시자이자 개척자로서 모더니즘의 핵심적인 선구자로 여겨집니다.

keyAchievements.title: Asalin kalmar Impressionism
keyAchievements.description: Kalmar 'Impressionism' ta fito ne daga taken zanensa "Impression, Sunrise" (인상, 해돋이) wanda aka nuna a Baje Kolin Impressionist na farko a shekara ta 1874.

keyAchievements.title: Gudanar da zane a waje (en plein air) kullum
keyAchievements.description: A matsayinsa na mai zane wanda ya fi kowa biyayya ga falsafar Impressionism a tsawon rayuwarsa, ya bayyana yadaan yake kallon yanayi a cikin zane-zanen da ya yi a waje (en plein air).

keyAchievements.title: Bude hanyar zane-zane na tarin jigo (series)
keyAchievements.description: Ya bude hanyar zana abu guda sau da dama don nuna sauyin haske da lokuta na shekara, kuma manyan ayyukansa sun hada da tarin zane-zanen "Haystacks", "Rouen Cathedral", da kuma "Water Lilies".

keyAchievements.title: Kera Gonar Giverny
keyAchievements.description: Ya sayi gida da fili a Giverny, Arewacin Faransa, kuma ya fara babban shiri na shimfida kasa ciki har da tabkin furen ruwa, wanda ya zama mafi girman tushen kwarin gwiwa ga fasaharsa.

keyAchievements.title: Tasiri a kan fasahar zamani
keyAchievements.description: Ayyukansa na karshe da ya yi karkashin tasirin cataract a Giverny ana daukar su a matsayin wadanda suka ba da 'babban' kwarin gwiwa ga fasahar karni na 20 da kuma abstract art na zamani.

faq.question: Wane ne Claude Monet?
faq.answer: Claude Monet ya kasance mai zane na Impressionist na kasar Faransa, wanda ake cura da 'Uban Impressionism' kuma shi ne ya kafa kuma ya bude fannin Impressionist.

faq.question: Daga ina kalmar 'Impressionism' ta fito?
faq.answer: Kalmar 'Impressionism' ta fito ne daga taken zanensa "Impression, Sunrise" (인상, 해돋이) wanda aka nuna a Baje Kolin Impressionist na farko a shekara ta 1874.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan zane-zane na tarin jigo (series) na Monet?
faq.answer: Manyan zane-zanensa na tarin jigo sun hada da "Haystacks", "Rouen Cathedral", da kuma "Water Lilies" wanda ya mamaye rayuwarsa a shekaru 20 na karshe.

faq.question: A ina Monet ya fi aiki?
faq.answer: Ya rayu a Giverny, Arewacin Faransa tun shekara ta 1883, inda ya sayi gida da fili kuma ya fara babban shiri na shimfida kasa ciki har da tabkin furen ruwa.

faq.question: Yaya idon Monet ya yi tasiri a kan ayyukansa?
faq.answer: Ya fara samun matsalar gane launuka saboda ciwon cataract, wanda ya sa zane-zanensa suka zama masu fadi da kuma abstract, kuma bayan aikin tiyata, sun fi nuna launin shudi (blue) fiye da na baya.

faq.question: Wane tasiri ayyukan Monet suka yi ga fasahar zamani?
faq.answer: Ayyukansa na karshe da ya yi karkashin tasirin cataract a Giverny ana daukar su a matsayin wadanda suka ba da 'babban' kwarin gwiwa ga fasahar karni na 20 da kuma abstract art na zamani.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin dan na biyu a cikin yara 7 na Mikhail Andreyevich da Maria Fyodorovna a Moscow.
Ya shiga makarantar kwana ta Chermak a Moscow tare da yayansa Mikhail kuma ya yi karatu na shekaru 3.

Mahaifiyarsa Maria Fyodorovna ta rasu sakamakon ciwon huhu (tuberculosis); mahaifinsa ya tura shi tare da yayansa Mikhail zuwa Saint Petersburg don shiga makarantar injiniyoyin soja (Military Engineering-Technical University).
Ya wuce jarrabawar shiga makarantar injiniyoyin soja kuma ya sami ilimin soja.
Bayi na gonakinsa (serfs) sun kashe mahaifinsa.
Ya kammala karatu a makarantar injiniyoyin soja kuma aka nada shi matsayin second lieutenant.
Ya bar aikin soja don sadaukar da kansa ga rubuce-rubucen adabi.
Ya shiga fannin adabi ta hanyar littafinsa na farko "Poor Folk" (가난한 사람들) wanda mai sukar adabi Vissarion Belinsky ya yaba masa sosai.
Gwamnati ta kama shi saboda ya shiga taron Mikhail Petrashevsky kuma ya karanta wasikar Belinsky "Letter to Gogol".
Ya kammala daurin shekaru 4 a kurkukun Omsk.
Ta auri Maria Isaeva.
Ya koma Saint Petersburg.
Ya kaddamar da jaridar "Time" (Vremya) tare da yayansa, kuma ya fara wallafa "The Insulted and Injured" da "House of the Dead" a ciki.
Ya kaddamar da sabuwar jaridar "Epoch" (Epokha) tare da yayansa amma bai yi nasara ba.
Ya kammala babban littafinsa "Crime and Punishment".
Ya dawo bayan ya rubuta "The Idiot" da "Demons" lokacin da yake zaune a kasashen waje (musamman Dresden).
Ya wallafa "The Adolescent" (The Raw Youth) wanda ya sa ya sami kudi mai yawa don fita dari talauci.
Ya kammala rubuta babban littafinsa na karshe "The Brothers Karamazov".
Ya rasu sakamakon fashewar jijiyar huhu (pulmonary artery rupture) yana da shekaru 60.
An binne gawarsa a makabartar Alexander Nevsky Monastery da ke Saint Petersburg.

keyAchievements.title: Poor Folk
keyAchievements.description: Ya shiga fannin adabi da kyau ta hanyar littafinsa na farko a shekara ta 1846, inda Vissarion Belinsky ya kira shi da 'Gogol na biyu'.

keyAchievements.title: House of the Dead
keyAchievements.description: Wannan littafi ne da aka rubuta bisa ga abubuwan da ya fuskanta a lokacin daure a Siberia.

keyAchievements.title: Crime and Punishment
keyAchievements.description: Ya kammala wannan littafin wanda ake dauka a matsayin daya dari cikin manyan ayyukansa a shekara ta 1866.

keyAchievements.title: The Adolescent (The Raw Youth)
keyAchievements.description: Ya samu damar fita dari talauci sakamakon samun kudi mai yawa bayan ya wallafa wannan littafin a shekara ta 1874.

keyAchievements.title: The Brothers Karamazov
keyAchievements.description: Ya kammala babban littafinsa na karshe wanda ake dauka a matsayin aikin rayuwarsa a shekara ta 1880.

keyAchievements.title: A Writer's Diary
keyAchievements.description: Wannan ya zama muhimmin bayani don binciken Dostoevsky a nan gaba, wanda ke kunshe da sukar adabi, sharhin siyasa da al'umma, makaloli, da gajerun labarai.

faq.question: Wane irin canjin tunani Dostoevsky ya fuskanta?
faq.answer: Ya canza tunaninsa dari dan gurguzu zuwa mai goyon bayan Kiristanci da jin kai ta hanyar karanta Littafi Mai Tsarki sosai a lokacin daure a Siberia da kuma lura da rayuwar fursunoni da talakawa.

faq.question: Wadanne ne abubuwan da Dostoevsky ya fuskanta da kansa da suka yi tasiri ga ayyukansa?
faq.answer: Abubuwan da ya fuskanta kamar sauya hukuncin kisa a daidai lokacin karshe, daure a Siberia, cutarsa ta farfadiya (epilepsy), da kuma wasan caca sun zama muhimman abubuwa da ke bayyana a cikin littattafansa.

faq.question: Wadanne ne siffofin littattafan Dostoevsky?
faq.answer: Littattafansa suna nuna mutane masu halayen kwakwalwa na musamman da kuma banbanci, inda yake nuna zurfin fahimta game da tunanin dan adam, kuma ya binciki siyasa, al'umma, da ruhin kasar Russia a lokacin.

faq.question: Shin Dostoevsky yana da alaka da existentialism?
faq.answer: Valter Kaufmann ya bayyana littafin Dostoevsky "Notes from Underground" (지하실의 수기) a matsayin 'mafi kyawun asali ga existentialism', kuma wani lokaci ana daukar sa a matsayin wanda ya kafa fannin existentialism.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin dan na uku na Léopold Hugo a Besançon, Gabashin Faransa.
Ya yanke shawarar zama shahararren marubuci na Faransa bayan ya nuna sha'awa ga karatu da rubuta waƙoƙi a makarantar kwana ta Cordier da ke Paris.
Ya wallafa tarin waƙoƙinsa na farko "Odes et poésies diverses" kuma ya yi aure.
Ya wallafa littafin "Han d'Islande" (Han of Iceland).
Gwamnatin Masarautar Faransa ta ba shi lambar yabo ta Chevalier na Légion d'honneur don girmama ayyukansa a matsayin marubuci.
Ya wallafa tarin waƙoƙi "Odes et Ballades" da kuma littafin "Bug-Jargal".
Ya jagoranci marubuta na Romanticism ta hanyar nuna adawa ga adabin classicism ta hanyar wallafa gabatarwa (preface) na wasan kwaikwayo "Cromwell".
Ya wallafa "Les Orientales" da kuma "The Last Day of a Condemned Man".
An sami rikici a tsakanin masu goyon bayan Romanticism da na Classicism (Battle of Hernani) lokacin da aka fara nuna wasan kwaikwayo "Hernani".
Ya wallafa littafin "The Hunchback of Notre-Dame" (Notre-Dame de Paris), tarin waƙoƙi "Les Feuilles d'automne", da kuma wasan kwaikwayo "Marion de Lorme".
Ya wallafa wasan kwaikwayo "Le roi s'amuse" (The King Amuses Himself).
Ya wallafa wasan kwaikwayo "Lucrezia Borgia" da kuma "Marie Tudor".
Ya wallafa tarin waƙoƙi "Les Chants du crépuscule".
Ya wallafa tarin waƙoƙi "Les Voix intérieures".
Ya wallafa wasan kwaikwayo na waƙa "Ruy Blas".
Ya wallafa tarin waƙoƙi "Les Rayons et les Ombres".
Ya zama memba na Académie Française.
Wasan kwaikwayo "Les Burgraves" ya fuskanci mummunar suka, kuma babban diyarsa Léopoldine da mijinta sun rasu sakamakon hatsarin kwal jirgin ruwa.
Bai wallafa littattafai ba kusan sam, kuma ya mayาร란다요의 공방에 도제로 들어감 (wait: ya mayar da hankali kan ayyukan siyasa).
Ya karfafa ra'ayinsa na jin kai (humanitarianism) sakamakon samun kwarin gwiwa dari Juyin Juya Hali na Fabrairu da sauran yanayin da ke kewaye da shi.
An kore shi dari kasa sakamakon adawa da juyin mulki na Napoleon III, inda ya fara rayuwar gudun hijira ta kusa shekaru 19.
Ya wallafa tarin waƙoƙi "Les Châtiments".
Ya wallafa tarin waƙoƙi "Les Contemplations".
Ya wallafa kashi na farko na tarin waƙoƙi "La Légende des siècles".
Ya wallafa littafin "Les Misérables".
Ya wallafa littafin "Toilers of the Sea" (Les Travailleurs de la mer).
《황량한 세월》을 집필하며 프산 노동자들의 현실을 그림.
Ya koma Paris a matsayin mai kare tsarin jamhuriya bayan faduwar Napoleon III sakamakon Yakin Franco-Prussian.
Ya wallafa "L'Année terrible".
Ya wallafa littafin "Ninety-Three" (Quatrevingt-treize).
Ya wallafa kashi na biyu na "La Légende des siècles".
Ya tsara wasiyyarsa.
Ya wallafa kashi na uku na "La Légende des siècles".
Ya rasu, kuma an binne gawarsa a Panthéon ta hanyar jana'izar kasa (state funeral).

keyAchievements.title: Jagorantar adabin Romanticism
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da ka'idar wasan kwaikwayo na Romanticism ta hanyar gabatarwa na "Cromwell" kuma ya yi nasara a 'Battle of Hernani' don jagorantar marubuta na Romanticism.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta manyan littattafai
keyAchievements.description: Ya tabbatar da matsayinsa na marubuci ta hanyar "The Hunchback of Notre-Dame", kuma ya rubuta manyan littattafai da dama kamar "Les Misérables" a lokacin gudun hijirarsa.

keyAchievements.title: Sukar al'umma da jin kai
keyAchievements.description: Ya nuna soyayyarsa ga ma'aikata matalauta a cikin ayyukansa, ya jaddada fasahar jama'a, kuma ya karfafa ra'ayinsa na jin kai.

keyAchievements.title: Muhimmin mutum a cikin adabin Faransa
keyAchievements.description: Ya rike matsayi mai mahimmanci a cikin adabin Faransa kamar samun lambar yabo ta Légion d'honneur a shekara ta 1825 da kuma zama memba na Académie Française a shekara ta 1841.

faq.question: Wane ne Victor Hugo?
faq.answer: Ya kasance mawaƙi, marubuci, kuma mai tsara wasan kwaikwayo na kasar Faransa.

faq.question: Wane tasiri Victor Hugo ya yi ga Romanticism?
faq.answer: Ya gabatar da ka'idar wasan kwaikwayo na Romanticism ta hanyar gabatarwa na "Cromwell" kuma ya yi nasara a 'Battle of Hernani' don jagorantar marubuta na Romanticism.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan ayyukan Victor Hugo?
faq.answer: Manyan ayyukansa sun hada da "The Hunchback of Notre-Dame" da kuma "Les Misérables".

faq.question: Me yasa Victor Hugo ya yi rayuwar gudun hijira?
faq.answer: Ya fara rayuwar gudun hijira ta kusa shekaru 19 bayan da aka kore shi dari kasa sakamakon adawa da juyin mulki na Napoleon III a shekara ta 1851.

faq.question: Wace alaka ce ke tsakanin Victor Hugo da Cocin Katolika?
faq.answer: Littattafansa an saka su a cikin jerin littattafan da aka hana na Cocin Katolika, kuma bai daidaita da coci ba, har ma ya ki amincewa da addu'ar coci.

faq.question: Yaushe Victor Hugo ya rasu kuma a ina aka binne shi?
faq.answer: Ya rasu a ranar 22 ga Mayu, 1885, kuma an binne gawarsa a Panthéon.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin dan na uku a birnin tashar jiragen ruwa na Taganrog da ke bakin Tekun Black Sea.
Ya shiga makarantar shiri (preparatory school) da ke koyar da harshen da na Girka a mahaifarsa.
Ya shiga Gymnasium na Taganrog don samun ilimin gargajiya.
Ya sake yin aji na 3 saboda rashin sakamako mai kyau.
Ya sake yin aji na 5 saboda ya fadi jarrabawar harshen da na Girka.
Ya kammala karatu a makarantar Taganrog kuma ya shiga Sashen Koyar da Magani na Jami'ar Moscow.
Ya dauki shafi (column) na nuna rayuwar yau da kullum ta Moscow a kowane mako biyu a cikin jaridar adabi "Oskolki".
Ya wuce jarrabawar kammala karatun magani kuma ya wallafa tarin gajerun labaransa na farko "Tales of Melpomene" (멜포네네의 우화).
Wasan kwaikwayo "Ivanov" (이바노프) an fara nuna shi kuma ya sami babban nasara a Moscow da Saint Petersburg.
Ya bar Moscow don tafiya zuwa Siberia da Tsibirin Sakhalin.
Ya sayi gida a wajen birnin Moscow inda ya zauna tare da iyayensa da kanwarsa, kuma ya yi aiki a matsayin likita.
Ya kaddamar da wasan kwaikwayo "The Seagull" (갈매기) wanda ke nuna farkon lokacinsa na karshe na wasan kwaikwayo.
Ya koma Peninsula ta Crimea da ke kallon Yalta saboda lalacewar lafiya.
An zabe shi a matsayin memba na Russian Academy of Sciences.
Ya auri Olga Knipper, mai wasan kwaikwayo ta Moscow Art Theatre.
Ya mayar da matsayinsa na memba na Academy don nuna rashin amincewa lokacin da gwamnati ta soke matsayin Maxim Gorky na memba na Academy.
Ya rasu sakamakon ciwon huhu (tuberculosis) yana da shekaru 44.

keyAchievements.title: Kammala karatun magani da aiki
keyAchievements.description: Ya kammala karatu a Sashen Koyar da Magani na Jami'ar Moscow a shekara ta 1884, inda ya yi aiki a matsayin likita don kula da manoma makwabta kuma ya kafa makarantu a kauyen.

keyAchievements.title: Shahara a matsayin marubucin gajerun labarai
keyAchievements.description: 대학 졸업 무렵 이미 신진 소설가로서 명성이 높았으며, 여러 잡지에 유머 단편과 수필을 기고하고 첫 단편집 《멜포네네의 우화》를 출판했습니다.

keyAchievements.title: Nasara a matsayin mai tsara wasan kwaikwayo
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa sabon tsarin wasan kwaikwayo ta hanyar manyan ayyukan wasan kwaikwayo na zamani kamar "The Seagull", "Uncle Vanya", "Three Sisters", da kuma "The Cherry Orchard", tun daga babban nasarar wasan kwaikwayo "Ivanov".

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan sukar al'umma
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta littafin tafiya da ke nuna mummunan yanayin rayuwar fursunoni da aka kora zuwa Tsibirin Sakhalin, kuma ya mayar da matsayinsa na memba na Russian Academy don nuna rashin amincewa da rashin adalci na gwamnati.

faq.question: Wadanne ayyuka Anton Chekhov ya yi?
faq.answer: Ya kasance likita, marubucin gajerun labarai, kuma mai tsara wasan kwaikwayo na kasar Russia.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan wasannin kwaikwayo na Anton Chekhov?
faq.answer: Manyan wasannin kwaikwayonsa sun hada da "The Seagull", "Uncle Vanya", "Three Sisters", da kuma "The Cherry Orchard".

faq.question: Yaushe Anton Chekhov ya rasu kuma menene sanadin mutuwarsa?
faq.answer: 안톤 체호프는 1904년 7월 15일에 44세의 나이로 폐결핵으로 사망했습니다.

faq.question: Wadanne ayyuka Anton Chekhov ya yi a matsayin likita?
faq.answer: Ya yi aikin sa-kai a matsayin likita ta hanyar kula da lafiyar manoma makwabta lokacin da yake zaune a wajen birnin Moscow da kuma kafa makarantu a kauyen.

timeline.event: Haihuwar Frédéric François Chopin.
Iyalinsa sun koma Warsaw.
바르샤바가 폴란드 입헌왕국의 일부가 됨
Ya sami horonsa na farko na kida dari Wojciech Żywny.
Ya fara gudanar da baje koli na kida (concerts) a fili yana da shekaru 7, kuma ya tsara polonaises guda biyu.
Ya tsara A-flat major polonaise kuma ya sadaukar da shi ga Żywny.
Ya buga kade-kadensa na kai tsaye (improvisation) da kuma sashi na concertos na Moscheles ta hanyar aeolopantalon (aeolomelodicon).
Ya buga Rondo Op. 1 dinsa (aikinsa na farko da aka sayar) a baje kolin aeolopantalon.
Ya shiga Lyceum na Warsaw, kuma ya koyi ka'idar kida, figured bass, da kuma tsara kida na tsawon shekaru 3 a Warsaw Conservatory.
Iyalinsa sun koma Krakowskie Przedmieście jim kadan bayan rasuwar kanwarsa Emilia.
Ya ziyarci Berlin tare da abokin iyalinsu.
Ya tsara "Souvenir de Paganini" bayan ya saurari kade-kaden goge (violin) na Niccolò Paganini.
Ya fara bayyana a Vienna inda ya gudanar da baje kolin piano guda biyu kuma ya sami yabo mai kyau.
Ya fara nuna Piano Concerto No. 2 in F minor, Op. 21.
Ya bar birnin Warsaw.
Boren watan Nuwamba ya barke a Warsaw.
Ya bayyana bacin ransa a cikin littafinsa na rubutu bayan ya ji labarin danne boren lokacin da yake tafiya dari Vienna zuwa Paris.
Ya isa birnin Paris.
Robert Schumann ya ayyana shi da 'gwarzo' a cikin sukar da ya yi ga Op. 2 variations.
Ya gudanar da baje kolinsa na farko a Paris kuma ya sami yabo gaba daya.
Wallafa Op. 10 Études.
Ya shiga Bikin Kida na Lower Rhenish tare da Hiller, inda ya hadu da Felix Mendelssohn.
Ya tafi Karlovy Vary don zama tare da iyayensa a karon karshe.
Ya sami zama dan kasar Faransa (citizenship).
Ya hadu da George Sand a wajen taron da Marie d'Agoult ta shirya.
Ya zauna tare da dangin Wodziński a Marienbad da Dresden, kuma ya nemi auren Maria.
Ya ziyarci London a asirce tare da mai kera piano Camille Pleyel.
Wallafa Op. 25 Études.
Ya zama masoyi na George Sand.
Ya shafe lokacin hunturu a tsibirin Majorca tare da Sand.
Wallafa Preludes Op. 28.
Tsara Piano Sonata No. 2, Op. 35.
Ya tafi gidansa Sand da ke Nohant don shafe lokacin rani.
Bayyanarsa ta karshe a fili tare da Liszt.
Ya rubuta wasika ga Grzymała game da lalacewar lafiyarsa bayan baje kolinsa na Paris.
Tsara Piano Sonata No. 3, Op. 58.
Dangantakar Sand da Chopin ta lalace.
Alakarsu ta zo karshe bayan musayar wasiku masu zafi.
Ya gudanar da baje kolinsa na karshe na Paris tare da mai kade-kaden cello Auguste Franchomme.
Ya tafi London a lokacin Juyin Juya Hali na Paris a shekara ta 1848.
Sarauniya Victoria da Prince Albert sun shiga baje kolinsa na farko na London a Stafford House.
Ya tsara wasiyyarsa ta karshe a Edinburgh.
Ya gudanar da baje kolinsa na karshe a fili a Guildhall, London.
Yayarsa Ludwika ta zo Paris tare da mijinta da diyarta.
Ya rasu yana da shekaru 39 a Paris.
An yi jana'izarsa a Cocin Madeleine da ke Paris.
An kafa kabarin Chopin.
Yayarsa Ludwika ta mayar da zuciyar Chopin zuwa kasar Poland.
Julian Fontana ya wallafa zane-zane na piano 23 wadanda ba a wallafa ba a matsayin Op. 66-73.
An wallafa wakokin Poland guda 17 a cikin Op. 74.
An yi amfani da kade-kaden Chopin a cikin wasan ballet "Chopiniana".
Claude Debussy ya sadaukar da kade-kaden pianonsa (études) ga tunawa da Chopin.
An wallafa sakamakon binciken zuciyar Chopin da aka ajiye a cikin American Journal of Medicine.

keyAchievements.title: Babban mai tsara kida
keyAchievements.description: Ya ci gaba da kasancewa shahararre a duniya saboda basirarsa ta waka wacce ta dogara kan fasaha ta kwarai da babu kamarta a lokacin.

keyAchievements.title: Kwarewa a kade-kaden piano shi kadai
keyAchievements.description: Ya fi tsara kade-kaden piano shi kadai, kuma dukkan ayyukansa da aka sani suna kunshe da piano.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar ballades na kida
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne ya fara kafa ballades na kida a matsayin fannin kida.

keyAchievements.title: Mayar da scherzo ya zama kade-kade na concert
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne ya fara tsara scherzo a matsayin kade-kade na baje koli daban.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa fannin prelude
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa sabon fannin kida ta hanyar tarin preludes dinsa (Op. 28).

keyAchievements.title: Amfani da kyawun waka na études
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi amfani da kyawun waka na concert études a cikin tarin études dinsa guda biyu (Op. 10, Op. 25).

keyAchievements.title: Inganta matsayin mazurkas
keyAchievements.description: Ya sanya mazurka a kan taswirar kade-kaden Turai.

keyAchievements.title: Sabon ma'auni na polonaise
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa sabon ma'auni ga kade-kaden polonaise.

keyAchievements.title: Zurfafa fannin nocturne
keyAchievements.description: Ya daga matsayin nocturne zuwa matakin da ya fi zurfi da daki-daki.

keyAchievements.title: Shigar da ruhin kishin kasa a kida
keyAchievements.description: Ana kimanta shi a matsayin wanda ya shigar da sabon ruhin kishin kasa (nationalism) a kida.

keyAchievements.title: Wanda ya kafa makarantar piano da ta tsara kida
keyAchievements.description: Ana kiran sa da wanda ya kafa makarantar piano da ta tsara kida.

faq.question: Yaushe Chopin ya haifu?
faq.answer: An haifi Frédéric François Chopin a ranar 1 ga Maris, 1810.

faq.question: Menene ainihin sunan Chopin?
faq.answer: Ainihin sunansa shi ne Fryderyk Franciszek Chopin.

faq.question: Don wane kayan kida Chopin ya fi tsara kade-kade?
faq.answer: Chopin ya fi tsara kade-kaden piano shi kadai, kuma dukkan ayyukansa suna kunshe da piano.

faq.question: Baje koli nawa a fili Chopin ya yi a duk rayuwarsa?
faq.answer: Ya gudanar da baje koli a fili kadan wanda bai wuce sau 30 ba a duk rayuwarsa, kuma ya fi son taron sirri na salons.

faq.question: Yaya Chopin ya sami kudin shiga a Paris?
faq.answer: Ya samu kudin shiga ta hanyar sayar da kade-kade da kuma koyar da piano, kuma darussan da ya bayyar sun sami farin jini sosai a lokacin.

faq.question: Wace alaka ce ke tsakanin George Sand da Chopin?
faq.answer: George Sand ta kasance marubuciya ta Faransa kuma masoyiyar Chopin, kuma sun zama masoya a watan Yuli na shekara ta 1838.

faq.question: Yaya alakar Chopin da Franz Liszt take?
faq.answer: Sun kasance abokai da ke girmama juna, amma abotarsu tana da wuyar gaske kuma tana dauke da soyayya da kiyayya a lokaci guda (love-hate relationship).

faq.question: Menene sanadin mutuwar Chopin?
faq.answer: An rubuta a takardar shaidar mutuwarsa ceve ya mutu sakamakon tuberculosis (결핵), amma binciken baya-bayan nan ya nuna cewa yana yiwuwa ya mutu sakamakon pericarditis (심낭염) mai wuya wanda ya taso daga matsalolin tuberculosis na lokaci mai tsawo.

faq.question: A ina aka ajiye zuciyar Chopin?
faq.answer: Likita ya cire zuciyarsa kuma aka ajiye ta a cikin barasa (alcohol) a gilashi, kuma yayarsa Ludwika ta mayar da ita kasar Poland a shekara ta 1850.

faq.question: Shin Chopin ya sanya wa kade-kadensa taken bayani (descriptive titles)?
faq.answer: Ban da wasan kida na jana'iza (Funeral March), bai taba sanya wa kade-kaden kida suna ba ban da fannin kida da lamba.

timeline.event: 에도 가쓰시카 지구의 한 장인 가정에서 출생 (아명: 도키타로)
Ya fara zane tun yana da shekaru 6.
Ya yi aiki a dakin sayar da littattafai da dakin karatu (lending library) yana da shekaru 12.
Ya yi aiki a matsayin dalibi (apprentice) na mai zane a kan katako (woodblock engraver) yana da shekaru 14.
Ya shiga shagon zane na Katsukawa Shunshō yana da shekaru 18.
Ya karbi sunan Shunrō daga malaminsa kuma ya wallafa zane na farko (woodblock print) na masu wasan kwaikwayo na Kabuki.
《에도 료고쿠 다리의 저녁 납량 불꽃놀이》를 제작함
Mutuwar malaminsa Katsukawa Shunshō.
Aure na biyu.
Ya mika sunan Tawaraya Sōri ga dalibinsa kuma ya fara aiki a matsayin mai zane mai zaman kansa, inda ya yi amfani da sunan 'Hokusai Tomisa'.
'가쓰시카 호쿠사이'라는 이름 사용 시작, 풍경화집 《동도명소》와 《에도 8경》을 발표하고 제자를 받기 시작함
Ya zana babban hoton Daruma (Daruma-zu) na kusa murabba'in mita 200 a lokacin bikin Edo.
Ya yi aiki tare da shahararren marubuci Kyokutei Bakin don samar da littattafai masu hotuna (illustrated novels).
Ya kera hotuna na littafin almara "Strange Tales of the Crescent Moon".
Ya canza sunansa zuwa Taito yana da shekaru 51, kuma ya fara kera "Hokusai Manga" da kuma e-tehon (littattafan koyar da zane) daban-daban.
Ya kera "Quick Guide to Simplified Drawing" (간단한 그림 그리기 입문).
An wallafa juzu'i na farko na "Hokusai Manga" kuma ya sami babban nasara.
Ya zana babban hoton Daruma a wajen Honganji Nagoya Betsuin da ke Nagoya.
Ya canza sunansa zuwa Iitsu kuma ya fara samun babban suna a matsayin mai zane a duk fadin kasar Japan.
Ya samar da babban aikinsa "Thirty-six Views of Mount Fuji".
Ya samar da "Oceans of Wisdom" (시가사진경 / Chie no umi).
Ya fara aiki karkashin sunan 'Gakyō Rōjin Manji' (The Old Man Mad About Painting), kuma ya kera "One Hundred Views of Mount Fuji".
Ya samar da tarin zane-zane na karshe "One Hundred Poems Explained by the Nurse" (백인일수 투바가 에토키).
Gobara ta kona shagon zanensa da yawancin ayyukansa.
Ya ziyarci Obuse da ke lardin Shinano yana da shekaru 83 kuma ya zauna a can na wasu shekaru.
Ya rika zana zakin kasar Sin (Shishi) a kowace safiya a matsayin laya ta korar mummuna.
Ya zana "Dragon in the Smoke of Mount Fuji" da "Tiger in the Snow".
Ya rasu kuma an binne shi a Cocin Seikyō-ji da ke Taito-ku, Tokyo.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da "Thirty-six Views of Mount Fuji"
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami babban suna a ciki da wajen kasa ta hanyar kera tarin ukiyo-e ciki har da shahararren zanen "The Great Wave off Kanagawa".

keyAchievements.title: Fadada jigogin Ukiyo-e
keyAchievements.description: Ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen fadada jigogin ukiyo-e zuwa hotunan kasa, shuke-shuke, da dabbobi, wadanda a baya suka fi mayar da hankali kan kyawawan mata (oiran) da masu wasan kwaikwayo.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyuka masu yawa
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi aiki ba kakkautawa tun daga yarinta har zuwa mutuwarsa, inda ya samar da zane-zane, skeching, woodblock prints, da hotunan littattafai fiye da 30,000.

keyAchievements.title: Tsarin zane mai ban mamaki da fasahar kwatance
keyAchievements.description: Ana daukar sa a matsayin daya dari cikin manyan jarumai a tarihin fasaha saboda tsarin zane mai ban mamaki da fasaharsa ta kwatance ta musamman.

keyAchievements.title: Wallafa "Hokusai Manga"
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera "Hokusai Manga" wanda ke kunshe da dubban zane-zane kuma ya sami babban nasara nan take, sannan aka yi amfani da shi a matsayin littafin koyar da zane.

keyAchievements.title: Gwajin tsarin nisa (perspective) na Yamma
keyAchievements.description: Yana daya dari cikin masu zane na kasar Japan na farko da suka gwada tsarin nisa na Yamma (Western perspective) don nuna zurfi da girma a cikin ayyukansu.

keyAchievements.title: Tasiri a kan fasahar Turai
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi tasiri sosai ga masu zane na Impressionist kamar Vincent van Gogh da Claude Monet a lokacin da salon Japonism ya yadu a Turai a karshen karni na 19.

keyAchievements.title: Kera "One Hundred Views of Mount Fuji"
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera "One Hundred Views of Mount Fuji", wani muhimmin tarin zane na daban wanda ake dauka a matsayin 'babban aikin rayuwarsa na hotunan kasa'.

faq.question: Wane ne Katsushika Hokusai?
faq.answer: Ya kasance mai zane na ukiyo-e da kera woodblock prints na kasar Japan a lokacin Edo, kuma ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen fadada jigogin ukiyo-e zuwa hotunan kasa, shuke-shuke, da dabbobi.

faq.question: Menene aikin Hokusai mafi shahara?
faq.answer: Zanen "The Great Wave off Kanagawa" wanda ke cikin tarin ukiyo-e na "Thirty-six Views of Mount Fuji" shi ne aiki mafi shahara na musamman.

faq.question: Wane tasiri Hokusai ya yi ga fasahar Yamma?
faq.answer: Ya yi tasiri sosai ga masu zane na Impressionist kamar Vincent van Gogh da Claude Monet a lokacin da salon Japonism ya yadu a Turai a karshen karni na 19.

faq.question: Sunaye nawa Hokusai ya yi amfani da su a duk rayuwarsa?
faq.answer: An san cewa ya yi amfani da sunaye akalla 30 a duk rayuwarsa, kuma wannan yana da alaka ta kusa da canje-canjen ayyukansa da kuma salon fasaharsa.

faq.question: Yaushe Hokusai ya rasu?
faq.answer: Ya rasu a ranar 10 ga Mayu, 1849, kuma ya nuna sha'awarsa ta son kera ayyuka mafi kyau har a lokacin mutuwarsa.

timeline.event: An haife ta a Torquay, Devon, Birtaniya.
Ta tafi Paris don koyon waka da piano tana da shekaru 16.
Ta yi aurenta na farko da Kanal Archibald Christie na Royal Flying Corps na Birtaniya.
Ya yi aiki a dakin magani na asibiti (dispensary) a lokacin Yakin Duniya na Farko.
An haifi tilas diyarta Rosalind Hicks.
Ta bace na tsawon kwanaki 10 a ranar 8 ga Disamba, wanda ya janyo hankalin jaridu sosai.
Ta sake aure da masanin kayan tarihi (archaeologist) Max Mallowan.
Ta sami lambar yabo ta Commander of the Order of the British Empire (CBE).
Ta sami lambar yabo ta Dame Commander of the Order of the British Empire (DBE).
Ta rasu tana da shekaru 85.

keyAchievements.title: Shahara a matsayin marubuciyar littattafan triller (detective fiction)
keyAchievements.description: Ta rubuta littattafan triller kusa da 80 wanda ya sa ake kiran ta da 'Sarauniyar Littattafan Triller', kuma ta samar da shahararrun jami'an tsaro Hercule Poirot na Belgium da kuma Jane Marple.

keyAchievements.title: Littattafan da aka sayar a duniya
keyAchievements.description: Ayyukanta sun sayar da fiye da kwafi biliyan 1 a cikin kasashen Turanci, kuma fassarar wasu harsuna 103 suma sun sayar da fiye da kwafi biliyan 1, wanda ya sa aka shigar da ita a cikin Guinness World Records.

keyAchievements.title: Marubuciya da aka fi fassara ayyukanta
keyAchievements.description: Index Translationum ya rubuta ta a matsayin marubuciya da aka fi fassara ayyukanta a duk duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Wasan kwaikwayo da aka fi nuna shi na dogon lokaci
keyAchievements.description: Wasan kwaikwayonta "The Mousetrap" (쥐덫) an nuna shi tun lokacin da aka fara shi a London a shekara ta 1955 har zuwa watan Nuwamba na shekara ta 2012.

faq.question: Menene ainihin sunan Agatha Christie?
faq.answer: Ainihin sunanta shi ne Dame Agatha Christie, Lady Mallowan, DBE.

faq.question: Wane sunan alkalami (pseudonym) Agatha Christie ta yi amfani da shi?
faq.answer: Ta yi amfani da sunan alkalami Mary Westmacott lokacin da take rubuta littattafan soyayya (romance novels).

faq.question: Wace ce shahararriyar jarumar jami'ar tsaro da Agatha Christie ta samar?
faq.answer: Ta samar da shahararren jami'an tsaro Hercule Poirot na Belgium da kuma Jane Marple.

faq.question: Kwafi nawa na ayyukan Agatha Christie aka sayar?
faq.answer: Ayyukanta sun sayar da fiye da kwafi biliyan 1 a cikin kasashen Turanci, kuma fassarar wasu harsuna 103 suma sun sayar da fiye da kwafi biliyan 1, wanda ya sa aka shigar da ita a cikin Guinness World Records.

faq.question: Menene wasan kwaikwayo na Agatha Christie mafi shahara, kuma na tsawon wani lokaci aka nuna shi?
faq.answer: Wasan kwaikwayonta "The Mousetrap" (쥐덫) an nuna shi tun lokacin da aka fara shi a London a shekara ta 1955 har zuwa watan Nuwamba na shekara ta 2012.

timeline.event: Haihuwar Samuel Langhorne Clemens (Mark Twain).
Ya shiga fannin adabi ta hanyar "The Celebrated Jumping Frog of Calaveras County".
Mutuwar Samuel Langhorne Clemens (Mark Twain).

keyAchievements.title: Marubuci na kasar Amurka
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne marubuci na kasar Amurka wanda ya fi shahara da sunan alkalami Mark Twain.

keyAchievements.title: The Adventures of Tom Sawyer
keyAchievements.description: Littafin yara ne wanda ke nuna abubuwan da suka faru da Tom Sawyer da Huckleberry Finn a kusa da Kogin Mississippi.

keyAchievements.title: The Celebrated Jumping Frog
keyAchievements.description: Wannan shi ne aikin da ya sa ya shiga fannin adabi a shekara ta 1865.

keyAchievements.title: The Innocents Abroad
keyAchievements.description: Wannan aiki ne da ya sami far인 jini sosai.

keyAchievements.title: Mississippi Trilogy
keyAchievements.description: Wannan ya kunshi "The Adventures of Tom Sawyer", "Life on the Mississippi", da "Adventures of Huckleberry Finn", kuma yana nuna kyawun ruhin Amurka da na yanci.

keyAchievements.title: Sukar al'umma (Satire)
keyAchievements.description: Ayyuka ne da ke nuna Turai a lokacin zamanin dā (feudalism) kamar "A Connecticut Yankee in King Arthur's Court", "The Prince and the Pauper", da "The Mysterious Stranger".

keyAchievements.title: Sukar fundamentalism na Kiristanci
keyAchievements.description: Ya soki fundamentalism na Kiristanci a kasar Amurka a lokacin ta hanyar wallafa "Letters from the Earth" a karshen rayuwarsa.

keyAchievements.title: 노예제도 비판
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi kokari wajen nuna sabani na 'kasa mai yanci mai dauke da bayi' da kuma gyara shi a karshen rayuwarsa.

faq.question: Menene ainihin sunan Mark Twain?
faq.answer: Ainihin sunan Mark Twain shi ne Samuel Langhorne Clemens.

faq.question: Menene babban aikin Mark Twain?
faq.answer: Babban aikinsa shi ne littafin yara "The Adventures of Tom Sawyer" wanda ke nuna abubuwan da suka faru da Tom Sawyer da Huckleberry Finn a kusa da Kogin Mississippi.

faq.question: Daga ina sunan alkalami na Mark Twain ya fito?
faq.answer: Ya yi amfani da kalmar da ke nuna zurfin ruwa a lokacin da yake aiki a matsayin mai tuka jirgin ruwa a Kogin Mississippi a matsayin sunan alkalami.

faq.question: Wane matsayi na addini Mark Twain ya dauka?
faq.answer: Mark Twain ya kasance dan kungiyar Presbyterian mai ra'ayin ci gaba, amma ya soki fundamentalism na Kiristanci a kasar Amurka a lokacin.

mark-twain.missingDataNote: 가족의 해니벌 이사 시기, 아버지 사망 및 견습공 시작 시기, 금 탐사 시기 등 일부 사건의 정확한 연도가 원문에 명시되지 않아 타임라인에서 생략되었습니다. 또한, 주요 작품들의 출판 연도 정보가 부족하여 포함하지 않았습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Frankfurt am Main, Jamus.
Ya fara shakkar imaninsa sakamakon girgizar kasa ta Lisbon.
Ya fara shakkar imaninsa sakamakon Yakin Shekaru Bakwai (Seven Years' War).
Soyayyarsa da Gretchen ta zo karshe.
Ya yi soyayya da Anna Katharina Schönkopf lokacin da yake karatu a Jami'ar Leipzig.
Ya rubuta wasan kwaikwayonsa na farko "The Lover's Caprice".
Ya samar da jin kai na addini ta hanyar alaka da Susanne von Klettenberg lokacin da yake jiyya a mahaifarsa.
Ya sami digiri na uku a fannin shari'a (doctor of laws) a Jami'ar Strasbourg, ya hadu da Herder don fahimtar ainihin adabi, kuma ya samar da damar motsi na 'Sturm und Drang'.
Ya bude ofishin lauya (advocate).
Ya tafi Kotun Koli na Wetzlar don yin aikin shari'a, inda ya hadu da Charlotte Buff.
Ya wallafa wasan kwaikwayo "Götz von Berlichingen".
Ya wallafa littafin "The Sorrows of Young Werther" (젊은 베르테르의 슬픔).
Ya kulla yarjejeniyar aure da Lili Schönemann amma ya fasa ta jim kadan bayan haka.
Ya isa Weimar bisa gayyatar Karl August, Duke of Saxe-Weimar-Eisenach.
Ya rike ayyukan gwamnati a Weimar na tsawon kusan shekaru 10, inda ya yi aiki a matsayin mai ba da shawara, kwamishina, da kuma shugaban gwamnati.
Ya rubuta wasan kwaikwayo na bakin ciki (tragedy) "Iphigenia in Tauris" (prose version).
Ya rubuta "Torquato Tasso".
Ya ce, "Ni ba mai adawa da Kiristanci ba ne (un-christian), amma ni ba Kirista ba ne (non-christian)."
Ya kafa ra'ayin adabin classicism a lokacin tafiyarsa a Italiya, kuma ya rubuta "Iphigenia in Tauris" (verse version).
Ya yi tafiya zuwa Italiya na tsawon shekara daya da rabi.
Ya wallafa "Egmont".
Ya koma kasar Jamus.
Ya fara zama tare da Christiane Vulpius.
Ya haifi babban dansa Julius August Walther.
An wallafa "Torquato Tasso" a karon farko.
Ya shiga Yakin Coalition na Farko (War of the First Coalition) tare da Duke Karl August, kuma ya shiga Yakin Valmy (Battle of Valmy).
Ya shiga Yakin Mainz (Siege of Mainz).
Ya hadu da Schiller a kan hanyarsa ta dawowa dari taron kimiyyar halitta na Jena, kuma ya fara abotarsu.
Ya rubuta littafin "Wilhelm Meister's Apprenticeship" (빌헬름 마이스터의 수업시대).
Ya rubuta waƙar labari "Hermann and Dorothea".
Ya shiga cikin kaduwa sosai sakamakon mutuwar Schiller.
Ya kammala kashi na farko na "Faust".
Ya kammala "Theory of Colors" (색채론).
Ya rubuta "Italian Journey".
Ya rubuta "West-östlicher Divan".
Ya kammala "Wilhelm Meister's Journeyman Years".
Ya rubuta "Marienbad Elegy".
Ya rubuta "Second Roman Stay".
Ya kammala kashi na biyu na "Faust".
Ya rasu.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar ayyukan adabi
keyAchievements.description: Ya kammala adabin classicism na kasar Jamus ta hanyar samar da ayyukan adabi daban-daban kamar "The Sorrows of Young Werther", "Wilhelm Meister's Apprenticeship", da "Faust".

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Weimar a matsayin cibiyar al'ada
keyAchievements.description: Ya koma Weimar a shekara ta 1775 kuma ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kafa wannan birnin a matsayin cibiyar al'ada.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyuka a matsayin mai kula da gwamnati da kimiyya
keyAchievements.description: Ya shiga cikin ayyukan kasa ta hanyar rike mukamin minista a Weimar, kuma ya bar manyan ayyuka a fannin kimiyyar halitta kamar botany, anatomy, mineralogy, geology, da kuma theory of colors.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa adabin classicism na kasar Jamus
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa ra'ayin adabin classicism a lokacin tafiyarsa a Italiya, kuma ya hadu da Schiller don bunkasa classicism na Weimar.

keyAchievements.title: Shugaban gidan wasan kwaikwayo na masarauta (Court Theatre)
keyAchievements.description: Ya rike matsayi na shugaban Court Theatre, inda ya taimaka wajen kafa wasan kwaikwayo a matakin duniya ta hanyar gudanarwa, tsara wasa, da kuma koyar da 'yan wasa.

faq.question: Wane ne Goethe?
faq.answer: Ya kasance marubuci mai ra'ayin classicism, masanin falsafa, da kuma masanin kimiyya na kasar Jamus, kuma ya rike mukamin minista a Weimar.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan ayyukan Goethe?
faq.answer: Manyan ayyukansa sun hada da "The Sorrows of Young Werther", "Wilhelm Meister's Apprenticeship", da "Faust".

faq.question: Wane matsayi na addini Goethe ya dauka?
faq.answer: An haife shi a cikin iyalin Lutheran, amma ya fara shakkar imaninsa sakamakon girgizar kasa ta Lisbon da kuma Yakin Shekaru Bakwai, kuma ya cura kansa 'non-christian'.

faq.question: Wace rawa Goethe ya taka a Weimar?
faq.answer: Ya koma Weimar a shekara ta 1775 kuma ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kafa wannan birnin a matsayin cibiyar al'ada, kuma ya shiga ayyukan kasa a matsayin mai kula da gwamnati.

timeline.event: Haihuwar Mary Wollstonecraft Shelley.
Ta rasa mahaifiyarta bayan kwanaki 11 da haihuwarta.
Ta fara soyayya da Percy Bysshe Shelley, daya dari cikin masu goyon bayan siyasa na mahaifinta.
Ta sami ra'ayin littafin "Frankenstein" lokacin da ta shafe lokacin rani tare da Lord Byron da John William Polidori a kusa da Geneva, Switzerland.
Ta auri Percy Bysshe Shelley bayan mutuwar matarsa Harriet ta hanyar kashe kansa.
Ma'auratan Shelley sun bar Birtaniya zuwa Italiya.
Wallafa littafin "Frankenstein; or, The Modern Prometheus".
Mijinta Percy Bysshe Shelley ya nutse a cikin ruwa sakamakon nutsewar jirginsa a lokacin guguwa a kusa da Viareggio.
Ta koma kasar Birtaniya.
Wallafa littafin tarihi "Valperga".
Wallafa littafin "The Last Man".
Ta rubuta labaran rayuwar mutane don "Cabinet Cyclopaedia" na Dionysius Lardner.
Wallafa littafin tarihi "Perkin Warbeck".
Wallafa littafin "Lodore".
Wallafa littafin "Falkner".
Wallafa littafin tafiya "Rambles in Germany and Italy".
Ta rasu sakamakon abin da ake zargin ciwon daji na kwakwalwa ne (brain tumor).

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "Frankenstein"
keyAchievements.description: Ta rubuta littafin gothic "Frankenstein; or, The Modern Prometheus" (1818), wanda ake dauka a matsayin aikin farko na kimiyyar almara (science fiction).

keyAchievements.title: Shirya da gabatar da ayyukan mijinta
keyAchievements.description: Ta shirya kuma ya gabatar da ayyukan mijinta Percy Bysshe Shelley, mawaƙi mai ra'ayin Romanticism da kuma masanin falsafa.

faq.question: Da wane aiki aka fi sanin Mary Shelley?
faq.answer: Har zuwa shekarun 1970, an fi sanin ta da littafinta "Frankenstein" da kuma kokarinta na wallafa ayyukan mijinta.

faq.question: Wane ne iyayen Mary Shelley?
faq.answer: Mahaifinta shi ne William Godwin, masanin falsafar siyasa, kuma mahaifiyarta ita ce Mary Wollstonecraft, masaniyar falsafa da kuma mai kare hakkin mata.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan jigogi a cikin ayyukan Mary Shelley?
faq.answer: Ayyukanta suna yawan nuna cewa hadin kai da tausayi, musamman wanda mata ke yi a cikin iyali, sune hanyoyin gyara al'umma.

mary-shelley.missingDataNote: 메리 셸리의 아버지가 메리 제인 클레어몬트와 결혼한 연도는 원문에 명시되지 않아 생략되었습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a York House kusa da Strand, London.
Ya shiga Trinity College, Cambridge.
Ya fara aikinsa na lauya ta hanyar shiga Gray's Inn.
Ya dawo gida bayan rasuwar mahaifinsa.
An zabe shi a matsayin memba na majalisa na mazabar Bossiney, Cornwall.
Ya zama barrister na wucin gadi.
Ya zama Bencher na Gray's Inn.
An zabe shi a matsayin mai ba da darussan shari'a (Reader).
Ya zama clerk na Star Chamber.
Ya yi aiki a matsayin mai ba da shawara a asirce ga Robert Devereux, Earl of Essex.
Ya rubuta "Observations upon a Libel" don kalubalantar Robert Parsons na Jesuit.
An zabe shi a matsayin memba na majalisa na Middlesex.
Elizabeth I ta nada shi a matsayin mai ba da shawara kan shari'a na masarauta (Queen's Counsel).
An kama shi saboda rashin biyan bashi.
Ya shiga cikin shari'ar cin amanar kasa ta Earl of Essex.
Ya sami taken knighthood (knight).
Ya auri Alice Barnham, diyar Saint Albans.
Ya wallafa "The Advancement of Learning".
Ya sami mukamin Solicitor General.
Ya fara aiki a matsayin clerk na Star Chamber a hukumance.
Ya zama Attorney General.
Ya tuhumi Robert Carr, Earl of Somerset da matarsa Frances Howard da laifin kisan kai kuma ya sa aka same su da laifi.
An nada shi a matsayin mai kula da mulki na wucin gadi na wata guda.
An nada shi matsayin Lord Chancellor kuma ya zama Baron Verulam.
Ya wallafa "Novum Organum".
An daukaka shi zuwa Viscount St Alban.
Majalisa ta tsige shi bisa zargin karbar hanci, inda aka soke dukkan mukamansa da takenshi.
Ya rasu sakamakon ciwon huhu (pneumonia).

keyAchievements.title: Samar da harsashi ga modern empiricism da scientific revolution
keyAchievements.description: Ya binciki falsafar halitta kuma ya jagoranci ci gaban hanyoyin kimiyya don samar da harsashin scientific revolution a nan gaba, kuma ana daukar sa tare da Descartes a matsayin wanda ya bude falsafar zamani.

keyAchievements.title: Nuna ra'ayin empiricism da rubuta "Novum Organum"
keyAchievements.description: Ya nuna ra'ayin empiricism cewa ana iya gano ainihin yanayi ta hanyar inductive reasoning, ya soki hanyar Aristotle, kuma ya rubuta "Novum Organum" wanda ya kafa empiricism.

keyAchievements.title: Wallafa "The Advancement of Learning"
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara tsarin ilimi a cikin "The Advancement of Learning" kuma ya bayyana mahimmancin lura na inductive don neman gaskiya a nan gaba.

keyAchievements.title: Shahararriyar magana "Ilimi shi ne karfi"
keyAchievements.description: An san shi sosai da kalmar "Ilimi shi ne karfi" (scientia est potentia).

keyAchievements.title: Shawarar tsarin rarraba littattafai na dakin karatu
keyAchievements.description: Ya taimaka wa dakunan karatu kuma ya ba da shawarar tsarin rarraba littattafai zuwa kashi uku: tarihi, waka, da falsafa.

keyAchievements.title: Jagoran dokar hadin kan masarauta (Union of the Crowns)
keyAchievements.description: An kiyasta shi a matsayin jagoran dokar hadin kan masarauta wanda ya nemi hadewar Scotland kuma ya zama harsashin kafa Masarautar Great Britain a nan gaba.

faq.question: Yaya ake auna Francis Bacon?
faq.answer: Ana daukar sa a matsayin wanda ya kafa modern empiricism kuma tare da Descartes ya kaddamar da falsafar zamani, sannan ya jagoranci ci gaban hanyoyin kimiyya don kafa harsashin scientific revolution.

faq.question: Menene babban ra'ayin falsafa na Francis Bacon?
faq.answer: Ya nuna ra'ayin empiricism cewa ana iya gano ainihin yanayi ta hanyar inductive reasoning, kuma ya gabatar da hanyar samun gaskiya ta hanyar lura da gwaji mai kyau ba tare da son zuciya ba.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan littattafan Francis Bacon?
faq.answer: Manyan littattafansa sun hada da "Novum Organum" wanda ya kaddamar da empiricism, da kuma "The Advancement of Learning" wanda ya tsara tsarin ilimi da nuna mahimmancin lura na inductive.

faq.question: Wace shahararriyar kalma Francis Bacon ya fada?
faq.answer: An san shi sosai da kalmar "Ilimi shi ne karfi" (scientia est potentia).

faq.question: Wadanne mukaman gwamnati Francis Bacon ya rike?
faq.answer: Ya yi aiki a matsayin Attorney General da Lord Chancellor na kasar Birtaniya a lokacin James I, kuma a lokacin Lord Chancellor ya kasance yana gudanar da aikin firaminista.

francis-bacon.missingDataNote: 원문에서 앨리스 번햄과의 결혼 시기가 1604년과 1606년으로 두 차례 언급되어 있으나, '세인트알반스 여자작 엘리스 반햄과 결혼하여 명실상부한 귀족이 되었다'는 구체적인 내용과 함께 제시된 1604년을 채택했습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a 83 Beals Street, Brookline, Massachusetts, Amurka a ranar 29 ga Mayu.
Ya karanci alakar kasa da kasa (international relations) a Jami'ar Harvard kuma ya kammala karatu da sakamako mai kyau (cum laude).
Ya fara aiki a matsayin memba na Majalisar Wakilai ta Amurka (House of Representatives).
Ya fara aiki a matsayin memba na Majalisar Dattijai ta Amurka (Senate).
An zabe shi a matsayin shugaban kasa mafi karancin shekaru a tarihin Amurka bayan ya doke Richard Nixon, dan takarar jam'iyyar Republican, a zaben shugaban kasa.
Ya fara gudanar da aikin shugaban kasa tun ranar 20 ga Janairu.
Ya kaddamar da Peace Corps na Amurka ta hanyar umarnin shugaban kasa (executive order) a watan Maris.
Harin Bay of Pigs na 'yan gudun hijira na Cuba a ranar 17 ga Afrilu ya kare da rashin nasara.
Ya kafa U.S. Military Assistance Command, Vietnam (MACV) karkashin jagorancin Paul Harkins a babban birnin Saigon a watan Fabrairu.
Majalisa ta amince da kudurin fadada kasuwanci (Trade Expansion Act) na Kennedy a watan Satumba.
Rikicin makaman linzami na Cuba (Cuban Missile Crisis) ya barke bayan da Amurka ta gano cewa Tarayyar Soviet tana kafa makaman linzami a Cuba a watan Oktoba.
Ya ziyarci Berlin ta Yamma a ranar 26 ga Yuni kuma ya yi jawabi yana sukar tsarin gurguzu (communism).
Lee Harvey Oswald ya kashe shi a Dallas a ranar 22 ga Nuwamba.

keyAchievements.title: Yarjejeniyar hana gwajin makaman nukiliya
keyAchievements.description: Ya shawo kan rikicin Berlin a Turai da rikicin makaman linzami na Cuba a Caribbean, kuma ya cimma yarjejeniyar hana gwajin makaman nukiliya (Partial Test Ban Treaty).

keyAchievements.title: Nuna ra'ayin New Frontier
keyAchievements.description: Ya nuna sabon ruhin jagoranci 'New Frontier' a cikin jawabin karbar takarar shugaban kasa na jam'iyyar Democratic ta Amurka.

keyAchievements.title: Kaddamar da Peace Corps
keyAchievements.description: Ya kaddamar da Peace Corps ta hanyar umarnin shugaban kasa a watan Maris na shekara ta 1961 don tura dubban 'yan Amurka zuwa kasashe masu tasowa don inganta yanayin rayuwarsu.

keyAchievements.title: Magance rikicin makaman linzami na Cuba
keyAchievements.description: Ya magance rikicin ta hanyar ba wa rundunar sojan ruwa umarnin killace (blockade) Cuba sakamakon kafa makaman linzami na Tarayyar Soviet a can.

keyAchievements.title: Karfafa manufar shiga Yakin Vietnam
keyAchievements.description: Ya kara yawan masu ba da shawarar soja na Amurka a Kudancin Vietnam don kare gwamnatin Ngo Dinh Diem kuma ya kafa MACV.

keyAchievements.title: Kokarin aiwatar da ikon buga kudi
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi kokarin sauya tsohon banki zuwa sabon bankin kasa mai ikon tsara da buga kudi a karkashin tsarin mulki don tabbatar da harsashin kudin shiga na kasa.

faq.question: Shugaban kasa na nawa Kennedy ya kasance a Amurka?
faq.answer: John F. Kennedy ya kasance shugaban kasa na 35 na Amurka.

faq.question: Yaushe aka kashe John F. Kennedy?
faq.answer: An kashe John F. Kennedy a Dallas a ranar 22 ga Nuwamba, 1963 ta hannun Lee Harvey Oswald.

faq.question: Menene daya dari cikin manyan manufofin John F. Kennedy?
faq.answer: Daya dari cikin manyan manufofinsa ita ce nuna sabon ruhin jagoranci 'New Frontier'.

faq.question: Wane addini John F. Kennedy yake bi?
faq.answer: John F. Kennedy ya kasance Kiristan Roman Catholic guda daya tilo a cikin shugabannin kasar Amurka na lokacin.

faq.question: Wadanne manyan rikice-rikice na kasa da kasa suka faru lokacin mulkin John F. Kennedy?
faq.answer: Lokacin mulkinsa, abubuwa da dama sun faru kamar harin Bay of Pigs, rikicin makaman linzami na Cuba, da ginin katangar Berlin (Berlin Wall).

faq.question: Shin John F. Kennedy ne kadai shugaban kasa da ya karya al'adar Ohio (Ohio jinx)?
faq.answer: E, shi ne kadai shugaban kasa da ya karya 'Ohio jinx' ta hanyar samun nasara a zaben shugaban kasa duk da cewa bai samu kuri'un masu zabe na jihar Ohio ba.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin babban dan An Tae-hun da Jo Maria a Gwangseok-dong, Haeju-bu, Hwanghae-do.
Ya auri Kim A-ryeo kuma ya hadu da Kim Gu a karon farko.
Mahaifinsa An Tae-hun ya shiga addinin Katolika.
Ya shiga addinin Katolika yana da shekaru 19 kuma ya sami sunan baftisma Thomas.
Gudanar da ayyukan yada addinin Katolika da kuma neman kafa jami'ar Katolika.
An sami sabani a tsakanin mahaifinsa An Tae-hun da wani likita na Qing Dynasty Seo Won-hun.
Shi da wasu mutane kusan 10 ciki har da Lee Yong-il sun lakada wa Seo Won-hun duka.
Ya tafi Shanghai don gudanar da yunkurin dawo da ikon kasa baada ya ji labarin sanya hannu kan Yarjejeniyar Eulsa (을사늑약), amma ya dawo bayan an ki taimaka masa; mahaifinsa An Tae-hun ya rasu.
Bayan ya koma Jinnampo, Pyongan-namdo, ya gudanar da kamfanin gawayi sannan ya rufe shi, kuma ya kafa Makarantar Samheung don fara yunkurin ilimi.

Ya karbi Makarantar Doneui da ke Nampo kuma ya yi aiki a matsayin malami; an nada shi shugaban reshen Gwanseo na Kungiyar Biyan Bashin Kasa (국채보상운동); ya tafi Maritime Province (Primorsky Krai) don shiga rundunar mayakan sa-kai (Righteous Army).
Ya gudu zuwa Manchuria baada an rushe rundunar sojan Masarautar Korea (Korean Empire).

Karkashin jagorancin Ahn Je-deok, a matsayinsa na laftanar janar na rundunar sojan Korea da kuma shugaban yancin kai na musamman, ya jagoranci mayaka kusan 100 tare da Eom In-seop don tsallake Kogin Tumen zuwa cikin gida kuma suka kai farmaki na bazata ga dakarun sojan Japan.
Ya kafa kungiyar Dongui Danjihoe tare da abokan gwagwarmaya 11, inda ya yanke yatsansa na hagu don rubuta alkawarin yancin kai da jini.
Ya bar Vladivostok ya koma Harbin.
Ya harbe Ito Hirobumi ya kashe shi a Harbin, kuma sojojin Rasha suka kama shi.
Kotun gundumar Kwantung Leased Territory a Lushun ta yanke masa hukuncin kisa.
Ya hadu da shugaban kotun koli kuma ya shigar da korafi game da yadaan aka binciki ayyukansa na shugaban mayakan sa-kai a matsayin mai kisan kai.
Ya yi ikirarin zunubi (confession) ga uban coci Joseph Wilhelm.
Ya halarci mass na karshe karkashin jagorancin uban coci Wilhelm.
An dage ranar zartar da hukuncin kisa, kuma ya bar sakon karshe ga kanne dinsa guda biyu.
An zartar da hukuncin kisa da misalin karfe 10 na safe yana da shekaru 32.
An ba shi lambar yabo ta Order of Merit for National Foundation (Republic of Korea Medal) baada mutuwarsa.

keyAchievements.title: Kashe Ito Hirobumi
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da gudunmawa ga yunkurin yancin kai na yaki da Japan ta hanyar harbe dan siyasar Japan Ito Hirobumi a Harbin a ranar 26 ga Oktoba, 1909.

keyAchievements.title: Yunkurin Ilimi
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi kokari wajen dawo da ikon kasa ta hanyar ilimi ta hanyar kafa Makarantar Samheung da kuma karbar Makarantar Doneui da ke Nampo.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan mayakan sa-kai
keyAchievements.description: Ya tafi Maritime Province a shekara ta 1907 don shiga yunkurin mayakan sa-kai, kuma ya yi yaki da dakarun Japan a matsayin laftanar janar na sojan Korea a shekara ta 1908.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Dongui Danjihoe
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa kungiyar Dongui Danjihoe tare da abokan gwagwarmaya 11 a shekara ta 1909, inda ya yanke yatsansa na hagu don nuna kudurin yancin kai da jini.

keyAchievements.title: 저술 활동
keyAchievements.description: Ya bar gadon tunani ta hanyar rubuta littafinsa na falsafa da bai kammala ba "On Peace in East Asia" (동양 평화론) da kuma tarihin rayuwarsa "The History of An Eung-chil" a cikin kurkuku.

keyAchievements.title: Barin rubuce-rubucen hannu (calligraphy)
keyAchievements.description: Ya bar rubuce-rubucen hannu da dama lokacin da yake tsare a kurkukun Lushun, kuma an ayyana wasu dari cikinsu a matsayin kayan tarihi na kasa (Treasure).

faq.question: Yaushe kuma a ina aka haifi An Jung-geun?
faq.answer: An haifi An Jung-geun a ranar 2 ga Satumba, 1879 a matsayin babban dan An Tae-hun da Jo Maria a Gwangseok-dong, Haeju-bu, Hwanghae-do.

faq.question: Wane ne An Jung-geun ya kashe?
faq.answer: An Jung-geun ya harbe dan siyasar Japan Ito Hirobumi ya kashe shi a Harbin a ranar 26 ga Oktoba, 1909.

faq.question: Me yasa An Jung-geun ya kashe Ito Hirobumi?
faq.answer: An Jung-geun ya kashe Ito Hirobumi ne saboda ya tabbatar da cewa ya aikata laifuka 15 kamar kisan gillar da aka yi wa Sarauniya Min (Empress Myeongseong), sanya hannu kan Yarjejeniyar Eulsa, da kuma sauke Sarki Gojong dari kan mulki.

faq.question: Yaushe aka kashe An Jung-geun ta hanyar hukunci?
faq.answer: An kashe An Jung-geun a ranar 26 ga Maris, 1910 baada ya kashe Ito Hirobumi.

faq.question: A ina gawar An Jung-geun take?
faq.answer: An binne gawar An Jung-geun a makabartar fursunoni na kusa da kurkukun Lushun, amma har yanzu ba a gano ainihin wurin da take ba.

faq.question: Menene babban littafin An Jung-geun?
faq.answer: An Jung-geun ya rubuta "On Peace in East Asia" da kuma tarihin rayuwarsa "The History of An Eung-chil" a cikin kurkuku.

faq.question: Menene sunan baftisma na An Jung-geun?
faq.answer: Sunan baftisma na An Jung-geun shi ne Thomas (Toma).

timeline.event: An haife shi a Majae, Chobu-myeon, Gwangju-bu, Gyeonggi-do.
Bayan mahaifinsa Jeong Jae-won ya bar mukaminsa na gwamnati ya koma kauye, ya sanya wa Jeong Yak-yong sunan yarinta Gwinong (komawa aikin gona).
Ya auri diyar hafsan soja Hong Hwa-bo, wacce ta fito dari gidan Pungsan Hong.
Mahaifinsa Jeong Jae-won ya zama jami'in ma'aikatar kudi (Hojo Jwarang) don hivyo ya yi hayar gida a Seoul, inda ya hadu da Lee Ga-hwan da Lee Seung-hun.
Ya shiga taron koyon addinin Yamma (Western learning) a Jueosa da Cheonjinam da ke Yangju, Gyeonggi-do, karkashin jagorancin Kwon Cheol-shin.
Ya wuce jarrabawar gwamnati (Junggwangsi) don bikin nada Yarima mai jiran gado, kuma ya zama Saengwon.
Ya sami bayani game da koyarwar addinin Katolika dari Yi Byeok, kanin matar yayansa Jeong Yak-hyeon.
An sami lamarin Myeongryebang inda aka gano kungiyar Myeongryebang da Lee Seung-hun ke jagoranta kuma aka kai su ma'aikatar shari'a (Hyeongjo).
Sarki Jeongjo ya ayyana addinin Katolika a matsayin addinin karya (heresy) kuma ya kaddamar da dokar hana shi, sannan aka ba da umarnin bincikawa da kona littattafan Yamma da ke da alaka da Katolika.
Ya wuce babban jarrabawar gwamnati (Daegwa) yana da shekaru 27 kuma ya shiga aikin gwamnati.
Samakon lamarin Jinsan inda Yun Ji-chung ya gudanar da jana'izar mahaifiyarsa ta hanyar Katolika a Jinsan, Jeolla-do, an kora shi zuwa Haemi, Seosan, amma aka sake shi baada kwanaki 11.
Ya shiga cikin tsara katangar Hwaseong ta Suwon kuma ya yi amfani da na'urar Geojunggi (pulley system).
Mahaifinsa Jeong Jae-won ya rasu.
Ya ba da darussa a Seongkyunkwan kuma ya zagaya Yeoncheon da Saknyeong a matsayin kwamishina na asirce (Amhaeng-eosa) na Gyeonggi-do.
An rage masa matsayi zuwa Geumjeong Chalbang sakamakon lamarin tsanantawa na Eulmyo (Eulmyo Persecution).
Samakon zargin da Park Jang-seol ya yi, an rage wa Lee Seung-hun matsayi zuwa Yesan, Lee Ga-hwan zuwa gwamnan Chungju (Chungju Moksa), kuma Jeong Yak-yong zuwa Geumjeong Chalbang a Hongju.
Ya gabatar da takardar bayani (Jamyeongso) kuma ya yi murabus lokacin da aka tuhumi yayansa Jeong Yak-jeon yayin da yake rike da mukamin Hyeongjo Chamui.
Ya koma Seoul baada ya ji labarin rasuwar Sarki Jeongjo lokacin da yake zaune a kauye.

timeline.year: 10 ga watan farko na kalandar gargajiya, 1801
timeline.event: Sarauniya Jeongsun ta kaddamar da dokar murkushe addinin Katolika kuma ta fara kawar da mambobin kungiyar Namin.
An kama shi kuma aka tsare shi a kurkuku, amma diga baya aka rage masa hukunci zuwa gudun hijira (exile) sannan aka sake shi.
Ya fara rayuwar gudun hijira ta tsawon shekaru 18 a wurare kamar Janggi a Gyeongsang-do da Gangjin a Jeolla-do.
Dansa Jeong Nong-jang ya rasu sakamakon ciwon agana (smallpox).
An sake shi dari gudun hijira kuma ya zama Seungji.
Ya koma mahaifarsa.
Ya kera ra'ayin Jeongjeonron don gyara rashin daidaiton filaye lokacin da yake gudun hijira a Gangjin-gun, Jeolla-do.
Ya rasu a gidansa da ke Mahyeon-ri.
An ba shi mukamin Kyujanggak Jehak baada mutuwarsa kuma aka ba shi sunan girmamawa 'Mundo'.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuce-rubuce masu tarin yawa
keyAchievements.description: An san shi a matsayin mutumin da ya fi kowa rubuta littattafai tun da aka kera haruffan Sinanci (Hanja), inda ya rubuta littattafai fiye da 500.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "Mongmin Simseo"
keyAchievements.description: Littafi ne da ke nuna ka'idoji da tunanin da gwamnonin gida (local magistrates) ya kamata su kasance da su don kula da jama'a.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "Heungheung Shinseo"
keyAchievements.description: 곡산부사 재직 시 실제 수사했던 사건들을 바탕으로 판결과 형벌 및 치옥에 대한 주의와 규범을 적은 책입니다.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "Gyeongse Yupyo"
keyAchievements.description: Littafi ne da ke tattaunawa da gabatar da tsarin dokoki da tsare-tsare masu dacewa don gudanar da kasa.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "Magwa Hwaitong"
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta littafin maganin kyanda (measles) "Magwa Hwaitong" bisa ga littafin "Majingibang" na Lee Heon-gil, wanda ya ceci rayukan mutanen Joseon da dama.

keyAchievements.title: Kera Geojunggi
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera na'urar juyi (pulley block) bisa ga ka'idar dagawa kuma ya kera tare da amfani da Geojunggi lokacin gina katangar Hwaseong ta Suwon.

keyAchievements.title: Hadakar Silhak (Practical Learning)
keyAchievements.description: Ya hada ra'ayoyin Silhak wadanda suka fito dari Yu Hyeong-won da Seongho Yi Ik a jikinsa.

keyAchievements.title: Kera ra'ayin Jeongjeonron
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera ra'ayin Jeongjeonron don gyara rashin daidaiton filaye ta hanyar raba filaye kyauta, aiki tare, da rarraba abubuwan da aka samu tare.

keyAchievements.title: Zaba a matsayin UNESCO Historic Figure
keyAchievements.description: An zabe shi a matsayin UNESCO Historic Figure a shekara ta 2012 don bikin cikar shekaru 250 da haihuwarsa.

faq.question: Yaushe Jeong Yak-yong ya haifu kuma yaushe ya rasu?
faq.answer: An haifi Jeong Yak-yong a ranar 5 ga Agusta, 1762, kuma ya rasu a ranar 7 ga Afrilu, 1836.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan littattafan Jeong Yak-yong?
faq.answer: Manyan littattafan Jeong Yak-yong guda uku sune "Mongmin Simseo", "Heungheung Shinseo", da "Gyeongse Yupyo".

faq.question: Wace alaka ce ke tsakanin Jeong Yak-yong da Katolika?
faq.answer: Jeong Yak-yong ya taba nuna sha'awa ga addinin Katolika amma ya bar shi baada tsanantawar Sinhae (1791), kuma ya rika shiga cikin ayyukan kama mambobin Katolika a lokacin tsanantawar Shinyu (1801).

faq.question: Menene Jeong Yak-yong ya yi a lokacin gudun hijirarsa?
faq.answer: Jeong Yak-yong ya rubuta manyan littattafai kamar "Mongmin Simseo" da "Gyeongse Yupyo" a lokacin gudun hijirarsa na tsawon shekaru 18.

faq.question: Yaya Jeong Yak-yong ya taimaka wajen gina katangar Hwaseong ta Suwon?
faq.answer: Ya kera na'urar juyi bisa ga ka'idar dagawa kuma ya kera tare da amfani da Geojunggi lokacin gina katangar Hwaseong ta Suwon.

faq.question: Menene ra'ayin Jeong Yak-yong ya nufa?
faq.answer: Jeong Yak-yong ya kafa Silhak don gudanar da kasa, ya nemi gyara ka'idojin da suka karkace ta hanyar komawa ga ainihin koyarwar Confucius da Mencius, kuma ya nufi kafa kasa mai jin dadin jama'a da ke kula da masu rauni a tattalin arziki da al'umma.

faq.question: Shin an zabe ga Jeong Yak-yong a matsayin UNESCO Historic Figure?
faq.answer: E, an zabe shi a matsayin UNESCO Historic Figure a shekara ta 2012, lokacin cikar shekaru 250 da haihuwarsa.

timeline.event: Haihuwa (Kiyasi)
Mutuwa (Kiyasi)

keyAchievements.title: Bunkasa ra'ayoyin Confucius
keyAchievements.description: Ya ci gaba da bunkasa ra'ayoyin Confucius kuma ya yi tasiri sosai ga rarraba addinin Confucianism ga al'ummomi na gaba.

keyAchievements.title: Littafin "Mencius"
keyAchievements.description: Akwai littafin "Mencius" wanda ke kunshe da ra'ayoyin Mencius, kuma ana daukar sa a matsayin wanda dalibansa suka rubuta.

keyAchievements.title: Nuna ra'ayin cewa mutum yana da kyawun asali (성선설)
keyAchievements.description: Ya nuna ra'ayin cewa mutum yana da kyawun asali (Innate Goodness), kuma ya kalli cewa zuciyar dan adam tana da tushe na kyawawan dabi'u guda hudu (benevolence, righteousness, propriety, wisdom).

keyAchievements.title: Nuna ra'ayin mulkin jin kai (benevolent government) da mulkin sarki na kwarai (kingly way)
keyAchievements.description: Ya zagaya duniya baada yana da shekaru 40 yana nuna ra'ayin mulkin jin kai da mulkin sarki na kwarai.

keyAchievements.title: Nuna ra'ayin Siduan (사단설)
keyAchievements.description: Ya bayyana cewa zuciyar dan adam tana da sassa hudu: tausayi (측은지심), kunya da kiyayyar mummuna (수오지심), girmamawa da sallamawa (사양지심), da kuma gane gaskiya da karya (시비지심).

keyAchievements.title: Nuna ra'ayin Wulun (오륜설)
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da tsarin alakar dan adam guda biyar (Wulun): soyayya a tsakanin uba da da, adalci a tsakanin sarki da talaka, banbanci a tsakanin miji da mata, tsari a tsakanin babba da yaro, da kuma amana a tsakanin abokai.

keyAchievements.title: Tabbatar da ra'ayin juyin mulki na canza daular (역성혁명)
keyAchievements.description: Ya tabbatar da ra'ayin juyin mulki na canza daular, wanto ke cewa sarkin da ya ci amanar jama'a kuma ya saba wa kyawun dabi'u ba komai ba ne face talaka talakawa, kuma yaki da irin wannan sarki ba cin amana ba ne.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da ra'ayin tarihin zagaye (cyclical view of history)
keyAchievements.description: Ya nemi tabbatar da adalcin Confucius bisa ga ra'ayin tarihin zagaye wando ke cewa mutumin kwarai (sage) yana bayyana a kowace shekaru 500.

faq.question: Shin labarin mahaifiyar Mencius ta canza gida sau uku gaskiya ne?
faq.answer: Labarin mahaifiyar Mencius ta canza gida sau uku (맹모삼천지교) ya bayyana ne a cikin littafin "Biographies of Exemplary Women" (열녀전) na masanin Han Dynasty Liu Xiang, kuma mafi yawan masana sun yarda cewa yana da wuya ya zama gaskiya.

faq.question: A wajen wane ne Mencius ya koyi ilimi?
faq.answer: Mencius ya koyi Littattafai Guda Shida (Six Classics) a karkashin shugabancin Zisi, jikan Confucius.

faq.question: Menene sunan mahaifiyar Mencius?
faq.answer: Sunan mahaifiyar Mencius ita ce Ji (伋).

faq.question: Wane ne ya tsara littafin "Mencius"?
faq.answer: Akwai ra'ayin cewa littafin "Mencius" ayyukan karshe na rayuwarsa ne, amma a zahiri ya fi dacewa a kalle shi a matsayin wanda dalibansa suka tsara.

timeline.event: Haihuwa
Ya zama Langzhong (ami) kuma ya raka Sarki Wu don ziyartar wurare kamar Jiangnan, Shandong, da Henan.
Kafin mahaifinsa Sima Tan ya rasu sakamakon rashin lafiya, ya buki shi da ya kammala tsara littafin tarihi.
Ya zama Taishiling (Grand Historian) baada mahaifinsa.
Ya gyara kalandar don kammala Kalandar Taichu (Taichu calendar).
An yanke masa hukuncin kaciya (castration) sakamakon fushin Sarki Wu lokacin da yake kare Janar Li Ling.
Mutuwa

keyAchievements.title: Tsara Shiji (Records of the Grand Historian)
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta littattafan tarihi juzu'i 130 wadanda ke nuna tarihin kasar Sin tun dari sarki na farko Yellow Emperor har zuwa Sarki Wu ta hanyar raba shi bisa ga mutane.

keyAchievements.title: Gyara Kalandar Taichu
keyAchievements.description: Ya kammala Kalandar Taichu ta hanyar gyara kalandar a shekara ta 104 BC.

faq.question: Wane ne Sima Qian?
faq.answer: Ya kasance masanin tarihi na lokacin Han Dynasty na kasar Sin, marubucin "Shiji", kuma ana daukar sa a matsayin daya dari cikin manyan masana tarihi na Gabas.

faq.question: Me yasa Sima Qian ya fuskanci hukuncin kaciya?
faq.answer: Lokacin da Janar Li Ling ya fadi a yaki da Xiongnu a shekara ta 99 BC, Sima Qian ya fuskanci hukuncin kaciya sakamakon fushin Sarki Wu yayin da yake kare Li Ling.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan littattafan Sima Qian?
faq.answer: Babban littafinsa shi ne "Shiji" (사기), kuma akwai wasu kamar "Letter to Ren An" (보임안서) da "Bei Shi Bu Yu Fu" (비사불우부).

faq.question: Wadanne mukamai Sima Qian ya rike?
faq.answer: Ya zama Taishiling baada mahaifinsa, kuma an nada shi matsayin Zhongsheling (shugaban sakatarorin masarauta) baada ya fuskanci hukuncin kaciya.

timeline.event: Mutuwa

keyAchievements.title: Gaji da bunkasa ra'ayin Taoism
keyAchievements.description: Ya zama babban mutum na Taoism ta hanyar gaji da bunkasa ra'ayoyin Laozi.

keyAchievements.title: Nuna ra'ayin haɗin kai na dukkan abubuwa (Monism)
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da ra'ayin haɗin kai na dukkan abubuwa.

keyAchievements.title: Nuna ra'ayin komawa ga yanayi da babu komai (Wu)
keyAchievements.description: Ya nemi komawa ga yanayi da kuma komawa ga babu komai (Wu) bisa ga tunanin Laozi.

keyAchievements.title: Neman kwanciyar hankali na kansa (Anshin Ritsumei)
keyAchievements.description: Sabanin Laozi, ya mayar da hankali ne kawai kan neman kwanciyar hankali na kansa.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da falsafar rayuwa ta kwarai
keyAchievements.description: Ya kalli rayuwar samun yanci da zaman kansa ta hanyar barin jiki da ruhin da ke kawo damuwa, da kuma isa ga yanayin rashin son zuciya (허정 /염담) a matsayin rayuwa ta kwarai.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa ka'idar ilimi
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa ka'idar ilimi wacce ke cewa fahimta ta ra'ayi da yanke hukunci ba su da amfani, kuma jahilci na kwarai ne kadai ke da kyau.

faq.question: Menene ainihin sunan Zhuangzi?
faq.answer: Ainihin sunan Zhuangzi shi ne Zhou (周).

faq.question: Wane tunani Zhuangzi ya gaji kuma ya bunkasa?
faq.answer: Zhuangzi ya gaji kuma ya bunkasa ra'ayoyin Laozi.

faq.question: Wane mukami Zhuangzi ya rike?
faq.answer: Zhuangzi ya zama jami'in kula da gonar lacquer (Qiyuan) a Meng.

faq.question: Shin Zhuangzi ya amince da shawarar Sarki Wei na Chu?
faq.answer: Sarki Wei na Chu ya buki shi da ya taimaka masa wajen gudanar da mulki, amma Zhuangzi ya ki amincewa.

faq.question: Menene rayuwa ta kwarai a wajen Zhuangzi?
faq.answer: Zhuangzi ya kalli rayuwar samun yanci da zaman kansa ta hanyar barin jiki da ruhin da ke kawo damuwa, da kuma isa ga yanayin rashin son zuciya (허정 /염담) a matsayin rayuwa ta kwarai. Ya nuna cewa ta wannan hanyar mutum zai iya bin dokokin yanayi kuma ya sami yanci da zaman kansa ba tare da cikas ba.

faq.question: Wane banbanci ne ke tsakanin Zhuangzi da Laozi a tunaninsu?
faq.answer: Yayin da Laozi ya nuna sha'awa ga siyasa da al'umma na gaskiya a wani mataki, Zhuangzi ya mayar da hankali ne kawai kan neman kwanciyar hankali na kansa.

zhuangzi.missingDataNote: 장자의 출생 연도(기원전 369년?)는 불확실하며, 관직 생활이나 초나라 위왕의 제안 거절 등 주요 생애 사건들의 구체적인 연도가 원문에 명시되어 있지 않습니다. 또한, 장자의 저작 목록이 원문에 제공되지 않았습니다.

timeline.event: Lokacin da ya rayu a matsayin sarki na 3 na daular Maurya na Magadha.
Yiwuwar haihuwa
Yiwuwar hawan mulki
Ci nasara a kan yankin Kalinga
Bayanin ziyarar Sambodhi (itacen Bodhi mai tsarki a Bodh Gaya).
Ya kusanci kungiyar mambobin addinin Buddha (Sangha) kuma ya zagaya masarautarsa.
Ya fara zana umarni (edicts) don yada Dharma.
Ya kafa mukamin Dhamma Mahamatta.
Ya ba da umarnin fadada stupa na Buddha Kanakamuni.
Ya ba da kyautar kogon Khalatika.

keyAchievements.title: Mulkin masarauta
keyAchievements.description: A matsayinsa na sarki na 3 na daular Maurya na Magadha, ya mulki masarautar da ta mamaye mafi girman sashen yankin kasar India.

keyAchievements.title: Taimakawa da yada addinin Buddha
keyAchievements.description: A matsayinsa na mai taimaka wa addinin Buddha, ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen yada addinin Buddha a duk fadin tsohuwar Asiya.

keyAchievements.title: Yada Dhamma
keyAchievements.description: Bayan ya ci nasara a kan Kalinga, ya sadaukar da kansa ga yada 'Dhamma', wato kyawawan dabi'u.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa da tallafawa gine-ginen Katolika (Buddha)
keyAchievements.description: Ana yaba masa a cikin labaran addinin Buddha don kafa stupas da dama, tallafawa taro na uku (Third Buddhist Council), tallafawa masu yada addini, da kuma ba da manyan kyaututtuka ga Sangha.

keyAchievements.title: Matsayi a tarihin kasar India
keyAchievements.description: Ya shahara a matsayin daya dari cikin manyan sarakuna na kasar India tun baada aka fassara rubutun Brahmi a karni na 19.

keyAchievements.title: Alamar kasar India ta zamani
keyAchievements.description: Alamar Jamhuriyar India ta fito ne dari hoton zakuna na Ashoka (Lion Capital of Ashoka), kuma a tsakiyar tutar kasar India akwai Ashoka Chakra, wato taya na Ashoka.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan jin dadin jama'a
keyAchievements.description: Ya gudanar da ayyukan jin dadin jama'a kamar kafa asibitoci don mutane da dabbobi, shuka ganyayyakin magani, gina rijiya, da kuma dasa bishiyoyi a gefen hanyoyi.

keyAchievements.title: Inganta jin dadin dabbobi
keyAchievements.description: Ya inganta jin dadin dabbobi ta hanyar soke hukuncin kisa, hana kashe dabbobi don yanka na addini, da kuma soke farauta na masarauta.

faq.question: Menene sunan Ashoka yake nufi?
faq.answer: 'A-shoka' a zahiri yana nufin 'mara bakin ciki'.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan taken Ashoka?
faq.answer: Manyan takensa sune 'Priyadasi' ('mai kallon mutane da kyau') da 'Devanampiya' ('wanda alloli ke so').

faq.question: Shin Ashoka dan addinin Buddha ne?
faq.answer: Ya bayyana karara cewa shi dan addinin Buddha ne ta hanyar kiran kansa Upasaka (dan addinin Buddha na farar hula) da kuma Shaka a cikin karamin umarnin dutse na 1.

faq.question: Shin Ashoka ya tsananta wa sauran addinai?
faq.answer: Umarninsa sun jaddada hakuri da sauran addinai gaba danya, kuma ya sadaukar da koguna ga masu addinin da ba na Buddha ba sannan ya bayyana cewa duka Brahmins da Shramanas sun cancanci girmamawa.

faq.question: Menene 'Dhamma' yake nufi ga Ashoka?
faq.answer: Ga Ashoka, Dhamma yana nufin manufar dabi'u da ta kunshi kulawa da al'umma, hakuri da addinai, sanin yanayi, bin dokokin dabi'u na gama gari, da kuma soke yaki.

faq.question: Shin Ashoka ya kasance mai tsananin fushi kafin ya shiga addinin Buddha?
faq.answer: Labaran gargajiya na Sri Lanka da na Arewacin India sun nuna cewa Ashoka ya kasance mai tsananin fushi kafin ya karbi addinin Buddha.

faq.question: Yaya Yakin Kalinga ya yi tasiri a kan Ashoka?
faq.answer: Mummunan halin da aka fuskanta a lokacin yakin ya janyo masa nadama game da fada da makamai, wando ya sa ya fara sha'awar addinin Buddha a cikin shekaru masu zuwa.

faq.question: Wadanne kokari Ashoka ya yi don jin dadin dabbobi?
faq.answer: Ya inganta jin dadin dabbobi ta hanyar soke hukuncin kisa, hana kashe dabbobi don yanka na addini, soke farauta na masarauta, da kuma kafa asibitocin dabbobi.

timeline.event: An haife shi a lokacin Tang Dynasty.
Ya shiga harkar Taoism ta hanyar hawan duwatsun Sichuan tare da wani mutumin kwarai Dong'anza a mahaifarsa lardin Shu, sannan ya bar mahaifarsa don ziyartar Jiangnan.
Ya zauna a Chang'an a matsayin Hanlin Gongfeng baada ya sami umarnin Sarki Xuanzong yana da shekaru 43.
Ya yi murabus baada ya shiga sabani da Gao Lishi, wani na kusa da Sarki Xuanzong, saboda rashin jin dadin rayuwar jami'i.
Ya koma Jiangnan kuma.
Ya shiga rundunar sojan Yarima Yin (dan na 16 na Xuanzong), amma an kora shi zuwa Ye (Guizhou na yanzu) sakamakon ayyana rundunar Yarima a matsayin 'yan tawaye.
Ya rasu a gidan kawunsa Li Yangbing, gwamnan Dangtu na lardin Anhui, yana da shekaru 61.

keyAchievements.title: Shahararren mawaƙi a tarihin kasar Sin
keyAchievements.description: 당나라 시대의 시인으로, 두보와 함께 중국 역사상 가장 위대한 시인 중 한 명으로 꼽힌다.

keyAchievements.title: Shishian (Mawaƙi Mai Tsarki)
keyAchievements.description: Ana kiran Li Bai da 'Shishian' (Mawaƙi Mai Tsarki), kuma ana daukar basirarsa ta waka a matsayin 'gwarzo'.

keyAchievements.title: Mawaƙi mai yawan ayyuka
keyAchievements.description: A yanzu akwai waƙoƙi kusan 1,100 da suka rage, kuma waƙoƙinsa na da alaka da Taoism da giya sun shahara sosai.

keyAchievements.title: Gwarzon tsofaffin waƙoƙi (gushi) da quatrains (jueju)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kware a tsofaffin waƙoƙi (gushi) da quatrains (jueju), kuma an kwatanta quatrains dinsa da 'kayan alloli'.

keyAchievements.title: Salon waka mai yanci da almara
keyAchievements.description: Waƙoƙinsa suna da girma da kwarin gwiwa, kuma wani lokaci suna nuna salon almara da kuma yanci sosai.

faq.question: Menene sunan Li Bai na biyu da na alkalami?
faq.answer: Sunan Li Bai na biyu shi ne Taibai (太白), kuma sunan alkalami shi ne Qinglian Jushi (靑蓮居士).

faq.question: Wane taken girmamawa aka ba wa Li Bai?
faq.answer: Ana daukar Li Bai a matsayin daya dari cikin manyan mawaƙa a tarihin kasar Sin, kuma ana kiran sa da 'Shishian' (Mawaƙi Mai Tsarki).

faq.question: Waƙoƙi nawa na Li Bai suka rage?
faq.answer: A yanzu akwai waƙoƙi kusan 1,100 da suka rage.

faq.question: Wadanne jigogi Li Bai ya fi rubutawa a waƙoƙinsa?
faq.answer: Manyan jigogin da ke da alaka da waƙoƙinsa sune Taoism da giya.

faq.question: A ina aka haifi Li Bai?
faq.answer: A halin yanzu, an yarda da cewa shi dan Asiya ta Tsakiya ne wanda ya fito dari Suyab (碎葉) a lokacin Tang Dynasty.

faq.question: Shin Li Bai ya sami ilimi na kwarai?
faq.answer: Li Bai bai sami ilimi na kwarai ba saboda mahaifinsa dan kasuwa ne.

faq.question: Yaushe Li Bai ya rasu?
faq.answer: Li Bai ya rasu a gidan kawunsa Li Yangbing, gwamnan Dangtu na lardin Anhui, a shekara ta 762 yana da shekaru 61.

faq.question: Wadanne ne siffofin waƙoƙin Li Bai?
faq.answer: Waƙoƙinsa suna da girma da kwarin gwiwa, kuma wani lokaci suna nuna salon almara da kuma yanci sosai.

li-bai.missingDataNote: 사직 후 두보와의 여행, 유배 중 은사(恩赦)를 받은 시점은 원문에 특정 연도나 나이가 명시되어 있지 않아 타임라인에서 생략되었습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin dan matalaucin manomi a Nakamura, Aichi, lardin Owari (ranar 6 ga watan 2 na kalandar gargajiya, shekara ta 6 ta Tenbun).
Ya fara aiki a matsayin kōmono (ami) na Oda Nobunaga.
Ya auri Nene, diyar riko ta Asano Nagakatsu (shekara ta 4 ta Eiroku).

Ya shiga cikin yakin cin nasara a kan Katangar Mitsukuri na Omi, kuma ya kula da harkokin gwamnati a Kyoto tare da Akechi Mitsuhide da Niwa Nagahide lokacin da Oda Nobunaga ya nada Ashikaga Yoshiaki a matsayin Shogun (watan 9 na kalandar gargajiya, shekara ta 11 ta Eiroku).
Ya shiga yakin yaki da Asakura Yoshikage na lardin Echizen, kuma ya sami babban sakamako ta hanyar kula da dakarun baya (rear guard) a Kanagasaki (shekara ta farko ta Genki).
Bayan an halakar da dangin Azai, an ba shi gundumomi uku na Omi kuma ya zama shugaban Katangar Nagahama, sannan ya canza sunan danginsa zuwa Hashiba (shekara ta farko ta Tensho).
