Ya dawo ba tare da izini ba lokacin da aka tura shi don taimaka wa Shibata Katsuie, kuma ya ci nasara a kan Matsunaga Hisahide na lardin Yamato (Yakin Katangar Shigisan) (shekara ta 4 ta Tensho).
Ya sa daimyō na lardin Bizen da lardin Mimasaka, Ukita Naoie, ya mika wuya gare shi (shekara ta 7 ta Tensho).

Ya kai hari a kan Bessho Nagaharu, shugaban Katangar Miki na Harima, kuma ya sa ya mika wuya (Yakin Miki). Sannan ya ci nasara a kan Katangar Arikoyama na Yamana Akihiro na lardin Tajima (shekara ta 8 ta Tensho).
Ya ci nasara a kan Katangar Tottori (Yakin Katangar Tottori). Ya kuma ci nasara a kan Katangar Iwaya don sanya lardin Awaji a karkashin ikonsa (shekara ta 9 ta Tensho).
Ya nemi dakarun taimako daga Oda Nobunaga a lokacin da yake kai hari ta hanyar amfani da ruwa (water siege) a kan Katangar Takamatsu na Bicchu (shekara ta 10 ta Tensho).
Ya ji labarin cewa ubangidansa Oda Nobunaga ya kashe kansa sakamakon lamarin Honno-ji (ranar 2 ga watan 6 na kalandar gargajiya, shekara ta 10 ta Tensho).
Ya doke Akechi Mitsuhide a Yakin Yamazaki (ranar 13 ga watan 6 na kalandar gargajiya, shekara ta 10 ta Tensho).
An yanke shawarar nada jikan Oda Nobunaga, Sanboshi, a matsayin magaji a taron Kiyosu (ranar 27 ga watan 6 na kalandar gargajiya, shekara ta 10 ta Tensho).
Ya gudanar da jana'izar Oda Nobunaga tare da dan rikonsa Hashiba Hidekatsu a matsayin babban mai kula (ranar 15 ga watan 10 na kalandar gargajiya, shekara ta 10 ta Tensho).
Sakamakon karfin sabani da Shibata Katsuie, ya kewaye Katangar Nagahama, ya ci nasara a kan Katangar Kajiki, kuma ya karbi Sanboshi daga hannun Oda Nobutaka (shekara ta 11 ta Tensho).
Ya doke Shibata Katsuie a Yakin Shizugatake (ranar 21 ga watan 4 na kalandar gargajiya, shekara ta 11 ta Tensho).
Ya fara gina Katangar Osaka a filin Ishiyama Hongan-ji (shekara ta 11 ta Tensho).
Ya sami sabani da Oda Nobukatsu, kuma Tokugawa Ieyasu ya mara wa Nobukatsu baya (Yakin Komaki da Nagakute) (shekara ta 12 ta Tensho).
Ikeda Tsuneoki, dansa Motosuke, da Mori Nagayoshi sun mutu a Yakin Nagakute (ranar 9 ga watan 4 na kalandar gargajiya, shekara ta 12 ta Tensho).
Ya daidaita (peace treaty) da Oda Nobukatsu (ranar 11 ga watan 11 na kalandar gargajiya, shekara ta 12 ta Tensho).
An ba shi mukamin Naidaijin (ranar 10 ga watan 3 na kalandar gargajiya, shekara ta 13 ta Tensho).
Ya kaddamar da yakin cin nasara a kan Kishu (ranar 21 ga watan 3 na kalandar gargajiya, shekara ta 13 ta Tensho).
Ya kaddamar da yakin cin nasara a kan Shikoku (ranar 25 ga watan 7 na kalandar gargajiya, shekara ta 13 ta Tensho).
Ya zama Kampaku (ranar 11 ga watan 7 na kalandar gargajiya, shekara ta 13 ta Tensho).
Sassa Narimasa na Etchu ya mika wuya ga Hideyoshi (ranar 25 ga watan 8 na kalandar gargajiya, shekara ta 13 ta Tensho).
Ya tilasta wa kanwarsa Asahi rabuwa da mijinta don ya kaurace mata ga Ieyasu, kuma ya tura mahaifiyarsa Omandokoro ga Ieyasu a matsayin garkuwa (hostage) (shekara ta 14 ta Tensho).
Masarautar ta ba shi sunan dangin Toyotomi (ranar 9 ga watan 9 na kalandar gargajiya, shekara ta 14 ta Tensho).
Ya zama Daijō-daijin don tabbatar da gwamnatinsa (ranar 25 ga watan 12 na kalandar gargajiya, shekara ta 14 ta Tensho).
Ya sha kashi a yakin da ya yi da sojojin Shimazu karkashin jagorancin Shimazu Iehisa a Kogin Hetsugi na Bungo (Yakin Hetsugigawa) (shekara ta 14 ta Tensho).
Ya jagoranci dakarun soja 200,000 don kai hari a Kyushu, kuma dangin Shimazu suka mika wuya (Kaddamar da Kyushu) (shekara ta 15 ta Tensho).
Ya kaddamar da dokar korar Kiristoci (Bateren Expulsion Edict) (watan Yuni, shekara ta 15 ta Tensho).
Ya kaddamar da dokar kwace makamai (Katanagari) (shekara ta 16 ta Tensho).
Yododono, matarsa ta gefe, ta haifi Tsurumatsu kuma ya nada shi a matsayin magajinsa (shekara ta 17 ta Tensho).
Ya jagoranci sojojin 210,000 zuwa Kanto don fatattakar dangin Go-Hōjō, kuma ya kewaye Katangar Odawara (Kaddamar da Odawara) (shekara ta 18 ta Tensho).

Bayan Tsurumatsu da aka nada a matsayin magaji ya rasu sakamakon rashin lafiya, ya karbi dan yayansa Hidetsugu a matsayin dan riko kuma ya mika masa mukamin Kampaku, sannan aka fara kiran shi da Taikō (shekara ta 19 ta Tensho).
Ya ba wa shugaban shayi (tea master) Sen no Rikyū umarnin kashe kansa ta hanyar seppuku (harakiri) (shekara ta 19 ta Tensho).
Ya danne boren da Kunohe Masazane ya tayar a yankin Tohoku (shekara ta 19 ta Tensho).
Yakin Imjin (임진왜란) ya barke (shekara ta farko ta Bunroku).
An fara tattaunawar zaman lafiya da daular Ming. Yododono ta haifi Hideyori (shekara ta 2 ta Bunroku).
Ya sauke Kampaku Toyotomi Hidetsugu dari mukaminsa kuma ya kore shi zuwa Dutsen Koya, sannan ya tilasta masa yin seppuku bisa zargin cin amanar kasa (shekara ta 4 ta Bunroku).
Tattaunawar zaman lafiya da daular Ming ta lalace (shekara ta 5 ta Bunroku).
Ya sake kai hari a Korea tare da sojojin 140,000 (Yakin Jeongyu / 정유재란) (shekara ta 2 ta Keicho).
Ya rasu a Katangar Fushimi (ranar 18 ga watan 8 na kalandar gargajiya, shekara ta 3 ta Keicho).

keyAchievements.title: Mutane 3 na musamman na lokacin Sengoku (Three Unifiers of Japan)
keyAchievements.description: Ana kiran sa tare da Oda Nobunaga da Tokugawa Ieyasu a matsayin jarumai uku na lokacin Sengoku.

keyAchievements.title: Gaji ayyukan Oda Nobunaga
keyAchievements.description: Ya doke Akechi Mitsuhide bayan lamarin Honno-ji kuma ya gaji ayyukan Oda Nobunaga.

keyAchievements.title: Hadewar kasar Japan
keyAchievements.description: Ya sa dangin Go-Hōjō mika wuya don hada kasar Japan baki daya, wando ya kawo karshen lokacin Sengoku mai tsawo.

keyAchievements.title: Nada matsayin Kampaku da Daijō-daijin
keyAchievements.description: An nada shi a matsayin Kampaku da Daijō-daijin don tabbatar da ikon sa, kuma ya sami sunan dangin Toyotomi dari masarautar.

keyAchievements.title: Taiko Kenchi da Katanagari
keyAchievements.description: Ya tabbatar da kwanciyar hankali a kasar Japan ta hanyar kaddamar da tsarin auna kasa (Taiko Kenchi) da kuma kwace makamai (Katanagari).

keyAchievements.title: Zama shugaba dari matsayi mafi kaskanci
keyAchievements.description: Mutumin da ya fito dari matsayi mafi kaskanci a kasar Japan ya zama shugaban kasar gaba daya.

keyAchievements.title: Gina Katangar Osaka
keyAchievements.description: Ya gina Katangar Osaka a filin Ishiyama Hongan-ji.

keyAchievements.title: Jagorantar Yakin Imjin
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne mutumin da ya kaddamar da Yakin Imjin a shekarar Bunroku ta farko (1592) don kai hari a kasar Korea.

faq.question: Yaya asalin Toyotomi Hideyoshi yake?
faq.answer: An san cewa an haife shi a matsayin dan matalaucin manomi a Nakamura, Aichi, lardin Owari, kuma saboda ya fito dari matsayi mafi kaskanci, akwai zargin cewa an sauya ko kyautata rubuce-rubucen tarihin rayuwarsa a wancan lokacin ko a baya.

faq.question: Me yasa Toyotomi Hideyoshi bai zama Shogun ba?
faq.answer: Bai iya zama Shogun ba saboda ya fito dari talakawa kuma ba shi da jinin Genji, wando ke da alaka da dokar cewa 'Shogun dole ne ya fito dari dangin Genji (源氏)'. Maimakon haka, ya sami mukaman Kampaku da Daijō-daijin.

faq.question: Menene ainihin dalilin da ya sa Toyotomi Hideyoshi ya kaddamar da Yakin Imjin?
faq.answer: A bincike na gaba daya, akwai ra'ayin cewa ya nemi karfafa alakar dakarunsa ta hanyar basu sababbin filaye da kuma karbe kudancin Korea wando ya yi ikirarin cewa tsohon filin kasarsa ne, sannan ya nemi fatattakar sojojin daular Ming don samun dalilin zama Shogun.

faq.question: Wadanne ne siffofin jikin Toyotomi Hideyoshi?
faq.answer: Akwai bayanan mai yada addini Luis Frois cewa yana da siffar biri wando ya sa ake kiran sa da 'biri kadan', yana da gajeren tsayi da kuma mummunan fuska, kuma yana da yatsu shida a hannunsa na dama (polydactyly).

faq.question: Yaya aka kula da mutuwar Toyotomi Hideyoshi?
faq.answer: Ya rasu a Katangar Fushimi a shekara ta 3 ta Keicho (1598), kuma ba a yi jana'izarsa ba don kada sojoji su karaya, sannan aka ajiye mutuwarsa a asirce. An tarwatsa kabarin sa baada Yakin Sekigahara kuma ya bace.

timeline.event: An haife shi a cikin iyalin masana shari'a (ulama) a Tangier, Morocco.
Ya bar mahaifarsa yana da shekaru 21 don tafiya aikin haji (Hajj) zuwa Mecca.

timeline.year: Farkon lokacin bazara na shekara ta 1326
timeline.event: Ya isa Alexandria.
Bayan ya shafe wata guda a Mecca, ya shiga rundunar 'yan kasuwa (caravan) da ke komawa Iraq.
Ya isa Baghdad.
Ya bar Baghdad ya nufi arewa ta gefen Kogin Tigris.
Ya isa Aden.
Ya ziyarci Sultan al-Hasan ibn Sulaiman na Kilwa.
Ya ziyarci Mogadishu.
Ya shiga rundunar 'yan kasuwa da ke tafiya Delhi dari Anatolia don neman aiki a fadar Sultan Muhammad bin Tughluq na daular Delhi Sultanate.
Ya isa Constantinople kuma ya hadu da Andronikos III Palaiologos.
Ya isa daular Samudera Pasai Sultanate da ke yankin Aceh, Arewacin Sumatra.
Ya bar Guangzhou don komawa gida.
Ya isa Damascus kuma ya sami labarin cewa mahaifinsa ya rasu shekaru 15 da suka gabata.
Lokacin da Alfonso XI na Castile ya kai hari a yankin Tangier, ya hadu da sauran Musulmai don kare tashar jiragen ruwa.
Ya bar Fez ya nufi Sijilmasa.
Ya isa Taghaza tare da rundunar 'yan kasuwa.
Ya shiga rundunar 'yan kasuwa da ke barin Mali don nufar Timbuktu.
Ya koma Sijilmasa.
Ya koma kasar Morocco.
Ya fadi labaran tafiyarsa ga Ibn Juzayy bisa umarnin Sultan, kuma Ibn Juzayy ya tsara littafin "The Travels of Ibn Battuta" (이븐 바투타 여행기).
Ya rasu.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta sanannen littafin tafiya (Rihla)
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta sanannen littafin tafiya 'Rihla' wando ke nuna tsohuwar daular Musulunci da sauran manyan yankuna daban-daban.

keyAchievements.title: Tafiya mai nisa sosai
keyAchievements.description: Ya bar babban tarihi mai daraja a fannin ilimin halayyar dan adam (anthropology) ta hanyar yin tafiyar kusa da kilomita 120,000 zuwa kasashen Musulunci na lokacin, kasar Sin, da Sumatra.

keyAchievements.title: Zama alkali (qadi) na daular Delhi Sultanate
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi aiki baada an nada shi a matsayin alkali (qadi) ta hannun Sultan Muhammad bin Tughluq na daular Delhi Sultanate.

faq.question: Yaushe kuma a ina aka haifi Ibn Battuta?
faq.answer: An haife shi a ranar 24 ga Fabrairu, 1304 a cikin iyalin masana shari'a (ulama) a Tangier, Morocco.

faq.question: Wace daraja ce littafin tafiyar Ibn Battuta yake da ita?
faq.answer: Littafin tafiyarsa yana da daraja mai girma a fannin ilimin al'adu da dan adam saboda yana kwatanta tafiyar kusa da kilomita 120,000 zuwa kasashen Musulunci na lokacin, kasar Sin, da Sumatra.

faq.question: Wadanne ayyuka Ibn Battuta ya yi?
faq.answer: Ya kasance mai tafiya, mai bincike, kuma marubucin sanannen littafin tafiya (Rihla), kuma ya yi aiki a matsayin alkali (qadi) a daular Delhi Sultanate sannan ya yi rayuwa a matsayin alkali a Morocco a karshen rayuwarsa.

faq.question: Wane ne ya rubuta littafin tafiyar Ibn Battuta?
faq.answer: Ibn Battuta ne ya fadi labaransa ga Ibn Juzayy bisa umarnin Sultan, kuma Ibn Juzayy ya shirya tare da rubuta 《이븐 바투타 여행기》.

timeline.event: Ya zama Mansa na daular Mali kuma ya fara mulkinsa.
Wani mai ziyara da ya zo Mali ya rubuta game da tsaro a daular Mali da kuma tsananin dokar da sarki ke zartarwa.
Ya kammala mulkinsa na daular Mali.
Ya rasu.

keyAchievements.title: Gina zamanin zinariya na daular Mali
keyAchievements.description: Ya gina zamanin zinariya ta hanyar mulkar daular Mali dari shekarar 1312 zuwa 1332.

keyAchievements.title: Aikin haji na Mecca da ayyukan sadaka
keyAchievements.description: A lokacin tafiyarsa ta haji zuwa Mecca, ya tafi da bayi 12,000, mata 800, da tan 11 na zinariya, kuma ya raba zinariya ga matalauta.

keyAchievements.title: Gayyatar masana da gine-gine
keyAchievements.description: Ya dawo da masana da dama lokacin da ya koma gida, kuma ya sa wani mai tsara gine-gine (architect) na kasar Spain ya gina fadar masarauta da masallatai a babban birnin Timbuktu.

faq.question: Yaushe Mansa Musa ya mulki daular Mali?
faq.answer: Mansa Musa ya mulki daular Mali dari shekarar 1312 zuwa 1332.

faq.question: Yaya aikin haji na Mecca na Mansa Musa yake?
faq.answer: Ya tafi da bayi 12,000, mata 800, da tan 11 na zinariya a lokacin aikin haji na Mecca, kuma ya raba zinariya ga matalauta a kan hanya.

faq.question: Wane kiyasi daular Mali ta samu a lokacin Mansa Musa?
faq.answer: Bisa ga bayanan wani mai ziyara a shekara ta 1325, daular Mali ta kasance kasa ce da ba a cika samun rashin adalci ba kuma masu tafiya suna iya tafiya lafiya sakamakon tsananin dokar da sarki ke zartarwa.

timeline.event: An haifi Shaka kaSenzangakhona a Masarautar Mthethwa.
Ya zama Sarki na Masarautar Zulu (Zulu Kingdom).
Ya yi nasara a yakin da ya yi da Zwide a kusa da Pongola.
Ya sake fuskantar Sikhunyane, dan Zwide.
Rasuwar mahaifiyarsa Nandi.
Kanne dinsa na gefe (half-brothers) sun kashe shi.

keyAchievements.title: Babban gyaran soja
keyAchievements.description: A matsayinsa na daya dari cikin sarakuna masu fada aji na kabilar Zulu, ya kaddamar da babban gyaran soja.

keyAchievements.title: Gyara tsarin soja
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami tallafi dari Masarautar Mthethwa don gyara tsarin soja da ake kira ibutho.

keyAchievements.title: Shigar da Iklwa
keyAchievements.description: Ya shigar da 'Iklwa', wani gajeren mashi na soka mai dauke da dogon mashi mai fadi.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da dabarar 'Kahon Sa' (Horn of the Bull)
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da dabarar 'Kahon Sa' (Horn of the Bull) wacce ta murkushe dakarun Zwide a Yakin Gqokli Hill.

keyAchievements.title: Fadada mulki bisa karfin soja
keyAchievements.description: Ya doke abokan gabarsa bisa karfin soja kuma ya shigar da mayakan da suka tsere zuwa cikin rundunarsa don fadada mulkinsa.

keyAchievements.title: Shigar da garkuwar Nguni
keyAchievements.description: Ana zargin cewa ya shigar da garkuwar Nguni mafi girma da nauyi.

keyAchievements.title: Koyar da dabarar amfani da garkuwa
keyAchievements.description: An yarda cewa ya koya wa mayaka dabarar amfani da gefen hagu na garkuwa don janye garkuwar abokin gaba zuwa dama, wando ke bayyana hakarkarin abokin gaba.

keyAchievements.title: Horon tattaki mai sauri
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance yana ba da horon tattaki mai sauri (forced marches) a cikin yanayi mai zafi da duwatsu.

keyAchievements.title: Tsarin tallafawa kayan yaki na matasa
keyAchievements.description: Ya shigar da yara maza masu shekaru 6 ko fiye a matsayin mayaka na gwaji (udibi) don daukar abinci, tukwane, tabarmi, da kuma makamai na ragi.

keyAchievements.title: Tsara tsarin rundunoni bisa shekaru
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara kungiyoyi daban-daban na shekaru zuwa rundunoni, ya ajiye su a cikin krals na soja na musamman, kuma ya basu sunaye da alamomi na musamman.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa dokar soja
keyAchievements.description: Ya shigar da mummunan tunani ga sojoji cewa idan suka rasa kwarin gwiwa ko suka sha kashi a yaki, mummunan sakamako zai biyo baya, wando ya ba su kuduri mara tausayi.

keyAchievements.title: Shigar da kabilun da aka ci nasara a kansu
keyAchievements.description: Ya shigar da mayakan kabilun da ya ci nasara a kansu zuwa cikin rundunarsa kuma ya yi amfani da su don cin nasara a kan sauran kabilun.

faq.question: Yaushe Shaka Zulu ya haifu kuma yaushe ya rasu?
faq.answer: An haifi Shaka kaSenzangakhona kusan shekara ta 1787, kuma ya rasu a ranar 24 ga Satumba, 1828.

faq.question: Shin Shaka Zulu ya kasance Sarki na Masarautar Zulu?
faq.answer: E, ya kasance Sarki na Masarautar Zulu dari shekarar 1816 zuwa 1828.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan gyare-gyaren soja na Shaka Zulu?
faq.answer: Ya shigar da gajeren mashi 'Iklwa', ya samar da dabarar 'Kahon Sa', kuma ya tsara tsarin rundunoni bisa shekaru.

faq.question: Yaya Shaka Zulu ya rasu?
faq.answer: Kanne dinsa na gefe Dingane kaSenzangakhona da Mlangana, da kuma Mbopa kaSithayi sun kashe shi a watan Satumba na shekarar 1828.

faq.question: Wace rawa Shaka Zulu ya taka a Mfecane?
faq.answer: Lokacin mulkin Shaka yana daya da lokacin Mfecane, kuma fadada sojansa ya janyo babban hijira da rudani, amma akwai cece-kuce game da rawar da ya taka.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Baghdad (Kiyasi)
Rubuta littafin "On the Calculation with Hindu Numerals"
Rubuta babban littafinsa "The Compendious Book on Calculation by Completion and Balancing" (al-Kitab al-mukhtasar fi hisab al-jabr wa'l-muqabala)
Mutuwa (Kiyasi)
An fassara littafinsa na lissafi zuwa harshen Latin.
Ayyukansa sun yadu zuwa Turai ta hanyar fassarar Latin.
An fassara littafinsa "The Compendious Book on Calculation by Completion and Balancing" zuwa harshen Latin.

keyAchievements.title: Littafin algebra "The Compendious Book on Calculation by Completion and Balancing"
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta littafin da ake kallo a matsayin farkon algebra na zamani ta hanyar gabatar da hanyoyin warware linear da quadratic equations.

keyAchievements.title: Littafin lissafi "On the Calculation with Hindu Numerals"
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta littafin da ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen raba lambobin Hindu-Arabic da hanyar lissafi ga kasashen Yamma.

keyAchievements.title: Kalandar taurari "Zij al-Sindhind"
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera kalandar taurari da ke kunshe da lissafin taurari, da kuma teburin trigonometric na sine da cosine.

keyAchievements.title: Littafin geography "The Image of the Earth" (Kitab surat al-ard)
keyAchievements.description: Ya gyara geography na Ptolemy kuma ya rubuta littafin da ke kunshe da coordinates da siffofin birane 2,402.

keyAchievements.title: Binciken injina na musamman
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi bincike a kan injina na musamman kamar astrolabes da sundials.

keyAchievements.title: Shiga aikin kera taswira da auna girman duniya
keyAchievements.description: 칼리프 알마문을 위한 지도 제작을 돕고 지구의 둘레를 재는 프로젝트에 참여했습니다.

faq.question: Wane ne al-Khwarizmi?
faq.answer: Ya kasance masanin lissafi na kasar Persia wando ya kera lissafi ta amfani da lambobin Arabic da aka shigo da su daga India, ya yi amfani da 0 da kuma place values, kuma ana kiran sa da 'Uban Algebra'.

faq.question: Daga ina kalmomin 'algorithm' da 'algebra' suka fito?
faq.answer: Kalmar 'algorithm' ta fito ne dari sunansa, kuma 'algebra' ta fito ne dari littafinsa <al-jabr wa al-muqabala>.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan littattafan al-Khwarizmi, kuma menene suke kunshe da shi?
faq.answer: Manyan littattafansa sun hada da "The Compendious Book on Calculation by Completion and Balancing" wando ke magana game da warware linear da quadratic equations, "On the Calculation with Hindu Numerals" wando ya raba lambobin Hindu-Arabic ga kasashen Yamma, da kuma "The Image of the Earth" wando ya gyara geography na Ptolemy.

timeline.event: An haife shi a cikin iyalin Yahudawa masu kudi a New York.
Ya kammala karatun chemistry a Jami'ar Harvard da sakamako mai kyau (summa cum laude).
Ya tafi karatu a Cavendish Laboratory na Jami'ar Cambridge da ke Birtaniya.
Ya karanci theoretical physics a Jami'ar Göttingen da ke Jamus kuma ya rubuta kasidun ilimi (papers) guda 16.
Ya fara koyarwa a Jami'ar California, Berkeley.
Ya auri Katherine Harrison, wacce ta kasance matar tsohon memba na jam'iyyar gurguzu (Communist Party).
Ya yi aiki a matsayin shugaban Los Alamos Laboratory don gudanar da Tsarin Manhattan (Manhattan Project).
An kore shi dari dukkan mukaman gwamnati baada ya ki amincewa da kera hydrogen bomb.
An zabe shi a matsayin memba na kasashen waje na Royal Society of London.
An gano cewa yana da ciwon kansa na wuya da kai (throat cancer).
Ya rasu yana barci a gidansa da ke Princeton yana da shekaru 62.

keyAchievements.title: Gudanar da Tsarin Manhattan
keyAchievements.description: Ya gudanar da Tsarin Manhattan don kera atomic bomb a matsayin shugaban Los Alamos National Laboratory a lokacin Yakin Duniya na Biyu.

keyAchievements.title: Bincike da koyarwa a fannin theoretical physics
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi bincike a kan theoretical physics a Jami'ar Göttingen na Jamus kuma ya wallafa kasidu da dama, sannan ya yi aiki a matsayin shahararren malami a Jami'ar California, Berkeley.

keyAchievements.title: Zabe a matsayin memba na kasashen waje na Royal Society
keyAchievements.description: An zabe shi a matsayin memba na kasashen waje na Royal Society of London a shekara ta 1962.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Robert Oppenheimer?
faq.answer: An haifi Robert Oppenheimer a ranar 22 ga Afrilu, 1904 a New York.

faq.question: Menene ainihin shahararren aikin Robert Oppenheimer?
faq.answer: Ya gudanar da Tsarin Manhattan don kera atomic bomb a matsayin shugaban Los Alamos National Laboratory a lokacin Yakin Duniya na Biyu.

faq.question: Me yasa Robert Oppenheimer ya bar mukamansa na gwamnati?
faq.answer: An kore shi dari dukkan mukamansa na gwamnati baada ya ki amincewa da kera hydrogen bomb.

faq.question: Wadanne harsuna Robert Oppenheimer ya koya?
faq.answer: Ya koyi harshen Italian don karanta "Divine Comedy" na Dante, ya koyi Sanskrit don karanta littattafan falsafar India, kuma ya kware a harshen Greek a lokacin makarantar sakandare.

saladin.missingDataNote: 제공된 출처 원문은 'saladin'에 대한 정보가 아닌 'Sandinista!' 앨범에 대한 내용입니다. 따라서 요청된 인물에 대한 정보는 찾을 수 없습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Syracuse.
Ya rasu a lokacin Yakin Punic na Biyu.
Cicero ya gano kabarin Archimedes a kusa da Syracuse.
Johan Ludvig Heiberg, masanin tarihin lissafi na Denmark, ya gano "The Method of Mechanical Theorems" a Istanbul.
Masanin kimiyya na kasar Greek Ioannis Sakkas ya yi nasara a gwajin sake kera madubin Archimedes.
An sayar da "The Method of Mechanical Theorems" a gidan gwanjo na Christie's da ke New York.
An nuna "The Method of Mechanical Theorems" ga jama'a.
Dalibai na Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT) sun gudanar da gwajin sake kera madubin Archimedes.

keyAchievements.title: Bincike a kan statics da hydrostatics
keyAchievements.description: 물리학 분야에서 정역학과 유체정역학을 연구했습니다.

keyAchievements.title: Bayyana ka'idar lever da pulley
keyAchievements.description: Ya bayyana ka'idojin lever da pulley.

keyAchievements.title: Kera injina
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera injina kamar irin na farko na lif (elevator), Archimedes' screw, da kuma madubin kai hari a teku.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyuka na lissafi
keyAchievements.description: Ya bar ayyuka na lissafi daban-daban kamar tsarin lambobi na decimal, lissafin fadin parabolic segment, da kuma lissafin pi (π).

keyAchievements.title: Gano Archimedes' principle
keyAchievements.description: Ya gano hanyar auna girman abubuwan da basu da siffa ta daidai don tabbatar da kyawun kambi na zinariya.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da Archimedes' screw
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera wata na'ura mai dauke da dunƙule a cikin silinda don janyo ruwa sama ta hanyar juya shi.

keyAchievements.title: Kera Claw of Archimedes
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera makamin kariya ta amfani da katon karfe mai kama da kambori don hambarar da jiragen ruwan abokan gaba.

keyAchievements.title: Kera madubin Archimedes
keyAchievements.description: An ce ya kera madubin da ke tara hasken rana don kunna wuta ga jiragen ruwa.

keyAchievements.title: Bayyana ka'idar lever
keyAchievements.description: Ya bayyana ka'idoji daban-daban na lever a cikin littafinsa "On the Equilibrium of Planes".

keyAchievements.title: Kera samfurin sararin samaniya
keyAchievements.description: Cicero ya bayyana cewa Archimedes ya kera samfurin sararin samaniya da ke nuna motsin rana, wata, da kuma duniyoyi guda biyar.

keyAchievements.title: Lissafin kusa na pi (π)
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi lissafin kusa na pi (π) a matsayin 3.1408 < π < 3.1429 ta hanyar amfani da polygons.

keyAchievements.title: Tabbatar da quadrature of the parabola
keyAchievements.description: Ya tabbatar da cewa fadin parabolic segment ya kai kashi 4/3 na fadin triangle da ke cikinsa.

keyAchievements.title: Kera hanyar nuna lambobi masu girma sosai
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da hanyar nuna lambobi masu girma sosai kamar yawan kwayoyin yashi a cikin littafinsa "The Sand Reckoner".

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta manyan littattafai
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta littattafan lissafi da na kimiyya daban-daban kamar "On the Equilibrium of Planes", "Measurement of a Circle", da "On the Sphere and Cylinder".

faq.question: Yaushe kuma a ina aka haifi Archimedes?
faq.answer: An haifi Archimedes kusan shekara ta 287 BC a Syracuse, wando ya kasance sashi na Magna Graecia na tsohuwar kasar Greek.

faq.question: Yaya Archimedes ya rasu?
faq.answer: Sojan Roma ya kashe shi kusan shekara ta 212 BC lokacin da sojojin Roma suka ci nasara a kan Syracuse a Yakin Punic na Biyu.

faq.question: Menene labari mafi shahara game da Archimedes?
faq.answer: Wannan shi ne labarin da ya gano hanyar auna girman abubuwa don tabbatar da kyawun kambi na zinariya, sannan ya yi kuka "Eureka!".

faq.question: Menene aka rubuta a kabarin Archimedes?
faq.answer: 그가 증명한 같은 높이의 원기둥과 구의 부피 관계를 나타내는 그림이 새겨져 있었습니다.

faq.question: Don menene aka yi amfani da Archimedes' screw?
faq.answer: Na'ura ce mai dauke da dunƙule a cikin silinda don janyo ruwa sama ta hanyar juya shi, kuma an yi amfani da ita wajen kwashe ruwa dari cikin jiragen ruwa.

faq.question: Shin an yi amfani da madubin Archimedes da gaske?
faq.answer: Marubucin karni na 2 Lucian ya rubuta cewa an kona jiragen ruwan Roma a lokatim Siege of Syracuse, amma an sami cece-kuce game da yin amfani da shi da gaske tun lokacin Renaissance.

faq.question: Shin kalmar "Kada ka taba circles dina" da aka ce Archimedes ya fada gaskiya ce?
faq.answer: Iri wannan kalma ce da aka kera ta a baya, kuma ba a bayyana ta ba a cikin littafin tarihin Plutarch (Parallel Lives).

faq.question: Shin akwai wasu ayyukan Archimedes da aka sake gano su a lokacin zamani?
faq.answer: Heiberg, masanin tarihin lissafi na Denmark, ya gano "The Method of Mechanical Theorems" wando ke dauke da "On Floating Bodies" da sauransu a Istanbul a shekara ta 1906.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin dan karshe a cikin yara 4 a Torun, Poland.
Ya rasa mahaifinsa yana da shekaru goma.
Ya shiga Jami'ar Krakow don fara karatun lissafi da sararin samaniya (astronomy).
Ya kammala karatun lissafi da sararin samaniya a Jami'ar Krakow.
Ya bar Jami'ar Krakow ya tafi Bologna, Italiya don shiga Sashen Koyar da Addini (canon law/theology).
Ya zauna a gidan Domenico Maria da Novara, farfesan sararin samaniya na Jami'ar Bologna, don taimaka masa wajen lura da taurari.
Ya kammala karatun shari'a na shekaru 4 a Jami'ar Bologna kuma ya yi tafiya zuwa Rome.
Ya sami izini daga Warmia Cathedral Chapter a Frombork don ci gaba da karatu na wasu shekaru 2.
Ya shiga kwas din magani (medicine) a Jami'ar Padua.
Ya sami digiri na uku a fannin canon law a Jami'ar Ferrara.
Ya koma Warmia kuma ya fara aiki a matsayin kwamishina na Chapter.
Ya lura da kuma rubuta yadda duniyoyi suka hadu a cikin constellation na Cancer.
Ya fassara littafin Theophylact Simocatta "Epistles" (도덕, 시골뜨기, 사랑꾼의 편지들) zuwa harshen Latin.
Ya kammala harsashin tsarin heliocentrism kuma ya raba "Commentariolus" (Takaitaccen bayani) ga abokansa.
Ya gudanar da ayyukan Warmia Chapter a matsayin mai ba da shawara.
Mahaifinsa na riko (kawunsa) Lucas Watzenrode ya rasu, kuma ya koma Frauenburg, Gabashin Prussia, don yin aiki a matsayin memba na canon (canon) na coci.
Aka ba shi aikin kula da filayen Warmia Chapter kuma ya magance matsalolin manoma (tenants).
Ya rubuta kasida game da gyaran kudi (monetary reform).
Lokacin da Knights na Teutonic suka kai hari a Frombork, ya yi kokarin kare Frombork ta hanyar neman taimako daga Sarkin Poland da sauran kwamishinoni.
Ya halarci taron Majalisar Royal Prussia don tattaunawa game da gyaran samar da tsabar kudi na azurfa.
Bayan rasuwar Archbishop Fabian Luzianski, mambobin Chapter sun zabe shi a matsayin archbishop na wucin gadi.
Kasar Poland da Teutonic Knights sun sanya hannu kan yarjejeniyar zaman lafiya ta karshe.
Ya fara rubuta "De revolutionibus orbium coelestium".
Ya kusa kammala bayanan tsarin sararin samaniyarsa.
Sakataren Paparoma ya bayyana ka'idar Copernicus ga Paparoma da cardinaloli.
쇤베르크 추기경이 코페르니쿠스에게 편지를 써서 그의 책 출간을 재촉함
An fara aikin buga "De revolutionibus orbium coelestium".
An wallafa "De revolutionibus orbium coelestium", kuma ya rasu a ranar 24 ga Mayu bayan ya fuskanci ciwon shanywar barin jiki (cerebral hemorrhage).
An gano kashi (remains) da ake zargin na Copernicus ne a karkashin bagadin Frauenburg Cathedral.
Masanin kimiyyar kwayoyin halitta (genetics) na Jami'ar Uppsala ta kasar Sweden ya bayyana cewa DNA na kashin ya dace da DNA na gashin da aka samu a cikin littafin.
An sake gudanar da jana'izarsa a kasar Poland bayan kusan shekaru 500 da mutuwarsa.

keyAchievements.title: Nuna ra'ayin Heliocentrism
keyAchievements.description: Ya nuna kuskuren geocentrism wando aka amince da shi a matsayin gaskiya a lokacin, kuma ya nuna ra'ayin heliocentrism don samar da babban sauyi a kimiyyar halitta ta zamani.

keyAchievements.title: Wallafa "Commentariolus"
keyAchievements.description: Ya kammala harsashin tsarin heliocentrism kusan shekarar 1510 kuma ya raba takaitaccen bayani a matsayin rubutun hannu ga abokansa.

keyAchievements.title: Wallafa "De revolutionibus orbium coelestium"
keyAchievements.description: Ya wallafa littafin da ke tattare da dukkan bayanan tsarin sararin samaniyarsa a shekarar 1543 don gabatar da heliocentrism daki-dahu.

keyAchievements.title: Sauyi na Copernican (Copernican Revolution)
keyAchievements.description: Ya janyo sauyin tunani dari geocentrism na dan adam zuwa heliocentrism na zahiri, wando ya janyo soke ra'ayin sararin samaniya na tsakiyar zamani.

faq.question: Wane ne Copernicus?
faq.answer: Ya kasance limamin Roman Catholic da kuma masanin sararin samaniya na kasar Poland, wando ya nuna kuskuren geocentrism kuma ya nuna ra'ayin heliocentrism don janyo babban sauyi a kimiyyar halitta ta zamani.

faq.question: Menene ka'idar heliocentrism ta Copernicus?
faq.answer: Ka'ida ce da ke cewa rana tana tsakiyar sararin samaniya kuma duniyoyi ciki har da duniya suna kewaye da ita, wando ya kalubalanci tsarin sararin samaniya na Ptolemy na lokacin kai tsaye.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan littattafan Copernicus?
faq.answer: Akwai "Commentariolus" wando ya raba wa abokansa kusan shekarar 1510, da kuma babban littafinsa "De revolutionibus orbium coelestium" wando aka wallafa a shekarar 1543.

faq.question: Yaya aka gano kashin Copernicus?
faq.answer: An gano kashin a karkashin bagadin Frauenburg Cathedral a shekarar 2005, kuma an tabbatar da cewa nasa ne ta hanyar binciken DNA a shekarar 2008.

faq.question: Wane martani ka'idar Copernicus ta samu a lokacin?
faq.answer: Ko da yake martanin bai taka kara ya karya ba nan take bayan an wallafa "De revolutionibus orbium coelestium", ya yadu a tsakiyar lokaci kuma Cocin Roman Katolika ta saka shi a cikin jerin littattafan da aka hana a shekarar 1616.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Florence, tsakiyar Italiya.
Ya kulla yarjejeniyar aure da Gemma Donati.
Ya auri Gemma Donati.
Ya sami ilimi daban-daban ciki har da theology a Florence.
Ya shiga cikin yakin jam'iyyu (factional strife) da ya barke a Florence da Pisa.
Ya zama shugaban majalisar birnin Florence (Prior).
Ya kammala aikinsa na shugaban majalisar birnin Florence.
Ya rasu sakamakon zazzabin cizon sauro (malaria) a Ravenna.

keyAchievements.title: Divine Comedy (La Divina Commedia)
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne littafi mafi shahara na Dante, labari ne da ya dogara kan ra'ayin Kiristanci kuma ya kaddamar da adabin zamani.

keyAchievements.title: La Vita Nuova (The New Life)
keyAchievements.description: Littafi ne da ke magana game da soyayyarsa da Beatrice, kuma shi ne farkon muhimmin rubutu a harshen Italian.

keyAchievements.title: De vulgari eloquentia (On the Eloquence of Vernacular)
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne littafi na farko da ya binciki harshen gida na Italian ta hanyar linguistics, kuma shi ne littafin farko da ya bayyana hadewar Italiya ta hanyar harshe.

faq.question: Menene ainihin sunan Dante?
faq.answer: Ainihin sunansa shi ne Durante degli Alighieri, kuma Dante takaitaccen sunansa ne.

faq.question: Menene aikin Dante mafi shahara?
faq.answer: Babban aikinsa mafi shahara shi ne "Divine Comedy", kuma wannan littafi ya dogara kan ra'ayin Kiristanci kuma ya kaddamar da adabin zamani.

faq.question: Me yasa Dante ya yi rayuwar gudun hijira?
faq.answer: Saboda jam'iyyar Black Guelphs ta doke jam'iyyar White Guelphs ta hanyar amfani da burin Paparoma Boniface VIII, sannan ta kori Dante.

faq.question: Me yasa Dante ya rubuta ayyukansa a harshen Italian maimakon Latin?
faq.answer: Ya nufi bayyana sakon tsarki (catharsis) na tsakiyar zamani da kuma ceto da ke cikin "Divine Comedy" ga talakawa gaba daya.

dante-alighieri.missingDataNote: 베아트리체를 처음 만난 해, 단테의 망명 시작 연도, 단테에게 사형이 선고된 궐석 재판의 연도는 원문에 명시되어 있지 않아 생략했습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Mainz.
Mahaifinsa ya gudu zuwa Strasbourg bayan da mutanen gari suka kore shi.
Bayan rasuwar mahaifinsa, Gutenberg shi ma ya koma Strasbourg don zama.
Ya yi amfani da tsarin buga kudi na metal movable type (금속 활판 인쇄술).
Ya koma Mainz.
Ya yi nasara a buga kudi na metal type kuma ya bude dakin buga littattafai a Mainz.
Bayan ya gyara nau'in haruffa zuwa mafi kankanta kuma mafi ci gaba, ya buga Littafi Mai Tsarki na Tsohon Alkawari mai layuka 42 sau biyu.
Ya buga "Biblia Sacra" mai layuka 42 a kowane shafi.
Fust ya shigar da shari'a ga Archbishop na Mainz.
An wallafa "Mainz Psalter" a dakin buga littattafai na Fust-Schöffer.
Mutuwa.

keyAchievements.title: Amfani da tsarin buga kudi na metal movable type
keyAchievements.description: Shi mai kera kayan gwal (goldsmith) ne na kasar Jamus wando ya yi amfani da metal movable type kusan shekarar 1440.

keyAchievements.title: Yada tsare-tsare da fasahar samar da haruffa da yawa
keyAchievements.description: Ya yada tsare-tsaren haruffa da fasahar samar da su da yawa a duk fadin Turai.

keyAchievements.title: Hada fasahar buga littattafai
keyAchievements.description: Ya hada fasahar buga kudi na metal movable type, tawada na mai (oil-based ink), da kuma injin buga kudi na katako (wooden press).

keyAchievements.title: Amfani da kayan kera haruffa da tsarin simintin gyaran kafa
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi amfani da gami na karfe (metal alloy) a matsayin kayan kera haruffa, kuma ya yi amfani da tsarin simintin gyaran kafa (casting method).

keyAchievements.title: Buga Littafi Mai Tsarki na Gutenberg
keyAchievements.description: Ya buga Littafi Mai Tsarki na Latin mai layuka 36, wato "Gutenberg Bible", a karon farko ta amfani da haruffan Gothic.

keyAchievements.title: Buga Tsohon Alkawari mai layuka 42
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami yabo mai kyau saboda ingancin bugawa bayan ya gyara haruffa kuma ya buga Tsohon Alkawari mai layuka 42 sau biyu kusan shekarar 1453.

keyAchievements.title: Buga "Biblia Sacra"
keyAchievements.description: Ya buga "Biblia Sacra" mai layuka 42 a kowane shafi a shekarar 1455.

faq.question: Menene ainihin sunan Gutenberg?
faq.answer: Ainihin sunansa shi ne Johannes Gensfleisch, kuma Gutenberg taken sunansa ne na kowa.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Gutenberg?
faq.answer: An san cewa an haifi Gutenberg a Mainz a shekarar 1397 ko 1398.

faq.question: Menene babban aikin Gutenberg?
faq.answer: Babban aikinsa shi ne yada tsare-tsaren haruffa da fasahar samar da su da yawa a duk fadin Turai, da kuma hada wannan fasaha da tawada na mai da kuma injin buga kudi na katako.

faq.question: Wadanne littattafai Gutenberg ya buga?
faq.answer: Ya buga takardun shaidar gafarar zunubai (indulgences) na Cocin Katolika, Littafi Mai Tsarki na Latin mai layuka 36, da kuma "Biblia Sacra" mai layuka 42 a shekarar 1455.

faq.question: Wane tasiri fasahar buga littattafai ta Gutenberg ta yi ga tarihin dan adam?
faq.answer: Abubuwan da ya kera sun sa littattafai sun yadu a duk fadin Turai don janyo sauyin bayanai (information revolution), wando ya zama harsashin Renaissance, Reformation, da kuma yunkurin humanism.

voltaire.missingDataNote: 제공된 출처 원문은 'voltaire' 인물에 대한 정보가 아닌 'volatile' 키워드에 대한 설명이므로, 요청된 인물에 대한 정보는 찾을 수 없습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Oak Park, Illinois.
Ya halarci Makarantar Sakandare ta Oak Park and River Forest.
Ya wallafa rubutunsa na farko a cikin jaridar makarantar "The Trapeze".
Ya sami rauni mai tsanani sakamakon harin igwa lokacin da yake tuka motar asibiti (ambulance) a Italiya, kuma ya sami lambar yabo ta Silver Star.
Ya koma Amurka kuma ya fara aiki a matsayin mai rubutu mai zaman kansa (freelancer) da kuma ma'aikaci a "Toronto Star Weekly".
Ya auri Hadley Richardson kuma ya koma Paris don yin aiki a matsayin wakilin kasashen waje na "Toronto Star".
Ya hadu da Ezra Pound a shagon sayar da littattafai na Sylvia Beach "Shakespeare and Company".
Ya wallafa littafinsa na farko "Three Stories and Ten Poems" (세 편의 단편과 열 편의 시) kuma an haifi dansa Jack Hemingway.
Ya wallafa "In Our Time" (우리들의 시대에) kuma ya hadu da F. Scott Fitzgerald.
Ya wallafa littafinsa na farko "The Sun Also Rises".
Ya auri Pauline Pfeiffer bayan ya rabu da Hadley Richardson, kuma ya wallafa tarin gajerun labarai "Men Without Women" (여자 없는 남자들).
An haifi dansa Patrick, kuma ya sami labarin kisan kai na mahaifinsa ta hanyar kashe kansa.
Ya wallafa littafin "A Farewell to Arms".
Hannunsa na dama ya karye sakamakon hatsarin mota.
An haifi dansa na uku Gregory Hemingway.
Ya tafi tafiyar safari zuwa Kenya tare da Pauline.
Ya sayi jirgin kamun kifi "Pilar".
Ya wallafa "Green Hills of Africa".
Ya tafi Spain don ruwaito Yakin Basasa na Spain ga North American Newspaper Alliance (NANA), kuma ya wallafa "To Have and Have Not".
Ya fara zama a Hotel Ambos Mundos da ke Havana, Cuba.
Ya auri Martha Gellhorn kuma ya wallafa littafin "For Whom the Bell Tolls".
Ya tafi kasar Sin tare da Martha.
Ya zauna a London da Turai, kuma ya shiga cikin Normandy Landings da kuma Yakin Yantar da Paris a matsayin mai ba da rahoto.
Ya rabu da Martha Gellhorn.
Ya auri Mary Welsh.
Ya sami lambar yabo ta Bronze Star Medal don nuna jaruntakarsa a lokacin Yakin Duniya na Biyu.
Ya wallafa littafin "Across the River and into the Trees".
Ya sami lambar yabo ta Pulitzer Prize don littafin "The Old Man and the Sea", kuma ya tafi tafiyarsa ta biyu zuwa Afirka.
Ya sami hatsarin jirgin sama sau biyu a Afirka, kuma ya sami lambar yabo ta Nobel Prize in Literature.
Ya bar Cuba kuma ya sayi gida a wajen Ketchum, Idaho.
Ya bar Cuba ya nufi New York, kuma ya kwanta a Mayo Clinic.
Ya dawo Ketchum bayan ya fita dari Mayo Clinic, kuma ya kashe kansa da bindiga (shotgun) a ranar 2 ga Yuli.

keyAchievements.title: Gyara salon rubutu (style)
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi tasiri sosai ga littattafan karni na 20 ta hanyar amfani da gajeren salon rubutu da ake kira 'Iceberg Theory'.

keyAchievements.title: Lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannin Adabi (Nobel Prize in Literature)
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami lambar yabo ta Nobel Prize in Literature a shekarar 1954.

keyAchievements.title: Samun lambar yabo ta Pulitzer Prize
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami lambar yabo ta Pulitzer Prize don littafin "The Old Man and the Sea" a shekarar 1952.

keyAchievements.title: Wallafa manyan ayyuka
keyAchievements.description: Ya wallafa manyan ayyuka da dama kamar "The Sun Also Rises" (1926), "A Farewell to Arms" (1929), "For Whom the Bell Tolls" (1940), da "The Old Man and the Sea" (1951/1952).

keyAchievements.title: Samun Bronze Star Medal
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami lambar yabo ta Bronze Star Medal don nuna jaruntakarsa a lokacin Yakin Duniya na Biyu a shekarar 1947.

keyAchievements.title: Tasiri a kan adabi
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi tasiri sosai ga salon rubutu na adabin kasar Amurka gaba danya, kuma an shigar da shi cikin Chicago Literary Hall of Fame a shekarar 2012.

faq.question: Menene ainihin salon rubutu na Ernest Hemingway?
faq.answer: Hemingway ya yi amfani da gajeren salon rubutu da ake kira 'Iceberg Theory' don yin tasiri sosai ga littattafan karni na 20.

faq.question: Yaushe Hemingway ya sami Nobel Prize in Literature?
faq.answer: Hemingway ya sami Nobel Prize in Literature a shekarar 1954.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan littattafan Hemingway?
faq.answer: Manyan ayyukansa sun hada da "The Sun Also Rises", "A Farewell to Arms", "For Whom the Bell Tolls", da "The Old Man and the Sea".

faq.question: Yaya Hemingway ya kammala rayuwarsa?
faq.answer: Ya kashe kansa da bindiga (shotgun) a Ketchum, Idaho a ranar 2 ga Yuli, 1961.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan jigogi a cikin littattafan Hemingway?
faq.answer: Soyayya, yaki, daji, da kuma rashin nasara sune manyan jigogi a cikin ayyukansa, kuma ana kwatanta yanayi a matsayin wurin sake farfadowa da hutu.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa banki
keyAchievements.description: J. P. Morgan, mai saka hannun jari a banki (investment banker), ya kafa bankin da ya zama asalin JPMorgan Chase.

faq.question: Wane ne ya kafa JPMorgan Chase?
faq.answer: J. P. Morgan, mai saka hannun jari a banki (investment banker), ya kafa bankin da ya zama asalin JPMorgan Chase.

faq.question: Menene jimillar dukiyar JPMorgan Chase a yanzu?
faq.answer: Jimillar dukiyar JPMorgan Chase ta kai dalar Amurka triliyan 3.5.

faq.question: Wadanne bankuna ne JPMorgan Chase ke tare da su a matsayin manyan bankuna hudu na Amurka a yanzu?
faq.answer: A yanzu JPMorgan Chase yana daya daga cikin manyan bankuna hudu na Amurka tare da Bank of America, Citi, da Wells Fargo.

faq.question: Yaushe aka kafa tsarin JPMorgan Chase na yanzu?
faq.answer: Tsarin JPMorgan Chase na yanzu ya fito ne sakamakon hadewar manyan bankuna na Amurka tun daga shekarar 1996.

faq.question: Wane tarihi JPMorgan Chase yake da shi a karshen shekarar 2008?
faq.answer: JPMorgan Chase ya kasance banki mafi girma na kashin kai (ba tare da rassan banki ba) a karshen shekarar 2008.

jp-morgan.missingDataNote: 인물 J.P. Morgan에 대한 구체적인 생애 정보(출생/사망 연도, 개인적인 업적 등)는 원문에 명시되어 있지 않으며, 대부분의 내용은 그가 설립한 회사인 JP모건 체이스에 관한 것입니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Kiel, Holstein.
Ya shaida tattakin dakarun Prussia da Austria zuwa Kiel a lokacin Yakin Schleswig na Biyu.
Iyalinsa sun koma Munich kuma ya shiga Maximiliansgymnasium.
Ya fara bincike a Jami'ar Munich.
Ya yi bincike na shekara guda a Jami'ar Friedrich Wilhelm na Berlin.
Ya kare kasidarsa ta digirin digirgir "On the Second Law of Thermodynamics".
Ya sami habilitation ta hanyar wallafa kasidar "Equilibrium states of isotropic bodies at different temperatures".
An nada shi a matsayin mataimakin farfesa na theoretical physics a Jami'ar Kiel.
Ya auri Marie Merck.
An nada shi a matsayin magajin Kirchhoff a Jami'ar Friedrich Wilhelm na Berlin.
Ya zama 정교수가 됨 (Ordinary Professor).
Ya mayar da hankali kan matsalar black-body radiation.
Ya wallafa "Treatise on Thermodynamics".
Ya taimaka wajen kafa German Physical Society (DPG).
Ya wallafa sabuwar hanyar samun dokar Planck ta black-body radiation wacce ke kunshe da hasashen energy quantization.
Ya zama shugaban DPG (har zuwa 1909).
Matarsa ta farko Marie Planck ta rasu.
Ya auri matarsa ta biyu Marga von Hoesslin.
Ya sami damar kiran Einstein zuwa Berlin don samar masa da sabon gurbin farfesa.
Babban dansa Karl ya mutu a Yakin Verdun.
Diyarsa Grete ta rasu lokacin da take haihuwar danta na farko.
Ya sami Nobel Prize in Physics don gano energy quanta (ainihin lambar yabo ta kasance a shekarar 1919).
Diyarsa Emma ta rasu.
Ya kafa Emergency Association of German Science tare da Fritz Haber.
베를린에서 은퇴하고 에르빈 슈뢰딩거가 그의 뒤를 이음.
Ya zama shugaban Kaiser Wilhelm Society (KWG).
Yana da shekaru 74 lokacin da Nazis suka karbi mulki, kuma ya tattauna da Hitler game da yadda ake kula da farfesoshi na Yahudawa.
Lokacin mulkinsa na shugaban KWG ya zo karshe.
Ya cika shekaru 80 da haihuwa, kuma ya yi murabus daga mukamin shugaban Prussian Academy bayan da Nazis suka karbe ta.
Gidansa na Berlin ya lalace sakamakon harin sama, wando ya janyo asarar dukkan rubuce-rubucensa na kimiyya da wasikunsa.
An kashe dansa Erwin saboda shiga cikin yunkurin kashe Hitler.
Ya rasu a Göttingen.
An sake sunan Kaiser Wilhelm Society zuwa Max Planck Society (MPG).

keyAchievements.title: Gano energy quanta
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami Nobel Prize in Physics a shekarar 1918 don gano energy quanta, wando ya canza fahimtar atomic da subatomic processes.

keyAchievements.title: Kaddamar da quantum theory
keyAchievements.description: Sunansa na masanin kimiyya ya fito ne dari matsayinsa na wando ya kaddamar da quantum theory, wando ya kasance ra'ayi mai sauyi da bai dace da classical physics ba.

keyAchievements.title: Doka ta Planck na black-body radiation
keyAchievements.description: Ya fitar da doka ta Planck ta hanyar bincike kan matsalar black-body radiation, wacce ke bayyana spectrum na black body da kyau.

keyAchievements.title: Planck constant (h)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa harsashin quantum theory ta hanyar gabatar da Planck constant (h) ta hanyar hasashen cewa electromagnetic energy ana iya fitar da ita ne kawai a cikin tsari na quanta.

keyAchievements.title: Farko sanin da kuma gudunmawa ga theory of relativity
keyAchievements.description: Yana daya dari cikin mutane kalilan da suka gane mahimmancin special relativity na Albert Einstein nan take, kuma ya ba da gudunmawa wajen sake tsara ka'idar.

keyAchievements.title: Shugabanci a kungiyoyin kimiyya na Jamus
keyAchievements.description: Ya gudanar da manyan mukamai a kimiyyar Jamus ta hanyar zama shugaban DPG da kuma shugaban KWG.

faq.question: Wane muhimmin gano na kimiyya Max Planck ya yi?
faq.answer: Max Planck ya gano energy quanta kuma ya kaddamar da quantum theory don canza fahimtar atomic da subatomic processes.

faq.question: Yaushe Max Planck ya sami Nobel Prize in Physics?
faq.answer: Ya sami Nobel Prize in Physics a shekarar 1918 don gano energy quanta, kuma an ba shi lambar yabo a shekarar 1919.

faq.question: Wane matsayi Max Planck ya dauka game da mulkin Nazi?
faq.answer: Ya yi kokarin taimakawa abokan aikinsa na Yahudawa da kare yancin kimiyya, kuma ya tattauna da Hitler game da yadda ake kula da farfesoshi na Yahudawa sannan ya yi murabus daga mukamin shugaban Prussian Academy don nuna adawa ga Nazis.

faq.question: Wane ra'ayi na addini Max Planck yake da shi?
faq.answer: Ya kasance memba na Lutheran na Jamus, kuma ya yi imani da Allah mai iko duka da kuma jin kai (ko da ba lallai ba ne a matsayin Allah na kashin kai), sannan ya kalli cewa kimiyya da addini duka suna da burin 'zuwa ga Allah!'.

timeline.event: An haife ta a Alexandria, a matsayin diyar Theon, masanin falsafa da lissafi (geometer).
Masu zanga-zanga na Kiristoci sun kashe ta kuma sun lalata gawarta.

keyAchievements.title: Littafi game da lissafin taurari na Diophantus
keyAchievements.description: An gano sashi na littafinta a dakin karatu na Vatican kusan karni na 15.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta bayanin littafin "Arithmetica" na Diophantus
keyAchievements.description: Ana kiyasta shi a matsayin babban aikin bincike domin ta shigar da sababbin hanyoyin warwarewa da kuma tambayoyi da dama ban da na Diophantus.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta bayanin "Conics" na Apollonius
keyAchievements.description: Ta rubuta bayanin "Conics" na Apollonius.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta bayanin "Almagest" na Ptolemy
keyAchievements.description: Ta rubuta bayanin babban littafin Ptolemy "Almagest".

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta bayanin "Elements" na Euclid tare da mahaifinta
keyAchievements.description: Ta rubuta bayanin "Elements" na Euclid tare da mahaifinta Theon.

faq.question: Wace ce Hypatia?
faq.answer: Hypatia ta kasance shahararriyar mace masaniyar falsafa ta Neoplatonism da kuma masaniyar lissafi na kasar Greek da ta yi aiki a Alexandria, tsohuwar kasar Egypt.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan littattafan Hypatia?
faq.answer: Ta rubuta bayanai kan "Arithmetica" na Diophantus, "Conics" na Apollonius, da "Almagest" na Ptolemy, kuma ta rubuta bayanin "Elements" na Euclid tare da mahaifinta Theon.

faq.question: Yaya Hypatia ta mutu?
faq.answer: Masu zanga-zanga na Kiristoci sun kashe ta kuma sun lalata gawarta baada da aka kalle ta a matsayin mai adawa da Archbishop Cyril.

faq.question: Wane ne mahaifin Hypatia?
faq.answer: An haifi Hypatia a matsayin diyar Theon, masanin falsafa da lissafi.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin dan Etienne Pascal, jami'in haraji na Rouen, a Clermont-Ferrand, Faransa.
Ya gano da kansa cewa jimillar kusurwoyin ciki na triangle ya kai digiri 180.
Ya gano Pascal's triangle.
Ya shiga taron mako-mako na kungiyar masana lissafi na Faransa.
Ya tabbatar da Pascal's theorem, wando ya zama harsashin projective geometry.
Ya samar da propositions 400 ta amfani da Pascal's theorem.
Ya kera calculator ta farko, wato Pascaline.
Ya kafa Pascal's law wando ya zama harsashin hydrostatics ta hanyar gwaji da mercury column.
Ya gudanar da gwaje-gwajen vacuum ta amfani da bututu daban-daban a Rouen.
Masu kimiyya da dama ciki har da Mersenne sun gudanar da gwaje-gwajensa a Paris.
Ya wallafa "Discours sur le vide" (Kalamai kan vacuum).
Ya bar Rouen ya koma Paris saboda lalacewar lafiyarsa.
Ya yi jayayya da Descartes game da wanzuwar vacuum.
Ya rubuta kasida "Experiences nouvelles touchant le vide" (Sababbin gwaje-gwaje kan vacuum).
Ya gudanar da 'gwajin Pascal' don lura da canjin tsawo na mercury column bisa ga tsayi a Dutsen Puy de Dôme.
Ya rubuta kasida don tsara sakamakon gwajin Dutsen Puy de Dôme.
Ya daina binciken lissafi da kimiyya don mayar da hankali kan addini.
Ya bayyana dokar matsa lamba (Pascal's principle) a cikin "Treatise on the Equilibrium of Liquids".
Hatsarin motar dawakai (carriage accident) ya faru.
Ya rubuta bayanin imani baada ya ce ya ji murya daga sama, kuma ya nutse cikin ilimin addinin Kiristanci.
Ya fuskanci wahala ta hankali sakamakon yawan ciwon kai.
Ya ba da gidansa ga talakawa da suka kamu da smallpox kuma ya koma gidan yayarsa don zama.
Ya rasu sakamakon seizure.
Périer ya wallafa "Treatise on the Equilibrium of Liquids" baada rasuwarsa.

keyAchievements.title: Pascal's triangle
keyAchievements.description: Wannan shi ne tsarin binomial coefficients a cikin siffar triangle a fannin lissafi.

keyAchievements.title: Pascal's theorem
keyAchievements.description: Wannan theorem ne wando ya zama harsashin projective geometry, kuma ya tabbatar da shi yana da shekaru 16.

keyAchievements.title: Pascaline (Pascal's calculator)
keyAchievements.description: Wannan ita ce calculator ta farko a duniya da ya kera ta yana da shekaru 19, kuma tana iya yin tara da ragewa.

keyAchievements.title: Pascal's law (Pascal's principle)
keyAchievements.description: Doka ce da ke cewa idan aka kaddamar da matsa lamba ga sashi na fluid da ba ya motsi a cikin akwati da aka rufe, wannan matsa lamba yana tafiya ko'ina a cikin fluid din da karfi daya.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa harsashin probability theory
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa harsashin probability theory tare da Pierre de Fermat ta hanyar musayar wasiku.

keyAchievements.title: Binciken cycloid
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da gudunmawa ga ci gaban lissafi ta hanyar bincikar cycloid don mantawa da ciwon kansa na kai.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "Pensées"
keyAchievements.description: Wannan shi ne littafinsa da bai kammala ba wando ke kunshe da kariya ga addinin Kiristanci, kuma yana dauke da shahararriyar kalma "Mutum ciyawa ce mai tunani".

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "Lettres provinciales" (Provincial Letters)
keyAchievements.description: Littafi ne da ya rubuta don kare limaman Jansenist da Jesuits ke tsananta musu, kuma ana daukar sa a matsayin farkon adabin prose na zamani na Faransa.

faq.question: Wane ne Blaise Pascal?
faq.answer: Shi masanin halayyar dan adam ne na kasar Faransa, masanin lissafi, masanin kimiyya, masanin addini, masanin physics, mai kera injina, marubuci, masanin falsafa, kuma masanin kididdiga, kuma musamman ya sadaukar da lokaci mai yawa ga falsafa da ilimin addini.

faq.question: Menene Pascaline (Pascal's calculator)?
faq.answer: Ita ce calculator ta farko a duniya da ya kera ta yana da shekaru 19 don taimaka wa mahaifinsa wando yake mai kula da akawu (accountant), kuma tana iya yin tara da ragewa kawai.

faq.question: Menene Pascal's principle?
faq.answer: Doka ce da ke cewa idan aka kaddamar da matsa lamba ga sashi na fluid da ba ya motsi a cikin akwati da aka rufe, wannan matsa lamba yana tafiya ko'ina a cikin fluid din da karfi daya.

faq.question: Menene shahararriyar magana ta Pascal?
faq.answer: Ya bar shahararriyar magana cewa "Mutum ciyawa ce mai tunani".

faq.question: Me yasa Pascal ya daina binciken lissafi da kimiyya?
faq.answer: Ya daina binciken lissafi da kimiyya domin ya mayar da hankali sosai kan addini yana da shekaru 27.

timeline.event: An haife shi a ranar 23 ga watan Yuni.
Ya fara karatun lissafi a Jami'ar Cambridge.
Ya halarci kwas din scientific methodology na masanin physics Eddington kuma ya tabbatar da central limit theorem.
Ya tafi Jami'ar Princeton baada ya kawo hujjoji marasa kyau game da entscheidungsproblem (decision problem).
Ya dawo Cambridge baada ya kammala karatu a Jami'ar Princeton.
Ya shiga Sashen Rubuta Asiri (GCCS) a lokacin Yakin Duniya na Biyu don fara binciken cryptography.
Ya samar da Turing machine; ya gabatar da kafa sashen lissafi don kera electronic computer a National Physical Laboratory (NPL) a ranar 1 ga watan Oktoba.
Ya sami lambar yabo ta Order of the British Empire (OBE).
철학 저널 '마인드'에 '기계가 생각할 수 있는가?'라는 주제의 논문을 발표
'Yan sandan Birtaniya sun kama shi kuma an same shi da laifi bisa zargin luwadi (homosexuality).
Ya wallafa kasida game da zeta function.
Ya rasu sakamakon guba ta potassium cyanide a ranar 7 ga Yuni.
Sarauniya Elizabeth II ta yafe wa Turing laifin luwadi a ranar 24 ga watan Disamba.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da Turing machine
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da gudunmawa mai girma ga ci gaban kimiyyar kwamfuta ta hanyar tsara ra'ayoyin algorithms da lissafi ta hanyar samfurin da ake kira Turing machine.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da Turing test
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da gwajin da ke kimanta yadda amsar inji take kusa da ta dan adam bisa tambayar "Shin zai yiwu inji ya yi tunani?".

keyAchievements.title: Warware Enigma
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami nasarar warware asirin sojojin Jamus a lokacin Yakin Duniya na Biyu ta hanyar amfani da na'urar warware asiri da ake kira Bombe.

keyAchievements.title: Tabbatar da central limit theorem
keyAchievements.description: Ya tabbatar da wannan a shekarar 1933 ba tare da sanin cewa masanin lissafi na Finland Jarl Waldemar Lindeberg ya riga ya tabbatar da shi a shekarar 1922 ba.

keyAchievements.title: Tabbatar da kuskuren decision problem
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da hujjoji marasa kyau game da entscheidungsproblem (decision problem) a shekarar 1936.

faq.question: A wane fanni ne Alan Turing ya kasance jagora?
faq.answer: Ya kasance masanin kimiyyar kwamfuta, masanin lissafi, masanin cryptography, kuma masanin logic na kasar Ingila, kuma shi ne jagora a fannin kimiyyar kwamfuta.

faq.question: Don menene aka kafa Turing Award?
faq.answer: Kyauta ce da ACM ke bayarwa duk shekara ga mutanen da suka samar da manyan ayyuka a kimiyyar kwamfuta, kuma an kafa ta tun daga shekarar 1966 don girmama ayyukan Turing.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran Alan Turing da 'Uban Kimiyyar Kwamfuta'?
faq.answer: Ana kiran sa da 'Uban Kimiyyar Kwamfuta' saboda ya ba da gudunmawa mai girma ga fannin theoretical computer science da kuma basirar wucin gadi (artificial intelligence).

faq.question: Yaushe aka yafe wa Alan Turing laifin luwadi?
faq.answer: Sarauniya Elizabeth II ta yafe wa Turing laifin luwadi a ranar 24 ga watan Disamba, 2013, wato shekaru 59 baada mutuwarsa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Afshana kusa da Bukhara, a matsayin dan Abdullah ibn al-Hasan, mai karbar haraji na daular Samanid, da kuma Sitara.
Lokacin da yake shekaru biyar, iyalinsa sun koma Bukhara, kuma ya shiga makarantar kashin kai a Bukhara.
Lokacin da yake shekaru dogma, ya riga ya haddace adabi da yawa na Larabci da kuma Alkur'ani (Quran).
Ya fara duba marasa lafiya yana da shekaru dogma sha shida.
Ya yi karatu da kansa yana da shekaru dogma sha takwas, kuma ya fahimci falsafar Aristotle ta hanyar bayanin al-Farabi.
Ya rubuta littafinsa na farko "Compendium of the Sciences" (여러 학문의 집성) ga makwabcinsa al-Arudi yana da shekaru dogma sha takwas.
Daular Samanid ta rushe sakamakon harin daular Ghaznavid da kuma daular Karakhanid.
Mahaifinsa Abdullah ya rasu.
Ya rubuta kuma ya gabatar da encyclopedia mai juzu'i 20 "The Book of Fair Judgment" (공정한 판단의 서) ga masanin shari'a al-Barqi yana da shekaru ashirin da daya.
Ya bar Bukhara ya fara tafiya ta yawo yana da shekaru ashirin da biyu.
Ma'mun II, sarki na Urgench a yankin Khwarazm, ya nada shi a matsayin jami'i, kuma ya fara rubuta "The Canon of Medicine" (의학전범).
Ya koma Ray kusa da Tehran kuma ya rubuta gajerun labarai da kasidu kusa da 30.
Ya kammala "The Canon of Medicine" wando yake rubutawa tun da farko.
Shams al-Dawla ya rasu, kuma Ibn Sina ya bar aikinsa na gwamnati ya shiga buya.
Sabon sarki na Hamadan, Sama' al-Dawla, ya jefa shi a kurkuku.
Isfahan ya sami hari dari Mas'ud I, sarki na daular Ghaznavid, kuma an kwace kayansa ciki har da littattafan Ibn Sina.
Ya rasu a Hamadan.

keyAchievements.title: Tattara falsafa da magunguna
keyAchievements.description: Ya tattara falsafa da magunguna na Greek da Larabci, kuma ya hada falsafar Aristotle da Neoplatonism don yin tasiri sosai ga magunguna da falsafar Turai.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta The Canon of Medicine
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta "The Canon of Medicine" wando ke tattare da dukkan bayanan kiwon lafiya na lokacin, kuma an yi amfani da shi a matsayin littafi na asali na kiwon lafiya na Turai har zuwa karni na 17.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta The Book of Healing
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta "The Book of Healing", wando yake encyclopedia ne da ya hada dukkan fannonin ilimi ban da etiks da kuma siyasa.

keyAchievements.title: Binciken kimiyyar halitta
keyAchievements.description: Ya ki amincewa da yiwuwar canza karfe a alchemy, kuma ya binciki fannoni daban-daban na kimiyyar halitta kamar lissafi, physics, astronomy, da mineralogy.

keyAchievements.title: Tasiri a kan ilimin Turai
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi tasiri ga Thomas Aquinas, kuma ya zama dalilin farfado da falsafar Aristotle a Turai a karshen karni na 12.

faq.question: Yaya ake kiran Ibn Sina a cikin tarihi?
faq.answer: Ana kiran sa a matsayin masanin falsafa, likita, kuma masanin kimiyya na daular Persia, daya dari cikin manyan likitoci na tsakiyar zamani kuma babban masani da daular Musulunci ta samar.

faq.question: Menene babban littafin kiwon lafiya na Ibn Sina?
faq.answer: Ya rubuta "The Canon of Medicine" wando ke tattare da dukkan bayanan kiwon lafiya na lokacin, kuma an yi amfani da wannan littafi a matsayin littafi na asali na kiwon lafiya na Turai har zuwa karni na 17.

faq.question: Wace gudunmawa ta falsafa Ibn Sina ya bayyar?
faq.answer: Ya tattara falsafa na Greek da Larabci, kuma ya hada falsafar Aristotle da Neoplatonism don yin tasiri sosai ga magunguna da falsafar Turai.

faq.question: Wane matsayi Ibn Sina ya dauka game da alchemy?
faq.answer: Ya ki amincewa da yiwuwar canza karfe da alchemists na lokacin ke bi, kuma ya nuna cewa bambancin karfe yana da zurfi sosai saboda haka kayan gwal da aka kera ta hanyar alchemy jabu ne kawai.

james-watt.missingDataNote: 제공된 출처 원문은 'James Arthur'에 대한 정보이며, 'James Watt'에 대한 내용은 포함되어 있지 않습니다. 따라서 요청된 인물에 대한 정보는 비어 있습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Paris a matsayin babban dan Jean-Antoine Lavoisier da Émilie Lavoisier.
Ya kammala karatu a Collège Mazarin.
Ya sami digiri na farko a fannin shari'a (law).
Ya zama memba na French Academy of Sciences, kuma ya shiga cikin kamfanin karbar haraji Ferme générale.
Ya zama shahararre bayan ya wallafa kasidar da ke cewa ruwa ba zai iya juyawa zuwa kasa ba.
Ya auri Marie-Anne Pierrette Paulze.
Ya wallafa "Opuscules Physiques et chimiques" (Takaitaccen bayani kan physics da chemistry).
Anne-Robert-Jacques Turgot, shugaban kudi, ya nada shi a matsayin darakta na gunpowder.
Ya nuna cewa ana samun ruwa idan aka kona hydrogen tare da taimakon Pierre-Simon Laplace.
Ya zama darakta na French Academy of Sciences.
Ya wallafa "Méthode de nomenclature chimique" (Hanyar kiran sunayen sinadarai) tare da Claude Louis Berthollet da sauransu.
Ya wallafa "Traité Élémentaire de Chimie" (Elementary Treatise on Chemistry).
Ya shiga cikin aikin kera tsarin ma'auni guda daya (metric system) bisa bukatar majalisa.
Academies da dama ciki har da French Academy of Sciences sun rufe kofofinsu.
An jefa shi a kurkuku tare da surukinsa Jacques Paulze.
An same shi da laifi kuma aka fille kansa a guillotine da ke dandalin Place de la Révolution.
Marie-Anne Lavoisier ta sami damar dawo da kayan tarihin Lavoisier a hukumance.

keyAchievements.title: Jagorantar Chemical Revolution
keyAchievements.description: Ya jagoranci Chemical Revolution na karni na 18 kuma ya bar babban tarihi a tarihin chemistry da biology.

keyAchievements.title: Soke phlogiston theory da kafa ka'idar combustion
keyAchievements.description: Ya soke phlogiston theory ta hanyar nuna sabuwar ka'idar combustion, kuma ya nuna aikin oxygen don inganta fannin chemistry sosai.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa law of conservation of mass
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa law of conservation of mass, wando ke cewa a cikin sinadaran da suka hadu, abu ba ya samuwa ko lalacewa sai dai canza siffa kawai.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa harsashin sunayen sinadarai na zamani
keyAchievements.description: Ya raba elements da compounds, kuma ya jagoranci gyaran sunayen sinadarai don kafa harsashin chemistry na zamani.

keyAchievements.title: Shigar da hanyoyin kididdiga da kera jerin elements
keyAchievements.description: 화학에 정량적인 방법을 처음으로 도입하고, 원소 목록을 최초로 광범위하게 작성하여 규소의 존재를 예측했다.

faq.question: Me yasa aka kashe Antoine Lavoisier?
faq.answer: An tuhume shi da zargin damfarar haraji da kuma sayar da gurbataccen taba a lokacin babban yunkurin French Revolution, kuma aka fille kansa a guillotine duk da gudunmawar da ya bayyar ga kimiyya.

faq.question: Menene ainihin babban aikin kimiyya na Lavoisier?
faq.answer: Ya jagoranci Chemical Revolution ta hanyar soke phlogiston theory da bayyana aikin oxygen a wajen combustion da numfashi, kuma ya kafa law of conservation of mass sannan ya kafa harsashin sunayen sinadarai na zamani.

faq.question: Yaya Marie-Anne Paulze Lavoisier ta taimaka wa binciken mijinta?
faq.answer: Marie-Anne ta taimaka a matsayin mai taimaka wa gwaji ta hanyar zana hotunan kayan aiki, rubuta sakamako, fassara kasidun Turanci, kuma ta shiga cikin aikin kera tsarin metric system.

timeline.event: An haife shi a ranar 3 ga watan Yuli a shekara ta 13 ta Zhengde na daular Ming.
Ya fara aikin tattara littafin bayanan magunguna yana da shekaru 35.
Ya rasu a shekara ta 21 ta Wanli na daular Ming (yana da shekaru 76).
Wallafa "Compendium of Materia Medica" (본초강목) (bayan mutuwar Li Shizhen).

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta Compendium of Materia Medica
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta "Compendium of Materia Medica" wando ke tattare da ilimin ganyayyaki na magani (materia medica), wando ya yi tasiri sosai ga likitancin Gabashin Asiya da kuma tarihin halitta na baya.

keyAchievements.title: Gudunmawa ga acupuncture da binciken cututtuka
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da gudunmawa ga acupuncture da fannin binciken cututtuka (diagnosis).

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta Binhu Maixue
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta littafi game da ilimin bugun jini "Binhu Maixue" (빈호맥학).

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta Qijing Bamai Kao
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta littafi game da hanyoyin jini guda takwas "Qijing Bamai Kao" (기경팔맥고).

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta Wuzang Taolun
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta littafi game da manyan gabobin jiki guda biyar "Wuzang Taolun" (오장도론), amma a yanzu ya bace.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta Mingmen Kao
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta littafi game da kofar rai "Mingmen Kao" (명문고), amma a yanzu ya bace.

faq.question: Yaushe Li Shizhen ya haifu kuma yaushe ya rasu?
faq.answer: 이시진은 명나라 정덕 13년인 1518년 7월 3일에 태어나 명나라 만력 21년인 1593년에 76세의 나이로 사망했습니다.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan littattafan Li Shizhen?
faq.answer: Babban littafinsa shi ne "Compendium of Materia Medica" wando ke tattare da materia medica, kuma ya rubuta "Binhu Maixue" da "Qijing Bamai Kao" ban da wannan.

faq.question: Wadanne mukamai Li Shizhen ya rike?
faq.answer: Ya kasance likita a fadar Sarkin Chu, sannan ya zama likitan masarauta, kuma yana da tarihin zama mai mulki a Huanggang, Hubei na daular Ming.

faq.question: Yaya dangantakar iyalin Li Shizhen take?
faq.answer: Kakan Li Shizhen da mahaifinsa sun kasance likitoci, kuma sunan mahaifinsa shi ne Li Yanwen (ta fuskar sunaye na daban, sunansa na musamman na daban shi ne Naoyu, sunansa na laƙabi shi ne Yuechi).

li-shizhen.missingDataNote: 명나라 후베이 황강 태수 직책과 조정의 태의가 된 정확한 연도가 원문에 명시되어 있지 않아 타임라인에 포함하지 않았습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Clausthal, Masarautar Hanover.
Ya kammala karatun magunguna (medicine) a Jami'ar Göttingen.
Ya bayyana sakamakon binciken anthrax a Jami'ar Breslau.
Ya bayyana sarai cewa kwayar cutar anthrax (anthrax bacillus) ita ce ke janyo cutar anthrax.
Ya koma Imperial Health Office da ke Berlin.
Ya fara gano kwayar cutar tuberculosis (tubercle bacillus).
Ya yi tafiya zuwa Egypt da India kuma ya gano kwayar cutar cholera (cholera vibrio).
Ya bayyana sarai cewa kwayar cutar cholera ce ke janyo cutar cholera.
Ya gano tuberculin, wando yake antigen na tubercle bacillus.
Ya zama shugaban farko na Prussian Institute for Infectious Diseases da ke Berlin.
Ya sami Nobel Prize in Physiology or Medicine don kafa bacteriology da kuma gano tubercle bacillus.
Ya rasu a Baden-Baden.

keyAchievements.title: Bayyana dalilan anthrax da cholera
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami yabo a matsayin 'Uban Bacteriology' baada ya tabbatar da cewa kwayoyin cutar sune ke janyo anthrax a shekarar 1877 da kuma cholera a shekarar 1885/1883.

keyAchievements.title: Gano tubercle bacillus
keyAchievements.description: Ya fara gano tubercle bacillus a shekarar 1882, kuma ya nuna cewa yana yaduwa ta iska.

keyAchievements.title: Kaddamar da hanyoyin binciken kwayoyin cuta
keyAchievements.description: Ya taimaka wa ci gaban microbiology ta hanyar samar da hanyoyin tsayar da samfurin kwayoyin cuta, rini (staining), da kuma daukar hoto ta microscope.

keyAchievements.title: Gano tuberculin
keyAchievements.description: Ya gano tuberculin na tubercle bacillus a shekarar 1890.

faq.question: Wane ne Robert Koch?
faq.answer: Robert Koch ya kasance likita da kuma masanin microbiology na kasar Jamus wando aka haife shi a shekarar 1843 kuma ya rasu a shekarar 1910, kuma ana kiran sa da 'Uban Bacteriology'.

faq.question: Menene babban aikin Robert Koch?
faq.answer: Ya bayyana kwayoyin cutar da ke janyo anthrax a shekarar 1877 da cholera a shekarar 1885/1883, kuma ya fara gano tubercle bacillus a shekarar 1882.

faq.question: Yaushe Robert Koch ya sami Nobel Prize?
faq.answer: Ya sami Nobel Prize in Physiology or Medicine a shekarar 1905 don gudunmawar da ya bayyar ga kafa bacteriology da kuma gano tubercle bacillus.

faq.question: Shin Robert Koch ya gano tuberculin?
faq.answer: E, ya gano tuberculin a shekarar 1890, amma baada haka aka gano cewa ba shi da amfani, wando ya sa sunansa ya dan ragu na wucin gadi.

robert-koch.missingDataNote: 프로이센-프랑스 전쟁 당시 군의관 근무 및 시골 의사 근무에 대한 구체적인 연도는 원문에 명시되어 있지 않아 생략했습니다. 베를린 대학교에서의 미생물 연구 시점도 구체적인 연도가 없어 생략했습니다.

rumi.missingDataNote: 제공된 출처 원문은 'rumi' 인물에 대한 내용이 아니므로, 해당 인물에 대한 정보는 추출할 수 없습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Tus, Khorasan.
Duk da shahararsa, ya bar aikinsa na asali don zama Sufi na yawo a Mecca da sauran yankuna daban-daban saboda wahala ta addini da sauran dalilai.
Ya koma mahaifarsa don yin murabus kuma ya rasu.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "The Incoherence of the Philosophers" (철학자의 모순)
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta littafin da ke sukar wasu masana falsafa wadanda suka shigar da falsafar Greek cikin Musulunci da karfi, wando ya janyo sabani da Alkur'ani.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "The Revival of the Religious Sciences" da "Deliverance from Error"
keyAchievements.description: Ya bar littattafai masu daraja kamar "The Revival of the Religious Sciences" (종교 제학의 소생) da "Deliverance from Error" (미혹으로부터의 해방) wadanda suka yi tasiri sosai ga mutanen baya.

keyAchievements.title: Hada orthodox theology da Sufism
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da babban aiki ta hanyar hada orthodox theology da Sufism don ba da sabuwar rayuwa ga tsarin addinin Musulunci.

keyAchievements.title: Kare orthodox Islam
keyAchievements.description: Ya taimaka wajen kare orthodox Islam ta hanyar sukar falsafar Ibn Sina.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da sauyi na ilimin Musulunci
keyAchievements.description: Ya fitar da ilimin Musulunci daga scholastic theology, ya farfado da Alkur'ani da Hadisi, kuma ya janyo sauyi a tunanin addinin Musulunci.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa matsayin Sufism
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa matsayin Sufism a cikin addinin Musulunci, wando ya sa talakawan Musulmi suka yarda da shi.

faq.question: Yaya ake kiran al-Ghazali a cikin tarihi?
faq.answer: Shi ne masanin addini da ake kalla a matsayin Musulmi mafi girma bayan Annabi Muhammadu, kuma shi ne babban mutum a fannin falsafa da Sufism.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan littattafan al-Ghazali?
faq.answer: Manyan littattafansa sun hada da "The Incoherence of the Philosophers", "The Revival of the Religious Sciences", da "Deliverance from Error".

faq.question: Menene babban aikin al-Ghazali?
faq.answer: Babban aikinsa shi ne hada orthodox theology da Sufism, da kuma kare orthodox Islam ta hanyar sukar falsafar Ibn Sina.

faq.question: Wane sauyi al-Ghazali ya kawo wa tunanin addinin Musulunci?
faq.answer: Ya fitar da ilimin Musulunci daga scholastic theology, ya sake dawo da wasu sassa na asali, ya kafa matsayin Sufism, kuma ya sa falsafa ta zama mafi kusa ga talakawan Musulmi.

al-ghazali.missingDataNote: 바그다드 니자미야 학원 교수 재임 시작 연도 및 《철학자의 모순》 저술 연도는 원문에 명시되어 있지 않습니다.

timeline.event: Haifuwa
Ya shiga buya a kauyen Qalat Ibn Salama da ke yankin Oran na Algeria don mayar da hankali kan binciken ilimi.

Ya koma Cairo, Egypt don yin laccoci daban-daban, ya sami amincewar Sultan Barquq na daular Mamluk, kuma ya zama farfesa a makarantu da dama sannan an nada shi a matsayin babban alkali na mazhabar Maliki.
Mutuwa

keyAchievements.title: "Kitab al-Ibar" (Littafin Darussa)
keyAchievements.description: Littafi ne na tarihin duniya wando ya nemi tsara tarihin Musulunci na Yammacin Asiya, kuma yana kunshe da bayanai da tarihin Larabawa, Persians, da kuma Berbers.

keyAchievements.title: "Muqaddimah" (Gabatarwa)
keyAchievements.description: Gabatarwa ce ta littafin "Kitab al-Ibar" wacce ta kasance shahararren littafi na duniya da ke binciki tsari da dokokin canjin al'umma kuma yana neman amsa tambayoyi na asali na tarihin al'adu.

faq.question: Wane ne Ibn Khaldun?
faq.answer: Ibn Khaldun ya kasance masanin tarihi, mai tunani, kuma dan siyasa na tsakiyar zamanin Musulunci wando ya yi aiki daga shekarar 1332 zuwa 1406. Ya fito ne dari sanannen dangin Khaldun da suka gudu zuwa Tunis daga Seville, Spain.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan littattafan Ibn Khaldun?
faq.answer: Manyan littattafansa sune "Kitab al-Ibar", wando ya kasance tarihin duniya da ke neman tsara tarihin Musulunci na Yammacin Asiya, da kuma "Muqaddimah", wando ya kasance gabatarwa a farkon littafin. Musamman "Muqaddimah" ana kiyasta shi a matsayin shahararren littafi na duniya da ke binciki dokokin canjin al'umma.

faq.question: Yaya tarihin siyasa na Ibn Khaldun yake?
faq.answer: Ya yi aiki a matsayin sakatare, jakada, da kuma babban alkali a gwamnatocin Musulunci daban-daban kamar daular Hafsid, daular Marinid, da kuma daular Nasrid, amma ya rayu cikin tafiye-tafiye da dama saboda shiga cikin makirci ko kuma rikici na siyasa. Wannan kwarewa ta siyasa ta yi tasiri sosai ga tunaninsa na masani a baya.

keyAchievements.title: Kaddamar da Zoroastrianism
keyAchievements.description: Ya zama jagoran ruhaniya na Zoroastrianism ta hanyar sukar addinan daxan na tsohuwar kasar Iran.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta littattafai masu tsarki
keyAchievements.description: An san cewa shi ne ya rubuta "Gathas" da "Yasna Haptanghaiti" wadanda suke littattafai masu tsarki na Zoroastrianism.

keyAchievements.title: Tasiri na falsafa
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi tasiri ga Heraclitus, Plato, Pythagoras, da kuma addinan Abrahamic ciki har da Judaism, Kiristanci, da kuma Musulunci.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa ra'ayoyin Asha da Druj
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa ra'ayin da ke kallon yanayin dan adam a matsayin fada na ruhaniya a tsakanin Asha (tsari) da Druj (karya/ha'inci).

keyAchievements.title: Karfafa yancin kashin kai da nauyi
keyAchievements.description: Ya karfafa yancin kashin kai wajen zaben daidai da kuskure, da kuma nauyin da ke wuyan mutum a kan ayyukansa.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa tsarin etiks na Mazdayasna
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa tsarin etiks na addini mai suna Mazdayasna wando ke nufin 'bauta wa hikima/Mazda'.

faq.question: A ina aka haifi Zoroaster?
faq.answer: Ba a san inda aka haife shi ba, kuma ainihin wurin haifuwarsa ba shi da tabbas.

faq.question: Yaushe Zoroaster ya rayu?
faq.answer: Babu yarjejeniya a tsakanin masana game da shekarunsa, kuma sun kiyasta cewa ya rayu a wani lokaci tsakanin karni na 2 BC da karni na 6 BC.

faq.question: Daga ina sunan 'Zoroaster' ya fito?
faq.answer: Sunansa na fassara 'Zoroaster' ya fito ne dari kalmar Greek ta karni na 5 BC "Zōroastrēs".

faq.question: Wadanne littattafai Zoroaster ya rubuta?
faq.answer: An san cewa shi ne ya rubuta "Gathas" da "Yasna Haptanghaiti" wadanda suke littattafai masu tsarki na Zoroastrianism.

faq.question: Menene falsafar Zoroaster ta fi karfafa kai kai?
faq.answer: Ya karfafa yancin kashin kai wajen zaben daidai da kuskure, da kuma nauyin da ke wuyan mutum a kan ayyukansa.

zoroaster.missingDataNote: 조로아스터의 정확한 출생 및 사망 연도와 주요 생애 사건에 대한 합의된 정보가 원문에 없어 타임라인 항목을 생략했습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Alcalá de Henares, wani birni na jami'a kusa da Madrid.
Ya tafi Rome tare da wani cardinal na Italiya don zama soja kuma ya shiga Yakin Lepanto, inda ya sami rauni a hannunsa na hagu.
Masu fashi da makami na teku (pirates) sun kama shi kuma ya yi rayuwar bawa na shekaru 5 a Algeria.
Ya dawo Madrid don fara rubutu baada an yafe kudin fansa tare da taimakon kungiyar Trinitarians.
Ya wallafa littafin "La Galatea", amma bai samu farin jini sosai ba.
Ya wallafa sashi na farko na "Don Quixote" kuma ya sami farin jini sosai.
Ya kammala sashi na biyu na "Don Quixote".
Ya rasu yana da shekaru 69.

keyAchievements.title: Don Quixote
keyAchievements.description: Littafi ne da mutane da dama ke kallo a matsayin littafin farko na zamani na Turai.

keyAchievements.title: La Galatea
keyAchievements.description: Ya wallafa littafin "La Galatea", amma bai samu farin jini sosai ba.

faq.question: Menene sunan laƙabi na Miguel de Cervantes?
faq.answer: Yana da sunan laƙabi "el Príncipe de los Ingenios" (Sarkin Hikima).

faq.question: A ina aka haifi Miguel de Cervantes?
faq.answer: An haife shi a Alcalá de Henares, wani birni na jami'a kusa da Madrid.

faq.question: Menene ainihin aikin Miguel de Cervantes?
faq.answer: Ya kasance marubucin littattafai (novelist), mawaki, kuma marubucin wasan kwaikwayo (playwright).

faq.question: Yaya ake auna ayyukan Miguel de Cervantes?
faq.answer: Ana kallon ayyukansa a matsayin manyan littattafai masu daraja a tarihin adabi gaba danya, kuma musamman "Don Quixote" ana kiyasta shi a matsayin littafin farko na zamani na Turai.

miguel-de-cervantes.missingDataNote: 어린 시절에 대한 정보가 거의 알려지지 않았습니다.

timeline.event: An haife ta a Heian-kyo, Japan.
Ta tafi lardin Echizen tare da mahaifinta lokacin da aka nada shi a matsayin jami'in lardin Echizen.
Ta dawo Kyoto kuma ta auri Fujiwara no Nobutaka.
An haifi diyarta Kenshi (Kataiko).
Mijinta Nobutaka ya rasu sakamakon cutar cholera.
Ta rubuta "The Tale of Genji" (겐지모노가타리).
Fujiwara no Michinaga ya gayyace ta zuwa fadar masarauta don zama mai kula da Empress Shoshi.
An ambaci sunan Fujiwara no Takako (藤原香子) a cikin tarihin fadar masarauta (wando ake zargin ainihin sunan Murasaki ne).
Ta rasu.
An kammala fassarar Turanci ta juzu'i 6 na "The Tale of Genji".

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta The Tale of Genji
keyAchievements.description: Ta rubuta "The Tale of Genji", wando ake kallo a matsayin daya dari cikin littattafan farko na duniya a harshen Japan.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta Murasaki Shikibu Diary
keyAchievements.description: Ta rubuta "Murasaki Shikibu Diary" (무라사키 시키부 일기).

keyAchievements.title: Karatu da koyar da harshen Sinanci na gargajiya
keyAchievements.description: Ta koyi harshen Sinanci na gargajiya (Classical Chinese), wando ya kasance haramun ga mata a lokacin Heian, a karkashin mahaifinta wando ya kasance masani, kuma ta koyar da Empress Shoshi.

faq.question: Menene ainihin sunan Murasaki Shikibu?
faq.answer: Murasaki Shikibu taken sunan rubutu ne, kuma ko da yake ba a san ainihin sunanta ba, ana zargin cewa ita ce Fujiwara no Takako (藤原香子) da aka ambata a tarihin fadar masarauta a shekarar 1007.

faq.question: Yaya Murasaki Shikibu ta sami damar koyon harshen Sinanci na gargajiya?
faq.answer: Mata na lokacin Heian ba sa samun horon koyon Sinanci na gargajiya, amma ta girma a karkashin mahaifinta masani kuma ta nuna kwarewa mai kyau wajen rubuta shi cikin sauki.

faq.question: Yaushe aka rubuta "The Tale of Genji"?
faq.answer: An rubuta "The Tale of Genji" tsakanin shekarar 1000 da 1012.

faq.question: Yaushe kuma me yasa Murasaki Shikibu ta zama mai kula a fadar masarauta?
faq.answer: An gayyace ta a matsayin mai kula da Empress Shoshi ta hannun Fujiwara no Michinaga lokacin da take tsakiyar shekaru 30 saboda shahararta ta marubuciya.

faq.question: Yaya alakar Sei Shonagon da Murasaki Shikibu take?
faq.answer: Murasaki Shikibu ta kalli Sei Shonagon a matsayin abokiyar takara, kuma ta soki girman kai na Shonagon da kuma nuna kwarewarta ta harshen Sinanci.

murasaki-shikibu.missingDataNote: 무라사키 시키부의 정확한 출생 연도는 970년경 또는 978년경으로도 추정되며, 사망 연도 또한 1025년경 또는 1031년까지 생존했다는 설이 있습니다. 무라사키 시키부가 《겐지모노가타리》의 집필을 시작한 시기는 확실하지 않으며, 남편 후지와라 노부타카의 다른 아내와 자식들의 수는 알려지지 않았습니다. 무라사키가 미치나가의 첩으로 궁정에 끌려갔다는 증거는 없습니다.

timeline.event: An haife ta a matsayin diyar Li Geifei.
Ta auri Zhao Mingcheng.
Zhao Mingcheng ya shiga cikin lamarin Yuanyou, wando ya janyo rabuwarsu ta farko.
Rushewar daular Northern Song.
Zhao Mingcheng ya rasu.
Ta sake auren Zhang Ruzhou.
Mutuwa

keyAchievements.title: Tattara Jinshi Lu
keyAchievements.description: Ta binciki rubutun tsohon karfe da dutse (epigraphy) tare da mijinta Zhao Mingcheng don tattara "Jinshi Lu" (금석록).

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta waka ta Song Ci
keyAchievements.description: Ta nuna kyakkyawan salo mai cike da fasaha ta hanyar rubuta ayyuka masu kyau da ke bin salon Li Yu da Yan Jidao.

keyAchievements.title: Sharhi kan mawakan Song Ci
keyAchievements.description: An san cewa ta ba da sharhi mai kyau kan mawakan Song Ci na daular Song.

faq.question: Wace ce Li Qingzhao?
faq.answer: Li Qingzhao ta kasance mawakiya ta daular Southern Song ta kasar Sin, wacce kuma aka sani da laƙabin Yi'an Jushi (이안거사), kuma an haife ta a karshen daular Northern Song a shekarar 1081.

faq.question: Menene babban aikin Li Qingzhao?
faq.answer: Ta tattara "Jinshi Lu" tare da mijinta Zhao Mingcheng, kuma ta sami suna a tarihin adabi ta hanyar rubuta Song Ci mai kyau da cike da fasaha.

faq.question: Yaya rayuwar Li Qingzhao ta canza?
