Rundunar yaki ta Ingila da aka tura Faransa ta lalace.
Yaki ya fara da dakarun tawaye na Ireland karkashin jagorancin Hugh O'Neill.
Sojojin Ingila karkashin jagorancin Robert Devereux sun sha kashi a Ireland.
Ta ba da izinin kafa English East India Company.
Majalisar Wakilai ta Ingila ta shigar da korafe-korafe don soke mummunan tsarin hadin gwiwar farashi (price fixing).
An kashe Robert Devereux, Earl of Essex.
Lafiyarta ta tabarbare sosai sakamakon mutuwar abokan arziki.
Ta rasu a Fadar Richmond.

keyAchievements.title: Tsawon mulki da kuma sarki na karshe na Daular Tudor
keyAchievements.description: Ta kasance sarki na karshe na Daular Tudor, tana mulkar Masarautar Ingila da Ireland na tsawon shekaru 44 tun daga hawan sarauta a shekarar 1558 har zuwa mutuwarta a shekarar 1603.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Cocin Ingila (Church of England)
keyAchievements.description: Ta juya manufar addini ta Mary I kuma ta sake tabbatar da rabuwa da Catholic don tabbatar da zama lafiya na Cocin Ingila (Church of England).

keyAchievements.title: Alamar zama Budurwa Sarauniya (Virgin Queen)
keyAchievements.description: Ta ki yarda ta yi aure duk da yawan neman aurenta wando ya sa ake kiran ta "Sarauniya Budurwa", kuma an sanya wa jihar Virginia ta Amurka suna don girmama ta.

keyAchievements.title: Haɗin gwiwa da ƙwararrun ma'aikatan gwamnati
keyAchievements.description: Ta gudanar da mulkin kasa ta hanyar hadin gwiwa da majalisa tare da taimakon kwararrun ma'aikata kamar William Cecil.

keyAchievements.title: Kashe Mary, Sarauniyar Scots
keyAchievements.description: Ta yi amfani da kungiyar sirri ta Francis Walsingham don gano tare da dakatar da makircin Mary, Sarauniyar Scots, kuma ta kashe ta don kawar da barazanar sarauta.

keyAchievements.title: Doke sojojin ruwa na Spain (Armada)
keyAchievements.description: Ta taimaka wajen kayar da rundunar Spanish Armada sakamakon harin da sojojin ruwa na Ingila suka kai a Yakin Ingila da Spain.

keyAchievements.title: Bada izinin kafa Kamfanin Gabashin Indiya na Ingila (East India Company).
keyAchievements.description: 1600년 12월 31일 잉글랜드 동인도 회사를 인가하여 해외 식민지 개척의 기반을 마련했습니다.

faq.question: Elizabeth I ta kasance diyar wane?
faq.answer: An haife ta a matsanin diyar Henry VIII da matarsa ta biyu Anne Boleyn.

faq.question: Me yasa aka kira Elizabeth I da 'Sarauniya Budurwa'?
faq.answer: Ta ki yin aure duk da yawan neman aurenta wando ya sa ake kiran ta "Sarauniya Budurwa", kuma a shekarar 1599 ta bayyana cewa "ta auri kasarta".

faq.question: Yaya manufar addini ta Elizabeth I take?
faq.answer: Ta soke manufar Mary I ta dawo da Catholic kuma ta kafa Cocin Ingila, yayin da ta nuna hakuri ga Katolika amma ta takaita Puritan sosai.

faq.question: Yaya dangantakar Mary, Sarauniyar Scots da Elizabeth I take?
faq.answer: Mary, Sarauniyar Scots ta zama barazana ta boye ta hanyar ikirarin gadon sarauta na Elizabeth I, kuma a karshe Elizabeth I ta yanke kanta sakamakon Makircin Babington.

faq.question: Menene babban lamari na kasashen waje a lokacin mulkin Elizabeth I?
faq.answer: Mafi muhimmanci shi ne kayar da Spanish Armada a Yakin Ingila da Spain, kuma an kafa harsashin neman yankuna a ketare tare da ba da izinin kafa English East India Company.

timeline.event: An haife shi a ranar 15 ga watan Fabrairu a Ireland.
Ya shiga cikin tafiyar binciken kudancin duniya (Antarctica) ta Robert Falcon Scott.
An zabe shi a matsanin memba na National Antarctic Expedition a watan Maris.
Discovery ta tashi zuwa Antarctica a ranar 6 ga watan Agusta.
Ya gano katon kankara (iceberg) a ranar 2 ga watan Janairu.
Ya tsere dari tarin kankara (pack ice) a ranar 8 ga watan Janairu.
Ya sauka a Granite Harbour na South Victoria Land a ranar 20 ga watan Janairu don tattara duwatsu.
Ya gano sabuwar kasa a ranar 30 ga watan Janairu.
Ya dauki hoton farko a duniya na babban yankin Antarctica dari mita 240 a sama ta hanyar amfani da balloon a ranar 4 ga watan Fabrairu.
Ya yada sansani kusa da McMurdo Sound a ranar 8 ga watan Fabrairu.
Ya gano hanya ta farko ta kasa zuwa South Pole tsakanin 19 da 22 ga watan Fabrairu ta hanyar tafiya a kasa na Antarctica.
Scott, Wilson, da Shackleton sun tashi zuwa South Pole a ranar 2 ga watan Nuwamba.
Ya sanar da rashin nasarar binciken Antarctica a latitude 81 deg kudu a ranar 19 ga watan Disamba.
An karkata shi a kan keken kankara (sledge) zuwa sansani a ranar 30 ga watan Janairu.
Ya koma cikin Discovery a ranar 3 ga watan Fabrairu.
An mayar da shi zuwa London ta hanyar jirgin ceto a ranar 1 ga watan Maris.
Ya isa Birtaniya a ranar 12 ga watan Yuni.
Ya jagoranci tafiyar binciken Antarctica da kansa.
Ya kammala tara kudi a ranar 25 ga watan Maris.
Ya tashi dari Birtaniya a ranar 7 ga watan Agusta.
Ya karbi Royal Victorian Order, Class 4 (MVO).
Edgeworth David, daya dari manyan mambobin tafiyar, ya zama mutum na farko da ya hau Dutsen Erebus a duniya.
Ya isa latitude 88 deg 23 min kudu, wando bil'adam bai taba kaiwa ba kafin nan, a ranar 9 ga watan Janairu.
Ya dawo Birtaniya a watan Yuni.
Ya karbi Royal Victorian Order, Class 3 (CVO).
Ya sami lakabin Knight (knighthood).
Ya ci gaba da binciken Antarctica.
Endurance ta sake tashi dari Tsibirin South Georgia a ranar 5 ga watan Disamba.
Ya fara haduwa da iceberg a ranar 8 ga watan Disamba.
Ya ratsa ta cikin pack ice a ranar 11 ga watan Disamba.
Ya isa Coats Land a ranar 12 ga watan Janairu.
Ya fita dari pack ice zuwa teku a ranar 15 ga watan Oktoba.
Endurance ta lalace sakamakon matsewa a tsakanin pack ice a ranar 27 ga watan Oktoba.
Tarin kankara ya narke bayan kwanaki 70 a ranar 7 ga watan Nuwamba.
Ya bar Ocean Camp a ranar 23 ga watan Disamba.
Ya kaddamar da kananan jiragen ruwa (boats) don nufar kasa, kuma ya sauka a Tsibirin Elephant a ranar 10 ga watan Afrilu.
Mutane 6 na zabi sun nufi Tsibirin South Georgia don neman ceto a ranar 24 ga watan Afrilu.
Sun isa gabar kudu na Tsibirin South Georgia a ranar 8 ga watan Mayu.
Shackleton, Worsley, da Crean sun fara ketare Tsibirin South Georgia a ranar 15 ga watan Mayu.
Sun isa tashar whaling (sansanin kamun kifi) a ranar 20 ga watan Mayu.
An ceto dukkan mambobin da aka bari a Tsibirin Elephant a ranar 8 ga watan Oktoba.
Ya karbi Order of the British Empire, Military Division, Class 4 (OBE).
Ya ci gaba da binciken Antarctica.
Quest wacce ke dauke da Shackleton ta tashi zuwa Tsibirin South Georgia a watan Satumba.
Ya sauka a Stromness Bay na Tsibirin South Georgia a ranar 4 ga watan Janairu.
Ya rasu sakamakon myocardial infarction (atherosclerosis) a ranar 5 ga watan Janairu.

keyAchievements.title: Hawan Dutsen Erebus na farko (runduna)
keyAchievements.description: Edgeworth David, daya dari mambobin tafiyar da ya jagoranta, ya zama mutum na farko da ya hau Dutsen Erebus a shekarar 1908.

keyAchievements.title: Isa latitude 88 deg 23 min kudu
keyAchievements.description: Ya isa latitude 88 deg 23 min kudu, wando bil'adam bai taba kaiwa ba kafin nan, a lokacin tafiyar Nimrod a shekarar 1909.

keyAchievements.title: Ceto mambobin Endurance
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami nasarar ceto dukkan mambobi 27 ba tare da rasa kowa ba a cikin mawuyacin hali na Antarctica a lokacin tafiyar Endurance a shekarar 1916.

keyAchievements.title: Daukar hoton Antarctica
keyAchievements.description: Ya dauki hoton farko na Antarctica dari mita 240 a sama ta hanyar amfani da balloon a shekarar 1902.

keyAchievements.title: Gano hanyar kasa zuwa South Pole
keyAchievements.description: Ya gano hanya ta farko ta kasa zuwa South Pole a shekarar 1902 ta hanyar tafiya a kasa na Antarctica.

faq.question: Yaushe kuma a ina aka haifi Ernest Shackleton?
faq.answer: An haife shi a ranar 15 ga watan Fabrairu, 1874 a Ireland.

faq.question: Shin Ernest Shackleton ya isa South Pole?
faq.answer: Ya kasa kaiwa South Pole saboda rashin abinci lokacin da ya rage kilomita 155 a shekarar 1908, kuma ya isa latitude 88 deg 23 min kudu a shekarar 1909.

faq.question: Menene aikin da aka fi sanin Ernest Shackleton da shi?
faq.answer: Shi ne ceto dukkan mambobi 27 ba tare da rasa kowa ba a cikin mawuyacin hali na Antarctica a lokacin tafiyar Endurance a shekarar 1916.

faq.question: Yaya Ernest Shackleton ya rasu?
faq.answer: Ya rasu sakamakon myocardial infarction a Stromness Bay na Tsibirin South Georgia a lokacin tafiyar Quest a ranar 5 ga watan Janairu, 1922.

faq.question: Wadanne lambobin yabo Ernest Shackleton ya karba?
faq.answer: Ya karbi MVO a shekarar 1907, CVO da lakabin Knight a shekarar 1909, da kuma OBE a shekarar 1919.

dorothea-dix.missingDataNote: 제공된 출처 원문은 'Dorothea Lange'에 대한 정보이며, 요청된 인물 'dorothea-dix'에 대한 정보가 아닙니다. 따라서 요청된 인물에 대한 정보는 추출할 수 없습니다.

timeline.event: 프란츠 페터 슈베르트 출생
Ya fara koyon kayan kida dari mahaifinsa yana da shekaru 5.
Ya shiga makarantar mahaifinsa don fara ilimin kida na yau da kullum.
Ya sami darussa dari Michael Holzer yana da shekaru 7; ya karbi jagoranci dari Salieri.
Ya shiga Stadtkonvikt (궁정신학원) a matsanin dalibi mai samun tallafi (scholarship).
Ya bar makarantar masarauta yana da shekaru 13 saboda canjin murya da kuma rashin sakamako mai kyau a karatu.
Ya fara aiki a matsanin mataimakin malami a makarantar firamare ta mahaifinsa; ya tsara Mass in F major.
Ya tsara daruruwan wakoki yana da shekaru 18; ya tsara "Erlkönig" (마왕), "Rastlose Liebe" (휴식 없는 사랑), da "Heidenröslein" (들장미).
프란츠 폰 쇼버의 권유로 친구 집에 머물며 작곡에 몰두하기 시작; 방랑 생활 시작; 매독 감염 추정
Ya hadu da Johann Michael Vogl.
Ya tsara wakokin "Death and the Maiden" (죽음과 소녀) da "The Trout" (송어); ya zama malami a gidan Duke Esterházy.

Ya yi tafiyar kide-kide zuwa sassa daban-daban na arewacin Austria tare da Vogl; Vogl ya rera kidansa a bainar jama'a a karon farko; ya gaza samun aikin koyarwa a makarantar Laibach; ya tsara wakar "Der Wanderer" (방랑자) da "Symphony No. 5".
Ya tsara Symphony No. 8 "Unfinished" (미완성).
Ya kaddamar da "Wanderer Fantasy" da "Rosamunde"; ya tsara "Die schöne Müllerin" (아름다운 물방앗간의 처녀).
Ya sake zama malamin kida na iyalin Esterházy; ya tsara String Quartet.
Ya yi tafiya zuwa yammacin Austria tare da Vogl; ya tsara "Ave Maria".
Ya tsara "Winterreise" (겨울 여행) yana da shekaru 30; ya ziyarci gidan Beethoven don haduwa da shi a ranar 19 ga watan Maris; ya shiga jana'izar Beethoven a ranar 26 ga watan Maris.

Ya gudanar da taron kade-kade na kansa cikin nasara a watan Maris; ya kammala Symphony No. 9 "Great"; ya kammala mafi yawan wakokin da ke cikin "Schwanengesang" (백조의 노래) a watan Agusta; ya kwanta rashin lafiya saboda wata cuta da ba a sani ba a ranar 17 ga watan Nuwamba; ya rasu yana da shekaru 31 a Vienna a ranar 19 ga watan Nuwamba.

keyAchievements.title: Wanda ya kafa salon Lieder na Jamus na karni na 19
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance wanda ya kafa salon Lieder na Jamus na karni na 19, kuma ya bar manyan ayyuka da dama musamman a cikin Lieder.

keyAchievements.title: 'Sarkin Wakoki' (King of Song)
keyAchievements.description: Ana kiran sa 'Sarkin Wakoki' saboda ya tsara wakoki fiye da 600.

keyAchievements.title: Manyan tarin wakoki (song cycles)
keyAchievements.description: Ya bar shahararrun tarin wakoki kamar "Winterreise", "Die schöne Müllerin", da "Schwanengesang".

keyAchievements.title: Manyan symphonies
keyAchievements.description: Symphony No. 8 "Unfinished" da kuma No. 9 "Great" sune aka fi sani.

keyAchievements.title: Piano Quintet "Trout" (송어)
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara Piano Quintet "Trout" mai tsari na musamman ta hanyar amfani da double bass maimakon violin na biyu a cikin string quartet.

keyAchievements.title: Wakar "Erlkönig" (마왕)
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara wakar "Erlkönig" dangane da wakar Goethe yana da shekaru 17.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran Schubert da 'Sarkin Wakoki'?
faq.answer: Saboda ya tsara wakoki fiye da 600, kuma ana kiyasta shi a matsanin wanda ya kafa salon Lieder na Jamus na karni na 19 saboda yawan manyan ayyukansa na Lieder.

faq.question: Me yasa aka sami rudani a tsarin lambobin symphonies na Schubert?
faq.answer: Saboda an ci gaba da gano tare da wallafa ayyukansa da ba a kaddamar ba baada mutuwarsa, lambobin sun canza sau da dama, kuma a yanzu ana amfani da hanyoyi daban-daban.

faq.question: Shin Schubert da Beethoven sun taba haduwa?
faq.answer: Kwarai kuwa, Schubert ya ziyarci Beethoven a ranar 19 ga watan Maris, 1827, wato mako guda kafin mutuwar Beethoven, wando ya kasance haduwarsu ta farko kuma ta karshe.

faq.question: Menene ake zargin sanadin mutuwar Schubert?
faq.answer: Ko da yake akwai tambayoyi da ba a amsa ba game da mutuwarsa, a yanzu ana zargin cewa ya mutu ne sakamakon cutar syphilis.

faq.question: Wadanne ne shahararrun tarin wakoki na Schubert?
faq.answer: Shahararrun sune "Winterreise", "Die schöne Müllerin", da kuma "Schwanengesang" da aka wallafa baada mutuwarsa.

timeline.event: Haifuwar Frederick II.
Ya yi yunkurin guduwa zuwa ketare tare da taimakon Lieutenant Hans Hermann von Katte da kuma Lieutenant Peter Karl Christoph von Keith.
Mahaifinsa sarki ya sake shi kuma ya dawo da matsayinsa.
Ya auri Elisabeth Christine.
Frederick II ya zama sarki baada mutuwar Frederick William I.
Sojojin Prussia sun nufi Silesia don fara Yakin Gadon Sarauta na Austria.
Ya kulla Yarjejeniyar Breslau don karbe kusan dukkan yankin Silesia.
Ya mamaye kuma ya hade East Frisia baada mutuwar Duke Charles Edzard.
Ya tura sojoji 80,000 zuwa Bohemia.
Ya kulla Yarjejeniyar Dresden don tabbatar da hakkinsa a kan Silesia da kuma samun kudin diyya.
Ya mamaye Saxony don fara Yakin Shekara Bakwai (Seven Years' War).
Saxony ta mika wuya.
Ya sha kashi sosai a hannun sojojin Austria a Yakin Kolin.
Yakin Kunersdorf.
Sojojin Austria sun kewaye Berlin.
Empress Elizabeth na Rasha ta rasu ba zato ba tsammani, kuma hawan Peter III ya janyo kulla zaman lafiya tsakanin Prussia da Rasha.
An tabbatar da ikon Prussia a kan Silesia ta hanyar kulla yarjejeniyar zaman lafiya.
Ya karbi West Prussia ta hanyar shiga Raba Poland na Farko (First Partition of Poland).
Ya yi yaki da Austria a Yakin Gadon Sarauta na Bavaria.
Ya rasu a Fadar Sanssouci da ke Potsdam.
Yu Kil-chun ya gabatar da shi ga Koriya ta hanyar rubutunsa "Tarihin Yakin Shekara Bakwai na Babban Sarki Frederick na Kasar Prussia".
An binne shi tare da karnukansa a harabar Fadar Sanssouci baada hadewar Jamus kamar yadda ya bar wasiyya.

keyAchievements.title: Manufar hakuri da addinai da soke azaba (torture)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kaddamar da manufar hakuri da addinai kuma ya soke azaba a lokacin shari'a.

keyAchievements.title: Bunkasar Prussia ta zama babbar kasa ta soja
keyAchievements.description: Ya bunkasa Prussia ta zama mafi karfin soja a Turai ta hanyar basirarsa ta soja da kuma gudanar da kasa cikin hikima.

keyAchievements.title: Tabbatar da Silesia da kuma ikon Prussia
keyAchievements.description: Ya ci nasara a yakin da ya yi da Austria don karbe Silesia, kuma ya kafa ikon Prussia a cikin kasashen Jamus.

keyAchievements.title: Kaddamar da tsarin soja na kasa (conscription)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kaddamar da tsarin soja na kasa don karfafa horon soja ga maza na Prussia.

keyAchievements.title: Fadada ilimi na bai daya da shiga cikin tsara tsarin mulki (constitution)
keyAchievements.description: Ya nuna manufar hakuri da dukkan addinai, ya fadada ilimi na bai daya, kuma ya shiga cikin aikin tsara tsarin mulki.

keyAchievements.title: Farfado da Berlin Academy
keyAchievements.description: Ya farfado da Berlin Academy don sake kiran masana da tsohon sarki ya kora.

keyAchievements.title: Samun West Prussia
keyAchievements.description: Ya fadada kasarsa ta hanyar karbe West Prussia (wacce take karkashin Poland a lokacin) a Raba Poland na Farko na shekarar 1772.

faq.question: Yaya ake auna Frederick II?
faq.answer: Ana sallonsa a matsanin sarkin wayewa (enlightened monarch) wando ya kaddamar da hakuri da addini da soke azaba, kuma ya bunkasa Prussia ta zama mafi karfin soja a Turai ta hanyar basirarsa ta soja da kuma gudanar da kasa cikin hikima.

faq.question: Wadanne manyan manufofi Frederick II ya kaddamar?
faq.answer: Ya kaddamar da manufofi kamar hakuri da addinai, soke azaba a shari'a, fadada ilimi na bai daya, tsarin soja na kasa, da kuma aikin tsara tsarin mulki.

faq.question: Me yasa aka fara kiran Frederick II da 'Babban Sarki' (Frederick the Great)?
faq.answer: Ya sami lakabin 'Babban Sarki' lokacin da aka kulla Yarjejeniyar Dresden a shekarar 1745 baada ya ci nasara a Yakin Gadon Sarauta na Austria, wando ke nufin matsayinsa daya da na sarki (emperor).

faq.question: Menene shahararren littafin Frederick II?
faq.answer: Ya rubuta "Anti-Machiavel" (반마키아벨리론) wando ke adawa da dabarun Machiavelli.

faq.question: Shin Frederick II yana da yara?
faq.answer: Ya auri Elisabeth Christine amma ba su sami yara ba, kuma wando ya gaje shi shi ne dansa na gefe (nephew) Frederick William II.

timeline.event: Haihuwa
Princess Victoria ta gayyace ta zuwa nadin sarauta.
Mutuwa

keyAchievements.title: Mace ta farko mai binciken zamantakewa (sociologist) na Birtaniya.
keyAchievements.description: Tana kasancewa mace ta farko mai binciken zamantakewa (sociologist) na Birtaniya kuma sananniyar mai ka'idar zamantakewa.

keyAchievements.title: Fassarar ayyukan Auguste Comte.
keyAchievements.description: Ta fassara ayyukan Auguste Comte.

keyAchievements.title: Yancin kai na tattalin arziki
keyAchievements.description: Ta sami isasshen kudi don kula da kanta, wando ya kasance abu mai wuya ga mata marubuta a lokacin.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da dabarun binciken zamantakewa
keyAchievements.description: Martineau ta ba da shawarar cewa "Ku maida hankali kan dukkan bangarori [na zamantakewa] ciki har da manyan tsarin siyasa, addini, da na jama'a."

keyAchievements.title: Bincike kan matsayin mata
keyAchievements.description: Ta yi bincike mai zurfi kan matsayin mata a karkashin maza.

faq.question: Wace ce Harriet Martineau?
faq.answer: Harriet Martineau ta kasance mace ta farko mai binciken zamantakewa (sociologist) na Birtaniya kuma mai ka'idar zamantakewa wacce aka haife ta a shekarar 1802 kuma ta rasu a shekarar 1876.

faq.question: Menene babban aikin Harriet Martineau?
faq.answer: Ta fassara ayyukan Auguste Comte, kuma ta sami isasshen kudi don kula da kanta, wando ya kasance abu mai wuya ga mata marubuta a lokacin.

faq.question: Wace gudunmawa ta bayyar ga sociology?
faq.answer: Ta ba da shawarar maida hankali kan dukkan bangarori na zamantakewa, kuma ta yi bincike mai zurfi kan matsayin mata a karkashin maza.

timeline.event: An haife ta a Mississippi a matsanin diyar dangin bayi na James Wells da Elizabeth Warrenton.
Mahaifanta sun rasu sakamakon cutar yellow fever (황열병), wando ya sa ta kula da kannenta tun tana karama.
Ta kai karar kamfanin jirgin kasa baada an kore ta dari rukunin farko (first class) na jirgin kasa a Tennessee.
Kotun kasa ta soke hukuncin kotun kasa da ke kasa a shari'ar da ta yi da kamfanin jirgin kasa, wando ya sa Wells ta biya kudin shari'ar.
Abokanta bakar fata Thomas Moss, Calvin McDowell, da Henry Stewart sun rasu sakamakon kisan gilla (lynching).
Ta yi aiki tare da Ferdinand Barnett don nuna muryar bakar fata a World's Columbian Exposition na Chicago.
Ta tsara 'Women's Era Club', kungiyar mata bakar fata na Chicago.
Ta shiga cikin kafa National Association of Colored Women's Clubs.
Ta shiga cikin kafa NAACP.
Ta rasu sakamakon cutar uremia (요독증) tana da shekaru 68 a Chicago.
Google Doodle ya yi bikin murnar zagayowar ranar haifuwar Wells ta 153.
An amince da dokar sake sanya wa 'Congress Parkway' na Chicago suna 'Ida B. Wells Drive'.

keyAchievements.title: Kalubalantar kisan gilla ta hanyar jarida
keyAchievements.description: Ta rubuta labarai da ke sukar kisan gilla ga bakar fata a cikin jaridu na gida, kuma ta wallafa littafin "Southern Horrors" (남부의 공포) don nuna tsananin wannan rikici.

keyAchievements.title: Shari'a da kamfanin jirgin kasa
keyAchievements.description: Ta taka rawar gani a matsanin jagorar yancin mata bakar fata ta hanyar yin shari'a da kamfanin jirgin kasa baada an kore ta dari rukunin farko na jirgin kasa saboda ita bakar fata ce.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa da kuma shiga cikin kungiyoyin gwagwarmaya
keyAchievements.description: Ta tsara 'Women's Era Club', ta shiga cikin kafa National Association of Colored Women's Clubs, kuma ta shiga cikin kafa NAACP.

faq.question: Wace ce Ida B. Wells?
faq.answer: Ida B. Wells ta kasance yar jarida, editan jarida, mai neman yancin zabe na mata, sociologist, mai fafutukar mata, Georgist, kuma jagorar gwagwarmayar yancin bil'adam na farko a Amurka, kuma ana kiran ta alamar mai fafutukar mata bakar fata na karni na 19.

faq.question: Wadanne kungiyoyi Ida B. Wells ta shiga kafa su?
faq.answer: Ta tsara 'Women's Era Club' a shekarar 1893, ta shiga cikin kafa National Association of Colored Women's Clubs a shekarar 1896, kuma ta shiga cikin kafa NAACP a shekarar 1909.

faq.question: Wadanne ayyuka Ida B. Wells ta yi game da kisan gilla?
faq.answer: Ta rubuta labarai a jarida don sukar kisan gilla baada kisan gilla na abokanta bakar fata, kuma ta wallafa littafin "Southern Horrors" don nuna tsananin wannan rikici.

faq.question: Yaya Ida B. Wells take da alaka da Rosa Parks?
faq.answer: Ana kiran ta mai fafutuka wacce ta riga Rosa Parks (wacce ta jagoranci Montgomery bus boycott a shekarar 1955) saboda ta yi shari'a da kamfanin jirgin kasa baada an kore ta dari rukunin farko na jirgin kasa saboda ita bakar fata ce.

timeline.event: An haife shi a ranar 15 ga watan Yuli a Leiden, kimanin kilomita 50 a yammacin Amsterdam, a matsanin yaro na tara na mai nika gari.
Ya shiga Jami'ar Leiden yana da shekaru 14.
Ya bude dakin zane na kansa kuma ya sami jagoranci dari Pieter Lastman.
Ya koma Amsterdam, kuma ya sami suna a matsanin mai zane baada ya kera "The Anatomy Lesson of Dr. Nicolaes Tulp" (튈프 박사의 해부학 강의).
Ya kera "The Night Watch" (야경) amma ya sami mummunan sharhi, kuma matarsa ta rasu a wannan shekarar.
Ya kera "An Old Woman in an Armchair" (의자에 앉아 있는 나이 든 여인).
Ya rayu a cikin talauci a unguwar Yahudawa baada an bayyana fatararsa (bankruptcy).
Ya rasu shi kadai a Amsterdam a ranar 4 ga watan Oktoba.

keyAchievements.title: Gudunmawa ga Dutch Golden Age
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da gudunmawa ga samar da lokacin da masana tarihi ke kira 'Dutch Golden Age'.

keyAchievements.title: Horar da masu zane da gama
keyAchievements.description: Ya koyar da manyan masu zane na Dutch da dama na tsawon shekaru 20.

keyAchievements.title: Uban amfani da haske da duhu na zamani (Chiaroscuro)
keyAchievements.description: Ana kiran sa 'uban amfani da haske da duhu na zamani' saboda ya samu nasara ta hanyar nuna bambancin haske da inuwa.

keyAchievements.title: Jagoran etching (동판화)
keyAchievements.description: Ya bar shahararrun ayyuka (etchings) kusan 300 a matsanin jagoran etching na Arewar Turai.

keyAchievements.title: Halin musamman da ya wuce al'adar lokacin
keyAchievements.description: Ya nuna fasalin zane da ke nuna halinsa na musamman da ya wuce al'adun lokacin.

faq.question: Yaushe kuma a ina Rembrandt ya haifu kuma yaushe ya rasu?
faq.answer: An haife shi a Leiden a ranar 15 ga watan Yuli, 1606, kuma ya rasu a Amsterdam a ranar 4 ga watan Oktoba, 1669.

faq.question: Wadanne ne shahararrun ayyukan Rembrandt?
faq.answer: Shahararrun ayyukansa sun hada da "The Anatomy Lesson of Dr. Nicolaes Tulp" (1632), "The Night Watch" (1642), da "Bathsheba at Her Bath" (1654).

faq.question: Menene ainihin siffar zane na Rembrandt?
faq.answer: Ana kiran sa 'uban amfani da haske da duhu na zamani' saboda ya nuna bambancin haske da inuwa, kuma siffarsa ita ce nuna halin musamman da ya wuce al'ada da kuma bayyana tunanin mutane.

faq.question: Yaya karshen rayuwar Rembrandt ya kasance?
faq.answer: 말년은 개인적인 비극과 재정적인 어려움으로 특징지어졌으며, 1656년 파산 선고를 받고 가난에 시달리다 1669년 쓸쓸히 죽었습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsanin dan na biyu na John Dickens da Elizabeth Barrow a Portsmouth, Birtaniya.
Ya zama mai daukar rubutu na kotu sannan ya zama dan jarida mai saurin rubutu (shorthand writer) na jarida.
Ya zama dan jarida na majalisa na "The Morning Chronicle" kuma ya fara rubutu karkashin sunan bogi "Boz".
Ya wallafa rubuce-rubuce da dama kamar "Scenes of London" a cikin "The Evening Chronicle" wando George Hogarth yake edita a kai.
Ya wallafa "Sketches by Boz".
Ya zama shahararre baada ya wallafa "The Pickwick Papers" (픽윅 보고서) a matsanin kashi-kashi (serialised).
Ya shiga damuwa baada kanwar matarsa Mary ta rasu sakamakon cuta farat daya.
Ya wallafa "Oliver Twist" (올리버 트위스트).
Ya wallafa "Nicholas Nickleby" (니콜라스 니클비).
Ya wallafa "The Old Curiosity Shop" (골동품 가게 이야기).
Ya wallafa "Barnaby Rudge".
Ya ziyarci Amurka tare da matarsa Catherine a cikin jirgin ruwa na Britannia.
Ya wallafa "The Child's Story" (그 아이의 이야기).
Ya wallafa "A Christmas Carol" (크리스마스 캐럴).
Ya wallafa "Martin Chuzzlewit".
Ya wallafa "Dombey and Son".
Ya wallafa "David Copperfield" (데이비드 코퍼필드).
Ya wallafa "A Child's History of England".
Ya wallafa "Bleak House" (황폐한 집).
Ya wallafa "Hard Times" (어려운 시절).
Ya wallafa "Little Dorrit" (작은 도릿).
Ya wallafa "A Tale of Two Cities" (두 도시 이야기).
Ya wallafa "Great Expectations" (위대한 유산).
Ya wallafa "Our Mutual Friend".
Ya sake ziyartar Amurka a karo na biyu.
Ya wallafa "The Mystery of Edwin Drood" (에드윈 드루드의 비밀).
Ya rasu yana da shekaru 58 a Gads Hill.

keyAchievements.title: Wallafa The Pickwick Papers da samun shahara
keyAchievements.description: Ya zama shahararre baada ya wallafa "The Pickwick Papers" a matsanin kashi-kashi, wando ya fara rubuta shi don zane-zane na Robert Seymour.

keyAchievements.title: Shahararren marubuci da mai sukar jama'a na zamanin Victoria (Victorian era)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera shahararrun jaruman litattafai a duniya, kuma ya yi aiki a matsanin marubuci da mai sukar jama'a na zamanin Victoria na Birtaniya.

keyAchievements.title: Shahara ga jama'a da tasiri ga al'umma
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi tafiye-tafiye a duk fadin Birtaniya da Amurka don karanta litattafansa, wando ya janyo babban nasara, kuma ra'ayoyinsa sun yi tasiri sosai ga al'umma.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta shahararrun ayyuka da dama
keyAchievements.description: Ya wallafa shahararrun ayyuka kamar "David Copperfield", "Great Expectations", "Oliver Twist", "A Christmas Carol", da "A Tale of Two Cities".

faq.question: Wane marubuci ne Charles Dickens?
faq.answer: Ya kera shahararrun jaruman litattafai a duniya, kuma ya kasance marubuci da mai sukar jama'a na zamanin Victoria na Birtaniya.

faq.question: Wadanne ne shahararrun ayyukan Charles Dickens?
faq.answer: Shahararrun ayyukansa sun hada da "David Copperfield", "Great Expectations", "Oliver Twist", "A Christmas Carol", da "A Tale of Two Cities".

faq.question: Wace kwarewa Charles Dickens ya samu a lokacin yarintarsa?
faq.answer: Ya yi aiki a masana'antar goge takalmi yana da shekaru 12 a cikin mawuyacin hali, kuma wannan kwarewa ta bayyana a cikin littafinsa na tarihin rayuwa "David Copperfield".

faq.question: Me yasa Charles Dickens ya ziyarci Amurka?
faq.answer: Ziyararsa ta farko a shekarar 1842 ta kasance don tattauna matsalar hakkin mallaka (copyright) tsakanin kasashe, kuma ziyara ta biyu a shekarar 1867 ta kasance don rangadin karanta litattafansa.

faq.question: Menene babban siffar ayyukan Charles Dickens?
faq.answer: Ayyukansa suna dauke da tausayi ga matalauta da kuma sukar munanan dabi'un al'umma, kuma sun fi nuna farin jini da kuma tunani kan matsalolin al'umma.

charles-dickens.missingDataNote: 어린 시절 가족의 이사 및 구두약 공장 취직, 변호사 사무실 사환 등의 사건은 나이만 명시되어 있고 정확한 연도가 원문에 직접 명시되어 있지 않아 타임라인에서 제외했습니다.

timeline.event: 25 ga watan Disamba, an haifi Clarissa "Clara" Harlowe Barton.
12 ga watan Afrilu, Clarissa "Clara" Harlowe Barton ta rasu.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa kungiyar Red Cross ta Amurka
keyAchievements.description: Ita ce ta kafa kungiyar Red Cross ta Amurka (American Red Cross).

keyAchievements.title: Aikin jiyya a lokacin Yakin Basasa
keyAchievements.description: Ta yi aiki a matsanin jami'ar jiyya (nurse) a lokacin Yakin Basasa na Amurka (American Civil War).

faq.question: Wace ce Clara Barton?
faq.answer: Clarissa "Clara" Harlowe Barton ita ce ta kafa kungiyar Red Cross ta Amurka, kuma ta yi aiki a matsanin jami'ar jiyya a lokacin Yakin Basasa na Amurka.

faq.question: Menene babban aikin Clara Barton?
faq.answer: Ta kafa kungiyar Red Cross ta Amurka.

clara-barton.missingDataNote: 미국 남북 전쟁 당시 간호 활동 및 전쟁 이후 여성 관련 인도주의 활동에 대한 구체적인 정보가 원문에 없습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Leipzig, Saxony ga mahaifinsa Friedrich Leibniz da mahaifiyarsa Catharina Schmuck.
Ya sami baftisma a Cocin St. Nicholas.
Ya fara kera na'urar da za ta iya yin lissafi hudu na asali.
An zabe shi a matsanin Fellow of the Royal Society.
Ya gabatar da calculus na integral don lissafin fili tsakanin hoton y = f(x) da layin X, kuma ya kera tsarin rubuta calculus.
An korea shi (ko an kira shi) zuwa gamayyar kasashen Turai wacce wakilan kasashe ke gudanar da ita.
Ya tsara na'urar da ke nuna lambobin binary ta hanyar amfani da kananan duwatsu, wando ya zama asalin punch card.
Ya fara kokarin magance matsalar ambaliyar ruwa a mahakar azurfa ta Harz a Jamus.
Ya fara bayyana pinwheel calculator.
Ya bayyana ra'ayoyin lissafi na trigonometric functions da logarithmic functions.
Ya bayyana ra'ayoyin lissafi na trigonometric functions da logarithmic functions.
Ya rubuta "Specimen Dynamicum".
Ya sami nasarar kafa Berlin Academy of Sciences kuma ya zama shugabanta har zuwa mutuwarsa.
Ya kammala rubuta "New Essays on Human Understanding" (인간오성신론).
Ya wallafa "Theodicy" (변신론).
Ya fara mahawara da John Keill, Newton, da sauran mutane kan ko ya gano calculus daban da Newton.
Ya rubuta "Monadology" (모나드론).
Ya sake yin tunani kan hasashen cewa za a samu Tarayyar Turai.
Ya rasu.
An wallafa "New Essays on Human Understanding".

keyAchievements.title: Kaddamar da infinitesimal calculus
keyAchievements.description: Ya kaddamar da infinitesimal calculus daban da Isaac Newton, kuma har yanzu ana amfani da alamomin lissafinsa sosai.

keyAchievements.title: Kera mechanical calculator
keyAchievements.description: Ya kara ayyukan multiplication da division na atomatik ga na'urar lissafi ta Pascal, ya fara bayyana pinwheel calculator a shekarar 1685, kuma ya kera Leibniz wheel.

keyAchievements.title: Tattara tsarin lambobin binary
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara tsarin lambobin binary wando ya zama asalin dukkan kwamfutoci, kuma ya kera na'urar da ke nuna binary ta hanyar amfani da kananan duwatsu.

keyAchievements.title: Falsafar optimism
keyAchievements.description: Yana da shahara da falsafarsa ta optimism wacce ke cewa sararin samaniya da muke ciki shi ne mafi kyau da Allah zai iya halitta, kuma yana daya dari cikin manyan masu ra'ayin hankali (rationalists) uku na karni na 17.

keyAchievements.title: Tsara ka'idar dynamics
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara sabuwar ka'idar motsi (dynamics) dangane da kinetic energy da potential energy, kuma ya sabawa ra'ayin Newton na absolute space ta hanyar kallon sarari a matsanin relative.

keyAchievements.title: Hangen nesa na geology
keyAchievements.description: Ya bayyana cewa duniya tana da narke (molten) core, wando ya yi daidai da geologin zamani.

keyAchievements.title: Rarraba a fannin psychology
keyAchievements.description: Ya bayyana rarrabewar hankali (conscious) da kuma rashin sani (unconscious).

keyAchievements.title: Uban applied science
keyAchievements.description: Ya dauki taken "Theory with Practice" (실천을 가진 이론) a matsanin jagora don amfani da ka'idoji a rayuwar yau da kullum, kuma ya tsara na'urori daban-daban kamar propeller na iska, famfon ruwa, da kuma submarine.

keyAchievements.title: Bunkasar library science
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance daya dari cikin wadanda suka kafa library science ta hanyar aiki a matsanin mai kula da littattafai (librarian) a Hanover da Wolfenbüttel na Jamus, kuma ya tsara sabon ginin laburare tare da kera tsarin index na kansa.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Berlin Academy of Sciences
keyAchievements.description: Ya taimaka wajen kafa Berlin Academy of Sciences kai tsaye a shekarar 1700, kuma ya kasance shugabanta har zuwa mutuwarsa.

keyAchievements.title: Bincike kan falsafar kasar Sin (Chinese philosophy)
keyAchievements.description: Ya lura da alakar tsarin I Ching (주역) da lambobin binary, kuma ya yi kokarin shigar da ra'ayoyin Confucianism cikin addinan Turawa.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta Theodicy
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi kokarin tabbatar da cewa dole ne a samu kasawa a duniya ta hanyar amfani da kalmar "mafi kyawun duniya da za a iya samu" a cikin littafinsa "Theodicy".

keyAchievements.title: Shawarar kafa gamayyar kasashen Turai
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi hasashen Tarayyar Turai ta hanyar ba da shawarar kafa gamayyar kasashen Turai wacce wakilan kasashe ke gudanar da ita a shekarar 1677.

faq.question: Wadanne harsuna Leibniz ya yi amfani da su wajen rubuce-rubucensa?
faq.answer: Leibniz ya yi amfani da harsuna daban-daban kamar Latin (~40%), French (~30%), da German (~15%) lokacin da yake rubuta littattafai.

faq.question: Yaya Leibniz ya gano calculus?
faq.answer: Ya kaddamar da infinitesimal calculus daban da Isaac Newton, kuma ya gabatar da calculus na integral tare da kera tsarin rubuta calculus a ranar 11 ga watan Nuwamba, 1675.

faq.question: Wane calculator Leibniz ya kera?
faq.answer: Ya kara ayyukan multiplication da division na atomatik ga na'urar lissafi ta Pascal, ya fara bayyana pinwheel calculator a shekarar 1685, kuma ya kera Leibniz wheel, na'urar lissafi ta farko da aka kera ta da yawa.

faq.question: Menene ainihin siffar falsafar Leibniz?
faq.answer: Yana da shahara da falsafarsa ta optimism wacce ke cewa sararin samaniya da muke ciki shi ne mafi kyau da Allah zai iya halitta, kuma yana daya dari cikin manyan masu ra'ayin hankali uku na karni na 17.

faq.question: Wace sha'awa Leibniz ya nuna ga falsafar kasar Sin?
faq.answer: Ya lura da alakar tsarin I Ching da lambobin binary odaga 000000 zuwa 111111, kuma ya nemi shigar da ra'ayoyin Confucianism cikin addinan Turawa.

faq.question: Shin Leibniz ya taba yin aure?
faq.answer: Leibniz ya rayu ba tare da yin aure ba.

faq.question: Menene addinin Leibniz?
faq.answer: Addininsa Protestant ne, kuma ya kasance philosophical theist.

faq.question: Wace academy of sciences Leibniz ya taimaka wajen kafa ta?
faq.answer: Ya taimaka wajen kafa Berlin Academy of Sciences kai tsaye a shekarar 1700, kuma ya kasance shugabanta har zuwa mutuwarsa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Marton, North Yorkshire, kusa da Middlesbrough, Birtaniya.
Mahaifinsa ya sami aikin kula da gona wando ya sa iyalin suka koma Great Ayton.
Ya fara aiki tare da mahaifinsa yana da shekaru 13.
Ya fara koyon aiki a shagon sayar da kayayyaki a Staithes, wani kauyen masunta, yana da shekaru 16.
Ya zama mai kula da jirgin ruwa a matsanin jami'in jirgin ruwan kasuwanci (merchant navy).
Ya zama kyaftin na wannan jirgin ruwa amma ya shiga aikin sa kai na sojan ruwan Birtaniya (Royal Navy) kafin wata guda ya cika.
Ya ci jarrabawar tuka jirgin ruwan sarki baada shekaru biyu da shiga aiki.
Ya shiga Yakin Siege of Quebec a lokacin Yakin Shekara Bakwai.
Ya auri Elizabeth Batts a coci na Essex yana da shekaru 34.
Binciken arewa maso yammacin Newfoundland.
Binciken arewa maso yammacin Newfoundland.
Binciken gabar kudu tsakanin Burin Peninsula da Cape Ray na Newfoundland.

Binciken gabar kudu tsakanin Burin Peninsula da Cape Ray na Newfoundland; Royal Society ta tura shi zuwa Kudancin Pacific don bincikar Transit of Venus, kuma ya jagoranci HMS Endeavour a matsanin lieutenant.
Binciken gabar yamma na Newfoundland.
Ya fara tafiyarsa ta farko dari Birtaniya.
Ya isa Tahiti, wando ya kasance wurin da aka zaba don bincikar Transit of Venus.
Bincikar Transit of Venus.
Ya zama mutum na biyu na Turai da ya kai New Zealand.
Ya zama mutum na farko na Turai da ya kai gabar gabashin Australia baada ya hango kasar da ya kira Point Hicks.
Saukarsa ta farko a Australia (Kurnell Peninsula na yanzu).
Endurance ta bugi kankara ko duwatsu a arewar Great Barrier Reef kuma ta lalace.
Ya sauka a Possession Island don bayyana ikon Ingila a kan gabar gabashin Australia.
Ya dawo gida baada mutane da dama a cikin tafiyar sun mutu sakamakon malaria da dysentery a Batavia.
Endeavour ta yada sansani a Downs, Kudancin Ingila, kuma Cook ya sauka a Kent.
Ya zama mutum na farko na Turai da ya shiga cikin Antarctic Circle (tafiyarsa ta biyu).
Ya isa Tonga, Easter Island, New Caledonia, da Vanuatu, sannan ya zagaya kudancin Amurka ta Kudu don gano South Georgia da Sandwich Islands (tafiyarsa ta biyu).
Ya zama mutum na farko na Turai da ya ziyarci Hawaii Islands (tafiyarsa ta uku).
Mutuwa

keyAchievements.title: Bunkasar mukami zuwa kyaftin na Royal Navy
keyAchievements.description: Ya hau mukamin post-captain na Royal Navy dari kasancewarsa talakan gari.

keyAchievements.title: Tafiya a Pacific
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi tafiya a Pacific sau bakwai kuma ya gudanar da bincike mai zurfi.

keyAchievements.title: Kai gabar gabashin Australia
keyAchievements.description: Ya zama mutum na farko na Turai da ya kai gabar gabashin Australia.

keyAchievements.title: Gano Hawaii Islands
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne mutum na farko na Turai da ya gano Hawaii Islands.

keyAchievements.title: Kera taswirar teku (charts)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera taswirar teku na Newfoundland da New Zealand, kuma shi ne ya fara kera cikakkiyar taswira mai kyau ta gabar Newfoundland.

keyAchievements.title: Zagaye duniya ba tare da asarar rai sakamakon scurvy ba
keyAchievements.description: A tafiyarsa ta farko, ya sami nasarar zagaye duniya ba tare da asarar rai ko guda daya sakamakon scurvy ba a karon farko a tarihi.

keyAchievements.title: Taimaka wa neman yankuna na Ingila
keyAchievements.description: Ya taimaka sosai ga kokarin neman yankuna na Ingila ta hanyar bincikar Pacific dari kudancinsa har zuwa arewaci.

keyAchievements.title: Karshen Lokacin Bincike na Teƙu (Age of Discovery)
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne ya kawo karshen abin da ake kira Age of Discovery, kuma kafin da kuma baada tafiyarsa, kusan dukkan sassan duniya sun zama sanannu ga Turawa.

keyAchievements.title: Tsara taswirar gabar New Zealand da gano bay (straits)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera cikakkiyar taswira ta gabar New Zealand kuma ya gano Cook Strait wacce ta raba tsibirin kudu da na arewa na New Zealand.

keyAchievements.title: Shiga cikin Antarctic Circle na farko
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami babban nasara na zama mutum na farko na Turai da ya shiga cikin Antarctic Circle.

keyAchievements.title: Kawo karshen binciken Terra Australis
keyAchievements.description: Ko da yake ya hango babban yankin Antarctica, ya tabbatar da cewa babu Terra Australis a wuraren da bil'adam zai iya zama, wando ya kawo karshen wannan tatsuniya.

keyAchievements.title: Tabbatar da longitude daidai
keyAchievements.description: Ya taimaka wajen tabbatar da longitude daidai ta hanyar amfani da chronometer a tafiyarsa ta biyu.

keyAchievements.title: Binciken gabar arewa maso yamma da kera taswirar teku
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera taswirar teku na mafi yawan gabar arewa maso yamma na Amurka dari California zuwa Bering Strait kuma ya gano wurare da dama a Alaska.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta littafin bayanan tafiyar zagaye duniya
keyAchievements.description: Ya bar rubutun hannu na littafin bayanan tafiyarsa ta biyu na zagaye duniya.

faq.question: Wane ne James Cook?
faq.answer: James Cook ya kasance mai bincike na Birtaniya, mai tuka jirgin ruwa, da kuma mai kera taswirori, wando ya hau mukamin post-captain na Royal Navy dari talaka.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan ayyukansa?
faq.answer: Ya yi tafiya a Pacific sau bakwai, ya kai gabar gabashin Australia, ya gano Hawaii Islands, kuma ya kera taswirar teku na Newfoundland da New Zealand.

faq.question: Yaya ya rasu?
faq.answer: An kashe shi a Hawaii ta hannun mutanen gari a lokacin tafiyarsa ta uku.

faq.question: Shin ya gano Australia?
faq.answer: Ya zama mutum na farko na Turai da ya kai gabar gabashin babban yankin Australia.

faq.question: Menene siffar tafiyarsa ta farko?
faq.answer: Ya sami nasarar zagaye duniya ba tare da asarar rai ko guda daya sakamakon scurvy ba a karon farko a tarihi.

faq.question: Menene ainihin manufar tafiyarsa ta farko?
faq.answer: Royal Society ta tura shi zuwa Kudancin Pacific don bincikar Transit of Venus.

faq.question: Menene manufar tafiyarsa ta biyu?
faq.answer: Royal Society ta sake tura shi don gano Terra Australis.

faq.question: Menene ainihin manufar tafiyarsa ta uku?
faq.answer: Shi ne neman Northwest Passage wando ke hada Pacific da Atlantic ta hanyar ratsa Arctic Ocean.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Hochheim kusa da Gotha, Thuringia.
Ya sami lakabin Magister dari Jami'ar Paris.
Ya zama shugaban lardin Dominican (Provincial) na Saxony.
Ya koma Strasbourg don sadaukar da kansa ga yin wa'azi.
Lokacin rasuwa
Taron babban gidan Dominican da aka yi a Walberberg, Jamus, ya yanke shawarar neman Paparoma ya sake duba hukuncin Meister Eckhart, kuma ya kafa kwamitin Meister Eckhart don tattara bayanai.

keyAchievements.title: Samun lakabin Magister
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami lakabin Magister dari Jami'ar Paris a shekarar 1302.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta Opus Tripartitum (3부작)
keyAchievements.description: Ya koma Paris inda ya rubuta "Opus Tripartitum".

keyAchievements.title: Kafa ra'ayin mysticism (신비사상)
keyAchievements.description: Ya nemi hadin gwiwa da Allah ta hanyar addu'ar tunani (contemplative prayer), kuma ya kalli Allah a matsanin Ubangiji mai girma wando ba za a iya fahimta da hankali ba.

faq.question: Wane ne Meister Eckhart?
faq.answer: Ya kasance masanin Roman Catholic mysticism na Jamus, wando kuma ake kiran sa Johannes Eckhart ko Eckhart von Hochheim.

faq.question: Menene ainihin ra'ayinsa na tauhidi (theology)?
faq.answer: Ya nemi hadin gwiwa da Allah ta hanyar addu'ar tunani, kuma ya kalli Allah a matsanin Ubangiji mai girma wando ba za a iya fahimta da hankali ko ji ba.

faq.question: Yaya zargin bidi'a (heresy) na Meister Eckhart ya kasance?
faq.answer: Ya fuskanci sukar bidi'a dari Franciscan friars saboda ya koyar da hadin kan dan adam da Allah ta hanyar dialectic na musun kai, kuma ana gudanar da kokarin dawo da matsayinsa tun dari shekarar 1980.

meister-eckhart.missingDataNote: 도미니크회 가입의 정확한 연도(15세 때로만 명시), 3부작 저술의 정확한 연도 및 내용, 프란체스코회와의 논쟁 및 이단 비난의 구체적인 상세 내용은 원문에 없어 생략되었습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Denmark.
Ya rasu sakamakon scurvy a Tsibirin Bering.

keyAchievements.title: Bincike da sanya wa Bering Strait suna
keyAchievements.description: Ya binciki bay da ke tsakanin nahiyoyin Asiya da Amurka bisa umarnin Peter I na Rasha, kuma ya kira shi Bering Strait.

keyAchievements.title: Binciken Arewacin Pacific
keyAchievements.description: Ya binciki Kamchatka Peninsula, Commander Islands, Aleutian Islands, da Alaska.

keyAchievements.title: Asalin sunan wurare
keyAchievements.description: An sanya wa wurare suna kamar Bering Strait, Bering Sea, da Bering Island don girmama Vitus Bering.

faq.question: Dan wace kasa ne Vitus Bering?
faq.answer: Ya kasance mai tuka jirgin ruwa da mai bincike wando aka haife shi a Denmark.

faq.question: Menene Vitus Bering ya bincika?
faq.answer: Ya binciki bay da ke tsakanin nahiyoyin Asiya da Amurka bisa umarnin Peter I na Rasha, kuma ya binciki Kamchatka Peninsula, Commander Islands, Aleutian Islands, da Alaska.

faq.question: Yaya Vitus Bering ya rasu?
faq.answer: Ya rasu sakamakon scurvy a Tsibirin Bering a shekarar 1741.

faq.question: Wadanne wurare ne ke dauke da sunan Vitus Bering?
faq.answer: Akwai Bering Strait, Bering Sea, da Bering Island.

vitus-bering.missingDataNote: 러시아 해군에서 일한 기간에 대한 정보가 부족합니다. 표트르 1세의 명을 받아 아시아와 아메리카 두 대륙 사이의 해협을 탐험한 정확한 연도에 대한 정보가 부족합니다. 캄차카반도, 코만도르스키 제도, 알류샨 열도, 알래스카를 탐험한 정확한 연도에 대한 정보가 부족합니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi kusa da Lisbon.
Ya tafi binciken gabar yamma na Africa tare da jiragen ruwa 3 bisa umarnin John II don gano Ethiopia.
Ya isa kudancin Africa tare da jiragen ruwa 2.
Ya zagaya Cape of Good Hope sakamakon guguwa a karshen wannan shekarar, amma ya koma baya saboda barazanar bore dari ma'aikatan jirgin ruwa.
Ya gano Cape Point lokacin da etiquette (ko lokacin da) yake komawa baya kuma ya kira shi 'Cape of Tempests' (폭풍의 곶).
Ya biyo Vasco da Gama don kaiwa Cape Verde Islands.
Ya rasu sakamakon hatsari na guguwa lokacin da etiquette yake tafiya zuwa Brazil tare da Pedro Álvares Cabral.

keyAchievements.title: Kai kudancin Africa
keyAchievements.description: Ya isa kudancin Africa tare da jiragen ruwa 2 a shekarar 1488 don kafa harsashin gano hanyar teku ta India.

keyAchievements.title: Gano Cape of Tempests
keyAchievements.description: Ya gano Cape Point lokacin da etiquette (ko lokacin da) yake komawa baya kuma ya kira shi 'Cape of Tempests', wando John II ya sake masa suna zuwa 'Cape of Good Hope'.

faq.question: Yaushe kuma a ina Bartolomeu Dias ya haifu kuma yaushe ya rasu?
faq.answer: An haife shi kusan shekarar 1450 kusa da Lisbon, kuma ya rasu sakamakon hatsari na guguwa lokacin da etiquette yake tafiya zuwa Brazil a ranar 29 ga watan Mayu, 1500.

faq.question: Menene babban aikin Bartolomeu Dias?
faq.answer: Ya isa kudancin Africa a shekarar 1488 don kafa harsashin gano hanyar teku ta India, kuma ya gano Cape Point lokacin da etiquette (ko lokacin da) yake komawa baya inda ya kira shi 'Cape of Tempests'.

faq.question: Wane ne ya sanya wa 'Cape of Good Hope' suna?
faq.answer: John II ne ya sake wa 'Cape of Tempests' suna zuwa 'Cape of Good Hope' wando Bartolomeu Dias ya gano.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsanin dan limamin coci a Berkeley, Gloucestershire.
Ya zama mai koyon aiki ga Daniel Ludlow, likitan fida (surgeon) a Sodbury.
Ya fara koyon likitanci a karkashin John Hunter a St George's Hospital na London.
Ya zama likita mai zaman kansa a garinsu.
Ya fara mai da hankali kan cutar smallpox (천연두).
Ya tara bayanai game da smallpox dangane da bincikensa.
Ya auri Catherine Kingscote.
Ya sami digiri na uku (MD) a Jami'ar St Andrews na Scotland.
John Hunter ya rasu, wando ya kawo karshen abotarsu.
Ya sami nasarar yi wa yaron garin allurar riga-kafi (vaccination) na farko.
Ya kai sakamakon gwaje-gwaje 23 ga Royal Society, kuma ya wallafa kasidarsa "An Inquiry into the Causes and Effects of the Variolae Vaccinae".
Ya karbi tallafin kudi dari gwamnati (wani bangare na fam 30,000 gaba danya).
An kafa Royal Jennerian Society a London don bunkasa allurar riga-kafi.
Ya karbi tallafin kudi na sauran bangaren dari gwamnati.
Ya ziyarci London a karon karshe a rayuwarsa.
Ya rasu sakamakon bugun jini (stroke) a garinsu.

keyAchievements.title: Gano allurar cowpox (우두법)
keyAchievements.description: Ana kiran sa uban smallpox saboda ya gano allurar cowpox.

keyAchievements.title: Kera kalmar 'vaccine'
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera kalmomi kamar 'vaccine' da 'vaccination' dari kalmar Latin 'vacca' wacce ke nufin saniya.

keyAchievements.title: Kera da kuma yada riga-kafi na smallpox
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami nasarar yi wa yaron allurar riga-kafi a ranar 14 ga watan Mayu, 1796 don kera riga-kafi na smallpox kuma ya ba da gudunmawa ga yada shi a duk duniya.

faq.question: Wane ne Edward Jenner?
faq.answer: Edward Jenner ya kasance likita na Birtaniya wando ya gano allurar cowpox kuma uban smallpox ne.

faq.question: Yaushe kuma a ina Edward Jenner ya haifu kuma yaushe ya rasu?
faq.answer: Edward Jenner ya haifu a ranar 17 ga watan Mayu, 1749 kuma ya rasu a ranar 26 ga watan Janairu, 1823.

faq.question: Menene asalin kera kalmar 'vaccine' ta Edward Jenner?
faq.answer: Jenner ya kera kalmomi kamar 'vaccine' da 'vaccination' dari kalmar Latin 'vacca' wacce ke nufin saniya.

faq.question: Menene babban aikin Edward Jenner?
faq.answer: Edward Jenner ya gano allurar cowpox kuma ya sami nasarar yi wa yaron allurar riga-kafi a ranar 14 ga watan Mayu, 1796 don kera riga-kafi na smallpox.

timeline.event: 10 ga watan Disamba, an haifi Emily Elizabeth Dickinson a Amherst, Massachusetts, Amurka.
15 ga watan Mayu, ta rasu tana da shekaru 55.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta wakoki (poems)
keyAchievements.description: Ta rubuta wakoki kusan 2000.

keyAchievements.title: Manyan abubuwan da wakokinta ke magana a kai
keyAchievements.description: Ta rubuta wakoki dangane da abubuwa kamar soyayya, mutuwa, bankwana, rai, da aljanna.

keyAchievements.title: Tabbatarwa ga jama'a a lokacin rayuwa
keyAchievements.description: Ba ta sami amincewa dari jama'a ba lokacin da take raye, kuma wakoki hudu kacal aka buga a cikin littattafai.

keyAchievements.title: Huldar wallafe-wallafe a lokacin rayuwa
keyAchievements.description: Ta rike huldar wasika akai-akai tare da wasu mawaka da masana wadanda suka gano basirarta lokacin da take raye.

keyAchievements.title: Tabbatar da basirar bayan mutuwa
keyAchievements.description: An wallafa wakokinta ta hanyar kanwarta Lavinia Norcross Dickinson baada mutuwarta, wando ya sa aka girmama basirarta a duk duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Sake nuna wakoki ta hanyar kida
keyAchievements.description: Shahararrun masu tsara kida kamar Aaron Copland sun kera wakokinta zuwa kidan murya (vocal music).

faq.question: Shin Emily Dickinson ta sami amincewa dari jama'a lokacin da take raye?
faq.answer: Ba ta sami amincewa dari jama'a ba lokacin da take raye, kuma wakoki hudu kacal aka buga a cikin littattafai.

faq.question: Menene ainihin abin da wakokin Emily Dickinson ke magana a kai?
faq.answer: Ta rubuta wakoki dangane da abubuwa kamar soyayya, mutuwa, bankwana, rai, da aljanna.

faq.question: Wakoki nawa Emily Dickinson ta rubuta?
faq.answer: Ta rubuta wakoki kusan 2000.

faq.question: Shin Emily Dickinson mawakiya ce da ta boye kanta?
faq.answer: An san ta a matsanin mawakiya da ta guji fita waje sosai, amma tana da siffar rayuwa mai dadi lokacin tana yarinya inda take fita fili kullum kuma take wasa da yara na makwabta.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Fuendetodos, yankin Aragon na kasar Spain.
Iyalin Goya sun sami gida a Zaragoza kuma sun koma can baada wasu shekaru.
Ya shigar da takardar neman shiga Royal Academy of Fine Arts amma aka ki yarda.
Ya sami wahayi dari ayyukan Velázquez da Rembrandt a Madrid.
Ya shigar da takardar neman shiga Royal Academy of Fine Arts amma aka ki yarda.
Ya yi tafiya zuwa Italiya inda ya sami kyauta ta biyu a taron zane na Parma, kuma ya dawo Zaragoza a karshen shekarar don zama mai zane na Basilica of Our Lady of the Pillar.
Ya auri Josefa, kanwar Bayeu.
Ya kera hoton Count of Floridablanca, na kusa da Charles III.
Ya fara zana hoton Charles III.
Charles III ya rasu.
Charles IV ya hau sarauta, kuma Goya ya zama mai zane na fada (court painter).
Ya rasa jinsa sakamakon zazzabi mai zafi baada ya kamu da cholera.
Ya kera wasu hotuna na musamman na tunani (fantasy).
Ya zana hoton bango a Royal Chapel of St. Anthony of La Florida na Madrid.
Ya wallafa "Los Caprichos" (카프리초스) kuma ya zama babban mai zane na fada (First Court Painter).
Ya zana "Charles IV of Spain and His Family" da kuma "The Nude Maja" (옷 벗은 마하).
Ya zana "The Clothed Maja" (옷 입은 마하).
Yakin Peninsular War ya barke tsakanin Faransa da Spain, kuma Goya ya bar zane-zane na wannan yaki.
Ya kera tarin zane-zane "The Disasters of War" (전쟁의 재난).
Matarsa Josefa ta rasu.
Kotun binciken addini na Spain (Inquisition) ta kwace ayyukan Maja saboda ta dauke su a matsanin batsa.
Sojojin Faransa sun janye kuma Ferdinand VII ya dawo kan sarauta.
Ya koma Bordeaux, Faransa.
Ya dawo Spain amma ya sake komawa Bordeaux saboda rashin lafiya.
Ya rasu yana da shekaru 82.

keyAchievements.title: Matsayi a matsanin mai zane da mai kera etching na Romanticism
keyAchievements.description: An san shi da babban mai zane da mai kera etching na Romanticism na Spain, kuma babban mai zane da ya fara nuna salon Impressionism a karni na 18.

keyAchievements.title: Aiki a matsanin mai zane na fada
keyAchievements.description: Ya zama mai zane na fada a shekarar 1789 kuma babban mai zane na fada a shekarar 1799, inda ya zana hotuna da dama na sarakuna, sarauniya, da masu sarauta.

keyAchievements.title: Wallafa Los Caprichos
keyAchievements.description: Ya wallafa "Los Caprichos" a shekarar 1799 wando aka kera shi ta hanyar aquatint don nuna gaskiyar lalacewar coci na Catholic da kuma camfi.

keyAchievements.title: Kera zane-zane da tarin zane na yaki
keyAchievements.description: Ya bar zane-zane na yaki "The Second of May 1808" da "The Third of May 1808", kuma ya kera "The Disasters of War" don nuna mawuyacin hali na yaki.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan Maja
keyAchievements.description: Ya zana "The Nude Maja" da "The Clothed Maja", kuma ana auna "The Nude Maja" a matsanin nude na farko na mace a fasahar Yamma.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan Black Paintings
keyAchievements.description: Ya bar ayyuka na "Black Paintings" a gidansa (Quinta del Sordo) a karshen rayuwarsa don nuna hauka, kuma "Saturn Devouring His Son" (자식을 잡아먹는 사투르누스) shi ne ya fi shahara.

faq.question: Yaya ake kimanta Francisco Goya a matsayin mai zane?
faq.answer: An san shi a matsayin fitaccen mai zane da sassaka na soyayya na ƙasar Spain, kuma hazikin mai zane wanda ya wakilci zanen Spain na ƙasar Spain na ƙarni na 18 kuma ya nuna farkon ra'ayi.

faq.question: Yaushe Goya ya rasa jinsa?
faq.answer: A shekara ta 1792, ya kamu da cutar kwalara kuma ya rasa jinsa saboda zazzabi mai zafi.

faq.question: Mene ne shahararrun tarin zane-zane na Goya?
faq.answer: Akwai "Los Caprichos" da aka buga a 1799 da "Bala'in Yaƙi" da aka yi daga 1810 zuwa 1820.

faq.question: Wace siffa ce jerin zane-zane na 'Maja' na Goya ke da ita?
faq.answer: "Maja sanye da kaya" da "Maja babu kaya" ayyuka ne da ke nuna mace ɗaya a cikin salo ɗaya, kuma ana ɗaukarsa a matsayin "tsiraicin mace na farko mai girman gaske a cikin fasahar yammacin duniya".

faq.question: Yaya yanayin ayyukan Goya na ƙarshen rayuwarsa yake?
faq.answer: Bayan ya rasa jinsa a shekara ta 1792, zanensa ya zama mai duhu, kuma bayan yakin Peninsula, ya zana hotuna masu dauke da jigogi masu nauyi da sautuna masu duhu, sannan a cikin shekarunsa na karshe ya bar jerin "Zane-zane Masu Duhu" a "Gidan Kurame".

timeline.event: An haifi Mary Anne Evans (George Eliot)
Iyali sun koma Griff House
Mahaifiyarsa ta rasu.
An kammala fassarar Turanci na littafin Strauss "Rayuwar Yesu"
Mutuwar uba
Tafiya zuwa Switzerland tare da ma'auratan Bray
Komawa Ingila da ƙaura zuwa Landan
Ya zama mataimakin edita na "Westminster Review"
Ya fara rubuta kasidu da sharhi a "Westminster Review"
Fassarar littafin Feuerbach "Asalin Kiristanci"
Ya bar "Westminster Review"
Buga littafin "Adam Bede"
Buga littafin "The Mill on the Floss"
Buga littafin "Silas Marner"
Buga littafin "Romola"
Buga littafin "Middlemarch"
Buga littafin "Daniel Deronda"
Mutuwar George Eliot

keyAchievements.title: Fitaccen marubuci na zamanin Victoria
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi aiki a matsayin marubuci, mawaƙi, ɗan jarida, kuma mai fassara, ɗaya daga cikin fitattun marubuta na zamanin Victoria.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta manyan litattafai
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta litattafai guda 7 ciki har da "Adam Bede", "The Mill on the Floss", "Silas Marner", "Romola", "Middlemarch", da "Daniel Deronda", yana nuna ra'ayin gaskiya da fahimtar tunani.

keyAchievements.title: Fassarar littattafan falsafa
keyAchievements.description: Ya fassara "Rayuwar Yesu" ta Strauss (1846) da "Asalin Kiristanci" ta Feuerbach (1854).

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan edita a "Westminster Review"
keyAchievements.description: Daga 1851 zuwa tsakiyar 1854, ya yi aiki a matsayin mataimakin edita na "Westminster Review", yana gudanar da ainihin aikin bugawa kuma ya ba da gudummawar kasidu da sharhi da yawa.

keyAchievements.title: Shawo kan son zuciya ta hanyar amfani da sunan bogi
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi amfani da sunan bogi "George Eliot" don guje wa son zuciya ga mata marubuta da kuma tabbatar da cewa an kimanta ayyukansa ba tare da son kai ba.

faq.question: Menene ainihin sunan George Eliot?
faq.answer: Ainihin sunan George Eliot shi ne Mary Anne Evans.

faq.question: Menene babban dalilin da ya sa George Eliot ta yi amfani da sunan bogi?
faq.answer: Ya kasance don guje wa son zuciya cewa marubutan mata za su iya rubuta litattafan soyayya na yau da kullun ne kawai, don tabbatar da cewa an kimanta litattafansa dabam da kansa a matsayin edita da mai sharhi, kuma don guje wa badakalar rayuwa ta sirri.

faq.question: Wadanne ne shahararrun litattafan George Eliot?
faq.answer: Akwai "Adam Bede", "The Mill on the Floss", "Silas Marner", "Romola", "Middlemarch", da "Daniel Deronda".

faq.question: Wadanne siffofi ne litattafanta ke da su?
faq.answer: Yawancin litattafanta suna gudana ne a yankunan karkara na Ingila kuma sun shahara da ra'ayin gaskiya da kuma zurfin tunani.

faq.question: Wadanne manyan ayyuka ne George Eliot ta fassara?
faq.answer: Ta fassara "Rayuwar Yesu" ta Strauss da "Asalin Kiristanci" ta Feuerbach.

timeline.event: Mafi yawan masana tarihi sun yi amfani da cewa an haife shi ne a Ingila kusan shekara ta 1565.
Ya bar Gravesend a cikin jirgin Hopewell don fara gagarumar tafiyarsa ta farko.
Jirgin Hopewell da ma'aikatan jirgin sun koma Ingila.
Ya sake tashi a cikin jirgin Hopewell don fara tafiya don nemo hanyar Arewa maso Gabas.
An ba shi izini daga Kamfanin Yammacin Indiya na Holland a cikin jirgin Halve Maen (Half Moon) don neman hanyar Arewa maso Gabas.
Ya tashi a cikin jirgin Discovery don gano hanyar Arewa maso Yamma.
Ya bace a cikin Tekun Hudson bayan da 'yan tawayen suka watsar da shi tare da dansa John da wasu abokansa guda 7 a cikin wani karamin kwale-kwale.

keyAchievements.title: Gano Kogin Hudson, Mashigin Hudson, da Tekun Hudson
keyAchievements.description: A shekara ta 1610, ya binciko arewacin Kanada kuma ya gano Kogin Hudson, Mashigin Hudson, da Tekun Hudson.

keyAchievements.title: Gano hanyoyin ruwa na Arewacin Amurka
keyAchievements.description: Kodayake ya gaza samun hanyar zuwa Asiya, ya gano hanyoyin ruwa daban-daban na Arewacin Amurka.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa harsashin mulkin mallaka da kasuwanci
keyAchievements.description: Abubuwan da ya gano sun kafa harsashi ga sauran tafiye-tafiyen Turawa don mulkin mallaka da kasuwanci a Arewacin Amurka.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Henry Hudson?
faq.answer: Yawancin masana tarihi sun yi imanin cewa an haifi Henry Hudson kusan 1565 a Ingila.

faq.question: Yaya Henry Hudson ya bace?
faq.answer: A ranar 23 ga Yuni, 1611, ya bace bayan da 'yan tawayen suka tilasta masa shiga cikin wani karamin kwale-kwale tare da dansa John da wasu abokansa guda 7 sannan aka watsar da su a Tekun Hudson.

faq.question: Menene babban burin binciken Henry Hudson?
faq.answer: Babban burin binciken Henry Hudson shi ne nemo hanyar Arewa maso Yamma ko Arewa maso Gabas zuwa Asiya.

faq.question: Menene gadon da binciken Henry Hudson ya bari?
faq.answer: Abubuwan da ya gano sun kafa harsashi ga mulkin mallaka da kasuwanci a Arewacin Amurka, kuma wurare da yawa da ya binciko kuma ya kewaya ana kiransu da sunansa a yau.

timeline.event: An haifi Homer

timeline.year: Ƙarshen ƙarni na 8 BC ko farkon ƙarni na 7 BC
timeline.event: Rubuta littafin "Iliad" da "Odyssey" (kimantawa)

keyAchievements.title: Rubutun "Iliad" da "Odyssey"
keyAchievements.description: An san shi a matsay인 marubucin litattafan almara guda biyu waɗanda ke kafa harsashin adabin tsohuwar ƙasar Girka, wato "Iliad" da "Odyssey".

faq.question: Waye Homer?
faq.answer: Homer ya kasance mawaƙin tsohuwar ƙasar Girka wanda aka haifa kusan ƙarni na 8 BC, kuma an san shi da marubucin "Iliad" da "Odyssey".

faq.question: Menene manyan ayyukan Homer?
faq.answer: An san shi a matsayin marubucin litattafan almara guda biyu waɗanda ke kafa harsashin adabin tsohuwar ƙasar Girka, wato "Iliad" da "Odyssey".

faq.question: Menene sanannun gaskiya game da rayuwar Homer?
faq.answer: A zamanin da, an yi imanin cewa shi mawaƙi ne makaho daga Ionia, amma masana na zamani suna ɗaukar wannan a matsayin labari. Kusan babu tabbataccen bayani game da rayuwarsa.

faq.question: Yaushe aka rubuta "Iliad" da "Odyssey"?
faq.answer: Ana jin cewa an rubuta waɗannan waƙoƙin ne a kusa da ƙarshen ƙarni na 8 BC ko farkon ƙarni na 7 BC.

timeline.event: An haife ta a cocin Steventon, Hampshire.
Ta yi karatu a Makarantar Kwana ta Mata ta Reading Abbey a Reading, Berkshire.
Ta fara rubuta litattafai tana da shekaru 14.
Ta rubuta "Elinor and Marianne" a cikin tsarin wasiƙa.
Ta hadu da wani matashi dan kasar Ireland mai suna Tom Lefroy, kuma ta rubuta "First Impressions".
Ta fara rubuta "Sense and Sensibility" bisa tushen "Elinor and Marianne".
Bayan mahaifinta ya mika aikin limanci, dangin sun koma Bath (Somerset).
해리스 빅 위저드의 프로포즈를 받았으나 하루 만에 거절했다.
Ta sayar da "Lady Susan" ga kamfanin Crosbie & Co.
Mahaifinta ya rasu.
Da taimakon yayanta na uku Edward, ta zauna a gidan kula da kaya a Chawton.
Ta rubuta "Mansfield Park" kuma ta buga "Sense and Sensibility" ba tare da sunanta ba.
Ta buga "Pride and Prejudice" wanda ya ginu a kan "First Impressions".
Ta buga "Mansfield Park".
Kafin buga "Emma", ta girmama kuma ta sadaukar da shi ga Yarima mai jiran gado (daga baya George IV).
Lafiyarta ta ci gaba da tabarbarewa kuma ta dade a kan gado.
Ta rasu a Winchester tana da shekaru 42 lokacin da take rubuta "Sanditon".
An buga "Northanger Abbey" da "Persuasion".

keyAchievements.title: Fara rubuta litattafai
keyAchievements.description: Ta fara rubuta litattafai tana da shekaru 14 kuma ta girma a matsayin marubuciya tare da goyon bayan danginta.

keyAchievements.title: Buga "Sense and Sensibility"
keyAchievements.description: Wannan shi ne daya daga cikin ayyukanta na farko da aka buga ba tare da sunanta ba a shekara ta 1811.

keyAchievements.title: Buga "Pride and Prejudice"
keyAchievements.description: An buga shi a watan Janairu 1813, kuma ainihin sunansa shi ne "First Impressions".

keyAchievements.title: Buga da kuma sadaukar da "Emma"
keyAchievements.description: An buga shi bayan an sadaukar da shi ga Yarima mai jiran gado (daga baya George IV) a watan Oktoba 1815.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa 'Babban Al'ada' na Litattafan Ingila
keyAchievements.description: Ana kimanta ta da kafa 'Babban Al'ada' na litattafan Ingila ta hanyar bayyana rayuwar mata na tsakiya da na sama na Ingila a ƙarni na 18 tare da hangen nesa mai kyau da salo mai daɗi.

keyAchievements.title: Adabin gaskiya mai sukar al'umma
keyAchievements.description: Ta kirkiro ingantaccen duniyar fasaha bisa ga gaskiya ta hanyar yin amfani da cikakken lura da kuma hangen nesa mai tsanani don yin ba'a da yanayin abin duniya da munafunci na al'ummar lokacin.

keyAchievements.title: Sake kimanta adabi bayan mutuwarta da kuma tasirin al'adun shahara
keyAchievements.description: Tun daga ƙarshen ƙarni na 19, ta sami yabo mai girma daga masu sharhi kuma ta shiga cikin manyan littattafan adabi, kuma a ƙarshen ƙarni na 20, ayyukanta sun zama fitattu ta hanyar sake yin su a matsayin fina-finai da wasan kwaikwayo.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Jane Austen?
faq.answer: An haife ta a ranar 16 ga Disamba, 1775 a cocin Steventon, Hampshire.

faq.question: Wadanne ne shahararrun ayyukan Jane Austen?
faq.answer: Akwai "Sense and Sensibility" (1811), "Pride and Prejudice" (1813), "Mansfield Park" (1814), da "Emma" (1816).

faq.question: Wane irin litattafai ne Jane Austen ta rubuta?
faq.answer: Yana da siffar kwatanta rayuwar mata na tsakiya da na sama na Ingila a ƙarni na 18 tare da hangen nesa mai kyau da salo mai daɗi.

faq.question: Jane Austen ta kasance shaharariya a lokacin rayuwarta?
faq.answer: Ba ta kasance mai shahara sosai ba lokacin da take raye, amma ta zama sananna a ƙarni na 20 yayin da aka daidaita ayyukanta zuwa fina-finai sau da yawa.

faq.question: Jane Austen ta yi aure?
faq.answer: 톰 러프로이라는 청년과의 연애담이 있었으나 결실을 맺지 못했고, 1802년 해리스 빅 위저드의 프로포즈를 받았으나 하루 만에 거절했습니다.

faq.question: Yaushe Jane Austen ta rasu?
faq.answer: Ta rasu a ranar 18 ga Yuli, 1817 tana da shekaru 42.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Pentonville, Landan, Ingila
Fara koyon yaren Girka
Fara koyon Latin, Euclid, da algebra da kuma yin aiki a matsayin malamin kannensa
Ya kai matakin da zai iya karanta ainihin rubuce-rubucen Plato ko Demosthenes
Fara nazarin ainihin rubuce-rubucen dabaru na Scholastic da na Aristotle
Fara nazarin tattalin arzikin siyasa
Ya zauna a kasar Faransa na tsawon shekara guda, inda ya halarci darussan sinadarai, ilimin dabbobi, da dabaru a Jami'ar Kimiyya ta Montpellier
Fuskantar matsalar tabin hankali ko gajiya ta jijiya
Kafa kungiyar masu ra'ayin amfani (Utilitarian Society) tare da abokansa
Buga littafin "Tsarin Dabaru" (A System of Logic)
Buga littafin "Essays on Some Unsettled Questions of Political Economy"
Buga littafin "Ka'idodin Tattalin Arzikin Siyasa" (Principles of Political Economy)
Aure tare da Harriet Taylor
Mutuwar Harriet Taylor da murabus daga Kamfanin Gabashin Indiya
Buga littafin "Akan 'Yanci" (On Liberty)
Buga "Utilitarianism" da "Considerations on Representative Government"
An zabe shi a matsayin Rector na Jami'ar St Andrews kuma an zabe shi a matsayin dan majalisar dokoki na mazabar Westminster ta London
Kammala wa'adin dan majalisar dokoki
Rarraba littafin "Karkashin Mata" (The Subjection of Women) da kuma ba da shawarar hakkin kada kuri'a ga mata a karon farko a majalisar dokoki
Ya rasu a Avignon, Faransa kuma an buga "Tarihin Rayuwa" (Autobiography)
Buga littafin "Akan Addini" (Three Essays on Religion)
Buga littafin "Chapters on Socialism"

keyAchievements.title: Kammala tsarin dabaru
keyAchievements.description: A shekara ta 1843, ya buga "Tsarin Dabaru", inda ya kammala dabarar shiga ta Bacon kuma ya gabatar da wata hanyar mai ma'ana ga binciken kimiyyar halitta.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa ka'idar siyasa ta yanci
keyAchievements.description: Ta hanyar littafinsa "Akan 'Yanci", ya bar wani shahararren rubutu a kan manufar yanci, kuma ya gabatar da ka'idojin dimokuradiyyar yanci ta zamani wadda ke kare yancin fadin albarkacin baki a matsayin hakki na asali na dan kasa.

keyAchievements.title: Habaka ra'ayin amfani (Utilitarianism)
keyAchievements.description: Ya habaka tsarin kansa ta hanyar hada ra'ayin amfani na Bentham, wanda ya kasance uban gidansa kuma malaminsa, da ra'ayin Saint-Simonianism da Romanticism.

keyAchievements.title: Kare hakkin mata da sake fasalin al'umma
keyAchievements.description: A matsayinsa na dan majalisa, ya ba da shawarar sake fasalin al'umma daban-daban kamar hakkin mata, wakilcin daidaituwa, kungiyoyin kwadago, da tsara gonaki ta hanyar hadin gwiwa, kuma ya fara gabatar da hakkin kada kuri'a na mata a majalisar dokoki.

keyAchievements.title: Piyoni na ka'idar gurguzu ta kasuwa
keyAchievements.description: Ana kimanta shi a matsayin daya daga cikin masana farko na gurguzu ta kasuwa ta hanyar ba da shawarar maye gurbin kamfanonin jari-hujja da hadin gwiwar ma'aikata.

faq.question: Yaya aka gudanar da ilimin John Stuart Mill?
faq.answer: Mahaifinsa James Mill ne ya fi ba shi ilimi, kuma ya kasance yaro mai hazaka wanda ya koyi yaren Girka tun yana dan shekara uku, da Latin da kuma ilimin lissafi na gaba tun yana dan shekara takwas.

faq.question: Wace ra'ayi Mill ke da ita game da addini?
faq.answer: Ya kasance mai sukar addini kansa, bai taba samun imani ba, ya musanta koyarwar Kiristanci kuma ya dauki addini a matsayin babban makiyin yanci.

faq.question: Wane tasiri Harriet Taylor ta yi a kan John Stuart Mill?
faq.answer: Harriet ta yi tasiri mai mahimmanci a kan tunanin Mill, musamman wajen karfafa matsayinsa na kare hakkin mata, kuma ta yi tasiri wajen rubuta littattafan "Akan 'Yanci" da "Karkashin Mata".

faq.question: Menene John Stuart Mill ya yi tunani game da 'tsayayyen yanayi' (stationary state)?
faq.answer: Ya yi imanin cewa tsayayyen yanayin jari da arziki ba abu ne mai ban tsoro ba, a maimakon haka yana iya zama yanayi na farin ciki wanda ya fi na yanzu ci gaba sosai, kuma ya yi hasashen cewa bil'adama za su fi mayar da hankali ga dabi'u kamar daraja, mutunci, da shari'a maimakon damuwa da kudi.

faq.question: John Stuart Mill ya kasance mai ra'ayin gurguzu?
faq.answer: Ya kira kansa mai ra'ayin gurguzu, kuma ana daukar shi a matsayin daya daga cikin masana farko na gurguzu ta kasuwa ta hanyar ba da shawarar maye gurbin kamfanonin jari-hujja da hadin gwiwar ma'aikata.

timeline.event: An haife ta a wani kauyen kasar Faransa.
Ta hadu da Jacques Biétrix de Rozières kuma ta yi doguwar dangantakar soyayya da shi.
A shekarar da mahaifinta na asali ya rasu, ta fara aikinta na marubuciya kuma ta rubuta wasan kwaikwayo na yaki da bautar da mutane mai suna "Zamore da Mirza".
Ta buga kasida mai suna "Wasiƙu zuwa ga Mutane" (Letters to the People).
Ba a iya gabatar da "Zamore da Mirza" ba, kuma ta rubuta wasan kwaikwayo mai suna "Kasuwar Bakaken Fata" (The Black Market).

Ta zama memba na "Kungiyar Jama'a" (Social Club) ko kuma "Kungiyar Abokai na Gaskiya", kuma ta fara rubuta "Sanarwar Yancin Mata da Yar Kasa" (Declaration of the Rights of Woman and the Female Citizen).
Yan kungiyar Jacobin sun kama kuma sun daure yan kungiyar Girondin wadanda abokan kawancen ta ne.
An kashe yan kungiyar Girondin a guillotine.
Kungiyar Jacobin ta yanke mata hukuncin kisa.
An kashe ta.
An ayyana sunan wani mahaɗar hanyoyi a birnin Paris a matsayin "Olympe de Gouges".

keyAchievements.title: Kare hakkin kada kuri'a na mata
keyAchievements.description: Ta yi ikirari mai ban mamaki cewa ya kamata a ba mata hakkin kada kuri'a a lokacin juyin juya halin Faransa.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "Sanarwar Yancin Mata da Yar Kasa"
keyAchievements.description: Ganin cewa kund인 tsarin mulkin kasar Faransa na shekarar 1791 bai shafi hakkin kada kuri'a na mata ba, ta rubuta sanarwar da ke bayyana daidaiton hakkin mata.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan yaki da bautar da bakaken fata
keyAchievements.description: Ta yi kokari wajen kare hakkin bakaken fata ta hanyar rubuta wasan kwaikwayo na yaki da bautar da mutane mai suna "Zamore da Mirza" a shekarar 1784, da kuma "Kasuwar Bakaken Fata" a shekarar 1789.

keyAchievements.title: Shawarar yarjejeniyar aure da dokar kare mata
keyAchievements.description: Ta ba da shawarar dokoki don raba dukiya daidai tsakanin miji da mata, raba dukiya daidai lokacin kisan aure, da kuma kare mata matsalata da 'ya'yansu.

keyAchievements.title: Kare tsarin mulkin sarauta
keyAchievements.description: Ta nuna rashin amincewa da soke tsarin mulkin sarauta a lokacin juyin juya halin Faransa kuma ta kare Sarki Louis XVI da Sarauniya Marie Antoinette.

faq.question: Wacece Olympe de Gouges?
faq.answer: Olympe de Gouges ta kasance mai fafutukar kare hakkin dan kasa kuma mai tsaurin ra'ayi wajen kare hakkin mata wadda ta bukaci a ba mata hakkin kada kuri'a a lokacin juyin juya halin Faransa.

faq.question: Menene babban aikin rubutunta?
faq.answer: Babban aikinta shi ne "Sanarwar Yancin Mata da Yar Kasa" (Declaration of the Rights of Woman and the Female Citizen) wanda aka rubuta a shekarar 1791.

faq.question: Me yasa aka kashe ta?
faq.answer: A shekara ta 1793, kungiyar Jacobin ta kashe ta a kan zargin ayyukan cin amana da kuma kokarin dawo da tsarin mulkin sarauta, bisa ga abubuwan da ke cikin kasidarta ta "The Three Urns, or the Salvation of the Fatherland, by an Aerial Traveller" da kuma wasan kwaikwayo da ba a kammala ba mai suna "France Saved, or the Tyrant Dethroned".

faq.question: Wane matsayi take da shi game da hakkin bakaken fata?
faq.answer: Ta nuna adawa da bautar da bakaken fata ta hanyar rubuta wasan kwaikwayo na yaki da bautar da mutane mai suna "Zamore da Mirza" a shekarar 1784 da kuma "Kasuwar Bakaken Fata" a shekarar 1789.

faq.question: Wane matsayi take da shi game da juyin juya halin Faransa?
faq.answer: Kodayake ta yi maraba da juyin juya halin Faransa, ta ji takaici cewa hakkin daidaiton da juyin juya halin ya gabatar bai shafi mata ba, kuma ta ki amincewa da kokarin juyin juya halin na soke tsarin mulkin sarauta sannan ta goyi bayan ci gaba da sarauta.

olympe-de-gouges.missingDataNote: 17세에 결혼하고 남편이 일찍 죽었다는 내용은 있으나, 해당 사건의 정확한 연도는 원문에 명시되어 있지 않아 생략했습니다.

timeline.event: An haifi Plotinus
Mutuwar Plotinus

keyAchievements.title: Kafa ra'ayin Neoplatonism
keyAchievements.description: Ana kiran shi "Wanda ya kafa Neoplatonism" saboda ya mayar da hankali sosai wajen koyar da tunanin Plato.

keyAchievements.title: Kiyaye da kuma gyara ayyuka
keyAchievements.description: Almajirinsa Porphyry ya kiyaye ayyukansa guda 54, kuma ya tsara su zuwa rukunoni 6 na littattafai 9 kowanne.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "Enneads"
keyAchievements.description: Ayyukansa da almajirinsa Porphyry ya tsara ana kiransu da "Enneads" a yau.

keyAchievements.title: Nazarin manufar 'Daya' (The One)
keyAchievements.description: Ya bayyana tunaninsa ta hanyar mayar da hankali kan tambayar yadda abubuwa da yawa suka fito daga "Daya".

keyAchievements.title: Habaka manufar 'Fitowa' (Emanation)
keyAchievements.description: Ya mayar da hankali kan manufar "Fitowa" (Emanation) yayin da yake amsa tambayar yadda abubuwa da yawa suka kasance daga "Daya".

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Plotinus kuma yaushe ya rasu?
faq.answer: An haifi Plotinus a shekara ta 205 kuma ya rasu a shekara ta 270.

faq.question: Wane salon falsafa ne aka san Plotinus da kafa shi?
faq.answer: Ana kiran Plotinus da "Wanda ya kafa Neoplatonism" saboda ya mayar da hankali sosai wajen koyar da tunanin Plato.

faq.question: Menene manyan ayyukan Plotinus?
faq.answer: Ayyukansa guda 54 da almajirinsa Porphyry ya tsara zuwa rukunoni 6 na littattafai 9 kowanne ana kiransu da "Enneads" a yau.

faq.question: Menene ainihin ra'ayi na falsafar Plotinus?
faq.answer: Ya gabatar da tunaninsa ta hanyar mayar da hankali kan tambayar yadda abubuwa da yawa suka fito daga "Daya" (Hen), kuma ya mayar da hankali kan manufar "Fitowa" (Emanation).

faq.question: Akwai wani abu da aka sani game da dangin Plotinus ko girmashi?
faq.answer: Babu wani labari da aka watsa game da danginsa ko girma.
