faq.answer: Sukarsa a kan mechanics ta yi tasiri a kan samar da ka'idar relativity ta Einstein, kuma ra'ayinsa na positivism da unified science sun kasance farkon logical positivism na zamani.

ernst-mach.missingDataNote: 일부 생애 정보(예: 대학 활동 시기)는 연도가 명시되지 않아 타임라인에 포함되지 않았습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Gloucester.
Ya shiga Jami'ar Oxford.
Ya sami digirin digirgir na Master of Arts.
Ya koma Cambridge don nazarin Littafi Mai Tsarki.
Ya kammala fassarar Sabon Alkawari na Turanci daga ainihin rubuce-rubucen Ibraniyanci da na Girka sannan aka buga shi a Jamus.
Ya fassara littattafai biyar na Musa (Pentateuch) a Hamburg.
Ya rubuta "An Answer unto Sir Thomas More's Dialogue" don karyata littafin Thomas More "A Dialogue Concerning Heresies".
An kama shi a Netherlands a kan zargin fassara Littafi Mai Tsarki zuwa Turanci.
An yanke masa hukuncin kisa bisa ga dokar Sarki (imperial decree).
An zarge shi da zama dan bidi'a sannan aka kona shi.

keyAchievements.title: Fassaran Littafi Mai Tsarki na Koine Greek zuwa Turanci
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami tasiri daga John Wycliffe don fassara Littafi Mai Tsarki na Koine Greek zuwa Turanci.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkiro sabbin kalmomi
keyAchievements.description: Ya kirkiro sabbin kalmomi wadanda ba su taba kasancewa ba don amfani da su a fassarar Turanci.

keyAchievements.title: Fassarawa da buga Sabon Alkawari na Turanci daga ainihin rubuce-rubucen Ibraniyanci da na Girka
keyAchievements.description: Ya kammala Sabon Alkawari na Turanci a shekara ta 1526 ta hanyar fassara daga ainihin rubuce-rubucen Ibraniyanci da na Girka sannan aka buga shi a Jamus.

keyAchievements.title: Fassaran littattafai biyar na Musa
keyAchievements.description: Ya fassara littattafai biyar na Musa (Pentateuch) a Hamburg a shekara ta 1529.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "An Answer unto Sir Thomas More's Dialogue"
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta wata makala a shekara ta 1531 don karyata littafin Thomas More "A Dialogue Concerning Heresies".

keyAchievements.title: Kafa harsashin King James Bible
keyAchievements.description: Kashi 70 na fassarar King James Bible na Turanci ya ginu ne a kan Littafi Mai Tsarki na Tyndale.

keyAchievements.title: Iya yarurruka 7
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance mai iya yarurruka 7 da suka hada da Turanci, Ibraniyanci, Girka, Latin, Italiyanci, Sifaniyanci, da Faransanci.

faq.question: 윌리엄 틴들은 언제 태어났습니까?
faq.answer: An haife shi a Gloucester a shekara ta 1494.

faq.question: Menene manyan ayyukan William Tyndale?
faq.answer: Ya fassara Littafi Mai Tsarki na Koine Greek zuwa Turanci, ya kammala kuma ya buga Sabon Alkawari na Turanci daga ainihin rubuce-rubucen Ibraniyanci da na Girka, sannan ya kafa harsashin King James Bible.

faq.question: Yaya William Tyndale ya rasu?
faq.answer: An kama shi a shekara ta 1535 a kan zargin fassara Littafi Mai Tsarki zuwa Turanci, kuma an kona shi a ranar 6 ga Oktoba, 1536 bayan an zarge shi da zama dan bidi'a.

faq.question: Wadanne yarurruka William Tyndale ya iya?
faq.answer: Ya kasance yana iya yarurruka 7 da suka hada da Turanci, Ibraniyanci, Girka, Latin, Italiyanci, Sifaniyanci, da Faransanci.

faq.question: Wace alaka ce tsakanin William Tyndale da Thomas More?
faq.answer: William Tyndale ya soki Thomas More sosai ta hanyar rubuta littafin "An Answer unto Sir Thomas More's Dialogue" a shekara ta 1531 don karyata "A Dialogue Concerning Heresies" na Thomas More.

timeline.event: Mahaifinsa John Chaucer ya kasance innarsa ta sace shi da nufin aurar da yaron mai shekaru 12 ga diyarta don kare dukiya a Ipswich.
An haife shi a matsayin dan mai sayar da ruwan inabi mai arziki a Landan.
Mahaifinsa John Chaucer ya auri Agnes Copton, kuma ya gaji dukiya mai dauke da shaguna 24 daga kawunta Hamo de Copton.
An ambaci sunansa a karon farko lokacin da ya zama page (yaron aiki) ga Elizabeth de Burgh, Countess of Ulster.
A lokacin da Edward III ya mamaye kasar Faransa a lokacin Yakin Shekaru Dari, ya yi tafiya zuwa Faransa a matsayin memba na sojojin Ingila tare da Lionel of Antwerp, mijin Elizabeth.
An kama shi a matsayin fursunan yaki a lokacin kewayen Reims, kuma Sarki Edward III ya biya fansar fam 16 don sake shi.
Ya auri Philippa Roet.
Ya rasu.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "The Canterbury Tales"
keyAchievements.description: An san shi sosai a matsayin marubucin littafin "The Canterbury Tales".

keyAchievements.title: '영문학의 아버지' 또는 '영시의 아버지'로 불림
keyAchievements.description: Ana kiran shi marubuci na farko da ya rubuta ayyuka a cikin yaren kansa na Turanci maimakon Faransanci ko Latin.

faq.question: Waye Geoffrey Chaucer?
faq.answer: Ya kasance marubuci, mawaƙi, ma'aikacin gwamnati, lauya, kuma jami'in diflomasiyya na kasar Ingila, kuma an san shi sosai a matsayin marubucin littafin "The Canterbury Tales".

faq.question: Menene babban littafin Geoffrey Chaucer?
faq.answer: Babban aikinsa shi ne littafin da bai kammala ba "The Canterbury Tales", wanda ya sami tasiri daga "Decameron" na Giovanni Boccaccio.

faq.question: Akwai isassun bayanai game da rayuwar farko ta Geoffrey Chaucer?
faq.answer: An bayyana a fili a cikin rubutun cewa kusan babu wasu bayanai da suka rage game da rayuwar farko da ilimin Chaucer.

chaucer.missingDataNote: 초서의 초기 생애와 교육에 대한 자료는 거의 남아있지 않으며, 1360년 석방 이후의 생애는 분명하지 않다고 원문에 언급되어 있습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin maraya (bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa) ga iyayen Ingila a Dublin, Ireland.
Ya fara aiki a fannin siyasa, kuma ya tabbatar da matsayinsa na marubuci ta hanyar buga ayyukan ba'a guda biyu ba tare da sunansa ba.
An nada shi a matsayin liman amma ya yi ritaya jim kadan baada haka.
Ya rasu kuma an binne shi a St. Patrick's Cathedral.

keyAchievements.title: Fara ayyukan rubutu
keyAchievements.description: Ya tabbatar da matsayinsa na marubuci ta hanyar buga ayyukan ba'a guda biyu ba tare da sunansa ba a shekara ta 1704.

keyAchievements.title: Yin aiki a matsayin mai sharhin siyasa
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi aiki a matsayin mai sharhin siyasa wanda ke wakiltar Jam'iyyar Tory da ke kan mulki a lokacin.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "Gulliver's Travels"
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta "Gulliver's Travels", wanda ake dauka a matsayin mafi kyawun littafin ba'a wanda ke sukar mutum da al'umma sosai.

keyAchievements.title: Samun laƙabin 'Mai kishin ƙasar Ireland'
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami laƙabin 'Mai kishin ƙasar Ireland' ta hanyar rubuta makalolin da ke zargin Ingila a kan yunwa da talauci a Ireland da kuma ba da shawarar dogaro da kai na Ireland.

faq.question: Wane aiki Jonathan Swift ya yi?
faq.answer: Ya kasance marubucin littattafai dan asalin kasar Ingila da Ireland kuma liman na cocin Anglican.

faq.question: Menene shahararren aikin adabi na Jonathan Swift?
faq.answer: Babban aikinsa shi ne littafin "Gulliver's Travels", wanda ake dauka a matsayin mafi kyawun littafin ba'a wanda ke sukar mutum da al'umma sosai.

faq.question: Yaya ake kimanta Jonathan Swift a Ireland?
faq.answer: Ya sami laƙabin 'Mai kishin ƙasar Ireland' ta hanyar rubuta makalolin da ke zargin Ingila a kan yunwa da talauci a Ireland da kuma ba da shawarar dogaro da kai na Ireland.

jonathan-swift.missingDataNote: 《걸리버 여행기》의 정확한 출판 연도, 윌리엄 템플 경 비서로 일한 기간, 잉글랜드 이주 연도 등 일부 사건의 구체적인 연도가 원문에 명시되어 있지 않습니다.

timeline.event: An haife ta a Paris
Ta rasa mahaifinta tana da shekaru 4 kuma ta girma a hannun kakarta
Ta auri Baron Dudevant, wani mai fada a gida
Ta bar gida tare da 'ya'yanta biyu ta koma Paris
Ta zama shahararriya ta hanyar buga littafin "Indiana" a matsayin wasan jarida
Buga littafin soyayya na tarihin rayuwarta "Lelia"
Buga littafin zamantakewa na jin kai "Consuelo"
Buga littafin karkara "La Mare au Diable" (The Devil's Pool)
Buga littafin "Francois le Champi"
Buga littafin "La Petite Fadette"
Buga littafin "Les Maitres Sonneurs"
Buga littafin tarihin rayuwarta "Histoire de ma vie"
Mutuwa

keyAchievements.title: Ayyuka a matsayin marubuciya
keyAchievements.description: Ta kasance marubuciyar kasar Faransa wadda ta ci gaba da rubuce-rubuce bayan ta zama sananna da littafin "Indiana".

keyAchievements.title: Wadda ta kafa adabin mata na Turai
keyAchievements.description: Ana kimanta ta a matsayin wadda ta kafa adabin mata na Turai tare da Madame de Stael.

keyAchievements.title: Mai fafutukar yancin mata
keyAchievements.description: Ana sake kimanta ta a matsayin wadda ta nuna fafutukar yancin mata a baya.

keyAchievements.title: Mafi kyawun adabin wasiƙa
keyAchievements.description: Wasiƙunta (juzu'i 26) ana daukar su a matsayin mafi kyawun adabin wasiƙa.

faq.question: Menene ainihin sunan George Sand?
faq.answer: Ainihin sunanta shi ne Amantine Lucile Aurore Dupin.

faq.question: Wacece George Sand?
faq.answer: Ta kasance marubuciyar kasar Faransa wadda kuma ta shahara da soyayya ta yanci.

faq.question: Daga ina sunan bogi 'Sand' na George Sand ya fito?
faq.answer: Ya fito ne daga takaita sunan Jules Sandeau, wanda ya kasance masoyinta a wani lokaci.

faq.question: Su wane ne shahararrun masoyan George Sand?
faq.answer: Suna da mawaƙi Musset da mawaƙi Chopin.

faq.question: Yaya aka raba ayyukan adabi na George Sand?
faq.answer: Ayyukanta na adabi sun kasu kashi hudu.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Aix-en-Provence
Ya shiga College Bourbon a Aix kuma ya zama aboki da Emile Zola
Ya shiga makarantar zane ta kyauta a Aix don koyon zane
Ya shiga Faculty of Law a Jami'ar Aix-en-Provence amma ya mayar da hankali kan yin zane
Ya koma Paris don bunkasa fasaharsa amma ya gaza shiga Ecole des Beaux-Arts
An nuna zanensa a "Salon des Refuses" wanda Napoleon III ya shirya
An haifi dansa Paul tare da Hortense Fiquet
Ya shiga cikin taro na farko na baje kolin kungiyar "Anonymous Society of Artists, Painters, Sculptors, and Printmakers"
Ya nuna ayyuka 16 a baje kolin Impressionist na uku
Ya sami damar nuna "Portrait of M. L. A." a Salon tare da taimakon Antoine Guillemet, wanda ya kasance wasansa na farko kuma na karshe a Salon
Ya auri Hortense Fiquet
Mahaifinsa ya rasu kuma ya gaji dukiya wadda ta ba shi kwanciyar hakim/kwanciyar hankali na kudi
Ya koma addinin Katolika
Ambroise Vollard ya gudanar da baje kolin farko na kansa na Cezanne a wani gallery a Paris, wanda ya haifar da sake kimanta ayyukansa
Mahaifiyarsa ta rasu.
Ya gina dakin zanensa na kansa a Aix-en-Provence kuma ya koma can a shekara ta 1903
Ya nuna ayyuka a karon farko a Salon d'Automne da aka kafa sabo
An cika dakin Salon d'Automne gaba daya da ayyukan Cezanne
Ya rasu sakamakon ciwon sanyi (pneumonia) yana da shekaru 67
Baje koli guda biyu na tunawa da shi bayan mutuwarsa (baje kolin watercolor a Bernheim-Jeune Gallery da kuma na Salon d'Automne) sun zaburar da masana zane da yawa

keyAchievements.title: Piyoni na Post-Impressionism
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance mai zane na Post-Impressionist na kasar Faransa wanda ya yi aiki a matsayin gada tsakanin Impressionism na karshen ƙarni na 19 da Cubism na farkon ƙarni na 20.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkiro sabon yare na zane
keyAchievements.description: Ya kirkiro sabon yare na zane ta hanyar canza tsarin perspective na gargajiya da kuma jaddada ainihin tsarin abubuwa da halayen tsari.

keyAchievements.title: Dabarar amfani da launi da bugun burushi
keyAchievements.description: Yana da siffar amfani da bugun burushi na musamman da na bincike don samar da bangarori masu rikitarwa ta hanyar amfani da launi da kananan bugun burushi.

keyAchievements.title: Binciken siffofi na lissafi (geometric shapes)
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da ra'ayin zane na daukar halitta a matsayin siffofi na lissafi masu sauki kamar cylinder, sphere, da cone, kuma ya sanya abin da ake zana a cikin perspective.

keyAchievements.title: Nuna zurfi ta hanyar binocular vision
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da sabon kwarewa na kyan gani game da zurfi ta hanyar bincikar binocular vision don bayyana fahimtar gani ta abu daya.

keyAchievements.title: Jerin zane na Mont Sainte-Victoire
keyAchievements.description: Ya nuna daidaitaccen lura da kuma bincike na zane game da halitta ta hanyar jerin zane-zane a kan Mont Sainte-Victoire na mahaifarsa Aix-en-Provence.

keyAchievements.title: Tasiri mai yawa a kan fasahar zamani
keyAchievements.description: Ya zama sananne da sunan 'Ubanmu duka' saboda ya ba da mahimmiyar fahimta da zaburarwa ga kungiyoyin fasaha na avant-garde na farkon ƙarni na 20 kamar Picasso da Matisse.

faq.question: Waye Paul Cezanne?
faq.answer: Ya kasance mai zane na Post-Impressionist na kasar Faransa wanda ya yi aiki a matsayin gada tsakanin Impressionism na karshen ƙarni na 19 da Cubism na farkon ƙarni na 20.

faq.question: Yaya aka kimanta ayyukan Cezanne a lokacin rayuwarsa?
faq.answer: Da farko dai, ba a fahimci zanensa ba kuma an yi masa ba'a a cikin sharhin fasaha na lokacin, amma an sake kimanta shi bayan baje kolinsa na farko a shekara ta 1895, kuma a cikin shekarunsa na karshe matasa masu fasaha sun girmama shi a matsayin babban malami.

faq.question: Wane tasiri Cezanne ya yi ga fasahar zamani?
faq.answer: Ya yi tasiri a kan kungiyoyin fasaha na avant-garde na farkon ƙarni na 20 ta hanyar gabatar da sabbin hanyoyin nuna fasaha, kuma ya ba da gagarumar zaburarwa ga masu zane na Cubist da Fauvist kamar Picasso da Matisse.

faq.question: Menene siffofin dabarun zane na Cezanne?
faq.answer: Ya canza tsarin perspective na gargajiya kuma ya jaddada ainihin tsarin abubuwa da halayen tsari, sannan ya nemi sauƙaƙe siffofi na lissafi ta hanyar daukar halitta a matsayin cylinder, sphere, da cone.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Paris, Faransa.
Ya yi karatun zane da fenti a Petite Ecole.
Ya gaza shiga Ecole des Beaux-Arts kuma ya bar Petite Ecole.
Yar uwarsa Maria ta rasu sakamakon ciwon sanyi na ciki (peritonitis).
Ya hadu da Rose Beuret, wata mai dinki wadda ta kasance abokiyar rayuwarsa ta har abada.
Ya nuna fasahar sassakarsa ta farko "The Man with the Broken Nose" a Salon amma aka ki amsa ta.
Ya fuskanci matsalolin kudi sakamakon Yakin Franco-Prussian.
Ya yi tafiya zuwa Italiya.
Ya zauna a Italiya sannan ya koma Faransa a shekara ta 1877.
Ya haifar da cece-kuce a cikin al'umma ta hanyar gabatar da littafin "The Age of Bronze".
Ya sami oda don kera "The Gates of Hell".
Alakarsa ta fara da Camille Claudel, wadda ta kasance dalibarsa kuma abokiyar aikinsa.
Ya gabatar da "The Burghers of Calais".
Ya gabatar da "Monument to Balzac".
Ya sami babban nasara a matsayin mai sassaka kuma ya gabatar da "The Kiss".
Ya gabatar da "The Thinker".
Mawaƙi Rainer Maria Rilke ya yi aiki a matsayin sakatarensa.
Ya gabatar da "The Walking Man".
Rainer Maria Rilke ya karfafa masa gwiwa ya yi hayar Hotel Biron, wanda a yau ya zama Rodin Museum.
Ya gabatar da "Clemenceau".
Ya ba da kyautar ayyukansa da kayayyakin baje koli ga kasa.
Ya rasu.

keyAchievements.title: Uban sassaka na zamani
keyAchievements.description: Ana kiran shi uban sassaka na zamani, kuma ya daukaka fahimtar sassaka zuwa matakin da yake daidai da zane.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da "The Age of Bronze"
keyAchievements.description: Ya haifar da cece-kuce a cikin al'umma ta hanyar gabatar da "The Age of Bronze" a shekara ta 1876.

keyAchievements.title: Kera "The Gates of Hell"
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera babban aikinsa "The Gates of Hell" wanda ya samu odarsa a shekara ta 1880 kuma ya yi aiki a kai duk rayuwarsa.

keyAchievements.title: Kera "The Burghers of Calais"
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera "The Burghers of Calais" wanda yake daya daga cikin manyan ayyukansa.

keyAchievements.title: Kera "The Thinker"
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera shahararren aikinsa "The Thinker".

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da "Monument to Balzac"
keyAchievements.description: Ya bude sabuwar Haya a fannin sassaka ta hanyar gabatar da "Monument to Balzac" a shekara ta 1898.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Auguste Rodin?
faq.answer: Auguste Rodin ya kasance an haife shi a ranar 12 ga Nuwamba, 1840 a Paris, Faransa.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan ayyukan Auguste Rodin?
faq.answer: Manyan ayyukansa sun hada da "The Burghers of Calais", "The Gates of Hell", da "The Thinker".

faq.question: Wane tasiri Auguste Rodin ya yi ga fannin sassaka?
faq.answer: Ana kimanta shi a matsayin uban sassaka na zamani ta hanyar karya tsarin gargajiya na sassaka da kuma daukaka fahimtar sassaka zuwa matakin da yake daidai da zane.

faq.question: Yaushe Auguste Rodin ya rasu?
faq.answer: Ya rasu ne a ranar 17 ga Nuwamba, 1917.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Saint-Germain-en-Laye, Yvelines, Ile-de-France.
Marie Maute de Fleurville ta lura da shi.
Ya shiga Paris Conservatoire yana da shekaru 11.
Ya tsara Piano Trio in G major.
Ya tsara "Nuit d'etoiles" da "Beau Soir".
Ya tsara Intermezzo for cello and orchestra.
Ya sami matsayi na biyu a Prix de Rome tare da cantata "Le Gladiateur".
Ya sami matsayi na farko a Prix de Rome tare da cantata "L'enfant prodigue".
Ya tsara cantata "L'enfant prodigue".
Ya fara tsara "Ariettes oubliees".
Ya fara tsara "Petite Suite".
Ya tsara symphonic suite "Printemps".
Ya fara halartar salon na Mallarme.
Ya fara tsara "Cinq poemes de Charles Baudelaire".
Ya fara tsara "La Damoiselle elue".
Ya fara tsara "Deux arabesques".
Ya fara tsara Fantaisie for piano and orchestra.
Ya tsara "Valse romantique" da "Reverie".
Ya fara tsara "Suite bergamasque".
Ya tsara String Quartet in G minor.
Ya fara tsara "Pelleas et Melisande".
Ya tsara symphonic poem "Prelude a l'apres-midi d'un faune".
Ya fara tsara "Pour le piano".
Ya fara tsara "Nocturnes".
Ya fara tsara "Trois chansons".
Ya auri Rosalie Texier.
Ya fara tsara Rhapsody for alto saxophone and orchestra.
Ya sami shahara ta duniya bayan an gabatar da opera dinsa "Pelleas et Melisande" a karon farko.
Ya fara tsara "Images pour orchestre".
Ya tsara "Estampes".
Ya fara tsara symphonic poem "La Mer".
Ya bar matarsa bayan ya fada cikin soyayya da Emma Bardac.
Ya tsara "King Lear" da "L'isle joyeuse".
Ya fara tsara "Images" (juzu'i 2).
Ya fara tsara "Children's Corner".
Ya sadaukar da "Children's Corner" ga diyarsa Claude-Emma.
Ya fara tsara Rhapsody na farko don clarinet da orchestra.
Ya fara tsara "Preludes" (juzu'i 2).
Ya fara tsara "Jeux".
Ya tsara "Syrinx", "La Boite a joujoux", da kuma "Trois poemes de Stephane Mallarme".
Ya tsara "En blanc et noir", "Etudes", "Elegie", Cello Sonata in D minor, da kuma Sonata for flute, viola, and harp in F major.
Ya fara tsara Violin Sonata in G minor.
Ya rasu sakamakon ciwon daji (cancer) a ranar 25 ga Maris a Paris.
An yi jana'izarsa a ranar 28 ga Maris.

keyAchievements.title: Shiga Paris Conservatoire
keyAchievements.description: Ya shiga Paris Conservatoire, babban dakin koyon kidi na kasar Faransa, yana da shekaru 10 sannan aka yaba da hazakarsa ta kidi.

keyAchievements.title: Samun matsayi na farko a Prix de Rome
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami matsayi na farko a Prix de Rome tare da cantata "L'enfant prodigue" a shekara ta 1884.

keyAchievements.title: Samun shahara ta duniya da "Pelleas et Melisande"
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami shahara ta duniya bayan an gabatar da opera dinsa guda daya tilo da ya kammala "Pelleas et Melisande" a shekara ta 1902.

keyAchievements.title: Tabbatar da salon Impressionist na ayyukansa
keyAchievements.description: Salon Impressionist na ayyukansa ya tabbata ta hanyar "Prelude a l'apres-midi d'un faune" wanda ya ginu a kan waƙar Mallarme.

keyAchievements.title: Habaka salon kidi na kansa
keyAchievements.description: Ya habaka tsarin sautin kansa da launin orchestra ta hanyar samun tasiri daga kidan Rasha, na Gabas, da kuma ayyukan Chopin.

keyAchievements.title: Tasiri ga mawaka na baya
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi tasiri mai karfi a kan mawaka da yawa kamar Bela Bartok da Olivier Messiaen.

faq.question: Wane salon kidi Claude Debussy ya wakilta?
faq.answer: Claude Debussy ya kasance babban mawaƙi na kidan Impressionist na kasar Faransa.

faq.question: Wadanne ne shahararrun ayyukan orchestra na Debussy?
faq.answer: Shahararrun ayyukansa na orchestra sun hada da "Prelude a l'apres-midi d'un faune", "Nocturnes" (1897-1899), da "Images" (1905-1912).

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Debussy kuma yaushe ya rasu?
faq.answer: An haife shi a ranar 22 ga Agusta, 1862 kuma ya rasu a ranar 25 ga Maris, 1918.

faq.question: Wane ilimi Debussy ya samu, kuma wadanne kyaututtuka ya ci?
faq.answer: Ya shiga Paris Conservatoire yana da shekaru 10, kuma ya sami matsayi na farko a Prix de Rome tare da cantata "L'enfant prodigue" a shekara ta 1884.

faq.question: Menene siffofin kidan Debussy?
faq.answer: Kidan Debussy ya samo asali ne da adawa da Wagner da al'adun kidan Jamus, kuma ya nemi sabbin siffofi maimakon tsarin symphony na gargajiya.

faq.question: Wane motsi na adabi ya yi tasiri a kan Debussy?
faq.answer: Debussy ya sami tasiri mai karfi daga motsin waƙoƙi na Symbolism a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19.

timeline.event: An haife ta a Landan da sunan Adeline Virginia Stephen
Ciwon hauka na farko ya bayyana bayan mutuwar mahaifiyarta
Ya fara karatun tarihi da yaren Girka a King's College London
Ta yi kokarin kashe kanta ta hanyar tsalle sakamakon ciwon hauka na biyu bayan mutuwar mahaifinta, amma ba ta yi nasara ba
Ta auri Leonard Woolf
Ta buga littafin "The Voyage Out"
Ta buga littafin "Night and Day"
An buga littafin "Mrs. Dalloway" kuma ya sami babban farin jini
Littafin "To the Lighthouse" ya sami yabo sosai
Littafin "Orlando" ya sami yabo sosai
Ta bace lokacin da ta fita yawo a Kogin Ouse, kuma aka gano gawarta bayan kwanaki biyu

keyAchievements.title: Kafa salon 'stream of consciousness'
keyAchievements.description: Tana daya daga cikin marubutan da suka samar kuma suka kammala salon 'stream of consciousness' a cikin litattafai.

faq.question: Wacece Virginia Woolf?
faq.answer: Ta kasance marubuciya kuma mai rubuta kasidu ta kasar Ingila, kuma tana daya daga cikin wadanda suka samar kuma suka kammala salon 'stream of consciousness'.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan ayyukan Virginia Woolf?
faq.answer: Akwai "Mrs. Dalloway" (1925), "To the Lighthouse" (1927), da "Orlando" (1928) wadanda suka sami babban farin jini da yabo.

faq.question: Yaushe Virginia Woolf ta rasu?
faq.answer: Ta bace lokacin da ta fita yawo a Kogin Ouse a ranar 28 ga Maris, 1941, kuma an gano gawarta bayan kwanaki biyu.

faq.question: Wace kungiya Virginia Woolf ta kasance cikinta?
faq.answer: Ta kasance memba na Bloomsbury Group wanda ya yi aiki a gundumar Bloomsbury ta London daga shekara ta 1907 zuwa 1930.

timeline.event: An haifi Franz Kafka, marubuci Bayahude na Daular Austria-Hungary
Ya sami digirin digirgir (PhD) a kan shari'a
Ya sami aiki a wani kamfanin inshora a Prague
Ya shiga kamfanin inshora na Assicurazioni Generali
Ya yi murabus daga kamfanin inshora na Generali
Ya shiga Kamfanin Inshora na Hatsarin Ma'aikata na Masarautar Bohemia
Karl Hermann, mijin kanwarsa Elli, ya ba shi shawarar kasuwancin masana'antar asbestos
Ya hadu da Felice Bauer a gidan Max Brod
Ya fara rubuta "Der Verschollene" (daga baya aka canza masa suna zuwa "Amerika") da kuma "Die Verwandlung" (The Metamorphosis)
Ya sami lambar yabo don kera hular kwana (safety helmet)
Ya fara rubuta "In der Strafkolonie" (In the Penal Colony) da kuma "Der Process" (The Trial)
Ya kammala rubuta tarin gajerun labarai "Ein Landarzt" (A Country Doctor)
Gano ciwon taruba (tuberculosis)
Rabuwa da Felice Bauer
Yin murabus daga kamfanin inshora
Fara rubuta "Das Schloss" (The Castle)
Koma Berlin don mayar da hankali kan rubutu
Ya rasu a Kierling, wani gidan jiyya na taruba kusa da Vienna, Austria
An binne shi a makabartar Yahudawa a gundumar Zizkov ta Prague

keyAchievements.title: Kera hular kwana da kuma taimakawa wajen rage yawan mace-mace
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami lambar yabo don kera hular kwana a shekara ta 1912, kuma ya taimaka wajen rage yawan mace-mace sakamakon injinan nika karfe a Masarautar Bohemia zuwa 25 a cikin mutane 1000.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta manyan ayyukan adabi
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta ayyukan adabi da yawa kamar "The Metamorphosis", "The Trial", "The Castle", "Amerika", "In the Penal Colony", da "A Country Doctor".

faq.question: Wane yare Kafka ya yi amfani da shi wajen rubuta ayyukansa?
faq.answer: Yawancin ayyukansa an rubuta su ne da yaren Prague German, in ban da wasu wasiƙu da ya rubuta wa Milena Jesenska da yaren Czech.

faq.question: Yaya Kafka ya so a yi da ayyukansa bayan mutuwarsa?
faq.answer: A cikin wasiyarsa da ya aika wa abokinsa kafin mutuwarsa, ya nemi da a kona dukkan rubuce-rubucensa.

faq.question: Yaya ayyukan Kafka suka zama sanannu bayan mutuwarsa?
faq.answer: Abokinsa Max Brod ya saba wa wasiyar Kafka kuma ya kula da buga ayyuka da yawa da yake da su, wanda ya sa suka zama sanannu a duk duniya.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin da na farko ga John Stanislaus Joyce da Mary Jane Murray a 41 Brighton Square West, Rathgar, Dublin, Ireland.
Ya buga tarin wakoki "Chamber Music".
Ya buga littafin "Dubliners".
Ya buga wasan kwaikwayo "Exiles".
Ya buga littafin "A Portrait of the Artist as a Young Man".
Ya buga littafin "Ulysses".
Ya buga littafin "Finnegans Wake".
Ya rasu.

keyAchievements.title: Ulysses
keyAchievements.description: Wani shahararren littafi ne da ya ba da gudummawa ga fasahar avant-garde na modernism.

keyAchievements.title: Finnegans Wake
keyAchievements.description: Wani ci gaba ne mai wuyar fahimta na littafin "Ulysses".

keyAchievements.title: Dubliners
keyAchievements.description: Wani tarin gajerun labarai ne da ke nuna rayuwar mutanen Dublin da ke cike da takaici da bakin ciki a farkon ƙarni na 20 da kmma yanayin al'umma mai wuya na lokacin.

keyAchievements.title: A Portrait of the Artist as a Young Man
keyAchievements.description: Wani littafi ne na tarihin rayuwa na wucin gadi.

keyAchievements.title: Chamber Music
keyAchievements.description: Wani tarin wakoki ne da aka buga a shekara ta 1907.

keyAchievements.title: Exiles
keyAchievements.description: Wani wasan kwaikwayo ne da aka buga a shekara ta 1915.

faq.question: Wane irin marubuci ne James Joyce?
faq.answer: Ya kasance marubuci dan asalin Dublin, Ireland, wanda ya yi aiki a fannoni daban-daban kamar litattafai, wakoki, da wasan kwaikwayo, kuma ana daukar shi a matsayin babban marubucin littattafai na modernism.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan ayyukansa?
faq.answer: Shahararrun litattafansa sun hada da "Ulysses", "Finnegans Wake", "Dubliners", da "A Portrait of the Artist as a Young Man".

faq.question: Menene babban tarihin da ya yi tasiri a kan duniyar ayyukansa?
faq.answer: Tunaninsa da duniyar kaga ta ginu ne a garinsa na Dublin, Ireland, kuma Dublin ta samar da mafi yawan jigogi da hotunan litattafansa.

faq.question: Wane matsayi James Joyce yake da shi game da addinin Katolika?
faq.answer: Ya nisa daga addinin Katolika bayan ya gano rashin adalci da zalunci na limamai ta hanyar ilimin Jesuit, kuma ya bayyana wannan cikin suka a cikin ayyukansa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a ranar 22 ga Disamba a Lucca, Tuscany, Italiya.
Ya shiga Milan Conservatoire yana da shekaru 23 inda ya yi karatu a karkashin Ponchielli da sauran malamai.
Ya sauke karatu daga Milan Conservatoire yana da shekaru 26.
Ya buga wasansa na farko na opera a shekara ta gaba bayan ya sauke karatu kuma ya sami yabo.
Nasarar farko ta opera dinsa "Manon Lescaut" bisa ga ainihin labarin Abbe Prevost ta kafa matsayinsa a matsayin mai tsara opera.
Ya fara zamanin shahararrun ayyuka ta hanyar gabatar da opera "La Boheme".
Ya gabatar da opera "Tosca".
Ya gabatar da opera "Madama Butterfly".
Ya gabatar da opera "La fanciulla del West" (The Girl of the Golden West).
Kafin ya kai shekaru 61, ya gabatar da jerin opera guda uku "Il tabarro", "Suor Angelica", da "Gianni Schicchi".
Ya rasu sakamakon bugun zuciya a ranar 29 ga Nuwamba a Brussels, inda ya je don tiyatar ciwon daji na makogwaro (throat cancer) kafin cika shekaru 66.

keyAchievements.title: Samun shahara ta duniya
keyAchievements.description: Yana da shahara ta duniya a matsayin babban mai tsara opera na Italiya bayan Giuseppe Verdi.

keyAchievements.title: Nasarar opera "Manon Lescaut"
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa matsayinsa a matsayin mai tsara opera ta hanyar gagarumar nasara ta "Manon Lescaut".

keyAchievements.title: Fara zamanin shahararrun ayyuka
keyAchievements.description: Ya bude zamanin shahararrun ayyuka tun daga opera "La Boheme" a shekara ta 1896, kuma ya gabatar da manyan ayyuka kamar "Tosca" da "Madama Butterfly".

keyAchievements.title: Tsara shahararrun arias
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara shahararrun arias kamar "O mio babbino caro" daga Gianni Schicchi da kuma "Nessun dorma" daga Turandot.

keyAchievements.title: Amfani da dabarun opera na Jamus da Italiya
keyAchievements.description: Ana kimanta shi a matsayin daya daga cikin mawaka da suka yi amfani da dabarun opera na Jamus da na Italiya cikin nasara.

faq.question: Wace irin kimantawa Puccini yake samu a matsayin mai tsara opera?
faq.answer: Yana da shahara ta duniya a matsayin babban mai tsara opera na Italiya bayan Giuseppe Verdi, kuma ana kimanta shi a matsayin daya daga cikin mawaka da suka yi amfani da dabarun opera na Jamus da na Italiya cikin nasara.

faq.question: Wadanne ne shahararrun ayyukan opera na Puccini?
faq.answer: Shahararrun ayyukansa sun hada da La Boheme, Tosca, da Madama Butterfly.

faq.question: Mene ne shahararrun arias octopus/operas na Puccini?
faq.answer: "O mio babbino caro" daga Gianni Schicchi da kuma "Nessun dorma" daga Turandot suna da shahara sosai.

faq.question: Yaushe Puccini ya rasu?
faq.answer: Ya rasu sakamakon bugun zuciya a ranar 29 ga Nuwamba, 1924 a Brussels kafin cika shekaru 66.

faq.question: Waye ya kammala opera ta Puccini "Turandot" da ba ta kammala ba?
faq.answer: Franco Alfano, wanda ya kasance abokin karatunsa a Milan Conservatoire, ne ya kammala "Turandot" wadda ba ta kammala ba.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Paris, Faransa.
Mahaifinsa Francois Baudelaire ya rasu lokacin da yake da shekaru 6.
An tura shi zuwa Kolkata, Indiya bisa fatan mahaifinsa na riko, amma ya tafi ne kawai har tsibirin Reunion sannan ya dawo Faransa.
Kodayake bai da wani rubutu da aka buga tukuna, an san shi a matsayin dandy a duniyar fasaha.
Ya batar da rabin dukiyar da mahaifinsa na asali ya bar masa sannan ya nemi kudi a wajen mahaifiyarsa don samun nasara a matsayin marubuci.
Ya buga aikinsa na farko na sukar fasaha "Salon of 1845".
Ya rubuta sharhi na biyu a kan Salon kuma ya sami shahara a matsay인 mai kare hakki da mai sharhi na Romanticism.
An buga littafinsa "La Fanfarlo".
Ya shiga cikin juyin juya hali.
Ya sha fama da tabarbarewar lafiya, bashi mai yawa, da kuma rubutu maras tabbas.
An buga tarin wakokinsa na farko kuma mafi shahara "Les Fleurs du mal".
Ya yi kokarin zama a Honfleur bayan ya bar Paris amma bai yi nasara ba.
Ya ci gaba da rubuce-rubuce kamar fassara littafin Edgar Allan Poe "The Narrative of Arthur Gordon Pym of Nantucket" da kuma rubuta sharhi.
Ya bar Jeanne Duval bayan wani masoyinta ya fara zama da ita.
An sake buga wani fitowa na "Les Fleurs du mal" dauke da wasu wakoki masu yawa bayan an cire wasu wakoki 6.
Ya yi kokarin zama dan takara a Academie Francaise amma ya janye sakamakon sukar da mai sharhi Charles Augustin Sainte-Beuve ya yi masa.
Ya tafi Brussels saboda bashi don buga littattafai da yin lakcoci, amma masu buga littattafai sun nuna halin ko-in-kula.
Ya rasu a watan Agusta a Paris.
A ranar 11 ga Mayu, an wanke wakoki 6 da aka cire na "Les Fleurs du mal" sannan aka sake buga su a Faransa.

keyAchievements.title: Yin aiki a matsayin mai sharhi da mawaƙi
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance mai sharhi da mawaƙi na kasar Faransa wanda ya ba da gudummawa ga adabi.

keyAchievements.title: Samun lambar yabo a gasar adabi
keyAchievements.description: Ya nuna hazakar adabi tun da wuri ta hanyar samun kyautar yabo a gasar Latin verse ta kasa da kuma matsayi na biyu a fannin French verse.

keyAchievements.title: Buga "Salon of 1845"
keyAchievements.description: Ya buga aikinsa na farko na sukar fasaha "Salon of 1845" kuma ya sami hankali saboda bajintarsa.

keyAchievements.title: Buga littafin "La Fanfarlo"
keyAchievements.description: Ya ci gaba da rubuce-rubuce ta hanyar buga littafin "La Fanfarlo".

keyAchievements.title: Fassaran ayyukan Edgar Allan Poe
keyAchievements.description: Ya fassara ayyukan Edgar Allan Poe don gabatar da su ga masu karatu na Faransa.

keyAchievements.title: Buga "Les Fleurs du mal"
keyAchievements.description: Ya buga tarin wakokinsa na farko kuma mafi shahara "Les Fleurs du mal" a shekara ta 1857.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan rubutu na baya
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da ayyuka kamar wakoki masu siffar kasida na "Le Spleen de Paris", "The Life and Work of Eugene Delacroix", da kuma "The Painter of Modern Life".

keyAchievements.title: Girmama shi a matsayin Uban Symbolism
keyAchievements.description: Stephane Mallarme da Paul Verlaine sun yabe shi kuma sun girmama shi a matsayin Uban Symbolism.

faq.question: Wane aiki Charles Baudelaire ya yi?
faq.answer: Ya kasance mai sharhi da mawaƙi na kasar Faransa.

faq.question: Menene mafi shahararren aikin Charles Baudelaire?
faq.answer: Babban aikinsa shi ne tarin wakokinsa na farko "Les Fleurs du mal" wanda aka buga a shekara ta 1857.

faq.question: Wace muhawara ce ta barke lokacin da aka buga "Les Fleurs du mal"?
faq.answer: "Les Fleurs du mal" an zarge shi da laifin cin zarafin tarbiyya kuma an ci tararsa, amma an wanke shi a shekara ta 1949.

faq.question: Wane marubuci Charles Baudelaire ya fassara ayyukansa?
faq.answer: Ya fassara ayyukan Edgar Allan Poe, kuma gajerun labaran Poe sun yi tasiri sosai a kansa.

faq.question: Wane salon fasaha Charles Baudelaire ya yi tasiri a kai?
faq.answer: Stephane Mallarme da Paul Verlaine sun yabe shi kuma sun girmama shi a matsayin Uban Symbolism.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Moscow
Ya zauna a Munich yana da shekaru 30 kuma ya fara karatu a makarantu masu zaman kansu da makarantar fasaha (Academy of Fine Arts)
Ya gama zama tare da Gabriele Munter, wata mace mai zane ta Expressionist ta Jamus
Ya koma Moscow bayan Juyin Juya Halin Rasha
Ya bar aikin koyarwa a Moscow Academy of Fine Arts ya koma Jamus
Ya fara koyar da dalibai a Bauhaus
Buga littafinsa na biyu na ka'ida "Point and Line to Plane"
Tafiya zuwa Egypt, Girka, da Turkey
Ya koma Faransa bayan da aka rufe Bauhaus sakamakon matsalolin siyasa
Samun zama dan kasar Faransa
Ya rasu a Neuilly-sur-Seine, Faransa

keyAchievements.title: Wanda ya kafa zanen abstract
keyAchievements.description: Ana kimanta shi a matsayin wanda ya kafa zanen abstract, kuma an san shi a matsayin mai zane wanda ya zana aikin abstract na farko na zamani.

keyAchievements.title: Littafinsa na ka'ida "Point and Line to Plane"
keyAchievements.description: Ya buga littafinsa na biyu na ka'ida "Point and Line to Plane" a shekara ta 1926 don bayyana alakar sassan zane na asali.

keyAchievements.title: Rawar da ya taka a Bauhaus
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance mai kula da sashen mural a Bauhaus, kuma a karshe ya sami amincewa a matsayin mataimakin darakta ta hanyar taimaka wa dalibai wajen samar da ikon yanke shawara mai kyau.

keyAchievements.title: Dalilin komawa ga zanen abstract
keyAchievements.description: Sauraron opera ta Wagner "Lohengrin" da kuma kwarewar ganin launuka lokacin sauraron kidi (synesthesia) sun kasance babban dalilin da ya sa ya koma ga zanen abstract.

faq.question: Yaya ake kimanta Kandinsky a matsayin mai fasaha?
faq.answer: Ana kimanta shi a matsayin wanda ya kafa zanen abstract, kuma yana daya cikin manyan masana fasaha na ƙarni na 20 wadanda ake kwatanta su da Picasso da Matisse.

faq.question: Yaushe kuma a ina aka haifi Kandinsky kuma yaushe ya rasu?
faq.answer: An haife shi a ranar 4 ga Disamba, 1866 a Moscow kuma ya rasu a ranar 13 ga Disamba, 1944 a Neuilly-sur-Seine, Faransa.

faq.question: Menene manyan littattafan Kandinsky na ka'ida?
faq.answer: Babban littafinsa na ka'ida shi ne "Point and Line to Plane" wanda aka buga a shekara ta 1926.

faq.question: Menene dalilin da ya sa Kandinsky ya koma ga zanen abstract?
faq.answer: Sauraron opera ta Wagner "Lohengrin" da kuma kwarewar ganin launuka lokacin sauraron kidi (synesthesia) sun kasance babban dalilin da ya sa ya koma ga zanen abstract.

wassily-kandinsky.missingDataNote: 가브리엘레 뮌터와의 동거 시작 연도와 제1 이론적 저작 《예술에 있어서 정신적인 것》의 출판 연도는 원문에 명시되어 있지 않아 생략되었습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a ranar 7 ga Yuni a Paris
Koma Peru tare da iyalinsa
Ya bar Peru ya koma Orleans, Faransa bayan da mai kula da shi ya rasa mukaminsa
Bayan ya shiga makarantar sojan ruwa, ya yi aiki a matsayin mai jagoran jirgi da kuma soja
Ya koma Paris kuma ya sami aiki a kamfanin hannun jari (stock brokerage)
Ya auri Mette Sophie Gad, wata mace 'yar kasar Denmark, kuma ya fara zane a matsayin abin sha'awa
Ya koma wani gida mai dakin zane a gundumar Vaugirard
Ya nuna ayyukansa a baje kolin Impressionist
Ya bar aikinsa na dillalin hannun jari sakamakon matsalar kudi sannan ya zama mai zane na cikakken lokaci
A watan Oktoba, ya nemi taimakon Camille Pissarro a matsayin mai zane na cikakken lokaci
Ya koma Rouen tare da iyalinsa, kuma a watan Nuwamba daukacin iyalin sun koma Copenhagen
Ya koma Paris tare da dansa Clovis a watan Yuni
Ya nuna zane-zane 19 da sassakar katako guda daya a baje kolin Impressionist na 8 a watan Mayu
Ya yi tafiya zuwa Panama da Martinique tare da Charles Laval
Ya ziyarci Arles a watan Oktoba don zama tare da Vincent van Gogh, sannan ya koma Paris a karshen Disamba
An gayyace shi zuwa baje kolin Les XX (Les Vingt)
Ya sami kudi ta hanyar gwanjo a Hotel Drouot a watan Fabrairu, sannan ya tashi zuwa Tahiti a ranar 1 ga Afrilu kuma ya auri Teha'amana a watan Nuwamba
Karshen shekara, ya nuna ayyukansa na Tahiti a Goupil Gallery
Ya bar Tahiti a ranar 14 ga Yuni kuma ya dawo Faransa a watan Agusta, sannan ya shirya baje koli a Durand-Ruel a watan Nuwamba
Farkon shekara, ya shirya zane-zanen katako don littafinsa na tafiye-tafiye "Noa Noa" sannan ya rabu da matarsa Mette

Ya yi kokarin yin gwanjo a Hotel Drouot a watan Fabrairu amma ya gaza, sannan ya mika sassakar yumbu "Oviri" ga Salon a watan Afrilu kuma ya sake tashi zuwa Tahiti a ranar 28 ga Yuni inda ya isa a watan Satumba
Ya sami labarin mutuwar diyarsa Aline a watan Afrilu, kuma ya shiga cikin mawuyacin hali na rashin lafiya da matsalolin kudi
Ya shirya baje koli a Vollard Gallery a watan Nuwamba
Ya sanya hannu kan yarjejeniyar samar da ayyuka tare da mai sayar da fasaha Ambroise Vollard
Ya zama edita na jaridar gida "Les Guepes" a watan Fabrairu
Ya yi murabus daga mukamin edita na "Les Guepes" a watan Satumba kuma ya koma Atuona a tsibirin Hiva Oa na Marquesas Islands
Ya rasu a ranar 8 ga Mayu a Marquesas Islands

keyAchievements.title: Taimako ga Post-Impressionism da Symbolism
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance mai zane, mai sassaka, mai kera zane-zane, mai kera yumbu, kuma marubuci na kasar Faransa wanda ya ba da gudummawa mai muhimmanci ga Post-Impressionism da Symbolism.

keyAchievements.title: Yin amfani da wood engraving da woodcut
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance mai amfani da wood engraving da woodcut a matsayin nau'in fasaha mai tasiri.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa salon Synthetism
keyAchievements.description: An san shi ga tsararraki masu zuwa saboda launukan gwaje-gwaje da salon Synthetism wadanda suka bambanta da Impressionism.

keyAchievements.title: Babban aikin Cloisonnism "The Yellow Christ"
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera "The Yellow Christ" wanda ye/yake babban aikin Cloisonnism mai dauke da zane mai sauki da layukan waje masu kauri da launuka masu tsabta.

keyAchievements.title: Piyoni na Primitivism
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance mai fasaha na farko da ya yi amfani da salon Primitivism cikin tsari kuma ya sami nasara, wanda ke da siffar karin gishiri na jiki, gumakan dabbobi, tsarin lissafi, da bambancin launuka.

keyAchievements.title: Tasiri a kan fasahar zamani
keyAchievements.description: Zanensa mai karfi, mai kayatarwa, kuma mai dauke da tsari na musamman ya zaburar da masana fasaha na zamani da yawa kamar Vincent van Gogh, Henri Matisse, da Pablo Picasso.

keyAchievements.title: Kammala babban aiki "Where Do We Come From? What Are We? Where Are We Going?"
keyAchievements.description: Ya kammala babban aikinsa "Where Do We Come From? What Are We? Where Are We Going?" wanda ace/ake dauka a matsayin wasiyyarsa ta fasaha.

faq.question: Wace kungiyar fasaha Paul Gauguin yake da alaka da ita?
faq.answer: Yana da alaka sosai da Post-Impressionism da Symbolism, kuma ana kimanta shi a matsayin piyoni na Primitivism.

faq.question: Menene salon ayyukan Paul Gauguin?
faq.answer: Ayyukansa suna da siffar launukan gwaje-gwaje da salon Synthetism, kuma ya yi amfani da kaurin layukan waje da sassan launi masu lebur sakamakon tasirin Cloisonnism.

faq.question: Wace alaka ce tsakanin Paul Gauguin da Vincent van Gogh?
faq.answer: Ya zana zane tare da Vincent van Gogh a Arles na tsawon makonni 9 a shekara ta 1888, amma alakar su ta tabarbare kuma suka rabu bayan da Vincent ya yanke kunnensa na kansa.

faq.question: Me yasa Paul Gauguin ya tafi Tahiti?
faq.answer: Ya tafi Tahiti don neman sabbin abubuwan zaburarwa na fasaha ta hanyar guduwa daga wayewar Turai da kuma "duk wani abu na kaga da al'ada".

faq.question: Paul Gauguin ya kasance mai zane mai nasara a lokacin rayuwarsa?
faq.answer: Bai sami babban nasara ba lokacin da yake raye, amma ya sami karbuwa bayan mutuwarsa sakamakon kokarin mai sayar da fasaha Ambroise Vollard, kuma ya yi babban tasiri a kan fasahar zamani.

timeline.event: An haifi William Blake, mai zane kuma mawaƙi na kasar Ingila (28 ga Nuwamba)
Ya zama dalibin mai kera zane-zane yana da shekaru 14
Ya yi aure yana da shekaru 25
Buga littafin "Poetical Sketches"
Buga littafin "Songs of Innocence"
Buga littafin "The Marriage of Heaven and Hell"
Buga littafin "Songs of Experience"
Buga littafin "Illustrations of the Book of Job" wanda ke kunshe da tunani na asiri a kan Littafi Mai Tsarki na Kiristanci
Ya yi kokarin kera zane-zane 100 don "Divine Comedy" na Dante amma bai kammala ba
Mutuwar William Blake (12 ga Agusta)

keyAchievements.title: Ayyuka a matsayin mawaƙi da mai zane
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi aiki a matsayin babban mai fasaha na kasar Ingila ta hanyar gabatar da wakoki da zane-zane masu alaka da asiri da mafarki.

keyAchievements.title: Kera shafukan wakoki da zane na musamman
keyAchievements.description: Ya buga littattafansa na musamman ta hanyar sanya zane a kowane shafi da kuma samar da launuka na musamman ta hanyar amfani da kera zane-zane (engraving).

keyAchievements.title: Buga manyan ayyuka
keyAchievements.description: Ya bar littattafai da yawa kamar "The Marriage of Heaven and Hell" (1790), "Songs of Experience" (1794), da "Illustrations of the Book of Job" (1825).

keyAchievements.title: Kafa matsayi na fasaha na zane-zane (illustrations)
keyAchievements.description: Ana kimanta shi a matsayin mutumin da ya daukaka zane-zane (illustrations) zuwa matakin da za a iya kwatanta shi da sauran zane-zane.

faq.question: Wane aiki William Blake ya yi?
faq.answer: Ya kasance mai zane kuma mawaƙi na kasar Ingila.

faq.question: Wadanne irin zane-zane William Blake ya soki/kyamatar?
faq.answer: Ya kyamaci zane-zane da ke kwafi hoton zahiri na halitta kawai kamar hoton mutum (portrait) ko na kasa (landscape).

faq.question: Wane irin zane William Blake ya fi so?
faq.answer: Ya ki amfani da oil painting kuma ya dauki watercolor a matsayin mafi kyawun nuna fasaha.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan littattafan William Blake?
faq.answer: Shahararrun littattafansa sun hada da "The Marriage of Heaven and Hell" (1790), "Songs of Experience" (1794), da "Illustrations of the Book of Job" (1825).

faq.question: Yaya William Blake ya kera littattafansa?
faq.answer: Ya buga littattafansa ta hanyar sanya zane a kowane shafi da kuma samar da launuka na musamman ta hanyar amfani da kera zane-zane (engraving).

william-blake.missingDataNote: 결혼 및 판화가 제자가 된 정확한 날짜는 원문에 명시되어 있지 않고, 나이만 언급되어 연도를 추정했습니다. 일부 작품의 정확한 출간일이 아닌 연도 범위만 제시되어 있습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Odense, Denmark
Ya sami baftisma a St. Hans Church, Odense
Mahaifinsa ya rasu
Mahaifiyarsa ta sake yin aure
Ya buga labarinsa na farko "The Ghost at Palnatoke's Grave"
An samar da takardar shaidar haihuwa tasa
Ya yi karatu a makaranta a Helsingor kuma
Ya sami babban nasara da gajeren labarinsa "A Journey on Foot from Holmen's Canal to the East Point of Amager"
Ya yi gwaji da "The Traveling Companion"
Ya buga "Shadow Pictures of a Journey to the Harz, Swiss Saxony, etc. in the Summer of 1831"
Ya sami karamin tallafin tafiya daga Sarki sannan ya fara tafiyarsa ta farko ta bincike a duk fadin Turai
Ya isa Rome
An buga littafinsa na farko "The Improvisatore" kuma ya sami yabo na farko
Buga littafi na farko na "Fairy Tales Told for Children. First Collection"
Buga littafi na biyu na "Fairy Tales Told for Children. First Collection"
Sukar farko ta kasar Denmark a kan littattafai biyu na farko ta bayyana
Buga littafi na uku na "Fairy Tales Told for Children. First Collection"
Ya fara jerin fairy tales na biyu
Ya buga "A Picture Book without Pictures"
Jenny Lind ta rubuta wasiƙa tana daukar Andersen a matsayin 'yaya'
Ya fara jerin fairy tales na uku
Ya zauna a 67 Nyhavn, Copenhagen
Ya ziyarci Ingila a karon farko kuma ya hadu da Charles Dickens
Ya buga "In Sweden" wanda ke kunshe da bayanan tafiya
Ya sake ziyartar Ingila musamman don haduwa da Dickens
Ya ambaci wannan lokaci a matsayin 'lokacin soyayya' (erotic period) a cikin jaridarsa
Ya rubuta a cikin jaridarsa cewa: 'Scharff bai ziyarce ni ba na tsawon kwanaki 8; ya kare tsakaninmu'
Ya buga "A Visit to Portugal in 1866"
Ya sami tayin sabbin labarai 12 daga Horace Scudder, edita na "Riverside Magazine for Young People"
Ya sami munanan raunuka bayan ya fado daga kan gado yana da shekaru 67
Ya rasu yana da shekaru 70 a Rolighed kusa da Copenhagen
An mayar da kabarin iyalin Collin zuwa wata makabarta inda aka binne matasa na iyalin Collin

keyAchievements.title: Shaharar marubucin fairy tales
keyAchievements.description: Ko da yake ya rubuta ayyuka da yawa a fannoni daban-daban kamar wasan kwaikwayo, littattafan tafiya, litattafai, da wakoki, an san shi sosai da fairy tales.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyuka da yawa da fassara
keyAchievements.description: Ayyukansa sun hada da fairy tales 156 a cikin juzu'i 9, kuma an fassara su zuwa yarurruka sama da 125.

keyAchievements.title: Tasirin al'adu
keyAchievements.description: Fairy tales dinsa sun zama wani bangare na tunanin gama gari na al'adun yammacin duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Nasarar "A Journey on Foot from Holmen's Canal to the East Point of Amager"
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami babban nasara da gajeren labarinsa "A Journey on Foot from Holmen's Canal to the East Point of Amager" a shekara ta 1829.

keyAchievements.title: Buga "The Improvisatore"
keyAchievements.description: An buga littafinsa na farko "The Improvisatore" a shekara ta 1835 kuma ya sami yabo na farko.

keyAchievements.title: Buga "Fairy Tales Told for Children. First Collection"
keyAchievements.description: Ya fara shiga fannin fairy tales ta hanyar wannan littafi da aka buga a matsayin jerin labarai tsakanin shekarun 1835 da 1837.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa shahara ta duniya da "The Little Mermaid"
keyAchievements.description: "The Little Mermaid" wadda aka buga a littafi na uku ta kafa shahara ta duniya ta Andersen.

keyAchievements.title: Buga littattafan tafiye-tafiye
keyAchievements.description: Ya buga littattafan tafiye-tafiye da yawa kamar "In Sweden" (1851) da "A Poet's Bazaar" kuma ya sami yabo.

keyAchievements.title: Buga "A Picture Book without Pictures"
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami babban sakamako da littafinsa "A Picture Book without Pictures" a shekara ta 1840.

keyAchievements.title: Yabo na kasa da kasa
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami yabo a duk fadin Turai bayan ya fara jerin fairy tales a shekarun 1838 da 1845.

faq.question: Wane irin marubuci aka fi sanin Hans Christian Andersen da shi?
faq.answer: Ko da yake ya rubuta ayyuka da yawa a fannoni daban-daban kamar wasan kwaikwayo, littattafan tafiya, litattafai, da wakoki, an san shi sosai da fairy tales.

faq.question: Zuwa yarurruka nawa aka fassara fairy tales na Andersen?
faq.answer: Ayyukansa sun hada da fairy tales 156 a cikin juzu'i 9, kuma an fassara su zuwa yarurruka sama da 125.

faq.question: Menene shahararrun fairy tales na Andersen?
faq.answer: Shahararrun fairy tales dinsa sun hada da "The Emperor's New Clothes", "The Red Shoes", "The Little Match Girl", "The Ugly Duckling", "The Little Mermaid", "Thumbelina", da "The Snow Queen".

faq.question: Yaushe kuma a ina aka haifi Andersen?
faq.answer: An haife shi a ranar 2 ga Afrilu, 1805 a Odense, Denmark.

faq.question: Su wane ne iyayen Andersen?
faq.answer: Mahaifinsa ya sami ilimin firamare, kuma mahaifiyarsa ta kasance mai wanke kaya wadda ba ta iya karatu ba.

faq.question: Andersen ya taba haduwa da Charles Dickens?
faq.answer: E, Andersen ya fara haduwa da Charles Dickens lokacin da ya ziyarci Ingila a watan Yuni 1847, kuma ya sake ziyartar Ingila a shekara ta 1857 don haduwa da Dickens.

faq.question: Yaushe Andersen ya rasu?
faq.answer: Ya rasu yana da shekaru 70 a ranar 4 ga Agusta, 1875 a Rolighed kusa da Copenhagen.

faq.question: Yaya rayuwarsa ta kuruciya ta bayyana a cikin ayyukan Andersen?
faq.answer: "The Little Match Girl" ta shafi mahaifiyarsa matsalata, "The Snow Queen" ta shafi mutuwar mahaifinsa, kuma "The Ugly Duckling" ta shafi wulakancin da ya sha sakamakon asalin rayuwarsa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Bombay, Indiya.
Ya koma Indiya.
Ya yi aiki a matsayin edita na "Civil & Military Gazette" da kuma "Pioneer" a Lahore.
Ya buga tarin wakoki "Departmental Ditties".
Ya buga tarin gajerun labarai "Plain Tales from the Hills".
Ya yi tafiya zuwa Gabas Mai Nisa da Amurka.
Ya buga littafin "The Man Who Would Be King".
Ya koma Ingila.
Ya buga wakokin "Mandalay" da "Gunga Din".
Ya buga tarin gajerun labarai "Life's Handicap".
An yi marhabin da shi don littafinsa "Barrack-Room Ballads" wanda ke nuna rayuwar soja a Indiya.
An girmama shi a matsayin mawaƙin kishin ƙasa don littafinsa "The Seven Seas".
Ya buga littafin "Kim".
Ya buga "Just So Stories".
Ya zama marubuci na farko mai amfani da yaren Turanci da ya sami Kyautar Nobel a Adabi.
Ya rubuta waƙar "If-" don ɗansa mai shekaru 12.
Ya rasu.

keyAchievements.title: Lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannin Adabi (Nobel Prize in Literature)
keyAchievements.description: Ya zama marubuci na farko mai amfani da yaren Turanci da ya sami Kyautar Nobel a Adabi a shekara ta 1907, kuma ya kasance mafi karancin shekaru da ya taba samun kyautar har zuwa yanzu.

keyAchievements.title: Taimako ga adabin yara
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da gudummawa ga fannin adabin yara ta hanyar rubuta fairy tales na yara kamar "The Jungle Book" da "Just So Stories".

keyAchievements.title: Kafa hanyar gajerun labarai
keyAchievements.description: Ana daukar shi a matsay인 daya daga cikin manyan masu kafa gajerun labarai (short stories).

keyAchievements.title: Ayyuka a fannoni daban-daban
keyAchievements.description: An amince da hazakarsa ta adabi baada ya buga ayyuka da yawa a fannoni daban-daban kamar litattafai, wakoki, da gajerun labarai.

faq.question: Wane irin marubuci aka fi sanin Rudyard Kipling da shi?
faq.answer: Ya kasance marubuci kuma mawaƙi na kasar Ingila, wanda aka fi sani da marubucin fairy tales kamar "The Jungle Book".

faq.question: Yaushe Rudyard Kipling ya sami Kyautar Nobel a Adabi?
faq.answer: Ya sami Kyautar Nobel a Adabi a shekara ta 1907 a matsayin marubuci na farko mai amfani da yaren Turanci.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan ayyukan Rudyard Kipling?
faq.answer: Ayyukansa sun hada da litattafai kamar "The Jungle Book", "Just So Stories", da "Kim", da kuma wakoki kamar "Mandalay" da "Gunga Din".

faq.question: Wane fannin adabi ake kimanta Rudyard Kipling a matsayin mai kafa shi?
faq.answer: Ana daukar shi a matsayin daya daga cikin manyan masu kafa gajerun labarai (short stories).

timeline.event: An haife ta a Ingila (13 ga Yuni)
Ta shiga Jami'ar Oxford don yin karatun yarurruka na zamani da kuma adabi na zamanin tsakiya
Ta sami digirin digirgir na Master of Arts ga/daga Jami'ar Oxford kuma ta zama mace ta farko da ta sami digiri a Oxford a lokacin
Ta buga littafinta na farko "Whose Body?"
Ta kafa kungiyar Detection Club (marubutan litattafan bincike na Ingila) tare da G. K. Chesterton, Agatha Christie, Ronald Knox, da sauran su
Mutuwa (17 ga Disamba)

keyAchievements.title: Buga littafin farko "Whose Body?"
keyAchievements.description: Ta buga littafinta na farko "Whose Body?" a shekara ta 1923 wanda ke dauke da babban jarumi Lord Peter Wimsey a matsayin mai bincike.

keyAchievements.title: Samun digiri na mace na farko a Jami'ar Oxford
keyAchievements.description: Ta sami digirin digirgir na Master of Arts a Jami'ar Oxford a shekara ta 1920 kuma ta zama mace ta farko da ta sami digiri a Oxford a lokacin.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta jerin littattafan Lord Peter Wimsey
keyAchievements.description: Ta rubuta jerin litattafan bincike na tsawon shekaru 15 dauke da Lord Peter Wimsey a matsayin mai bincike, wadanda ake dauka a matsayin manyan ayyuka da ke wakiltar zamanin zinariya na litattafan bincike.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa kungiyar Detection Club ta Ingila
keyAchievements.description: Ta kafa kungiyar Detection Club ta Ingila tare da G. K. Chesterton, Agatha Christie, da sauran su a shekara ta 1929.

keyAchievements.title: Rubutu a fannoni daban-daban
keyAchievements.description: Ta ci gaba da rubuce-rubuce a fannoni daban-daban kamar litattafan bincike, wakoki, wasan kwaikwayo, sukar adabi, fassara, da kasidu har zuwa kafin mutuwarta.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "The Zeal for Thy House"
keyAchievements.description: Ta rubuta babban aikinta "The Zeal for Thy House" wanda ke dauke da darussa na addinin Kiristanci da tauhidi.

faq.question: Wadanne fannoni Dorothy L. Sayers ta yi aiki a kai?
faq.answer: Ta yi aiki a matsayin marubuciyar litattafan bincike, mawaƙiya, da mai tsara talla, kuma ta ci gaba da rubuce-rubuce a fannoni daban-daban kamar wasan kwaikwayo, sukar adabi, kasidu, da fassara.

faq.question: Menene babban littafinta?
faq.answer: Manyan ayyukanta sun hada da jerin litattafan bincike dauke da Lord Peter Wimsey a matsayin babban jarumi da kuma "The Zeal for Thy House" wanda ke dauke da darussa na addinin Kiristanci.

faq.question: Wace alaka ce tsakanin Dorothy L. Sayers da Jami'ar Oxford?
faq.answer: Ta shiga Jami'ar Oxford a shekara ta 1912 don yin karatun yarurruka na zamani da adabi na zamanin tsakiya, kuma ta sami digirin digirgir na Master of Arts a shekara ta 1920, wanda ya sanya ta zama mace ta farko da ta sami digiri a Oxford a lokacin.

faq.question: Wadanne marubuta ta yi mu'amala da su?
faq.answer: Ta kafa abota da manyan marubuta na lokacin kamar C. S. Lewis, J. R. R. Tolkien, da T. S. Eliot, kuma ta kafa kungiyar Detection Club ta Ingila tare da Agatha Christie da sauran su.

dorothea-lange.missingDataNote: 입력된 slug 'dorothea-lange'는 제공된 출처 원문의 인물(Dorothy Leigh Sayers)과 다릅니다. 내용은 출처 원문에 따라 Dorothy Leigh Sayers에 대한 정보로 구성되었습니다.

timeline.event: An haife ta a Leipzig da sunan Clara Josephine Wieck.
Iyayenta sun rabu.
Ta fara gabatar da kanta a hukumance a Gewandhaus da ke Leipzig.
Ta hadu da Robert Schumann.
Ta tsara Quatre Polonaises Op. 1 for piano.
Ta zagaya Paris da sauran biranen Turai tare da mahaifinta.
Ta buga Piano Concerto in A minor dinta tare da Leipzig Gewandhaus Orchestra karkashin jagorancin Mendelssohn.
Ta amince da bukatar Robert Schumann na ya aure ta.
An nada ta a matsayin 'Königliche und Kaiserliche Österreichische Kammersvirtuosin' (Royal and Imperial Austrian Chamber Virtuosa), babban matsayi na girmamawa a fannin kidi a Austria.
Ta auri mai tsara kidan nan Robert Schumann.
Ta hada hannu da Robert Schumann wajen gabatar da wani aiki wanda ke amfani da jerin wakoki "Liebesfrühling" (Spring of Love) na Friedrich Rückert a matsayin kalmomi.
Ta fara haduwa da mai buga violin Joseph Joachim.
Ta fara gabatar da Piano Concerto na Robert Schumann a Dresden a karon farko.
Ta tsara Piano Trio in G minor Op. 17.
Ta ceci 'ya'yanta lokacin tawayen Mayu a Dresden.
Ta hadu da Johannes Brahms.
Ta tsara Three Romances for Violin and Piano Op. 22.
Robert Schumann ya yi kokarin kashe kanta sakamakon tabarbarewar lafiyar hankali, kuma an kwantar da shi a asibitin jiyya.
Ta fara yin yawace-yawacen baje kolin kide-kide a Ingila.
Mijinta Robert Schumann ya rasu.
Ta fara gabatar da aikin piano na Brahms "Variations and Fugue on a Theme by Handel" a karon farko.
Ta ci gaba da yin yawace-yawacen baje kolin kide-kide na hunturu-bazara a Ingila sau 16 a kowace shekara.
Ta tsara ayyukan gyare-gyare na wakoki 41 na Robert Schumann bisa bukatar mai buga littafi.
An nada ta a matsayin farfesa na farko na piano a Dr. Hoch's Konservatorium da aka kafa a Frankfurt.
Ta buga Beethoven's Choral Fantasy tare da sabuwar kungiyar kidi ta Berlin Philharmonic Orchestra.
Ta tace wasiƙun mijinta Robert Schumann (Jugendbriefe).
Ta tace ayyukan piano na Robert Schumann ta hanyar sanya lambobin yatsa da sauran darussa.
Ta gudanar da wasanta na karshe a Frankfurt.
Ta ci gaba da aikin koyarwa.
Ta rasu tana da shekaru 76.
An yi amfani da hoton Clara Schumann wanda Andreas Staub ya kera a shekara ta 1835 a kan takardar kudi ta 100 Deutsche Mark.

keyAchievements.title: Shahararriyar mai buga piano ta wasan kide-kide
keyAchievements.description: Ana daukar ta a matsayin daya daga cikin fitattun masu buga piano na zamanin Romanticism, kuma ta nuna tasiri ta hanyar ayyukan wasa na shekaru 61.

keyAchievements.title: Mai kawo sauyi a tsarin piano recital
keyAchievements.description: Ta canza tsarin wasan piano da abubuwan da ake bugawa ta hanyar rage muhimmancin ayyukan fasaha kawai, kuma ta sanya buga kidi ba tare da kallon rubutu ba (memorized performance) a matsayin ka'ida.

keyAchievements.title: Mai tsara kidi mai tarin yawa
keyAchievements.description: Ta tsara ayyuka a fannoni daban-daban kamar aikin piano na kanta, piano concerto, chamber music, choral music, da wakoki.

keyAchievements.title: Malami mai tasiri na piano
keyAchievements.description: Ta yi aiki a matsayin malami mai tasiri na piano a Dr. Hoch's Konservatorium a Frankfurt tun daga shekara ta 1878 kuma ta jawo hankalin dalibai na kasashen waje.

keyAchievements.title: Mai tace ayyukan Robert Schumann
keyAchievements.description: Ta tace littattafan ayyukan mijinta Robert Schumann, kuma ta kara wasiƙunsa da darussa a kan ayyukan piano.

keyAchievements.title: Mai tallata kidan Robert Schumann
keyAchievements.description: Ta ci gaba da tallata ayyukan mijinta Robert Schumann don su sami karbuwa da girmamawa a duk rayuwarta.

faq.question: Wacece Clara Schumann?
faq.answer: Clara Schumann ta kasance mai buga piano ta kasar Jamus, mai tsara kidi, da kuma malamar piano, wadda ake kimanta ta a matsayin daya daga cikin fitattun masu buga piano na zamanin Romanticism.

faq.question: Yaushe Clara Schumann ta auri Robert Schumann?
faq.answer: Clara Schumann ta auri mai tsara kidan nan Robert Schumann a ranar 12 ga Satumba, 1840.

faq.question: Wane tasiri Clara Schumann ta yi a kan wasan piano?
faq.answer: Ta sanya buga kidi ba tare da kallon rubutu ba a matsayin ka'idar wasa, kuma ta canza tsarin wasan piano da abubuwan da ake bugawa ta hanyar rage muhimmancin ayyukan fasaha kawai.

faq.question: Yaushe Clara Schumann ta rasu?
faq.answer: Clara Schumann ta rasu a ranar 20 ga Mayu, 1896 tana da shekaru 76, kuma an binne ta kusa da mijinta Robert Schumann a Bonn.

faq.question: Akwai takardar kudi da ke dauke da hoton Clara Schumann?
faq.answer: E, hoton Clara Schumann wanda Andreas Staub ya kera a shekara ta 1835 an yi amfani da shi a kan takardar kudi ta 100 Deutsche Mark dari/daga shekara ta 1989 zuwa 2002.

timeline.event: An haife ta a Cedarville, Illinois
Ta sauke karatu daga Rockford College
Ta kafa Hull House a Chicago tare da Ellen Gates Starr
An zabe ta a matsayin shugabar kungiyar Women's International League for Peace and Freedom
Ta sami Kyautar Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya tare da Nicholas Murray Butler
Ta rasu.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Hull House
keyAchievements.description: Ta kafa Hull House, dakin zama na farko na Amurka a Chicago tare da Ellen Gates Starr a shekara ta 1889.

keyAchievements.title: Jagorantar motsin zaman lafiya na yaki da yaki (anti-war peace movement)
keyAchievements.description: Ta jagoranci motsin zaman lafiya na yaki da yaki a lokacin Yakin Duniya na Farki.

keyAchievements.title: Shugabar kungiyar Women's International League for Peace and Freedom
keyAchievements.description: An zabe ta a matsayin shugabar kungiyar Women's International League for Peace and Freedom a shekara ta 1915.

keyAchievements.title: Lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya
keyAchievements.description: Ta sami Kyautar Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya tare da Nicholas Murray Butler a shekara ta 1931.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Jane Addams?
faq.answer: An haife ta a Cedarville, Illinois a ranar 6 ga Satumba, 1860.

faq.question: Yaushe Jane Addams ta sami Kyautar Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya?
faq.answer: Ta sami Kyautar Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya tare da Nicholas Murray Butler a shekara ta 1931.

faq.question: Wane irin daki ne Hull House wanda Jane Addams ta kafa?
faq.answer: Hull House ya kasance dakin zama na farko na Amurka wanda ke da makarantar dare ga manya, makarantar yara (kindergarten), kungiyar yara, dakin abinci na sadaka, da kuma gallery na fasaha.

timeline.event: An haife ta a Italiya
Ta zama shugabar makarantar nakasassu ta kasa
Ta dauki yara 60 daga unguwannin marasa karfi na Rome sannan ta kirkiro 'Montessori method of education'
Buga littafin "Il segreto dell'infanzia" (The Secret of Childhood)
Buga littafin "La mente del bambino" (The Absorbent Mind)
Mutuwa

keyAchievements.title: Habaka Montessori method of education
keyAchievements.description: Ta kirkiro wani tsarin ilimi wanda ke taimaka wa yara wajen nuna kansu cikin yanci bisa ga ikon bunkasa na kansu, kuma ta yada shi a duk duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Gano kayan wasan horar da hankali (sensory training toys)
keyAchievements.description: Ta gano kayan wasan da ke taimakawa wajen bunkasa hankalin yara ta hanyar amfani da kayan wasan da aka yi amfani da su ga yara masu larurar hankali ga yara marasa larura.

faq.question: Wacece Maria Montessori?
faq.answer: Ta kasance masaniyar ilimi kuma likita ta kasar Italiya wadda ta habaka Montessori method of education kuma ta yada shi a duk duniya.

faq.question: Menene ainihin ka'idar Montessori method of education?
faq.answer: Ta yi imanin cewa yara suna da ikon bunkasa kansu ta fuskar hankali, kuma ilimi ya kamata ya zama wanda ke ba yara damar nuna kansu da bunkasa kansu cikin yanci.

faq.question: Menene rawar da malami yake takawa a Montessori method of education?
faq.answer: Ta bayyana cewa malami ya kamata ya lura da ayyukan yara kuma ya jagorance su yadda ya kamata, ya samar da yanayin da ke taimaka wa yara a ayyukansu na kansu, kuma ya shiga tsakani kawai lokacin da bukata ta taso.

timeline.event: An haife shi a ranar 10 ga Disamba a Newburyport, Massachusetts, Amurka
Kafa jaridar "The Liberator" wadda ke ba da shawarar soke bauta
Dakatar da jaridar "The Liberator" da kuma soke bauta ta hanyar Doka ta 13 ta Tsarin Mulkin Amurka
Neman fadada hakkin jefa kuri'a na mata
Ya rasu a ranar 24 ga Mayu a New York City, New York, Amurka

keyAchievements.title: Kafa da buga jaridar "The Liberator"
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa jaridar "The Liberator" a shekara ta 1831 wadda ke ba da shawarar soke bauta, kuma ya ci gaba da buga ta har zuwa shekara ta 1865 lokacin da aka soke bauta ta hanyar Doka ta 13 ta Tsarin Mulkin Amurka.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa kungiyar American Anti-Slavery Society
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance daya daga cikin wadanda suka kafa American Anti-Slavery Society, kuma ya ba da shawarar soke bauta nan take ba tare da wani biyan kudi ba.

keyAchievements.title: Yunkurin hakkin kada kuri'a na mata
keyAchievements.description: Ya nemi fadada hakkin jefa kuri'a na mata a shekarun 1870.

faq.question: Waye William Lloyd Garrison?
faq.answer: Ya kasance mai fafutukar soke bauta, dan jarida, kuma mai fafutukar zamantakewa na Amurka, wanda ya kafa jaridar "The Liberator" wadda ke ba da shawarar soke bauta.

faq.question: Menene sunan jaridar da William Lloyd Garrison ya kafa?
faq.answer: Sunan jaridar da ya kafa shi ne "The Liberator", kuma an buga ta daga shekara ta 1831 zuwa 1865.

faq.question: Wane matsayi William Lloyd Garrison ya dauka game da soke bauta?
faq.answer: Ya nemi soke bauta nan take ba tare da wani biyan kudi ba, kuma ko da yake da farko ya ginu a kan zaman lafiya na Kiristanci, ya goyi bayan gwagwarmayar makami baada/bafter barkewar Yakin Basasa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin babban da na liman Lutheran a Kaysersberg, Alsace.
Ya yi karatu a makarantar kauye.
Ya fara karatu a makarantar sakandare ta kasuwanci.
Ya sami digirin digirgir (PhD) na falsafa a Jami'ar Strasbourg ta hanyar nazarin Kant.
Ya zama liman a Strasbourg.
Ya sami digirin digirgir na ilimin addinin Kiristanci (Doctor of Theology) ta hanyar nazarin rayuwar Yesu da farkon Kiristanci.
Ya zama malami a sashen ilimin addini na jami'ar da ya kammala.
Ya shiga fannin karatun likitanci yana da shekaru 30.
Ya taimaka wajen kafa kungiyar Bach Society a Paris kuma ya yi aiki a matsayin mai buga organ.
Ya fara aikin kula da lafiya a Lambarene, French Equatorial Africa tare da matarsa Helene Bresslau.
Ya buga littafinsa na addini "The Quest of the Historical Jesus".
Mahaifiyarsa ta rasu sakamakon murkushe ta da dokin sojojin Faransa ya yi.
An tsare shi a sansanin fursunonin yaki na Faransa.
Ya canza takardar zama dan kasa daga Jamus zuwa Faransa.
Ya koma Lambarene, Afirka bayan ya tara kudi a Turai.
Ya buga littafin tarihin rayuwarsa "Out of My Life and Thought".
Ya sami Kyautar Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya.
An ba shi lambar yabo ta girmamawa ta Order of Merit (honorary OM) ta Ingila.
Ya yi fafutukar yaki da makaman kare-dangi (nuclear weapons) ta hanyar jawabi a rediyo da rubuce-rubuce a jaridu.
Ya rasu a Lambarene yana da shekaru 90.

keyAchievements.title: Lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami Kyautar Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya a shekara ta 1952 sakamakon gudummawar da ya bayar ga aikin kula da lafiya a Afirka da kuma bunkasa dangantakar dan adam bisa ga falsafarsa ta 'Reverence for Life' (Girmama Rayuwa).

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Asibitin Albert Schweitzer
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa Asibitin Albert Schweitzer a Lambarene, Gabon da ke yammacin Tsakiyar Afirka.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyuka a matsayin mai buga organ da mawaƙi
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi nazari a kan mai tsara kidan nan na Jamus Johann Sebastian Bach, kuma ya yi tasiri a kan motsin gyaran organ a farkon ƙarni na 20, sannan ya yi aiki a matsayin mai buga organ na Bach Society na Paris.

keyAchievements.title: Samun digirin digirgir (PhD) na falsafa da ilimin addini
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami digirin digirgir na falsafa a kan nazarin Kant a Jami'ar Strasbourg, da kuma digirin digirgir na ilimin addini a kan nazarin rayuwar Yesu da farkon Kiristanci.

keyAchievements.title: Sadaukar da kai ga aikin kula da lafiya a Afirka
keyAchievements.description: Ya sadaukar da daukacin rayuwarsa ga aikin kula da lafiya na mutanen bakar fata a Lambarene, French Equatorial Africa tare da matarsa tun daga shekara ta 1913.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da ra'ayin 'Reverence for Life'
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da ra'ayin 'Reverence for Life' wanda ke nuna cewa dukkan rayuwa tana da tsarki kuma babu wata rayuwa da ya kamata a sadaukar da ita a cikin littafinsa "Out of My Life and Thought".

keyAchievements.title: Fafutukar zaman lafiya ta yaki da makaman kare-dangi
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi fafutukar yaki da makaman kare-dangi a shekara ta 1957 ta hanyar jawabi a rediyo da rubuce-rubuce a jaridu, kuma ya yi tasiri sosai a kan fafutukar zaman lafiya.

faq.question: Waye Albert Schweitzer?
faq.answer: Albert Schweitzer ya kasance likita, mai buga organ, masanin falsafa, masanin addini, kuma liman na Lutheran dan asalin kasar Jamus da Faransa, wanda ya sadaukar da kansa ga aikin kula da lafiya a Afirka bisa ga falsafarsa ta 'Reverence for Life' kuma ya sami Kyautar Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya a shekara ta 1952.

faq.question: Menene ra'ayin Schweitzer na 'Reverence for Life'?
faq.answer: 'Reverence for Life' wani ra'ayi ne na Kiristanci da ke nuna cewa dukkan rayuwa tana da tsarki kuma babu wata rayuwa da ya kamata a sadaukar da ita, kuma ya bayyana wannan a cikin littafinsa "Out of My Life and Thought" sannan ya yi aiki da shi.

faq.question: Me yasa Schweitzer ya fara aikin kula da lafiya a Afirka?
faq.answer: Schweitzer ya yi imanin cewa ya dace a raba farin ciki ga kowa, kuma ya girma da fahimtar cewa 'ba zan iya rayuwa cikin farin ciki ni kadai ba', don haka ya shiga fannin likitanci yana da shekaru 30 sannan ya fara aikin kula da lafiya a Afirka.

faq.question: Wadanne ayyukan kidi Schweitzer ya yi?
faq.answer: Schweitzer ya kasance mai buga organ kuma masanin tarihin Bach, inda ya taimaka wajen kafa Bach Society na Paris kuma ya yi aiki a matsayin mai buga organ, sannan ya gudanar da yawace-yawacen wasa a Turai don tara kudi don aikin Afirka.

faq.question: Yaushe Schweitzer ya sami Kyautar Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya?
faq.answer: Schweitzer ya sami Kyautar Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya a shekara ta 1952 sakamakon yadda falsafarsa ta 'Reverence for Life' ta ba da gudummawa ga aikin kula da lafiya a Afirka da kuma bunkasa dangantakar dan adam.

faq.question: Yaya aka canza takardar zama dan kasa ta Schweitzer?
faq.answer: Yankin Alsace inda aka haifi Schweitzer ya kasance wuri mai yawan rikicin yankuna tsakanin Jamus da Faransa, kuma ya canza takardar zama dan kasa daga Jamus zuwa Faransa a shekara ta 1919.

timeline.event: Ta koma addinin Kiristanci lokacin da take zama a Ingila.
의회 회의의 10명의 여성 대표 중 한 명이었다.
Ta kafa kungiyar sadaka ta Kiristanci Mukti Mission a kauyen Kedgaon, mil 40 gabas da birnin Pune.

keyAchievements.title: Samun laƙabi
keyAchievements.description: Ta kasance mace ta farko da ta sami laƙabin Pandita da Sarasvati a matsayin masaniya a kan yaren Sanskrit bayan ta wuce jarrabawar malaman Jami'ar Calcutta.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Sharada Sadan
keyAchievements.description: Ta fara kafa Sharada Sadan don mata marasa miji (widows) ta hanyar amfani da kudin da aka tara.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Mukti Mission
keyAchievements.description: Ta kafa kungiyar sadaka ta Kiristanci Mukti Mission a kauyen Kedgaon, mil 40 gabas da birnin Pune.

faq.question: Menene ainihin sunan Pandita Ramabai?
faq.answer: Ainihin sunanta shi ne Pandita Ramabai Sarasvati.

faq.question: Wadanne laƙabi Pandita Ramabai ta samu?
faq.answer: Ta sami laƙabin Pandita da Sarasvati a matsayin masaniya a kan yaren Sanskrit bayan ta wuce jarrabawar malaman Jami'ar Calcutta.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan kungiyoyi da Pandita Ramabai ta kafa?
faq.answer: Ta kafa Sharada Sadan don mata marasa miji da kuma kungiyar sadaka ta Kiristanci Mukti Mission.

pandita-ramabai.missingDataNote: 산스크리트어 학자 칭호 획득 및 샤라다 사단 설립의 정확한 연도는 원문에 명시되어 있지 않습니다.

timeline.event: An haife ta a Bristol, Gloucestershire, Ingila
Daukacin iyalin sun koma Amurka da zama a New York
Iyalinsa sun zauna a Cincinnati, Ohio
Ta shiga Geneva Medical College a New York
Ta sauke karatu a matsayin mafi hazaka (valedictorian) dari/daga Geneva Medical College
Ta sadaukar da kanta ga kula da kuma yi wa sojoji raunana magani lokacin da Yakin Basasa ya barke
Ta kafa makarantar likitanci a New York
Ta kafa makarantar likitanci a London
Ta rasu.

keyAchievements.title: Sauke karatu a matsayin mafi hazaka dari/daga Geneva Medical College
keyAchievements.description: Ta zama likita bayan ta sauke karatu a matsayin mafi hazaka dari/daga Geneva Medical College na New York a shekara ta 1849.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa makarantar likitanci
keyAchievements.description: Ta kafa makarantar likitanci a New York a shekara ta 1865 da kuma London a shekara ta 1874.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan kula da lafiya lokacin Yakin Basasa
keyAchievements.description: Ta sadaukar da kanta ga kula da kuma yi wa sojoji raunana magani lokacin da Yakin Basasa ya barke a shekara ta 1861.

faq.question: Wacece Elizabeth Blackwell?
faq.answer: Elizabeth Blackwell ta kasance likita ta kasar Ingila wadda aka haiba/haifa a shekara ta 1821 kuma ta rasu a shekara ta 1910.

faq.question: Yaushe Elizabeth Blackwell ta yanke shawarar zama likita?
faq.answer: Ta yanke shawarar zama likita sakamakon tasirin Harriet Beecher Stowe a Cincinnati, Ohio.

faq.question: Wane ilimi Elizabeth Blackwell ta samu?
faq.answer: Ta shiga Geneva Medical College na New York a shekara ta 1847 kuma ta sauke karatu a matsayin mafi hazaka a shekara ta 1849.

faq.question: Wadanne kungiyoyin kula da lafiya Elizabeth Blackwell ta kafa?
faq.answer: Ta kafa makarantar likitanci a New York a shekara ta 1865 da kuma London a shekara ta 1874.

elizabeth-blackwell.missingDataNote: 엘리자베스 블랙웰이 사망한 장소는 원문에 명시되어 있지 않습니다. 설립한 의과 대학의 정확한 명칭은 원문에 명시되어 있지 않습니다. 원문에는 엘리자베스 블랙웰이 '최초의 여성 의사'라는 명시적인 언급이 없습니다.

florence-kelley.missingDataNote: 제공된 출처 원문은 '플로렌스 나이팅게일'에 대한 내용이며, 요청된 인물 'florence-kelley'에 대한 정보는 포함되어 있지 않습니다. 따라서 요청된 인물에 대한 정보는 추출할 수 없습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin dan ma'aikaci a Scotland.
Ya tafi Afirka a matsayin likita na London Missionary Society.
Ya isa Botswana, Kudancin Afirka kuma ya fara aikin mishan.
Ya gano Tafkin Ngami lokacin tafiyarsa ta farko.
Ya gano Kogin Zambezi lokacin tafiyarsa ta farko.
Ya gano Victoria Falls kuma ya yi nasarar tsallake Afirka lokacin tafiyarsa ta farko.
Ya zama jakadan Ingila kuma ya binciki yankin Kogin Zambezi a matsayin shugaban bincike na Tsakiyar Afirka, sannan ya 'yantar da bayi.
Ya sake tafiya Afirka bisa bukatar Royal Geographical Society kuma ya gano Tafkin Mweru da Tafkin Bangweulu.
Ya kamu da zazzabi a Ujiji kusa da Tafkin Tanganyika, amma tawagar bincike ta Stanley ta cece shi.
Ya rasu kusa da Tafkin Bangweulu sakamakon matsananciyar rauni da rashin lafiya.

keyAchievements.title: Binciken Afirka da gano wurare
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi nasarar tsallake hamadar Kalahari, ya gano Tafkin Ngami, Kogin Zambezi, da Victoria Falls, kuma ya yi nasarar tsallake Afirka daga shekara ta 1849 zuwa 1856.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan 'yantar da bayi
keyAchievements.description: Ya shiga tsakanin fataucin bayi na mutanen Portugal a yankin Kogin Zambezi a shekara ta 1858 kuma ya 'yantar da bayi daruruwa.

keyAchievements.title: Binciken taswirar kasa na Tsakiyar Afirka
keyAchievements.description: Ya ci gaba da binciken Tsakiyar Afirka ta hanyar gano Tafkin Mweru da Tafkin Bangweulu bisa bukatar Royal Geographical Society.

keyAchievements.title: Buga bayanan bincike
keyAchievements.description: Ya dawo gida bayan ya kammala binciken Afirka kuma ya buga "Missionary Travels" wanda ke kunshe da kwarewarsa.

faq.question: Yaushe kuma a ina aka haifi David Livingstone?
faq.answer: An haife shi a ranar 19 ga Maris, 1813 a Scotland.

faq.question: Menene ainihin aikin David Livingstone?
faq.answer: Ya kasance dan mishan na cocin Congregational na Scotland kuma mai bincike.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan abubuwan da David Livingstone ya gano a Afirka?
faq.answer: Ya gano Tafkin Ngami, Kogin Zambezi, da Victoria Falls, kuma ya yi nasarar tsallake hamadar Kalahari da tsallake Afirka.

faq.question: Yaya David Livingstone ya rasu, kuma yaya aka yi da gawarsa?
faq.answer: 그는 1873년 5월 1일 뱅웰루 호반에서 사망했으며, 그의 심장은 잠비아에 묻히고 방부 처리된 시신은 영국 웨스트민스터 사원에서 국장으로 치러졌습니다.

faq.question: Wadanne ayyukan al'umma David Livingstone ya yi a Afirka?
faq.answer: Ya shiga tsakanin fataucin bayi na mutanen Portugal a yankin Kogin Zambezi kuma ya 'yantar da bayi daruruwa.

timeline.event: An haifi Alfred Bernhard Nobel
Mahaifin Nobel ya koma Saint Petersburg, Rasha tare da iyalinsa
Ya tafi Paris, Faransa don ci gaba da bincike
Ya tafi kasar Amurka don yin karatu na shekara guda yana da shekaru 18
Ya shigar da lambar mallaka (patent) ta farko a kan gas meter a ofishin patent na Ingila
Mahaifin Nobel ya damka masana'antar ga dansa na biyu Ludvig Nobel
Ya sami lambar mallaka ta farko ta kasar Sweden a kan "hanyar kera gunpowder"
Ya kera detonator
Hadarin fashewar dakin adana nitroglycerin ya faru a masana'antar Heleneborg da ke Stockholm, wanda ya yi sanadin mutuwar mutane 5 da suka hada da kanensa Emil
Ya kera blasting cap wanda ke inganta detonator
Ya kera dynamite kuma ya sami lambar mallaka a Amurka da Ingila
Ya fara baje kolin dynamite a wani dakin fasa dutse a Redhill, Surrey, Ingila
Ya kera gelignite
Ya sami lambar mallaka a kan gelignite
An zabe shi a matsay인 memba na Royal Swedish Academy of Sciences
Ya sami lambar mallaka a kan ballistite
Yayan Alfred Nobel Ludvig ya rasu, wanda ya sa wasu jaridu suka buga labarin mutuwar Alfred Nobel bisa kuskure
Ya sami digirin girmamawa na Doctor (honorary doctorate) dari/daga Jami'ar Uppsala
Ya sanya hannu a kan wasiyarsa ta karshe a Swedish-Norwegian Club da ke Paris don kafa Kyautar Nobel
Ya rasu a gidansa na hutu da ke Sanremo, Italiya
An kafa tsarin Kyautar Nobel
Sveriges Riksbank (Babban Bankin Sweden) ya ba da gudummawa ga Nobel Foundation don kafa 'Kyautar Tattalin Arziki na Girmama Alfred Nobel'
Peter Nobel, tattaba-kunnen Alfred Nobel, ya nemi a raba kyautar tattalin arziki da ainihin Kyautar Nobel
Nobel Foundation tana da kadarorin zuba jari na kusan biliyan 6 na kasar Sweden (kronor)

keyAchievements.title: Kera dynamite
keyAchievements.description: Ya ƙirƙiri daɗaɗɗen fashewar abu da ake kira dynamite, kuma ya sami haƙƙin mallaka a cikin 1867.

keyAchievements.title: Ƙirƙirar Gelignite
keyAchievements.description: A cikin 1875, ya ƙirƙiri gelignite, wanda ya fi dynamite ƙarfi da tsaro, kuma ya sami haƙƙin mallaka a cikin 1876.

keyAchievements.title: Ƙirƙirar Ballistite
keyAchievements.description: A cikin 1887, ya sami haƙƙin mallaka na ballistite, wani nau'i na foda marar hayaƙi.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Kyautar Nobel
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa Kyautar Nobel ta amfani da dukiyarsa ta gado, don yin kyautar shekara-shekara ga mutanen da suka bayar da 'mafi girman amfanin ɗan adam'.

keyAchievements.title: Mallakar Haƙƙin Mallaka 355
keyAchievements.description: A rayuwarsa, ya yi gudummawa masu muhimmanci da yawa ga kimiyya, har da yin rajista na haƙƙin mallaka 355 a duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Haɓakar Bofors
keyAchievements.description: Ya girbe kamfanin ƙarfe Bofors ya zama manyan masana'antar kera bindigogi da kayan soja.

keyAchievements.title: Tsara Fuse da Kwal na Fashewa
keyAchievements.description: A cikin 1863, ya ƙirƙiri fuse, kuma a cikin 1865, ya tsara kwal na fashewa wanda ya inganta kan fuse.

faq.question: Wane ƙirƙira Alfred Nobel ya shahara da shi?
faq.answer: Ya ƙirƙiri daɗaɗɗen fashewar abu da ake kira dynamite, kuma ya kuma ƙirƙiri gelignite da ballistite.

faq.question: Ta yaya Kyautar Nobel ta fara?
faq.answer: Bayan mutuwarsa, Nobel ya ba da mafi yawan dukiyarsa don kafa asusun gudanar da Kyautar Nobel, kuma ana ba da wannan kyauta shekara-shekara ga mutanen da suka bayar da 'mafi girman amfanin ɗan adam'.

faq.question: Nawa haƙƙin mallaka Nobel ya mallaka a rayuwarsa?
faq.answer: A rayuwarsa, Nobel ya yi rajista na haƙƙin mallaka 355 a duniya.

faq.question: Yaushe Alfred Nobel ya mutu?
faq.answer: Nobel ya mutu a ranar 10 ga Disamba, 1896 a gidansa na yawon shakatawa a San Remo, Italiya.

faq.question: Menene abubuwan da aka sanya sunan Alfred Nobel?
