faq.answer: Ba a rubuta ainihin dalilin ba gaba daya, amma masana tarihi sun yi amanna cewa komawarsa ta kasance sakamakon abubuwa da dama da suka hada da mutuwar mai taimaka masa na sarauta, karuwar nuna bambanci da gogayya a fannin aiki a Jamus, da kuma burinsa na komawa mahaifarsa.

faq.question: Kwarai kuwa. Ayyukansa na asali na harshen Latin da fassarar zamani na manyan litattafansa guda biyu, 'On the Right of Moors in Europe' da kuma 'On the Apathy of the Human Mind', suna nan har yanzu kuma masana na nazartar su a yau.
faq.answer: 그러하다. 그의 주요 두 논문인 '유럽의 무어인 권리에 대하여'와 '인간 정신의 무감각에 대하여'의 라틴어 원본과 현대 번역본이 현재까지 남아 있어 오늘날 학자들에 의해 연구되고 있다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Alexandria, Masar ta karkashin mulkin Roma.
Ya halarci taron majalisar farko ta Nicaea a matsayin mai taimaka wa liman (deacon) kuma ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen yaki da Arianism.
Ya gaje Alexander a matsayin Bishop (ko Paparoma) na Alexandria.
Sarki Constantine I ya tura shi gudun hijira na farko zuwa Trier da ke Gaul.
An tura shi gudun hijira na biyu a Roma a karkashin Sarki Constantius II.
Gudun hijira na uku. Ya gudu zuwa hamadar Masar inda ya zauna a cikin Uban Hamada (Desert Fathers).
An tura shi gudun hijira na hudu a karkashin Sarki Julian mai ridda.
An tura shi gudun hijira na biyar kuma na karshe a karkashin Sarki Valens.
Ya mutu lafiya a Alexandria bayan ya shafe rayuwarsa cikin rigingimu da kuma kare koyarwar addini.

keyAchievements.title: Mai kare koyarwar Orthodox ta Nicaea
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance babban mai kare allantakar Almasihu yaki da bid'ar Arianism da ta yadu sosai, inda ya tabbatar da wanzuwar Akidar Nicaea.

keyAchievements.title: Marubucin 'On the Incarnation'
keyAchievements.description: Wannan wani muhimmin littafi ne na koyarwar addinin Kirista, wanda ke bayyana dalilin da ya sa Allah ya zama mutum a cikin Yesu Almasihu don ceton bil'adama.

keyAchievements.title: Marubucin tarihin rayuwar Anthony Mai Girma
keyAchievements.description: Littafinsa na 'Life of Antony' ya zama mai matukar shahara a lokacin, inda ya yada kyawawan dabi'un zaman kadaici (monasticism) a fadin Daular Roma.

faq.question: Menene Arianism?
faq.answer: Arianism wata babbar koyarwar addini ce ta karni na 4, wadda ke koyar da cewa Yesu Almasihu wata halitta ce da ke karkashin Allah Uba, kuma ba shi da dawwama daya da Uban ko kuma asali daya (homoousios).

faq.question: Me yasa aka kira shi 'Athanasius contra mundum'?
faq.answer: Wannan kalmar Latin tana nufin 'Athanasius yaki da duniya.' Wannan yana nuna yadda ya tsaya shi kadai don yaki da Arianism a lokacin da sarakunan Roma da mafi yawan bishop-bishop ke goyon bayan Arianism.

faq.question: Sau nawa aka tura Athanasius gudun hijira?
faq.answer: A tsawon shekaru 45 da ya yi yana Bishop, sarakunan Roma daban-daban guda hudu sun tura shi gudun hijira sau biyar, kuma ya shafe fiye da shekaru 17 a gaba daya yana nesa da majami'arsa ta Alexandria.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Diduseya, Masar.
Ya gaje kawunsa Theophilus a matsayin Shugaban Majami'ar (Patriarch) Alexandria.
Rikici tsakaninsa da Gwamnan Roma Oreste ya kai kololuwa; wasu gungun Kiristoci masu tayar da zaune tsaye sun kashe masaniyar falsafa Hypatia.
Ya fara rubutu da sabani da Shugaban Majami'ar Constantinople Nestorius game da kalmar 'Theotokos'.
Ya jagoranci taron farko na Majalisar Ephesus don yin tir da Nestorianism kuma ya tabbatar da Maryamu a matsayin Theotokos.
Ya cimma matsaya a kan 'Tsarin Hadin Kai' da John na Antioch, wanda ya gyara rabuwar wucin gadi.
Ya mutu a Alexandria.

keyAchievements.title: Kare Koyarwar 'Theotokos'
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi nasarar tabbatarwa da kuma tsara lakabin 'Theotokos' (Mahaifiyar Allah) ga Budurwa Maryamu a Majalisar Ephesus, wanda hakan ya bayyana allantakar Almasihu tun daga lokacin da aka dauki cikinsa.

keyAchievements.title: Kayar da Nestorianism
keyAchievements.description: Ayyukansa na ilimin tauhidi da rawar da ya taka a Majalisar Ephesus sun haifar da la'antar Nestorianism a matsayin bidi'a.

keyAchievements.title: Malamin Coci (Doctor of the Church)
keyAchievements.description: Dinbin rubuce-rubucensa a kan koyarwar Almasihu da kuma Uku Cikin Daya (Trinity) sun yi tasiri sosai a kan koyarwar Kirista, wanda ya sa ya sami lakabin 'Malamin Coci'.

faq.question: Shin Cyril ne ke da alhakin kisan Hypatia?
faq.answer: Ba a tabbatar da alhakinsa na kai-tsaye ba kuma akwai mahawara a tsakanin masana tarihi. Koyarwarsa mai tsanani yaki da arna da kuma rigingimun siyasarsa da Gwamna Oreste (wanda Hypatia ke marawa baya) sun haifar da yanayi mai hadari da ya sa gungun Kiristoci suka kashe ta. Akalla yana da alaka ta kaikaice da wannan bala'i.

faq.question: Menene babban sabaninsa da Nestorius?
faq.answer: Babban abin da aka samu sabani a kai shi ne dabi'ar Yesu Almasihu. Nestorius ya yi jayayya cewa akwai halaye guda biyu daban-daban (allahntaka da mutuntaka) da suka hadu a sanyaye a cikin Almasihu, kuma ya fi son lakabin 'Christotokos' (Mai haihuwar Almasihu) ga Maryamu. Cyril ya yi jayayya cewa dabi'un guda biyu sun hadu ne a cikin mutum guda na allahntaka ('hypostatic union') kuma ya jaddada cewa 'Theotokos' (Mahaifiyar Allah) shi ne kadai lakabi mai dacewa.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Malamin Coci'?
faq.answer: Ana ba da wannan lakabi ga tsarkaka wadanda rubuce-rubucensu na ilimin tauhidi ake ganin suna da mahimmanci ga daukacin coci. Rubuce-rubucen Cyril, musamman kariyarsa ga hypostatic union da kuma zama mutum na Allah (incarnation), sun zama ginshikin koyarwar Almasihu na gaba a cikin Kiristancin Gabas da na Yammacin duniya.

timeline.event: Ya hau karagar mulkin Daular Habasha. Ya gaje mahaifinsa Wedem Arad.
Ya kayar da Haqq ad-Din I na Daular Ifat sannan ya kashe shi. Wannan ya fara jerin manyan kamfen na soja da kasashen musulmi da ke makwabtaka da su.
Ya gudanar da manyan kamfen a kan Daular Ifat da sauran lardunan musulmi, inda ya samu gagarumar nasara kuma ya fadada daular sosai.
Shugaban Cocin Habasha ya kore shi daga coci (excommunicate) saboda batun aure, amma ya ci gaba da rike ikonsa na siyasa da na soja.
Ya mutu. Ya bar wata daula mai girma da iko wadda ke da babban tasiri a yankin Kahon Afirka.

keyAchievements.title: Fadada Soja na Habasha
keyAchievements.description: Ta hanyar gagarumin yakin soja, ya mayar da Habasha daga masarautar tuddai ta zama daular da ke da iko a yankin Kahon Afirka.

keyAchievements.title: Cin Kasashen Sarakunan Musulmi da Yaki
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi nasarar kayar da kuma cin kasashen musulmi masu hamayya da shi da dama da yaki, ciki har da Daular Ifat, wanda ya tabbatar da ikon addinin Kirista a yankin.

keyAchievements.title: Taimaka wa Adabi
keyAchievements.description: A lokacin mulkinsa, adabin harshen Ge'ez na da ya bunkasa, ciki har da rubuta tarihin masarautar da kuma samar da tsari na karshe na 'Kebra Nagast'.

faq.question: Shin Amda Seyon mai yakin addini (crusader) ne?
faq.answer: Ko da yake shi Kirista ne mai kishin addini kuma yakokinsa suna da alaka mai karfi da addini da kasashen musulmi, hakan kuma ya faru ne saboda dalilai na siyasa da na tattalin arziki don sarrafa hanyoyin kasuwanci da kuma karfafa ikonsa.

faq.question: Yaya ya gudanar da mulkin wannan daula mai girma da banbancin mutane?
faq.answer: Ya yi amfani da tsarin 'biranen sojoji' don kula da ikon soja, sannan ya karfafa ikonsa ta hanyar nada gwamnoni masu aminci, wadanda galibi daga fadarsa suke, don su gudanar da mulki a lardunan da ya ci da yaki.

faq.question: Menene babban tushen tarihi game da lokacin mulkinsa?
faq.answer: Babban tushen shi ne tarihin zamanin mai suna 'Glorious Victories of Amda Seyon', wanda ke ba da cikakken bayani game da yakin neman zabensa na soja cikin salon yabo kuma yana daukaka nasarorinsa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Alkahira, Masar.
Ya fara rubuta tarihinsa na abubuwan da suka faru na yau da kullum.
Ya shaida mamayar da Napoleon Bonaparte ya yi wa Masar sannan aka nada shi a cikin Diwan (hukumar gudanarwa).
Sojojin Daular Usmaniyya da na Burtaniya sun kori sojojin Faransa daga Masar.
Muhammad Ali Pasha ya kafa mulkinsa a kan kasar Masar.
An kashe dansa, wanda ake kallonsa a matsayin wani mataki na daukar fansa daga Muhammad Ali saboda rubuce-rubucen suka na al-Jabarti.
Ya mutu a cikin yanayi mai cike da shakku a Alkahira.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta 'Aja'ib al-Athar fi al-Tarajim wa al-Akhbar'
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta wani gagarumin tarihi ('The Marvelous Biographies and Chronicles') wanda ya kasance babban tushen bayanai na farko a kan tarihin Masar daga shekarar 1688 zuwa 1821.

keyAchievements.title: Shaidan Gani da Ido na Mamaya
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da wata hacks ta musamman kuma mai mahimmanci ta fuskar da ba ta Turai ba game da mamayar Napoleon da kuma arangama tsakanin wayewar Turai da ta Musulunci.

faq.question: Yaya dangantakar al-Jabarti take da Faransawa?
faq.answer: Tana da wuyar fahimta. Faransawa sun nada shi a cikin wani kwamiti kuma ya ji dadi da kimiyyarsu, amma ya soki al'adunsu, rashin addininsu, da kuma zaluncin mamayar da suka yi.

faq.question: Me yasa rubuce-rubucensa ke da matukar mahimmanci?
faq.answer: Tarihinsa yana daya daga cikin 'yan kadan na bayanai dalla-dalla, na gida, da kuma na lokacin game da wani lokaci mai mahimmanci a tarihin Masar, wanda ke samar da haske a kan al'umma, siyasa, da rayuwar yau da kullum da za a iya rasa su.

faq.question: Shin ya nuna adawa da Muhammad Ali?
faq.answer: Kwarai kuwa. Rubuce-rubucensa na baya sun soki mulkin kama-karya na Muhammad Ali, haraji mai yawa, da kuma ikon mallakar kasa na musamman, wanda hakan yana iya kasancewa ya haifar da tsangwama da kisan dansa.

timeline.event: Ya hadu da Ibn Tumart inda ya zama mabiyinsa mai aminci kuma babban mataimakinsa.
Ya zama jagoran kungiyar Almohad bayan ya boye mutuwar Ibn Tumart don tabbatar da mika mulki cikin sauki.
Ya ci birnin Marrakesh da yaki, wanda ya kawo karshen daular Almoravid kuma ya mayar da birnin ya zama babban birnin Almohad.
Ya ci tsakiya da gabashin Maghrib (Algeria da Tunisia ta yanzu) da yaki, inda ya hada kan Arewacin Afirka a karkashin mulkinsa.
Ya tsallaka zuwa yankin Iberian don tsara yankunansa a al-Andalus kuma ya shirya karin yakin soja da masarautun Kirista.
Ya mutu a Sale, Maroko, yayin da yake tattara babban sojan da zai mamaye Spain.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Daular Almohad
keyAchievements.description: Ya mayar da kungiyar addini ta Almohad ta zama wata kasa mai karfi da iko.

keyAchievements.title: Hada kan Maghrib
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne sarki na farko da ya hada daukacin gabar tekun Arewacin Afirka da Tekun Atlantika zuwa Libya a karkashin mulkin gida guda daya.

keyAchievements.title: Nasarorin soja
keyAchievements.description: Ya jagoranci ruguza daular Almoravid gaba daya sannan ya fadada daular zuwa al-Andalus (Spain ta Musulunci).

faq.question: Shin Abd al-Mumin yana da alakar jini da Ibn Tumart?
faq.answer: A'a, ba shi da alakar jini da shi. Shi bafillace ne na kungiyar kabilun Zenata, yayin da Ibn Tumart ya fito daga kabilar Masmuda. Gadonsa ya ginu ne a kan amincinsa, ikonsa, da kuma zabar shi da Ibn Tumart ya yi a matsayin magaji.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar 'Almohad'?
faq.answer: 이는 아랍어 '알-무와히둔'에서 유래했으며, '일신론자들' 또는 '통일론자들'을 의미한다. 이는 그들이 하느님의 유일성(타우히드)에 대해 엄격하게 신학적으로 강조했음을 나타낸다.

faq.question: Menene babban gadonsa na gine-gine?
faq.answer: Ya ba da umarnin gina Masallacin Koutoubia a Marrakesh. Wannan masallacin yana daya daga cikin fitattun misalan gine-ginen Almohad, kuma ko da yake magadansa ne suka karasa shi, yana zama tarihinsa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a gidan malaman addini na kusa da Mascara, Algeria ta yanzu.
Shugabannin kabilu sun zabe shi a matsayin Amir don tsarawa da jagorantar tirjiya da mamayar mulkin mallaka na Faransa.
Ya kulla Yarjejeniyar Tafna da Faransa, wadda ta amince da ikonsa a kan wani babban sashi na Algeria.
Faransa ta karya yarjejeniyar wanda ya sa aka sake komawa yaki. Wannan ya haifar da wani mummunan yaki gaba daya na Faransawa.
Ya mika wuya ga sojojin Faransa bisa sharadin tura shi gudun hijira zuwa Alexandria ko Acre don kare al'ummarsa daga karin kisa.
Gwamnatin Faransa ta tsare shi a gidan yari a Faransa bayan ta karya sharadin mika wuyarsa.
An sake shi da umarnin Napoleon III sannan ya tafi gudun hijira. A karshe ya zauna a Damascus.
Ya tsoma baki don ceto dubban Kiristoci daga kisa lokacin rigingimun addini a Damascus, wanda hakan ya sa ya sami yabo daga kasashen duniya.
Ya mutu a Damascus sannan aka binne shi kusa da babban malamin sufaye Ibn Arabi. Wannan yana nuna alamar tirjiya da tausayi.

keyAchievements.title: Wanda ya kafa Kasar Algeria
keyAchievements.description: Ya hada kan kabilun da suka rabu sannan ya kafa kasa ta zamani mai dauke da rundunar soji na kashin kanta, kudi, da kuma tsarin ilimi.

keyAchievements.title: Jagoran Turawa ta Adawa da Mulkin Mallaka
keyAchievements.description: Ya jagoranci wata tirjiya ta soja da siyasa mai karfi da inganci yaki da mamayar Faransa na tsawon shekaru 15.

keyAchievements.title: Alamar Taimako da Hadin Kan Addini
keyAchievements.description: An san shi da ceto rayukan dubban Kiristoci a Damascus a shekarar 1860, wanda ke nuna kyawawan dabi'unsa na tausayi.

faq.question: Me yasa ake daukarsa a matsayin 'Uban' Algeria ta zamani?
faq.answer: Shi ne mutum na farko da ya hada kabilun Algeria daban-daban a karkashin kasa guda daya don yaki da mamayar kasashen waje, inda ya samar da alamar kishin kasa mai karfi da ke wanzuwa har yau.

faq.question: Shin shi soja ne kawai?
faq.answer: A'a, shi ma babban malamin sufaye ne, mawaƙi, kuma masanin falsafa wanda ya rubuta abubuwa da dama a kan al'amuran ruhaniya kuma ya sadaukar da shekarunsa na karshe ga ilimi da koyarwa.

faq.question: Yaya dangantakar al-Jabarti take da Faransawa bayan mika wuyarsa?
faq.answer: Duk da cewa ya yi yaki mai tsanani da Faransawa, ya sami girmamawarsu. Bayan da aka tsare shi, mutane da dama a Faransa sun girmama shi, kuma ayyukansa na taimako a Damascus sun sami yabo a fadin Turai da Amurka.

timeline.event: An haife shi kusa da Bulawayo a Kudancin Rhodesia (Zimbabwe ta yanzu).
Ya kammala karatun koyarwa a Adams College kuma ya zama malami a can.
An zabe shi a matsayin Sarki na al'ummar Zulu na Abasemakholweni a Groutville.
Ya shiga kungiyar African National Congress (ANC).
Gwamnatin wariya ta soke shi daga matsayin Sarki bayan ya jagoranci kamfen na nuna tirjiya. Daga baya a wannan shekarar, an zabe shi a matsayin Shugaban ANC.
An kama shi tare da wasu mutane 155 a Yakin Shari'ar Cin Amana kuma aka tuhume shi da laifin cin amanar kasa.
Kisan kiyashi na Sharpeville ya faru, wanda ya haifar da haramta ANC.
Ya sami Lambar Yabo ta Zaman Lafiya ta Nobel a shekarar 1960 saboda yakin neman zabensa na lumana yaki da wariyar launin fata.
Ya mutu sakamakon hatsarin jirgin kasa kusa da gidansa da ke Stanger (yanzu KwaDukuza) a karkashin umarnin gwamnati na haramta masa zirga-zirga.

keyAchievements.title: Shugaban ANC
keyAchievements.description: Ya jagoranci kungiyar African National Congress daga shekarar 1952 har zuwa mutuwarsa, inda ya jagoranci manyan tarurrukan nuna tirjiya na lumana.

keyAchievements.title: Samun Lambar Yabo ta Zaman Lafiya ta Nobel a shekarar 1960
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne bakar fata dan Afirka na farko da ya sami Lambar Yabo ta Zaman Lafiya ta Nobel, wanda ya jawo hankalin duniya ga yunkurin yaki da wariyar launin fata.

keyAchievements.title: Mai Kare Hakki na Lumana
keyAchievements.description: Bisa kwarin gwiwa daga akidarsa ta Kirista da dabarun Gandhi, ya kasance mai tsayin daka wajen kare nuna tirjiya ta lumana yaki da gwamnatin wariya ta zalunci.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Sarki Luthuli'?
faq.answer: Ya kasance zaɓaɓɓen Sarki na al'ummar Zulu a Groutville tun shekarar 1936. Gwamnatin wariya ta tsige shi a shekarar 1952 saboda ayyukansa na yaki da wariya, amma ya kasance shugaba mai daraja a wajen mutanensa.

faq.question: Me yasa ya sami Lambar Yabo ta Zaman Lafiya ta Nobel?
faq.answer: Ya samu lambar yabon ne saboda jagorantar yakin neman zabe na lumana yaki da wariyar launin fata a Afirka ta Kudu, wanda ya jawo hankalin duniya ga rashin adalci.

faq.question: Shin ya yi aiki tare da Nelson Mandela?
faq.answer: Kwarai kuwa. Luthuli shi ne Shugaban ANC a lokacin da Mandela ya shahara. Sun kasance abokan gwagwarmaya, kodayake wani lokacin suna da sabanin ra'ayi na dabara yayin da yunkurin ke bunkasa.

faq.question: Me yasa ya nace a kan nuna tirjiya ta lumana?
faq.answer: Jajircewarsa wajen nuna tirjiya ta lumana ta samo asali ne daga zurfin akidarsa ta Kirista da kuma imanin cewa nuna tirjiya cikin kwanciyar hankali tana da daraja ta dabi'a kuma tana da tasiri fiye da yaki da makami.

timeline.event: An haife ta a Besease na Daular Ashanti.
Yayanta ne ya nada ta a matsayin Sarauniyar Uwa ta Edweso (Edwesohene/Sarki).
Burtaniya ta tsige Sarki Prempeh I na Daular Ashanti sannan ta tura shi gudun hijira zuwa Seychelles.
Gwamna Hodgson ya bukaci a ba shi Kujerar Zinariya (Golden Stool), wanda hakan ya haifar da shahararren tawayen makami na Yaa Asantewaa.
Ta jagoranci sojojin Ashanti a matsayin Babban Kwamandan yaki a Yakin Kujerar Zinariya, inda ta kewaye sojojin Burtaniya a Kumasi.
Sojojin Burtaniya sun kama ta sannan aka tura ta gudun hijira zuwa Seychelles.
Ta mutu ranar 17 ga Oktoba yayin da take gudun hijira a Seychelles.

keyAchievements.title: Babban Kwamandan Sojojin Ashanti
keyAchievements.description: An nada ta a matsayin jagorar sojojin Ashanti a tawayen da suka yi da Burtaniya a shekarar 1900, wanda ya kasance rawar da ba kasafai mace ke takawa ba.

keyAchievements.title: Alamar tirjiya da mulkin mallaka
keyAchievements.description: Jagorancinta da tirjiyarta sun sanya ta zama jagorar kasa a Ghana kuma alamar nuna tirjiya a fadin Afirka.

keyAchievements.title: Mai Kare Al'adun Ashanti
keyAchievements.description: Ta jagoranci yakin don kare Kujerar Zinariya, wadda ke zama alamar tsarki na hadin kai da ruhin al'ummar Ashanti, daga wulakanci.

faq.question: Menene Kujerar Zinariya (Golden Stool)?
faq.answer: Kujerar Zinariya (Sika Dwa Kofi) ita ce karagar sarauta mai tsarki ta al'ummar Ashanti. An yi amanna tana dauke da ruhin al'ummar kasar, kuma ita ce babbar alamar iko da hadin kai.

faq.question: Shin Yaa Asantewaa Sarauniya ce mai mulki?
faq.answer: A'a, ita ce Sarauniyar Uwa (Ohemaa) ta Edweso. Wannan wata muhimmiyar rawa ce ta siyasa da zamantakewa wadda ke da alhakin ba da shawara ga Sarki da kuma zabar magajinsa.

faq.question: Shin Ashanti ta yi nasara a yakin?
faq.answer: A'a, sojojin Burtaniya da ke da makamai mafi inganci sun kayar da Ashanti. An shigar da Daular Ashanti cikin mulkin mallaka na Gold Coast, amma Burtaniya ba ta taba samun ikon mallakar Kujerar Zinariya ba.

timeline.event: An haife shi a gidan Kiristoci a Alexandria, Masar.
Mahaifinsa Leonides ya yi shahada lokacin tsanantawar Septimius Severus. Origen ya fara koyarwa don taimaka wa iyalinsa.
Bishop Demetrius ya nada shi a matsayin shugaban Makarantar Catechetical ta Alexandria.
Ya rubuta mafi mahimmancin ayyukansa ciki har da 'On First Principles' da kuma 'Hexapla'.
An nada shi limami (presbyter) a Caesarea Palaestina. Wannan ya haifar da babban sabani da Bishop Demetrius na Alexandria sannan aka kore shi daga Alexandria.
An kama shi sannan aka azabtar da shi sosai lokacin tsanantawar Decius, amma bai bar imaninsa ba.
An yi amanna cewa ya mutu a Tyre sakamakon raunin da ya ji lokacin da aka azabtar da shi.
Wasu daga cikin koyarwarsa ta bidi'a an la'ance ta bayan mutuwarsa a Majalisar Biyu ta Constantinople.

keyAchievements.title: Hexapla
keyAchievements.description: Wani babban aiki ne na tantance rubutu wanda ya hada fassarori guda shida daban-daban na Tsohon Alkawari don samar da ingantaccen rubutu.

keyAchievements.title: 'On First Principles' (De Principiis)
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne bayani na farko na tsari na ilimin tauhidin Kirista, wanda ke shafar batutuwa daban-daban daban-daban daga asalin Allah zuwa yancin zabar rayuwa da kuma karshen duniya (eschatology).

keyAchievements.title: Fassarar Littafi Mai Tsarki ta Alama (Allegorical)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa kuma ya tsara hanyar fassarar Littafi Mai Tsarki mai matakai uku (wani lokacin hudu) wadda ta yi tasiri a kan fassarar Littafi Mai Tsarki na Kirista fiye da shegaru dubu.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuce-rubuce Masu Yawa
keyAchievements.description: Ya bar ayyuka kusan 2,000 da suka hada da bayanai a kan mafi yawan littattafan Littafi Mai Tsarki, wa'azi, da rubuce-rubucen ilimin tauhidi, wanda ya sa ya zama daya daga cikin marubuta mafi yawan ayyuka a zamanin da.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kallon Origen a matsayin mutum mai cike da cece-kuce?
faq.answer: Wasu daga cikin ra'ayoyinsa na addini kamar kasancewar rai kafin haihuwa, siffar duniya da sararin samaniya mai kama da kwallo, da kuma maido da dukkan halittu ciki har da shaidan a karshe (apokatastasis) an la'ance su a matsayin bidi'a daruruwan shekaru bayan mutuwarsa.

faq.question: Shin Origen ya yi wa kansa kaciya da gaske?
faq.answer: Masanan tarihin coci na da watau Eusebius ya rubuta cewa Origen ya fassara Matta 19:12 a fili kuma ya yi wa kansa kaciya don kiyaye tsarkakarsa yayin da yake koyar da mata masu shirin shiga addini. Sai dai ingancin wannan tarihin yana da mahawara a tsakanin masana na zamani, inda wasu ke cewa jita-jita ce da abokan hamayyarsa suka yada.

faq.question: Menene mafi mahimmancin gudunmawar Origen?
faq.answer: Duk da cewa 'On First Principles' shi ne ginshikin tsarin ilimin tauhidi, babban nasararsa ta ilimi ita ce 'Hexapla'. Duk da haka, babban tasirinsa na din-din-din shi ne samar da fassarar Littafi Mai Tsarki ta alama, wanda ya tsara yadda Kiristoci ke karanta nassosi na tsawon daruruwan shekaru.

timeline.event: An haifi Osei Tutu.
Ya gudu zuwa fadar Sarkin Akwamu inda ya koyi shugabanci da dabarun soja.
Ya zama Kumasihene (Shugaban Kumasi) kuma ya fara kulla kawance da kasashen Akan da ke makwabtaka da shi.
Okomfo Anokye ya kira Kujerar Zinariya (Sika Dwa Kofi) daga sama, wanda ke nuna kafuwar Hadin Kan Ashanti.
Ya jagoranci hadakar sojojin Ashanti zuwa nasara a kan Denkyira a Yakin Feyiase, wanda ya kafa Daular Ashanti.
Ya mutu a yakin soja da mutanen Akyem sakamakon harin kwantan bauna lokacin da yake tsallake kogin Pra.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Daular Ashanti
keyAchievements.description: Ya hada kan kasashen Akan daban-daban don kafa Daular Ashanti mai karfi da dukiya, wadda ta mamaye yankin na tsawon shekaru dari biyu.

keyAchievements.title: Tabbatar da Kujerar Zinariya
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa Kujerar Zinariya a matsayin babbar alama ta hadin kai, iko, da kuma ruhin al'ummar Ashanti.

keyAchievements.title: Tsara Kundin Tsarin Mulki na Ashanti
keyAchievements.description: Tare da Okomfo Anokye, ya tsara kundin tsarin mulki wanda ke bayyana matsayin gwamnati mai karfi da kuma mambobin hadakar.

faq.question: Wane ne Okomfo Anokye?
faq.answer: Okomfo Anokye ya kasance babban firist kuma mai ba wa Osei Tutu shawara, kuma daya daga cikin wadanda suka kafa Daular Ashanti. An ce shi ne ya kira Kujerar Zinariya daga sama.

faq.question: Menene Kujerar Zinariya?
faq.answer: Sika Dwa Kofi ita ce karagar sarauta mai tsarki ta al'ummar Ashanti. An yi amanna tana dauke da ruhin daukacin al'umma, kuma tana da tsarki sosai ta yadda bai kamata ta taba kasa ba.

faq.question: Yaya Osei Tutu I ya mutu?
faq.answer: Ya mutu ne sakamakon harin kwantan bauna lokacin da yake tsallake kogin Pra a lokacin yakin soja da mutanen Akyem a shekarar 1717.

timeline.event: An haife shi a yankin Igbo na kasar Najeriya ta yanzu.
An sace shi tare da kanwarsa sannan aka sayar da shi a matsayin bawa. Ya fuskanci wahalar hanyar tsakiya (Middle Passage), wadda ita ce bala'in fataucin bayi na tekun Atlantika.
Wani jami'in sojan ruwa na Burtaniya mai suna Michael Henry Pascal ya saya shi sannan ya canza masa suna zuwa Gustavus Vassa.
Pascal ya ci amanarsa kuma ya sayar da shi ga Robert King, wani dan kasuwa na Quaker a Montserrat.
Ya sayi 'yancinsa daga hannun King a kan kudi fam 40.
Ya shiga yunkurin soke bauta na Burtaniya kuma ya yi aiki tare da kungiyar 'Sons of Africa'.
Ya buga littafin tarihinsa na kashin kansa mai suna 'The Interesting Narrative of the Life of Olaudah Equiano'.
Ya auri wata mata 'yar Burtaniya mai suna Susannah Cullen.
Ya mutu a London shekaru 10 kafin soke Dokar Fataucin Bayi ta shekarar 1807.

keyAchievements.title: Tarihi Mai ban Sha'awa (The Interesting Narrative)
keyAchievements.description: 널리 읽힌 최초의 노예 서사 중 하나를 저술했으며, 이 책은 베스트셀러가 되어 노예 폐지 운동의 강력한 도구가 되었습니다.

keyAchievements.title: 노예 폐지 운동 활동
keyAchievements.description: 런던의 아프리카 노예 폐지론자 단체인 '아프리카의 아들들'의 주요 구성원이 되어 의회에 로비하고 노예 무역에 반대하는 목소리를 냈습니다.

keyAchievements.title: 자유 구매
keyAchievements.description: 노예 상태에서 자신의 자유를 구매하기 위해 충분한 돈을 모아 놀라운 주도성과 사업적 통찰력을 보여주었습니다.

faq.question: Shin Gustavus Vassa shi ne ainihin sunansa?
faq.answer: A'a, mai gidansa na farko ne ya ba shi sunan Gustavus Vassa. Ainihin sunansa shi ne Olaudah Equiano, kuma ya dawo da wannan sunan inda ya yi amfani da shi a matsayin marubucin littafin tarihinsa.

faq.question: Shin ya sake haduwa da iyalinsa?
faq.answer: A'a, bayan an sace shi da kanwarsa a kauyensu, nan da nan suka rabu da ita, kuma bai taba haduwa da kowa a cikin iyalinsa na asali ba.

faq.question: Menene tasirin littafinsa?
faq.answer: Littafinsa ya samar da shaida ta gani da ido game da zaluncin bauta, inda ya nuna mutuntakar mutanen da abin ya shafa kuma ya firgita jama'ar Burtaniya. Ya taka rawar gani wajen sauya ra'ayin jama'a game da fataucin bayi ta hanyar buga littafin sau da yawa, kuma ya taimaka wajen kafa Dokar Fataucin Bayi ta shekarar 1807.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin Kassa Mercha a yank인 Tigray na kasar Habasha.
Ya zama Sarki Yohannes IV bayan ya kayar da abokin hamayyarsa Tekle Giyorgis II, wanda ya kawo karshen lokacin Zemene Mesafint (Lokacin Sarakuna).
Ya jagoranci sojojin Habasha zuwa ga gagarumar nasara yaki da mamayar Masar a Yakin Gundet da Yakin Gura.
Ya kira taron Majalisar Boru Meda don tilasta hadin kan addini bisa koyarwar Orthodox Tewahedo.
Italiya ta mamaye tashar jiragen ruwa ta Massawa, wanda ya haifar da sabuwar barazana ta mulkin mallaka a kan iyakar arewacin Habasha.
Janar dinsa Ras Alula ya kayar da sojojin Italiya a Yakin Dogali, wanda ya dakatar da ci gabansu na gaggawa.
Ya mutu washegari bayan ya ji rauni na ajali sakamakon harbin mai kisan gilla sa'ilin da yake jagorantar soji yaki da dakarun Mahdist na Sudan a Yakin Gallabat (Metemma) daf da samun nasara.

keyAchievements.title: Nasara a kan Masar
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi nasarar kayar da sojojin Masar na zamani masu inganci a shekarar 1875-76, wanda ya kiyaye 'yancin Habasha.

keyAchievements.title: Sake Hada kan Habasha
keyAchievements.description: Ya kawo karshen lokacin hargitsi na 'Lokacin Sarakuna' (Zemene Mesafint) kuma ya sake kafa ikon masarautar tsakiya a kan lardunan da suka rabu na daular.

keyAchievements.title: Tirjiya da Mulkin Mallaka
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi nasarar yaki da mamayar Italiya, musamman ta hanyar kayar da sojojin Italiya a Yakin Dogali, wanda ya jinkirta burin mulkin mallaka na Italiya a yankin.

keyAchievements.title: Hadin Kan Addini
keyAchievements.description: Ya kira taron Majalisar Boru Meda don hada kan Cocin Orthodox na Habasha, da imanin cewa hadin kan addini yana da muhimmiyar tasiri ga karfin kasa.

faq.question: Me yasa ake daukar Yohannes IV a matsayin gwarzon kasar Habasha?
faq.answer: Ya sadaukar da daukacin lokacin mulkinsa wajen kare ikon kasar Habasha daga mahara daban-daban na kasashen waje. Ya mutu a filin daga yana jagorantar sojojinsa, wanda ke nuna ruhin tirjiya da sadaukarwa na kasa.

faq.question: Yaya Yohannes IV ya mutu?
faq.answer: Ya ji rauni na ajali sakamakon harbin mai kisan gilla yayin da yake jagorantar dakarunsa zuwa ga gagarumar nasara yaki da sojojin Mahdist a Yakin Gallabat a ranar 9 ga Maris shekarar 1889. Ya mutu washegari sakamakon raunin.

faq.question: Menene ra'ayinsa game da addini?
faq.answer: Ya kasance Kirista mai kishin addinin Orthodox wanda ya yi imanin cewa hadin kan addini yana da muhimmanci ga hadin kan kasa. Ya kira taron Majalisar Boru Meda don daidaita sabani na ilimin tauhidi kuma ya kafa addinin Kirista na Orthodox a matsayin addinin kasa, wani lokacin ta hanyar tilastawa.

faq.question: Wane ne ya gaje Yohannes IV?
faq.answer: Mutuwarsa ta haifar da rashin shugabanci. Bayan dan takaitaccen lokaci na rikici, Sarki Menelik II na Shewa ya karfafa ikonsa kuma ya zama Sarkin Habasha na gaba.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Maratta a cikin kasar hausa ta Gobir.
Ya fara aikinsa a matsayin mai wa'azi mai zagayawa da kuma malami.
Yunfa, sarkin Gobir, ya yi kokarin kashe shi, wanda hakan ya zama gagarumin sauyi a dangantakarsu.
Ya yi hijira zuwa Gudu, kuma mabiya sun ayyana shi a matsayin Amir al-Mu'minin. Yakin Fulani ya fara.
Dakarunsa sun ci Gobir, babban birnin abokin hamayyarsa.
Dansa Muhammadu Bello ya gina birnin Sokoto, wanda ya zama babban birnin Daular.
Ya yi ritaya daga gudanar da mulki kuma ya sadaukar da shekarunsa na karshe ga rubuce-rubuce da koyarwa.
Ya mutu a Sokoto.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Daular Sokoto
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa daya daga cikin dauloli mafi girma a Afirka a karni na 19, inda ya hada kasashen hausa a karkashin gwamnatin Musulunci guda daya.

keyAchievements.title: Sauye-sauyen Musulunci da na Al'umma
keyAchievements.description: Ya jagoranci wani gagarumin yunkuri na farfado da Musulunci (Jihadi) wanda ya tsarkake kuma ya yada addinin, ya inganta ilimi, sannan ya kare adalci a al'umma.

keyAchievements.title: Babban Ilimi na Musamman
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta littattafai sama da 100 a kan ilimomin Musulunci, shugabanci, da wakoki, wanda ya bar gado mai muhimmanci na ilimi.

faq.question: Shin yakin Usman dan Fodio na addini ne kawai?
faq.answer: Duk da cewa an gabatar da shi a matsayin jihadi na addini yaki da ayyukan cakuda addini, yana da muhimman bangarori na siyasa, zamantakewa, da kabilanci, kamar magance korafin da Fulani ke da shi a kan mulkin Hausawa.

faq.question: Menene ra'ayinsa game da ilimi?
faq.answer: Ya kasance mai karfi wajen kare ilimi ga kowa da kowa, maza da mata, da imanin cewa ilimi da sanin rubutu da karatu suna da muhimmanci ga kowane musulmi. Ya bayyana cewa 'ya'yansa mata sun zama fitattun malamai.

faq.question: Yaya girman Daular Sokoto yake?
faq.answer: Lokacin da ta kai kololuwar girma, ta wuce kilomita 1,500 daga Burkina Faso ta yanzu zuwa Kamaru, kuma tana daya daga cikin kasashe mafi karfi a Afirka, wadda ta kunshi masarautun larduna (emirates) sama da 30 daban-daban.

timeline.event: An haifi Nzinga Mbande a cikin dangin sarauta na Masarautar Ndongo.
Ya gudanar da wani shahararren taron diflomasiyya zuwa Luanda don tattauna yarjejeniyar zaman lafiya da Gwamnan Fotigal.
Ta zama Sarauniyar Ndongo bayan mutuwar yayanta Ngola Mbande.
Bayan an kore ta daga Ndongo, ta ci Masarautar Matamba sannan ta kafa ta a matsayin sabuwar cibiyar ikonta.
Ta kulla kawance na dabara da mutanen Holland wadanda kwanan nan suka kwace Luanda daga hannun Fotigal.
Ta kulla yarjejeniyar zaman lafiya da Fotigal, wadda ta amince da ita a hukumance a matsayin sarauniyar Matamba da Ndongo.
Ta mutu tana da kimanin shekaru 80, inda ta bar masarauta mai karko kuma mai cin gashin kanta.

keyAchievements.title: Tirjiya na Shekaru Goma da Dama
keyAchievements.description: Ya jagoranci gwagwarmayar soja da na diflomasiyya na tsawon kusan shekaru 40 yaki da fadada mulkin mallaka na Fotigal da fataucin bayi.

keyAchievements.title: Kwararren Jami'in Diflomasiyya
keyAchievements.description: Ta tattauna da kwarewa tare da manyan kasashen Turai ciki har da Fotigal da Holland don kare ikon masarautarta.

keyAchievements.title: Wanda ya Kafa Ikon Matamba
keyAchievements.description: Ta ci Masarautar Matamba sannan ta kafa ta a matsayin babbar daular yanki kuma mafaka ga bayi da suka tsere.

faq.question: Me yasa galibi ake kwatanta Nzinga sanye da tufafin maza?
faq.answer: Ta dauki lakabin maza (Sarki, ko 'Ngola') da kuma suturar maza don tabbatar da ikonta a cikin al'ummar da maza ke da rinjaye, ta yadda za ta sami girmamawa daya da takwarorinta maza da kuma manyan jami'ai.

faq.question: Shin shigarta addinin Kirista ta kasance ta gaskiya?
faq.answer: Masanan tarihi suna mahawara a kan wannan. Ko da yake a fili yake cewa mataki ne na dabara don samun tasiri a wajen kasar Fotigal da Vatican, ta ci gaba da rike imaninta har zuwa mutuwarta, wanda hakan ya bushe cewa yana iya kasancewa yana da wata ma'ana ta kashin kanta a gare ta.

faq.question: Menene gadon Nzinga a yau?
faq.answer: Ana girmama ta a matsayin gwarzar kasa ta Angola kuma alamar tirjiya da mulkin mallaka, sannan kuma ta zama gunki na jagorancin mata da fasahar dabara a fadin Afirka da kuma kasashen waje (diaspora).

timeline.event: Ya zama Mai (Sultan) na Daular Kanem-Bornu.
Ya kulla dangantaka ta diflomasiyya da Daular Usmaniyya, wanda ya ba shi damar samun makamai da masu ba da shawara kan harkokin soja.
Ya gudanar da kamfen na soja sama da 330, inda ya tabbatar da iyakokin daular musamman yaki da kasashen hausa a yamma da kuma Bulala a gabas.
Ya aiwatar da sauye-sauye na shari'a da gudanar da mulki bisa koyarwar shari'ar Musulunci, ya gina masallatan bulo, sannan ya karfafa ilimin addini.
Ya yi aikin Hajji zuwa Makka, wanda ya karfafa alakar diflomasiyya da al'adu da daukacin duniyar musulmi.
Ya mutu a lokacin yakin soja, inda ya bar daula mai karfi, mai iko a tsakiya, kuma mai arziki.

keyAchievements.title: Zamanantar da Soja
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da runduna mai karfi ta hanyar shigo da sojoji masu harbin bindiga da aka horas a Turkiyya, makamai, da kuma dakarun dawakai masu sulke.

keyAchievements.title: Fadada Daula
keyAchievements.description: Ya fadada kuma ya tsare iyakokin Daular Kanem-Bornu sosai ta hanyar kamfen na soja sama da 330.

keyAchievements.title: Sauye-sauyen Gudanarwa da Shari'a
keyAchievements.description: Ya mayar da dokokin gargajiya zuwa shari'ar Musulunci, ya tattara ikon gudanarwa a tsakiya, sannan ya inganta adalci.

keyAchievements.title: Diflomasiyya ta Duniya
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa manyan dangantaka na diflomasiyya da kasuwanci da Daular Usmaniyya da sauran kasashen Arewacin Afirka.

faq.question: Me yasa ake daukar Idris Alooma a matsayin babban sarki?
faq.answer: Ya mayar da Kanem-Bornu daga kasa da ta rabu zuwa daula mai iko a tsakiya ta hanyar gagarumin kokari na soja, gudanarwa, da kuma diflomasiyya.

faq.question: Yaya ya sami makamai?
faq.answer: Ya sami makamai da masu horas da sojoji na Turkiyya ta hanyar wakilan diflomasiyya da ya tura ga Sultan Murad III na Daular Usmaniyya ta hanyar hukumomin Usmaniyya da ke Tripoli.

faq.question: Menene tasirinsa a kan addini na daular?
faq.answer: Ya kasance musulmi mai kishin addini wanda ya karfafa matsayin Musulunci a kasar ta hanyar mayar da dokokin gargajiya zuwa shari'ar Musulunci, gina masallatan bulo da dama, da kuma daukar nauyin aikin Hajji zuwa Makka.

faq.question: Menene 'Mai'?
faq.answer: Mai shi ne lakabin da ake amfani da shi ga Sarki ko Sultan na Daular Kanem-Bornu. Idris Alooma yana daya daga cikin mafi shahararren Mai a cikin dogon tarihin daular.

timeline.event: Ya yi aiki a matsayin babban minista (vizier) da kuma babban firist ga Sarki Djoser na Daular Uku ta Masar.
Ya tsara kuma ya kula da gina Piramid na matakai (Step Pyramid) a Saqqara, wanda shi ne katon gini na dutse na farko a duniya.
Kiyasin shekarar mutuwarsa. Ba a gano kabarinsa ba, amma ana zargin yana boye a Saqqara.
Bautar Imhotep ta fara ne a lokacin Sabuwar Daula (New Kingdom), inda aka girmama shi a matsayin rabin allah (demigod) na magani da hikima.
A lokacin Late Period, musamman bayan cin kafar kasan Farisa da yaki, an daukaka Imhotep zuwa matsayin cikakken allah a hukumance, kuma yana da nasa gunkin bauta da haikali.

keyAchievements.title: Mai Tsara Piramid na Matakai
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara Piramid na Djoser a Saqqara, wanda ake daukarsa a matsayin katon gini na farko a duniya da aka yi da dutse da aka yanka.

keyAchievements.title: Majagaba na Magani
keyAchievements.description: Ana daukarsa a matsayin daya daga cikin likitoci na farko a tarihi, kuma an yi amanna cewa Takardar Papyrus ta Edwin Smith, wani tsohon littafin tiyata na raunuka, ta ginu ne a kan koyarwarsa.

keyAchievements.title: Talaka da Aka Mayar da Shi Allah
keyAchievements.description: Yana daya daga cikin 'yan kadan na talakawa ba na dangin sarauta ba a Masar da aka mayar da shi allah bayan mutuwarsa, kuma daga baya aka bauta masa a matsayin allahn warkarwa da hikima.

keyAchievements.title: Wanda ya Fara Kera Shika-shikan Dutse
keyAchievements.description: Tsarinsa na ginin Saqqara ya kunshi amfani da shika-shikan dutse na farko da aka sani a fannin gine-gine (wadanda aka yanka kamar damin ciyawa).

faq.question: Shin Imhotep mutum ne na gaske da ya rayu?
faq.answer: E, Imhotep mutum ne na gaske da ya rayu a tarihi. An tabbatar da wanzuwarsa ta hynar rubutun zamanin da aka samu a gindin mutum-mutumin Sarki Djoser, inda aka rubuta sunansa da lakabinsa.

faq.question: Shin shi ne ya rubuta Papyrus ta Edwin Smith da gaske?
faq.answer: Kodayake papyrus din da ke akwai an rubuta ta ne kusan 1600 BCE, shaidar harshe ta nuna cewa kwafi ce ta wani rubutu da ya fi dadewa tun lokacin Tsohuwar Daula (kusan 2600 BCE). Masana tarihi da dama sun yi imanin cewa Imhotep shi ne ainihin marubucin saboda shahararsa ta ban mamaki a matsayin likita.

faq.question: Me yasa aka bauta masa a matsayin allah?
faq.answer: Ayyukansa na ban mamaki a fannoni daban-daban sun sa aka fara bauta masa bayan mutuwarsa. A tsawon daruruwan shekaru, labaran hikimarsa da ikon warkarwa sun karu, kuma a lokacin Late Period, an mayar da shi allahn magani gaba daya, wanda galibi ake daidaita shi da allahn Girka Asclepius.

faq.question: Shin shi ne ya ba da kwarin gwiwa ga mugun hali a fim din 'The Mummy'?
faq.answer: E, an yi amamani da sunan 'Imhotep' ga mugun hali a fim din 'The Mummy' na shekarar 1932 da kuma wanda aka sake yi a shekarar 1999. Sai dai labarin mugun firist da aka la'ana na bogi ne gaba daya, kuma ba shi da alaka da rayuwa da ayyukan Imhotep na gaske na tarihi.

timeline.event: An haife shi a kauyen Igiliz da ke tsaunin Anti-Atlas a kudancin Maroko.
Ya fara tafiya zuwa gabas don karantar ilimin tauhidi da shari'ar Musulunci a birane kamar Cordoba, Baghdad, da Damascus.
Ya koma Maghrib kuma ya fara wa'azin koyarwar sauye-sauye, wanda hakan ya sa aka kore shi daga birane da dama.
Ya ayyana kansa a matsay인 Mahdi wanda ba ya kuskure, kuma dakarunsa sun yarda da shi.
Ya kafa babban sansaninsa a katangar tsauni ta Tinmel kuma ya tsara kungiyar Almohad.
Ya jagoranci yakin Almohad da daular Almoravid mai mulki.
Ya mutu a Tinmel shekaru uku kafin Almohads su samu nasararsu ta farko mai girma. Magajinsa Abd al-Mumin ya boye mutuwarsa na tsawon shekaru uku.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Kungiyar Almohad
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da akida da tsari na kungiyar Almohad, wadda za ta bunkasa ta zama babbar daular da ta hada Arewacin Afirka da yankin Iberian.

keyAchievements.title: Koyarwar Tawhid
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara wata koyarwa mai tsanani ta kadaita Allah (Tawhid), inda ya kalubalanci fassarar da ke kamanta allah da mutum wadda ta yadu a lokacin.

keyAchievements.title: Hada kan Kabilun Masmuda
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi nasarar hada kabilun Berber na Masmuda daban-daban a karkashin tutar addini da siyasa guda daya, wanda ya samar da babbar rundunar soja.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar 'Almohad'?
faq.answer: Wannan ya samo asali ne daga kalmar Larabci 'al-Muwahhidun', wadda ke nufin 'masu bautar allah daya' ko 'masu kadaita allah', wanda ke nuna koyarwarsu ta asali ta Tawhid.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran Ibn Tumart 'Mahdi'?
faq.answer: Ya yi ikirarin cewa shi ne 'shiryayye' da aka yi alkawari a wasu al'adun Musulunci, kuma jagora ne maras kuskure da aka aiko don maido da adalci da addini na gaskiya. Wannan ikirarin ya ba shi cikakken iko na addini da siyasa a kan dakarunsa.

faq.question: Shin Ibn Tumart shi da kansa ya ci Almoravids da yaki?
faq.answer: 아니요, 그는 갈등 초반인 1130년경에 사망했습니다. 그가 선택한 후계자인 압드 알 무으민이 알모하드족을 최종 승리로 이끌고 알모하드 칼리프국을 건립했습니다.

faq.question: Menene babban sabanin addini da ke tsakaninsa da Almoravids?
faq.answer: Babban sukan da ya yi musu shi ne a kan kamanta allah da mutum (anthropomorphism) na Almoravids, watau danganta halayen dan adam ga Allah. Ibn Tumart ya inganta ra'ayi mai karfi na kadaita Allah (Tawhid).

timeline.event: An haifi Amina a Zazzau a matsayin 'yar Sarauniya Bakwa na Turunku.
An nada ta a matsayin Magajiya (mai jiran gado) kuma ta fara horaswa a kan gudanar da mulki da yaki.
Ta hau karagar mulkin Zazzau bayan mutuwar yayanta Karama.
Ta gudanar da kamfen na soja na tsawon shekaru 34, inda ta fadada yankuna da tasirin Zazzau.
Ta fara gina katangar kasa ta yumbu da aka sani da 'Ganuwar Amina' a gefen sansanoninta da birane.
Ta mutu a lokacin wani yakin soja a Atagara, kusa da Bida na Najeriya ta yanzu.

keyAchievements.title: Fadada yankuna
keyAchievements.description: Ta fadada Masarautar hausa ta Zazzau zuwa mafi girman siffarta a tarihi ta hanyar gagarumin yakin soja.

keyAchievements.title: Sarrafa Hanyoyin Kasuwanci
keyAchievements.description: Ta mamaye kuma ta tsare hanyoyin kasuwanci na ketare Sahara masu riba, wanda ya kawo dukiya da albarkatu masu yawa ga masarautar.

keyAchievements.title: Ganuwar Amina (Ganuwar Amina)
keyAchievements.description: Ana yaba mata da gina katangar kasa masu yawa a gefen Zazzau da sansanoninta na soja don kariya.

keyAchievements.title: Jagorancin Soja na Labari
keyAchievements.description: Ta zama fitacciya saboda jarumtakarta ta kashin kansa da kuma dabarar jagorantar sojoji a gaba na tsawon shekaru sama da 30.

faq.question: Shin Amina mutum ce ta gaske a tarihi?
faq.answer: E, ana kallon Amina a matsayin mutum ta gaske da ta rayu a tarihi, kodayake labarinta ya sami canje-canje na tarihi tsawon lokaci. Bayanai daga tarihin Kano (Kano Chronicle) suna tabbatar da wanzuwarta.

faq.question: Me yasa Amina ba ta yi aure ba?
faq.answer: Bisa mafi yawan al'adun, Amina ta zabi kada ta yi aure ko ta haihu. Ana kallon wannan a matsayin wata shawara ta dabara don rike ikonta da kuma kauce wa cire ta da miji zai yi ko kuma rasa hankali a kan mulki da yaki.

faq.question: Menene 'Ganuwar Amina'?
faq.answer: Wadannan katangar kasa ne masu girma da aka gina a gefen manyan birane da sansanonin soja a yankunan da ta ci da yaki. Wadannan ganuwar sun kasance muhimmiyar dabarar tsaro da alamar ikonta, kuma har yanzu akwai sauran burbushinsu yau.

timeline.event: An haife shi kusa da Aksum a cikin Daular Habasha.
Ya sami ilimin gargajiya na Habasha a fannin magana, ilimin tauhidi, da littafin Zabura.
Ya gudu don tsira daga tsangwamar Sarki Susenyos, wanda ya shiga addinin Katolika kuma ya tsananta wa Cocin Orthodox na Habasha.
Ya zauna a cikin kogo na tsawon shekaru hai a matsayin gudun hijira na kashin kansa, inda ya samar da tunaninsa na falsafa.
Sarki Fasilides ya gaje Susenyos, ya maido da addinin Orthodox, kuma Yacob ya fito daga kogon da ya buya.
Ya rubuta littafinsa mai suna 'Hatata' (Bincike) bisa bukatar dalibinsa Walda Heywat.
Ya mutu yana da shekaru 93.

keyAchievements.title: Marubucin Hatata (Bincike)
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta muhimmin littafi na falsafar Afirka wanda ke kare ra'ayin hankali (rationalism), bincike na tsanaki, da kuma dabi'un duniya gaba daya.

keyAchievements.title: Majagaba na Hasken Wayewa a Habasha
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da falsafa game da hankali da dokokin halitta ba tare da dogaro ga hasken wayewar Turai ba kuma a lokaci guda da su.

keyAchievements.title: Mai Kare Daidaiton Kowa da Kowa
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi calling ga daidaiton dukkan mutane ba tare da la'akari da addini, jinsi, ko matsayin rayuwa ba, kuma ya yi tir da bauta.

faq.question: Shin Zera Yacob shi ne 'Descartes na Afirka'?
faq.answer: 이성과 근본적인 탐구를 강조한 점에서 종종 데카르트와 비교되지만, 그의 작업은 독특합니다. 야코브의 철학은 사회-윤리적 문제와 이신론적 관점에서 계시 종교에 대한 비판에 더 초점을 맞추는 반면, 데카르트는 형이상학과 인식론에 더 집중했습니다.

faq.question: Yaya aka yi aka san aikinsa a duniya?
faq.answer: Malami Antoine d'Abbadie ne ya gano 'Hatata' a tsakiyar karni na 19, kuma ta sami hankalin duniya ta hannun masanin harsunan gabas na Italiya Carlo Conti Rossini a farkon karni na 20.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar 'Hatata'?
faq.answer: 'Hatata' kalma ce ta harshen Ge'ez na da wadda ke nufin 'bincike' ko 'tantancewa'. Wannan lakabi yana nuna salon littafin na tambayar komai don neman gaskiya ta hanyar amfani da hankali.

timeline.event: An haife shi a yankin Chiradzulu na Nyasaland (Malawi ta yanzu).
선교사 조셉 부스와 함께 미국으로 건너가 교육을 추구함.
An nada shi a matsayin limamin Baptist a wata coci a Lynchburg, Virginia.
Ya koma Nyasaland inda ya kafa Providence Industrial Mission (PIM) a Chiradzulu.
Ya rubuta wasika mai cike da kishin kasa ga jaridar gida don nuna adawa da karbar dakarun Nyasa a lokacin Yakin Duniya na Fakar.
Ya jagoranci tawaye da mulkin mallaka a watan Janairu, kuma 'yan sandan mulkin mallaka sun kashe shi a farkon watan Fabrairu.
Nyasaland ta sami 'yancin kanta a matsayin Malawi. An amince da John Chilembwe a hukumance a matsayin gwarzon kasa.

keyAchievements.title: Providence Industrial Mission (PIM)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa ofishin jakadanci wanda ya kasance cibiyar ilimi da dogaro da kai na Afirka ba tare da ikon Turai ba.

keyAchievements.title: Fitaccen Dan Kishin Kasa na Farko
keyAchievements.description: Ya zama ginshikin kishin kasar Malawi, inda ya zaburar da al'ummomi masu zuwa a cikin yakin neman samun 'yanci.

keyAchievements.title: Tawayen Shekarar 1915
keyAchievements.description: Ya jagoranci tawayen makami na farko mai mahimmanci yaki da mulkin mallaka na Burtaniya a Nyasaland, wanda ya kasance babban mataki na nuna tirjiya.

faq.question: Me yasa ake daukar John Chilembwe a matsayin gwarzon kasar Malawi?
faq.answer: Duk da cewa tawayen ya gaza, matakinsa na nuna tirjiya da rashin adalci na mulkin mallaka ya zama babbar alama ta kishin kasar Malawi da kuma yakin samun 'yanci da aka samu a shekarar 1964.

faq.question: Menene Providence Industrial Mission?
faq.answer: Wani ofishin jakadanci ne mai zaman kansa wanda 'yan Afirka ke jagoranta wanda ya kafa, inda ya samar da ilimi da inganta dogaro da kai a fannin tattalin arziki, wanda ya kalubalanci tsarin ofisoshin jakadanci na Turai.

faq.question: Menene ya haifar da tawayen 1915 kai-tsaye?
faq.answer: Bayanai na da sun nuna cewa babban abin da ya haifar da hakan shi ne yadda Burtaniya ta tilasta wa maza na Nyasa shiga Yakin Duniya na Farko don yaki da Jamus a Gabashin Afirka, wanda Chilembwe ke ganin wannan rigimar ba ta da wani amfani ga mutanensa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin dan Sarkin Zulu Mpande.
Ya kayar da dan uwansa Mbuyazi a Yakin Ndondakusuka, wanda ya tabbatar da matsayinsa na mai jiran gado.
Ya zama Sarkin Masarautar Zulu bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa.
Ya sami wani gargadi daga Burtaniya na neman ya rushe sojojinsa, wanda hakan ya haifar da Yakin Anglo-Zulu.
Ya samu gagarumar nasara yaki da sojojin Burtaniya a Yakin Isandlwana.
An kayar da shi a Yakin Ulundi kuma aka tilasta masa buya.
Sojojin Burtaniya sun kama shi sannan aka tura shi gudun hijira zuwa Cape Town.
Ya tafi London inda ya gana da Sarauniya Victoria don rokon a mayar da shi kan mulki.
An mayar da shi kan karagar mulki tare da rage ikonsa, wanda hakan ya haifar da yakin basasa.
Ya mutu a Eshowe, inda ake kyautata zaton bugun zuciya ne ko kuma guba aka ba shi.

keyAchievements.title: Nasara a Isandlwana
keyAchievements.description: Ya jagoranci sojojin Zulu don samun daya daga cikin gagarumar nasara da sojojin Afirka na gida suka samu yaki da ikon mulkin mallaka.

keyAchievements.title: Tafiyar Diflomasiyya zuwa London
keyAchievements.description: Ya zama Sarkin Zulu na farko da ya ziyarci Turai, inda ya tattauna da gwamnatir Burtaniya don mayar da shi kan mulki cikin nasara.

keyAchievements.title: Zamanantar da Sojojin Zulu
keyAchievements.description: Ya sake samar da makamai da tsara rundunonin Zulu na gargajiya (amabutho) don mayar da su rundunar yaki mai karfi.

faq.question: Shin Cetshwayo ya so yaki da Burtaniya?
faq.answer: A'a, shaidar tarihi ta nuna cewa Cetshwayo ya nemi kauce wa yaki, amma babban kwamishinan Burtaniya Sir Henry Bartle Frere ya bayyar da wani gargadi da ba zai yiwu ba don tunzura yaki da kuma mamaye kasar Zulu.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar sunansa?
faq.answer: Galibi ana fassara sunan 'Cetshwayo' a matsayin 'wanda aka yi wa kage'.

faq.question: Yaya aka kama shi?
faq.answer: Bayan an kayar da shi a Ulundi, ya gudu zuwa dajin Ngome. An bi sawunsa sannan sojojin Burtaniya suka kama shi a ranar 28 ga Agusta shekarar 1879.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin dan Fir'auna Sneferu da Sarauniya Hetepheres I.
Ya hau karagar mulkin Masar, inda ya zama Fir'auna na biyu na Daular Hudu.
Ya ba da umarni kuma ya kula da gina Babban Piramid na Giza, wanda zai zama kabarinsa.
Ya tura wakilai zuwa Wadi Maghareh da ke yankin Sinai don tallafawa hakar dutsen turquoise da tagulla.
Ya mutu bayan ya yi mulki na kimanin shekaru 23, kuma an yi amanna cewa an binne shi a Babban Piramid na Giza.

keyAchievements.title: Ba da Umarnin Gina Babban Piramid na Giza
keyAchievements.description: Ya fara gina mafi girman piramid a Masar, wanda ya kasance gini mafi tsayi da dan adam ya gina na tsawon shekaru sama da 3,800.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Ikon Kasa a Tsakiya
keyAchievements.description: Aikin gina piramid ya bukaci kuma ya nuna wani mataki na daban na ikon kasa a kan albarkatu, ma'aikata, da gudanarwa, wanda ya karfafa ikon Fir'auna.

keyAchievements.title: Jirgin ruwan Khufu
keyAchievements.description: 기자 대피라미드 기슭의 구덩이에서 온전한 크기의 태양의 배가 밀봉된 채 발견되었으며, 이는 부활한 왕을 하늘로 운반하기 위함이었습니다.

faq.question: Shin bayi ne suka gina Babban Piramid na Giza?
faq.answer: A'a. Shaidar kimiya ta yanzu ta nuna cewa 'yan kasa na Masar ne kwararru wadanda ke samun abinci mai kyau, masauki, kuma suke aiki a tsanake suka gina piramid din.

faq.question: Menene kadai mutum-mutumin Khufu da ke nan har yau?
faq.answer: Kadai hotonsa na 3D da aka tabbatar shi ne wani dan karamin mutum-mutumi na hauren giwa mai tsayin 7.5 cm (inci 3) da aka gano a haikalin Abydos.

faq.question: Yaya tsawon lokacin da Khufu ya yi yana mulki?
faq.answer: Masanan tarihin baya Manetho ya rubuta cewa ya yi mulki na shekaru 63, amma takardar tarihin Turin (Turin King List) ta ba shi shekaru 23, wanda shi ne adadin da masana Masar na zamani suka fi yarda da shi.

timeline.event: An haife ta a matsayin memba na daular Ptolemaic a Alexandria, Masar.
Bayan mutuwar mahaifinta, ta hau karagar mulki a matsayin mai mulki tare da kaninta Ptolemy XIII.
Bayan da aka kore ta daga fadar kaninta, ta gana da Julius Caesar don neman taimako wajen dawo da ita kan mulki.
Ta haifi Caesarion, wanda aka sani sosai a matsayin dan Caesar.
Bayan an kashe Julius Caesar a Roma, Cleopatra ta koma Masar don tabbatar da matsayinta.
Ta gana da Mark Antony a Tarsus, inda ta fara kulla kawance na siyasa da na soyayya.
Dakarun Cleopatra da Antony sun sha kashi a hannun Octavian a Yakin Actium.
Ta kashe kanta a Alexandria don kauce wa kama ta da Octavian zai yi, inda aka fi sani da cewa maciji ne ya cije ta.

keyAchievements.title: Tsayar da 'Yancin Masar
keyAchievements.description: Ta kiyaye 'yancin Masar na kusan shekaru 20 ta hanyar diflomasiyya mai karfi da kawance na dabara don kauce wa mamaye ta da Roma za ta yi.

keyAchievements.title: Gudanar da Tattalin Arziki
keyAchievements.description: Ta daidaita tattalin arzikin Masar, ta gudanar da yunwa, sannan ta yi gyara ga kudi, wanda ya haifar da lokaci na wadata.

keyAchievements.title: Hadin Kan Al'adu
keyAchievements.description: Ita ce sarki na farko na Ptolemaic da ya koyi harshen Masar, kuma ta shiga cikin rayuwar addini ta Masar sof, inda ta bayyana kanta a matsayin reincarnation na sarauniya Isis.

keyAchievements.title: Mai Jin Harsuna da Yawa da kuma Masaniya
keyAchievements.description: Bayanai na da sun nuna cewa tana jin harsuna 9, kuma ta kasance shugaba mai ilimi sosai wadda ke da ilimin magani, alchemy, da kuma falsafa.

faq.question: Shin Cleopatra tana da kyau sosai kamar yadda labari ya nuna?
faq.answer: Yayin da farfagandar Roma ta mayar da hankali kan kyanta, bayanan zamanin kamar na Plutarch sun jaddada cewa kwarjininta, basirarta, da muryarta mai dadi su ne manyan makaman jan hankalinta maimakon kyawun jiki na gargajiya.

faq.question: Shin Cleopatra 'yar kasar Masar ce?
faq.answer: A bangaren kabila, ta fito ne daga zuriyar Girka da Macedonia kamar daukacin sarakunan daular Ptolemaic. Sai dai an haife ta ne a Masar, kuma ita ce kadai sarki a daular da ya koyi kuma ya yi magana da harshen Masar sannan ya karbi al'adunta da addininta.

faq.question: Yaya Cleopatra ta mutu a gaskiya?
faq.answer: Labarin da aka fi sani shi ne ta kashe kanta ta hanyar barin maciji ya cije ta. Kodayake wannan shi ne salo mafi ban sha'awa da aka yarda da shi sosai, wasu masana tarihi suna mahawara cewa ta iya amfani da wata guba mai saurin aiki maimakon haka. Burinta shi ne ta kauce wa jan ta a matsayin fursuna a bukin nasarar Octavian a Roma.

timeline.event: An haifi Kimpa Vita kusa da Tsaunin Kibangu a Masarautar Kongo.
Bayan ta yi fama da wata rashin lafiya mai tsanani, ta fara ayyukan addini tana ikirarin cewa ruhun Saint Anthony na Padua ya shige ta.
Ta jagoranci dubban mabiya (Antonianists) don sake mamaye da kuma sake gina babban birnin da aka watsar, watau Mbanza Kongo.
Sojoji masu aminci ga Sarki Pedro IV sun kama ta kuma aka yi mata shari'a a kan zargin bidi'a a gaban majalisar jama'a karkashin tasirin malaman mishan na Capuchin.
An kashe Kimpa Vita ta hanyar kona ta a wuta tare da danta jariri.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Kungiyar Antonianist
keyAchievements.description: Ta samar da wani sanannen yunkuri na hadin kan addinin Kirista wanda ya sake fassara addinin a cikin tsarin al'adun Kongo.

keyAchievements.title: Sake Gina Babban Birni
keyAchievements.description: Ta jagoranci dubban mabiya don sake mamaye da kuma sake gina babban birnin da aka watsar na Mbanza Kongo, wanda ya samar da sabuwar cibiyar siyasa.

keyAchievements.title: Alama ta Juriya
keyAchievements.description: Ta zama alama ta din-din-din ta adawa da mulkin mallaka da kuma yakin neman ikon gudanar da siyasa da addini na Afirka.

faq.question: Shin Kimpa Vita Kirista ce?
faq.answer: E, amma ta jagoranci yunkurin Antonianist wanda ya sake fassara koyarwar Kirista don ta dace da Kongo, inda ta kalubalanci koyarwar malaman mishan na Turai.

faq.question: Me yasa aka kashe ta?
faq.answer: Majalisar Sarki Pedro IV na Kongo ta la'ance ta a matsayin mai bidi'a karkashin tasirin malaman mishan na Capuchin saboda koyarwarta wadda ke raunana ikon sarki da na coci.

faq.question: 그녀의 유산은 무엇입습니까?
faq.answer: Ana tunawa da ita a matsayin wata jaruma ta kishin kasa wadda ta nemi hada kan mutanenta da sake gina Masarautar Kongo, da kuma mai kawo sauye-sauye a addini wadda ta kalubalanci ikon addini na mulkin mallaka.

timeline.event: An haife shi a cikin kabilar Berber a Arewacin Afirka.
Musa ibn Nusayr ya nada shi a matsayin gwamnan Tangier.
Ya jagoranci dakarunsa tsallake mashigin tekun Gibraltar zuwa yankin Iberian.
Ya kayar da Sarkin Visigoth Roderic a Yakin Guadalete.
Ya ci manyan birane da yaki cikin sauri, ciki har da Cordoba da babban birnin Visigoth na Toledo.
Caliph al-Walid I ya kira shi zuwa Damascus tare da Musa ibn Nusayr.
Ya mutu a Damascus cikin mantuwa.

keyAchievements.title: Cin Hispania da Yaki
keyAchievements.description: Ya jagoranci dakarun Umayyad na farko wadanda suka ci mafi yawan yankin Iberian da yaki daga hannun Visigoths, wanda ya fara mulkin Musulunci na tsawon daruruwan shekaru.

keyAchievements.title: Yakin Guadalete
keyAchievements.description: Ya samu gagarumar nasara yaki da sojojin Visigoth masu yawa, wanda ya haifar da rugujewar masarautarsu.

keyAchievements.title: Asalin Sunan Gibraltar
keyAchievements.description: Sunan 'Gibraltar' ya samo asali ne daga kalmar Larabci 'Jabal Tariq', wadda ke nufin 'Dutsen Tariq'.

faq.question: Shin Tariq ibn Ziyad Balarabe ne ko kuwa Bafillace?
faq.answer: Shi Bafillace ne daga kabilun Arewacin Afirka. Sojojinsa kuma galibi sun kunshi kabilun Berber ne.

faq.question: Shin ya kona jiragen ruwansa da gaske?
faq.answer: Wannan shahararren labari ne, amma yawancin masana tarihi na zamani suna kallonsa a matsayin labarin bogi na baya da aka kera don nuna jarumtakarsa. Babu wani bayani game da wannan a cikin rubuce-rubucen Larabci na farko na yakin.

faq.question: Me yasa ya fadi daga mulki?
faq.answer: An ce babban jami'isa Musa ibn Nusayr ya yi kishin nasararsa. Caliph ya kira su duka zuwa Damascus saboda fargabar siyasa cewa za su yi karfi sosai, kuma ba a sake ba wa Tariq ikon jagorantar sojoji ba.

timeline.event: An haife ta a cikin dangin sarauta a yankin Semien na kasar Habasha.
Ta auri Sahle Maryam na Shewa, wanda daga baya ya zama Sarki Menelik II.
Ta zabi wurin kuma ta ba da sunan Addis Ababa ('Sabuwar Fure'), wanda zai zama babban birnin Habasha na gaba.
Ta zama Sarauniyar Habasha bayan hawan karagar mulki na Menelik II. Ta nuna shakku a kan yarjejeniyar Wuchale ta harshen Italiyanci.
Ta taka muhimmiyar rawa ta dabara ta hanyar jagorantar dakarunta da kuma ba wa Menelik II shawara a Yakin Adwa, wanda ya haifar da gagarumar nasara ta Habasha yaki da Italiya.
Sarki Menelik II ya mutu. Abokan hamayyarta a fada wadanda ke fargabar tasirinta sun cire Taytu daga mulki.
Ta mutu a Entoto yayin da take tsare a tsohuwar fada.

keyAchievements.title: Nasara a Yakin Adwa
keyAchievements.description: Shawarwarinta na dabara da jagorancin soja sun kasance da muhimmanci ga nasarar Habasha wajen kayar da sojojin Italiya da kuma kiyaye 'yancin kasar.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Addis Ababa
keyAchievements.description: Ta zabi wurin da zai zama babban birnin Habasha kuma ta ba shi suna 'Addis Ababa' (Sabuwar Fure).

keyAchievements.title: Turawa ta Diflomasiyya
keyAchievements.description: Ita ce ta farko da ta fahimci dabarar yaudara ta Yarjejeniyar Wuchale kuma ta nace a kan soke ta.

faq.question: Me yasa Taytu Betul take da muhimmanci a tarihin Habasha?
faq.answer: Ta kasance sarauniya mai iko wadda ta yi mulki tare da mijinta Menelik II yadda ya kamata. Kwararar basirarta na siyasa da soja ta kasance da muhimmanci wajen kare Habasha daga mulkin mallaka na Italiya, musamman a Yakin Adwa, wanda ya mayar da Habasha alamar 'yancin Afirka.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar sunan 'Taytu'?
faq.answer: Sunanta Taytu (ko Taitu) yana nufin 'Rana'. Saboda ficewarta da kuma kwarjininta, galibi ana kiran ta 'Rana ta Habasha'.

faq.question: Me ya faru da ita bayan mutuwar Sarki Menelik II?
faq.answer: Bayan mutuwar Menelik a shekarar 1913, abokan hamayyarta na siyasa wadanda ke fargabar tasirinta sun kulla makirci don cire ta daga mulki. An tsare ta a tsohuwar fadar Entoto inda ta zauna a can har zuwa mutuwarta a shekarar 1918.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Bauchi, Arewacin Najeriya.
Ya tafi Burtaniya don yin karatu a Cibiyar Ilimi ta Jami'ar London.
An zabe shi a matsayin mamba na Majalisar Arewa da kuma Majalisar Wakilai ta Tarayya.
Ya zama Babban Minista na farko na Najeriya.
Ya zama Firayim Minista na farko na Najeriya mai cin gashin kanta a ranar 1 ga Oktoba.
Najeriya ta zama jamhuriya, kuma ya ci gaba da kasancewa Firayim Minista.
An kashe shi a lokacin juyin mulkin soja ranar 15 ga Janairu.

keyAchievements.title: Jagorancin Samun 'Yancin Najeriya
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi nasarar tattaunawa don samun 'yancin kai cikin lumana na Najeriya daga Burtaniya a shekarar 1960.

keyAchievements.title: Firayim Minista na Farko na Najeriya
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi aiki a matsayin Firayim Minista na farko kuma daya tilo na kasar, inda ya kafa tsarin gwamnati na farko da manufofinta.

keyAchievements.title: Mai Kare Akidar Pan-Africanism
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance muhimmin mutum wajen kafa kungiyar hadin kan Afirka (OAU) a shekarar 1963, kuma ya kare hadin kai da hakkin cin gashin kai na Afirka.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Muryar Zinariya ta Afirka'?
faq.answer: Ya kasance mawaƙi mai hazaka da kwarjini, kuma ya sami wannan sunan saboda jawabansa masu karfi da ma'ana a majalisa da taron kasashen duniya.

faq.question: Menene jam'iyyar siyasar sa?
faq.answer: Ya kasance jagoran kungiyar Northern People's Congress (NPC), wadda ita ce jam'iyya mafi karfi a Arewacin Najeriya lokacin Jamhuriya ta Fakar.

faq.question: Yaya ya mutu?
faq.answer: An sace shi daga gidansa kuma aka kashe shi a lokacin juyin mulkin soja na farko a Najeriya a watan Janairu shekarar 1966, wanda ya kawo karshen Jamhuriya ta Fakar ta kasar cikin bakin ciki.

timeline.event: Ya hau karagar mulki a matsay인 Fir'auna na Masar da Kush.
Lokaci ne na zaman lafiya da wadata, inda aka gudanar da gagarumin aikin gine-gine a Karnak, Kawa, da Jebel Barkal.
Sarkin Assyria Esarhaddon ya mamaye Masar, ya ci Memphis da yaki, sannan ya tilasta wa Taharqa gudu zuwa kudu.
Bayan mutuwar Esarhaddon, Taharqa ya sake kwace Memphis na wani lokaci.
Sarkin Assyria Ashurbanipal ya kaddamar da wani babban hari inda ya kwashe dukiyar birnin Thebes.
Ya mutu a Napata sannan aka binne shi a piramid na Nuri da ke Nubia.

keyAchievements.title: Hadin kai da Wadata
keyAchievements.description: Ya mulki wata babbar daula da ta tashi daga Nubia zuwa Delta ta kogin Nile, wanda ya kawo lokacin zaman lafiya da wadatar tattalin arziki.

keyAchievements.title: Mai Gina Katon Gine-gine
keyAchievements.description: Ya kaddamar da daya daga cikin manyan tsare-tsare na gine-gine na zamaninsa, inda ya gyara da kuma gina haikalai a Masar da Nubia.

keyAchievements.title: Farfado da Al'adu
keyAchievements.description: Ya jagoranci farfado da fasaha, addini, da al'adun Masar bisa kwarin gwiwa daga al'adun Tsohuwar Daula.

faq.question: Shin an ambaci Taharqa a cikin Littafi Mai Tsarki?
faq.answer: E, ana kyautata zaton shi ne 'Tirhaka Sarkin Habasha (Kush)' da aka ambata a cikin Littafi Mai Tsarki na Ibraniyawa (2 Sarakuna 19:9; Ishaya 37:9), wanda ya yaki Sarki Sennacherib na Assyria.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa Fir'auna na 'Nubia' ko 'Kush'?
faq.answer: Taharqa ya fito ne daga Masarautar Kush da ke cikin kasar Sudan ta yanzu (Nubia ta da). Daularsa, watau Daular 25, ta ci Masar da yaki sannan ta mulki kasar na kusan karni daya.

faq.question: Me ya faru da masarautarsa bayan mutuwarsa?
faq.answer: Bayan janyewar Taharqa, Assyrian sun kafa daular Masar ta gida. Masarautar Kush ta ci gaba da bunkasa a Nubia na tsawon shekaru dubu daya, amma ba ta sake samun ikon mallakar Masar ba.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Carthage da ke karkashin mulkin Roma a Afirka.
Ya shiga addinin Kirista.
Ya rubuta manyan litattafan kare addinin Kirista, watau 'Apologeticus' da kuma 'Ad Nationes'.
Ya fara nuna goyon baya ga kungiyar Montanism, inda ya fi son rayuwa ta tsantsani.
Ya rubuta 'Adversus Praxean', wani babban littafi da ke bayyana koyarwar Uku Cikin Daya (Trinity).
Ya yanke alaka gaba daya da babbar coci sannan ya zama jagoran kungiyarsa ta kashin kansa.
Ya mutu a Carthage.

keyAchievements.title: Uban Ilimin Addini na Latin
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne babban marubucin Kirista na farko da ya yi amfani da harshen Latin, inda ya samar da kalmomi don ilimin addini na Yammacin duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da kalmar 'Trinity'
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne ya fara amfani da kalmar Latin 'Trinitas' (Trinity) don bayyana alakar da ke tsakanin Uba, da Da, da kuma Ruhu Mai Tsarki.

keyAchievements.title: Marubucin Kare Addini mai Yawan Ayyuka
keyAchievements.description: Littafinsa na 'Apologeticus' wani babban aiki ne na farko da ke kare hakki na shari'a da dabi'u na Kiristoci.

faq.question: Shin Tertullian tsarkaka ne?
faq.answer: A'a, ba a amince da shi a matsayin tsarkaka ba a cikin Cocin Katolika ko na Orthodox, musamman saboda shigarsa kungiyar Montanism da ake kallo a matsayin bidi'a.

faq.question: Wanne harshe Tertullian ya yi amfani da shi wajen rubuce-rubucensa?
faq.answer: Ya fi yin rubuce-rubuce da harshen Latin, amma ya kware a harshen Helenanci kuma yana iya kasancewa ya rubuta wasu ayyukansa na farko da aka rasa da harshen Helenanci.

faq.question: Menene Montanism?
faq.answer: Montanism wani yunkuri ne na farko na Kiristanci wanda ke jaddada sabuwar wahayi na annabci, tsauraran dabi'u, da kuma ayyukan tsantsani, wanda hakan ya jawo hankalin Tertullian.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin Kassa Hailu a yankin Qwara na Daular Habasha.
Ya shahara a matsayin 'shifta' (mai tayar da zaune tsaye) kuma ya tara babban sojan da ya ba shi daukaka.
Ya kayar da manyan sarakunan yankin na lokacin Zemene Mesafint (Lokacin Sarakuna) a jer인 yakoki masu mahimmanci.
Ya hau karagar mulkin Habasha a matsayin Sarki, inda ya yi amfani da sunan sarauta Tewodros II.
Ya fara gagarumin sauye-sauye don tsara ikon gudanarwa a tsakiya, zamanantar da soja, da kuma rage ikon sarakunan gargajiya da na coci.
Ya tura wasika ga Sarauniya Victoria na Burtaniya don neman kawance na soja, amma bai sami amsar wasika ba.
A matsayin martani ga wulakanci na diflomasiyya, ya tsare jakadan Burtaniya Charles Duncan Cameron da sauran Turawa, wanda ya haifar da tashin hankali.
Burtaniya ta kaddamar da balaguron Abyssinia, wani gagarumin aikin soja don ceto mutanen da aka tsare.
Bayan an kayar da sojojinsa a Yakin Magdala, ya kashe kansa ta hanyar amfani da bindiga da Sarauniya Victoria ta ba shi don kauce wa kama shi a matsayin fursuna.

keyAchievements.title: Kawo Karshen 'Lokacin Sarakuna'
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne mutum na farko da ya sake hada kan Habasha karkashin ikon tsakiya bayan ya kayar da sarakunan yankin da suka rabu da yaki na tsawon fiye da karni daya.

keyAchievements.title: Yunkurin Zamanantarwa
keyAchievements.description: Ya nemi samar da dakarun soja kwararru na zamani, ya gyara tsarin haraji, ya tsara gwamnati a tsakiya, kuma ya shigo da fasahar Turai da masu sana'a.

keyAchievements.title: Uban Habasha ta Zamani
keyAchievements.description: Duk da cewa ya kare cikin bakin ciki, mulkinsa ya samar da muhimman ginshikai da kuma kishin kasa na Habasha ta zamani.

faq.question: Me yasa ya zabi sunan Tewodros?
faq.answer: Ya yi amfani da sunan sarauta Tewodros II don cika wani shahararren annabci da ke cewa wani sarki adali mai suna Tewodros zai bayyana, wanda zai kawo karshen 'Lokacin Sarakuna' sannan ya maido da daukakar Daular Habasha.

faq.question: Me yasa ya yi yaki da Daular Burtaniya?
faq.answer: Rikicin ya fara ne bayan ya tura wasika ga Sarauniya Victoria don neman kawance, amma ma'aikatar harkokin waje ta Burtaniya ta yi watsi da wasika. Da jin cewa an wulakanta shi, ya tsare Turawa da dama ciki har da jami'an Burtaniya, wanda hakan ya sa sojojin Burtaniya suka kaddamar da balaguro zuwa Magdala don kubutar da su.

faq.question: Menene gadon Tewodros II a Habasha a yau?
faq.answer: Ana girmama Tewodros II a matsayin gwarzon kasa kuma uban Habasha ta zamani a yau. Ana kallonsa a matsayin wani jagora mai hangen nesa, ko da yake ya kare cikin bakin ciki, wanda ke da burin gina kasa mai karfi, dunkulalliyar kasa, kuma mai cin gashin kanta wadda za ta iya yaki da mahara na kasashen waje.

timeline.event: An yi amanna cewa an haife shi a matsayin Tutankhaten a birnin Amarna.
Ya hau karagar mulkin Masar yana dan kimanin shekaru 9 bayan mutuwar sarki na baya Smenkhkare.
Ya canza sunansa zuwa Tutankhamun, ya maido da babban birnin zuwa Thebes, kuma ya fara maido da bautar alloli na gargajiya na Masar.
Ya mutu yana da kimanin shekaru 19 sannan aka binne shi a wani kabari da aka shirya cikin gaggawa a Kwarin Sarakuna (KV62).
Masanin kimiya na Burtaniya Howard Carter ya gano kabarinsa wanda ke nan cikakke gaba daya, karkashin daukar nauyin kudi na Lord Carnarvon a shekarar 1922 CE.

keyAchievements.title: Maido da Addinin Gargajiya
keyAchievements.description: Ya soke bautar allahn daya tilo na Aten da mahaifinsa Akhenaten ya kafa, inda ya maido da bautar alloli daban-daban na gargajiya da kuma mahimmancin allahn Amun-Ra.

keyAchievements.title: Mayar da Babban Birni
keyAchievements.description: Ya mayar da fadar sarauta daga Amarna wadda Akhenaten ya gina zuwa cibiyoyin gudanarwa da addini na gargajiya na Memphis da Thebes.

keyAchievements.title: Shahara bayan Mutuwa
keyAchievements.description: Babban 'nasararsa' ta ginu ne a kan kabarinsa da aka samu gaba daya cikakke a zamanin yau, wanda ya samar da haske na musamman game da yaya ake binne sarakuna a Masar ta da.

faq.question: Yaya Tutankhamun ya mutu?
faq.answer: Ainihin dalilin yana da mahawara. Shaidu daga jikinsa sun nuna cewa yana da matsalolin lafiya da yawa ciki har da gurguntaccen kafa, cutar kashi, da zazzabin cizon sauro. Karyewar kafa mai tsanani da ya samu daf da mutuwarsa wadda ta harbu da kwayoyin cuta tana iya kasancewa ta haifar da mutuwarsa.

faq.question: Me yasa kabarinsa yake da kankanta ga sarki?
faq.answer: Mutuwarsa da ba a yi tsammani ba da wuri tana nufin cewa ba a sami lokacin kammala katon kabari na sarauta ba. Wani karamin kabari da aka yi don wani da ba na sarauta ba ne aka sauya shi da sauri don binne shi.

faq.question: Shin akwai 'La'anar Fir'auna' da gaske?
faq.answer: '저주'는 대체로 언론이 만들어낸 것입니다. 무덤 개봉 후 일련의 사망 사건들, 예를 들어 카나본 경이 감염된 모기 물림으로 사망한 것이 전설에 불을 지폈지만, 통계 분석 결과 발굴에 관련된 사람들 사이에 비정상적인 사망률은 없었습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsay인 Yarima Kwaku Dua III.
Ya hau karagar mulki a matsayin Asantehene bayan wani lokaci na yakin basasa, inda ya zabi sunan sarauta Prempeh I.
Ya mika wuya ga sojojin Burtaniya don hana lalata Kumasi, sannan aka tura shi gudun hijira zuwa Sierra Leone.
An sake tura shi gudun hijira zuwa tsibiran Seychelles. Lokacin da yake gudun hijira, 'Yakin Kujerar Zinariya' ya barke.
An ba shi damar komawa Gold Coast (Ghana ta yanzu) a matsayin talaka.
Gwamnatin mulkin mallaka ta Burtaniya ta maido da shi a matsayin Kumasihene (Sarkin Kumasi).
Ya mutu a Kumasi.

keyAchievements.title: Hada kan Hadakar Ashanti
keyAchievements.description: Ya kawo karshen yakin basasa lokacin da ya hau karagar mulki kuma ya sake hada kan larduna daban-daban na Hadakar Ashanti.

keyAchievements.title: Alamar tirjiya da mulkin mallaka
keyAchievements.description: Kin mika Kujerar Zinariya da kuma mika wuyarsa cikin lumana don kare mutanensa ya mayar da shi wata babbar alama ta tirjiya.

keyAchievements.title: Kiyaye Asalin Ashanti
keyAchievements.description: Komawarsa daga gudun hijira da maido da shi a matsayin Kumasihene ya farfado da kishin kasa da asalin al'adun mutanen Ashanti.

faq.question: Me yasa Kujerar Zinariya take da mahimmanci?
faq.answer: An yi amanna cewa Kujerar Zinariya (Sika Dwa Kofi) ta sauko ne daga sama kuma tana dauke da ruhin al'ummar Ashanti. Ba kawai kujerar sarki ba ce, face babbar alama ce ta iko, hadin kai, da kuma ci gaban al'ummar Ashanti.

faq.question: Me yasa Prempeh I ya mika wuya ga Burtaniya ba tare da yaki ba a shekarar 1896?
faq.answer: Sakamakon fuskantar sojojin Burtaniya masu makamai mafi inganci, Prempeh I ya zabi ya mika wuya don hana lalata birnin Kumasi da kisan kiyashin mutanensa. Wannan wata shawara ce ta zahiri don kare al'ummar Ashanti.

faq.question: Me ya faru bayan ya dawo daga gudun hijira?
faq.answer: Mutanensa sun tarbe shi a matsayin gwarzo a shekarar 1924. A shekarar 1926, Burtaniya ta maido da shi a matsayin Kumasihene (Sarkin Kumasi) amma ba a matsayin Asantehene na daukacin hadakar ba. Kasancewarsa ya taimaka wajen sake hada kan al'ummar Ashanti.

timeline.event: Ya gaji Masarautar Kush daga mahaifinsa Kashta inda ya zama Sarkin Napata.
Ya kaddamar da yakin soja zuwa Masar don yaki da ikon da ke bunkasa na Tefnakht na Sais.
Ya kammala cin Masar da yaki bayan ya mamaye manyan birane da suka hada da Hermopolis da babban birnin Memphis.
Ya kafa shahararren 'Dutsen Nasara' (Victory Stele) a haikalin Amun da ke Jebel Barkal don tunawa da yakinsa.
Ya mutu sannan aka binne shi a makabartar sarauta ta El-Kurru, wadda ke dauke da piramid na farko irin na Masar a Nubia.

keyAchievements.title: Cin Masar da Yaki
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi nasarar mamaye da kuma cin Masar da ta rabu da yaki, inda ya kayar da hadakar sarakunan Arewacin Masar.

keyAchievements.title: Wanda ya Kafa Daular 25
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa daular Kush (Daular 25) wadda ta mulki Masar na kusan karni guda.

keyAchievements.title: Mai Hada kan Kasashe Biyu
keyAchievements.description: Ya gina wata babbar daula da ta tashi daga zurfin Nubia zuwa Delta ta tekun Mediterranean kuma ya yi mulki a matsayin 'Ubangijin Kasashe Biyu'.

keyAchievements.title: Mai Farfado da Al'adu
keyAchievements.description: Mulkinsa ya fara zamanin farfadowa a Masar, inda ya maido da salon fasaha na da da sadaukarwar addini, musamman bautar allahn Amun.

faq.question: Shin Piye dan kasar Masar ne ko kuwa dan Nubia?
faq.answer: Piye sarki ne na Nubia na Masarautar Kush da ke cikin kasar Sudan ta yanzu. Sai dai al'adun Kush sun sami tasiri sosai daga al'adun Masar, kuma Piye ya dauki kansa a matsayin magaji na gaskiya kuma mai kare al'adun Masar na da.

faq.question: Me yasa wani lokacin ake kiran sa Piankhy?
faq.answer: '피앙키'는 그의 이름에 대한 오래된 판독으로, 현재는 틀린 것으로 간주됩니다. 현대 이집트학자들은 그의 상형문자 이름에 대한 정확한 음역이 '피예'라는 데 동의합니다.

faq.question: Shin ya yi mulki a cikin kasar Masar?
faq.answer: A'a. Bayan nasarar da ya samu, Piye ya koma babban birninsa na asali watau Napata da ke Nubia inda ya mulki kasashensa guda biyu a can, sannan ya bar ragamar mulkin Masar ga sarakunan gida da kuma magadansa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Lagos, Najeriya karkashin mulkin Burtaniya.
Ya sami horon aikin injiniya na gida (civil engineering) a Burtaniya, wanda ya sa ya zama injiniya na farko dan Najeriya.
Ya yi ritaya daga aikin gwamnati na mulkin mallaka sannan ya zama mai auna filaye na kashin kansa kuma babban mai sukar gwamnati.
Ya kafa jam'iyyar siyasa ta farko a Najeriya, watau Nigerian National Democratic Party (NNDP).
Ya kafa jaridar 'Lagos Daily News', wadda ta zama babban makamin ayyukansa na yaki da mulkin mallaka.
Tare da Nnamdi Azikiwe, ya kafa kungiyar National Council of Nigeria and the Cameroons (NCNC).
Ya mutu a Kano yana da shekaru 81 lokacin da yake cikin wata tafiyar siyasa ta kasa.

keyAchievements.title: Wanda ya Kafa Jam'iyyar Siyasa ta Farko a Najeriya
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa kungiyar Nigerian National Democratic Party (NNDP) a shekarar 1923, wanda ya samar da tsarin siyasa na farko ga 'yan Najeriya.

keyAchievements.title: Majagaba na Aikin Jarida na Kishin Kasa
keyAchievements.description: Jaridarsa 'Lagos Daily News' ta kasance babban makami wajen hada ra'ayin jama'a yaki da manufofin mulkin mallaka.

keyAchievements.title: Uban Kishin Kasar Najeriya
keyAchievements.description: Kokarinsa na din-din-din ya samar da ginshikin akida da tsari ga yunkurin samun 'yancin Najeriya.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran Herbert Macaulay 'Uban Kishin Kasar Najeriya'?
faq.answer: Saboda yana daya daqun mutanen farko kuma mafi tasiri wajen tsara tirjiyar siyasa da mulkin Burtaniya, kafa jam'iyya ta farko, da kuma kare hakkin cin gashin kai na Najeriya, wanda ya zaburar da daukacin 'yan kishin kasa.

faq.question: Yaya dangantakar sa take da Nnamdi Azikiwe?
faq.answer: Macaulay ya kasance babban dan siyasa wanda ya zaburar da matasan kishin kasa kamar Azikiwe. Sun yi aiki tare don kafa NCNC, inda suka hada karfin siyasar Macaulay da kuma shaharar kishin kasa ta zamani ta Azikiwe.

faq.question: Menene aikin sa kafin ya sadaukar da kansa ga siyasa?
faq.answer: Ya kasance injiniyan gida da mai auna filaye da aka horas a Burtaniya. Wannan ilimin ya ba shi basira ta musamman game da ayyukan gine-gine da manufofin filaye na mulkin mallaka, wadanda galibi yake suka a matsayin zalunci.

faq.question: Shin an taba tsare Herbert Macaulay a gidan yari?
faq.answer: E, hukumomin mulkin mallaka sun tsare shi a gidan yari sau biyu saboda ayyukansa na siyasa. Sai dai wannan tsarewar ta kara masa shahara kuma ta karfafa matsayinsa na sadaukarwa ga kishin kasa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Pella, Cape Colony (Afirka ta Kudu ta yanzu).
Ya zama Kaptein (Sarki) na mutanen Witbooi Nama bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa Moses Witbooi.
Ya rubuta shahararren wasika ga Sarkin Herero Maharero yana gargadin shi game da kulla 'yarjejeniyar tsaro' da kasar Jamus.
An matsa masa lamba don ya sa hannu a kan yarjejeniyar tsaro da Jamus baada shekaru da yawa yana nuna tirjiya.
Ya karya yarjejeniyar sannan ya shelanta yaki da Jamus, inda ya shiga cikin babban Yakin Herero-Nama.
Ya mutu a ranar 29 ga Oktoba lokacin da yake jagorantar dakarunsa yaki da Jamus kusa da Vaalgras.
Hotonsa yana bayyana a kan daukacin takardun kudi na Dalar Namibia, wanda ke tabbatar da matsayinsa na gwarzon kasa.

keyAchievements.title: Alamar Tirjiya da Mulkin Mallaka
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance daya daqun shugabannin Afirka na farko da suka bayyana kyakkyawan hangen nesa na hadin kan kabilu daban-daban yaki da babban hadari na mulkin mallaka na Turai.

keyAchievements.title: Gwarzon Kasar Namibia
keyAchievements.description: Ana girmama shi a matsayin uban kasar Namibia ta zamani kuma babban gwarzon kasa, inda hotonsa ke bayyana a kudaden kasar.

keyAchievements.title: Littafin Tarihin Witbooi
keyAchievements.description: Dinbin rubuce-rubucen tarihinsa na yau da kullum da wasikunsa suna cikin jerin Taskar Tarihi ta Duniya ta UNESCO, wanda ke samar da hangen nesa na Afirka na musamman game da mulkin mallaka.

faq.question: Me yasa Witbooi ya yi yaki da sauran kungiyoyi na Namibia kamar Herero a farko?
faq.answer: Kafin lokacin mulkin mallaka na Jamus, rikici tsakanin kabilun gida a kan albarkatu kamar makiyaya, ruwa, da sarrafa hanyoyin kasuwanci ya kasance siffa ta yau da kullum a siyasar yankin.

faq.question: Me yasa hoton Hendrik Witbooi ke kan kudaden Namibia?
faq.answer: An dora hotonsa a kan kudin Dalar Namibia don girmama shi a matsayin babban gwarzon kasar kuma alama mai karfi ta dogon yakin neman samun 'yanci daga ikon waje.

faq.question: Menene sakamon yakinsa da Jamus?
faq.answer: Duk da cewa Witbooi ya mutu kuma sojojin Jamus sun murkushe tirjiyar da karfi, wanda ya kai ga kisan kiyashi na Herero da Nama, yakin gwagwarmayarsa ya zama ginshikin tarihin kishin kasar Namibia da kuma yakin samun 'yanci a karni na 20.

timeline.event: An haife ta a cikin dangi mai daraja da dukiya a Minya, Masar.
An tilasta mata auren dan uwanta Ali Pasha Sha'arawi tana da shekaru 13.
Ta tsara kuma ta jagoranci daya daga cikin zanga-zangar farko na mata a kan titi yaki da mulkin Burtaniya lokacin Juyin Juya Halin Masar.
Ta cire mayafin fuskarta a fili a babban tashar jirgin kasa ta Alkahira, wanda ya zama lokaci mai muhimmanci ga gwagwarmayar mata a Masar.
Ta kafa kungiyar Egyptian Feminist Union (EFU) kuma ta zama shugabarta ta farko.
EFU ta fara buga wata jarida mai tasiri ta mata mai suna 'L'Egyptienne'.
Ya tara taron farko na mata na kasashen Larabawa a Alkahira sannan ta zama shugabar kafa kungiyar Arab Feminist Union.
Ta rasu a Alkahira tana da shekaru 68.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Kungiyar Egyptian Feminist Union (EFU)
keyAchievements.description: Ta kafa EFU a shekarar 1923, wadda ta zama kungiyar mata ta farko kuma mafi tasiri da ta yi yakin neman hakkin mata a Masar.

keyAchievements.title: Matakin Cire Mayafi a Fili
keyAchievements.description: Matakin cire mayafi da ta yi a shekarar 1923 ya zama babban alama ta 'yantar da mata da kuma adawa da manufofin ware mata a duniyar Larabawa.

keyAchievements.title: Jagoranci a Juyin Juya Halin 1919
