faq.answer: Abai yana da ra'ayi mai sarkakiya. Ya soki manufofin mulkin mallaka na Tsarist amma ya girmama adabi da al'adun Rasha, inda yake kallon su a matsayin hanyar samun wayewa da ci gaba wadda za ta iya amfanar mutanen Kazakh idan aka bi ta da hankali.

timeline.event: An haife shi a kauyen Grigorovo, yankin Nizhny Novgorod, a cikin dangin limamai.
Ya fara nuna adawa a fili ga sauye-sauyen addini da Patriarch Nikon na Moscow ya kaddamar.
An kama shi sannan an tura shi gudun hijira zuwa Siberia tare da iyalinsa. Ya fuskanci wahala mai tsanani da tafiye-tafiye na tsawon shekaru goma.
Ya koma Moscow na wani dan lokaci amma ya ki yin sulhu, wanda hakan ya sa aka sake kama shi sannan an tura shi gudun hijira zuwa Arewacin Rasha.
An cire masa matsayin addini sannan Great Moscow Synod ta la'ane shi. An tsare shi a cikin rami na karkashin kasa a Pustozersk.
Ya rubuta littafin tarihin rayuwarsa, 'The Life of Avvakum, Written by Himself', wanda yake zama babban aiki na adabin Rasha.
An kona shi a kan bishiya a Pustozersk tare da mabiyansa na kusa saboda 'babban sabo yaki da Tsar'.

keyAchievements.title: Jagoran Old Believers
keyAchievements.description: Ya zama mafi shahara kuma jajirtaccen jagora na Raskol (schism), wanda ya tara adawa yaki da sauye-sauyen coci da gwamnati ke goyon baya.

keyAchievements.title: Marubucin 'The Life of Avvakum'
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta littafin tarihin rayuwa na kashin kansa na farko a Rasha, babban aikin adabi na karni na 17 wanda aka sani da harshen yau da kullum da kuma zafafan kariya ga bangaskiyarsa.

faq.question: Menene sauye-sauyen coci da Avvakum ya nuna adawa da su?
faq.answer: Sauye-sauyen Patriarch Nikon suna da burin daidaita ayyukan Rasha na Orthodox da Cocin Greek Orthodox. Wannan ya hada da canza alamar giciye daga yatsu biyu zuwa uku, canza rubutun sunan Yesu ('Isus' zuwa 'Iisus'), da kuma gyara littattafan addini. Avvakum da Old Believers sun kalli wadannan sauye-sauye a matsayin bidi'a.

faq.question: Me yasa littafin tarihin rayuwarsa yake da matukar mahimmanci?
faq.answer: Ya kasance daya daqun manyan ayyuka na farko da aka rubuta da harshen Rasha na yau da kullum maimakon formal Church Slavonic. Salonsa na kashin kansa da mai cike da zafi ya bude sabuwar hanya a adabin Rasha sannan ya samar da shaida mai karfi ga tafiyar Old Believer.

faq.question: Shin Avvakum tsarkaka (saint) ne?
faq.answer: Ba a amince da shi a matsayin tsarkaka ba a babbar Cocin Russian Orthodox. Sai dai, ana girmama shi a matsayin tsarkaka da mai sadaukarwa na addini a cikin dariku da dama na Old Believers, wadanda ke kallon sa a matsayin mai kare bangaskiya ta gaskiya gaba daya.

timeline.event: Ya zama abokin mulki na Huns tare da dan uwansa Bleda.
Ya kashe Bleda don ya zama sarki shi kadai na Daular Hunnic.
Ya kaddamar da babban hari a Balkans sannan ya yi barazana ga Constantinople.
Ya mamaye Gaul sannan ya yi Yakin Catalaunian Plains.
Ya mamaye Italiya, ya lalata birane da dama, amma bai taba Roma ba.
Ya mutu a daren aurensu; masarautarsa ta rushe jim kadan bayan haka.

keyAchievements.title: Hada kan Kabilun Hunnic
keyAchievements.description: Ya hada kabilun Hunnic da na Germanic daban-daban ya zama dakarun yaki masu karfi karkashin mulkinsa shi kadai.

keyAchievements.title: Murkushe Daular Roma ta Gabas (Eastern Roman Empire)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kayar da sojojin Roma ta Gabas akai-akai, inda ya tilasta musu biyan kyaututtuka na zinariya masu yawa duk shekara.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Babbar Daula ta Turai
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa wata babbar daula, kodayake mara karko, wadda ta tashi daga kogin Ural zuwa Rhine da kuma daga Danube zuwa Tekun Baltic.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Scourge of God'?
faq.answer: Marubuta Kirista a Turai sun ba shi wannan sunan, da imanin cewa yakokin da ya yi sun kasance hukunci ne na Allah saboda zunubansu.

faq.question: Me yasa bai ci Roma da yaki ba a shekarar 452?
faq.answer: Masanan tarihi suna yin muhawara a kan wannan. Dalilan suna iya hada da roko daga Paparoma Leo I, cututtuka da yunwa a cikin sojojinsa, ko kuma barazanar harin Roma ta Gabas a kan mahaifarsa.

faq.question: Yaya Attila ya mutu?
faq.answer: Ya mutu a shekarar 453 a daren aurensu da wata sabuwar amarya mai suna Ildico. Dalilin da aka fi yarda da shi shi ne zubar da jini mai tsanani daga hanci ko ko zubar jini na ciki, wanda kila shaye-shaye ya karfafa shi.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Sayram, kasar Kazakhstan ta yanzu.
Ya tafi Bukhara don yin karatu a karkashin shahararren malamin Sufi Yusuf Hamadani.
Ya zama shugaban khaneqah (wurin Sufi) na Hamadani na wani dan lokaci kaf인 ya koma mahaifarsa Yasi.
Yana da shekaru 63, don nuna alhinin mutuwar Annabi Muhammad, ya koma wani daki na karkashin kasa (chilla-khana) don gudanar da rayuwarsa cikin tunani.
Ya mutu a birnin Yasi (Turkistan ta yanzu, Kazakhstan), inda kabarinsa (mausoleum) yake yau.

keyAchievements.title: Diwan-i-Hikmet (Book of Wisdom)
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta tarin wakoki a cikin harshen Turkic, wanda ya mayar da tsarin Sufi mai sarkakiya ya kasance mai sauki ga talakawa na Tsakiyar Asiya.

keyAchievements.title: Wanda ya Kafa Yasawiyya Order
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa kungiyar Sufi ta farko ta Turkic, wadda ta yada koyarwarsa sosai a cikin kasashen da ke jin harshen Turkic na tsawon daruruwan shekaru.

keyAchievements.title: Majagaba na Adabin Addini na Turkic
keyAchievements.description: Ya daukaka matsayin harshen Turkic don ya kasance kafar bayyana addini da sirrinsa, wanda ya yi tasiri a kan adabi na tsawon karni da dama.

faq.question: Why is Ahmad Yasawi so important?
faq.answer: He was the first major mystic to compose poetry in a Turkic language, which allowed Islamic and Sufi ideas to spread widely among the nomadic and settled Turkic peoples of Central Asia.

faq.question: Menene 'Diwan-i-Hikmet'?
faq.answer: Tarin wakokinsa ne, wadanda ake kira 'hikmats' (hikimomi), wadanda ke bayyana tsarin Sufism, dabi'u na kwarai, da kuma son Allah a cikin salo mai sauki ta amfani da karin waka na gargajiya na Turkic.

faq.question: Me yasa ya shiga karkashin kasa yana da shekaru 63?
faq.answer: Ya yi hakan ne saboda tsananin girmamawa da alhinin mutuwar Annabi Muhammad, wanda ya mutu yana da shekaru 63. Yasawi ya ji cewa bai dace a gare shi ya ci gaba da zama a kan kasa yana kallon ranar da Annabi ba zai iya gani ba.

timeline.event: An haife ta a dakin Porphyra na Babban Fadar Constantinople, a matsayin yar farko ta Sarki Alexios I Komnenos da Irene Doukaina.
Lokacin da take matashiya, ta shaida zuwan shugabannin First Crusade a Constantinople, wani al'amari da daga baya za ta rubuta shi daki-daki.

Mahaifinta Alexios I ya mutu. Ita da mahaifiyarta sun yi yunkurin shawo kansa ya nada mijinta, Nikephoros Bryennios, a matsayin magaji, amma abin ya gaza. Bayan haka, ta kulla makirci yaki da dan uwanta, sabon Sarki John II.
Bayan an gano makircinta, an kwace kayanta sannan an tura ta gudun hijira zuwa Kecharitomene Monastery, wanda mahaifiyarta ta kafa.
Bayan mutuwar mijinta, ta fara rubuta Alexiad, tarihin kashi 15 na mulkin mahaifinta, wanda kila ya kammala aikin da mijinta ya fara.
Ta mutu a monastery, bayan ta kammala babban aikinta na tarihi.

keyAchievements.title: Marubuciyar Alexiad
keyAchievements.description: Ta rubuta Alexiad, tarihin kashi 15 wanda yake zama daya daqun manyan tushen tarihi na Daular Byzantine da kuma First Crusade.

keyAchievements.title: Majagaba na Marubutan Tarihi Mata
keyAchievements.description: Ana kallon ta a matsayin daya daqun marubutan tarihi mata na farko kuma mafi mahimmanci a Yammacin duniya, wanda ya kafa misali ga karatun mata.

keyAchievements.title: Mai Gudanar da Lafiya da Masaniya
keyAchievements.description: Tana da babban ilimin likitanci, ta gudanar da babban asibiti da gidan marayu a Constantinople, sannan ta rubuta game da cututtuka da magunguna a cikin Alexiad.

faq.question: Shin da gaske ne Anna Komnene ya kamata ta zama Sarauniya?
faq.answer: A matsayinta na yar farko, ita ce magajiya ta farko da aka tsara sannan aka kulla yarjejeniyar aure da co-emperor, wanda ya sanya ta a kan layin mulki kai-tsaye. Matsayinta ya sauya bayan an haifi dan uwanta John sannan mahaifinsu ya nada shi a matsayin magaji.

faq.question: Game da menene Alexiad?
faq.answer: Cikakken labari ne na tarihin siyasa da na soja na Daular Byzantine lokacin mulkin mahaifinta, Alexios I Komnenos, daga shekarar 1081 zuwa 1118. Ya kuma samar da hangen nesa na musamman na Byzantine a kan First Crusade.

faq.question: Shin Alexiad tushen tarihi ne mai dogaro?
faq.answer: Kodayake labari ne na musamman na shaidar gani da ido, yana da wariya sosai. Anna tana daukaka mahaifinta da iyalinta yay인에 galibi take sukar ko rage darajar abokan hamayyarsu. Masanan tarihi suna amfani da shi cikin kiyayewa, suna duba shi tare da tushen Latin, Armenian, da sauran su don samun cikakken hoto.

timeline.event: An haife shi, wataƙila a Lardin Moscow, lokacin Zamanin Tatar Yoke.
Ya yi aiki tare da Theophanes the Greek da kuma Prokhor na Gorodets a kan frescoes na Cathedral of the Annunciation a Moscow Kremlin.
Ya zana frescoes da iconostasis a Dormition Cathedral da ke Vladimir, tare da abokinsa Daniil Chyorny.
Ya zana aikinsa mafi shahara, icon na 'The Trinity', don iconostasis na Trinity Cathedral a Trinity Lavra na St. Sergius.
Ya mutu a Andronikov Monastery da ke Moscow, inda ya zana ayyukansa na karshe a Saviour Cathedral.
Cocin Russian Orthodox ta nada shi a matsayin tsarkaka, inda ranar bikin sa take ranar 4 ga Yuli.

keyAchievements.title: The Trinity Icon
keyAchievements.description: Babban aikinsa, wanda ake yaba wa saboda alamar addini mai zurfi, jituwar fasaha, da kuma rabuwa da dokokin Byzantine masu tsanani.

keyAchievements.title: Makarantar Zana Hoto ta Moscow (Moscow School of Painting)
keyAchievements.description: Ana kallon sa a matsayin wanda ya kafa makarantar Moscow na zana hoton icon, wanda ke da siffar salo mai taushi, kwanciyar hangali, da na ruhaniya.

keyAchievements.title: Frescoes na Manyan Coci-coci
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da gudunmawa ga adon manyan coci-coci na zamaninsa a Moscow da Vladimir, inda ya bar gadon fasaha mai dorewa.

keyAchievements.title: Nadin Tsarkaka (Canonization)
keyAchievements.description: Cocin Orthodox ta gane shi saboda ibadarsa da babban mahimmancin ruhaniya na aikinsa na rayuwa, wanda ya daukaka hotunansa fiye da fasaha zuwa abubuwa masu tsarki.

faq.question: Me yasa 'The Trinity' take da shahara sosai?
faq.answer: Ta rabu da al'adar Byzantine ta hanyar jituwarta mai taushi, tsarin zagaye, da kuma alamar addini mai zurfi na son Allah da hadin kai, tana samar da sakon zaman lafiya lokacin yaki.

faq.question: Shin da gaske ne Andrei Rublev mutum ne na gaske?
faq.answer: E. Kodayake bayanan rayuwarsa kalilan ne, bayanan tarihi kamar chronicles sun tabbatar da wanzuwarsa da kuma aikinsa a kan manyan aikin coci a farkon karni na 15.

faq.question: Menene 'icon' a al'adar Orthodox?
faq.answer: A addinin Kirista na Orthodox, icon wani hoto ne mai tsarki da ake amfani da shi wajen ibada. Ana kallon sa a matsayin 'taga zuwa sama', bayanin addini ne da kala, maimakon kawai fasaha ta ado.

faq.question: Shin ya yi aiki shi kadai ne?
faq.answer: A'a, ya zama ruwan dare ga masu zana hotunan icon su yi aiki a cikin kungiyoyi. An rubuta cewa Rublev ya yi aiki kafada da kafada da gwanaye kamar Theophanes the Greek da kuma abokinsa na din-din-din Daniil Chyorny.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Pereslavl-Zalessky, dan na biyu na Prince Yaroslav Vsevolodovich.
Ya zama Prince na Novgorod bayan mahaifinsa ya tafi Kiev.
Ya jagoranci sojojinsa zuwa gagarumar nasara yaki da Swedes a Yakin Neva, wanda ya ba shi sunan 'Nevsky'.
Ya kayar da Livonian Order (reshen Teutonic Knights) a Yakin kan Kankara a tafkin Peipus.
Ya tafi tare da dan uwansa Andrey zuwa babban birnin Mongol na Karakorum don Great Khan ya nada su a matsayin sarakuna.
Ya tafi Golden Horde, ya sami yarlik (shaidar ofis) sannan ya zama Grand Prince na Vladimir, babban sarki na Rasha.
Ya tafi babban birnin Horde, Sarai, don rokon Khan ya dakatar da aikin soja da ya tsara a biranen Rasha, wanda ya haifar da boren jama'a.
Ya mutu a Gorodets lokacin da yake kan hanyarsa ta dawowa daga Sarai. An binne shi a birnin Vladimir.
Cocin Russian Orthodox ta nada shi a matsayin tsarkaka saboda kariya ga bangaskiya da kasar.

keyAchievements.title: Nasara a Yakin Neva (1240)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kayar da dakarun mamaya na Sweden, wanda ya kare kan iyakar arewa sannan ya ba shi lakabin 'Nevsky'.

keyAchievements.title: Nasara a Yakin kan Kankara (1242)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kayar da Teutonic Knights a kan daskararren tafkin Peipus, wanda ya dakatar da fadadarsu zuwa gabas a cikin Rus'.

keyAchievements.title: Diflomasiyya da Golden Horde
keyAchievements.description: Ta hanyar mika wuya ta zahiri da kuma diflomasiyya, ya kare sarakunan Rasha daga hare-hare na lalata na Mongol sannan ya kiyaye addinin Orthodox.

keyAchievements.title: Matusyin Tsarkaka (Sainthood)
keyAchievements.description: Ana girmama shi a matsayin tsarkaka a cikin Cocin Russian Orthodox saboda rawarsa a matsayin mai kare Rus' da kuma addinin Orthodox.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Nevsky'?
faq.answer: An ba shi sunan 'Nevsky', wanda ke nufin 'na Neva', don girmama babban nasararsa a kan Swedes a Yakin kogin Neva a shekarar 1240.

faq.question: Me yasa Alexander Nevsky ya yi aiki tare da Mongols (Golden Horde)?
faq.answer: Ya yi zabi ne na zahiri, inda yake kallon Catholic Teutonic Knights da Swedes a matsayin babban barazana ga addini da al'adun Rasha. Mongols gaba daya suna da hakuri da addinan gida matukar ana biyan kyaututtuka, don haka mika wuya gare su ya hana lalata kasarsa da mutanensa gaba daya.

faq.question: Shin ana kallon Alexander Nevsky a matsayin tsarkaka?
faq.answer: E, Cocin Russian Orthodox ta nada shi a matsayin tsarkaka a shekarar 1547. Ana bikin ranar sa ranar 23 ga Nuwamba.

faq.question: Menene Yakin kan Kankara?
faq.answer: Wani shahararren yaki ne a shekarar 1242 inda sojojin Nevsky suka kayar da Teutonic Knights a kan daskararren saman tafkin Peipus. Ya yaudari sojojin zuwa kan kankara mara karfi, wadda ta cabe karkashin nauyinsu, wanda ya taimaka ga nasararsa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Moscow.
Ya halarci Imperial Lyceum a Tsarskoye Selo.
Ya buga wakarsa ta farko mai tsawo, 'Ruslan and Ludmila'; an tura shi gudun hijira saboda wakoki na siyasa.
Ya rubuta wasan kwaikwayo na tarihi 'Boris Godunov'.
Ya auri Natalya Goncharova; ya kammala 'Eugene Onegin'.
Ya sami rauni mai tsanani a cikin fada da Georges d'Anthès sannan ya mutu bayan kwanaki biyu.

keyAchievements.title: Wanda ya Kafa Adabin Rasha na Zamani
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da sabon harshen adabi wanda ke hada maganganun yau da kullum da tsoffin tsarin coci, wanda ya kafa misali ga marubutan Rasha na karni na 19.

keyAchievements.title: 'Eugene Onegin'
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta 'novel in verse' wanda ya zama tsari ga salon zahiri (realism) na adabin Rasha.

keyAchievements.title: Majagaba na Kalar Adabi Daban-daban
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi fice a fannoni daban-daban, ciki har da wakoki na yau da kullum, wakoki na labari, wasannin kwaikwayo, gajerun labarai, da kuma novel.

faq.question: Me yasa Pushkin yake da matukar mahimmanci ga mutanen Rasha?
faq.answer: Ana kallon sa a matsayin 'rana' ta wakokin Rasha da kuma uban harshensu na adabi na zamani, kamar yadda Shakespeare yake ga harshen Turanci.

faq.question: Menene ya haifar da mutuwarsa?
faq.answer: Ya mutu ne sakamakon rauni da ya samu a yakin bindiga da Georges d'Anthès, wanda ake zargin mai son matarsa ne, wanda ya kalubalance shi don kare mutuncin iyalinsa.

faq.question: Shin Pushkin yana da tushen Afirka?
faq.answer: E, kakansa na wajen uwa shi ne Abram Petrovich Gannibal, wani yaro dan Afirka wanda Peter the Great ya rene shi sannan ya zama kwamandan soja.

timeline.event: An haife ta a Constantinople.
Ya hau karagar mulki bayan wani juyin mulki mai nasara, wanda ya fara mulkinsa a matsayin Sarkin Byzantine.
Ya kaddamar da Golden Bull wadda ke ba wa Venetians manyan gata na kasuwanci a madadin goyon bayan ruwa yaki da Normans.
Ya kayar da Pechenegs a Yakin Levounion, wanda ya kawo karshen barazanarsu ga Constantinople.
Ya tura wakilai zuwa ga Paparoma Urban II a Majalisar Piacenza, yana neman taimakon soja yaki da Seljuk Turks.
Sojojin boren First Crusade sun isa Constantinople; Alexios ya sami rantsuwar aminci daga shugabanninsu.
Dakarun Byzantine, tare da hadin gwiwar Crusaders, sun sake kwace Nicaea, Smyrna, Ephesus, da sauran yankuna masu mahimmanci na Anatolia.
Ya mutu a Constantinople, inda ya bar daula mai karko da ke farfadowa ga dansa, John II Komnenos.

keyAchievements.title: Farfadowar Komnenian (The Komnenian Restoration)
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsayar da faduwar Daular Byzantine, ya gyara soja da na gudanarwa, sannan ya dawo da yankunan da aka rasa, wanda hakan ya kaddamar da karni na wadata.

keyAchievements.title: Dalilin kaddamar da First Crusade
keyAchievements.description: Neman taimakon soja na Yammacin duniya yaki da Seljuks ya haifar da kaddamar da First Crusade ba tare da shiri ba, wanda ya sake fasalin alakar Gabas da Yamma sosai.

keyAchievements.title: Kayar da Pechenegs
keyAchievements.description: Gagarumar nasararsa a Yakin Levounion (1091) ta kawar da barazanar Pecheneg gaba daya daga Balkans.

faq.question: Shin Alexios yana son First Crusade?
faq.answer: Ba a siffar da ta dauka ba. Ya nemi kananan dakarun soji na musamman na Yammacin duniya don su yi aiki karkashin umarninsa. Ya cika da mamaki da kuma fargaba lokacin da manyan sojoji masu zaman kansu na 'crusaders' suka isa da manufofinsu.

faq.question: Yaya alakarta take da Crusaders?
faq.answer: Ta kasance mai sarkakiya da kuma yawan tashin hangali. Ya kalle su a matsayin makami mai karfi amma mai hadari. Ya yi amfani da diflomasiyya da barazanar a boye don ya sa su rantse cewa za su dawo masa da tsoffin kasashen Byzantine, amma rikice-rikice a kan yankuna da shugabanci sun kasance akai-akai.

faq.question: Yaya ya gyara daular?
faq.answer: Ya gyara kudin kasar don yaki da hauhawar farashi, ya sake tsara sojoji karkashin sabon tsarin ba da filaye (pronoia), sannan ya tsara gwamnati a tsakiya, inda ya dogara sosai ga danginsa don tabbatar da aminci da iko.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Herat, wanda a lokacin yake zama babban birni a Daular Timurid (Afghanistan ta yanzu).
An tilasta masa gudu daga Herat tare da iyalinsa bayan mutuwar sarkin Timurid Shahrukh.
Ya koma Herat bayan abokinsa na kuruciya, Husayn Bayqara, ya zama sarki. An nada shi a matsayin babban jami'i da mai ba da shawara.
An nada shi a matsayin vizier (babban minista), wanda ya ba shi babban ikon siyasa da tasiri.
Ya rubuta babban littafinsa, 'Khamsa' (Quintet), tarin wakoki na tarihi guda biyar a cikin harshen Chagatai.
Ya kammala 'Muhakamat al-Lughatayn' (The Comparison of the Two Languages), wata makala da ke kare fifikon adabi na Turkic a kan Farsi.
Ya mutu a Herat, inda ya bar babban gado na adabi da tallafawa gine-gine.

keyAchievements.title: Uban Adabin Chagatai
keyAchievements.description: Ya daukaka harshen Chagatai Turkic don ya kasance da matsayin adabi mai girma, inda ya kalubalanci ikon Farsi.

keyAchievements.title: Marubucin 'Khamsa'
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta tarin wakoki na tarihi guda biyar wadanda suka zama ginshikin adabin Turkic, suna yin gaba da shahararrun wakokin Farsi.

keyAchievements.title: Dan Siyasa da Mai Taimako
keyAchievements.description: A matsayinya na vizier, ya kasance babban mai tallafa wa fasaha, gine-gine, da kuma kimiyya, inda ya dauki nauyin gina masallatai, madrasas, dakunan karatu, da kuma asibitoci sama da 370.

keyAchievements.title: Masanin Harshe
keyAchievements.description: Aikinsa 'The Comparison of the Two Languages' ya kasance aikin farko na ilimin kwatanta harsuna da kuma kariya mai karfi ga harshensa na gida.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar sunan 'Navoi'?
faq.answer: 'Navoi' is a pen name, which means 'the melodious' or 'the one with a beautiful voice' in Persian. His given name was Nizām-al-Din ʿAli-Shir.

faq.question: Shin ya tsani adabin Farsi?
faq.answer: A'a, akasin haka ma. Navoi yana da babban ilimi a adabin Farsi kuma ya girmama mawaƙan kamar Nizami Ganjavi da Jami sosai. Burinsa ba don rage darajar Farsi ba ne, amma don tabbatar da cewa Turkic daidai yake da shi a fannin adabi.

faq.question: Me yasa yake da matukar mahimmanci a Tsakiyar Asiya yau?
faq.answer: Ana kallon Alisher Navoi a matsayin gwarzon kasa da kuma uban adabi a kasashe da dama da ke jin harshen Turkic, musamman Uzbekistan. An sanya wa birane, jami'o'i, har ma da daukacin lardi a Uzbekistan sunansa, kuma aikinsa yana zama muhimmiyar kashi ta asalin kasa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Bukhara, Transoxiana (Uzbekistan ta yanzu).
An ce ya rasa ganinsa lokacin da yake yaro amma cikin mu'ujiza ya sake samun sa.
Yana da shekaru 16, ya tafi Mecca don aikin Hajj sannan ya fara tafiye-tafiye na tara hadisai.
Ya shafe fiye da shekaru 16 yana tafiya a daukacin Abbasid Caliphate, ciki har da manyan cibiyoyin ilimi a Iraq, Syria, Egypt, da kuma Hejaz.
Ya kammala babban littafinsa, 'Sahih al-Bukhari', bayan ya tantance hadisai sama da 600,000 daki-daki.
Ya fuskanci sabanin addini a Nishapur, wanda ya haifar da gudun hijirarsa.
Ya mutu a Khartank, wani kauye kusa da Samarkand, bayan an kore shi daga garinsu na Bukhara.

keyAchievements.title: Sahih al-Bukhari
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta tarin hadisai wadanda musulmai Sunni ke kallo a matsayin littafi mafi inganci bayan Alkur'ani.

keyAchievements.title: Majagaba na Binciken Hadisi
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar kuma ya aiwatar da tsari mai tsanani ('ilm al-rijal) don tabbatar da ingancin hadisai ta hanyar bincikar tarihin rayuwa da amincin masu ruwaito hadisan.

keyAchievements.title: Babban Ilimi
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta wasu manyan ayyuka a kan hadisi da kuma shari'ar Musulunci, kamar 'Al-Adab al-Mufrad'.

faq.question: Menene hadisi?
faq.answer: Hadisi shi ne labari na zantuka, ayyuka, ko amincewa ta shiru na Annabin Musulunci Muhammad. Su ne babban tushen dokar Musulunci da jagorancin dabi'u, na biyu bayan Alkur'ani.

faq.question: Me yasa 'Sahih al-Bukhari' yake da matukar mahimmanci?
faq.answer: Ana kallon sa a matsayin tarin hadisai mafi inganci saboda tsauraran dokokin Imam al-Bukhari na shigar da hadisi. Ya bukaci cikakken sarkar masu ruwaito hadisi wadanda za a iya amincewa da su kuma sun hadu da juna, wanda hakan ya wuce sauran masu tara hadisai.

faq.question: Me yasa aka kore shi?
faq.answer: An kore shi ne sakamakon sabanin addini da kuma kishin sana'a. Wani malamin kishiyarsa a Nishapur ya kalubalanci matsayinsa a kan ko karanta Alkur'ani halitta ce, wani batu mai matukar hadari. Wannan ya sa sarkin Bukhara ya bukaci a koya masa ilimi na musamman, wanda al-Bukhari ya ki amincewa, wanda hakan ya kai ga gudun hijirarsa na karshe.

timeline.event: An haife shi a kwarin Fergana, Transoxiana (Uzbekistan ta yanzu).
Ya koma Baghdad sannan ya fara aiki a House of Wisdom karkashin goyon bayan Caliph al-Ma'mun.
Ya rubuta aikinsa mafi shahara, 'Elements of Astronomy' (Jawāmiʿ ʿIlm al-Nujūm).
Ya shiga cikin aikin auna diamita na duniya a hamadar Siriya.
Ya tafi kasar Egypt don tsarawa da kula da ginin Great Nilometer a tsibirin Rawda, Fustat (Alkahira ta da).
Ainihin shekarar mutuwarsa ba ta da tabbas, amma aiki na karshe da aka rubuta game da shi shi ne a shekarar 861.

keyAchievements.title: Elements of Astronomy
keyAchievements.description: Takaitaccen bayani, wanda ba na lissafi ba, na Almagest ta Ptolemy wanda ya zama littafin karatu a Turai na tsawon shekaru sama da 400 karkashin sunan 'Alfraganus'.

keyAchievements.title: Auna Diamita na Duniya
keyAchievements.description: Ya shiga cikin aikin da Caliph al-Ma'mun ya kaddamar don auna latitude, wanda ya samar da lambar daidai ta zagayen duniya.

keyAchievements.title: The Great Nilometer
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera kuma ya kula da ginin wani babban tsari a Alkahira don auna yawan ruwan kogin Nile na kowace shekara, wanda aka ci gaba da amfani da shi na tsawon daruruwan shekaru.

faq.question: Menene sunan Latin na Al-Farghani?
faq.answer: An san shi sosai a Yammacin Latin da sunan 'Alfraganus'.

faq.question: Shin Al-Farghani masanin sararin samaniya ne kawai?
faq.answer: A'a, ya kasance kwararren injiniya, wanda ya nuna gwanintarsa ta hanyar kera da kuma ginin Nilometer a Alkahira.

faq.question: Yaya tasirin littafinsa yake?
faq.answer: Ya kasance babban littafin karatu a jami'o'in Turai har zuwa karni na 15 kuma ya yi tasiri a kan manyan mutane kamar Dante, Sacrobosco, da kuma Regiomontanus.

faq.question: Ina House of Wisdom take?
faq.answer: House of Wisdom (Bayt al-Hikma) ta kasance babban cibiyar ilimi lokacin Zamanin Zinariya na Musulunci, wadda ke Baghdad.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin dan Grand Prince Vladimir.
Bayan mutuwar Grand Prince Vladimir, yakin neman sarauta tsakanin 'yan uwa ya barke.
Ya kayar da yayansa Sviatopolk a Yakin kogin Alta sannan ya zama Grand Prince na Kyiv.
Ya samar da tsari na farko na dokar Rus' 'Russkaya Pravda'.
Ya kayar da Pechenegs gaba daya a Yakin Kyiv sannan ya zama sarki daya tilo na Rus'.
Ya fara ginin Saint Sophia Cathedral a Kyiv don tunawa da nasararsa.
Ya mutu a Vyshhorod bayan ya raba yankunansa ga 'ya'yansa maza guda biyar.

keyAchievements.title: Russkaya Pravda
keyAchievements.description: Ta samar da tsarin doka na farko na East Slavic, wanda ya kafa ginshikin adalci da oda.

keyAchievements.title: Zamanin Zinariya na Kyiv
keyAchievements.description: Mulkinsa ya inganta ilimi, gine-gine, da rubutu da karatu, wanda ya zama kololuwar al'adu da siyasa ta Kievan Rus'.

keyAchievements.title: Kayar da Pechenegs
keyAchievements.description: Ya kayar da makiyaya Pechenegs gaba daya a shekarar 1036, wanda ya kare kan iyakar kudu ta Rus'.

keyAchievements.title: Hada Hanyar Aure da Turai
keyAchievements.description: Ya aurar da 'ya'yansa mata da kanwansa ga gidajen sarauta na Faransa, Norway, Hungary, da Poland ta hanyar dabarar siyasa.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'the Wise'?
faq.answer: Saboda ya tallafa wa al'adu da ilimi ta hanyar kafa makarantu da dakunan karatu, sannan ya samar da dokar farko ta Rus' 'Russkaya Pravda'.

faq.question: Menene Russkaya Pravda?
faq.answer: Ita ce doka ta farko ta Kievan Rus'. Ta musanya daukar fansa ta kashin kansa da tsarin tara, sannan ta kafa ka'idojin shari'a game da dukiya, laifi, da matsayin al'umma.

faq.question: Me ya faru da Kievan Rus' bayan mutuwarsa?
faq.answer: Duk da gargadin da ya yi wa 'ya'yansa na su zauna cikin zaman lafiya, mutuwarsa ta haifar da rabuwar kai da fadace-fadace a tsakanin magadansa, wanda a karshe ya raunana kasar.

timeline.event: An haife shi, wataƙila a wani kauye a kan kogin Northern Dvina. Rayuwarsa ta farko ba ta da bayanai sosai.
Ya zama sananne a matsayin ataman na Cossack, wataƙila yana da alaka da fashi da kuma dakarun soji na haya a kan kogunan Volga da Don.
Dangin Stroganov sun dauke shi aiki, Yermak ya jagoranci dakarun Cossacks sama da 800 ta Tsaunukan Ural don yaki da Khanate of Sibir.
Ya samu gagarumar nasara yaki da sojojin Khan Kuchum a Yakin Chuvash Cape.
Ya kwace Qashliq (Isker), babban birnin Khanate of Sibir, wanda ya tilasta wa Khan Kuchum gudu zuwa steppe.

Yermak ya tura mataimakinsa Ivan Koltso zuwa Moscow da labarin nasarar da kuma kyautar fatun dabbobi. Tsar Ivan the Terrible ya yafe wa Cossacks a hukumance sannan ya tura musu dakarun soji na karfafa gwiwa.

Sojojin Khan Kuchum sun kai masa hari na kwanto lokacin da yake kafa sansani a wani tsibiri a kan kogin Irtysh. Yermak ya nutse a ruwa, wanda ake zargin nauyin sulken da Tsar ya ba shi a matsayin kyauta ya ja shi.

keyAchievements.title: Cin Khanate of Sibir da Yaki
keyAchievements.description: Yakin da ya yi ya haifar da rushewar Tatar Khanate, wanda ya bude babbar kasa don mamayar Rasha.

keyAchievements.title: Farkon Fadada Kasar Rasha zuwa Siberia
keyAchievements.description: Tafiyar Yermak ta kasance babban mataki na farko na fadada kasar Rasha zuwa gabas, wanda a karshe ya kai ga Tekun Pacific.

keyAchievements.title: Gwarzon Kasa na Rasha
keyAchievements.description: Duk da asalin sa da ba a sani ba sosai, ya zama shahararren mutum a tarihin Rasha da tatsuniyoyi, inda ake girmama shi a matsayin gwarzon kasa da ya fadada kasar Rasha.

faq.question: Shin Yermak dan fashin kogi ne?
faq.answer: Rayuwarsa ta farko ba ta da bayanai sosai, amma tushen tarihi da tatsuniyoyi da dama sun nuna cewa shi dan fashin kogi ne a kan Volga kafin dangin Stroganov su dauke shi aiki. Yafewar da Tsar ya yi masa a hukumance na laifukan da ya yi a baya tana goyon bayan wannan ra'ayi.

faq.question: Me yasa Yermak ya mamaye Siberia?
faq.answer: A farko, dangin Stroganov ne suka dauke shi aiki don kare sansanonsu daga hare-hare na Siberian Tatars karkashin jagorancin Khan Kuchum. Wannan aiki na tsaro da sauri ya sauya ya zama yakin cin kasa da yaki.

faq.question: Yaya kananan sojojin Yermak suka kayar da manyan sojojin Tatar?
faq.answer: Cossacks na Yermak suna da babban amfani na fasaha ta hanyar amfani da bindigogi (muskets). Tatars, wadanda galibi ke amfani da baka, kiban, da mashi, yawanci ba su da ikon tsayawa yaki da harbin bindiga na Cossacks.

faq.question: Yaya Yermak ya mutu?
faq.answer: An kashe shi ne a lokacin wani hari na kwanto da dakarun Tatar suka kai da daddare a watan Agusta na shekarar 1585. Yayin da yake kokarin guduwa zuwa jirginsa na ruwa, ya nutse a kogin Irtysh, wanda ake kyautata zaton nauyin sulken da Tsar ya ba shi a matsayin kyauta ne ya ja shi.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Antioch a cikin dangi na sarakuna.
Ya fara rayuwa ta tsantsani a matsay인 hermit a tsaunukan kusa da Antioch bayan mutuwar mahaifiyarsa.
An nada shi a matsayin priest a Antioch sannan ya fara aikinsa na musamman na yin wa'azi.
An nada shi a matsayin Archbishop na Constantinople ba tare da son ransa ba, wanda ya sanya shi zama babban mutum a babban birnin sarki.
Synod of the Oak ta la'ane shi sannan an tura shi gudun hijira na wani dan lokaci, wanda abokan hamayyarsa na siyasa da na coci suka tsara.
Sarauniya Eudoxia ta sake tura shi gudun hijira a karo na biyu, a wannan karon zuwa Cucusus da ke Armenia.
Ya mutu lokacin wata tafiya ta dole zuwa wani wurin gudun hijira mai nisa a Pityus da ke kan Tekun Black.

keyAchievements.title: Mai Magana da Muryar Zinariya
keyAchievements.description: Zafafan wa'azinsa a kan Littafi Mai Tsarki da kuma dabi'u na Kirista ya ba shi lakabin 'Chrysostom' bayan mutuwarsa.

keyAchievements.title: Malamin Coci (Doctor of the Church)
keyAchievements.description: An amince da shi a cikin Kiristanci na Gabas da na Yamma saboda babban gudunmawarsa ga ilimin addini da koyarwa.

keyAchievements.title: Mai Kare Talakawa
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance mai sukar dukiya da jin dadi na karya, inda ya mayar da kudaden coci don gina asibitoci da taimaka wa talakawa.

keyAchievements.title: Mai Gyara Ayyukan Ibada (Liturgical Reformer)
keyAchievements.description: The Divine Liturgy of St. John Chrysostom har yanzu ita ce babbar ibada da Cocin Eastern Orthodox da kuma Byzantine Rite Catholic Churches ke amfani da ita.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Chrysostom'?
faq.answer: Sunan 'Chrysostomos' harshen Helenanci ne wanda ke nufin 'mai muryar zinariya.' Wani lakabi ne da aka ba shi bayan mutuwarsa don girmama gwanintarsa ta musamman da kuma karfinsa a matsayin mai wa'azi.

faq.question: Menene rikicinsa da Sarauniya Eudoxia yake kai?
faq.answer: Ya yi tir da almubazzaranci da gurbacewar dabi'u na fadar sarki a fili. Sarauniya Eudoxia ta ji cewa wa'azinsa na kai tsaye ne gare ta, wanda hakan ya haifar da gaba mai tsanani da kuma gudun hijirarsa na karshe.

faq.question: Menene aikinsa mafi shahara?
faq.answer: A cikin rubuce-rubucensa da yawa, 'Divine Liturgy of St. John Chrysostom' dinsa har yanzu ita ce babbar ibada ta eucharistic ta Cocin Eastern Orthodox. Har ila yanzu ana yin nazari sosai a kan wa'azinsa da yawa a kan littattafan Littafi Mai Tsarki.

faq.question: Me yasa ya zama sufi mai zaman kansa (hermit)?
faq.answer: Bisa tasirin yunkurin sufanci na farko na Kirista, ya nemi rayuwa ta horon ruhaniya, addu'a, da kuma tunani, wadda aka cire ta daga shagala da sha'awoyi na rayuwar birni.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin Mirza Muhammad Taraghay bin Shahrukh a Soltaniyeh, Persia.
Mahaifinsa Shah Rukh ya nada shi a matsayin gwamnan Samarkand yana da shekaru 16.
Ya fara ginin Ulugh Beg Madrasa (makarantar Musulunci) a dandalin Registan da ke Samarkand.
Ya gina babban Ulugh Beg Observatory a Samarkand don inganta nazarin sararin samaniya.
Ya kammala 'Zij-i Sultani' (Sultanic Star Tables), wani babban tarin taswirar taurari da kuma makalar sararin samaniya.
Ya hau karagar mulki ta Daular Timurid bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa Shah Rukh, wanda ya haifar da lokaci na rashin karko.
Dansa mai tawaye Abd al-Latif Mirza ya kayar da shi a yaki, sannan aka kashe shi kusa da Samarkand.

keyAchievements.title: Ulugh Beg Observatory
keyAchievements.description: Ya gina daya daqun manyan observatories a duniyar Musulunci, wanda ke dauke da katon Fakhri sextant mai radius na kimanin mita 36.

keyAchievements.title: Zij-i Sultani Star Catalogue
keyAchievements.description: Tarin taswirar taurari guda 1,018 mai inganci sosai, wanda ake kallo a matsayin mafi inganci a zamaninsa da kuma na kusan shekaru 200 bayan haka.

keyAchievements.title: Ci Gaban Lissafi
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da babban gudunmawa ga trigonometry da spherical geometry, inda ya auna sine da tangent tables har zuwa decimal guda takwas.

faq.question: Shin Ulugh Beg sarki ne mai kyau?
faq.answer: Mulkinsa a matsayin Sultan na Timurid ya kasance gajere kuma cike da rikici. Kodayake shi babban mai tallafa wa fasaha da kimiyya ne, bai kasance kwararren kwamandan soja ko dan siyasa ba, wanda hakan ya kai ga faduwarsa cikin sauri da kuma kisa.

faq.question: Menene na musamman game da observatory dinsa?
faq.answer: Ya kasance babban cibiyar bincike na gaske, ba wai kawai wurin tsaro ba. Babban makaminsa, watau katon masonry sextant, ya ba da damar auna matsayin taurari cikin inganci da ba a taba gani ba.

faq.question: Yaya aikinsa ya yi tasiri a kan kimiyya ta gaba?
faq.answer: An fassara tarin taswirar taurarinsa kuma an yada shi, wanda ya kai Turai a karni na 17. Ya samar da muhimman bayanai ga masana sararin samaniya kamar Tycho Brahe sannan an kalle shi a matsayin tarin taswirar taurari mafi mahimmanci tsakanin Ptolemy da Brahe.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Flavius Petrus Sabbatius a Tauresium.
Ya hau karagar mulki a matsayin Sarki Justinian I.
Bore na Nika ya barke a Constantinople sannan an murkushe shi da karfi.
An tattara kuma an buga Corpus Juris Civilis (Body of Civil Law).
Kwamanda Belisarius ya sake kwace Arewacin Afirka daga hannun Vandals.
An kebe Hagia Sophia da aka sake gina ta a Constantinople.
Cutar yaduwa ta Justinian (Plague of Justinian) ta fara, wata cutar yaduwa da ta lalata mutanen daular.
Yakin Gothic ya zo karshe, inda Byzantium ke da ikon Italiya bayan dogon yaki na lalacewa.
Mutuwar Justinian I a Constantinople.

keyAchievements.title: Corpus Juris Civilis
keyAchievements.description: Babban tsarin tattara duk wata doka ta Roma, wanda ya zama ginshikin tsarin dokar gida (civil law) na yanzu a daukacin duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Renovatio imperii Romanorum
keyAchievements.description: Gagarumin shirin na 'maido da Daula', wanda ya kai ga sake kwace sassa na Daular Roma ta Yamma.

keyAchievements.title: Tsarin Gine-gine
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da umarnin gina coci-coci da gine-gine na gida daruruwan a daukacin daular, musamman Hagia Sophia a Constantinople.

faq.question: Shin da gaske ne Justinian sarki ne na 'Roma'?
faq.answer: E. Shi ne sarkin Daular Roma ta Gabas (Byzantium), wadda take zama ci gaba na kai tsaye na Daular Roma. Harshensa na gida shi ne Latin, kuma ya kalli kansa a matsayin magaji na gaskiya na Caesars, wanda ya sadaukar da kansa don maido da yankunan daular da aka rasa.

faq.question: Menene Bore na Nika?
faq.answer: Wani babban boren birni ne a shekarar 532 AD, wanda kungiyoyin tseren dawakai (Blues da Greens) suka kaddamar da shi, wanda ya sauya ya zama bore yaki da manyan haraji da manufofin Justinian. Ya kusan tilasta masa gudu amma an murkushe shi da karfi, wanda ya haifar da mutuwar mutane dubu da dama.

faq.question: Yaya tasirin matarsa Theodora yake?
faq.answer: Sosai da sosai. Ta fito daga dangi talaka, ta zama mai ba shi shawara mai aminci da kuma abokiyar mulki. Kin guduwa da ta yi lokacin bore na Nika shi ne ya kare mulkinsa, kuma ta yi tasiri sosai a kan manufofin addini da na al'umma, musamman wadanda suka shafi mata.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Moscow ga Grand Prince Vasily II.
Ya hau karagar mulki a matsayin Grand Prince na Moscow.
Ya kayar da sojojin Novgorod Republic a Yakin kogin Shelon.
Ya hada Novgorod Republic a hukumance, wanda ya kawo karshen 'yancinta.
The Great Stand a kan kogin Ugra, wanda ke nuna karshen mulkin Mongol-Tatar a kan Rasha.
Ya mallaki Lardin Tver, abokin hamayyarsa na karshe mai girma na Rasha.
Ya kaddamar da Sudebnik, sabuwar dokar kasa ga kasa dunkulalliya.
Ya mutu a Moscow, inda ya bar kasa mai babban fadada da kuma tsari a tsakiya ga dansa, Vasily III.

keyAchievements.title: Tattara Kasashen Rasha
keyAchievements.description: Ya ninka yankin Moscow fiye da sau uku ta hanyar mallakar larduna masu hamayya kamar Novgorod da Tver.

keyAchievements.title: Karshen Mulkin Mongol
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi nasarar kawar da ikon Golden Horde bayan The Great Stand a kan kogin Ugra a shekarar 1480.

keyAchievements.title: Tsara Iko a Tsakiya
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa Sudebnik na shekarar 1497, sabuwar doka wadda ta daidaita shari'a sannan ta karfafa ikon Grand Prince.

keyAchievements.title: Gadon Gine-gine
keyAchievements.description: Ya kula da sake gina Moscow Kremlin, inda ya gayyaci masu kera gine-gine na Italiya don gina sabbin coci-coci da fadoji.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Mai Girma'?
faq.answer: Ana kiran sa 'Mai Girma' saboda muhimmiyar rawarsa wajen kawo karshen mulkin Mongol na tsawon shekaru sama da 200 da kuma hada lardunan Rasha daban-daban ya zama kasa guda mai karfi, wanda ya kafa ginshikin kasar Rasha ta zamani.

faq.question: Menene The Great Stand a kan kogin Ugra?
faq.answer: Ya kasance tsayawar soja a shekarar 1480 tsakanin dakarun Ivan III da Golden Horde. Kin janyewa ko biyan kyaututtuka na Ivan, wanda ya kai ga janyewar Horde, ya nuna 'yancin Muscovy gaba daya.

faq.question: Yaya auren sa da Sophia Palaiologina ya shafi Rasha?
faq.answer: Auren sa da yar uwar sarkin Byzantine na karshe, Sophia Palaiologina, ya kawo al'adun fadar Byzantine, lakabin 'Tsar' (Caesar), da kuma tambarin gaggafa mai kai biyu zuwa Moscow, wanda ya karfafa ikirarin Moscow a matsayin magajin ruhaniya da na siyasa na Daular Byzantine ('Roma ta Uku').

faq.question: Menene Sudebnik na shekarar 1497?
faq.answer: Doka ce wadda Ivan III ya gabatar don samar da tsarin shari'a iri daya a daukacin kasashensa da aka hada. Ta daidaita tsarin shari'a sannan ta karfafa ikon gwamnati ta tsakiya.

timeline.event: Ya zama Grand Prince na Moscow yana da shekaru uku.
An nada shi sarki a matsayin 'Tsar of All Russia' na farko.
Ya ci Khanate of Kazan da yaki.
Ya ci Khanate of Astrakhan da yaki.
Matarsa Anastasia Romanovna ta mutu, wanda ya nuna sauyi a cikin halayensa.
Ya kafa Oprichnina, lokacin zalunci na daukacin mutane.
Ya jagoranci kisan kiyashi na Novgorod.
Ya kashe dansa na farko kuma magaji Ivan Ivanovich a cikin fushi.
Ya mutu, inda ya bar karagar mulki ga dansa mai karanci shekaru kuma maras dacewa Feodor.

keyAchievements.title: Tsar of All Russia na Farko
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne sarki na farko na Muscovite da ya karbi lakabin Tsar a hukumance, wanda ya daukaka matsayin Rasha a duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Cin Kazan da Astrakhan da Yaki
keyAchievements.description: Yakokin soja da ya yi sun yi nasarar mallakar Tatar khanates, wanda ya kare daukacin kogin Volga ga Rasha sannan ya bude hanya don fadadawa zuwa gabas.

keyAchievements.title: Tsara Kasar Rasha a Tsakiya
keyAchievements.description: Ta hanyar gyaran shari'a (Sudebnik na 1550) da kuma murkushe sarakunan boyar da karfi, ya karfafa ikonsa sannan ya kafa ginshikin mulkin kama-karya na Rasha.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'the Terrible'?
faq.answer: Lakabin Rasha 'Grozny' (Грозный) ya fi dacewa a fassara shi da 'mai ban tsoro' ko 'mai ban mamaki.' Yana nuna ikonsa da karfinsa, kodayake ayyukansa na baya na zalunci sun sa fassaran Turanci 'the Terrible' ta kasance.

faq.question: Menene Oprichnina?
faq.answer: Oprichnina ta kasance manufar kasa da yanki (1565-1572) inda Ivan IV ya yi mulki kai-tsaye, ta hanyar amfani da masu tsaron lafiyarsa na kashin kansa (the Oprichniki) don kashe wadanda yake kallon su a matsayin maciya amana, musamman sarakunan boyar.

faq.question: Shin da gaske ne ya kashe dansa?
faq.answer: Mafi yawan bayanan tarihi, wadanda ke da goyon baya daga tushen lokacin da kuma hujjojin baya, sun tabbatar da cewa Ivan ya daki dansa Ivan Ivanovich da sanda mai nuni lokacin da suke tattaunawa ta fushi, wanda ya haifar da rauni na mutuwa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Mazepyntsi, kusa da Bila Tserkva, wanda a lokacin yake zama bangaren Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth.
An zabe shi a matsayin Hetman na Zaporizhian Host na Hagu na Ukraine.
Ya yi mulki a matsayin Hetman, a farko a matsayin mai biyayya ga Tsar Peter the Great na Rasha, sannan ya zama babban mai tallafa wa fasaha da al'adu.
Ya hada Left-bank da Right-bank na Ukraine na wani lokaci karkashin mulkinsa yayin boren yaki da Poland.
Ya kulla kawance a asiri da Charles XII na Sweden yaki da Peter the Great lokacin Great Northern War.
Ya fuskanci babban kashi tare da Swedes a Yakin Poltava.
Ya mutu a gudun hijira a Bendery (Tighina), wanda a lokacin yake zama bangaren Daular Usmaniyya.

keyAchievements.title: Tallafawa Al'adu
keyAchievements.description: Ya dauki nauyin ginin coci-coci da cibiyoyin ilimi da dama a cikin salon 'Mazepa Baroque', wanda ya inganta farfadowar al'adu.

keyAchievements.title: Kokarin Hadin Kai
keyAchievements.description: A shekarar 1704, ya hada mafi yawan kasashen Ukraine (Left-bank da Right-bank na Ukraine) karkashin mulkinsa a karon farko a cikin shekaru da dama.

keyAchievements.title: Alamar 'Yancin Kai
keyAchievements.description: Rabuwar sa da Rasha ta mayar da shi alama mai karfi da dorewa ta yakin neman 'yancin kasa na Ukraine.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kallon Mazepa a matsayin maciya amana a Rasha amma gwarzo a Ukraine?
faq.answer: A Rasha, ana kallon sa a matsayin maciya amana saboda karya rantsuwar aminci ga Tsar Peter the Great. A Ukraine, ana girmama shi sosai a matsayin gwarzon kasa wanda ya yi yunkurin jaruntaka don samun 'yanci daga ikon Rasha.

faq.question: Menene 'Mazepa Baroque'?
faq.answer: Salo ne na musamman na tsarin gine-ginen Ukrainian Baroque wanda ya bunkasa a karshen karni na 17 da farkon karni na 18. An sanya masa sunan Mazepa saboda gagarumin goyon bayansa ga ginin coci da fasaha lokacin mulkinsa a matsayin Hetman.

faq.question: Me ya faru bayan Yakin Poltava?
faq.answer: Bayan babban kashi da suka samu, Mazepa da Charles XII sun gudu zuwa Daular Usmaniyya don neman tsari. Mazepa ya mutu jim kadan bayan haka a birnin Bendery. Peter the Great ya takaita ikon cin gashin kai na Hetmanate sosai, wanda ya tsananta ikon Rasha a kan Ukraine.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Nahuievychi, Lardin Galicia da Lodomeria (Ukraine ta yanzu).
Ya shiga Jami'ar Lviv sannan ya fara buga ayyukansa na farko na adabi.
An kama shi a karon farko saboda ayyukan gurguzu da kuma kasancewa memba na kungiyar sirri.
Ya hada hannu wajen kafa Ruthenian-Ukrainian Radical Party, jam'iyyar siyasa ta farko ta zamani a Ukraine.
Ya kare takardar bincikensa ta digirin digirgir (PhD) 'Barlaam and Josaphat' a Jami'ar Vienna.
Ya buga wakarsa ta tarihi ta falsafa 'Moses' (Мойсей), wadda take zama ginshikin gadonsa na adabi.
An ba da shawarar sunansa don kyautar Nobel Prize in Literature.
Ya mutu a Lviv yana da shekaru 59, a matsayin talaka amma ana girmama shi a matsayin gwarzon kasa.

keyAchievements.title: Babban Rubuce-rubucen Adabi
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta ayyuka sama da 6,000, ciki har da waka, zantuka, wasannin kwaikwayo, da kuma fassara, wanda ya tsara adabin Ukraine na zamani sosai.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan Siyasa
keyAchievements.description: Ya hada hannu wajen kafa jam'iyyar siyasa ta farko ta zamani a Ukraine sannan ya goyi bayan gurguzu da kuma hakkin kasa na Ukraine akai-akai.

keyAchievements.title: Gudunmawar Ilimi
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta manyan ayyukan ilimi a kan tarihi, al'adu, da kuma sukar adabi, inda ya sami digirin digirgir (PhD) daga Jami'ar Vienna.

keyAchievements.title: Kwararren Mai Fassara
keyAchievements.description: Ya fassara ayyukan marubuta kusan 200 daga harsuna 14 zuwa harshen Ukraine, ciki har da ayyukan Shakespeare, Goethe, da kuma Dante.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Kameniar'?
faq.answer: Yana nufin 'Makerin Dutse' (The Stone-Breaker) a harshen Ukraine, wanda ya fito daga shahararriyar wakarsa mai wannan sunan. Yana nuna alamar aikin rayuwarsa na fasa duwatsu na zalunci don samar da hanyar 'yanci ga mutanensa.

faq.question: Shin ya taba zama farfesa?
faq.answer: Duk da cewa ya sami digirin digirgir (PhD) kuma ya kware sosai, hukumomin Austro-Hungarian sun dakatar da nada shi a matsayin farfesa a Jami'ar Lviv saboda ayyukansa na siyasa na gurguzu da na goyon bayan Ukraine.

faq.question: Shin ya lashe kyautar Nobel?
faq.answer: An ba da shawarar sunansa don kyautar Nobel Prize in Literature a karshen shekarar 1915, kuma an girmama takararsa sosai. Sai dai, ya mutu a watan Mayu shekarar 1916 kafin kwamitin ya yanke shawara, kuma ba a bayyar da kyautar bayan mutuwa.

faq.question: Yaya alakar sa take da Daular Rasha?
faq.answer: Ya kasance mai sukar mulkin kama-karya na Rasha na tsarist da kuma manufofinsa na zalunci yaki da harshe da al'adun Ukraine. Galibi ana hana ayyukansa a cikin Daular Rasha.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Avcıköy, Crimea, Daular Rasha.
Ya tafi Paris, inda ra'ayoyin 'yanci na Faransa da na gurguzu suka shafe shi.
Yunkurin farko don samun izini daga gwamnatin Rasha don buga jarida da harshen Turkic, amma aka hana shi.
Ya yi nasarar kafa jaridar Terciman (The Interpreter) a Bakhchysarai, wadda ta zama muryar masana na Turkic.
Ya kafa makarantar 'Sabuwar Hanya' (Usul-i Jadid) a Bakhchysarai, wanda ya kaddamar da gyaran iliminsa.
An zabe shi a matsayin shugaban First All-Russian Muslim Congress, wani babban mataki na tsara ayyukan siyasa na Musulmai a cikin daular.
Ya mutu a Bakhchysarai, Crimea, inda ya bar gadon gyara da wayewa.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Terciman
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa jarida ta farko ta harshen Turkic a Rasha, wadda ta zama babban makami na sadarwa da gyare-gyare a tsakanin mutanen Turkic na tsawon shekaru sama da 35.

keyAchievements.title: Tafiyar Jadid (The Jadid Movement)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kaddamar da gyaran ilimi ('Sabuwar Hanya') wanda ya shigo da darussa na zamani da kuma hanyoyin koyarwa na zamani a cikin makarantun Musulmai a daukacin Daular Rasha.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da Harshen Pan-Turkic
keyAchievements.description: Ya goyi bayan kuma ya samar da harshen Turkic mai sauki kuma na gama gari, bisa Ottoman Turkish, don samar da hadin kai tsakanin kungiyoyin da ke magana da harshen Turkic daban-daban.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar 'Jadid'?
faq.answer: 'Jadid' ya fito ne da kalmar Larabci na 'sabuwa' (jadīd). Tafiyar, watau Jadidism, ta ginu ne a kan 'sabuwar hanya' (usul-i jadid) ta ilimi wadda Gasprinsky ya goyi baya.

faq.question: Me yasa aka kira jaridarsa Terciman (The Interpreter)?
faq.answer: Sunan yana nuna manufarta: don 'fassara' duniyar zamani ga mutanen Turkic na Daular Rasha sannan ta kasance gadar sadarwa tsakanin al'adun Rasha da na Turkic.

faq.question: Shin Gasprinsky yana yaki da Musulunci ne?
faq.answer: A'a, shi musulmi ne nagari. Ya yi imanin cewa Musulunci yana tafiya da zamani kuma ya bayyana cewa rashin ilimi ne, ba wai bangaskiya ba, ya jawo rashin ci gaban mutanensa. Burinsa shi ne ya gyara kuma ya zamanantar da al'ummar musulmi, ba wai ya bar addininsa ba.

faq.question: Menene shahararren taken Gasprinsky?
faq.answer: Takensa shi ne 'Dilde, fikirde, işte birlik,' wanda ke nufin 'Hadin kai a harshe, tunani, da aiki.' Yana nuna hangen nesansa na dunkulewar duniyar Turkic da ci gabanta.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Kashan, Persia (Iran ta yanzu).
Ya lura da husufin wata a Kashan, wanda daga baya ya yi amfani da shi don auna lissafinsa.
Ya kammala aikinsa 'Sullam al-Sama' ('The Stairway of Heaven') a kan girma da nisan taurari.
Yarima Ulugh Beg ya gayyace shi don ya shiga cibiyar kimiyya a Samarkand.
Ya kammala 'The Treatise on the Circumference', inda ya auna 2π zuwa sexagesimal digits guda 9, wanda daidai yake da decimal guda 16.
Ya kammala babban littafinsa, 'Miftah al-Hisab' ('The Key to Arithmetic'), wanda ke bayyana amfani da decimal fractions.
Ya mutu a Samarkand, a cikin yanayi da har yanzu masana tarihi ke yin muhawara a kai.

keyAchievements.title: Auna Pi
keyAchievements.description: Ya auna darajar pi zuwa decimal guda 16, wanda ya zama tarihin duniya da ya tsaya na kusan shekaru 180.

keyAchievements.title: Decimal Fractions
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara kuma ya bayyana lissafin decimal fractions a cikin littafinsa 'The Key to Arithmetic', wanda ya zama da matukar mahimmanci ga makomar lissafi.

keyAchievements.title: Dokar Cosines (Law of Cosines)
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da takamaiman bayani na dokar cosines a cikin tsari mai dacewa don triangulation a cikin taswirar sararin samaniyarsa.

keyAchievements.title: Makaman Sararin Samaniya
keyAchievements.description: Ya kirkiro 'Plate of Conjunctions', wata kwamfuta ta analog don tantance lokacin rana da matsayin taurari.

faq.question: Shin da gaske ne ya kirkiro decimal point?
faq.answer: Kodayake bai kirkiro alamar kanta ba, ya samar kuma ya tsara lissafin decimal fractions, wani babban mataki ga lissafi na zamani.

faq.question: Yaya alakar sa take da Ulugh Beg?
faq.answer: Ya kasance masani mai daraja kuma shugaba a fadar Ulugh Beg da observatory dinsa, kodayake wasu wasikunsa na kashin kansa sun nuna alaka mai sarkakiya da sarki mai yawan bukata.

faq.question: Yaya ya mutu?
faq.answer: Ainihin dalilin ba a sani ba. Yayin da wasu bayanai na tarihi ke ikirarin cewa an kashe shi ne da umarnin Ulugh Beg saboda ya kasance mai fadin gaskiya sosai, wasu kuma sun nuna cewa ya mutu sakamakon rashin lafiya ta dabi'a. Gaskiyar lamarin ta kasance asiri.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin Muhammed Qanapiya a sansanin Kushmurun, yankin Kostanay.
Ya shiga cikin Omsk Cadet Corps, wata makarantar soja ta Rasha.
Ya kammala karatu a Cadet Corps sannan ya fara aikin soja a matsayin aide-de-camp ga Gwamna-Janar na Yammacin Siberia.
Ya gudanar da bincikensa na farko mai girma na ilimi zuwa yank인 Issyk-Kul, inda ya rubuta sassa na Epic of Manas.
Ya gudanar da wani binciken sirri mai hadari zuwa Kashgar, inda ya boye kansa a matsayin dan kasuwa, sannan ya tara bayanai masu mahimmanci na al'adu da na soja.
Ya yi aiki a St. Petersburg a Ofishin Harkokin Waje da kuma Russian Geographical Society, wanda ya sanya shi zama fitaccen masanin ilimi.
Ya mutu sakamakon cutar daji ta huhu (tuberculosis) yana da shekaru 29 a yankin Altyn-Emel.

keyAchievements.title: Tafiyar Bincike zuwa Kashgar
keyAchievements.description: Ya gudanar da tafiya mai hadari inda ya boye kansa zuwa birnin Kashgar da aka rufe, wanda ya samar da bayanai masu mahimmanci na sirri da al'adu ga Daular Rasha.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta Epic of Manas
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance masani na farko da ya rubuta babban sashi na shahararren wasan baka na Kyrgyz (Kyrgyz oral epic), inda ya kiyaye shi ga mutanen gobe.

keyAchievements.title: Uban Kazakh Ethnography
keyAchievements.description: Dinbin rubuce-rubucensa a kan tarihi, al'adu, da al'adun mutanen Tsakiyar Asiya sun kafa ginshikin karatun Kazakh na zamani.

faq.question: Shin da gaske ne shi jikan Genghis Khan ne?
faq.answer: E, shi jikansa ne kai-tsaye ta hynar kakansa Ablai Khan, wani sarki mai karfi na Middle Horde, wanda ya biyo bayan nasarar layinsa zuwa Jochi, dan farko na Genghis Khan.

faq.question: Yaya alakarsa take da Dostoevsky?
faq.answer: Sun zama abokai na kusa a Omsk lokacin da Dostoevsky yake gudun hijira. Dostoevsky ya girmama ilimin Walikhanov da dabi'unsa sosai, inda ya kira shi Kazakh 'mai hazaka' kuma 'mai ban sha'awa' da ya sami ilimin Turai.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Comet of the Steppe'?
faq.answer: Wannan lakabi yana nuna rayuwarsa mai ban sha'awa amma ta kare cikin bakin ciki da wuri. Ya bayyana a matsayin haske mai haske na ilimi, ya haskaka duniya da aikinsa, sannan ya bace da wuri yana da shekaru 29.

timeline.event: An haife ta a cikin dangi mai dukiya a Constantinople.
Ta shiga cikin bride-show don neman auren Sarki Theophilos, inda shahararren musayar magana na fasaha ya faru.
Ta kafa convent (gidan mata na addini) a Constantinople sannan ta zama shugabarta ta farko, bayan karshen zamanin Iconoclast na biyu.
Ta mutu. Ainihin shekarar mutuwarta ba ta da tabbas.
Ana girmama ta a matsayin tsarkaka a cikin Cocin Eastern Orthodox. Ana bikin ranar ta ranar 7 ga Satumba.

keyAchievements.title: Mace ta Farko da aka Sani da ke Hada Kade-kade
keyAchievements.description: Tana daya daqun mawaƙa mata na farko na Lokacin Tsakiya wadanda ayyukansu suka rage kuma masana da mawaƙa na zamani za su iya fassara su.

keyAchievements.title: Marubuciyar Wakokin Coci
keyAchievements.description: Ta rubuta wakoki na coci kusan 50, wadanda da yawa daga cikinsu har yanzu ana amfani da su a ayyukan ibada na Orthodox, musamman shahararriyar 'Hymn of Kassiani' dinta.

keyAchievements.title: Shugabar Gidan Ibada da Mai Kare Bangaskiya
keyAchievements.description: Ta kafa gidan mata na addini sannan ta zama mai kariya mai karfi ga girmama icons lokacin Byzantine Iconoclasm.

keyAchievements.title: Mawaƙiya da Mai Rubuta Epigram
keyAchievements.description: Ta rubuta wakoki sama da 260 wadanda ba na coci ba, ciki har da epigrams da gnomic verses, wanda ke nuna fasaharta da iliminta.

faq.question: Me yasa Kassia ba ta auri sarki ba?
faq.answer: Lokacin bride-show, Sarki Theophilos ya bayyana cewa mata su ne hanyar shiga mummuna (yana nuni ga Hauwa/Eve). Kassia ta mayar masa da martani cewa mata kuma su ne hanyar shiga mafi alheri mai girma (tana nuni ga Budurwa Maryama). Iliminta da jaruntakarta sun sa sarkin ya zabi wata amarya daban mai saukin kai.

faq.question: Menene aikinta mafi shahara?
faq.answer: Aikinta mafi shahara shi ne 'Hymn of Kassiani' (wanda kuma aka sani da Troparion of Kassiani), wanda ake rera shi lokacin Holy Week a cikin Cocin Orthodox. Yana ba da labarin macen mai zunubi wadda ta shafa wa kafafun Yesu mai.

faq.question: Shin Kassia tsarkaka ce?
faq.answer: E, ana girmama Kassia a matsayin tsarkaka a cikin Cocin Eastern Orthodox. Ana bikin ranar ta ranar 7 ga Satumba.

faq.question: Menene Iconoclasm da ta rayu a ciki?
faq.answer: Ya kasance babban rikici na addini da siyasa a Daular Byzantine a kan amfani da hotunan addini (icons). Kassia ta kasance 'iconodule', watau mai kare girmama icons yaki da 'iconoclasts' wadanda ke son lalata su.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Constantinople ga Sarki Manuel II Palaiologos da Helena Dragaš.
Ya zama co-Despot na Morea, wani lardin Byzantine a Peloponnese, tare da yayunsa.
Ya hau karagar mulki ta Byzantine a matsayin Constantine XI Palaiologos bayan mutuwar dan uwansa John VIII.
Mehmed II ya zama Sultan na Ottoman sannan ya fara shiri don cin Constantinople da yaki.
Kewaye birnin Constantinople na karshe da Daular Usmaniyya ta yi ya fara.
Ya mutu a yaki lokacin hari na karshe yayin da birnin ya shiga hannun Ottomans, wanda ke nuna karshen Daular Byzantine.

keyAchievements.title: Despot na Morea
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi nasarar fadada yankin Byzantine a Peloponnese, wani babban nasarar soja da ta gudanarwa ga daular ta baya.

keyAchievements.title: Mai Kare Constantinople
keyAchievements.description: Ya jagoranci kariya ta jaruntaka, kodayake ta gaza a karshe, na babban birninsa na tsawon kwanaki 53 yaki da sojojin Ottoman da suka fi shi yawa gaba daya.

keyAchievements.title: Alamar Sadaukarwa (Martyrdom)
keyAchievements.description: Mutuwarsa a yaki ta sauya shi ya zama shahararren mutum na sadaukarwa ga asalin kasar Greek da kuma addinin Kirista na Orthodox, wanda aka sani da 'Marble Emperor'.

faq.question: Shin da gaske ne ya ce 'Birnin ya rushe kuma ina raye'?
faq.answer: Wannan wata shahararriyar magana ce ta tatsuniya, wataƙila ba ta gaske ba ce. Maganarsa da aka fi sani ta tarihi ita ce ki yarda da ya yi na mika birnin ga Sultan Mehmed II, inda ya bayyana cewa ba nasa ba ne da zai bayyar.

faq.question: Me yasa wani lokacin ake kiran sa Constantine XII?
faq.answer: Wasu masana tarihi suna hada da Constantine Laskaris, wanda kila an nada shi sarki lokacin da aka kewaye birnin a Fourth Crusade a shekarar 1204. Sai dai, Constantine XI shi ne tsari da lambar da masana tarihi suka fi amfani da ita.

faq.question: Shin an taba samun gawarsa?
faq.answer: A'a, ba a taba tantance gawarsa ba bayan yakin. Wannan rashin tabbas ya taimaka wa tatsuniyoyi na komawarsa, musamman tatsuniyar 'Marble Emperor' wanda ke barci yana jiran 'yantar da birnin.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin jikan Genghis Khan.
An shelanta shi a matsayin Great Khan na Daular Mongol bayan ya kayar da dan uwansa Ariq Boke.
Ya kafa daular Yuan a hukumance sannan ya shelanta kansa a matsayin Sarkin China.
An ce Marco Polo ya isa fadar Kublai Khan a Dadu (Beijing).
Ya kammala cin Daular Southern Song da yaki, wanda ya hada daukacin kasar China karkashin mulkinsa.
Ya kaddamar da mamayar teku guda biyu na Japan, wadanda duka biyun suka gaza, wani sashi sakamakon guguwa mai girma.
Ya mutu a Dadu yana da shekaru 78.

keyAchievements.title: Wanda ya Kafa Daular Yuan
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa daular farko ta kasashen waje wadda ta mulki daukacin kasar China, inda ya mayar da babban birnin zuwa Dadu (Beijing ta yanzu).

keyAchievements.title: Hada kan Kasar China
keyAchievements.description: Ya kammala cin Southern Song da yaki, wanda ya kawo karshen rabuwar kasar China ta tsawon shekaru sama da 300.

keyAchievements.title: Inganta Kasuwanci tsakanin Turai da Asiya (Eurasian Trade)
keyAchievements.description: Mulkinsa, wanda yake zama bangaren Pax Mongolica, ya shaida hanyoyin kasuwanci masu aminci da bunkasa kamar Hanyar Siliki, wadda ke hada Gabas da Yamma.

keyAchievements.title: Mai Tallafa wa Al'adu da Kimiyya
keyAchievements.description: Ya inganta fasaha, kimiyya, da injiniyanci, sannan ya yi amfani da hakurin addini, wanda ya ba wa addinai daban-daban damar zama tare a cikin daularsa.

faq.question: Shin Kublai Khan dan kasar China ne?
faq.answer: A'a, shi dan kasar Mongol ne na kabilar Borjigin. Sai dai, ya zama sarki na farko na daular Yuan ta China, inda ya karbi tsarin siyasa da al'adu na China don gudanar da mulki.

faq.question: Shin da gaske ne Marco Polo ya hadu da Kublai Khan?
faq.answer: Kodayake labarin Marco Polo kansa shi ne babban tushen labarin, mafi yawan masana tarihi sun yarda cewa ya yi aiki a fadar Kublai Khan na tsawon kusan shekaru 17, duk da cewa ainihin tsarin aikinsa ana yin muhawara a kai.

faq.question: Me yasa mamayar Japan da Kublai Khan ya yi ta gaza?
faq.answer: Duka mamayar biyu a shekarun 1274 da 1281 sun gaza sakamakon hadakar tirjiya mai karfi ta mutanen Japan da kuma guguwa mai karfi (typhoons), wadda mutanen Japan daga baya suka kira ta 'kamikaze' ko 'iskoki na Allah'.

faq.question: Yaya Kublai Khan yake da alaka da Genghis Khan?
faq.answer: Kublai Khan jikan Genghis Khan ne. Shi ne dan hudu na Tolui, wanda ya kasance dan karanci shekaru na Genghis Khan.

timeline.event: Born in Kyiv, daughter of Grand Prince Yaroslav the Wise of Kievan Rus'.
Ta auri Sarki Henry I na Faransa a Reims Cathedral, wando ya sanya ta zama Sarauniyar Franks.
Ta haifi danta na farko kuma sarki na gaba, Philip I.
Sarki Henry I ya mutu. Anne ta yi aiki a matsayin mai kula da dansa Philip I mai shekaru takwas.
Ta auri Count Ralph IV na Valois, wanda ya haifar da babbar badakala da kuma cire ta daga coci na wani dan lokaci.
Sa hannu na karshe da aka rubuta a kan takarda karkashin mulkin danta Philip. Ainihin ranar mutuwarta ba ta da tabbas.

keyAchievements.title: Sarauniya da Mai Kula mai Ilimi
keyAchievements.description: A matsayinta na daya daqun mutanen sarauta kalilan masu ilimi a fadar Faransa, ta shiga cikin gudanar da mulki sosai, inda sa hannunta ke bayyana a kan takardun hukuma.

keyAchievements.title: Gadar Al'adu
keyAchievements.description: Aurenta ya kafa babban alakar siyasa da al'adu tsakanin Kievan Rus' mai karfi da kuma daular Capetian ta Faransa da ke bunkasa.

keyAchievements.title: Mahaifiyar Sarki
keyAchievements.description: Ta yi nasarar tabbatar da karagar mulki ga danta Philip I, kuma ta hanyarsa, ta zama kakar sarakunan Faransa na gaba.

faq.question: Shin da gaske ne Anne na Kyiv tana da ilimi fiye da na fadar Faransa?
faq.answer: E, shaidun tarihi sun nuna cewa fadar Yaroslav the Wise a Kyiv ta kasance babban cibiyar ilimi. Anne tana iya karatu da rubutu a Old East Slavic, da kuma wataƙila Helenanci, yayin da manyan mutane da yawa na Yammacin Turai, ciki har da mijinta Sarki Henry I, kila ba su da ilimi.

faq.question: Me yasa aurenta na biyu ya kasance mai matukar cece-kuce?
faq.answer: Her second husband, Count Ralph IV of Valois, was already married. He repudiated his wife to marry Anne, which led the Pope to excommunicate them both for adultery and bigamy.

faq.question: Menene gadonta mai dorewa?
faq.answer: Babban gadonta mai dorewa shi ne shigar da sunan Helenanci 'Philip' a cikin iyalai na sarauta na Yammacin Turai, wanda ta ba wa dansa. Haka kuma ana tunawa da ita a matsayin sarauniya mai iko da ilimi wadda ta hada alakar al'adu tsakanin Gabas da Yammacin Turai.

timeline.event: An haife ta a Pskov (kimanin shekara) sannan daga baya ta auri Igor na Kyiv.
Drevlians sun kashe Igor na Kyiv. Olga ta zama mai kula da danta Sviatoslav.
Ta gudanar da daukar fansa na kashi hudu yaki da Drevlians, wanda ya kare da kona babban birninsu Iskorosten.
Ta kafa gyare-gyaren gudanarwa, inda ta kafa hanyoyin 'pogosti' (cibiyoyin gudanarwa) don tara haraji cikin tsari.
Ta tafi Constantinople sannan aka yi mata baftisma a addinin Kirista na Orthodox, inda ta dauki sunan Kirista Elena (Helen).
Ta mutu a Kyiv. Daga baya Cocin Orthodox ta nada ta a matsayin tsarkaka.

keyAchievements.title: Karfafa Iko
keyAchievements.description: Ta dauki fansar mutuwar mijinta cikin rash인 tausayi, inda ta kayar da Drevlians sannan ta karfafa ikonta ga daular Rurik.

keyAchievements.title: Gyare-gyaren Gudanarwa
keyAchievements.description: Ta kafa tsarin shari'a da na gudanarwa na farko a Kievan Rus', inda ta samar da 'pogosti' don tara haraji da gudanar da mulki cikin tsari.

keyAchievements.title: Shigar da Addinin Kirista
keyAchievements.description: Ta zama sarki na farko na Rus' da ta shiga addinin Kirista, wanda ya kafa ginshikin shigar addinin Kirista na daukacin kasar ta hannun jikanta, Vladimir Mai Girma.

faq.question: Shin daukar fansar Olga ta kasance ta gaske?
faq.answer: Kodayake ana iya samun karin gishiri a cikin Primary Chronicle, masana tarihi suna kallon ainihin al'amuran daukar fansarta a matsayin bayyanar nasararta da karfafa ikonta cikin rashin tausayi yaki da kabilar Drevlian mai tawaye.

faq.question: Me yasa ake girmama Olga a matsayin tsarkaka?
faq.answer: Ana girmama ta a matsayin tsarkaka a cikin Cocin Eastern Orthodox da Roman Catholic saboda zama sarki na farko na Rus' da ta karbi addinin Kirista. Wannan ya ba ta lakabin 'Isapostolos' (Equal-to-the-Apostles).

faq.question: Shin ta yi nasarar shigar da danta Sviatoslav addinin Kirista?
faq.answer: A'a, ta gaza shawo kan danta Sviatoslav, wanda ya ci gaba da zama arna. Sai dai, tasirinta ya sa jikanta Vladimir Mai Girma ya mayar da addinin Kirista ya zama addinin kasa na Kievan Rus'.

timeline.event: An haife shi a cikin bauta (serfdom) a kauyen Moryntsi, Daular Rasha.
An 'yantar da shi daga bauta ta hanyar kokarin Karl Bryullov da Vasily Zhukovsky.
Ya buga tarin wakokinsa na farko kuma mafi shahara, 'Kobzar'.
An kama shi saboda shigarsa cikin kungiyar siyasa ta Brotherhood of Saints Cyril and Methodius sannan an tura shi gudun hijira.
An sake shi daga gudun hijirarsa na soja na tsawon shekaru goma bayan mutuwar Tsar Nicholas I.
Ya mutu a Saint Petersburg yana da shekaru 47. Daga baya aka sake binne shi a Ukraine.

keyAchievements.title: Kobzar (The Bard)
keyAchievements.description: Tarin wakokinsa wadanda suka kafa ginshikin adabin Ukraine na zamani da kuma harshen adabi na Ukraine.

keyAchievements.title: Uban Harshen Ukraine na Zamani
keyAchievements.description: Ya daukaka harshen Ukraine na gida, wanda a baya ake kallonsa a matsayin yare kawai, ya zama matsayin adabi mai girma.

keyAchievements.title: Alamar 'Yantar da Kasa
keyAchievements.description: Rayuwarsa ta gwagwarmaya da wakokinsa na juyin juya hali sun mayar da shi alama mai karfi da dorewa ta yakin neman 'yancin kai na Ukraine.

keyAchievements.title: Hazikin Mai Fasaha
keyAchievements.description: Bayan waka, ya kasance hazikin mai zane, inda ya samar da ayyuka sama da 800 sannan ya zama Academician a Imperial Academy of Arts.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Kobzar'?
faq.answer: Lakabin ya fito ne daga tarin wakokinsa mafi shahara. 'Kobzars' sun kasance mawaƙan gargajiya na Ukraine wadanda ke tafiya a kasa, suna rera wakoki na tarihi yayin da suke rera wani makami mai suna kobza. Sunan yana hada shi da wannan tsohuwar al'adar gargajiya.

faq.question: Shin shi mawaƙi ne kawai?
faq.answer: A'a, ya kasance kwararren mai zane kuma mai fasaha. Ya kasance cikakken memba na Imperial Academy of Arts a Saint Petersburg kuma ya samar da daruruwan hotunan mutane, shimfidar kasa, da kuma zane-zane.

faq.question: Me yasa gudun hijirarsa yake da matukar tsanani?
faq.answer: Tsar Nicholas I ya yi fushi sosai da wakarsa ta barkwanci ta Shevchenko 'The Dream,' wadda ke nuna wulakanci ga Tsar da matarsa. Sakamakon haka, Tsar da kansa ya kara tsauraran kalmomin 'karkashin tsauraran tsaro, tare da haramta rubutu da zane' a cikin hukumcinsa, da nufin lalata ruhinsa na fasaha.

faq.question: Yaya ya sami 'yancinsa daga bauta (serfdom)?
faq.answer: Manyan masu zane na Rasha sun gane hazakarsa ta fasaha. Sun tsara caca (lottery), inda suka sayar da hoton mawaƙi Vasily Zhukovsky wanda Karl Bryullov ya zana, sannan suka yi amfani da rubles 2,500 da aka tara don sayan 'yancinsa daga hannun mai gidan a shekarar 1838.

timeline.event: An haifi Tamar ga Sarki George III da Sarauniya Burdukhan.
Mahaifinta George III ya nada ta a matsayin abokiyar mulki da magajiya.
Ta zama sarki daya tilo na Georgia bayan mutuwar mahaifinta, inda ta dauki lakabin 'Mepe' (Sarki).
Sarakuna sun tilasta mata auren sarki na Rus' Yuri Bogolyubsky.
Ta kashe auren sannan ta kori Yuri saboda mummuna dabi'unsa.
Ta zabi kuma ta auri sarki na Alan David Soslan.
Sojojin Georgia karkashin jagorancin David Soslan sun samu gagarumar nasara a Yakin Shamkor.
Dakarun Georgia sun samu nasara a kan Seljuk Sultanate na Rum a Yakin Basian.
Ta taimaka wajen kafa Daular Trebizond a bakin Tekun Black a matsayin kasar karkashin tsaron Georgia.
Tamar ta mutu, inda ta bar masarauta mai karfi da wadata. Daga baya an nada ta a matsayin tsarkaka.

keyAchievements.title: Mace ta Farko da ta Mulki Georgia
keyAchievements.description: Ta zama mace ta farko da ta mulki Georgia da kanta, inda ta dauki lakabin maza 'Mepe' (Sarki) don nuna cikekken ikonta na sarki.

keyAchievements.title: Mafi Girman Lokacin Zinariya na Georgia
keyAchievements.description: Mulkin ta ya nuna kololuwar karfin siyasa, karfin tattalin arziki, da bunkasar al'adu na Georgia a Lokacin Tsakiya (High Middle Ages).

keyAchievements.title: Fadada Kasa ta hanyar Soja da Nasarori
keyAchievements.description: Ta jagoranci manyan nasarori na soja a Shamkor (1195) da Basian (1202), wanda ya fadada tasirin Georgia a daukacin Caucasus.

keyAchievements.title: Tallafawa Al'adu da Addini
keyAchievements.description: Zamaninta ya shaida bunkasar fasaha da adabi, ciki har da wakar tarihi ta Shota Rustaveli, kuma ta kasance babbar mai tallafa wa coci-coci da monasteries na Georgian Orthodox.

faq.question: Me yasa aka kira Tamar 'Sarki' (Mepe) maimakon 'Sarauniya'?
faq.answer: Don tabbatar da mulkinta a cikin al'ummar maza da kuma tabbatar da matsayinta na sarki mai cikekken iko, daidai da kowane sarki namiji, maimakon a kalle ta a matsayin matar sarki (queen consort) ko mai kula mara karfi.

faq.question: Menene Zamanin Zinariya na Georgia?
faq.answer: Wani lokaci ne na tarihi a Lokacin Tsakiya, daga karni na 11 zuwa na 13, lokacin da Masarautar Georgia ta kai kololuwar karfin soja, yankin kasa, da kuma nasarorin al'adu. Ana kallon mulkin Tamar a matsayin mafi girmansa.

faq.question: Shin Tamar ta Georgia tsarkaka ce?
faq.answer: E, ana girmama ta sosai a cikin Cocin Georgian Orthodox a matsayin tsarkaka, wadda aka nada ta a matsayin 'Holy Righteous King Tamar'. Ana bikin ranar ta ranar 1 ga Mayu (da kuma 14 ga Mayu).

faq.question: Yaya alakarta take da mawaƙi Shota Rustaveli?
faq.answer: Shota Rustaveli, mawaƙin kasa na Georgia, ya rubuta wakarsa 'The Knight in the Panther's Skin' lokacin mulkinta. An sadaukar da wakar ga Tamar, yana yaba mata sannan yana nuna dabi'u na jarumtaka na fadarta.

timeline.event: An haife ta a Constantinople ko Cyprus, a cikin dangi na talakawa; mahaifinta ya kasance mai kula da dabbobin bear ga Hippodrome.
Ta hadu da Justinian, magajin karagar mulki, a Constantinople. Ta kasance tana aiki a matsayin actress da kuma courtesan.
Ta auri Justinian. Ya canza doka don ba da damar aurensu, tun da a baya doka ta hana jami'ai auren actresses.
An nada ta a matsayin Augusta (Sarauniya) tare da Justinian a matsayin Augustus (Sarki) na Daular Byzantine.
Ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen shawo kan Justinian ya zauna sannan ya murkushe Bore na Nika, wanda ya kare karagar mulkinsa.
Ta kaddamar da manyan gyaran al'umma, ciki har da dokoki wadanda suka haramta karuwanci na dole sannan suka fadada hakkin mata a saki da mallakar filaye.
Ta mutu, wataƙila sakamakon cutar daji (cancer), a Constantinople. Justinian ya yi alhini sosai gare ta kuma bai sake yin aure ba.

keyAchievements.title: Murkushe Bore na Nika
keyAchievements.description: Kin guduwa da ta yi da kuma jawabinta mai karfi sun zaburar da Sarki Justinian ya murkushe babban boren, wanda ya kare karagar mulkinsa da daular.

keyAchievements.title: Dokokin Hakkin Mata
keyAchievements.description: Ta kare dokoki wadanda suka haramta karuwanci na dole, suka ba wa mata karin hakki wajen saki, sannan suka ba su damar mallakar da gadon dukiya.

keyAchievements.title: Abokiyar Mulki ta Daula
keyAchievements.description: Ta yi aiki a matsayin babban mai ba da shawara ga Justinian da abokiyar mulki ta zahiri, wadda ta yi tasiri sosai a kan manufofin daula, addini, da na waje.

keyAchievements.title: Tallafawa Miaphysites
keyAchievements.description: Duk da cewa addinin kasa na hukumance shi ne Chalcedonian Christianity, ta yi amfani da ikonta don kare da tallafa wa al'ummar Miaphysite, wadanda ake kallo a matsayin bidi'a.

faq.question: Shin da gaske ne Theodora actress ce da kuma courtesan?
faq.answer: E, masanin tarihin lokacin Procopius ya rubuta game da rayuwarta ta farko a cikin 'Secret History' dinsa. Kodayake ana kallon labarinsa a matsayin na gaba da kuma wataƙila da karin gishiri saboda dalilai na siyasa, masana tarihi gaba daya sun amince da ainihin bayanai na tarihinta na mai wasa.

faq.question: Yaya ta zama sarauniya idan ta fito daga dangi na talakawa?
faq.answer: Justinian yana son ta sosai. Ya shawo kan kawunsa, Sarki Justin I, ya soke dokar da ta haramta wa manyan jami'ai auren actresses, wanda ya bude hanyar shari'a don aurensu a shekarar 525.

faq.question: Menene tasirinta na addini?
faq.answer: Theodora ta kasance Kirista Miaphysite tagari, reshen Kiristanci da cocin daula ta Chalcedon ke kallo a matsayin bidi'a. Ta yi amfani da babban tasirinta don kare abokan zamanta na Miaphysites daga zalunci sannan ta kafa monasteries, wanda ya yi babban tasiri a kan addini na daular.

faq.question: Shin da gaske ne ita da Justinian sun yi mulki a matsayin daidai da juna?
faq.answer: Duk da cewa Justinian ne ke da babban iko a matsayin sarki, tushen tarihi ya nuna cewa Theodora ta yi amfani da babban iko. An nada ta a matsayin abokiyar mulkinsa a hukumance, sunanta ya bayyana a kan dokoki, kuma galibi tana gudanar da harkokinta na siyasa na kashin kansa, wanda ya sanya ta zama daya daqun sarauniyoyi mafi karfi a tarihi.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Daular Byzantine.
Ya isa kasashen Rasha, inda aka rubuta shi a karon farko a Novgorod.
Ya zana frescoes a Church of the Transfiguration a kan titin Ilin, Novgorod.
Ya koma Moscow sannan ya yi aiki a kan ayyuka daban-daban, ciki har da na Grand Prince.
Ya yi aiki a kan iconostasis na Cathedral of the Annunciation a Moscow Kremlin tare da Andrei Rublev da Prokhor na Gorodets.
Ya mutu, wataƙila a Moscow.

keyAchievements.title: Frescoes na Church of the Transfiguration
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da sabbin frescoes a Novgorod, wadanda aka sani da hotuna masu rai, masu ma'ana da kuma kalar monochromatic.

keyAchievements.title: Makarantar Zana Hoto ta Moscow (Moscow School of Painting)
keyAchievements.description: A matsayinsa na babban gwanaye a Moscow, ya yi tasiri sosai a kan bunkasar salo na musamman na Rasha na zana hoton icon.

keyAchievements.title: Koyar da Andrei Rublev
keyAchievements.description: Ya koyar da Andrei Rublev kuma ya yi aiki tare da shi, wanda yake zama daya daqun shahararrun masu zane na Rasha na Lokacin Tsakiya, inda ya mika masa tunaninsa na fasaha.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'the Greek'?
faq.answer: Don bambanta shi a matsayin wanda ya fito daga Daular Byzantine (wadda al'adarta take ta Girka) a cikin sabon gidansa a cikin lardunan Rasha.

faq.question: Menene na musamman game da salon zanensa?
faq.answer: Salonsa yana da ban mamaki da kuma nuna asalin kansa a lokacin, inda yake amfani da zane mai karfi da kuma haske na musamman ('hasken Theophanic') don nuna karfin ruhaniya maimakon kwanciyar hangali.

faq.question: Shin ya zana frescoes kawai ne?
faq.answer: Kodayake ya fi shahara da frescoes, ya kasance kwararre na panel icons da manuscript illumination, kodayake ayyukansa kalilan ne suka rage.

timeline.event: An haife shi a cikin kabilar Ashina sannan daga baya ya sami ilimi a babban birnin Tang na Chang'an.
Ya tsere daga ikon Tang sannan ya shawo kan Qutlugh (daga baya Ilterish Khagan) ya yi tawaye yaki da Daular Tang.
An kafa Second Turkic Khaganate; an nada Tonyukuk a matsayin babban mai tsara dabara da kwamanda (Apa Tarkan).
Ilterish Khagan ya mutu. Tonyukuk ya ci gaba da aiki a matsayin babban mai ba da shawara karkashin sabon Khagan, Qapaghan.
Bayan an kashe Qapaghan Khagan, Tonyukuk ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen tallafa wa Bilge Khagan don tabbatar da karagar mulki yaki da juyin mulki.
Ya rubuta nasa rubutun tunawa na bango, daya daqun tsoffin rubuce-rubucen adabin Turkic da suka rage, wadanda aka rubuta su a siffar mutum na farko.
Ya mutu yana da babban shekaru, bayan ya yi aiki ga Khagans guda uku sannan ya tabbatar da ginshikin daular.

keyAchievements.title: Sake Kafa Turkic Khaganate
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance babban mai tsara dabara a bayan nasarar tawaye yaki da Daular Tang, wanda ya kai ga kafa Second Turkic Khaganate a shekarar 682.

keyAchievements.title: Nasarorin Soja
keyAchievements.description: A matsayinya na kwamandan soja, ya jagoranci sojojin Turkic zuwa nasarori da dama yaki da Tang, Kyrgyz, da kuma Turgesh, wanda ya kare iyakokin Khaganate.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuce-rubucen Tonyukuk
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta rubutun tunawarsa na kashin kansa, wanda ya samar da labari na musamman na mutum na farko na kafa Khaganate da kuma babban rubutu na adabin Turkic.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran Tonyukuk 'Bismarck of the Turks'?
faq.answer: This title refers to his role as a master statesman and strategist who, like Otto von Bismarck for Germany, unified his people and forged a powerful empire through political cunning and military might.

faq.question: Shin Tonyukuk ya zama Khagan (sarki) ne?
faq.answer: A'a, Tonyukuk bai taba zama Khagan ba. Ya kasance babban mai ba da shawara, mai tsara dabara, da kwamandan soja (tare da lakabin Apa Tarkan), yana aiki a matsayin mai iko a bayan karagar mulki ga Khagans guda uku na baya: Ilterish, Qapaghan, da Bilge.

faq.question: Menene mahimmancin rubuce-rubucen Tonyukuk?
faq.answer: Suna daya daqun tsoffin ayyuka da aka sani da aka rubuta da harshen Old Turkic ta amfani da rubutun Orkhon. A siffar ta musamman, labari ne na mutum na farko da dan siyasa ya rubuta, wanda ke samar da bayanai masu kima a kan siyasa, dabarun soja, da hangen nesa na manyan mutane na Turkic na farko.

timeline.event: An haife shi kusa da Kesh (Shahrisabz ta yanzu, Uzbekistan) a cikin kabilar Barlas.
Ya samu raunuka masu tsanani a kafar dama da hannunsa, wanda ya ba shi lakabin 'Timur mai Dori' (Timur the Lame).
Ya zama sarki mai iko na yankunan yamma na Chagatai Khanate sannan ya kafa Samarkand a matsayin babban birninsa.
Ya mamaye India sannan ya lalata birnin Delhi, wanda ya haifar da lalacewa mai girma.
Ya ci Baghdad da Damascus da yaki, wanda ya fadada daularsa zuwa yamma.
Ya kayar da kuma kama Sultan na Ottoman Bayezid I a Yakin Ankara.
Ya mutu a Otrar lokacin da yake tafiyar soja don cin Ming China da yaki.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Daular Timurid
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa wata babbar daula mai karfi wadda ta mamaye Tsakiyar Asiya, Gabas ta Tsakiya, da sassa na India.

keyAchievements.title: Kayar da Daular Usmaniyya
keyAchievements.description: Nasararsa a Yakin Ankara a shekarar 1402 ta raunana sojojin Ottoman sannan ta jinkirta fadadarta na tsawon shekaru da dama.

keyAchievements.title: The Timurid Renaissance
keyAchievements.description: Goyon bayansa ga fasaha, gine-gine, da kimiyya ya sauya Samarkand ya zama wuri mai kyau na al'adu sannan ya kaddamar da babban yunkuri na fasaha da ilimi.

keyAchievements.title: Murkushe Golden Horde
keyAchievements.description: Yakokin da ya yi yaki da Tokhtamysh sun raunana Golden Horde gaba daya, wanda ya sauya ma'aunin iko a Gabashin Turai da Tsakiyar Asiya.

faq.question: Shin Timur dan kasar Mongol ne ko kuwa na Turk?
faq.answer: Ya kasance dan asalin Turco-Mongol. Kodayake ya yi ikirarin gadon Mongol daga Genghis Khan don tabbatar da mulki, fadar sa da sojojinsa sun kasance na al'adu da harshen Turkic, kuma shi musulmi ne nagari.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa Tamerlane?
faq.answer: Tamerlane siffar Turai ce ta sunan bogi na Farsi 'Timur-i-Lang,' wanda ke nufin 'Timur mai Dori.' Wannan yana nuni ga gurguntarsa ta din-din-din da ya samu daga raunuka lokacin kuruciyarsa.

faq.question: Yaya rashin tausayin mamayar da ya yi take?
faq.answer: Yakokin da ya yi sun kasance sanannu da rashin tausayi. Ya kasance sananne wajen ba da umarnin kisan kiyashi na mutane a biranen da suka nuna masa tirjiya, wani lokacin ma yana gina hasumiya da kokon kansu a matsayin gargadi ga sauran mutane.
